Matthew1:1 Kaarooretap ooreetap Jeso Kristo, weeriitap Daudi, weeriitap Abraham." 
Matthew1:2 Ki sich `Abraham Isak, kosich `Isak Jakobo, kosich `Jakobo Judah ak che tupcho." 
Matthew1:3 Ki sich `Judah Phares ak Zara eng' Tamar, kosich `Phares Hesron, kosich `Hesron Ram." 
Matthew1:4 Ki sich `Ram Aminadab, kosich `Aminadab Naasson, kosich `Naasson Salmon." 
Matthew1:5 Ki sich `Salmon Boaz eng' Rahab, kosich `Boaz Obed eng' Ruth, kosich `Obed Jesse," 
Matthew1:6 kosich `Jesse Laitoryat Daudi. Ki sich `Daudi Solomon eng' chepyoset ne ki po Uriah," 
Matthew1:7 kosich `Solomon Rehoboam, kosich `Rehoboam Abijah, kosich `Abijah Asa." 
Matthew1:8 Ki sich `Asa Jehoshaphat, kosich `Jehoshaphat Joram, kosich `Joram Uzziah." 
Matthew1:9 Ki sich `Uzziah Jotham, kosich `Jotham Ahaz, kosich `Ahaz Hezekiah." 
Matthew1:10 Ki sich `Hezekiah Manasseh, kosich `Manasseh Ammon, kosich `Ammon Josiah." 
Matthew1:11 Ki sich `Josiah Jekoniah ak che tupcho, eng' egosyek che ki kagimut piik koba Babilon." 
Matthew1:12 Kingo kagimut koba Babilon, kosich `Jekoniah Shealtiel, kosich `Shealtiel Zerubabel." 
Matthew1:13 Ki sich `Zerubabel Abiud, kosich `Abiud Eliakim, kosich `Eliakim Asor." 
Matthew1:14 Ki sich `Asor Zadok, kosich `Zadok Akim, kosich `Akim Eliud." 
Matthew1:15 Ki sich `Eliud Eleazar, kosich `Eleazar Matan, kosich `Matan Jakobo." 
Matthew1:16 Ki sich `Jakobo Joseph manong'otyotap Maria ne kisich Jeso ne kiguure Kristo. 
Matthew1:17 Ki ek ibinwek tugul taman ak ang'wan kobooch Abraham agoi Daudi; ak kobooch Daudi agoi kamutet ne ki kimut piik koba Babilon ko ki ek ibinwek taman ak ang'wan; ak kobooch ngap kimut piik koba Babilon agoi Kristo ko ki ek ibinwek taman ak ang'wan. 
Matthew1:18 Ki uu ni sigeetap Jeso Kristo: Ye kingo kagogosyin Joseph kotungei ak Maria kametap Jeso, kotomo kotuiyo, kotook keele managaat ineendet eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Matthew1:19 Amu ki chii ne po imanda Joseph sandennyi, kotet Joseph kobagaakta Maria eng' ung'oot amu ki ma mach koteweer eng' taitap piik." 
Matthew1:20 Ago ye kingo ta kobwaati tuguuchu, ogeero, ki mong'ji ineendet malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat eng' karwotitoet kole, “Joseph weeriitap Daudi, ameiywei imutyigei Maria koek osotyondeng'ung' amu managaat ineendet eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Matthew1:21 Tuun sichei ineendet weeriit ak iguure kainennyi Jeso, amu ineendet ne tuun saru piikyik eng' tengekwogikwak.”" 
Matthew1:22 Koyaak tuguuchu tugul si kobiit kosulda ne ki kamwa Kiptaiyat eng' maotyot kole," 
Matthew1:23 “Ogeero, manachi pergeiyat ak kosich weeriit, ak keguure kainennyi Immanuel,” ne ye kiweech ko ni, “Mi Kamuktaindet kobootech.”" 
Matthew1:24 Ki ng'eet Joseph eng' rwondonyi ak koyai ko uu ye ki kang'at malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat, ak ki imutyigei koek osotyonnyi" 
Matthew1:25 nga ma riikyi ineendet kot kosich weeriit, ak koguuree kainennyi Jeso." 
Matthew2:1 Ak ye kingo kagesich Jeso eng' Bethlehem ne po Judea eng' peetuusyek che po laitoryat Herod, ogeero, ki pwa Jerusalem piik che ng'oomen kobunu kong'asiis," 
Matthew2:1 Ak ye kingo kagesich Jeso eng' Bethlehem ne po Judea eng' peetuusyek che po laitoryat Herod, ogeero, ki pwa Jerusalem piik che ng'oomen kobunu kong'asiis," 
Matthew2:2 koteeboti kole, “Mi ano ineendet laitoryatap Yahudik ne ko ki sich? Kogigeer kecheiyandennyi eng' kong'asiis, ak kagibwa kilasu ineendet.”" 
Matthew2:3 Ye kingo kas nooto laitoryat Herod, koaragen kobooto Jerusalem komugul." 
Matthew2:4 Ki kuur `ineendet tisiik che eecheen tugul ak siriik che po piik ak koteepse ole ki kisikyin Kristo. 
Matthew2:5 Ki wolji koleenji, “Ki kisikyi Bethlehem ne po Judah ko uu ye kisir maotyot kole," 
Matthew2:6 ‘Ak inyee Bethlehem, emetap Judah, ma ii ming'in miising' eng' kandoigap Judah, amu mong'unenen pounindet, ne tuun egu mestowotap piikyuk Israel.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Ki kuur anyun Herod eng' ung'oot piik che ng'oomen si kogine kasarta ne kitaagu kecheiyat. 
Matthew2:8 Ki iyookto anyun koba Bethlehem ak ki leenji, “Oba ocheeng' komyee lakweet ne ming'in, ak ye kaonyooru ineendet, obwa omwaiwo si anyo alas ineendet.”" 
Matthew2:9 Kingo kagogas ng'aleegap laitoryat, koba pandanywa ak ogeero, ki indochi icheek `kecheiyat ne kiga kogeer eng' kong'asiis kot koit ak kotonon eng' paragutap ye ki mi lakweet ne ming'in." 
Matthew2:10 Ye kingo keer kecheiyat, koboiboitu eng' poiboiyet ne oo miising'." 
Matthew2:11 Ki pa koot oriit ak ki keer lakweet ne ming'in kobooto kamennyi Maria. Ki ing'uruukso eng' teegis kolas ineendet ak kotyach konoraikwak che po kamanuut, ak kogoochi ineendet kagoochinoichooto po thahabu, tuguuk che nyamdut ak tuguuk che uu igomoik." 
Matthew2:12 Ak ko uu ye kiga kiteechi eng' karwotitoet keleenji amoweekyigei Herod, konam panda koosup ooreet age koba emennywa." 
Matthew2:13 Ye kingo kagoba icheek, komong'ji `malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat Joseph eng' karwotitoet ak koleenji, “Ng'eet, imut lakweet ak kamennyi, mwechi Misiri ak itebee olooto agoi tuun amwaun amu cheeng'ei Herod kobar lakweet.”" 
Matthew2:14 Ki ng'eet Joseph eng' kemoi komut lakweet ak kamet koba Misiri. 
Matthew2:15 Ki tebee olooto agoi kome Herod si kosulda ne ki mwa Kiptaiyat eng' maotyot kole, “Ki aguur weeriinnyu komong' eng' Misiri.”" 
Matthew2:16 Kingo keer Herod kole king'al `ng'oomotik ineendet, konereech miising' ak koyookto kebar lagok tugul che weeriik che po kenyiisyek aeng' ak korek eng' Bethlehem ak eng' tabanwekyik tugul kosuupkei ak peetuut ne kiginee piik che ng'oomen." 
Matthew2:17 Ki isulda anyun eng' peetuunooto ne ki kamwa maotyot Jeremiah kole: 
Matthew2:18 “Ki kegas tuugeet eng' Ramah, riirek ak kateiyet ne oo, riirchin `Rael lagokyik; ma cham kigaigai, amu ma komi.”" 
Matthew2:19 Ye kingo kagome Herod, komong'ji `malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat Joseph eng' Misiri eng' karwotitoet ak" 
Matthew2:20 koleenji, “Ng'eet, imut lakweet ak kamet, ak obe emetap Israel amu kogobek che ki cheeng'ei kobar lakweet.”" 
Matthew2:21 Ki ng'eet komut lakweet ak kamet koba emetap Israel. 
Matthew2:22 Ago ye kingo kas kole pou `Arkelau Judea eng' pounateet ne ki po kwandanyi Herod, koywei kwo olooto. Kingo kagoteechi Kamuktaindet eng' karwotitoet, koweekyigei komoswegap Galilaya." 
Matthew2:22 Ago ye kingo kas kole pou `Arkelau Judea eng' pounateet ne ki po kwandanyi Herod, koywei kwo olooto. Kingo kagoteechi Kamuktaindet eng' karwotitoet, koweekyigei komoswegap Galilaya." 
Matthew2:23 Ki tebee nganaseet ne kiguure Nazareth si kobiit kosulda ne ki kamwa maotik kole, “Kiguure ineendet Nazaretindet.”" 
Matthew3:1 Ki nyo eng' peetuusyechooto Johana kabatisanindet koamdaati eng' surkwen ne po Judea," 
Matthew3:1 Ki nyo eng' peetuusyechooto Johana kabatisanindet koamdaati eng' surkwen ne po Judea," 
Matthew3:2 koleen, “Osigu, amu kagoriik pounatetap kipsengwet.”" 
Matthew3:3 Ni ineendet ne ki kamwa maotyot Isaiah kole, “Tuugeetap chii ne kuursei eng' surkwen, koleen: ‘Ochop ooreetap Kiptaiyat, olitiit ole punooti.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Ki ilaachi Johana sambutap tambeesik, ak ki rategei pireneetap muito, ak amitwogikyik ko ki chereng'endet ak kumyatap timiin." 
Matthew3:5 Ki ng'etyo anyun piigap Jerusalem ak Judea komugul, ak komoswek tugul che neegitee Jordan koba ole mi ineendet," 
Matthew3:5 Ki ng'etyo anyun piigap Jerusalem ak Judea komugul, ak komoswek tugul che neegitee Jordan koba ole mi ineendet," 
Matthew3:6 ak ki kibatisan icheek eng' aineet ne po Jordan, kong'aanyei tengekwogikwak." 
Matthew3:7 Ago ye kingo keer che chaang' che po Pharisaik ak Sadukaik kobwonjin kabatisanennyi, koleenji, “Lagochu po erenook, ng'oo ne ki iteiywok omwee piruutyet ne nyoonei?" 
Matthew3:8 Oii logoek che nyoljin siguunet. 
Matthew3:9 Amat obwaat ole, ‘Ki tinyei kwandanyo Abraham,’ amu amwaiwok ale, imuuchi Kamuktaindet kong'eetyi Abraham lagok eng' koichu." 
Matthew3:10 Agot nguno ko kagiting'e aiywet tigitigap keetiik; kiebei keetit age tugul ne ma iyei logoek che myach ak kewiirchi ma. 
Matthew3:11 Abatisanook eng' peek agobo siguunet; ineendet ne isubwo ko tinyei kimnateet kosiiro, ma nyolu aipchinot kweonikyik. Ibatisanook ineendet eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak maat." 
Matthew3:12 Tinyei eng' eunnyi keibennyi, ak kotiliili komyee rwanyut; ak koyumji nganuuk chogennyi, ak kobeele `meteteek maat ne ma imisoksei.”" 
Matthew3:13 Ki nyo anyun Jeso kobunu Galilaya konyo Jordan ole mi Johana, si kibatisan." 
Matthew3:14 Ago kimachei Johana koeesyo, kole, “Kanyool ibatisana, ago kenyoonjo anee?”" 
Matthew3:15 Ago ki wolji Jeso koleenji, “Cham nguno; amu kanyoljech eng' ooreet ne uu ni kigeesu imanda tugul.” Kocham anyun." 
Matthew3:16 Kingo kagibatisan Jeso, ye kigatogos kityo eng' peek, ogeero, ki yaatagis kipsengwet ak kogeer `ineendet Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet kochoorugei ko uu cheptuget ak kotonoon eng' paragunnyi." 
Matthew3:17 Ak ki mang'une tuugeet kipsengwet, kole, “Ni ko Weeriinnyu, chamanennyu, agasegei ineendet.”" 
Matthew4:1 Ki imut anyun Kabuuset ne Tiliil Jeso kotogosta kwo surkwen si koyoom chesawilyet. 
Matthew4:2 Ak ye kingo kagorugutkei peetuusyek artam ak kemousyek artam eng' let koam ruhebeet. 
Matthew4:3 Ak ki nyo yoomindet ak koleenji, “Ngo ii Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, ing'at koichu koek magatiinik.”" 
Matthew4:4 Ago ki wolji kole, “Siraat, ‘Ma sabei chii eng' magatyat ineegei, ago eng' ng'olyoot age tugul ne mang'une kutitap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Yeityo komut chesawilyet ineendet kwo nganaseet ne tiliil; ki imut kwo kimonjogut ne po Hekaluut," 
Matthew4:6 ak koleenji, “Ngo ii Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, iwiirchigei ng'wony; amu siraat kole, ‘Iyogu malaikaisyekyik agobo inyee: Ak kotaachin eng' eunekwak, si ma rus koita keeldong'ung'.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Ki leenji Jeso, “Siraat kogeny kole, ‘Meyoom Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor neng'ung'.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Ki imut kogeny `chesawilyet ineendet kwo tulweet ne kooi miising', ak koboorchi laitornatosyek tugul che po ng'wony, ak telunateet ne po chooto," 
Matthew4:9 ak koleenji, “Agoonin tuguuchu tugul, ngibutya iloswa.”" 
Matthew4:10 Ki leenji Jeso anyun, “Istegei, Setani; amu siraat kole, ‘Ilasu Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindeng'ung', ak iboisyechi ineendet ineegei.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Ki pagaach chesawilyet anyun ineendet; ak ogeero, ki pwa malaikaisyek si koboisyechi." 
Matthew4:12 Ye kingo kas Jeso kole kigerat Johana, kwo ineendet Galilaya." 
Matthew4:13 Ki wo eng' Nazareth ak kwo kotebee Kapernaum, ne mi ye neegitee araraita, eng' tabanwek che po Zebulun ak Naphtali;" 
Matthew4:14 si kosulda ne ki kamwa maotyot Isaiah kole," 
Matthew4:15 “Emetap Zebulun ak emetap Naphtali, ooreet ne neegit araraita, Jordan pitoniin, Galilaya ne po Pororyosyek," 
Matthew4:16 Piik che ki tebee mesundeito ko ki kogeer lapkeiyet ne oo, ak icheek che ki tebee koreet ne po urwetap meet, ko ki kochoorchigei lapkeiyet.”" 
Matthew4:17 Kobooch yooto kotoi Jeso koamda, kole, “Osigu, amu kagoriik pounatetap kipsengwet.”" 
Matthew4:18 Ak ye kiwendotee ngeguutap araraita ne po Galilaya, kogeer piik aeng' che tupcho, Simion ne kiguure Petero, ak Andrea ng'eetap kamet, kowiirchin regereiywot ne kiname njireenik araraita; amu ki ramiigap njireenik." 
Matthew4:19 Ak koleenji, “Obwa osubwo, si ayaak oegu ramiigap piik.”" 
Matthew4:20 Ak eng' yooto, kobagaach regereiywekwak ak koosup ineendet." 
Matthew4:21 Ki ye kingo ta kowendi eng' olooto, kogeer piik aeng' alak che tupcho, Jakobo weeriitap Zebedayo, ak Johana ng'eetap kamet, komiitei moingetap peek kobooto Zebedayo kwandanywa, konabei regereiywekwak; ak koguur icheek." 
Matthew4:22 Ak ki pagaach moinget ak kwandanywa, ak koosup ineendet." 
Matthew4:23 Ak kiwendoti Jeso eng' Galilaya komugul, koneetisyoti eng' sinagogisyekwak ak koamdaati logoiywek che myach che po laitornatet, ak kosabooti che tinyei korotwek alak tugul ak myanwogik alak tugul eng' piik." 
Matthew4:24 Ara kiyesta ng'aleek agobo ineendet eng' Syria komugul, ak ki kimutyi `ineendet piik tugul che myandos, che ki nam korotwek ak ng'waninwek che teerchiin, che ki tinyei oik, che kitanuitos ak che ki meiyotiin poorwek; ak ki isoop icheek." 
Matthew4:25 Ak ki isup ineendet tuiyosyek che eecheen che ki punu Galilaya ak Decapolis ak Jerusalem ak Judea ak Jordan pitoniin. 
Matthew4:25 Ak ki isup ineendet tuiyosyek che eecheen che ki punu Galilaya ak Decapolis ak Jerusalem ak Judea ak Jordan pitoniin. 
Matthew5:1 Ye kingo keer `Jeso tuiyosyek, kotogosta tulweet, ak kingo kagotep ng'wony, kobwonji kasubikyik." 
Matthew5:2 Ki yaat kutinnyi ak koneet icheek koleenji: 
Matthew5:3 Poiboen che ponoon eng' muguleldo, amu nenywa pounatetap kipsengwet." 
Matthew5:4 Poiboen che aragendos, amu tuun kigoigoi." 
Matthew5:5 Poiboen che talaen, amu tuun punjin ng'wony." 
Matthew5:6 Poiboen che amei rubo ak melelda agobo imanda, amu tuun piyang'dos." 
Matthew5:7 Poiboen che rireegei, amu tuun nyooru ak icheek rireenetapkei." 
Matthew5:8 Poiboen che tiliileen mugulelwek, amu tuun keerei Kamuktaindet." 
Matthew5:9 Poiboen che yaei kaalyeet, amu kiguure weeriigap Kamuktaindet." 
Matthew5:10 Poiboen che kageusaus agobo imanda, amu nenywa pounatetap kipsengwet." 
Matthew5:11 Oboiboi ye churook piik, ak ye usausook, ak ye mwaitaenok yaityet age tugul kong'oochook agobo anee." 
Matthew5:12 Oboiboitu ak ogaaskei miising', amu oo melektang'wong' eng' kipsengwet; amu ki kiusaus ko uu nooto maotik che ki indounenok." 
Matthew5:13 Oo muunyugap ng'wony, ago ngo pet anyinyindap muunyuk, kotagenyoorundo ano anyinyindo? Kobooch yooto koma kotilei kiy, ago ketumda ak kotyegaat piik." 
Matthew5:14 Oo lapkeiyatap ng'wony. Ma kimuuchi keuny nganaseet ne mi tulweet parak. 
Matthew5:15 Ak ma inaami piik tait, ak konde kitonget oriit, ago indoi kiit ne tonone; ak kokweng'ji piik tugul che mi ko." 
Matthew5:16 Ongoluu lapkeiyeng'wong' ko uu nooto eng' taitap piik, si komuuch kogeer poisyonikwok che myach, ak kolas Kwandang'wong' ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew5:17 Moleen ki anyoo abut Ng'atuutyet anan Maotik, ki ma anyoo abut, ago ayai kosulda." 
Matthew5:18 Amu amwaiwok iman ale, agoi kosiirto kipsengwet ak ng'wony, koma siirtoi agot tisyet anan kiy ne ming'in eng' Ng'atuutyet, agoi kosulda tuguuk tugul." 
Matthew5:19 Nooto anyun, chii age tugul ne putei ng'atuutyet agenge ne ming'in kot, eng' ng'atuutichu, ak koneeti piik ko uu nooto, keguure ineendet ne ming'in eng' tugul eng' pounatetap kipsengwet: ago chii tugul ne yaei ak koneeti chooto, keguure ineendet ne oo eng' pounatetap kipsengwet." 
Matthew5:20 Amu amwaiwok ale, ngot koma siir imandang'wong' imanda ne po siriik ak Pharisaik, ko moite pounatetap kipsengwet ne matiny." 
Matthew5:21 Ki ogas keele ki kileenji icheek che po keny, “Amerumisye, ak age tugul ne rumisyei ko kagoriikyi kirwooget.”" 
Matthew5:22 Ago amwaiwok ale, Age tugul ne nereekyin ne tupcho ko kagoriikyi kirwooget; ak age tugul ne leenji ne tupcho, “Raca” ko kagoriikyi kapkirwooget; ak age tugul ne mwaei kole abusanani ko kagoriikyi Gehenna ole mi maat." 
Matthew5:23 Nooto anyun ngigoite kagoochineng'ung' eng' kaptisisyet, ak ibwaat eng' olooto ile ting'enen ne otupche ng'olyoo," 
Matthew5:24 ibagaakte kagoochineng'ung' eng' taitap kaptisiisyo ak iwe anyun ochamyegei korook ak ne otupche, yeityo inyoo igoite kagoochineng'ung'." 
Matthew5:25 Ochamyegei ak punyondeng'ung' kota imi ooreet ak ineendet; si ma imutyin `punyondeng'ung' kirwoogindet, ak komutyin `kirwoogindet riibindet, eng' let ketoorchin korgoreet." 
Matthew5:26 Amwaun iman ale, ma koi imong'u eng' olooto agoi iyaakte sendeiyot ne po let." 
Matthew5:27 Ki ogas keele ki kimwa keele mogesesen. 
Matthew5:28 Ago amwaiwok ale, age tugul ne keerei kobogoryo ak kogase myat ineendet, ko kagogesesen ak ineendet eng' muguleldanyi." 
Matthew5:29 Ngo riichin kondang'ung' ne po tai, ibalu ak iwiirte; kaigai eng' inyee ngo petenen kebeberta agenge eng' poorto kosiir ketoorchi Gehenna poortang'ung' komugul." 
Matthew5:30 Ak ngo riichin eung'ung' ne po tai, itil ak iwiirte; kaigai eng' inyee ngo petenen kebeberta agenge eng' poorto kosiir kwo Gehenna poortang'ung' komugul." 
Matthew5:31 Ki kimwa kogeny keele age tugul ne oonei osotyonnyi, ko ingogoochi anyun sireet ne po peesyet." 
Matthew5:32 Ago amwaiwok ale age tugul ne oonei osotyonnyi, ama eng' sokseet, ko kayai ineendet koegunoot chebaigeiyat: ak age tugul ne ituni kobogoryondonooto ne kigeon, ko kabaigei." 
Matthew5:33 Ki ogas kogeny keele kigemwachi icheek che po keny keleenji, ameyosyechigei eng' lembech, ago yachi Kamuktaindet ne Toroor kayasyosyeguk." 
Matthew5:34 Ago amwaiwok ale, Amoyosye agot kitigin; agot agobo kipsengwet, amu ng'echereetap Kamuktaindet nooto;" 
Matthew5:35 anan agobo ng'wony, amu keldebesaigap keelyekyik; anan agobo Jerusalem, amu nganaseetap Laitoryat ne oo." 
Matthew5:36 Anan iyasye agobo meting'ung', amu memuuchi iyai sumeiyot agenge koleelit anan kotuuit." 
Matthew5:37 Ago ingoek ng'alaaleng'wong', wei ko wei anan achicha ko achicha; ak kiy age tugul ne siirei chuuto kobunu ineendet ne ya." 
Matthew5:38 Ki ogas keele ki kimwa keele konda eng' konda ak keldet eng' keldet. 
Matthew5:39 Ago amwaiwok ale, Amogirinde ne ya; ago age tugul ne irabaachin matandap tai, iweekyi age agine." 
Matthew5:40 Ngomutyin age tugul kapkirwook, komachei korebenen sumeng'ung', ko ingoip ngoryeeng'ung' agine." 
Matthew5:41 Ak age tugul ne pirchinin iwe mailit agenge, obe tuwai mailisyek aeng'." 
Matthew5:42 Igoochi ineendet ne soomin, ametuktoochi patai ineendet ne machei kobesenin." 
Matthew5:43 Ki ogas keele ki kimwa keele cham chiitap kokweng'ung', ak iwech punyondeng'ung'." 
Matthew5:44 Ago amwaiwok ale, Ocham puunikwok ak osachi icheek che usook," 
Matthew5:45 si oegu weeriigap Kwandang'wong' ne mi kipsengwet; amu igoochin asiistanyi kochorchi che yaach ak che myach, ak iyookyin ropta che po imanda ak che ma po imanda." 
Matthew5:46 Amu ngot ochame icheek che chamok, ko nee melekto ne otinye? Ma yaei ak icheek ko uu nooto taagigap aisuruut?" 
Matthew5:47 Ak ngot ogati che otupche kityo, ko koyai nee ne siirei alak? Tos ma yaei ak icheek ko uu nooto Pororyosyek?" 
Matthew5:48 Nooto anyun, oegu okweek che igesunotkei ko uu ye igesunotkei Kwandang'wong' ne po kipsengwet." 
Matthew6:1 Oriipkei si moyai imandang'wong' eng' taitap piik ole si kogeerok icheek; amu ngo yai ko uu nooto ko monyooru melekto kobun Kwandang'wong' ne mi kipsengwet. 
Matthew6:2 Ko uu nooto anyun, ye igoite kagoochinoiguk che po toreteet, ko mat iguutyi igoondit ko uu ye yaei chombilik eng' sinagogisyek ak ortinwek si kobiit kolas piik. Amwaiwok iman ale, kagonyoor icheek melektanywa." 
Matthew6:3 Ago ye igoite kagoochinoik, ko mat konai eung'ung' ne po kaataam kiit ne yaei eung'ung' ne po tai," 
Matthew6:4 si kobiit kobunji ung'oot kagoochinoiguk; ak kogoonin melekto Kwandang'ung' ne keerei eng' ung'oot. 
Matthew6:5 Ak ye osaae, ko moigei chombilik; amu chamei icheek kosaaei kotonondos eng' sinagogisyek ak pesiap oor si kobiit kogeer piik icheek. Amwaiwok iman ale, kagonyoor icheek melektanywa." 
Matthew6:6 Ago ye imache isaa inyee, iwe koong'ung' oriit, ak ye kaiger kurgeet, isaa Kwandang'ung' ne mi eng' ung'oot, ak kogoonin melekto Kwandang'ung' ne keerei eng' ung'oot." 
Matthew6:7 Ak ye osaae, ko mat otes ng'aleek puch, ko uu ye yaei pororyosyek; amu leen kigasyin icheek amu chaang'indap ng'aleekwak." 
Matthew6:8 Nooto anyun amoigei icheek; amu ingen Kwandang'wong' tuguuk che omache, kotom osoom." 
Matthew6:9 Nooto anyun osaa ko uu ni: “Kwandanyo ne mi kipsengwet; Ingoloosunok kaineng'ung'. 
Matthew6:10 Ingonyo laitornateng'ung'. Ingoyaak mageng'ung' eng' ng'wony ko uu ye yaaksei eng' kipsengwet. 
Matthew6:11 Koonech ra amitwogikyok che po kotugul. 
Matthew6:12 Ak inyoiywech kaat lelutikyok, ko uu ye kinyochini kaat che lelweech." 
Matthew6:13 Amemutech ole mi yoomseet, ago sarwech eng' ne ya.” [Amu neng'ung' laitornatet, ak kamuktaet, ak toroornatet, agoi koigeny. Amen.]" 
Matthew6:14 Amu ngo nyochini kaat piik kachiliilutikwak, konyoiywok kaat agine Kwandang'wong' ne po kipsengwet." 
Matthew6:15 Ago ngo monyochini kaat piik kachiliilutikwak, koma nyoiywok kaat agine Kwandang'wong' kachiliilutikwok." 
Matthew6:16 Kogeny ye orugutkei, ko moigei chombilik, eng' togoochik che po arageneet; amu walei togoochikwak, si kogeer piik kole, koirugutkei. Amwaiwok iman ale, kagonyoor icheek melektanywa." 
Matthew6:17 Ago ye irugutkei inyee, iil meting'ung' ak iun togeng'ung'," 
Matthew6:18 si ma keer piik kole irugutige, ago keerei Kwandang'ung' ne mi eng' ung'oot; ak kogoonin melekto Kwandang'ung' ne keerei eng' ung'oot." 
Matthew6:19 Amogonorchigei konoraik eng' ng'wony, ole amei kuutik anan kong'em kutuuk, ak ole putei chooriik ak kochoor;" 
Matthew6:20 ago ogonorchigei konoraik eng' kipsengwet, ole ma amei kuutik anan kong'em kutuuk, ak ole ma putei chooriik ak kochoor;" 
Matthew6:21 amu ole mi konorweng'ung', komiitei olooto muguleldang'ung' agine." 
Matthew6:22 Taitap poorto konda; nooto anyun, ngo myee kondang'ung', ko nyiitaat poortang'ung' komugul lapkeiyet." 
Matthew6:23 Ago ngo ya kondang'ung', ko nyiitaat poortang'ung' komugul mesundeito. Nooto anyun, ngot koek mesundeito lapkeiyet ne mi oriing'ung', ko oo mesundeoto ne tya anyun!" 
Matthew6:24 Ma mi chii ne imuuchi koot kiptainik aeng'; amu imuuch kowech age ak kocham age, anan konamgei ak age ak kosas age. Momuuchi oot Kamuktaindet ak mogornatosyek." 
Matthew6:25 Amwaiwok anyun ale, mogereer met agobo sabeeng'wong' eng' che oame anan che oee, anan agobo che olaachi eng' poorwekwok. Tos ma siirei saboondo amitwogik, ak ma siirei poorto ngoroik?" 
Matthew6:26 Ogeer toriitik che po parak; ma kolsei ama kesisyei ama iyumjin choge, ak kobaei icheek Kwandang'wong' ne po kipsengwet. Tos ma oo koigoi okweek miising' osiir icheek?" 
Matthew6:27 Ak imuuchi ng'oo ne kereri met eng' okweek kotesyi koindonyi kakwautyet agenge ne po euut? 
Matthew6:28 Ak amu nee anyun si ogereer met agobo ngoroik? Obwaat taaptook che po keeweet, ole pititoi; ma poisyei anan koletis," 
Matthew6:29 ago amwaiwok ale, agot Solomon eng' talbistanyi tugul ko ki ma kolumegei ko uu age eng' chu." 
Matthew6:30 Ago ngo laakyin Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto susweek che po keeweet, che mi rani ak mutai kewiirchi ma, ko tos mayaiywok ko uu nooto kosiir, okweek che otinye kayaneet ne ming'in?" 
Matthew6:31 Nooto anyun amogereer met, ole, “Ki ame nee?” Anan, “Ki ee nee?” Anan, “Kilaachi nee?”" 
Matthew6:32 Amu cheeng'ei tuguuchu tugul Pororyosyek; amu ingen Kwandang'wong' ne po kipsengwet kole omokyinigei tuguuchu tugul. 
Matthew6:33 Ago ocheeng' korook laitornatennyi, (ne po Kamuktaindet) ak imandanyi; si keteswook tuguuchu tugul." 
Matthew6:34 Nooto anyun amogereer met agobo mutai, amu kerere met mutaut agobo kei. Yamei peetuut yaityennyi." 
Matthew7:1 Amorwooch, si ma kirwookwok." 
Matthew7:2 Amu kirwooget ne orwoochi ko tuun kirwoogunenok nooto, ak eng' kerutyet ne ogere, ko tuun kigerunenok nooto." 
Matthew7:3 Kalya si igeer petbetyat ne mi kondap ne otupche, ago ma ibwaat pambaniat ne mi kondang'ung' inyeendet?" 
Matthew7:4 Anan imwachindoi ano ne otupche ileenjini, “Inganemun petbetyat eng' kondang'ung',” ye mi `pambaniat kondang'ung' inyeendet?" 
Matthew7:5 Chombilindoni, icheru korook pambaniat eng' kondang'ung', si igeer anyun komyee inemu petbetyat eng' kondap ne otupche." 
Matthew7:6 Amogoochi sesenik kiit ne itabaanat, anan owiirchi toorook sonoegap kamanuut si ma tyech eng' keelyekwak, ak koweekyogei okweek kogereerak." 
Matthew7:7 Osoom si kegoonok; ocheeng' si onyooru; ogonygony si keyatwok. 
Matthew7:8 Amu age tugul ne soomei kigoochin; ak ne cheeng'ei konyooru; ak ineendet ne igonygonyi keyatyin. 
Matthew7:9 Tos ng'oo eng' okweek ne ngo soom weeriinnyi magatyat, kogoochi koita?" 
Matthew7:10 Anan ngo soom njiryot, kogoochi ereneet?" 
Matthew7:11 Ngot ongen okweek anyun nga oo yaach ogoochi lagokwok kagoochinoik che myach, ko tos yaei myeein ne tya Kwandang'wong' ne mi kipsengwet. Tos ma igoochin che soomei ineendet tuguuk che myach?" 
Matthew7:12 Nooto anyun, tuguuk tugul che omache koyaiywok piik, ko kanyool oyachi ak icheek ko uu nooto: amu chuuto ng'atuutigap Musa ak kaneetisyosyegap maotik." 
Matthew7:13 Obun okweek kurgeet ne mariich; amu kurgeet ne paraa ak ooreet ne tebees ko wendi ng'emisyet, ak chaang' che punei nooto kot koit olooto." 
Matthew7:14 Mariich kurgeet ak ko pichiy ooreet ne wendi saboon ak ng'ering' che nyooru. 
Matthew7:15 Oriibegei maotik che po lembech, che pwonjinok eng' ngoroik che po keechiirek nga suik che amei piich." 
Matthew7:16 Onae icheek logoekwak. Tos kesei piik sabibuk eng' katook, anan logoegap mogoonik eng' katook che rutei piich?" 
Matthew7:17 Uu nooto keetit age tugul ne myee, yiei logoek che myach; ago keetit ne ya, koyiei logoek che yaach." 
Matthew7:18 Ma imuuchi keetit ne myee kooi logoek che yaach, amaimuuchi keetit ne ya kooi logoek che myach." 
Matthew7:19 Keetit age tugul ne mayiei logoek che myach keebei ak kewiirchi ma. 
Matthew7:20 Nooto anyun onae icheek logoekwak. 
Matthew7:21 Ma age tugul ne leenjino “Kiptaiyat, Kiptaiyat,” ne itei pounatetap kipsengwet, ago ineendet ne yaei mageetap Abba ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew7:22 Leenjino che chaang' peetuunooto, “Kiptaiyat, Kiptaiyat, tos ki ma kiyai maonateet eng' kaineng'ung', ak keon oik eng' kaineng'ung', ak keyai eng' kaineng'ung' poisyonik che chaang' che po kimnateet?”" 
Matthew7:23 Ak amwachi anyun icheek eng' yooto kotook aleenji, “Mangenok kobooch agoi; oistoenage okweek che oyae yaityo.”" 
Matthew7:24 Nooto anyun age tugul ne kasei ng'aleechuchuk ak koyai, kiyanie chiito ne utaat ne ki teech koonnyi rwandet parak:" 
Matthew7:25 ak ki roobon, ak ki pwa mogoochek, ak kius usoonaik, ak koryep koyooto; ama iluul, amu ki kiteech rwandet parak." 
Matthew7:26 “Ak age tugul ne kasei ng'aleechuchuk, ama yaei, kiyanie chiito ne perber, ne ki teech koonnyi ng'aniek:" 
Matthew7:27 ak ki roobon, ak ki pwa mogoochek, ak kius usoonaik, ak koryep koyooto; ak kiluul: ak kieet luulennyi.”" 
Matthew7:28 Ak ye kingo kes Jeso ng'aleechu, kokwong'yo tuiyosyek amu kaneetisyennyi:" 
Matthew7:29 amu ki ineet ko uu ne tinyei kimnateet, ama uu siriikwak." 
Matthew8:1 Ye kingo choorgei eng' tulweet, koosup ineendet tuiyosyek che eecheen." 
Matthew8:2 Ak ogeero, ki nyoonji chii ne ki tinyei mogondosaik ak kogutung'ji ak koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, ngot icham, imuuchi itiliilo.”" 
Matthew8:3 Ki iito eunnyi ak kotwekyi ineendet koleenji, “Kaacham, tiliiliitu.” Ak kisop chiichooto sainooto eng' mogondosaik." 
Matthew8:4 Ak ki mwachi Jeso koleenji, “Riipkei, memwachi chii, ago ui iboorchigei tisiindet, ak igoite kagoochinet ne ki ng'at Musa, si koek paornateet eng' icheek.”" 
Matthew8:5 Ak ye kingo kagomong'ji Kapernaum, konyonji chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol kogaigai," 
Matthew8:6 kole, “Kiptaiyat, myani otwogindennyu eng' kaa, kasaat miising', meat poorto.”" 
Matthew8:7 Ak ki leenji, “Anyo si asoop ineendet.”" 
Matthew8:8 Ak ki wolji chemogonooto po kiplugotinik pogol kole, “Kiptaiyat, ma nyoljino inyoo koonnyu; ago mwaa ng'olyoot kityo, si kosap otwogindennyu." 
Matthew8:9 Amu aa chii agane ne kiboiywa, ak atinye kiplugotinik che abou; ak ngamwachi ni aleenji, ‘Ui!’ kowendi; ak ngamwachi age aleenji, ‘Nyoo!’ konyonei; ak ngamwachi otwogindennyu aleenji, ‘Yai ni!’ koyaei.”" 
Matthew8:10 Ye kingo kas Jeso, kokwong' ak koleenji icheek che ki isubi, “Amwaiwok iman ale, tomo anyooru kayaneet ne tee ni agot eng' Israel." 
Matthew8:11 Amwaiwok ale tuun pwoonei che chaang' kobun kong'asiis ak cherongo, kobwa kotebi ak Abraham ak Isak ak Jakobo eng' pounatetap kipsengwet," 
Matthew8:12 ye tuun kitoorchin weeriik che po laitornatetap mesundeito ne po saang', ole mi riirek ak nyeetap kelek.”" 
Matthew8:13 Ki leenji anyun Jeso chemogonooto po kiplugotinik pogol, “Ui oldang'ung', ingeyaun ko uu ye kaiyan.” Ak kisop eng' sainooto otwogindennyi." 
Matthew8:14 Ak ye kingo kakwo Jeso kootap Petero, kogeer kametap osotyotap Petero koruei koamei eseet." 
Matthew8:15 Ak kitwa eunnyi, ak kobagaakta eseet ineendet; ak king'eet koboisyechi." 
Matthew8:16 Ak ye ki machei koimen, komutyi icheek che chaang' che tinyei oik: ak ki oon oik eng' ng'olyoot, ak kosoop tugul che ki myandos:" 
Matthew8:17 si kobiit kosulda ne ki kamwa maotyot Isaiah, kole, “Ki nam ineendet nyalulnatennyo ak koip myanwekyok.”" 
Matthew8:18 Ak kingo keer Jeso tuiyosyek che eecheen koga yiem ineendet, kong'at kolanda pitoniin." 
Matthew8:19 Ak ki nyo siriindet age, ak koleenji, “Kaneetindoni, asubin eng' ui tugul ole iwendi.”" 
Matthew8:20 Ak ki leenji Jeso, Tinyei lelwek keriingonik, ak tinyei toriitik che po parak kesonok; ago ma tinyei Weeriitap chii ole indoi metinnyi." 
Matthew8:21 Ki mwachi agenge eng' kasubikyik koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, chamwo korook awo atup abba.”" 
Matthew8:22 Ago ki leenji Jeso, Isubwo, pagakte piik che ki kobek kotup chechwaak che ki kobek." 
Matthew8:23 Ak kingo kagolaany moingetap peek, koosup ineendet `kasubikyik." 
Matthew8:24 Ak ogeero, king'eet usoonet ne oo eng' araraita, kot komaaluuch mildaetapkei ne po peek moinget: ago ki inuuchi ineendet." 
Matthew8:25 Ki pwa anyun kong'eet ineendet, koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, sarwech! Kagibegu!”" 
Matthew8:26 Ak ki leenji, “Kalya si oiywei, okweek che otinye kayaneet ne ming'in?” Ki ng'eet anyun koger kong' usoonet eng' araraita; ak ki imung'do anyun kalunguletapkei." 
Matthew8:27 Ago ki kwong'yo piik, kole, “Chii nee chiichi, amu kase iit ineendet agot usoonaik ak araraita?”" 
Matthew8:28 Ak ye kingo kagoit pitoniin emetap Gadarenes, kotuiyo ak ineendet piik aeng' che ki tinyei oik, kobunu ye mi kereeriisyek; ki koroomen miising', kot ko ki ma komuuchi chii kosiir oranooto." 
Matthew8:29 Ak ogeero, kiwaach, kole, “Kiting'egei nee ak inyee, Weeriitap Kamuktaindet? Kenyo yu inyalilech kotom koit peetuut?”" 
Matthew8:30 Ak ki agete ole ki ma ko neegitee icheek akweet ne po toorook che chaang'. 
Matthew8:31 Ak ki soom ineendet oik, kole, “Ngioonech kemande, iyooktech kechut akweet ne po toorook.”" 
Matthew8:32 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Oba!” Ak kimanda koba kochut toorook: ak ogeero, ki rwai miising' akweet komugul kochoortaegei chemng'eisut koba araraita, ak kobekyi peek." 
Matthew8:33 Ak ki mwei che ki iyagi tooroochooto koba nganaseet ak komwaita kiy age tugul, ak kiit ne kiga keyachi che ki tinyei oik." 
Matthew8:34 Ak ogeero, ki mong' saang' nganaseet komugul kotuiyo ak Jeso: ak kingo keer ineendet, kosoom mat komanda eng' nganaseennywa." 
Matthew9:1 Ki laany anyun moingetap peek ak kolanda koit nganasennyi. 
Matthew9:2 Ak ogeero, ki kimutyi ineendet chiito ne myani, ne meat poorto korue itoogut: ak ye kingo keer Jeso kayanennywa, koleenji ne meat poorto, Weeri, nyiganitu; kagenyoun kaat tengekwogiguk." 
Matthew9:3 Ak ogeero, ki mwa alak che po siriik eng' mugulelwekwak kole, Mwaei chiichi ng'aleek che yaacheen agobo Kamuktaindet." 
Matthew9:4 Kole Jeso, “Kalya si obwaat yaityet eng' mugulelwekwok? Amu ki ingen kabwaatutikwak." 
Matthew9:5 Nee ne nyumnyum, kemwa keele ‘Kagenyoun kaat tengekwogiguk anan keele ng'eet ak iwe?’" 
Matthew9:6 Ago si onai ole tinyei kimnateet Weeriitap chii eng' ng'wony konyochi kaat piik tengekwogik” Eng' yooto koleenji anyun ne meat poorto, “Ng'eet, ip itogung'ung' ak iwe koong'ung'.”" 
Matthew9:7 Ki ng'eet anyun ak kwo koonnyi. 
Matthew9:8 Ago ye kingo keer tuiyosyek, koywei ak kolas Kamuktaindet ne igoochin chii kimnateet ne uu nooto." 
Matthew9:9 Ak kingo siirto Jeso eng' olooto, kogeer chiito, ne kiguure Matayo, kotebee ole kitaage aisuruut ak ki leenji, “Isubwo.” Kong'eet anyun ak koosup." 
Matthew9:10 Ye ki amisyei Jeso eng' ko, kobwa taagigap aisuruut che chaang' ak kiptengeginik ak kotebi kobooto Jeso ak kasubikyik." 
Matthew9:11 Ak ye kingo keer Pharisaik, koleenji kasubikyik, Amu nee si koamisyei Kanetindeng'wong' ak taagik che po aisuruut ak kiptengeginik?" 
Matthew9:12 Ago kingo kas, koleenji, “Ma machei che chamegei chepkerichot, ago che myandos." 
Matthew9:13 Ago oba okweek, si oneetkei ole teptoi ng'olyoondoni, ‘Amache rireenetapkei, ma mache tiseiywo.’ Ki ma anyo aguur che po imanda, ago kiptengeginik.”" 
Matthew9:14 Ki pwanji anyun kasubigap Johana ak koleenji, “Amu nee si kirugutige acheek ak Pharisaik konyil che chaang', ago ma irugutegei kasubiguk?”" 
Matthew9:15 Ak ki leenji Jeso, Imuuchi icheek che kogiguurchi katunisyet koaragenso, kota komi ak sandet? Ago pwoonei peetuusyek, che tuun ki istoe sandet icheek, ak korugutkei anyun." 
Matthew9:16 Ak ma indo chii akwot ne leel ngoryeet ne oos; amu kereri akwot ne leel ngoryeet ne oos, ak koyait kosiir ole kagereer." 
Matthew9:17 Amaindo piik divaik che leelach lolotinwek che oosen: amu kereri lolotinwek, ak kotumdagei divaik, ak kobek lolotinwek: ago kindoi divaik lolotinwek che leelach, ak kotebi tuwai." 
Matthew9:18 Kingo ta komwachin icheek ng'aleechu, ogeero, ki nyo pounindo, ak kong'uruukyi ineendet ak kole, “Kagome cheptonyu nguniito: ago nyoo igonoor ineendet eung'ung', si kosap.”" 
Matthew9:19 Ak king'eet Jeso, koosup ineendet, ak ki isup kasubikyik ak icheek." 
Matthew9:20 Ogeero, kobogoryot, ne kimandae korotiik eng' kenyiisyek taman ak aeng', ki isubu Jeso eng' let, ak kotwa tabandap ngoryennyi:" 
Matthew9:21 amu ki mwa eng' muguleldanyi, kole, “Ngot atwa kityo ngoryennyi, asabe.”" 
Matthew9:22 Ago ki welelgei Jeso kogeer ineendet ak kole, “Chebi, nyiganitu; kagosaabin kayaneng'ung'.” Ak kisop kobogoryot kobooch sainooto." 
Matthew9:23 Ak kingo it Jeso kootap pounindet, ak kogeer piik che kuutei ndurerusyek, ak piik che sololendos," 
Matthew9:24 koleenji, “Oistegei: amu ma me chepto, ago inuuchi.” Ak kirorechi ineendet kochot." 
Matthew9:25 Ago kingo kageoon tuiyet koba saang', kwo ko, ak konam eutap chebooto; ak kong'eet ineendet." 
Matthew9:26 Ak kiyesto ng'olyoondonooto eng' emonooto komugul. 
Matthew9:27 Ak kingo siirto Jeso kwo eng' olooto, koosup ineendet kipkoratinik aeng', kowaagoti koleen, “Rireneige, ee weeriitap Daudi!”" 
Matthew9:28 Ak kingo kakwa ko, kobwonji ineendet kipkoratinichooto: ak koleenji Jeso, “Oyani ole amuuchi ayai niito?” Koleenji, “Wei, Kiptaiyat.”" 
Matthew9:29 Kotwa anyun konyekwak, ak kole, “Ingoyaak eng' okweek ko uu kayaneng'wong'.”" 
Matthew9:30 Ak ki yaatagis konyekwak. Ak ki kergong' Jeso miising', koleenji, “Oriip among' konai chii.”" 
Matthew9:31 Ago ki pa, ak koiyestaat ng'olyoot agobo ineendet eng' emonooto komugul." 
Matthew9:32 Ak ye kita kobendi, ogeero, ki kimutyi ineendet chii ne namaat kuut ne ki tinyei oindet." 
Matthew9:33 Ak kingo kageoon oindet, kotwek ne namaat kuut; ak ki kwong'yo tuiyosyek, kole, “Ki tomo kegeerei ne uu ni eng' Israel.”" 
Matthew9:34 Ago ki mwa Pharisaik, kole, “Oone oik eng' ne oo ne po oik.”" 
Matthew9:35 Ak kiwendote Jeso nganasook tugul, che eecheen ak che mengeechen, koneetisyoti eng' sinagogisyekwak, ak koamdaati logoiywek che myach che po laitornatet, ak kosabooti che myandos eng' koroito age tugul, ak eng' nyalulnateet age tugul." 
Matthew9:36 Ago ye kingo keer tuiyosyek, koriiregei icheek, amu kinyerootiin ak koiyestootin, ko uu keechiirek che ma tinyei mestowot." 
Matthew9:37 Ki leenji anyun kasubikyik, “Oo kesisyet iman, ago ng'ering' kiboitiinik." 
Matthew9:38 Nooto anyun osaa Kiptaiyat ne po kesisyet, si kobiit koyookyi kiboitiinik kesisyennyi.”" 
Matthew10:1 Ki kuur anyun `Jeso kasubikyik taman ak aeng', yeityo kogoochi kimnateet si koon tamirmirik che murwonen, ak kosoop che myandos eng' koroito age tugul ak eng' nyalulnateet age tugul." 
Matthew10:2 Chu kainaik che po che kiyooktoi taman ak aeng': ne tai ko Simion ne kiguure Petero, ak Andrea ng'eetap kamet; Jakobo weeriitap Zebedayo, ak Johana ng'eetap kamet;" 
Matthew10:3 Philipu ak Bartolomayo; Thomas, ak Matayo taagindetap aisuruut; Jakobo weeriitap Alphayo, ak Thadeo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simion kanaanindet, ak Judas Iskaryot, ne king'wektoi ineendet." 
Matthew10:5 Ki iyookto Jeso chuuto taman ak aeng' ak kong'at icheek koleenji, “Amobe ooreet age tugul ne po Pororyosyek anan nganaseet age tugul ne po piigap Samaria," 
Matthew10:6 ago kaigai obe ole mi keechiirek che petyotiin che po kootap Israel. 
Matthew10:7 Ye obendi, oamde ole, ‘Kagoriik pounatetap kipsengwet.’" 
Matthew10:8 Osoop che myandos, oong'et che ki kobek, otiliil che tinyei mogondosaik, oon oik. Kaonyooru puch, ogoite puch." 
Matthew10:9 Amocheeng'jige thahabu, anan fedha, anan sendeisyek eng' lolotinwekwok;" 
Matthew10:10 anan lolet ne po ooreet, anan sumotik aeng', anan kweonik, anan kirokto; amu nyoljin kiboityot amitwogikyik." 
Matthew10:11 Ocheeng' chiito ne nyolu eng' nganaseet age tugul ne oo anan ne ming'in ne omong'jini, ak otebee olooto agoi obe." 
Matthew10:12 Ak ye obe ko, ogat." 
Matthew10:13 Ak ngo nyolu koyooto, ongotebee kalyeng'wong'; ago ngo ma nyolu, ko ingoweekyogei kalyeng'wong'." 
Matthew10:14 Ak age tugul ne mataachok anan kogas ng'aleekwok, ko ye omande eng' koyooto anan nganasanooto, olelekte temburyek eng' keelyekwok." 
Matthew10:15 Amwaiwok iman ale, kaigaitu emetap Sodom ak Gomorah eng' peetuutap kirwooget kosiir nganasanooto." 
Matthew10:16 “Ogeero, ayooktook ko uu keechiirek eng' kwenutap suik; nooto anyun oegu che utaateen ko uu erenook, ak otalaitu ko uu cheptugenik." 
Matthew10:17 Ago oriibegei piik; amu imutyinok kapkirwooget, ak kobirenok kipcharitisyek eng' sinagogisyekwak;" 
Matthew10:18 ak kimutyinok taitap pounik ak laitorinik agobo anee, si koek paornateet eng' icheek ak eng' Pororyosyek." 
Matthew10:19 Ago ye igoitook, ko mogereer met agobo ole ong'alaaldoi anan kiit ne omwae; amu ki koonok eng' sainooto ne omwae." 
Matthew10:20 Amu ma okweek che ong'alaali, ago Kabuusetap Kwandang'wong' ne ng'alaali eng' okweek." 
Matthew10:21 “Ak kong'wekta chiito ng'eetap kamet kong'wekyi meet, ak kong'wekta kwanda lakweennyi, ak kong'eetyi lagok sigiikwak, ak kogoito kebar." 
Matthew10:22 Ak kowechok piik tugul agobo kainennyu. Ago ineendet ne muitoi agoi kagesunet kesaru. 
Matthew10:23 “Ago ye kiusook eng' nganasani omwechi nganaseet age; amu amwaiwok iman ale, mobendi ogesu nganasook che po Israel, ama it Weeriitap Chii." 
Matthew10:24 “Ma siirei ne kineeti kaneetindennyi, ama siirei otwogindet kiptaiyandennyi." 
Matthew10:25 Yamei kotep ne kineeti ko uu kaneetindennyi, ak kotebi otwogindet ko uu kiptaiyandennyi. Ak ngot koguure icheek chiitap ko po koot Beelsebul, kotam nee icheek che po koonnyi!" 
Matthew10:26 “Moiywei anyun icheek; amu ma mi kiy ne tugoot ne ma tuun king'aanyei, ama mi kiy ne ung'aat ne ma tuun naoksei." 
Matthew10:27 Ne amwaiwok eng' mesundeito, ong'alaalde eng' lapkeiyet; ak kiit ne ogase eng' itit, omwaite eng' kooriik parak." 
Matthew10:28 Amoiywei icheek che parei poorto ago ma imuuchi kobar saboondo; ago kaigai oiywei ineendet ne imuuchi kong'em saboondo kobooto poorto eng' Gehenna. 
Matthew10:29 Ma ki aldoe toriitik aeng' che mengeechen kebebertap taman ne po dinarit? Ama ibutyin ng'wony agenge eng' icheek ama chamji Kwandang'wong'. 
Matthew10:30 Ago iitotin agot suumeek tugul che po metowekwok. 
Matthew10:31 Nooto anyun amoiywei; osiire toriitik che mengeechen che chaang'. 
Matthew10:32 “Nooto anyun age tugul ne ibortoa eng' taitap piik, aboortoi agine eng' taitap Abba ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew10:33 Ago age tugul ne eesyoa eng' taitap piik, aeesyoi ineendet agine eng' taitap Abba ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew10:34 “Moleen ki anyoo aipchi ng'wony kaalyeet; ki ma anyoo aipchi kaalyeet, ago rotwetap chok." 
Matthew10:35 Amu ki anyoo atoiye chii ak kwanda, ak chepto ak kamet, ak osotyotap weeriit ak kametap weeriit:" 
Matthew10:36 egu puunigap chii piikyik. 
Matthew10:37 Ineendet ne chamei kwanda anan kamet kosiiro koma nyoljino; ak ineendet ne chamei weeriit anan cheptonyi kosiiro koma nyoljino. 
Matthew10:38 Ak ineendet ne ma ibei kimurtoiyondennyi ak kosubwo, koma nyoljino." 
Matthew10:39 Ineendet ne riibei saboondanyi kobeeti; ak ineendet ne ibeeti saboondanyi agobo anee ko tuun nyooru. 
Matthew10:40 “Ineendet ne taachok ko kataacha, ak ineendet ne taacha ko kataach ne ki iyookwo." 
Matthew10:41 Ineendet ne taachei maotyo eng' kainetap maotyo konyooru melektap maotyo; ak ineendet ne taachei chii ne po iman eng' kainetap chiito ne po iman konyooru melektap chiito ne po iman. 
Matthew10:42 Ak age tugul ne igoochin agenge eng' chu mengeechen agot kigombet ne po peek che kaitit kityo amu kasubiin ineendet, amwaiwok iman ale, ma petyin melektanyi matiny.”" 
Matthew11:1 Ak ye kingo kagong'at `Jeso kasubikyik taman ak aeng' kogees, kwo eng' olooto koneetisyot ak koamdoi eng' nganasookwak." 
Matthew11:2 Ak kingo kas Johana eng' korgoreet poisyosyek che po Kristo, koyooktoe ng'olyoo aeng' eng' kasubikyik," 
Matthew11:3 ak koteebe ineendet kole, “Tos ii ineendet ne nyoonei, anan kiganye age?”" 
Matthew11:4 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji, “Oba pandang'wong', ak omwachi Johana tuguuk che ogase ak che ogeere:" 
Matthew11:5 keertoi che koryotiin, ak kobendoti che salamonik, kitiliili che tinyei mogondosaik, ak kastoi che ming'otin, ak king'eeti che ki kobek, ak keamjin kibananook logoiywek che myach." 
Matthew11:6 Ak paibai age tugul ne ma nyoorunena kanagut eng' ui tugul.” 
Matthew11:7 Ak ye kita kobendi chu pandanywa, kotoi Jeso komwachi tuiyosyek agobo Johana koleenji, “Ki omande surkwen ogeer nee? Tegat ne itumdumi usoonet?" 
Matthew11:8 Ki omande ogeer nee? Chiito ne ilaachi ngoroik che tangusen? Ogeero, icheek che ilaachi ngoroik che tangusen komi kooriigap laitorinik." 
Matthew11:9 Ago kilya si omande? Si kobiit ogeer maotyot? Ee, amwaiwok ale, siirei ineendet maotyot." 
Matthew11:10 Niito ko ineendet, ne ki kisir keele, ‘Keero, ayooktoi kiboityondennyu kondoenen, ne chobei oreng'ung' eng' taing'ung'.’" 
Matthew11:11 Amwaiwok iman ale, tom kobiit ne siirei Johana Kabatisanindet eng' che ki sich kobogorisyek: ago ineendet ne ming'in miising' eng' pounatetap kipsengwet ko oo kosiir ineendet." 
Matthew11:12 Ak kobooch peetuusyek che po Johana Kabatisanindet agoi nguno korwochin piik pounatetap kipsengwet, ak namei piik che koroomen eng' kimnateet." 
Matthew11:13 Amu ki maotenso maotik tugul ak Ng'atuutik agoi koit peetuusyegap Johana. 
Matthew11:14 Ak ngo chame otaach ko uu nooto, ko Elijah niito, ne nyoonei." 
Matthew11:15 Ineendet ne tinyei iitiik che kastoe, kogas." 
Matthew11:16 “Ago aroge nee ibini? Kergei ak lagok che tebyei eng' ole kiyae mung'aaret, che kuurei siritoikwak," 
Matthew11:17 ak kole, ‘Kigeguutwak ndurerusyek, ak ki ma oureren; ki kiteeye ak ki ma oriirye.’" 
Matthew11:18 Amu ki nyo Johana ak ki ma amis anan koeeiso, ak kole piik, ‘Tinyei oindet’." 
Matthew11:19 Ki nyo Weeriitap chii koamis ak koeeiso, ak kole piik, Ogeero, chiito ne kipkeiya, ak eeindetap divaik, chorweetap taagigap aisuruut ak kiptengeginik. Ak naat utaatyet keele po iman eng' poisyonikyik.”" 
Matthew11:20 Ki toi anyun koger kong' nganasook che ki kiyae poisyonikyik che po kamuktaet, che chaang' kosiir, amu ki ma sik." 
Matthew11:21 Pwo! Wee Korazin! Pwo! Wee Bethsaida! Amu nda kiga kiyai eng' Tyro ak Sidon poisyonik che po kamuktaet che ki kiyai eng' okweek, ta kiga kosik keny, kolaach kuniok ak koiilegei oreek." 
Matthew11:22 Ago amwaiwok ale, kaigaitu tuun Tyro ak Sidon eng' peetuutap kirwooget, kosiirok." 
Matthew11:23 Ak inyee, Kapernaum, ko tos kitoroorin agoi kipsengwet? Ichoortoige agoi ye mi che ki kobek: amu nda kiga kiyai eng' Sodom poisyonik che po kamuktaet che ki kiyai eng' inyee, kota mi agoi rani." 
Matthew11:24 Ago amwaiwok ale, tuun kaigaitu emetap Sodom eng' peetuutap kirwooget, kosiirin." 
Matthew11:25 Eng' peetuusyechooto kowol Jeso kole, “Amwaun kongoi, we Abba, Kiptaiyatap kipsengwet ak ng'wony, amu ki iung'e tuguuchu che utaatiin ak che ng'oomeen, ak ki ing'aang'ji manyurunik;" 
Matthew11:26 ee, Abba, amu ki icham inyee ko uu nooto." 
Matthew11:27 Ki kogoono tuguuk tugul Abba: ama mi ne ingen Weeriit, kobatee Kwanda; ama mi ne ingen Kwanda kobatee Weeriit, ak chii age tugul ne chamei Weeriit kong'aang'jin." 
Matthew11:28 “Obwanjo, okweek tugul che oiimige, ak che olae mileet ne nyigiis si amuung'wok." 
Matthew11:29 Otiiny kaat choginnyu ak oneetenage; amu aa tala ak aming'inige eng' muguleldo: si osich kamuung'et eng' saboonwekwok. 
Matthew11:30 Amu nyumnyum choginnyu, ak wisis milennyu.”" 
Matthew12:1 Eng' kasarata, kogiwo Jeso kobun mbareenigap peek eng' peetuutap sabato. Ki am rubeet kasubikyik ak ki toi kobut mesiisegap peek ak koam." 
Matthew12:2 Ago ye kingo keer Pharisaik koleenji ineendet, “Keero, yaei kasubiguk ne ma chamdaat eng' ng'atuutik keyai eng' sabato.”" 
Matthew12:3 Ago ki leenji icheek, “Tom osoman kiit ne ki yai Daudi ak che ki mi ak ineendet ye ki amei rubeet?" 
Matthew12:4 Ki wo kootap Kamuktaindet ak koam magatiinik che itabaanatiin che ki ma kochamdaat eng' ng'atuutik koam ineendet anan che ki mi kobooto ineendet, kobatee tisiik icheegei." 
Matthew12:5 Anan tomo osoman eng' ng'atuutik keele eng' peetuutap sabato kong'waniti tisiik sabato eng' Hekaluut, ama kiityin icheek tengek?" 
Matthew12:6 Ago amwaiwok ale, mi yu ne oo kosiir Hekaluut." 
Matthew12:7 Ago nda ki ongen kaguiyetap ‘amache rireenetapkei ma tiseiywek,’ ta ki ma ogikyini che ma tinyei tengek," 
Matthew12:8 amu Weeriitap chii ko kiptaiyatap sabato.” 
Matthew12:9 Kiwechigei eng' olooto ak kwo agoi sinagoginnywa, ole" 
Matthew12:10 ki miitei chiito ne ki meat euut. Komachei kong'ach ineendet, ko kiteebe icheek koleenji, “Tos chamdaat eng' ng'atuutik kisoop chii eng' peetuutap sabato?”" 
Matthew12:11 Kowolji koleenji, “Ngot kotinyei chii eng' okweek keechiiryet ak kororokyi keriinget peetuutap sabato, ko tos masutu komong'?" 
Matthew12:12 Po kamanuut anyun ne tya chiito kosiir keechiiryet? Ara anyun, chamdaat keyai ne myee eng' peetuutap sabato.”" 
Matthew12:13 Eng' yooto, komwachi anyun chiichooto koleenji, “Chuul eung'ung'.” Ki chuul, ak kiga kosap koigei euut nin age." 
Matthew12:14 Ki manda anyun Pharisaik ak korwooch agobo ole partoi ineendet. 
Matthew12:15 Ye kingo nai Jeso agobo nooto, kwo koistogei eng' olooto. Ki isup `ineendet piik che chaang' ak ki isoop icheek tugul," 
Matthew12:16 ak kong'at kole mat kobarta ineendet 
Matthew12:17 si kosulda ne ki kamwa maotyot Isaiah kole," 
Matthew12:18 “Ogeero, otwogindennyu ne ki alewen; Chamanennyu ne paibai saboondanyu eng' ineendet: Andoi ineendet Kabuusennyu ne Tiliil, si komwachi pororyosyek kirwooget." 
Matthew12:19 Matiitos, anan kobol; ama kasei chii kutinnyi eng' ortinwegap nganaseet." 
Matthew12:20 Ma iriei tegat ne chisot, ama imisi ineendet kitambit ne iyeni, kot koyookto kirwooget ne iterteerisyei." 
Matthew12:21 Ak imang'u pororyosyek kainennyi.” 
Matthew12:22 Ki kimutyi anyun chiito ne ki tinyei oindet ak ko koraat ak konamaat kuut. Ki isoop ineendet, kot kong'alaal ak kogeerto." 
Matthew12:23 Ki kwong'yo anyun tuiyosyek tugul koleen, “Tos weeriitap Daudi ni?”" 
Matthew12:24 Ago kingo kas Pharisaik, kole, “Maonei chiichi oik kobatee eng' Beelsebul ne oo ne po oik.”" 
Matthew12:25 Ki ingen ineendet kabwaatutikwak ak ki leenji, “Ng'emaksei laitornatet age tugul ne pcheat, ama tononi nganaseet anan koot age tugul ne pcheat." 
Matthew12:26 Ngo oon `Setani Setani, ko kapcheigei ineegei; tonondoi ano anyun laitornatennyi?" 
Matthew12:27 Ngaon oik eng' Beelsebul, koonei eng' ng'oo weeriikwok? Nooto anyun, egu icheek che kirwoogikwok." 
Matthew12:28 Ago ngaon oik eng' Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet, ko kagoitwak anyun laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Matthew12:29 Anan, tos imuuchi kwo chii kootap chiito ne kiim ak korebe tuguukyik ngot ko marat korook chiichooto kiim yeityo kochoor koonnyi?" 
Matthew12:30 Ineendet ne ma kimi tuwai kogirindaa, ak ineendet ne ma kiyumi tuwai koiyestoi." 
Matthew12:31 Nooto anyun amwaiwok ale, kinyochin kaat piik tengek age tugul ak ng'olyoo age tugul ne ya, ago age tugul ne mwaei ng'olyoo ne ya agobo Kabuuset ne Tiliil, koma kinyochin kaat." 
Matthew12:32 Age tugul ne mwaitoe yaityo Weeriitap chii kenyochin kaat, ago age tugul ne mwaitoe yaityo Kabuuset ne Tiliil, koma kinyochin kaat, ngo eng' kasari, anan ko eng' kasarta ne nyoonei." 
Matthew12:33 “Oyai keetit komyeeit, ak myagitu logoekyik, anan oyai keetit koyait, ak yagitu logoekyik, amu kinae keetit logoekyik." 
Matthew12:34 Lagochu po erenooi, omuktoi ano okweek che oo yaach omwa tuguuk che myach? Ng'alaali kutit che nyiitaat muguleldo." 
Matthew12:35 Ibune chii ne myee tuguuk che myach konorwennyi ne myee, ak ibune chii ne ya tuguuk che yaach konorwennyi ne ya." 
Matthew12:36 “Amwaiwok ale, ng'olyoo age tugul ne mwaei piich eng' tangoi, ko tuun tetu chooto tugul eng' peetuutap kirwooget." 
Matthew12:37 Ki ityinin imanda eng' ng'aleeguk, ak kirwoogun eng' ng'aleeguk.”" 
Matthew12:38 Ki wol alage `eng' siriik ak eng' Pharisaik kowolji ineendet koleenji, “Kaneetindoni, kimache kegeer kabooruno kobunun.”" 
Matthew12:39 Ki wolji kole, “Ibinda ne ya ak ne po ibeetapkei kocheeng'ei kabooruno! Ago ma kigoochin kabooruno kobatee kaboorunetap maotyot Jona." 
Matthew12:40 Ko uu ye ki mi Jona peetuusyek somok ak kemousyek somok moetap njiryot ne oo miising', ko uu nooto tuun tebee Weeriitap chii peetuusyek somok ak kemousyek somok ng'wony oriit." 
Matthew12:41 Tuun tonondos piigap Nineveh ak ibini eng' kapkirwook ak korwookyi, amu kisik icheek eng' amdaetap Jona ak ogeero, mi yu ne oo kosiir Jona." 
Matthew12:42 Ng'eetei tuun laitoryat kobogoryot koyoop murot komostap tai ak ibini eng' kapkirwook ak korwookyi, amu ki nyo kobun ole poochin ng'wony si kogas utaatyetap Solomon ak ogeero, mi yu ne oo kosiir Solomon." 
Matthew12:43 “Ye kagomang'une chii `tamirmiryet ne murwoon, kwo kobunoot oldinwek che yamyotiin kocheeng'oti ole imuung'ee, amanyoor" 
Matthew12:44 komwa kole, ‘Kaweekyigei koonnyu ole ki amang'une.’ Ye kingo nyo, konyoor koma mi kiy, kobugot ak ko choboot." 
Matthew12:45 Yeityo kwo anyun komut oik alak tisap che yaach kosiir ineendet ak kochut ak komeny olooto; ak eng' let koyaitu atebeetap chiichooto kosiir ne ki po tai. Egu ko uu nooto agine eng' ibini ya.” 
Matthew12:46 Kingo ta kong'alaaljin tuiyosyek, ko kitonondos eng' saang' kamet ak che tupcho, kocheeng'ei kong'alaalji ineendet." 
Matthew12:47 Ki mwachi chii age koleenji, “Keero, mi saang' kamenng'ung' ak che otupche, cheeng'ei kong'alaalun.”" 
Matthew12:48 Ago ki wolji ineendet koleenji, “Ng'oo kamennyu ak che kitupche?”" 
Matthew12:49 Kotokyin eunnyi kasubikyik, koleenji, “Ang'chu, kamennyu ak che kitupche!" 
Matthew12:50 Amu age tugul ne yaei mageetap Abba ne mi kipsengwet, ko nooto weeriit ne kitupche ak chepto ne kitupche, ak kamennyu.”" 
Matthew13:1 Ki wo Jeso peetuunooto komanda eng' koot ak kwo kotebee ngeguutap araraita. 
Matthew13:2 Ki iyumjigei ineendet tuiyosyek che eecheen kot koit kolaany moingetap peek ak kotep ng'wony, ak ki ng'et tuiyet komugul eng' ngeguut." 
Matthew13:3 Ki mwachi icheek tuguuk che chaang' eng' kalewenaik koleenji, “Ogas o! Ki wo kolindet koleeta" 
Matthew13:4 ak kingo ta koletoi, kobutyi kesweek alak tabandap ooreet, ak ki pwa toriitik ak koam." 
Matthew13:5 Ki ibutyi alak ole mi koik, ole ki ma kotinyei ng'ung'unyek che chaang' ak ne matyaniit kobiityo amu ki ma kotya ng'ung'unyek." 
Matthew13:6 Kingo chor asiista, kolalyo ak koresyo amu ki ma kotinyei tigitik." 
Matthew13:7 Ki ibutyi kesweek alak ole ki mi katook, ak ki piityo katook ak kogiich." 
Matthew13:8 Ki ibutyi alak ng'ung'unyek che myach, ak koiyo logoek, alak pogol, alak tamanwogik lo, ak alak sosom." 
Matthew13:9 Ineendet ne tinyei itiik che kastoi, kogas.”" 
Matthew13:10 Ki pwa kasubik ak koleenji, “Kalya si ing'alaalji icheek eng' kalewenaik?”" 
Matthew13:11 Kowolji koleenji, “Kagegoonok onai ung'ootik che po pounatetap kipsengwet, ago ma kigoochi icheek." 
Matthew13:12 Amu age tugul ne tinyei, ko tuun kigoochin si konyoor che chaang' kosiir; ago age tugul ne ma tinyei, kereben agot che katinyei." 
Matthew13:13 Ang'alaaljini eng' kalewenaik amu nganda keertoi koma keerei kiy, ak nganda kastoi, koma kasei kiy anan koguiyo." 
Matthew13:14 Isuldaat eng' icheek maonateetap Isaiah ne leen, ‘Eng' kaseet ko tuun ogase, ago moguitosi, ak eng' keeret ko tuun ogeere, ago mobestosi agot kitigin." 
Matthew13:15 Amu kwalilenotin mugulelwegap pichu, ak ma kastoi komyee iitiikwak, ak ki kogeer konyekwak, si ma keer eng' konyekwak, anan kogas eng' iitiikwak, anan koguiyo eng' mugulelwekwak, si koweek kogeny ak asoop icheek.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Ago iberuurotin konyekwok, amu keertoi, ak iitiikwok, amu kastoi." 
Matthew13:17 Amwaiwok iman ale, ki machei maotik che chaang' ak piigap imanda kogeer tuguuk che ogeere, ago ki ma keer; ak kimachei kogas ng'aleek che ogase, ago ki ma kas." 
Matthew13:18 “Ogas anyun okweek kalewenet ne po kolindet. 
Matthew13:19 Ye kasei chii age tugul ng'olyootap laitornatet ama iguiyo, ko nyoonei anyun ineendet ne ya ak korebee ne kagagelechi muguleldanyi. Niito ne ki kilechi tabandap ooreet." 
Matthew13:20 Nooto ne ki kilechi ole mi koik, ko ineendet ne kasei ng'olyoot ak kotaach eng' poiboiyet," 
Matthew13:21 ago amu ma tinyei tigitik ineendet, ko tebyei ne matya, ak ye kanyo nyalilda anan usiisyet agobo ng'olyoot, kinach anyun ineendet." 
Matthew13:22 Nooto ne ki kilechi ole mi katook, ko ineendet ne kasei ng'olyoot ak kogiich kererwegap met che po ng'wony, ak kaberberisyet ne po mogornateet, si mai." 
Matthew13:23 Ne ki kilechi ng'ung'unyek che myach, ko ineendet ne kasei ng'olyoot ak koguiyo, ne yiei logoek iman, alak pogol, alak tamanwogik lo, ak alak sosom.”" 
Matthew13:24 Ki mwachi kalewenet age koleenji, “Kergei pounatetap kipsengwet ak chiito ne ki koolji kesweek che myach mbareennyi," 
Matthew13:25 ago ye kita koruitos piik, konyo punyondennyi ak kogoolji chemulbainik ole mi peek, ak kwo." 
Matthew13:26 Ago ye kingo piityo minutik, ak koi peek, kotook ak icheek chemulbainik." 
Matthew13:27 Ki pwa otwogik che po chiitap koot ak koleenji, ‘Kiptaiyat, ki ma igoolji kesweek che myach mbareeng'ung'? Ki pun ano chemulbainik?’" 
Matthew13:28 Kowolji koleenji, ‘Kiyaei nooto puunyoot.’ Koleenji otwogik, ‘Tos imache keebe kitutote?’" 
Matthew13:29 Ago ki leenji, ‘Achicha, si ma ye otuti chemulbainik, otutunde peek." 
Matthew13:30 Ingobiityo tugul agoi kesisyet, ak eng' peetuutap kesisyet, ang'at kesik si koyum korook chemulbainik ak korat ratuutik si kebeel, yeityo koyumji chogennyu peek.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Ki mwachi kalewenet age koleenji, “Kergei pounatetap kipsengwet ak keswootap karadali, ne ki ip chiito ak komiinji mbareennyi." 
Matthew13:32 Ming'in iman eng' kesweek tugul, ago ye kagoeet, ko oo kosiir minutik tugul che po mbar, ak egu keetit ne tebee toriitik mooriikyik.”" 
Matthew13:33 Ki mwachi kogeny kalewenet age koleenji, “Kergei pounatetap kipsengwet ak mermereek che ki nam kobogoryot, ak koburukto peek che ng'ootiin che po kitongok somok, agoi kogut tugul.”" 
Matthew13:34 Ki mwachi Jeso tuiyosyek tuguuchuuto tugul eng' kalewenaik; ki ma ng'alaalji icheek ama eng' kalewenet 
Matthew13:35 si kosulda ne ki kamwa maotyot kole: “Ayaate kutinnyu eng' kalewenaik; amwae tuguuk che ki kiuny kobooch koga kelumda ng'wony.” 
Matthew13:36 Ki pagaakta anyun tuiyosyek, ak kwo ko. Ki pwanji kasubikyik ak koleenji, “Iarorwech agobo kalewenetap chemulbainigap mbar.”" 
Matthew13:37 Ki wolji kole, “Ineendet ne kileta kesweek che myach ko Weeriitap chii," 
Matthew13:38 ak mbareet ko ng'wony. Kesweek che myach ko weeriik che po laitornatet, ak chemulbainik ko weeriitap ineendet ne ya." 
Matthew13:39 Puunyoot ne ki koolei chemulbainik ko chesawilyet. Kesisyet ko kagesunetap ng'wony ak kesik ko malaikaisyek. 
Matthew13:40 Ko uu ye kiyumi chemulbainik ak kebeel eng' maat, ko egu ko uu nooto eng' kagesunetap ng'wony." 
Matthew13:41 Iyooktoi Weeriitap chii malaikaisyekyik, koba koyum komang'une laitornateennyi, tuguuk tugul che inachi piich, ak icheek che yaei tengek," 
Matthew13:42 ak kowiirchi maat ne oo, ole tuun mi kateeiyet ak nyeetap kelek." 
Matthew13:43 Iluu anyun che po imanda ko uu asiista eng' laitornatetap Kwandanywa. Ineendet ne tinyei iitiik, kogas." 
Matthew13:44 “Kergei pounatetap kipsengwet ak kiy ne po kamanuut ne ung'aat eng' mbar ne kinyoor chii ak kouny. Ki wo kogasategei ak koalda tugul che ki tinyei si koale mbaranooto. 
Matthew13:45 “Kogeny, kergei pounatetap kipsengwet ak chemung'araiya ne cheeng'ei sonoek che korooron," 
Matthew13:46 ak ye kingo kagonyoor sonoiyat agenge ne po alyet ne oo, kwo koalda tugul che ki tinyei ak koale sonoiyandanooto." 
Matthew13:47 “Kora, kergei pounatetap kipsengwet ak regereiywot ne kiname njireenik, ne ki kiwiirchi araraita ak koyum injiren tugul che teerchiin." 
Matthew13:48 Ye kingo kagonyi, kochuut konyo ngeguut ak kotep ng'wony. Ki iyumji che myach kitongok ak kolakta che yaach." 
Matthew13:49 Egu ko uu nooto eng' kagesunetap ng'wony. Tuun pwoonei malaikaisyek koobeesyo che yaacheen eng' kwenutap che po imanda," 
Matthew13:50 ak kowiirchi maat ne lalei, ole tuun mi kateeiyet ak nyeetap kelek.”" 
Matthew13:51 “Kaoguiye tuguuchuuto tugul?” Kowol kole, “Ee.”" 
Matthew13:52 Koleenji anyun, “Ko uu nooto anyun, siriindet age tugul ne ki kineet komyee ng'aleegap pounatetap kipsengwet, ko kergei ak chiito ne po koot, ne inemu tuguuk che leelach ak che po keny eng' ole konoree tuguukyik che po kamanuut.”" 
Matthew13:53 Ye kingo kagogees Jeso kalewenaichu, kwo eng' olooto." 
Matthew13:54 Ki it nganaseennyi ne po kaa, ak konaam koneet icheek eng' sinagoginnywa kot ko kwong'yo ak kole, “Kanyoorunee ano chiichi utaatyoni ak poisyonichu kiimeen?" 
Matthew13:55 Tos ma weeriitap musogindet ni? Ma kiguure kamet Maria ak weeriik che tupcho ko Jakobo, Joseph, Simion, ak Judas?" 
Matthew13:56 Tos ma mi chepkametwagik tugul kobootech? Ki nyoorunee ano anyun chiichi tuguuchuuto tugul?” 
Matthew13:57 Ki inach icheek ng'aleekyik. Ago ki leenji `Jeso icheek, “Nyooru maotyo teegis, kobatee eng' emennyi, ak eng' koonnyi.”" 
Matthew13:58 Ma yai kwang'utik che chaang' eng' olooto amu pistoennywa. 
Matthew14:1 Ki kas eng' peetuusyechooto pounindet Herod logoiywek agobo Jeso," 
Matthew14:2 ak ki leenji otwogikyik, “Ineni ko Johana kabatisanindet, kagong'eet eng' che ki kobek! Eng' niito anyun ko poisyei kimnatosyechu eng' ineendet.”" 
Matthew14:3 Kiga konam `Herod Johana, korat ak konde korgoreet agobo Herodias, osotyotap Philipu ng'eetap kam." 
Matthew14:4 Amu ki leenji Johana ineendet, “Etaat eng' ng'atuutik obaigei ak kwonyito.”" 
Matthew14:5 Nganda kimachei Herod kobar ineendet, ko ki iywei tuiyet, amu ki kiit keele ineendet ko maotyo." 
Matthew14:6 Ago ye kingo it peetuut ne po kabwaatetap sigeetap Herod, koureren cheptap Herodias eng' kween, ak ki ibaibai Herod." 
Matthew14:7 Ak ki iyasyechi Herod kogoochi kiy age tugul ne kasoom. 
Matthew14:8 Ak ye kingo kagong'ulang'ul kamet, komwa kole, “Koono metitap Johana Kabatisanindet eng' tageito.”" 
Matthew14:9 Ki aragenji laitoryat ng'olyoondoni; ak amu konyit ne kiting'e icheek che kitebyei ak ineendet eng' amisyet, kong'at kigoochi;" 
Matthew14:10 ki iyookto anyun keetil metitap Johana eng' korgoreet. 
Matthew14:11 Ak ki kiip metinnyi eng' tageito, kigoochi chebooto; ak ki ipchi chebooto kamet." 
Matthew14:12 Ki pwa anyun kasubikyik, koip muusto ipkotup; ak ki pa komwachi Jeso." 
Matthew14:13 Ye kingo kas Jeso, kwo kolaany moingetap peek, ak kwo agoi surkwen kotabaangei. Kingo kas tuiyosyek koosup ineendet kobun keelyek kong'eetyee nganasook che eecheen." 
Matthew14:14 Ak kingo mong' kogeer tuiyet ne oo, ak ki riiree icheek, ak kosaap piikwak che ki myandos." 
Matthew14:15 Eng' koskoleng'unooto, kobwonji kasubikyik koleenji, “Surkwen koroni, ak kagoimen; mete tuiyet koba nganasook, si koaljigei amitwogik.”" 
Matthew14:16 Ago ki leenji Jeso, “Ma nyooljin koba, ogoochi icheek kiy ne amei.”" 
Matthew14:17 Ak ki leenji, “Ki tinyei eng' yu magatiinik muut ak njireenik aeng' kityo.”" 
Matthew14:18 Koleenji, “Oibwa.”" 
Matthew14:19 Ki ng'at tuiyosyek kotep ng'wony eng' susweek. Ki inam magatinichooto muut ak injirenichooto aeng' ak konyal kipsengwet ak koberuur. Kibuutul ak kogoochi kasubikyik magatiinichooto, yeityo kogoochi kasubik tuiyosyek." 
Matthew14:20 Ki amis tugul kot kobiyong'so, ak ki iyum katuganik che ki nyi kereboonik taman ak aeng'." 
Matthew14:21 Icheek che ki amis ko ki neegit murenik eliphuusyek muut ama kiit kobogorisyek ak lagok. 
Matthew14:22 Ak ki ichirchir eng' yooto kasubikyik kolaany moingetap peek, ak koba pitoniin kondoe ineendet, ye kita koyomisi tuiyosyek koba." 
Matthew14:23 Ak kingo kagoyomis tuiyosyek koba, kotogosta ineendet tulweet kwo kosa: ak koimenji olooto komi ineegei." 
Matthew14:24 Ago kigaiit moinget peek kween, kolungulgei eng' mildaetapkei ne po peek; amu ki kirindoi icheeget usoonet." 
Matthew14:25 Ak eng' riipseet ne po ang'wan ne po kemoi kwo ole mi icheeget, kobunei araraita parak." 
Matthew14:26 Ak ye kingo keer kasubikyik ineendet kobunei araraita parak, koiyweis, ak kole, “Tamirmir ni!” Ak kowaach amu kaiyweisyet." 
Matthew14:27 Ago ki ng'alaalji Jeso icheek eng' yooto koleenji, “Onyiganitu; anee; amoiyweisye.”" 
Matthew14:28 Ak ki wolji Petero koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, ngo inyee, ing'ata anyoonjin abun peek parak.”" 
Matthew14:29 Ak ki le, “Nyoo.” Ak kichoortagei Petero eng' moingetap peek, kobun peek parak kwo ole mi Jeso." 
Matthew14:30 Ago ye kingo keer usoonet, koywei; ak ki neegit kolis peek kowaach kole, “Kiptaiyat, sarwo!”" 
Matthew14:31 Ak eng' yooto koito Jeso eunnyi konam ineendet ak koleenji, “Ee inyee ne tinyei kayaneet ne ming'in, kalya si isage?”" 
Matthew14:32 Ak ye kingo kagolaany icheek moinget, kosiis usoonet." 
Matthew14:33 Ak ki ilas ineendet icheek che ki mi moinget, kole, “Iman ii Weeriitap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Matthew14:34 Ak ye kingo kagolanda, koit emetap Genesaret." 
Matthew14:35 Ak ye kingo nai piigap koronooto ineendet, koyookto emonooto komugul komutyi ineendet tugul che ki myandos;" 
Matthew14:36 ak ki igaigai ineendet kole kotwa agot tabandap ngoryennyi: ak kisopchi tugul che kitwa. 
Matthew15:1 Ki pwanji anyun Jeso `Pharisaik ak siriik che ki punu Jerusalem ak koleenji," 
Matthew15:2 “Amu nee si kobistoe kasubiguk pitonwegap poisyek? Amisyei icheek kotom koun eunekwak.” 
Matthew15:3 Ki wolji koleenji, “Amu nee si obistoe ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet amu pitonwekwok?" 
Matthew15:4 Amu ki ng'at Kamuktaindet kole, ‘Teech kwandang'ung' ak kamenng'ung',’ ak, ‘Ineendet ne mwaei ne ya agobo kwan anan kamet, komeei iman.’" 
Matthew15:5 Ago omwae ole age tugul ne leenjin kwan anan kamet, ‘Kiit age tugul ne kota nyolu atoretenen ko koagoochi Kamuktaindet,’" 
Matthew15:6 koma teechei ineendet kwanda ak kamet; kaowal anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet koek puch amu pitonwekwok. 
Matthew15:7 Okweek chombilik! Ki maoten Isaiah komyee agobo okweek ye ki mwa kole," 
Matthew15:8 ‘Teecha pichu eng' kutusweekwak, ago looen mugulelwekwak eng' anee." 
Matthew15:9 Ilaswo icheek puch; kaneetisyosyekwak che ineetisye ko ng'atuutigap piik.’ ” 
Matthew15:10 Ki kuur tuiyet kobwa ole mi ak koleenji, “Ogas ak oguiye:" 
Matthew15:11 ma che chutei kutit che imurwoni chii, ago che mang'une kutit che imurwoni ineendet.”" 
Matthew15:12 Ki pwa anyun kasubikyik ak koleenji, “Ingen ile kaginach Pharisaik ye ka ngo kas mwaoni?”" 
Matthew15:13 Kowol kole, “Keswot age tugul ne ki ma kool Abba ne mi kipsengwet, kitutu." 
Matthew15:14 Omete icheek; icheek ko kandoik che koryotiin. Ak ngo ndochi kipkoraatyat, kipkoraatyat, kororokyin tuwai keriinget.”" 
Matthew15:15 Ki wolji Petero koleenji, “Mwaiwech agobo kalewenonooto.”" 
Matthew15:16 Koleenji, “Kagatomo oguiye ak okweek?" 
Matthew15:17 Tos mongen ole, kiy age tugul ne punei kutit kowendi moo ak komandoi saang'?" 
Matthew15:18 Ago tuguuk che mang'une kutit kobunu muguleldo, ak chooto che ing'waniti chiito." 
Matthew15:19 Amu kabwaatutik che yaach, rumisyosyek, ibeetapkei, soksosyek, choorsosyek, paornatosyegap lembech, ng'aleek che yaacheen ko mang'une muguleldo." 
Matthew15:20 Chuuto tuguuk che ing'waniti chii; ago ngeamisye eunek che ma kiuun koma ing'waniti chii. ” 
Matthew15:21 Ki wo Jeso eng' olooto, kwo komoswek che po Tyro ak Sidon." 
Matthew15:22 Ki mong' eng' komoswechooto kobogoryot ne po Kanaan, koriirei koleen, “Rireena ee Kiptaiyat, inyee weeriitap Daudi! Inyaliili miising' oindet cheptonyu.”" 
Matthew15:23 Ago ki ma wolji `inee ng'olyoo age tugul. Ki pwanji kasubikyik, ak kogaigai ineendet koleenji, “Oon kwo, amu riirchinootech.”" 
Matthew15:24 Ki wol kole, “Ki kiyokwo anyoonji keechiirek che lusyotin che po kootap Israel icheegei.”" 
Matthew15:25 Ki nyo ak kogutung'ji ineendet koleen, “Kiptaiyat, toreto!”" 
Matthew15:26 Ago ki wolji kole, “Ma myee kerebee lagok amitwogikwak ak kewiirchi sesenik.”" 
Matthew15:27 Ago ki wol kole, “Ee, Kiptaiyat, nga agot sesenik ak icheek koamei amitwogik che iroroi eng' meesogap kiptainikwak.”" 
Matthew15:28 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Chebyosoni, oo kayaneng'ung'! Ingoyaak ko uu nooto imache.” Ak kisop cheptonyi kobooch sainooto." 
Matthew15:29 Ki wo Jeso eng' olooto ak kwo koroop ole neegitee araraitap Galilaya. Ki wo kotogosta tulweet, ak kotep ng'wony eng' olooto." 
Matthew15:30 Ki pwanji ineendet tuiyosyek che eecheen komutu salamonik, che koryotiin, che namotin kutuswai, che po mugungon ak alak che chaang', komut ak konde tainnyi; ak ki isap icheek." 
Matthew15:31 Ki kwong' tuiyet ye kingo keer kong'alaaldos che ki namotin kutuswai, ko kagosapcho che ki po mugungon, kobendoti che kisolomon ak kogeertoi che ki koryotiin. Ki ilas icheek Kamuktaindetap Israel." 
Matthew15:32 Ki kuur Jeso kasubikyik kobwa ak koleenji, “Ariiree tuiyoni, amu kogetebi tugul peetuusyek somok ama tinyei kiy ne amei. Ma mache aunda icheek koba koamoti rubo, amu imuuch kotanuiso eng' ooreet.”" 
Matthew15:33 Kowol kasubikyik kole, “Ki nyoorchini ano magatiinik che tee cho eng' surkwen che yamei kebae tuiyet ne tee ni?”" 
Matthew15:34 Koleenji Jeso, “Otinye magatiinik ata?” Kowol kole, “Tisap ak njireenik che mengeechen che ng'ering'.”" 
Matthew15:35 Ki ng'at tuiyet kobur," 
Matthew15:36 ak konam magatinichooto tisap ak njireenik, ak ye kiga komwa kongoi, kobuutul ak kogoochi kasubik, yeityo kogoochi kasubik tuiyosyek." 
Matthew15:37 Ki am tugul kot kobiyong'so, ak koyum katuganik che kiyam konyi mesendoik tisap." 
Matthew15:38 Icheek che ki amis ko ki murenik eliphuusyek ang'wan, ama kiit kobogorisyek ak lagok." 
Matthew15:39 Kingo kagounda tuiyosyek koba, kolaany moingetap peek, ak kwo kotokyigei ye neegitee tabanwegap Magadan." 
Matthew16:1 Ki pwa Pharisaik ak Sadukaik, ak kotyem ineendet kole koboorchi kaboorunet kobun kipsengwet." 
Matthew16:2 Ago ki wolji icheeget koleenji, “Ngo ek koskoleny, omwae oleen, ‘Moeni mutai, amu piriir parak,’" 
Matthew16:3 ak ngo ek karon omwa ole, ‘Usei ra, amu piriir ak kotulungenot parak.’ Ongen obesye ole teptoi soet parak, ago momuuchi obesye kaboorunoigap peetuusyechu." 
Matthew16:4 Cheeng'ei kaboorunet ibinda ne ya, ak ne po ibeetapkei, ago ma kiboorchin kaboorunet kobatee kaboorunetap Jona.” Ki pagaakta icheek ak kwo kowechigei." 
Matthew16:5 Ye kingo kagolanda pitetap araraita, kogiutye kasubik koip magatiinik." 
Matthew16:6 Ki leenji `Jeso icheek, “Oep iit ak oriibegei mermereegap Pharisaik ak Sadukaik.”" 
Matthew16:7 Ki ng'alaaljigei icheegei ak kobwaatyigei koleen, “Abeere amu ma kiibu magatiinik.”" 
Matthew16:8 Ki nai Jeso kabwaatutikwak ak ki leenji, “Ee okweek che otinye kayaneet ne ming'in, kalya si ong'alaali agobo magatiinik che ma mi?" 
Matthew16:9 Moguitosi agoi nguno? Mobwaati magatiinik muut eng' piik eliphuusyek muut, ak mesendoigap amitwogik che tee che ki oyum?" 
Matthew16:10 Anan magatiinik tisap eng' piik eliphuusyek ang'wan, ak mesendoigap magatiinik che tee che ki oyum?" 
Matthew16:11 Lyon si moguiye ole ka ma ng'alaalwok agobo magatiinik? Ago oriibegei mermereegap Pharisaik ak Sadukaik.” 
Matthew16:12 Ki nai anyun kole kamamwochi icheek koriibegei mermereek che kichobe magatinik, ago kaneetisyosyegap Pharisaik ak Sadukaik." 
Matthew16:13 Ye kingo nyo Jeso komostap Kaisarea Philippi, koteebe kasubikyik koleenji, “Mwaei piik koleen ng'oo Weeriitap chii?”" 
Matthew16:14 Kowol icheek kole, “Mwaei alak koleen Johana Kabatisanindet, koleen alage Elijah, ko alak koleen Jeremiah anan ko age eng' maotik.”" 
Matthew16:15 koteebee koleenji, “Ago oleen okweek aa ng'oo?”" 
Matthew16:16 Ki wol Simion Petero kole, “Ii Kristo, weeriitap Kamuktaindet ne sabei.”" 
Matthew16:17 Kowol Jeso kole, “Iberuurot inyee, Simion Barjona, amu mang'ang'un niito poorto anan korotiik, ago Abbannyu ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew16:18 Amwaun anee ale ii Petero, ak eng' rwandani ateeche kanisennyu, ak ma neneti kimnatosyegap ye mi che ki kobek." 
Matthew16:19 Agoonin yaateiwegap pounatetap kipsengwet, ak kiy age tugul ne irate eng' ng'wony, keratei eng' kipsengwet; ak kiy age tugul ne ityaachi eng' ng'wony, kityaachi eng' kipsengwet.”" 
Matthew16:20 Ki ng'at kasubik kole amat komwachi chii kole ineendet ko Kristo. 
Matthew16:21 Kobooch yooto anyun, kotoi Jeso koboorchi kasubikyik kole wendi ineendet Jerusalem, ak nyooru kanyaliilet ne oo eng' eunegap poisyek, tisiik che eecheen ak siriik, ak kebar, ak eng' peetuutap somok, king'eet." 
Matthew16:22 Ki nam Petero ineendet komut taban ak kotoi koger kong' koleen, “Achicha Kiptaiyat! Ma nyoonjin niito agoi.”" 
Matthew16:23 Ago kiweleljigei ak koleenji Petero, “Istoenongei, Setani! Ii kanagut eng' anee; amu ma ibwaati inyee tuguugap Kamuktaindet, ago ibwaati che po kipkosabei.”" 
Matthew16:24 Kingo pata koleenji Jeso kasubikyik, “Ngo machei chii kosubwo, ko nyolu koeesyogei, ak kosut koip kimurtoiyondennyi, ak kosubwo." 
Matthew16:25 Amu age tugul ne machei kosar saboondanyi, kobeeti, ak age tugul ne ibeeti saboondanyi agobo anee, konyooru." 
Matthew16:26 Keljino nee ne nyooru chii, ngo nyoor ng'wony komugul, ak kobeet saboondanyi? Anan tos igoito nee chii kowale saboondanyi?" 
Matthew16:27 Tuun nyoonei Weeriitap chii eng' liilindap Kwandanyi kobooto malaikaisyekyik, ak kogoochi chii age tugul ko uu poisyonikyik." 
Matthew16:28 Amwaiwok iman ale, mi alak eng' che tonondos eng' yu che ma chamchami meet kot kogeer konyonei Weeriitap chii eng' pounatennyi.”" 
Matthew17:1 Kingo pata peetuusyek lo komut Jeso Petero, Jakobo ak Johana ng'eetap kam, ak ki indochi icheek kolaany tulweet ne kooi, koba uwak icheegei." 
Matthew17:2 Kiwalak ineendet eng' tainnywa, ak ki iluu togeennyi ko uu asiista, ak kileelagitu ngoroikyik ko uu lapkeiyet." 
Matthew17:3 Eng' sainooto ko ki took eng' tainnywa Musa ak Elijah, kong'alaaljindos kobooto ineendet." 
Matthew17:4 Ki wolji `Petero Jeso koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, myee eng' acheek ye kimi yu. Ngichame, amuuchi ateech eng' oli keryosyek somok, neng'ung' age, po Musa age ak po Elijah age.”" 
Matthew17:5 Kingo ta kong'alaali, ogeero, kouur icheek pooldet ne iluu: ak ogeero, ki mang'une kutit pooldet, kole, “Ni ko Weeriinnyu, chamanennyu, ineendet ne agasegei miising'; ogas okweek ineendet.”" 
Matthew17:6 Ye kingo kas kasubik, kobutyo kot koit togoochikwak ng'wony, koiyweis miising'." 
Matthew17:7 Ki nyo Jeso ak kotwa icheek ak koleenji, “Ong'eetyee, amoiyweisye.”" 
Matthew17:8 Kingo yoot met, koma keer chii kobatee Jeso ineegei." 
Matthew17:9 Ye kita kochoorugei eng' tulweet, kong'at Jeso icheek koleenji, “Amomwachi chii kaboorunoniito agoi tuun kogagobata kong'eet Weeriitap chii eng' che ki pek.”" 
Matthew17:10 ki teebee kasubikyik ineendet kole, “Amu nee anyun si komwaei siriik kole nyoonei Elijah korook kondou?”" 
Matthew17:11 Kowol Jeso kole, “Iman indou Elijah, ak koweech tuguuk tugul;" 
Matthew17:12 ago amwaiwok ale kigonyo Elijah, ak ki ma nai icheek ineendet, ago ki yachi ineendet kiy age tugul ne kimach. Agot ko uu nooto tuun nyalili Weeriitap chii agine eng' eunekwak.”" 
Matthew17:13 Konai anyun kasubik kole ki ng'alaaljin icheek agobo Johana Kabatisanindet. 
Matthew17:14 Ye kingo kagobwa ole mi tuiyet, konyonji ineendet chiito ak kogutung'ji, ak kole," 
Matthew17:15 “Kiptaiyat, rireegei weeriinnyu, amu amei iywek, ak nyalili miising'. Ibutyin konyil ak konyil ma anan ko peek." 
Matthew17:16 Ak koamutyi kasubiguk, ago ma imuuch kosoop ineendet.”" 
Matthew17:17 Ki wol Jeso kole, “Ee ibinda ne ma tinyei kayaneet ak komaasat, atebye ak okweek kot kotyanit? Amuitoi kot kotyanit agobo okweek? Imutwaa ineendet.”" 
Matthew17:18 Ki kergong' Jeso oindet, ak komanda eng' ineendet ak kosap weerooto sainooto." 
Matthew17:19 Ki pwanji anyun `kasubik Jeso eng' taban ak koteebe kole, “Kalya si ma kimuuch acheek keon komanda?”" 
Matthew17:20 Ki leenji, “Amu otinye kayaneet ne ming'in. Amwaiwok iman ale ndotinye kayaneet ne tee keswootap karadali, ta ngo mwachi tulwooni oleenji, ‘Inakte ui oliin,’ konaktoi; ak ta ma mi kiy ne ma imugaksei eng' okweek.”" 
Matthew17:21 Ago ma mandoi ne uu ni kobatee eng' saaet ak karugutetapkei. 
Matthew17:22 Ye kingo ta kobeniei icheek eng' Galilaya, koleenji `Jeso icheek, “Kindoi Weeriitap chii eunegap piik;" 
Matthew17:23 ak kobar `icheek ineendet, ak king'eet kogeny eng' peetuutap somok.” Ak ki aragenso icheek anyun miising'." 
Matthew17:24 Ye kingo kagoit Jeso ak kasubikyik Kapernaum kobwonji taagigap kebebertap shekel ak kole, “Magoonu kaneetindeng'wong' kebebertap shekel?”" 
Matthew17:25 Ak kole, “Ee, yaei nooto.” Ye kingwo ko Petero, kosip kong'alaalji `Jeso ineendet koleenji, “Ibwaati nee, inyee, Simion? Laitorinik che po ng'wony konyoorunee ng'oo aisuruut anan kodi? Eng' weeriikwak anan eng' piik alak?”" 
Matthew17:26 Kingo wol Petero kole, “Eng' toek,” koleenji `Jeso ineendet, “Nooto anyun ityagatin weeriik.”" 
Matthew17:27 Si ma kinach icheek, iwe araraita ak iwiirchi ndoanet, ak injiryo ne kamong' ne tai, inam; ak ye kaiyat kutinnyi, inyooru shekel nam nooto, ak igoite agobo anee ak inyee." 
Matthew18:1 Ki pwanji `kasubik Jeso eng' sainooto ak koteebe kole, “Ng'oo anyun ne oo eng' tugul eng' pounatetap kipsengwet?”" 
Matthew18:2 Ki kuur lakweet ne ming'in ak kotonon eng' kwenunnywa," 
Matthew18:3 ak kole, “Amwaiwok iman ale, ngot ko mowalage ak oige lagok che mengeech, ko moite pounatetap kipsengwet." 
Matthew18:4 Nooto anyun age tugul ne iming'inegei ko uu lakwani ming'in, ko oo nooto eng' tugul eng' pounatetap kipsengwet." 
Matthew18:5 Ak age tugul ne taachei lakweet ne ming'in ne uu ni eng' kainennyu ko kataacha. 
Matthew18:6 “Ago age tugul ne inachi age eng' chu mengech iyana, ko kaigai eng' ineendet kirooch kaatinnyi koitap pai ne oo, ak kechoorchi rireetap araraita." 
Matthew18:7 Pwo ng'wony amu kanagutik! Pwoonei kanagutik iman; ago pwo eng' chiichooto punu kanagutyet! 
Matthew18:8 “Ngo nachin eung'ung' anan keeldong'ung', itil ak iwiirte. Kaigai eng' inyee imong'ji saboondo ii po mugung' anan ii po keelok kosiir itinye eunek aeng' anan keelyek aeng' ak kewiirchin maat ne po koigeny." 
Matthew18:9 Ak ngo nachin kondang'ung', ibalu ak iwiirte. Kaigai eng' inyee imong'ji saboondo ii po kong'ak kosiir itinye koonyek aeng' ak kewiirchin Gehenna, ye mi maat." 
Matthew18:10 “Oriip si mosas age eng' chu mengech; amu amwaiwok ale malaikaisyekwak eng' kipsengwet ko keerei kotugul togeetap Abba ne mi kipsengwet. 
Matthew18:11 Amu ki nyo Weeriitap chii kosar ne kiga kobet. 
Matthew18:12 Oleen nee okweek? Ngo tinyei chii keechiirek pogol, ak kwo age kobetot, ko tos ma pagaaktoi chuun tamanwogik sogool ak sogool che mi tuloonook, ak kocheeng'at ne kagobetot?" 
Matthew18:13 Ak ngo nyoor, amwaiwok iman ale, poiboitu agobo nooto kosiir chuun tamanwogik sogool ak sogool che ma petyo." 
Matthew18:14 Ko uu nooto anyun koma mageetap Kwandang'wong' ne mi kipsengwet, kolus age eng' chu mengech." 
Matthew18:15 “Ngo chalwogenjin ne otupche, iwe, iboorchi lelutyennyi omi tuwai okweegei. Ngo kasin, ko kagogelun ne otupche." 
Matthew18:16 Ago ngo ma kasin, imut agenge anan aeng' alak, si kogimit ng'olyoot age tugul eng' kutusweegap paorinik aeng' anan somok." 
Matthew18:17 Ngo eesyo kogas icheek, imwachi kaniset; ak ngo eesyo kogas iit kaniset agine, iingoigei eng' inyee kipsagarin ak taagindetap aisuruut." 
Matthew18:18 “Amwaiwok iman ale, tuguuk alak tugul che orate eng' ng'wony keratei eng' kipsengwet, ak tuguuk alak tugul che otyachi eng' ng'wony kityaachi eng' kipsengwet." 
Matthew18:19 Amwaiwok kogeny, ale, ngo yanjin aeng'u eng' okweek eng' ng'wony agobo kiy age tugul ne soomei, koyachin Abba anyun ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew18:20 Amu ole katuiyechi aeng'u anan somok eng' kainennyu, ami kwenunnywa eng' olooto.”" 
Matthew18:21 Ki nyo anyun Petero ak koteep kole, “Kiptaiyat, nyolu anyochi kaat ne kitupche konyil ata ye kachalwogenjo? Agoi konyil tisap?”" 
Matthew18:22 Kowolji Jeso kole, “Ma mwaun ale, konyil tisap; ago, agoi tamanwogik tisap konyil tisap." 
Matthew18:23 Nooto anyun kiyanie pounatetap kipsengwet laitoryat anum, ne machei koiityi tuguuk otwogikyik." 
Matthew18:24 Ye kingo toi koiit, kimutyi agenge, ne kibesen talendaisyek eliphuusyek taman." 
Matthew18:25 Ak amu ki ma kotinyei kiy ne yaaktae, kong'at kiptaiyandennyi kealda ineendet, osotyonnyi, lagokyik ak tugul che ki tinyei, si koyaaktae pesendo." 
Matthew18:26 Ki ibutyi ng'wony anyun otwogindonooto kosaisai ineendet kole, ‘Kiptaiyat, muitaiwo kitigin, si ayaagun tugul.’" 
Matthew18:27 Koriree kiptaiyandanooto inee, ki ityaach ak konyochi kaat eng' pesendo." 
Matthew18:28 “Ago kimanda otwogindonooto kai, ak konyoor age ne kiboisyei tuwai, ne kigabesen inee dinarisyek pogol. Ki nam ineendet kaatit ak kole, ‘Yaakwo che ki ibesena.’" 
Matthew18:29 Ki ibutyi ng'wony anyun ne kiboisyei tuwai, kosoom ineendet, kole, ‘Muitaiwo kitigin, si ayaagun.’" 
Matthew18:30 Ago ki eesyo; ak ki wo kotoorchi ineendet korgoreet, agoi koyaak tugul che kiga pesen." 
Matthew18:31 “Ye kingo keer anyun che kiboisyei tugul tuguuk che kagoyaagiis, koaragenso miising' ak koba komwachi kiptaiyannywa tuguuk tugul che kagoyaagiis." 
Matthew18:32 Ki kuur anyun kiptaiyandennyi ineendet konyo ak koleenji, ‘Ee otwogindet ne kipyaitwet, ki anyoun kaat eng' pesenooto tugul, amu ki isooma." 
Matthew18:33 Tos ki ma nyoljin iriiree ne oboisyei tuwai, ko uu ye ki ariirenen?’" 
Matthew18:34 “Eng' nereeknateet koging'at kiptaiyandennyi kigoochi ineendet kergong'yet ne ng'waan, agoi koyook tugul che kiga pesen." 
Matthew18:35 Yaiywok ko uu nooto agine Abba ne po kipsengwet, ngo monyochi kaat age tugul eng' mugulelwekwok ne otupche.”" 
Matthew19:1 Ye kingo kagogees Jeso ng'aleechu, kwo eng' Galilaya agoi tabanwegap Judea, Jordan pitoniin;" 
Matthew19:1 Ye kingo kagogees Jeso ng'aleechu, kwo eng' Galilaya agoi tabanwegap Judea, Jordan pitoniin;" 
Matthew19:2 Ki isup ineendet tuiyosyek che eecheen; ak ki isoop icheek eng' olooto. 
Matthew19:3 Ki pwanji ineendet `alage eng' Pharisaik ak kotyem kole, “Tos chamdaat eng' ng'atuutik koon chii osotyonnyi agobo kiy age tugul?”" 
Matthew19:4 Kowolji kole, “Tom osoman, ole ineendet ne ki yai icheek eng' taunet ko ki yai muren ak kobogoryo,”" 
Matthew19:5 ak ki le, “Amu niito anyun ko pagaktoi mureno kwanda ak kamet ak konamgei ak osotyonnyi; ak koek tuwai poorto agenge?" 
Matthew19:6 Si ma ko aeng' ago poorto agenge. Nooto anyun, che ki kotuiyo Kamuktaindet, komat koobeesyo chii.”" 
Matthew19:7 Ki leenji anyun pichooto ineendet, “Kilya anyun si kong'at Musa kole kigoochin sireet ne po peesyet ak koon kwo?”" 
Matthew19:8 Ki mwachi icheek koleenji, “Ki chamwok Musa oon osotikwok amu uuindap mugulelwekwok, ago ki ma ko uu nooto kobooch taunet." 
Matthew19:9 Amwaiwok ale, chii age tugul ne oonei osotyonnyi, ama eng' ng'olyootap sokseet, ak kotun age, ko kabaigei, ak ineendet ne ituni ne kigeon ko kabaigei.”" 
Matthew19:10 Koleenji kasubikyik ineendet, “Ngot ko uu nooto ateptap muren ak osotyonnyi, koma nyolu kitunis.”" 
Matthew19:11 Ago ki leenji `ineendet icheek, “Temenee piik tugul kotaach kaneetisyoni, kobatee icheek che kigoochin." 
Matthew19:12 Amu miitei sirorinik che ki kisich ko uu nooto kobooch mootinwegap kametwagikwak; miitei piik che ki kimooch; ak miitei piik che ki imoigei agobo pounatetap kipsengwet. Ineendet ne imuuchi kotaach ni, kotaach.”" 
Matthew19:13 Ki kimutyi anyun lagok che mengech, si kobiit kogonoor eunekyik icheek ak kosa. Ago ki kergong' kasubik icheek." 
Matthew19:14 Ki le Jeso, “Ochamji lagok che mengech kobwanjo, amoete icheek, amu po che uu chuuto pounatetap kipsengwet.”" 
Matthew19:15 Ye kingo konoor eunekyik icheek, kwo eng' olooto." 
Matthew19:16 Ki nyoonji chii ak kole, “Kaneetindoni, nee kiy ne myee ne kanyool ayai si anyoor saboondap koigeny?”" 
Matthew19:17 Ak ki leenji ineendet, “Kalya si iteebena agobo nooto myee? Mi agenge ne myee. Ngimache imong'ji saboondo, inam ng'atuutik.”" 
Matthew19:18 Ki leenji ineendet, “Che uu nee?” Kowolji Jeso kole: “Amerumisye; Amoipkei; Amechoorse; Amebaoryanji lembech;"
