Matthew19:19 Teech kwandang'ung' ak kamenng'ung'; ak, cham chiitap kokwet ko uu ye ichamdoige.”" 
Matthew19:20 Koleenji murenonooto, “Ki ariip tuguuchu tugul; ta ko ng'etunot nee eng' anee?”" 
Matthew19:21 Koleenji `Jeso ineendet, “Ngimache iegu ne ititaat, iwe ak ialde che itinye, ak igoochi kibananook, si inyooru mogornateet eng' kipsengwet; yeityo inyoo ak isubwo.”" 
Matthew19:22 Ago ye kingo kas murenonooto mwaonooto, kwo eng' kaimetapkei, amu ki tinyei tuguuk che chaang'." 
Matthew19:23 Ki leenji `Jeso kasubikyik, “Amwaiwok iman ale, uui eng' mogoryot komong'ji pounatetap kipsengwet." 
Matthew19:24 Kogeny amwaiwok ale, nyamnyum eng' tambeesyet kochut kondap sindanut, kosiir komong'ji mogoryot laitornatetap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Matthew19:25 Ye kingo kas kasubik ng'olyoondonooto, kokwong'yo miising' ak kole, “Ng'oo anyun ne imuuchi konyoor saruunet?”" 
Matthew19:26 Ago ki keer Jeso icheek ak koleenji, “Ma imugaksei ni eng' piik, ago imugaksei tuguuk tugul eng' Kamuktaindet.”" 
Matthew19:27 Ki wolji Petero anyun koleenji, “Keero, kigebagaakte tuguuk tugul, ak ki kisubun. Kinyooru nee anyun acheek?”" 
Matthew19:28 Ki leenji `Jeso icheek, “Amwaiwok iman ale, eng' kalelitetap tuguuk tugul, ye tuun tebee Weeriitap chii ng'echereetap toroornatennyi, okweek che koosubwo ko tuun otebee ak okweek ng'echerok taman ak aeng' che po laitornatet, orwookyini ortinwek taman ak aeng' che po Israel." 
Matthew19:29 Ak age tugul ne ki kobagakta kooriik, anan ng'eetap kametwagik, anan chepkametwagik, anan kwanda, anan kamet, anan lagok, anan mbareenik, agobo kainennyu, kotaachei konyil pogol, ak koboor eng' saboondap koigeny." 
Matthew19:30 Ago che chaang' che po tai ko tuun egu che po let; ak che po let ko tuun egu che po tai. 
Matthew20:1 “Amu kergei pounatetap kipsengwet ak chiitap ko po koot, ne kimusta karon koguur meek kobwa mbareennyi ne po sabibuk." 
Matthew20:2 Ye kingo kagoyanjin ak meechooto kogoochi dinarit agenge eng' peetuut agenge, koyookto koba mbareennyi." 
Matthew20:3 Ki manda ko neegit sait somok ak kogeer alak kotonondos eng' ye mi ole keyae mung'aaret ama tinyei poisyet. 
Matthew20:4 Ak ki leenji icheek, ‘Oba ak okweek oboisye eng' mbareetap sabibuk si agoonok ne nyolu.’ Ak ki pa anyun." 
Matthew20:5 Ki manda kogeny ko neegit sait lo ak eng' sait sogool, ak ki yai ko uu nooto." 
Matthew20:6 Ki manda kogeny olo po sait taman ak agenge, ak konyoor alak kotonondos. Ki leenji icheek, ‘Kalya si otonone oli peetuut komugul amotinye poisyo?’" 
Matthew20:7 Kowolji `pichooto ineendet kole, ‘Amu ma kuurech chii.’ Koleenji, ‘Oba ak okweekoboisye eng' mbareetap sabibuk.’" 
Matthew20:8 “Ye kingo ek koskoleny, komwachi chiitap ko po mbareetap sabibuk kiboityondennyi ne oo koleenji, ‘Guur meek si kobiit igoochi melekwekwak, itaune ne po let agoi ne po tai.’" 
Matthew20:9 Ye kingo pwa icheek che kiga kiguur ko neegit sait taman ak agenge, konyoor chii tugul dinarit agenge." 
Matthew20:10 Ara ye kingo pwa che po tai, koleen nyooru che siirei; ago kinyoor ak icheek dinarit agenge chii tugul." 
Matthew20:11 Ye kingo taach, kong'unyng'ung'ji chiitap ko po koot," 
Matthew20:12 koleenji, ‘Kabois chu po let sait agenge kityo, ak kairogenech pichooto acheek che kagibirtegei peetuut komugul eng' asiista ne ng'waan.’" 
Matthew20:13 Ago ki wolji ineendet age eng' icheek koleenji, ‘Chorwani, ma ayaun kiy ne ya; kama kiyanjine tuwai dinarit agenge?" 
Matthew20:14 Nam neng'ung', ak iwe oreng'ung'. Magennyu agoochi chiichito po let ko uu ye kagoonin." 
Matthew20:15 Tos ma nyoljino ayai ne amache eng' tuguukyuk? Anan amin ng'etkong', amu aa ayiep?’ ”" 
Matthew20:16 “Egu anyun che po let che po tai, ak egu che po tai che po let.”" 
Matthew20:17 Ye kitogostoi Jeso kowendi Jerusalem, komut kasubikyik chooto taman ak aeng' koba taban icheegei, ak koleenji icheek eng' ooreet," 
Matthew20:18 “Ogeero, kitogosyini Jerusalem, ak kinde Weeriitap chii eunegap tisiik che eecheen ak siriik. Kirwookyin ineendet kome," 
Matthew20:19 ak kigoito kochurachur Pororyosyek, ak kebire kipchoritiit ak kogartaat eng' kimurtoiyot. Eng' peetuutap somok king'eeti ineendet.”" 
Matthew20:20 Ki nyoonji anyun ineendet kametap weeriigap Zebedayo kobooto weeriikyik, ak kogutung'ji, ak kosoom ineendet kiy." 
Matthew20:21 Ak kiteebe koleenji, “Imache nee?” Kowol kole, “Ng'at ile kotebee age eng' weeriichuchuk aeng' eung'ung' ne po tai, ak age eung'ung' ne po kaataam eng' laitornateng'ung'.”" 
Matthew20:22 Ago ki wol Jeso kole, “Mongen ne osoome. Omuuchi okweek oee kigombet ne neegit aee?” Kowolji icheek ineendet kole, “Kimuuchi.”" 
Matthew20:23 Koleenji `Jeso icheek, “Oee iman kigombennyu, ago ketebee eunnyu ne po tai ak eunnyu ne po kaataam koma nenyu agoito, ago po icheek chooto Ki kochopchi kotabaanji Abba.”" 
Matthew20:24 Ye kingo kas niito chuun tamanu, konereekyi chooto aeng' tupcho." 
Matthew20:25 Ago kiguur Jeso icheek ak koleenji, “Ongen ole pounee tegeet pounigap Pororyosyek, ak kolaitoranjin `kiptainik icheek." 
Matthew20:26 Ma uu nooto eng' okweek. Ago age tugul ne machei koek ne oo eng' kwenung'wong' koek kiboityondeng'wong'; 
Matthew20:27 ak age tugul ne machei koek ne po tai eng' kwenung'wong' koek otwogindeng'wong'; 
Matthew20:28 agot ko uu nooto ko ki ma nyo Weeriitap chii keboisyechi, ago si kobois, ak kogoito saboondanyi koek kiit ne kityage che chaang'.”" 
Matthew20:29 Kingo mandoi Jeso ak kasubikyik eng' Jeriko, kosubi ineendet tuiyet ne oo." 
Matthew20:30 Ki mi kipkoratinik aeng' che ki tebyei eng' ooreet taban, ye kingo kas kole siirtoi Jeso, kowaakyo icheek ak kole, “Kiptaiyat, Weeriitap Daudi, rirenech!”" 
Matthew20:31 Ki kergong' tuiyet pichooto kole kosiisyo; ago kites kowaach kole, “Kiptaiyat, ee weeriitap Daudi, rirenech!”" 
Matthew20:32 Ki tonon Jeso ak koguur icheek, ak koteebe koleenji, “Omache ayaiywok nee?”" 
Matthew20:33 Kowol kole, “Kiptaiyat, kimache keyatwech konyekyok.”" 
Matthew20:34 Kirirge Jeso ak kitwa konyekwak. Kigeerto sainooto ak koosup ineendet. 
Matthew21:1 Ye kiriiktoi icheek Jerusalem, komi Bethphage eng' tulweetap Mseituni, koyookto Jeso kasubik aeng'," 
Matthew21:2 koleenji, “Oba agoi nganaseet ne mi taing'wong', ak onyooru sigiryet ne rataat, komi ak moitanyi; otyach tuwai ak ogetwo." 
Matthew21:3 Ngo mwaiwok chii kiy, oleenji ineendet makyingei Kiptaiyat chooto; ak kogoonok.”" 
Matthew21:4 Kayaak ni si kobiit kosulda ne ki kimwa kobun maotyot kole," 
Matthew21:5 “Omwachi cheptap Zion, Keero, nyoonjinin Laitoryandeng'ung', tala, ak kobunu sigiryet, ak moitap sigiryet, parnotyot.”" 
Matthew21:6 Ki pa kasubik ak koyai ko uu ye ki iarorchi Jeso icheek. 
Matthew21:7 Kiget sigiryet ak moitanyi, ak koiitoochi ngoroikwak, ak kotebee inee parak." 
Matthew21:8 Ki iito che chaang' che po tuiyet ngoroikwak eng' ooreet; ak ki ep alak mooriigap keetiik ak koiito eng' ooreet. 
Matthew21:9 Kimwaoti tuiyosyek che ki indoe ineendet ak che ki isubi eng' kutit ne oo koleen, “Hosanna weeriitap Daudi! Iberuurot ineendet ne nyoonei eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat! Hosanna eng' ole toroor miising'!”" 
Matthew21:10 Ye kingo mong'ji Jerusalem, kochirchiren nganaseet komugul koteebe kole, “Ng'oo ni?”" 
Matthew21:11 Ki wol tuiyosyek kole, “Ni ko maotyot Jeso, ne punu Nazareth ne po Galilaya.”" 
Matthew21:12 Ki wo Jeso hekaluutap Kamuktaindet, ak koon tugul che ki aldaisyei ak che ki alisyei eng' yooto. Kigabui mesosyek che po woliigap silingisyek ak ng'echerogap che ki aldoi cheptugenik." 
Matthew21:13 Ki leenji icheek, “Siraat keele, ‘Kiguure koonnyu kootap saaet,’ ago kaowal koek kebeneetap rebiik.”" 
Matthew21:14 Ki pwanji ineendet eng' Hekaluut icheek che ki koryotiin ak che ing'waldos, ak ki isoop icheek." 
Matthew21:15 Ago ye kingo keer tisiik che eecheen ak siriik tuguuk che ki yai che po kwong'eet, ak lagok che kimwaei eng' kutit ne oo eng' Hekaluut, kole, “Hosanna weeriitap Daudi,” konereekso icheek miising'." 
Matthew21:16 Ki teebe icheek ineendet koleenji, “Igase ne mwaei chu?” Kowolji Jeso icheek koleenji, “Ee, ki ma osoman keele, ‘Ki ichopchigei kosulda kalasunet kobun kutusweegap lagok ak che reritos.’ ”" 
Matthew21:17 Ki pagaakta icheek, ak kwo komanda eng' nganaseet kwo agoi Bethania, ole ki wo koru olooto kemout." 
Matthew21:18 Eng' karononooto, ye ki weeksei kowendi nganaseet, koam rubeet." 
Matthew21:19 Kingo keer mogoywet eng' tabandap ooreet, kwo ole mi ago ma nyoorchi kiy kobatee sogeek kityo. Ak ki leenji keetoto, “Kobooch ra, koma iyie logoek kogeny agoi!” Ak koma tyanit kores mogoywondonooto." 
Matthew21:20 Ye kingo keer kasubik, kokwong'yo ak komwaei koleen, “Katepto ano si kores mogoywet koma tyanit?”" 
Matthew21:21 Ki wolji Jeso koleenji, “Amwaiwok iman ale, ngo tinye kayaneet, amosage, ko moyae ne kageyachi mogoywondoni kityo, ago agot ngo mwachi tulwooni oleenji ‘Ngesutin ak kewiirchin araraita,’ koyaaksei." 
Matthew21:22 Tuguuk alak tugul che osoome eng' saaet, oyani, otaache.”" 
Matthew21:23 Ye kingwo Hekaluut oriit, ak ye kita koneetisyei, kobwonji ineendet tisiik che eecheen ak poisyegap pichooto ak koleenji, “Nee kimnateet ne iyae tuguuchu? Ak kigoonin ng'oo kimnatoni?”" 
Matthew21:24 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Amache agane ateebenak ng'olyoo agenge, ne ngo mwaiwo, amwaiwok agane kimnatonooto ayae tuguuchu." 
Matthew21:25 Ki punu ano kabatisanetap Johana? Ki punu kipsengwet anan ki punu piik?” Ak kichaamjigei icheegei kole, “Ngot kemwa keele, ‘Ki punu kipsengwet,’ komwaiwech kole, ‘Kilya anyun si moyan ineendet?’" 
Matthew21:26 Ago ngemwa keele, ‘Ki punu piik,’ ki iywei tuiyet, amu iyani piik tugul kole Johana ko ki maotyot.”" 
Matthew21:27 Ki wolji `piik Jeso koleenji, “Ma kingen.” Komwachi agine koleenji, “Ma mwaiwok agane kimnateet ne ayae tuguuchu." 
Matthew21:28 “Ago oleen nee? Ki tinyei chii weeriik aeng'; ki wo ole mi weeriit ne po tai ak koleenji, ‘Weeri, ui poisye rani eng' mbareetap sabibuk.’" 
Matthew21:29 Ak ki wol kole, ‘Ma wendi,’ ago eng' let kosik ak kwo." 
Matthew21:30 Yeityo kwo ole mi ne po aeng' ak komwachi ko uu nooto. Ki wol kole, ‘Abba, awendi,’ ago ma wo." 
Matthew21:31 Ng'oo eng' chooto aeng' ne ki yai mageetap kwandanywa?” Kole, “Ne po tai.” Ki mwachi `Jeso icheek koleenji, “Amwaiwok iman ale, sip kondoenak koitei laitornatetap Kamuktaindet taagigap aisuruut ak chepkugonik." 
Matthew21:32 Amu kinyonjok Johana eng' ooreetap imanda, ago ma oyan ineendet, ago ki iyan ineendet taagigap aisuruut ak chepkugonik. Agot ye kingo kaogeer, koma osigu ak oyan ineendet." 
Matthew21:33 “Ogas kalewenet age: ki mi chiito age ne ki tinyei koot, ne kiminji sabibuk mbareet, ak kong'oot, ak kobal keriinget ole kiruruung'e logoek, ak koteech koot ne kooi. Kimanakyi meek ak kwo emet age." 
Matthew21:34 Ye kingo kagoriik ruroteetap logoek, koyookto otwogikyik koba ole mi meek, si koip logoekyik." 
Matthew21:35 Ki nam meek otwogikyik, kibir age, ak ki par age, ak kilach age eng' koik." 
Matthew21:36 Ki iyookto kogeny otwogik alak che siirei che po tai; ak ki yachi icheek ko uu nooto. 
Matthew21:37 Eng' let koyookyi weeriinnyi koleen, ‘Teechei weeriinnyu.’" 
Matthew21:38 Ago ye kingo keer meek weeriit, komwachigei kole, ‘Ni ne po tuguuk; obwa, kebar ineendet ak kenyaban tuguuk che kata tuun punjin ineendet.’" 
Matthew21:39 Ara ki nam ineendet ak kotoorta komanda eng' mbar, ak kobar." 
Matthew21:40 “Nooto anyun ye nyo chiitap ko po mbareetap sabibuk, koyachin nee meechooto?”" 
Matthew21:41 Ki wol kole, “Parei chiichooto po mbareet pichooto yaacheen eng' pareet ne ya, ak komanakyi mbareetap sabibuk meek alak, che igoochin ineendet logoek eng' ruratennywa.”" 
Matthew21:42 Ki leenji `Jeso icheek, “Tom osoman siruutik keele: ‘Koita ne ki eesyo teegik, ko koek nooto metit ne po luuita; punu Kiptaiyat niito ak po kwang'ut eng' konyekyok?’" 
Matthew21:43 “Nooto anyun amwaiwok ale, kirebenok laitornatetap Kamuktaindet, ak kigoochi laitornatet age ne yiei logoekyik." 
Matthew21:44 Ineendet ne ibutyin kooi parak koilei konyaknyagansei; ak age tugul ne tururchingei koiito, konyirnyiraksei.”" 
Matthew21:45 Ye kingo kas tisiik che eecheen ak Pharisaik kalewenaikyik, konai kole kang'alaali ineendet agobo icheek." 
Matthew21:46 Ki cheeng' icheek oor kole si konam ineendet, ago kiywei tuiyosyek, amu ki iyani piik kole ineendet ko maotyot." 
Matthew22:1 Ki ng'alaalji Jeso icheek kogeny eng' kalewenaik, koleenji," 
Matthew22:2 “Kiyanie pounatetap kipsengwet laitoryat anum ne ki yachi weeriinnyi igoortap katunisyet. 
Matthew22:3 Ki iyookto otwogikyik koguur icheek che kiga kemwachi agobo igoortap katunisyet; ago ma cham kobwa. 
Matthew22:4 Ki iyookto kogeny otwogik alak kole, ‘Omwachi icheek che kiga keguur oleenji kachobok amitwogik. Kageeny eiik ak alak che akwaen, ak chobootiin tuguuk tugul; obwa igoortap katunisyet.’" 
Matthew22:5 Ago ma iit ng'aleekyik ak ki pa ortinwekwak, kwo age mbareennyi, kwo age poisyennyi ne po mung'aaret," 
Matthew22:6 ko che ki ng'et konam otwogikyik, konyaliil ak kobar." 
Matthew22:7 Ki nereech anyun laitoryat. Ki iyookto lugosyekyik kobar rumichooto ak kobeel nganasennywa. 
Matthew22:8 Ki mwachi anyun otwogikyik koleenji, ‘Choboot igoortap katunisyet, ago ma nyoljin kobwa icheek kiga kemwachi." 
Matthew22:9 Oba anyun ole pesyechin ortinwek, ak oguurchi igoorto tugul che konyooru." 
Matthew22:10 Ki pa anyun otwogichooto ortinwek ak koyum tugul che kinyoor, che myach ak che yaach, ak ki nyi toek kootap katunisyet." 
Matthew22:11 “Ago ye kingo mong' laitoryat kogeer toek, kogeer chiito ne ki ma ilaach ngoryeetap katunisyet;" 
Matthew22:12 ak ki leenji, ‘Chorwani, kenyonunde ano ko metinye ngoryeetap katunisyet?’ Ak ki nam kuut, ma twek." 
Matthew22:13 Ki leenji anyun laitoryat kiboitiinik, ‘Orat ineendet eunek ak keelyek, ak owiirchi saang' ole mi mesundeito; olooto ole mi riirek ak nyeetap kelek.’" 
Matthew22:14 Amu kiguurei che chaang', ago ki leweni che ng'ering'.”" 
Matthew22:15 Ki pa anyun Pharisaik ak korwooch ole namdoi ineendet eng' ng'aleekyik. 
Matthew22:16 Ki iyookto kasubikwak kobooto che po Herodik koba ole mi ineendet, koleenji, “Kaneetindoni, kingen keele ii po iman, ak ineeti ooreetap Kamuktaindet eng' iman, ameiti chii tugul; amu megeere togoochigap piik." 
Matthew22:17 Mwaiwech anyun, Ibwaati nee inyee? Tos chamdaat eng' ng'atuutik kigoochi kodi Caesarea anan achicha?”" 
Matthew22:18 Ago ki nai Jeso yaityennywa, ak kole, “Okweek chombilichu, amu nee si otyema?" 
Matthew22:19 Oboorwo fedha ne po kodi.” Ak ki ipchi dinarit. 
Matthew22:20 Ak kiteebe icheek koleenji, “Itoondap ng'oo ni, ak po ng'oo siruutyet?”" 
Matthew22:21 Kowol kole, “Po Caesarea.” Koleenji ineendet anyun icheek, “Ogoochi Caesarea tuguuk che po Caesarea; ak ogoochi Kamuktaindet tuguuk che po Kamuktaindet.”" 
Matthew22:22 Ye kingo kas icheek niito, kokwong'yo; ki pagaach ineendet ak koba ooreenywa." 
Matthew22:23 Ki pwanji ineendet peetuunooto Sadukaik, che mwaei kole ma mi ng'eetyeetap che ki kobek; ak koteebe ineendet kole" 
Matthew22:24 “Kaneetindoni, ki mwa Musa kole, ‘Ngo me chii ama tinyei lagok, kondi ng'eetap kam osotyondonooto ak kolalji maat ineendet.’" 
Matthew22:25 Ki mi kwenunnyo murenik tisabu che kitupcho; kiitunis ne po tai ak kime ama sich lakwa. Kondi osotyonnyi ng'eetap kamet. 
Matthew22:26 Ki yai ko uu nooto ne po aeng' agine ak ne po somok, agoi ne po tisap." 
Matthew22:27 Kingo keskei tugul, kome agine kobogoryondonooto." 
Matthew22:28 Eng' ng'eetyeet anyun, ko tuun punjin ng'oo osotyondonooto eng' chooto tisap? Amu kiga kotun tugul ineendet.”" 
Matthew22:29 Ki wolji Jeso koleenji, “Oleele, amu mongen siruutik anan kimnateetap Kamuktaindet." 
Matthew22:30 Eng' ng'eetyeet ko tuun ma mi piik che itunisyei anan che igoitoi kitun, ago tuun kergeitu icheek ak malaikaisyek eng' kipsengwet." 
Matthew22:31 Ak agobo ng'eetyeetap piik che ki kobek koma osoman ne kimwaiwok Kamuktaindet kole," 
Matthew22:32 ‘Aa Kamuktaindet ne po Abraham, ne po Kamuktaindet Isak ak Kamuktaindet ne po Jakobo?’ Ineendet ko Kamuktaindet ma ne po che ki kobek, ago che saptos.”" 
Matthew22:33 Ak ye kingo kas tuiyosyek, kokwong'yo agobo kaneetisyennyi." 
Matthew22:34 Ye kingo kas Pharisaik kole kagoyai `ng'aleegap Jeso Sadukaik konamak kuut, koyumgei" 
Matthew22:35 ak koteebe age eng' icheek ne ki ng'amotyotap ng'atuutik, kole kotyem ineendet." 
Matthew22:36 Kile, “Kaneetindoni, ngoro ng'atuutyet ne oo eng' Ng'atuutik?”" 
Matthew22:37 Ak ki wolji koleenji, “Cham Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor neng'ung' eng' muguleldang'ung' komugul, eng' saboondang'ung' komugul ak eng' ng'omnateng'ung' komugul." 
Matthew22:38 Niito ng'atuutyet ne oo ak ko ne po tai. 
Matthew22:39 Ak ne po aeng' ne kergei ak niito ko ni, ‘Cham chiitap kokweng'ung' ko uu ole ichamdoige.’" 
Matthew22:40 Tononie Ng'atuutik tugul ak maotik, ng'atuutichu aeng'.”" 
Matthew22:41 Kingo ta koyumigei Pharisaik, koteebe Jeso icheek ng'olyoo," 
Matthew22:42 kole, “Obwaati nee okweek agobo Kristo? Weeriitap ng'oo ineendet?” Kowol icheek kole, “Weeriitap Daudi.”" 
Matthew22:43 koteebee icheek koleenji, “Lyon anyun Daudi eng' kamugetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil, si koguuree ineendet ‘Kiptaiyat,’ koleen," 
Matthew22:44 ‘Ki leenji Kiptaiyat Kiptaiyandennyu, Tebee eunnyu ne po tai, agoi ande puuniguk keldebesaigap keelyeguk.’" 
Matthew22:45 Ngot koguure anyun Daudi ineendet Kiptaiyat, ko weeriinnyi eng' nee?”" 
Matthew22:46 Ki ma imuuch age tugul kowolji ineendet ng'olyoo, ak kobooch peetuunooto agoi ko mata kogany chii koteebe ineendet ng'olyoo kogeny." 
Matthew23:1 Ki mwachi Jeso anyun tuiyosyek ak kasubikyik koleenji," 
Matthew23:2 “Tebee siriik ak Pharisaik ng'echereetap Musa; 
Matthew23:3 ko uu nooto anyun, oyai kiy age tugul ne ineetook ak osup nooto; ago moyai ko uu poisyonikwak, amu ma yaei icheek tuguuk che ineeti." 
Matthew23:4 Ratei icheek lautik che nyigiisen ak ko pichiien eng' laiset ak konde tigigoigap piik; ama istoi icheeget eng' mornet agenge. 
Matthew23:5 Ago yaei poisyonikwak tugul si kogeer piik; amu yaei kotebesiitu lolotinwegap siruutik ak kobaroi tabanwegap ngoroikwak. 
Matthew23:6 Chamei icheek ole tagunoot eng' igoorwek ak ng'echerok che eecheen eng' sinagogisyek," 
Matthew23:7 chamei kagatosyek eng' ole kiyae mung'aaret, ak kogasigei ye kasei koguure piik icheek ‘Rabbi.’" 
Matthew23:8 Ago amongeguurenok ‘Rabbi,’ amu agenge Kanetindeng'wong', ak okweek tugul ko otupchosyek." 
Matthew23:9 Amoguure chii eng' ng'wony ‘abba,’ amu agenge Kwandang'wong', ineendet ne mi kipsengwet." 
Matthew23:10 Amocham keguurenok ‘kaneetik,’ amu agenge kaneetindeng'wong', Kristo nooto." 
Matthew23:11 Ne oo eng' kwenung'wong' koegu kiboityondeng'wong'. 
Matthew23:12 Age tugul ne ieetegei ko tuun kiming'ini; ak age tugul ne iming'inigei ko tuun kieeti. 
Matthew23:13 “Ago pwo eng' okweek, siriik ak Pharisaik, chombilik! Amu ogere piik pounatetap kipsengwet. Amu mochutei okweeget olooto, ak che machei kochut olooto ko mochamjini koba." 
Matthew23:14 Pwo eng' okweek, siriik ak Pharisaik, chombilik! Amu oame kooriigap mosoogik ak osaae saautik che kooen eng' ng'aalseenng'wong'; nooto anyun onyooru kirwooget ne siirtoot." 
Matthew23:15 “Pwo eng' okweek, siriik ak Pharisaik, chombilik! Amu olandoe araraita ak obun emet ocheeng'e owal chii kobunjook, ak ye kagobunjok, oyai ineendet koek lakweetap Gehenna konyil aeng' kosiirok." 
Matthew23:16 “Pwo eng' okweek, kandoik che oo koryotiin, che omwae ole, ‘Age tugul ne iyasyee Hekaluut koma kiy; ago age tugul ne iyasyee thahabu che po Hekaluut ko pesenindet.’" 
Matthew23:17 Okweek che oo perber ak oo koryotiin! Ngoro ne oo, thahabu anan Hekaluut ne ki itiliili thahabu?" 
Matthew23:18 Ak omwae ole, ‘Age tugul ne iyasyee kaptisisyet koma kiy; ago age tugul ne iyasyee kagoochinet ne mi kaptisisyet ko pesinindet ineendet.’" 
Matthew23:19 Okweek kipkoratinik! Ngoro ne oo, kagoochinet anan kaptisisyet ne itiliili kagoochinet?" 
Matthew23:20 Ara ineendet ne iyasyee kaptisisyet, koyasyee kaptisisyonooto ak tuguuk tugul che miitei yooto." 
Matthew23:21 Ara ineendet ne iyasyee Hekaluut, koyasyee olooto tiliil ak ineendet ne menyei olooto." 
Matthew23:22 Ak ineendet ne iyasyee kipsengwet, koyasyee ng'echereetap Kamuktaindet ak ineendet ne tebee yooto." 
Matthew23:23 Pwo eng' okweek, siriik ak Pharisaik, chombilik! Amu ogoitoi kebebertap taman ne po heduosmon, pisalik ak kamon, ak ki obagaach chooto po kamanuut che po ng'atuutik: kirwooget ak rireenetapkei ak kayaneet. Chuuto che kanyool oyai amobagaach chuun alak." 
Matthew23:24 Okweek kandoik che oo koryotiin! Ogeneni ting'wichet ak olugui tambeesyet! 
Matthew23:25 “Pwo eng' okweek, siriik ak Pharisaik, chombilik! Amu otiliili kigombet ak sanit parak, ago oriit ko nyiitaat rebisyet ak keiyandit." 
Matthew23:26 Inyee Pharisaindet ne koraat! Itiliil korook kigombet oriit, si kobiit kotiliiliit parak agine." 
Matthew23:27 “Pwo eng' okweek, siriik ak Pharisaik, chombilik! Amu oo kerge ak kereeriisyek che kigesal koleelagitu, che korooron iman parak eng' keeret, ago nyiitootiin oriit kawegap piik che ki kobek ak murwoonindo tugul." 
Matthew23:28 Ara ou nooto okweek ye otaagu ko uu piigap iman eng' taitap piik, ago oriing'wong' ko nyiitaat chombilisyet ak tengekto." 
Matthew23:29 “Pwo eng' okweek, siriik ak Pharisaik, chombilik! Amu oteeche kereeriisyegap maotik ak olelesanjini kereeriisyegap che po imanda." 
Matthew23:30 Ak omwae ole, ‘Nda ki kimi eng' peetuusyegap kwanisyekyok, ta ki ma keyamdoi ak icheeget tumdaetap korotiigap maotik.’" 
Matthew23:31 Nooto obaoryanjinigei oleen oo weeriigap icheek che ki par maotik. 
Matthew23:32 Onyiit anyun kerutyetap kwanisyekwok. 
Matthew23:33 Erenochu, oo lagogap erenook che ng'woneen, ochilildoi ano eng' kirwoogetap Gehenna!" 
Matthew23:34 Nooto anyun ayookwok maotik, piik che ng'oomen ak siriik, che alak eng' icheek ko tuun obare ak ogartoti, ak obire kipchoritiit alak eng' icheek eng' sinagogisyekwok, ak ousoti kong'etee nganaseet age agoi nganaseet age." 
Matthew23:35 Ak tebee paragung'wong' korotiigap che po imanda tugul che kigetumda eng' ng'wony, kobooch korotiigap Abel ne ki po iman agoi korotiigap Zekariah weeriitap Barachiah, ne ki obar eng' kwenutap Hekaluut ak kaptisisyet." 
Matthew23:36 Amwaiwok iman ale, pwaanjin ibini tuguuchu tugul." 
Matthew23:37 “Ee Jerusalem, Jerusalem, ne parei maotik ak kolage koik icheek che ki kiyookyi! Ki amach konyil ata ayum lagoguk ko uu ye iyumi ngokyet aarekyik eng' kebebaikyik, ago ma ocham!" 
Matthew23:38 Ogeero, kagebagakwok koonng'wong' koek kipkuubere." 
Matthew23:39 Amu amwaiwok ale, ma ogeera kogeny agoi omwa ole, ‘Iberuurot ineendet ne nyoonei eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat.’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 Ye ki mandoi Jeso eng' Hekaluut kowendi pandanyi, kobwonji kasubikyik ak koboorchi ineendet teeksosyegap Hekaluut." 
Matthew24:2 Ago ki wolji ineendet icheek kole, “Mogeere tuguuchu tugul? Amwaiwok iman ale, ma koi ng'etunee koita age paragutap age, ne ma ki wiirchin ng'wony.”" 
Matthew24:3 Ye kitebyei ng'wony eng' tulweetap Mseituni, kobwonji ineendet kasubik komi ineegei, ak kole, “Mwaiwech, egu au tuguuchu? Ak tuun uu nee kaboorunetap nyonuneng'ung' ak kagesunetap ng'wony?”" 
Matthew24:4 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Oriipkei si ma ibeetook chii." 
Matthew24:5 Amu tuun pwoonei che chaang' eng' kainennyu koleen, ‘Aa Kristo’ ak kobeet che chaang'." 
Matthew24:6 Tuun ogase agobo lugoosyek ak ng'aleek agobo paretapkei; oriipkei si moaragense; amu pwoonei tuguuchu matiny; ago tomo koitu kagesunet. 
Matthew24:7 Amu tuun setyin pororyet age pororyet age, ak setyin laitornatet age laitornatet age, ak tuun piitu rubosyek ak potaneetap ng'wony eng' emotinwek che teerchiin." 
Matthew24:8 Ago tuguuchu tugul ko taunetap ng'waninwek. 
Matthew24:9 “Ak kogoitok icheek kinyaliilak ak kebaraak; ak kowechok pororyosyek tugul agobo kainennyu. 
Matthew24:10 Tuun ibutyin tengek che chaang', tuun ng'wektogei ak kosuryo icheegei eng' icheegei." 
Matthew24:11 Tuun ng'eetos maotik che chaang' che po lembech ak kobeet che chaang'. 
Matthew24:12 Ak amu tesoksei yaityet, kogaitititu chamyetap che chaang'." 
Matthew24:13 Ago ineendet ne muitoi agoi kagesunet, kesaru." 
Matthew24:14 Ak logoiywechu myach po laitornatet ko tuun keamdaati eng' ng'wony komugul koek paornateet eng' pororyosyek tugul; ak koit anyun kagesunet. 
Matthew24:15 “Ye ogeer anyun kiit ne kiwechei ne po ng'emisyet kotonone ole-tiliil, ko uu ye ki mwa maotyot Daniel (ingoguiyo ineendet ne somani)," 
Matthew24:16 ko ingomwechi tuloonook anyun icheek che mi Judea; 
Matthew24:16 ko ingomwechi tuloonook anyun icheek che mi Judea; 
Matthew24:17 ama choorugei ineendet ne mi koot parak si konem tuguuk che mi koonnyi; 
Matthew24:18 ama weekyingei let ne mi mbar si koip ngoryennyi. 
Matthew24:19 Pwo eng' icheek che chii oo ak che tinyei lagok che reritos eng' peetuusyechooto! 
Matthew24:20 Osaa anyun si ma piit mweeng'wong' eng' peetuusyegap kaititindo anan eng' peetuutap sabato. 
Matthew24:21 Amu tuun piitu nyalilda ne oo, ne kitom kobiitu kobooch taunetap ng'wony agoi nguno, ama koegu kogeny." 
Matthew24:22 Ak nda ma kiga keetil konwagitu peetuusyechooto, ta ma ki saru chii; ago kitilei peetuusyechooto agobo che lewenotin." 
Matthew24:23 “Ngo mwaiwok chii age tugul eng' peetuunooto kole, ‘Ogeero! Mi oli Kristo’ anan ‘Mi olo’ ko mat oyan." 
Matthew24:24 Amu tuun ng'eetos Kristoisyek che po lembech ak maotik che po lembech, ak koboortoi kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik che eecheen; si kobeet, nda imugaksei, agot che lewenotin." 
Matthew24:25 Ogeero, kaasip amwaiwok." 
Matthew24:26 Nooto anyun ngo mwaiwok kole, ‘Ogeero! Miitei ineendet surkwen,’ ko mat obe. ‘Ogeero! Miitei ineendet koot ne po oriit,’ ko mat oyan." 
Matthew24:27 Ko uu ye mong'u kalyeleet eng' kong'asiis ak kegeerot agoi cherongo, ko egu ko uu nooto nyonunetap Weeriitap chii." 
Matthew24:28 Oldo age tugul ole mi muusto, koyumjingei olooto motong'wek." 
Matthew24:29 “Ne ma tyanit ko kagogeskei nyalilda ne po peetuusyechooto, koimenit asiista, ama kooluu arawet, ak rorogu kecheik eng' kipsengwet, ak kitumdum kimnatosyek che po kipsengwet." 
Matthew24:30 “Ak kotook anyun eng' kipsengwet kaboorunetap Weeriitap chii, ak koteiyo anyun pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony, ak kogeer Weeriitap chii konyonei eng' pooligap kipsengwet kobooto kimnateet ak liilindo ne oo." 
Matthew24:31 Ak tuun iyooktoi malaikaisyekyik ak cheet ne oo ne po iryageet, ak koyum lewenikyik kobun usoonaik ang'wan, kobooch tabandap kipsengwet agoi tabanda age." 
Matthew24:32 “Oneetkei anyun kalewenetap mogoywet: ye kang'arng'aritu mooriikyik, ak kong'atyo sogeek, onai ole neegit kesisyet." 
Matthew24:33 Ara uu nooto, ye ogeer tuguuchu tugul, onai ole kagoriik ineendet, mi kurgotik." 
Matthew24:34 Amwaiwok iman ale, ma siirtoi ibini ama isulda tuguuchuuto tugul." 
Matthew24:35 Siirtoi kipsengwet ak ng'wony, ago ma siirtoi ng'aleekyuk." 
Matthew24:36 “Ago ma naei chii age tugul agobo peetuunooto ak sainooto, ma naei agot malaikaisyegap kipsengwet, anan Weeriit, ago Kwanda ineegei." 
Matthew24:37 Ko uu ole kiteptoi peetuusyechu ki po Noah, ko egu ko uu nooto nyonunetap Weeriitap chii." 
Matthew24:38 Ko uu eng' peetuusyechooto ye kitom kobiit maraneet ko ki amisyei ak koeisei, kiitunisyei ak kogoitoi kitun, agoi peetuut ne ki wo Noah moinget oriit," 
Matthew24:39 ak ki ma nai icheek agoi koit maraneet ak kogees icheek tugul, egu ko uu nooto nyonunetap Weeriitap chii." 
Matthew24:40 Tuun poisyei murenik aeng'u eng' mbar; kimuti age, kebagaakta age." 
Matthew24:41 Tuun ng'aisei kobogorisyek aeng'u eng' koita agenge; kimuti age, kebagaakta age." 
Matthew24:42 Oriipse anyun, amu mongen peetuut ne nyoonei Kiptaiyandeng'wong'." 
Matthew24:43 Ago onai ni: nda kiga nai chiitap ko po koot kole sait ngoro ne nyoonei choriindet, ta ki riipsei ak ta ki ma kochamdoi kebut koonnyi." 
Matthew24:44 Nooto anyun ochoboge ak okweek, amu nyoonei Weeriitap chii eng' sait ne mobwaati." 
Matthew24:45 “Ng'oo anyun otwogindet ne kiyani ak ko utaat, ne ki inde kiptaiyandennyi kotononji koonnyi, ak kogoochi piik amitwogikwak eng' peetuut ne yamei?" 
Matthew24:46 Paibai otwogindonooto nyooru kiptaiyandennyi komi koboisye ye weigei ineendet. 
Matthew24:47 Amwaiwok iman ale, indoi ineendet koboi tuguuk tugul che tinyei." 
Matthew24:48 Ago ngo mwa otwogindet ne ya eng' muguleldanyi, kole, ‘Ta kogaegei kiptaiyandennyu,’" 
Matthew24:49 ak kotoi kobir otwogik, ak koamis ak koeeiso kobooto che pogitos," 
Matthew24:50 nyoonei anyun kiptaiyatap otwogindonooto eng' peetuut ne leen ineendet ma nyoonei, ak eng' sait ne ma naei," 
Matthew24:51 ak kobir miising' ak kogoochi kebebertanyi kobooto chombilik, egu eng' olooto riirek ak nyeetap kelek." 
Matthew25:1 “Ki yanie anyun pounatetap kipsengwet pergeinik taman che ki ip taisyekwak ak koba kotorookta sandetap katunisyet. 
Matthew25:2 Ki perberen muutu eng' icheek ak ki utaatiin muutu. 
Matthew25:3 Ye kingo ip che perber taisyekwak, koma ipto icheek mwanik;" 
Matthew25:4 ago ki ip che utaatiin mwanik eng' chuboisyekwak kobooto taisyekwak. 
Matthew25:5 Ak ye kita kogaegei sandet, kobirto met tugul ak koruiyo." 
Matthew25:6 Ago ki piit waagaat kemoi kween, ‘Ogeero! Kagoit sandet! Omong'u otorooch ineendet.’" 
Matthew25:7 Ki ng'eetyo anyun pergeinichooto tugul, kochop taisyekwak." 
Matthew25:8 Ak ki leenji anyun che perber che utaatiin, Onagech mwanikwok; amu machei komisogis taisyekyok." 
Matthew25:9 Ago ki wolji che utaatiin, koleenji, ‘Abeere mayamech acheek ak okweek: kaigai obe ole mi che aldoi, ak oaljige.’" 
Matthew25:10 Ak kingo ta kobendi koalisyei, koit sandet; ak komong'ji anyun che chobootiin igoortap katunisyet ak ineendet: ak ki kiger kurgeet." 
Matthew25:11 Ak eng' let kobwa pergeinik chugai ak icheek, ak kole, ‘Kiptaiyat, Kiptaiyat, yaatwech.’" 
Matthew25:12 Ago ki wol kole, ‘Amwaiwok iman ale, mangenok.’ ”" 
Matthew25:13 Nooto anyun oriipse, amu mongen peetuut anan sait." 
Matthew25:14 “Amu uu ye wendi chii emet age, koguur otwogikyik ak kogoochi tuguukyik." 
Matthew25:15 Ki igoochi age talendaisyek muut, kogoochi age aeng', kogoochi age agenge, age tugul ko uu kamugennyi; ak kwo pandanyi." 
Matthew25:16 Ki wo anyun ineendet ne kitaach talendaisyek muut ak kwo koboisyee, ak kinyoor talendaisyek alak muut." 
Matthew25:17 Ki yai ko uu nooto agine ne kitaach aeng' ak kinyoor aeng' alak. 
Matthew25:18 Ago ineendet ne kitaach agenge kogiwo kobal ng'wony ak kounyee yooto fedha ne po kiptaiyandennyi. 
Matthew25:19 “Ye kingo pata peetuusyek che chaang', konyo kiptaiyatap otwogichooto, ak koiit kobooto icheeget." 
Matthew25:20 Ak ki nyo ineendet ne kiga taach talendaisyek muut koibu talendaisyek muut alak ak kole, ‘Kiptaiyat, ki igoono talendaisyek muut; keero, ki anyooru talendaisyek muut alak.’" 
Matthew25:21 Ki leenji kiptaiyandennyi, ‘Ki iyai ne myee, otwogindoni myee ak ne kiyani; koiegu ne po iman eng' tuguuk che ng'ering', kandein ibou tuguuk che chaang'; mong'ji anyun poiboiyetap kiptaiyandeng'ung'.’" 
Matthew25:22 “Ak ki nyo agine ne kiga taach talendaisyek aeng' ak kole, ‘Kiptaiyat, ki igoono talendaisyek aeng', keero, ki anyooru talendaisyek alak aeng'.’" 
Matthew25:23 Ki leenji kiptaiyandennyi, ‘Ki iyai ne myee, otwogindoni myee ak ne kiyani; koiegu ne po iman eng' tuguuk che ng'ering', kandein ibou tuguuk che chaang'; mong'ji anyun poiboiyetap kiptaiyandeng'ung'.’" 
Matthew25:24 “Ki nyo agine ne kiga taach talendait agenge ak kole, ‘Kiptaiyat, ki angenin ale, ii chii ne kolgol, igese eng' ole ma igoolji, ak iyumi eng' ole ma ilechi;" 
Matthew25:25 ara ki aiywei, ak ki awe auny talendaing'ung' eng' ng'wony. Keero, ee, nam anyun nooto ne neng'ung'.’" 
Matthew25:26 “Ago ki wolji kiptaiyandennyi ak koleenji, ‘Otwogindoni ya ak ko choriren! Ki inai ile agese eng' ole ma agool ak ayumi eng' ole ki ma alechi?" 
Matthew25:27 Kiga nyoljin anyun indeiywo fedhaisyekyuk ole tesoksei, ak ye aweege ataach chechuuk kobooto che kitesak." 
Matthew25:28 Orebee anyun ineendet talendait, ak ogoochi ineendet ne tinyei talendaisyek taman." 
Matthew25:29 Amu age tugul ne tinyei, kigoochin si kosich che chaang'; ago ineendet ne ma tinyei, kerebee agot ne tinyei." 
Matthew25:30 Otoorchin anyun otwogindet ne ma tilei kiy mesundeito ne po saang', ole egu riirek ak nyeetap kelek.’" 
Matthew25:31 “Ye nyo Weeriitap chii eng' toroornatennyi, kobooto malaikaisyek tugul, kotebee anyun ng'echereetap toroornatennyi." 
Matthew25:32 Tuun kiyumji tainnyi pororyosyek tugul, ak kokwei icheek koobeesyo ko uu ye ibestos mestowot keechiirek ak ng'oroorek," 
Matthew25:33 ak konde keechiirek eunnyi ne po tai ak ng'oroorek eng' kaataam. 
Matthew25:34 “Yeityo komwachi `Laitoryat icheek che mi eunnyi ne po tai koleenji, ‘Obwa, okweek che oberuurotin che oo po Abba, onam laitornatet ne kigechobwok kobooch ko kagilumda ng'wony;" 
Matthew25:35 amu ki ama rubeet ak ki ogoono aam, ki ama melel ak ki onaga aee, ki aa too ak ki otaacha;" 
Matthew25:36 ki ami aach ngor ak ki olaaksewo, ki amyani ak ki obwa ogeero, ki ami korgoreet ak ki orutecho.’" 
Matthew25:37 Kowolji anyun che po imanda koleenji, ‘Kiptaiyat, ki kigeerin au koamin rubeet ak kebain, anan koamin melel ak kinagin iee?" 
Matthew25:38 Ak ki kigeerin au ko ii too ak ketaachin, anan imi aach ngor ak kilaakseun?" 
Matthew25:39 Ak ki kigeerin au imyani anan eng' korgoreet ak kerutochin?’ 
Matthew25:40 Ak kowolji Laitoryat koleenji, ‘Amwaiwok iman ale, ko uu ye ki oyachi agot agenge eng' chu mengeech, eng' tupchosyechuchuk, ko ki oyaiywo.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Koleenji anyun icheek che mi murot kaataam, ‘Oba eng' ole ami, okweek che oo chubootiin, oba maat ne po koigeny ne kigechopchi chesawilyet ak malaikaisyekyik;" 
Matthew25:42 amu ki ama rubeet ak ki ma ogoono aam, ki ama melel ak ki ma onaga aee," 
Matthew25:43 ki aa too ak ki ma otaacha, ki ami aach ngor ak ki ma olaaksewo, ki amyani ak eng' korgoreet ak ki ma obwa ogeero.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Kowol anyun icheek kole, ‘Kiptaiyat, ki kigeerin au koamin rubeet anan melel, anan ko ii too, anan imi aach ingor, anan imyani, anan imi korgoreet, ama kiboisyeun?’" 
Matthew25:45 Kowolji anyun kole, ‘Amwaiwok iman ale, ko uu ye ma oyachi agenge eng' chu mengech eng' tugul, koma oyaiywo.’" 
Matthew25:46 Ak pendi chu ole mi nyalilda ne po koigeny; ago pendi che po imanda ole mi saboondap koigeny.” 
Matthew26:1 Ye kingo kagogees Jeso ng'aleechu tugul, koleenji kasubikyik," 
Matthew26:2 “Ongen ole ye ibata peetuusyek aeng'u koek igoortap paska, ak keng'wektoi Weeriitap chii si kigartaat.”" 
Matthew26:3 Ki iyumgei anyun tisiik che eecheen ak poisyegap pichooto eng' seremutap kootap tisiindet ne oo, ne kiguure Caiaphas," 
Matthew26:4 ak kitet icheek ng'aleek kole si konam Jeso eng' ng'aalseet ak kobar ineendet. 
Matthew26:5 Ago ki mwa icheek kole, “Ma eng' peetuusyegap igoorto, si ma ng'eet polateet eng' piik.”" 
Matthew26:6 Ak ye ki mi Jeso Bethania eng' kootap Simion ne ki tinyei mogondosaik," 
Matthew26:7 konyonji ineendet kobogoryot ne ki tinyei chuboit ne mi mwaita ne nyamdut ne mi parak miising' alyennyi, ak koroong'ji metitap Jeso ye kita koamisyei." 
Matthew26:8 Ago ye kingo keer kasubik, konereekso ak kole, “Po nee kaseroni?" 
Matthew26:9 Amu kota ki aldoe mwai tuguuk che chaang', ak kigoochi kibananook.”" 
Matthew26:10 Ago ye kingo nai Jeso, koleenji icheek, “Kalya si oiim kobogoryondoni? Amu kayaiywo inee poisyet ne myee." 
Matthew26:11 Amu otinye kotugul kibananook; ago ma mi anee kobootok kotugul. 
Matthew26:12 Amu ye roong'ji mwaita poortanyu, ko kachopcha tubeet." 
Matthew26:13 Amwaiwok iman ale, ui tugul ole tuun ki amdaate logoiywechu myach eng' ng'wony komugul, kemwaei nooto kagoyai koek ne kibwaatee ineendet.”" 
Matthew26:14 Ki wo anyun age eng' chooto taman ak aeng' ne keguure Judas Iskaryot, ole mi tisiik che eecheen," 
Matthew26:15 ak kole, “Nee ne ogoono si ande ineendet eunekwok?” Kigamanji ineendet fedhaisyek sosom." 
Matthew26:16 Ak kobooch yooto kocheeng' ineendet poroindo ne ng'wektoe ineendet. 
Matthew26:17 Ki pwanji `kasubik Jeso eng' peetuutap tai ne po peetuusyegap magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, ak koleenji, “Imache kechobuun ano ole iame paska?”" 
Matthew26:18 Ki le ineendet, “Oba nganaseet ole mi chii anum, ak oleenji, ‘Kale Kaneetindet, Kagoriik sainnyu; ayaei paska eng' koong'ung' kobooto kasubikyuk.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Ak ki yai kasubik ko uu ye ki ng'at Jeso, ak ki chop paska." 
Matthew26:20 Ye kingo ek koskoleny kotebi eng' amisyet kobooto kasubikyik chooto taman ak aeng'; 
Matthew26:21 ak ye kita koamisyei, kole, “Amwaiwok iman ale, ng'wektoo agenge eng' okweek.”" 
Matthew26:22 Ak ki iimak icheek miising' ak kotoi komwachi ineendet age tugul koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, tos anee?”" 
Matthew26:23 Ki wol kole, “Ineendet ne kagiburburtoi tuwai eng' taabeet, nooto ne ng'wektoo." 
Matthew26:24 Wendi Weeriitap chii, ko uu ye ki kisir agobo ineendet, ago pwo chiichooto ne king'wektoe Weeriitap chii! Kita myee eng' chiichooto nda ki ma kisich.”" 
Matthew26:25 Ki teebee Judas, ne king'wektoi ineendet kole, “Rabbi, tos anee?” Kowolji koleenji, “Kaimwa.”" 
Matthew26:26 Ye ki amisyei, konam Jeso magatyat ak kingo kagoberuur, kogoochi kasubikyik, ak kole, “Onam magatyandani ak oam; ni ko poortanyu.”" 
Matthew26:27 Ki nam kigombet, ak kingo kagoweekta kongoi, kogoochi icheek, ak koleenji, “Oee eng' niito, okweek tugul;" 
Matthew26:28 amu chu ko korotiikyuk che po arorutyet, che kitumdoi agobo che chaang' ak agobo nyoetap kaat ne po tengekwogik." 
Matthew26:29 Amwaiwok ale, kobooch nguno koma aee che po logoechu po sabibuk agoi peetuunooto ne aee che leelach kobootok eng' laitornatetap Abba.”" 
Matthew26:30 Ye kingo kagotyen tyendo, komanda koba tulweetap Mseituni." 
Matthew26:31 Ki mwachi Jeso icheek koleenji, “Kinachok okweek tugul agobo anee kemouni; amu siraat kole, ‘Tuun abire mestowot, ak koyesta keechiirek che po akweet.’" 
Matthew26:32 Ago ye tuun king'eeta, andoenok awendi Galilaya.”" 
Matthew26:33 Ago ki wol Petero kole, “Agot nginach tugul agobo inyee, koma koi kinacha anee.”" 
Matthew26:34 Koleenji Jeso, “Amwaun iman, ale, kotom koote kipsoiywet kemouni, ieesyoa konyil somok.”" 
Matthew26:35 Koleenji Petero, “Agot nda kanyool ame kobooten, koma eesyoin.” Ak ki mwa ko uu nooto kasubik tugul." 
Matthew26:36 Ki pa anyun Jeso kobooto icheek ole kiguure Gethsemane, ak ki leenji kasubikyik, “Otebi yu, ye awendi yuun si asa.”" 
Matthew26:37 Ki imut Petero ak weeriik aeng' che po Zebedayo, ak kotoi koaragen ak koimak miising' eng' muguleldanyi." 
Matthew26:38 Ki mwachi ineendet anyun icheek koleenji, “Arageni miising' saboondanyu, agoi meet; otebee yu, ak oriipse kobooto.”" 
Matthew26:39 Ak ki wo tai kitigin, ak kobutyi ng'wony ak kosa kole, “Ee Abba, ngo mugaksei, kosiirtoena kigombani; ma ko uu ye amache ago ko uu ye imache inyee.”" 
Matthew26:40 Ki nyo koweek ole mi kasubik ak konyoor icheek koruitos, ak koleenji Petero, “Kaga momuuchi oriipse kobooto agot sait agenge?" 
Matthew26:41 Oriipse ak osaae, si mochut yoomseet; chamei saboondo iman, ago nyaluli poorto.”" 
Matthew26:42 Ki wo kogeny ne po aeng' ak ki sa kole, “Ee Abba, ngo ma chamdaat kosiirtoena kigombani ama aee, ingoyaak anyun mageng'ung'.”" 
Matthew26:43 Ki nyo koweek kogeny ak konyoor icheek koruitos, amu kinyigiisen konyekwak." 
Matthew26:44 Ki pagaach icheek kogeny, ak ki wo kosa ne po somok, komwa ng'aleechugaita." 
Matthew26:45 Ki nyoonji anyun kasubik ak koleenji, “Oruitosi kora ak omuuny? Keero, kait sait, ak kageng'wekyi Weeriitap chii eunegap kiptengeginik." 
Matthew26:46 Ong'eetyee, keebe. Keero, kagoit ineendet ne ng'wektoo.”" 
Matthew26:47 Kingo ta kong'alaali, ogeero, konyo Judas, age eng' taman ak aeng', kobooto piik che chaang' che tinyei rotoogap chok ak kirokweek, kobunu kaptisiik che eecheen ak poisyegap pichooto." 
Matthew26:48 Kiga komwachi icheek kabooruno, kole, “Ineendet ne ang'ututi ko ineendet nooto; onam.”" 
Matthew26:49 Ki nyoonji Jeso eng' yooto ak kole, “Chamge, Rabbi!” Ak kong'utut ineendet." 
Matthew26:50 Ki leenji `Jeso ineendet, “Chorwani, yai kiit ne kenyonjini.” Ki pwa anyun icheek ak koyogooito eunekwak konam Jeso ak korat ineendet." 
Matthew26:51 Eng' sainooto, ko ki iyogoito eunnyi age eng' icheek che ki mi kobooto Jeso, ak kong'us rotwennyi po chok, ak koep otwogindetap tisiindet ne oo, kong'eti itinnyi." 
Matthew26:52 Koleenji Jeso anyun, “Iweekyi rotweng'ung' ole kami; amu pegu eng' rotoogap chok tugul che namei rotoogap chok." 
Matthew26:53 Anan ileen ma muuchi asoom Abba, ak koyookwo agot nguno malaikaisyek che siirei lugoosyek taman ak aeng'?" 
Matthew26:54 Isuldoitoi ano anyun siruutik, che leen egu ko uu niito matiny?”" 
Matthew26:55 Ki leenji `Jeso tuiyosyek eng' sainooto, “Komong'u ko uu ye osetyini rebindet, otinye rotoogap chok ak kirokweek si onama? Ki atebye peetuusyek tugul eng' Hekaluut aneetisyei ak ki ma onama." 
Matthew26:56 Ago kabwa chu tugul, si kobiit kosulda siruutik che po maotik.” Ki pagaakta ineendet anyun kasubik tugul ak komwei." 
Matthew26:57 Ki imut icheeget che kiga nam Jeso kwo kootap tisiindet ne oo ne kiguure Caiaphas, ole kiga koyumjigei siriik ak poisyek." 
Matthew26:58 Ago ki isubot Petero ineendet eng' ye loo kot koit seremutap kootap tisiindet ne oo, ak ki wo ko, ak ki tep ng'wony kobooto asigarik kole si kogeer ole igeesundogei." 
Matthew26:59 Ak ki cheeng' tisiik che eecheen ak kapkirwooget komugul paornateet ne po lembech agobo Jeso, si kobiit kobar ineendet," 
Matthew26:60 ago ki ma nyoor, agot nganda ki pwa paorinik che chaang' che po lembech. Eng' let kobwa aeng'u" 
Matthew26:61 ak kole, “Ki mwa chiichi kole, ‘Amuuchi ang'em hekaluutap Kamuktaindet, ak ateech eng' peetuusyek somok.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 Ki tonon tisiindet ne oo ak koleenji, “Mewolu kiy? Nee niito ne paoryanjinin pichu?”" 
Matthew26:63 Ago ki siis Jeso. Ki leenji tisiindet ne oo, “Ayosyeun eng' Kamuktaindet ne sabei ale, mwaiwech ngo ii Kristo, Weeriitap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Matthew26:64 Koleenji Jeso, “Kaimwa. Ago amwaiwok ale, Kobooch nguno kotun ogeere Weeriitap chii kotebyei eng' eutap tai ne po kamuktaet, ak konyonei eng' pooligap kipsengwet.”" 
Matthew26:65 Kigereer anyun tisiindet ne oo ngoroikyik ak kole, “Kagomwa ne ya! Ta kemage nee paorinik alak? Kaogas nguno mwaet ne ya." 
Matthew26:66 Oleen nee?” Kowol icheek kole, “Nyoljin kome.”" 
Matthew26:67 Kising'ilji togeennyi ak koluch; ak korabach alak," 
Matthew26:68 kole, “Ng'ang'wech, inyee Kristo! Ng'oo nooto ne kakwerin?”" 
Matthew26:69 Kitebyei Petero eng' seremutap koot. Ak ki wo chepto ye mi ineendet ak koleenji, “Koimi inyee kobooto Jeso Galiilindet.”" 
Matthew26:70 Ago ki eesyo eng' taitap tugul kole, “Mangen nooto imwae.”" 
Matthew26:71 Kingo kagomanda kwo keter, kogeer chepto age ineendet ak koleenji icheek che ki mi olooto, “Ki mi chiichi ak Jeso ne po Nazareth.”" 
Matthew26:72 Ki eesyo kogeny eng' kayasyoet kole, “Mangen chiichooto.”" 
Matthew26:73 Ne ma tya kobwa che kitonondos eng' ye neegit ak koleenji Petero, “Iman, ii age eng' pichooto, amu ng'ang'doin ng'aleeguk.”" 
Matthew26:74 Ki toi anyun kochubis ak koyasyo kole, “Mangen chiichooto!” Ak koma tyanit koote kipsoiywet." 
Matthew26:75 Ki ibwaat Petero ng'olyoot ne kiga komwa Jeso kole, “Kotom koote kipsoiywet, ieesyoa konyil somok.” Ak kimanda saang' ak koriir eng' ng'wanindo." 
Matthew27:1 Ye kingo kagoeech, korwooch tisiik tugul che eecheen ak poisyegap pichooto, korwookyi ole partoi Jeso." 
Matthew27:2 Ki rat ineendet, koomut ak ipkogoochi Pilato pounindet." 
Matthew27:3 Ye kingo keer Judas anyun kole kagirwookyi Jeso, komwa ndara ak koweekyi tisiik che eecheen ak poisyek fedhaisyechooto sosom." 
Matthew27:4 Ki mwa kole, “Kaalel amu kaang'wekte korotiik che ma tinyei tengek.” Ago ki wol icheek kole, “Tiing'enech nee ng'aleeguk? Rar inyegei.”" 
Matthew27:5 Ki wiirchi fedhaisyechooto Hekaluut, komanda ak kwo kogeetkei." 
Matthew27:6 Ak ki nam tisiik che eecheen fedhaisyechooto ak kole, “Ma chamdaat eng' ng'atuutyet kituiyo chu ak konunoigap Hekaluut amu po koroti.”" 
Matthew27:7 Ki irwooch ak kotil koboisyee fedhaisyechooto koale mbareetap cheptereniot si koek ole kitupchin toek. 
Matthew27:8 Amu nooto anyun ko ki kiguuree mbaranooto mbareetap korotiik agoi rani. 
Matthew27:9 Ki isulda anyun ne ki kagimwa eng' maotyot Jeremiah keele, “Ki ip icheek fedhaisyek sosom, alyetap ineendet ne kiga kigaamanji, ne kigaaman piigap Israel," 
Matthew27:10 ak ki igoito icheek koale mbareet ne po cheptereniot ko uu ye ki kang'ata Kiptaiyat.” 
Matthew27:11 Ki tonon Jeso anyun eng' taitap pounindet ak kiteebe pounindet koleenji, “Ii Laitoryatap Yahudik?” Koleenji Jeso, “Kaimwa.”" 
Matthew27:12 Ago ye kingo taam ineendet tisiik che eecheen ak poisyek, ko mawol kiy." 
Matthew27:13 Komwachi anyun Pilato ineendet koleenji, “Megase ole tee paornateet ne paoryanjinin pichu?”" 
Matthew27:14 Ago mawolji kiy, agot ng'olyoo agenge kot kokwong' miising' pounindet." 
Matthew27:15 Ki cham kotyakyin pounindet tuiyet kimonjororyot agenge ne kacham icheek eng' peetuutap igoorto. 
Matthew27:16 Eng' kasarata, kogimitei kimonjororyot age ne kinaat kot ne ki kiguure Barabbas." 
Matthew27:17 Ye kingo kagoyumgei anyun, koleenji Pilato, “Ng'oo ne omache atyakwok? Barabbas anan Jeso ne kiguure Kristo?”" 
Matthew27:18 Ki ingen kole kagigoito ineendet eng' ng'etkonda. 
Matthew27:19 Ye kingo ta kotononjin kirwooget, koyookyi osotyonnyi ng'olyoo kole, “Ameite kiy chiichoo ma tinyei leluut, amu kaanyooru nyalilwogik che chaang' rani eng' karwotitoet agobo ineendet.”" 
Matthew27:20 Kisaisai tisiik che eecheen ak poisyek tuiyosyek kole kosoom kityaach Barabbas ak kebar Jeso. 
Matthew27:21 Ki leenji pounindet icheek kogeny, “Omache atyakwok ng'oo eng' chu aeng'?” Kole icheek, “Barabbas.”" 
Matthew27:22 Koleenji Pilato, “Alyonji anyun Jeso ne kiguure Kristo?” Kole icheek tugul, “Ingigartaat ineendet!”" 
Matthew27:23 koteebee koleenji, “Amu nee? Kayai nee ne ya?” Ago ki polyo miising' koleen, “Ingigartaat!”" 
Matthew27:24 Ye kingo keer Pilato kole mata komuuch koyai kiy ago ki neegit kotoigei chemargeet, konam peek ak koun eunekyik eng' taitap tuiyet koleen, “Ma tinyei leluut agobo korotiigap chiichi po iman. Orarati okweegei.”" 
Matthew27:25 Ki wol piik tugul kole, “Ingotebenech korotiikyik ak lagokyok.”" 
Matthew27:26 Ki ityakyi Barabbas ak ye kingo kagobir `Pilato Jeso, kogoito ineendet kigartaat." 
Matthew27:27 Ki imut anyun kiplugotinigap pounindet Jeso kwo Praitorium, ak koyumjigei ineendet kiplugotinik tugul." 
Matthew27:28 Ki ireegune ngoroikyik ak kolaakyi sambut ne piriir. 
Matthew27:29 Kitaa ngatyetap katook ak konde metinnyi. Ki inde tegat eunnyi ne po tai ak ko kutung'so eng' tainnyi ak kochotei koleen, “Kigatin, Laitoryatap Yahudik!”" 
Matthew27:30 Kising'ilji ineendet ak konam tegat kokwere metinnyi. 
Matthew27:31 Ye kingo kagochot ineendet, koreegune sambut ak kolaakyi ineendet ngoroikyik, yeityo komut kwo kigartaat." 
Matthew27:32 Ye ki mi kobendi, konyoor chiitap Kurene ne kiguure Simion ak kobirchi ineendet kola kimurtoiyondennyi." 
Matthew27:33 Ye kingo it ole kiguure Golgota, ne kaguiyennyi ko emetap terta," 
Matthew27:34 kogoochi ineendet siki koe che ki kiburukto tuguuk che ng'woneen, ak ye kingo chamcham, koeesyo koe." 
Matthew27:35 Kingo kagogartaat ineendet, kopchechigei ngoroikyik eng' seretap parbareek," 
Matthew27:36 ak kotep ng'wony koriip ineendet eng' olooto. 
Matthew27:37 Ki inde paragutap metinnyi kataamset ne ki kisir keele, “Ni ko Jeso Laitoryatap Yahudik.”" 
Matthew27:38 Ki kigartaat ineendet ak rebiik aeng' eng' yooto, age eng' euut ne po tai ak age eng' euut ne po kaataam." 
Matthew27:39 Kichurachur ineendet che kisiirtoi ak koleglegoti metowekwak 
Matthew27:40 koleen, “Inyee ne ing'eme Hekaluut ak iteech eng' peetuusyek somok, sarugei! Ngo ii Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, ichoorugei eng' kimurtoiyot.”" 
Matthew27:41 Kichurachur ko uu nooto ak icheek tisiik che eecheen kobooto siriik ak poisyek koleen," 
Matthew27:42 “Ki sar alak; ama imuuchi kosargei. Ineendet Laitoryatap Israel; ingochoorgei nguno eng' kimurtoiyot, si kiyan ineendet." 
Matthew27:43 Imang'u Kamuktaindet; ingosar ineendet nguno ngot komachei amu ki le, ‘Aa Weeriitap Kamuktaindet.’ ”" 
Matthew27:44 Kichurochur ak icheek ko uu nooto rebiik che kiga kigartaat kobooto ineendet. 
Matthew27:45 Ki imenit anyun emet komugul kong'etee sait lo agoi sait sogool. 
Matthew27:46 Ye kingo olo po sait sogool, koguurso Jeso eng' tuugeet ne oo kole, “Eli, Eli, lama sabaktani?” Nooto ko, “Kamuktaindet nenyu, Kamuktaindet nenyu, kalya si ibagaakta?”" 
Matthew27:47 Kingo kas alak eng' icheek che kitonondos eng' olooto, kole icheek, “Kuurei chiichi Elijah.”" 
Matthew27:48 Eng' yooto kolabat age eng' icheek kwo konem sponjit ak konyiit siki, ak konde tegat ak kogoochi koe." 
Matthew27:49 Ki mwa chuun alak kole, “Omete, ongegeer ngo nyoonei Elijah si kosar ineendet.”" 
Matthew27:50 Ki kuurso Jeso kogeny eng' kutit ne oo, ak kogoito saboondanyi." 
Matthew27:51 Ogeero, ki kereer angeet ne ki kioiye Hekaluut koek aeng' kobooch parak agoi ng'wony, ak kobetogis rwandosyek." 
Matthew27:52 Ki yaatagis kereeriisyek ak ki king'eet poorwegap piik che chaang' che tiliileen che ki ruitos. 
Matthew27:53 Kingo kagong'eet Jeso, komong' pichooto ak icheek eng' kereeriisyekwak komong'ji nganaseet ne tiliil ak koboorchigei che chaang'." 
Matthew27:54 Ye kingo keer chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol ak icheeget che ki mi kobooto ineendet koriibei Jeso potaneetap ng'wony, ak tuguuk che kayaagiis, koywei miising' ak kole, “Iman Weeriitap Kamuktaindet chiichi.”" 
Matthew27:55 Ki mi eng' olooto kobogorisyek che chaang' che kigeerei eng' ye loo, che kiga isubot Jeso kobooch Galilaya koboisyechinoti ineendet." 
Matthew27:56 Ki Maria Magdalene age eng' kobogorisyechooto kobooto Maria kametap Jakobo ak Joses, ak kametap weeriigap Zebedayo." 
Matthew27:57 Kingo kagoek koskoleng', konyo mogoryot kobun Arimatea ne keguure Joseph ne ki kasubindetap Jeso agine." 
Matthew27:58 Ki wo chiichooto ole mi Pilato, kwo kosoom poortap Jeso; ak ki ng'at Pilato anyun kole kigoochi." 
Matthew27:59 Ki ip Joseph poorto ak kotaae angeetap katanit ne tiliil," 
Matthew27:60 ak konde kererinnyi ne leel ne kiga kobal eng' rwandet. Kimilji koita ne oo kurgeetap kererit kogeree yeityo kwo. 
Matthew27:61 Ki mi yooto Maria Magdalene ak Maria age kotebyei eng' taitap kererit. 
Matthew27:62 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi, ko kaibata peetuutap chobeet, koyumgei tisiik che eecheen ak Pharisaik eng' taitap Pilato" 
Matthew27:63 ak koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, kibwaati keele ki mwa kaberberindonooto kota kosabei kole, ‘Ye ibata peetuusyek somogu, ang'eete kogeny.’" 
Matthew27:64 Ng'at anyun keriip kererit komyee agoi peetuut ne po somok, si ma pwa kasubikyik kochoor ineendet ak koip, ak komwachi piik koleenji, ‘Kagong'eet ineendet eng' che ki kobek,’ si koyait kaberberisyet ne po let kosiir ne po tai.”" 
Matthew27:65 Koleenji Pilato icheek, “Otinye riibiik, obechigei ak oriip komyee ko uu ye omuuchi.”" 
Matthew27:66 Koba anyun ak ribiik koriip kererit; king'ooch koita ak koriip kererit komyee. 
Matthew28:1 Kingo neegit kogeskei peetuutap sabato, ko katoi koeech emet eng' peetuutap tai ne po wigiit, kobwa Maria Magdalene ak Maria age kogeer kererit." 
Matthew28:2 Keero, ki potan ng'wony miising'; amu ki choorgei malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat eng' kipsengwet, konyo komilda koita ak kotebee koiata." 
Matthew28:3 Ki uu kalyeleet itoondanyi, ak ki leelach miising' ngoroikyik ko uu teluji." 
Matthew28:4 Ki potanso asigarik kot koigei piich che kagobek amu ki iywei ineendet. 
Matthew28:5 Ki mwachi malaikaiyat kobogorisyek koleenji, “Amoaragen; angen ale ocheeng'e Jeso ne ki kigartaat." 
Matthew28:6 Ma komi yu; amu kagong'eet, ko uu ye ki kamwa. Obwa, ogeer ole korue Kiptaiyat," 
Matthew28:7 ak obe ochakte omwachi kasubikyik oleenji, ‘Kagong'eet eng' che ki kobek; ak ogeero, indoenok kowendi Galilaya; ogeere ineendet eng' olooto.’ Ogaso, kaamwaiwok.”" 
Matthew28:8 Ara ki pa kochaakta kobagaach kererit eng' kaiyweisyet ak poiboiyet ne oo, ki rwai koba komwachi kasubikyik." 
Matthew28:9 Ak ogeero, kituiye Jeso icheek, ak koleenji, “Chamge!” Ak ki pwanji `icheek ineendet, konam keelyekyik, ak kolas ineendet." 
Matthew28:10 Ki leenji Jeso anyun icheek, “Amoiywei: oba omwachi che kitupche koba Galilaya, ak keera icheek eng' oliindo.”" 
Matthew28:11 Ye kita kobendi, komong'ji nganaseet alak eng' asigarik ak komwachi tisiik che eecheen tuguuk tugul che kagoyaagiis." 
Matthew28:12 Kingo kagoyumgei ak poisyek, korwooch kole kogoochi asigarik fedhaisyek che chaang'," 
Matthew28:13 koleenji, “Nyolu omwa ole, ‘Kobwa kasubikyik kemoi ak kochoor ineendet koip kota keruitosi.’" 
Matthew28:14 Ngo kas pounindet ng'olyoondoniito, kigaigai ineendet ak kesorwok eng' nyalilda.”" 
Matthew28:15 Kotaach anyun fedhaisyek ak koyai ko uu ye kaginet. Ak ki yom ng'olyoondoniito Yahudik, agoi ra." 
Matthew28:16 Ki pa Galilaya kasubik tamanu ak agenge, agoi tulweet ole kiga koarorchi Jeso." 
Matthew28:17 Ye kingo keer `icheek ineendet, kolas; ago kisage alage." 
Matthew28:18 Ak ki nyoonji `Jeso icheek ak koleenji, “Ki kegoono kimnateet tugul eng' kipsengwet ak ng'wony." 
Matthew28:19 Nooto anyun oba ak oyai piigap pororyosyek tugul koek kasubik, obatisan icheek eng' kainetap Kwanda ak ne po Weeriit ak ne po Kabuuset ne Tiliil," 
Matthew28:20 oneet icheek koosup tuguuk tugul che kaang'atak. Ak ogeero, ami kobootok eng' peetuusyek tugul, agoi kagesunetap ng'wony.”" 
Mark1:1 Taunetap logoiywek che myach che po Jeso Kristo, Weeriitap Kamuktaindet." 
Mark1:2 Ko uu ye ki kisir eng' maotyot Isaiah keele, “Keero, ayooktoi kiboityonnyu kondoenen, ne chobei oreng'ung';" 
Mark1:3 tuugeetap chii ne kuursei eng' surkwen koleen, ‘Ochop ooreetap Kiptaiyat, olitiit ole punooti.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Ki nyo Johana kobatisanisyei eng' surkwen ak koamdoi kabatisanet ne po siguunet agobo nyoetap kaat ne po tengekwogik. 
Mark1:5 Ak ki pwanji `piik ineendet kobunu emet komugul ne po Judea ak meng'iigap Jerusalem tugul; ak ki ibatisan icheek eng' aineetap Jordan, kong'aanyei tengekwogikwak." 
Mark1:5 Ak ki pwanji `piik ineendet kobunu emet komugul ne po Judea ak meng'iigap Jerusalem tugul; ak ki ibatisan icheek eng' aineetap Jordan, kong'aanyei tengekwogikwak." 
Mark1:6 Ki ilaachi Johana sambut ne po tambeesik ak ki rategei pireneetap muito, ki amei ineendet chereng'enyinik ak kumigap timiin." 
Mark1:7 Ak ki amda kole, “Isubwo ineendet ne kiim kosiiro, ak ma nyoljino ang'uruuk atyach anoogap kweonikyik." 
Mark1:8 Ki abatisanak eng' peek; ago ibatisanook ineendet eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil.” 
Mark1:9 Ki nyo anyun Jeso eng' peetuusyechooto kobunu Nazareth ne po Galilaya, ak ki ibatisan Johana ineendet eng' Jordan." 
Mark1:10 Yeityo kogatogos eng' peek, kogeer kipsengwet kogayaatak ak kochoorchigei ineendet Kabuuset ne Tiliil ko uu cheptuget." 
Mark1:11 Ak ki mong' tuugeet eng' kipsengwet kole, “Ii Weeriinnyu chamanennyu, agasenengei.”" 
Mark1:12 Ak koma tyanit komut Kabuuset ne Tiliil ineendet kotokyi surkwen. 
Mark1:13 Ki tebi ineendet eng' surkwen peetuusyek artam koyomei Setani; ak kitebyei ak tyong'ik che po timiin; ak ki poisyechin ineendet malaikaisyek. 
Mark1:14 Kingo kagenam Johana, konyo Jeso Galilaya, koamdooti logoiywek che myach che po Kamuktaindet," 
Mark1:15 koleen, “Kagosulda peetuusyek, ak kagoriik laitornatetap Kamuktaindet; osigu, ak oyan logoiywek che myach.”" 
Mark1:16 Ye kiwendi Jeso kobunei tabandap araraita ne po Galilaya, kogeer Simion ak tupchennyi Andrea kowiirchin araraita regereiywot ne kinamee njireenik, amu ki ramiigap njireenik." 
Mark1:17 Koleenji `Jeso icheek, “Obwa osubwo si ayaak oegu ramiigap piik.”" 
Mark1:18 Ak ki pagaakta regereiywekwak ak koosup ineendet. 
Mark1:19 Ak ye ki pa kitigin, kogeer Jakobo weeriitap Zebedayo ak tupchennyi Johana, che ki mi eng' moingennywa kochobei regereiywek." 
Mark1:20 Ki kuur `ineendet icheek; ak ki pagaakta kwandanywa Zebedayo komi moinget kobooto otwogik, ak koosup ineendet." 
Mark1:21 Ki pa anyun Kapernaum; ak ye kibetut ne po sabato, ko ki wo ineendet sinagogit oriit ak koneetis." 
Mark1:22 Ki kwong'yo icheek eng' kaneetisyennyi, amu ki ineeti icheek ko uu chii ne tinyei kimnateet, ama ko uu siriik." 
Mark1:23 Ki mi sainooto eng' sinagoginnywa chii ne ki tinyei tamirmiryet ne murwoon, ak kiwaach," 
Mark1:24 kole, “Kiting'egei nee ak inyee, Jeso ne po Nazareth? Kenyo ing'emech? Angenin ale, ii Ne Tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet.”" 
Mark1:25 Ago ki kergong' `Jeso ineendet koleenji, “Siis, ak imang'une ineendet!”" 
Mark1:26 Ak kibirabirto ineendet ak kowaachei eng' kutit ne oo, yeityo komanda oindonooto murwoon eng' ineendet." 
Mark1:27 Ki tang'any tugul, ak koteebeegei icheegei kole, “Nee ni? Leel kaneetisyoni! Ng'atei eng' kimnateet agot tamirmirik che murwonen ak ko kasei iit ineendet.”" 
Mark1:28 Kong'eetee yooto ko kinaak inee eng' komoswek tugul che po Galilaya. 
Mark1:29 Ye kingo mong' eng' sinagogit, koba kootap Simion ak Andrea, kobooto Jakobo ak Johana." 
Mark1:30 Ki myani kametap kwondap Simion kolalee maat ak kiruei, ak ki kimwachi Jeso eng' chokyinet agobo ineendet." 
Mark1:31 Ki nyo ak konam eunnyi, ak kong'eet ineendet. Kisoop ineendet ak kotoi kobois koboisyechi icheek." 
Mark1:32 Kingo ek koskoleny, ko karorokto asiista, kimutyi tugul che ki myandos ak icheeget che ki tinyei oik." 
Mark1:33 Ak ki iyumgei nganaseet komugul eng' kurgat. 
Mark1:34 Ki isoop che chaang' che ki myandos eng' myanwek che teerchiin, ak koon komanda oik che chaang'. Ki ma chamji oik kong'alaal amu ki ingen oichooto ineendet." 
Mark1:35 Eng' karon kogairir emet, kong'eet ineendet komanda saang' ak kwo surkwen kosa." 
Mark1:36 Ki isup `Simion ak icheek che ki mi tugul. 
Mark1:37 Kingo nyoor ineendet, koleenji, “Cheeng'in piik tugul.”" 
Mark1:38 Kowolji koleenji, “Ongetestai keebe agoi nganasook che rubei si kobiit aamda eng' olooto kora; amu ki anyoon agobo nooto.”" 
Mark1:39 Ki wo koyom Galilaya komugul, koamdooti ak ko oonei oik eng' sinagogisyekwak." 
Mark1:40 Ki nyoonji ineendet `chii ne ki tinyei mogondosaik kosoomei ak kogutunyi koleenjin, “Ngot icham, imuuchi itiliilo.”" 
Mark1:41 Kiriree ineendet ak koyogoito eunnyi kotwa ak koleenji, “Tiliiliitu!”" 
Mark1:42 Eng' yooto, kogisaapcho mogondosaik ak kotiliilit chiichooto." 
Mark1:43 Ki kergong' ineendet ak kotyakta kwo; 
Mark1:44 koleenji, “Memwachi chii kiy, ago ui iboorchigei tisiindet ak igoite konunotyotap katiliileng'ung' ko uu ye ki ng'at Musa, si koek paornat eng' icheek.”" 
Mark1:45 Ago kimanda inee ak kotoi komwaitaat ak kobarastaat ng'olyoondonooto kot ko mata komuuch kowendoot Jeso eng' nganaseet kegeeroti, ago kitebote kewaniin kityo. Ki pwanji `ineendet piik kobun komoswek tugul." 
Mark2:1 Kingo pata peetuusyek che chaang' ak koweek kogeny Kapernaum, kogasak keele miitei kaa." 
Mark2:2 Ki iyumgei piik che chaang' kot koma ng'et poroin, agot eng' kurgat; ak ki amndochin icheek ng'olyoot." 
Mark2:3 Ki pwa piich ang'wanu koganabu chii ne ki meat poor. 
Mark2:4 Ago ye ki mata komuuch komutyi ineendet amu tuiyet, kong'aany komasak eng' paragutap koot eng' ole ki mi ineendet. Kingo kayaatak parak, kochoorta itoogut ne kirue chiichooto ki meat poorto." 
Mark2:5 Kingo keer Jeso kayanennywa, koleenji chiichooto kimeat poorto,“Weeri, kagenyoun kaat tengekwogiguk.”" 
Mark2:6 Ago ki miitei olooto siriik alak che kitebyei ak kobwaati eng' mugulelwekwak koleen," 
Mark2:7 “Amu nee si komwaei chiichi ko uu ni? Ang' kagowech! Ng'oo ne imuuchi konyochi chii kaat tengekwogik kobatee Kamuktaindet ineegei?” 
Mark2:8 Ki nai anyun Jeso eng' saboondanyi kole ka ibwaati ko uu nooto icheegei, koleenji, “Kalya si obwaat tuguuchu eng' mugulelwekwok?" 
Mark2:9 Nee ne nyumnyum, kemwachi chiichi meat poorto keleenji, ‘Kagenyoun kaat tengekwogiguk’; anan keleenji, ‘Ng'eet, ip itogung'ung', ak iwendote?’" 
Mark2:10 Ago si onai ole tinyei Weeriitap chii kimnateet eng' ng'wony konyochi kaat tengekwogik.” Koleenji anyun chiichooto ki meat poorto," 
Mark2:11 “Amwaun aleenjinin, ng'eet, ip itogung'ung' ak iwe koong'ung'.”" 
Mark2:12 Ki ng'eet anyun ak koip itogunnyi, ak komanda eng' taitap piik tugul koek kwong'eet eng' tugul ak kolas Kamuktaindet kole, “Tom kegeere ne uu niito!”" 
Mark2:13 Ki wo Jeso kogeny tabandap araraita; ak ki pwa tuiyet komugul ye mi ineendet, ak ki ineet icheek." 
Mark2:14 Ye kisiirtoi, kogeer Lawi weeriitap Alphayo kotebyei eng' ole kitaage aisuruut, ak koleenji ineendet, “Isubwo.” Ak king'eet ak koosup ineendet." 
Mark2:15 Ye ki amisyei eng' kootap Lawi, ko ki mi ak icheek taagigap aisuruut che chaang' ak kiptengeginik kotebyei kobooto Jeso ak kasubikyik: amu ki chaang' che ki isupi ineendet." 
Mark2:16 Kingo keer siriigap Pharisaik koamisyei ineendet kobooto kiptengeginik ak taagigap aisuruut, koleenji kasubikyik, “Lyon si koamisyei ak koeisei ineendet kobooto taagigap aisuruut ak kiptengeginik?”" 
Mark2:17 Ye kingo kas Jeso koleenji icheek, “Ma machei che chamegei chepkerichot kobatee icheek che myandos. Ki ma anyo aguur che tiliileen, ago ki anyo agobo kiptengeginik.”" 
Mark2:18 Ki irugutegei kasubigap Johana ak che po Pharisaik, ak ki pwa piich koleenji ineendet, “Lyon si korugutegei kasubigap Johana ak kasubigap Pharisaik ago ma irugutegei kasubiguk?”" 
Mark2:19 Kowolji `Jeso icheek koleenji, “Imuktoi ano korugutkei che kogiguurchin katunisyet ye ta komi sandet kobooto icheek? Kota komi sandet kobooto icheek koma imuuchi korugutkei." 
Mark2:20 Ago pwoonei peetuusyek che keistoe sandet icheek, korugutkei anyun eng' peetuunooto." 
Mark2:21 “Ma mi chii ne napchin akwot ne leel ngoryeet ne oos, si ma kereer `ne leel ne oos ak kotesak ole kagereer." 
Mark2:22 Ama miitei chii ne indoi divaik che leelach lolotinwek che oosen; ngot yai ko uu nooto, kogereeri divaik che leelach lolotinwek, ak kobeet divaik kobooto lolotinwek. Kindoi divaik che leelach lolotinwek che leelach.”" 
Mark2:23 Kibunei ineendet mbareenigap peek eng' peetuutap sabato, ak ye kibendi kotoi kasubikyik kobutoot mesisyegap peek." 
Mark2:24 Ak ki leenji `Pharisaik ineendet, “Keero, kalya si koyai eng' peetuutap sabato kiit ne eetaat eng' ng'atuutik?”" 
Mark2:25 Ak ki leenji icheeget, “Tos kitom osoman kiit ne ki yai Daudi ye ki ma kotinyei kiy, ak ki amei rubo ineendet ak che ki mi tugul?" 
Mark2:26 Ki wo kootap Kamuktaindet, ye ki tisiindet ne oo Abiathar, ak koam magatiinik che itabaanatiin, che eetaat eng' ng'atuutik keele ma ki amei, kobatee tisiik icheegei, ak kogoochi che ki mi tugul.”" 
Mark2:27 Ak ki leenji `ineendet icheek, “Ki kiyai sabato agobo chii, ak ma ki yai chii agobo sabato." 
Mark2:28 Ara anyun Weeriitap chii ko kiptaiyat agot ne po sabato.” 
Mark3:1 Ki wo sinagogit kogeny, ak ki mi chii ne meat euut." 
Mark3:2 Ki riibe `icheek kogeer ngo tos isoop chiichooto eng' peetuutap sabato si kobiit kogikyi ineendet leluut. 
Mark3:3 Ak ki leenji chiito ne meat euut, “Tonon eng' kween.”" 
Mark3:4 Koleenji anyun icheek, “Tos chamdoi ng'atuutik keyai ne myee anan ne ya eng' peetuutap sabato? Tos chamdoi kisoop chii anan kebar?” Ago ki siisyo icheek." 
Mark3:5 Ki tooben icheeget konereechi eng' ng'wanindo ne oo amu uuindap mugulelwekwak, ak koleenji chiichooto, “Chuul euut!” Ki chuul anyun, ak ki myeiit eunnyi." 
Mark3:6 Ki manda koba saang' eng' kasarata Pharisaik ak Herodik kotet agobo ole imuuch kobarta ineendet. 
Mark3:7 Ki pa Jeso ak kasubikyik kotokyigei araraita, ak ki isup `ineendet tuiyet ne oo kobun Galilaya." 
Mark3:8 Ki pwa kora tuiyosyek kobun Judea, Jerusalem, Idumea, pitetap Jordan, ak komoswegap Tyro ak Sidon ye kingo kas agobo tuguuk che eecheen che ki yai ineendet." 
Mark3:8 Ki pwa kora tuiyosyek kobun Judea, Jerusalem, Idumea, pitetap Jordan, ak komoswegap Tyro ak Sidon ye kingo kas agobo tuguuk che eecheen che ki yai ineendet." 
Mark3:9 Ki mwachi kasubikyik kochopchi moingetap peek ne ming'in amu chaang'indap piik; si ma chiil `piik ineendet 
Mark3:10 amu kiga kosoop che chaang' kot koit komach age tugul ne ki tinyei kaimut kole ta tiny ineendet. 
Mark3:11 Eng' ui tugul ye kingo keer tamirmirik che murwonen ineendet, ko ki ibutos eng' tainnyi koteitos koleen, “Inyee ko ii Weeriitap Kamuktaindet!”" 
Mark3:12 Ki kergong' icheek kole si ma ng'ang'nda ineendet. 
Mark3:13 Ki wo kotokyigei tulweet ak koguur chooto kimachei ineendet, ak ki pwa icheek kobwonji ineendet." 
Mark3:14 Ki lewen taman ak aeng', che chooto ki yai koek che kiyooktoi, ak kole tamangap kotebi ak ineendet ak koyookto koba koamdaat," 
Mark3:15 ak konyoor kimnateet ne onen oik. 
Mark3:16 Ki lewen chooto taman ak aeng', ak kogoochi Simion kainet Petero," 
Mark3:17 kogoochi Jakobo weeriitap Zebedayo ak Johana ne tupcho ak Jakobo kainet koguure Boanerges ne kaguiyennyi ko Weeriigap tuleet," 
Mark3:18 ak Andrea, Philipu, Bartolomayo, Matayo, Thomas, Jakobo ne po kap Alphayo, Thadeo, Simion kanaanindet" 
Mark3:19 ak Judas Iskaryot nooto king'wekta ineendet. 
Mark3:20 Ki wo kaa, ak ne matyanit ko ki iyumgei tuiyet kogeny kot ko mata komuuch agot koamis." 
Mark3:21 Ye kingo kas piikyik, koba komut ineendet amu kimwae koleen, “Kagoyait met.”" 
Mark3:22 Ki mwa siriik che ki punu Jerusalem kole, “Tinyei ineendet Beelsebul, ak oonei oik eng' kimnateetap ne oo ne po oik.”" 
Mark3:23 Kingo kagoguur icheek, kong'alaalji eng' kalewenaik, “Imuktoi ano Setani koon Setani?”" 
Mark3:24 Ngo pcheak pororyet inegei, koma imuuchi pororyonooto kotonon." 
Mark3:25 Ak ngot kopcheak koot, koma imuuchi koyooto kotonon." 
Mark3:26 Ngo ng'eet Setani koboryegei ak kopcheak, koma imuuchi kotonon, ago kagoit let eng' ineendet." 
Mark3:27 Ma imuuchi chii kochut kootap chii ne kiim ak korebe tuguukyik, ngot ko marat korook chiichooto kiim si koibe anyun tuguuk." 
Mark3:28 “Amwaiwok iman ale, kinyochin kaat weeriigap piik tengekwogikwak tugul ak ng'aleek alak tugul che yaacheen che mwaei." 
Mark3:29 Ago age tugul ne inachi Kabuuset ne Tiliil, koma koi kinyochi kaat koigeny, ago tebee ng'oogisto koigeny.”" 
Mark3:30 Amu ki mwa kole “Tinyei tamirmiryet ne murwoon.” 
Mark3:31 Ki pwa kamet ak che tupcho ak kotononso eng' saang', ak ki kiyookto keguur ineendet." 
Mark3:32 Ki mi tuiyet ko kayiem ineendet, ak ki kileenji, “Keero, mi saang' kamenng'ung' ak che otupche kocheeng'in.”" 
Mark3:33 Ak ki wolji icheek kole, “Ng'oo kamennyu ak che kitupche?”" 
Mark3:34 Ki keer `icheek che kitebyei ng'wony ko kayiem ineendet ak kole, “Ang'chu kamennyu ak tupchosyekyuk!" 
Mark3:35 Amu chii age tugul ne yaei mageetap Kamuktaindet, ko nooto weeriit ne ketupche ak chepto ne kitupche ak kamennyu.”" 
Mark4:1 Ki toi kogeny koneetis eng' tabandap araraita. Ki iyumjigei ineendet tuiyet ne oo miising' kot kolaany moingetap peek kotebee araraita, ak kotebee tuiyet tugul ngeguutap araraita." 
Mark4:2 Ki ineet icheek tuguuk che chaang' eng' kalewenaik, ak eng' kaneetisyennyi kogileenji icheek:" 
Mark4:3 “Oep iit! Ki wo leetaindet koleetais. 
Mark4:4 Ak ye kileetaisye, kobutyi kesweek alak ooreet taban, ak ki pwa toriitik ak koam." 
Mark4:5 Ki ibutyi alage ole mi koik, ole ki ma kotya ng'ung'unyek, ak ki piityo anyun kochook, amu ng'ering' ng'ung'unyek." 
Mark4:6 Ak kingo chor asiista, komel; ak ki yaamyo, amu ki ma kotinyei tigitik." 
Mark4:7 Ki ibutyi alage ole mi katook, ak ki piityo katook ak kogiich, si ma iiyo logoek." 
Mark4:8 Kobutyi alage ng'ung'unyek che myach ak koiiyo logoek, kieegitu ak kotesak ak ki iyo sosom ak tamanwogik lo ak pogol.”" 
Mark4:9 Ak ki mwa kole, “Ne tinyei iitiik che kastoe, kogas!”" 
Mark4:10 Ye ki mi ineegei, kobwanji inee `kasubikyik tamanu ak aeng' kobooto chooto ki mi tugul ak koteebe ineendet agobo kalewenaichooto." 
Mark4:11 Ki leenji `ineendet icheek, “Kagegoonok okweek onai ung'ootyet ne po laitornatetap Kamuktaindet, ago icheek che miitei saang', kobwanjin tuguuk tugul eng' kalewenaik;" 
Mark4:12 si eng' ‘keeret kogeerei ama ibestos, ak eng' kaseet kogasei ama iguitos; si ma week ak kenyochi kaat.’ ”" 
Mark4:13 Ki leenji icheek, “Ngot ko moguitosi okweek kalewenoni, ko tos onaite ano kalewenaik tugul?" 
Mark4:14 Ineendet ne leetoi ng'olyoot ko koolsei. 
Mark4:15 Chu che mi tabandap ooreet ole kagilechi ng'olyoot, ak ye kagogas, konyo Setani ak konem nooto kagigoolji icheeget." 
Mark4:16 Ak chu ak icheek ko chooto che kagilechi ole mi koik, ak ye kagogas ng'olyoot, kotaach eng' poiboiyet." 
Mark4:17 Ago ma tinyei tigitik, ak tebyei peetuusyek che matya, ak ye it nyalilda anan ko usiisyet agobo ng'olyoot, kobutos ne matiny." 
Mark4:18 Ak alak, ko che kagilechi ole mi katook; chooto ko icheeget che kagogas ng'olyoot," 
Mark4:19 ak ye kait kaimutigap ng'wony, ak kaberberisyetap mogornateet, ak magutigap tuguuk alak, kogiich ng'olyoot si ma sich logoek." 
Mark4:20 Ak chooto che kagilechi ng'ung'unyek che myach, ko icheeget che kasei ng'olyoot ak kotaach, ak koiiyo logoek sosom, ak tamanwogik lo, ak pogol.”" 
Mark4:21 Ki leenji icheek, “Ma ki ibu tait ak kinde kitonget oriit anan kurereetap itoogut, ago kindoi ole tonone." 
Mark4:22 Ma miitei kiy ne ung'aat ne ma tuun king'aanyei, anan ng'olyoo ne po ung'oot ne ma tuun taagu." 
Mark4:23 Ngo tinyei chii iitiik che kastoe, kogas.”" 
Mark4:24 Ak ki mwachi icheek koleenji, “Oriibegei tuguuk che ogase; kerutyet ne ogere ko tuun kegerunenok nooto, ak keteswook." 
Mark4:25 Amu ineendet ne tinyei, ko tuun kigoochin; ak ineendet ne ma tinyei, ko tuun keibe agot che tinyei.”" 
Mark4:26 Ak ki mwa kole, “Uu laitornatetap Kamuktaindet chii ne leechin kesweek ng'wony," 
Mark4:27 ak koru ak kong'eet, kemoi ak peet, ak kobiityo kesweek ak koeegitu, amaingen ole pititoi." 
Mark4:28 Yiei ng'wony ineegei; rutu, yeityo konyo metit, yeityo koiywa peek." 
Mark4:29 Ago ye kagoruryo peek, eng' yooto koip ineendet chepkeswet amu kait kesisyet.”" 
Mark4:30 Ki le, “Kiyanie nee laitornatetap Kamuktaindet anan nee kalewenet ne kimuuchi kemwaitae?" 
Mark4:31 Kergei ak keswootap karadali, ne ye kageminji ng'wony, nganda ming'in eng' kesweek tugul che mi ng'wony," 
Mark4:32 ko ye kagemin, ko piitei koeetu kosiir minutik tugul che po mbar, ak kosich mooriik che eecheen kot komuuch koteekyi kesonok oriit `toriitigap parak.”" 
Mark4:33 Ak eng' kalewenaik alak che chaang' che uu chooto, ko ki ng'alaaljin icheek ng'olyoot ko uu ye ki imuuchi kogas." 
Mark4:34 Ak ki ma ng'alaalji icheek ama eng' kalewenet, ago ki ineet tuguuk tugul kasubikyik komi taban icheegei." 
Mark4:35 Ak kingo kagoek koskoleny eng' peetuunooto, koleenji icheek, “Ongelande pitoniin.”" 
Mark4:36 Ak kingo pagaakta tuiyet, komut ineendet amu ki miitei moingetap peek. Ak ki mi moingonik alak kobooto ineendet." 
Mark4:37 Ki ng'eet anyun usoonet ne koroom, ak kiryebei `peek che mildogei moinget kot kogineegit konyi peek moinget." 
Mark4:38 Ki mi ineendet moinget let, korue kiit ne kitiie metit; ak ki ing'eet ineendet ak koleenji, “Kaneetindoni, mema kenech kiy ago kagibegu?”" 
Mark4:39 Kingo kaging'eet, koger kong' usoonet, ak kong'alaalji araraita kole, “Tonon! Siis!” Ki tonon anyun usoonet, ak kosiis araraita." 
Mark4:40 Ki leenji icheek, “Kalya si oiyweisye? Agoi nguno ko motinye kayaneet?”" 
Mark4:41 Ki iyweis miising' ak komwachingei koleen, “Ng'oo niito, ne kase iit agot usoonet ak araraita?”" 
Mark5:1 Ki it icheek pitet age ne po araraita, agoi emetap Gerasenik." 
Mark5:2 Ak kingo kagolong' eng' moingetap peek, kotuiyo ak chiito ne ki menyei ole ki mi kereeriisyek, ak kotinyei tamirmiryet ne murwoon." 
Mark5:3 Ki menyei ye mi kereeriisyek; ak ki ma komi chii ne kita komuuchi korat ineendet agot eng' nyororoit; 
Mark5:4 amu kiga kerate ineendet mugurek ak nyororosyek konyil che chaang', ak king'etyei nyororosyek ak kotonaton mugurek; ak ki ma komi chii ne ki imuuchi koboi ineendet." 
Mark5:5 Ki waagaati peetuusyek tugul, kemoi ak peet, eng' kereeriisyek ak tuloonook, ak kotilegei koik." 
Mark5:6 Kingo keer `ineendet Jeso eng' ye loo, kolabat ole mi ak kogutung'ji;" 
Mark5:7 ak kowaach eng' tuugeet ne oo kole, “Iting'eno nee inyee Jeso, Weeriitap Kamuktaindet Ne Toroor Miising'? Asoomin eng' Kamuktaindet ale amenyaliila.”" 
Mark5:8 Amu kigaleenji ineendet, “Mong'u eng' chiichi, inyee tamirmiryet ne murwoon!”" 
Mark5:9 Ak ki teebe ineendet koleenji, “Ng'oo kaineng'ung'?” Koleenji ineendet, “Kainennyu ko Chaang'indo, amu ki chaang'.”" 
Mark5:10 Ki soom ineendet miising' kole, amaon komanda eng' emonooto." 
Mark5:11 Ak ki mi tegeiyatap tulweet akweet ne oo ne po toorook che ki agetoos. 
Mark5:12 Ak ki soom koleenji, “Iyanwech kechut toorook.”" 
Mark5:13 Ki iyanji icheek, ak ki manda tamirmirik che murwonen koba kochut toorook. Ki rwai akweetap toorook, che neegit eliphuusyek aeng' kochoortaegei chemng'eisut koba kochoorchigei ak kobekyi araraita." 
Mark5:14 Ki mweiso anyun che ki iyagi toorook ak komwaitaat eng' nganaseet ak eng' emet. Ak ki pwa anyun piik kogeer kiit ne kagoyaak. 
Mark5:15 Ki pwa ole ki mi Jeso ak kogeer ineendet ne kiga konam oik, kotebyei ko kagolaach ngoroik, ak ko kagong'omit ineendet ne ki tinyei chaang'indap oik; ak ki aragenso pichooto." 
Mark5:16 Ki mwaita paorinik komwachi piik kiit ne kiyaak eng' ineendet ne ki tinyei oik, ak kiit ne kiityi toorook ak icheek." 
Mark5:17 Ki toi piik komwachi ineendet kole kwo eng' kiwotosyekwak. 
Mark5:18 Ye ki laanyei moingetap peek, kogaigai ineendet ne kiga konam oik kole kotebi tuwai." 
Mark5:19 Ki ma chamji Jeso, ago ki leenji, “Ui kaa ole mi choronoguk, ak iboorchi tuguuk che eecheen che kagoyaun Kiptaiyat, ak ko uu ye kagobooruun rireenet.”" 
Mark5:20 Ki nam pandanyi ak kotoi komwaita eng' Decapolis tuguuk che eecheen che kayachi `Jeso ineendet; ak ki kwong'yo piik tugul. 
Mark5:21 Ye kingo kagolanda Jeso kogeny eng' moinget kwo pitoniin, koyumjigei tuiyet ne oo komi ineendet ye neegitee araraita." 
Mark5:22 Ki nyo agenge eng' pounigap sinagogit ne kiguure Jairo, ak kingo keer ineendet, kobutyi keelyekyik," 
Mark5:23 ak kosoom miising' koleenji, “Neegit kome cheptonyu ne ming'in. Nyoo igonoor ineendet euneguk, si kosap.”" 
Mark5:24 Ki pa anyun kobooto ineendet. Ki isup ineendet tuiyet ne oo ak ki igiich ineendet. 
Mark5:25 Ki mi kobogoryo ne kiga komandae korotiik eng' kenyiisyek taman ak aeng'. 
Mark5:26 Kiga konyalil ineendet miising' agobo chepkerichinik che chaang', ak kiga kogoito tuguukyik tugul che ki tinyei ama toret kiy, ago kitesak myando koyait." 
Mark5:27 Kingo kas agobo Jeso, konyo kosubu ineendet ak tuiyet ne ki mi let ak kotiiny ngoryennyi." 
Mark5:28 Ki leenjigei, “Ngatiiny agot ngoroikyik, kisoobo.”" 
Mark5:29 Ye kingo tiiny, kogisiis mandaetap korotiik ak kogas eng' poortanyi kole kagisoop eng' kaimutyennyi." 
Mark5:30 Kingo nai Jeso kole, kagoistoegei kimnateet, koweleljigei tuiyet ak kole, “Ng'oo ne katiiny ngoroikyuk?”" 
Mark5:31 Ak ki leenji `kasubikyik ineendet, “Igeere ole tee tuiyet ak ileen, ‘Ng'oo ne katwaa?’ ”" 
Mark5:32 Kiguskong' kotabendo komoche konai kole ng'oo ne katiiny. 
Mark5:33 Ago ki nyo kobogoryondonooto ko kagonai kiit ne kageyachi, ak kobutyi tainnyi koarageni ak kobotani, ak komwachi `ineendet imanit tugul." 
Mark5:34 Ki leenji ineendet, “Chebi, kagosaabin kayaneng'ung'; ui eng' kaalyeet, ak isap eng' myandang'ung'.”" 
Mark5:35 Kingo ta kong'alaali ineendet, kobwa piik che punu kootap pounindet ne po sinagogit ak kole, “Kagome cheptong'ung'. Kata iimji nee kaneetindet?”" 
Mark5:36 Ago ma mage kiy Jeso ng'olyoot ne kagimwa, koleenji pounindetap sinagogit, “Meiywei, iyan kityo.”" 
Mark5:37 Ki ma chamji chii koosup ineendet kobatee Petero, Jakobo ak Johana ng'eetap kametap Jakobo." 
Mark5:38 Ki it `icheek kootap pounindetap sinagogit, ak ki keer piik che sololendos, kobooto che riirtos ak koteeitos miising'." 
Mark5:39 Ye kingo kakwo ko, koleenji pichooto, “Kalya si owasegei ak orirtosi? Tom kome lakweet ago inuuchi.”" 
Mark5:40 Ak kirorechi ineendet kochot. Ye kingo kagoon ineendet pichooto tugul koba saang', komut kwandap lakweet ak kamet kobooto che ki mi ak ineendet ak kwo ko ole mi lakweet." 
Mark5:41 Kingo kagonam eutap lakweet koleenji, “Talitha koum,” ye kiweech ko, “Chebi, amwaun ale, ng'eet!”" 
Mark5:42 Ki ng'eet chebooto ak kowendot; (ki po kenyiisyek taman ak aeng'). Eng' yooto ko ki nam icheek kwong'eet ne oo. 
Mark5:43 Ki ng'at `ineendet icheek miising' kole amat konai chii ng'olyoondoniito, ak ki mwaita kigoochi tuguuk che amei." 
Mark6:1 Ki mong' ineendet eng' olooto ak konyo agoi nganaseetap emennyi, kobendoti ak kasubikyik." 
Mark6:2 Kingo it sabato kotoi koneetis eng' sinagogit, ak ki kwong'yo che chaang' che ki kas ineendet ak koleen, “Nyoorunee ano chiichi tuguuchu? Nee utaatyoni ki kigoochi chiichi? Nee poisyonichu kiimeen yaaksei eng' eunekyik?" 
Mark6:3 Tos ma musogindet niito, weeriitap Maria, ne tupcho ak Jakobo, Joses, Judah, ak Simion? Tos ma mi kobootech eng' olinyo chepkametisyekyik?” Ak kinyoor kanagutyet eng' ineendet." 
Mark6:4 Ak ki leenji `Jeso icheek, “Nyooru maotyo teegisto, kobatee eng' emennyi, ak eng' che po ooreennyi ak eng' koonnyi.”" 
Mark6:5 Ki mata komuuch koyai kwang'utyo age tugul eng' olooto, kobatee piik che ng'ering' che ki myandos che kigonoor eunekyik ak kosaap icheek." 
Mark6:6 Ak ki kwong' ineendet amu pistoennywa. Ak kiwendote nganasook koneetisyoti. 
Mark6:7 Ki kuurchigei anyun taman ak aeng', ak kotoi koyookto kobee aeng' aeng', ak ki igoochi icheek kimnateet koterteer tamirmirik che murwonen." 
Mark6:8 Ki ng'at icheek koleenji, “Mat oip kiy ne po panda kobatee kirokto kityo; agot magatyat, anan suberet, anan sendeisyek eng' lolet;" 
Mark6:9 oba olaachi kweonik ago mat olaach sumotik aeng'. 
Mark6:10 Ye kobe ko age tugul, otebi yooto agoi obe eng' olooto." 
Mark6:11 Ak oldo age tugul ne mataachak, ama cham kogasak, ye omande eng' olooto, olelekte temburyek che mi keelyekwok si kobiit koek paornateet eng' icheek.”" 
Mark6:12 Ki manda ak koamdaat kole kanyool kosik piik. 
Mark6:13 Ki oon oik che chaang', ak koilee `mwaita che chaang' che ki myandos ak kosaap icheek." 
Mark6:14 Ki kas laitoryat Herod agobo nooto; amu kiga konaak kainenetap Jeso ak ki le alak, “Kagong'eet Johana kabatisanindet eng' che ki pek, nooto anyun poisyei kimnatosyechu eng' oriitinnyi.”" 
Mark6:15 Ago ki mwa alak kole, “Elijah ineendet.” Ak ki le alak, “Maotyo ineendet, anan uu age eng' maotigap keny.”" 
Mark6:16 Ago ye kingo kas Herod kole, “Johana niito, ne ki atile metit, kagong'eet.”" 
Mark6:17 Amu kiga koyookto `Herod ineendet piik, koba konam Johana, ak korat eng' korgoreet, amu Herodias osotyotap Philipu ng'eetap kamet, amu kiga kobaigei ineendet ak kwonyooto." 
Mark6:18 Amu ki mwachi `Johana Herod koleenji, “Etei ng'atuutik otebi ak osotyotap ng'eetap kamenng'ung'.”" 
Mark6:19 Ak kiwech `Herodias ineendet, ak kimach kobar. Ago ma imuuch," 
Mark6:20 amu ki iywei `Herod Johana ak ki riip, kongen kole ineendet ko chii ne po imanda ak ko tiliil. Ye kingo kas Herod ng'aleekyik, koiimgei miising'; nganda ki cham koboiboenjin kogas ineendet." 
Mark6:21 Ki it anyun peetuut ne nyolu, ye ki yai Herod igoorto ne po peetuutap sigennyi, koyachi piikyik che eecheen, kiptainik, ak che taagunotiin che po Galilaya." 
Mark6:22 Kingo nyo ko cheptap Herodias ak koureren, kobaibai Herod ak icheek che kitebyei eng' amisyet kobooto ineendet; ak ki leenji `laitoryat chebooto, “Sooma kiy age tugul ne imache si agoonin.”" 
Mark6:23 Ak ki iyasyechi kole, “Kiy age tugul ne isooma agoonin, agot kebebertap laitornatennyu.”" 
Mark6:24 Ki manda ak komwachi kamet kole, “Asoom nee?” Ak ki leenji, “Metitap Johana Kabatisanindet.”" 
Mark6:25 Ak yeityo konyo kochook agoi ole mi laitoryat ak kosoom kole, “Amache ale igoono nguno metitap Johana Kabatisanindet eng' tageito.”" 
Mark6:26 Ki aragen anyun miising' laitoryat; ago amu kayosyautikyik, ak amu icheeget che kitebyei eng' amisyet, ko mata koete ineendet." 
Mark6:27 Ara ki iyookto laitoryat asigarindet age eng' che kiriipsei kong'at kole keip metitap Johana. Ki wo anyun kotil metit eng' korgoreet," 
Mark6:28 ak ki ip metoto eng' tageito, ak kogoochi chebooto; ak kogoochi chebooto kamet." 
Mark6:29 Ye kingo kas kasubikyik agobo ng'olyoondonooto, kobwa ak kosut poortanyi, ak konde kererit." 
Mark6:30 Ki iyumjigei Jeso che kiyooktoi ak komwachi ineendet tuguuk tugul che kiga koyai ak tugul che kiga koneet. 
Mark6:31 Ki mwachi icheek koleenji, “Obwa okweegei taban ole surkwen, si omuuny kitigin.” Amu ki chaang' che kibwanei ak kobendi, ak ki ma kotinyei agot poroindo ne amisye." 
Mark6:32 Ak ki pa icheegei eng' moingetap peek kolang'ji surkwen. 
Mark6:33 Ak kigeeroti piik kobendi, ak ki nai che chaang', ak ki rwai koba olooto kibagenge kobunu nganasook tugul, ak kondoe icheeget." 
Mark6:34 Ak kingo lang' Jeso kogeer tuiyet ne oo, ak koriiregei icheek, amu ki uu keechiirek che ma tinyei mestowo; ak ki toi koneet icheek tuguuk che chaang'."
