Mark6:35 Ye kimachei koimen, kobwonji ineendet kasubikyik ak kole, “Surkwen oli, ak machei koimen nguno." 
Mark6:36 Mete piik koba emet ak nganasook che mi komoswek ole neegit, si koaljigei tuguuk che amei.”" 
Mark6:37 Ago ki wolji koleenji, “Ogoochi okweek amitwogik.” Ki leenji, “Kibe keal magatiinik che po dinarisyek pogol aeng', si kigoochi koam?”" 
Mark6:38 Ki leenji icheek, “Otinye magatiinik ata? Oba ogeer.” Ak kingo kagonai, kole, “Muut, ak njireenik aeng'.”" 
Mark6:39 Ki ng'at kole kobuur piik eng' susweek che nyalileen, korurugotkei." 
Mark6:40 Ara ki tep ng'wony kotetatkei, kobee pogol ak kobee konom." 
Mark6:41 Ki nam magatinichooto muut ak njireenik aeng', ak konyal kipsengwet, koberuur, ak kotonaton magatiinik. Ki igoochi kasubikyik si konde tainnywa; ak kipchechi icheeget tugul injirenichooto aeng'." 
Mark6:42 Ki amis tugul ak kibiyong'so. 
Mark6:43 Ki iyum katuganik che ki nyi kereboonik taman ak aeng', che po magatiinik ak njireenik." 
Mark6:44 Icheeget che ki am magatinichooto ko ki murenik eliphuusyek muut. 
Mark6:45 Ki ichiich `Jeso kasubikyik kolaany moinget si kondoe ineendet koba pitoniin agoi Bethsaida, ak ya tugul kotyaachi tuiyet koba." 
Mark6:46 Ye kingo kagobagaakta icheek, kwo tulweet kosa." 
Mark6:47 Kingo ek koskoleny, komi moinget kwenutap araraita, ak ki mi ineegei emet ne yaamaat." 
Mark6:48 Kingo keer icheeget konyalildos eng' poisyetap mugangok che ki kwerye moinget, amu ki kirindoi usoonet icheeget, konyo ole mi icheeget eng' riipseet ne po ang'wan ne po kemoi, kowendote araraita parak. Ki machei kosiirtoe icheeget," 
Mark6:49 ago kingo keer icheek ineendet kowendoti eng' araraita parak, koleen icheeget abeere tamirmiryet, ak ki waakyo;" 
Mark6:50 amu ki keer icheek tugul ineendet, ak ki aragenso. Ak kitwekyi icheek koleenji, “Onyiganitu! Aa ineendet. Amoaragen.”" 
Mark6:51 Ki laany ineendet moinget kwo ole mi icheek ak ki siis usoonet. Ki kwong'yo miising' pichooto," 
Mark6:52 amu ki ma nai icheek agobo magatiinik, amu ki uueen mugulelwekwak." 
Mark6:53 Ye kingo kagolanda, koit emetap Genesaret ak korat moinget eng' ngeguut." 
Mark6:54 Ye kingo mong' eng' moinget, konai `piik ineendet eng' sainooto," 
Mark6:55 ak korwaat eng' koronooto komugul, ak kotoi komut che myandos eng' itogusyekwak, koba ole kiga kasyi ineendet." 
Mark6:56 Ak oldo tugul ole ki mong'ji nganasook che mengeechen, anan che eecheen, anan emet, ki inde che myandos ye mi sirosyek. Ki soom `icheek ineendet kole tamangap kocham kotwa agot tabandap ngoryennyi; ak tugul che kitiiny ineendet ko kisopcho." 
Mark7:1 Ki iyumjigei ineendet Pharisaik ak alak eng' siriik che kiga pun Jerusalem," 
Mark7:2 ak ki keer alak eng' kasubikyik koamei magatiinik eng' eunek che murwonen, nooto ko, eunek che ma kiuun." 
Mark7:3 Amu ngot koma iun eunekwak komyee Pharisaik ak Yahudik tugul koma amisyei, kosubi piteetap poisyek;" 
Mark7:4 ak ye punu ye mi ole kiyae mung'aaret, ko ngot koma iungei koma amisyei. Ak miitei pitonwek alak che chaang' che kitaach si koriip komyee, ko uu kaunetap kigombok, tereenik ak tuguuk che po sugunwet." 
Mark7:5 ki teebee ineendet `Pharisaik ak `siriik kole, “Lyon si ma pendoti kasubiguk kosubi piteetap poisyek, ago amisye eunek ko murwonen?”" 
Mark7:6 Ki mwachi icheek koleenji, “Kisip komwa Isaiah iman agobo okweek chombilik, ko uu ye siraat kole, ‘Teecha pichu eng' kutusweekwak, ago looen mugulelwekwak eng' anee." 
Mark7:7 Ilaswo puch; ng'atuutigap piik kaneetisyosyek che ineetisye.’ 
Mark7:8 Obagaaktoi ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet, ak onamjigei piteetap piik.”" 
Mark7:9 Ki leenji icheek, “Oeesyoi iman ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet si kobiit oriip piteeng'wong'!" 
Mark7:10 Amu ki le Musa, ‘Teech kwandang'ung' ak kamenng'ung',’ ak, ‘Ineendet ne mwaei yaityet agobo kwanda anan kamet komeei iman.’" 
Mark7:11 Ago omwae ole ngo leenji chii kwanda anan kamet, ‘Kiit ne kata atoretenen ko Korban’ ye kiweech ko Kagoochinet," 
Mark7:12 ko mata ochamji anyun ineendet kotoret kwanda anan kamet. 
Mark7:13 Oyai anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet koek puch eng' piteeng'wong' ne ki ong'at. Ak oyae tuguuk alak che chaang' che uu chooto.” 
Mark7:14 Ki kuur tuiyet kogeny kobwa ye mi ineendet ak koleenji, “Ogasa okweek tugul si oguiye:" 
Mark7:15 Ma mi kiy ne mi chii saang' ne ngwo oriitinnyi komuuchi kong'wanit ineendet, ago tuguuk che mang'une chii ko chooto che ing'waniti chii.”" 
Mark7:16 Ngo tinyei chii iitiik che kastoe, kogas." 
Mark7:17 Ye kingo pagaakta tuiyet kwo ko, koteebe kasubikyik agobo kalewenonooto." 
Mark7:18 Ki leenji icheek, “Tos motinye kaguiyet ak okweek? Mogeere ole kiy tugul ne mi saang' ak kwo oriit, koma koi imuuch kong'wanit chii," 
Mark7:19 amu ma chut muguleldanyi ago chutei moet, si komanda koba timiin?” (Uu nooto, kiitiliil amitwogik tugul.)" 
Mark7:20 Ak ki le, “Kiit ne mang'une chii ko nooto ne ing'waniti chii." 
Mark7:21 Amu mang'une oriit, eng' muguleldap chii, kabwaatutik che yaach: sokseet, choorsosyek, rumisyosyek, ibeetapkei," 
Mark7:22 kasetap myat, yaityet, ng'aalseet, mageet ne ya, kong' ne ya, ng'aleek che yaach, menoteet, ak perberyo." 
Mark7:23 Mang'une oriit tuguuchuuto tugul yaacheen ak kong'wanit chii.” 
Mark7:24 Ki ng'eet ineendet eng' olooto ak kwo agoi tabanwegap Tyro ak Sidon. Ki wo koot age ak ki ma mach konai chii, nga ki ma imuuch koung'ak." 
Mark7:25 Ak eng' sainooto, kingo kas kobogoryot age ne ki tinyei chepto ne ming'in ne kiga nam tamirmiryet ne murwoon agobo ineendet, konyo ak kobutyi keelyekyik." 
Mark7:26 Ki po Yunanik kobogoryondonooto, ne kisalu pororyetap Surophoenike. Ak ki soom ineendet kole koon oindet eng' cheptonyi." 
Mark7:27 Ak ki leenji ineendet, “Ingebai lagok korook, amu ma nyolu kenam amitwogigap lagok ak kewiirchi sesenik.”" 
Mark7:28 Ago ki wolji ineendet koleenji, “Wei, Kiptaiyat; nga amei sesenik ak icheek eng' kurereetap meset amitwogik che po lagok che iroroi.”" 
Mark7:29 Ak ki leenji kobogoryondonooto, “Ui anyun amu mwaoni; kagomang'une oindet cheptong'ung'.”" 
Mark7:30 Ki wo anyun koonnyi ak konyoor lakweet koruei eng' itook, ko kagomang'une oindet." 
Mark7:31 Ki manda kogeny eng' tabanwegap Tyro, ak ki iwerta kobun Sidon kot koit araraita ne po Galilaya, eng' tabanwegap Decapolis." 
Mark7:32 Ki kimutyi ineendet chii ne miing'at, ak ko uui kuut; ak kosoom kole kogonoor ineendet eunnyi." 
Mark7:33 Ki imut chiichooto kwo taban eng' tuiyet, ak ki irooch moriikyik iitiigap chiichooto, yeityo kong'utyi ak kotwa ng'elyeptanyi." 
Mark7:34 Ki inyal kipsengwet, kobus ak koleenji, “Epata!” Nooto ko, “Yaatage!”" 
Mark7:35 Eng' niito anyun koyatagis iitiikyik ak kotyagak ng'elyeptanyi, ak kong'alaal komyee." 
Mark7:36 Ak ki ng'at icheek kole mat komwachi chii; ago ye kites kong'at icheek, kotes anyun pichooto komwaitaat." 
Mark7:37 Ak ki kwong'yo miising' ne siirei koleen, “Kagoyai tuguuk tugul komyee; igoochin kogasta agot che ming'otin ak kong'alaal che namotin kuut.”" 
Mark8:1 Eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki piit kogeny tuiyet ne oo ak ki ma kotinyei kiy ne amei, koguur anyun Jeso kasubikyik ak koleenji," 
Mark8:2 “Ariiree tuiyet, amu kagotebi kobooto nguno peetuusyek somok ak ma tinyei kiy ne amei." 
Mark8:3 Ngot aunde koba oldanywa koma am kiy, kotanuitos eng' ooreet, amu kagobun alak eng' icheek ole loo.”" 
Mark8:4 Ki wolji kasubikyik kole, “Imuuchi konyoorunee ano chii magatiinik eng' emoni surkwen kobae pichu kot kobiyong'so?”" 
Mark8:5 ki teebee icheek koleenji, “Otinye magatiinik ata?” Ak kole, “Tisap.”" 
Mark8:6 Ki ng'at anyun tuiyet kotep ng'wony. Ki nam magatinichooto tisap ak kingo kagomwa kongoi, kobuutul ak kogoochi kasubikyik si konde tainnywa, ak kogoochinot tuiyet." 
Mark8:7 Ki tinyei njireenik che mengeechen che ng'ering'; ak kingo kagoberuur, kong'at konde chooto ak icheek tainnywa." 
Mark8:8 Ki amis ak kobiyong'so. Ak ki iyum katuganik, ak kiyam mesendoik tisap." 
Mark8:9 Ak icheeget ko ki olo po eliphuusyek ang'wan. Ak kiunda icheek koba. 
Mark8:10 Ak yeityo anyun kolaany moingetap peek kobooto kasubikyik ak koba komoswegap Dalmanuta. 
Mark8:11 Ki pwa Pharisaik ak kotoi koteepse ineendet. Kotyemei ineendet, ko kiteebe `icheek ineendet kigoochi kaboorunet ne punu kipsengwet." 
Mark8:12 Ki ibuus ne nyigiis eng' muguleldannyi ak kole, “Amu nee si kocheeng'ei ibini kaboorunet? Amwaiwok iman ale, ma mi kaboorunet ne kigoochi ibini.”" 
Mark8:13 Ak ki pagaakta icheek, ak kolaany moingetap peek kogeny, kolanda kwo pitet age." 
Mark8:14 Ak kiutye icheek koip magatiinik; ki ma kotinyei kiy eng' moinget kobatee magatyat agenge kityo. 
Mark8:15 Ki itigon icheek koleenji, “Oriipkei, ak oriibegei mermeregap Pharisaik ak mermereek che po Herod.”" 
Mark8:16 Ki ng'alaaljingei icheegei koleen, “Abeere amu ma ki tinyei magatiinik.”" 
Mark8:17 Ak kingo nai Jeso, koleenji, “Kalya si oteebegei ole motinye magatiinik? Tom onai anan oguiye? Ta ko uueen mugulelwekwok?" 
Mark8:18 Otinye koonyek, amogeere kiy? Ak otinye iitiik, amogastoi? Amobwaati?" 
Mark8:19 Yu kinga puutulji magatiinik muut piik eliphuusyek muut, ko ki tinyei kereboonik ata katuganik che ki koyum?” Koleenji ineendet, “Taman ak aeng'.”" 
Mark8:20 “Ak tisap eng' piik eliphuusyek ang'wan, koginyi mesendoik ata katuganik che ki koyum?” Ak koleenji, “Tisap.”" 
Mark8:21 Koleenji icheek, “Tom oguiye?”" 
Mark8:22 Ki it anyun Bethsaida. Ak kimutyi `icheek ineendet chii ne koraat ak kosoom kotwa ineendet. 
Mark8:23 Ki nam eutap kipkoratyandanooto ak komut komandae nganaseet; ak ye kingo kagong'utyi konyekyik ak kogonoor eunekyik ineendet, koteebe kole, “Igeere kiy?”" 
Mark8:24 Ki inyal parak ak kole, “Ageere piik; amu ageere icheek ko uu keetiik, kobendi.”" 
Mark8:25 Yeityo kotwa eunekyik kogeny konyekyik; ak ki ichiil koonyek ak kisop, ak kogeer tuguuk tugul komyee." 
Mark8:26 Ki unda kwo kaa, koleenjin, “Amewe nganaseet agot kitigin.”" 
Mark8:27 Ki pa Jeso ak kasubikyik agoi nganasook che po Caesarea Philippi. Eng' ooreet koteebe `ineendet kasubikyik koleenji, “Mwaei piik kole aa ng'oo?”" 
Mark8:28 Komwachi koleenji, “Leen, ii Johana Kabatisanindet; koleen alak, ii Elijah; ak leen alak, ii agenge eng' maotik.”" 
Mark8:29 ki teebee icheeget kole, “Ago oleen okweek aa ng'oo?” Kowolji Petero koleenji, “Ii Kristo.”" 
Mark8:30 Ak ki ng'at icheek kole amat komwachi chii agobo ineendet. 
Mark8:31 Ki toi koneet icheek kole, kanyool konyalil Weeriitap chii eng' tuguuk che chaang', ak koeesyo poisyek, tisiik che eecheen ak siriik ak kebar, ak ye igeskei peetuusyek somogu kong'eet kogeny." 
Mark8:32 Ki mwa ng'olyoondonooto kotook. Ak ki nam `Petero ineendet ak kotoi koger kong'. 
Mark8:33 Ago kiwelelgei ak kogeer kasubikyik, ak koger kong' Petero ak koleenji, “Ui let eng' anee, Setani! Amu mebwaati tuguugap Kamuktaindet, ago tuguugap piik.”" 
Mark8:34 Ki kuur anyun tuiyet kobooto kasubikyik ak koleenji icheek, “Ngo machei chii age tugul kosubwo, koeesyogei ak kosut kimurtoiyondennyi ak kosubwo." 
Mark8:35 Amu age tugul ne machei kosar saboondanyi kobeeti; ak age tugul ne ibeeti saboondanyi agobo anee ak logoiywek che myach kosaru. 
Mark8:36 Amu nyooru porot nee chii, ngo nyoor ng'wony komugul, ak kobeet saboondanyi?" 
Mark8:37 Amu igoitoi nee chii kowale saboondanyi? 
Mark8:38 Amu age tugul ne ililani agobo anee kobooto ng'aleekyuk eng' ibinita po sokseet ak tengek, ko tuun ililanjin agine Weeriitap chii ineendet, ye tuun nyoonei eng' liilindap Kwandanyi kobooto malaikaisyek che tiliileen.”" 
Mark9:1 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Amwaiwok iman ale, mi yu alak eng' chu tonondos che ma koi chamcham meet agoi kogeer laitornatetap Kamuktaindet konyonei eng' kamuktaet.”" 
Mark9:2 Kingo pata peetuusyek lo, komut `Jeso Petero, Jakobo ak Johana kotogosta tulweet ne kooi koba uwak icheegei. Kiwalak Jeso eng' tainnywa," 
Mark9:3 ak kolelagitu ngoroikyik miising' ko uu teluji, ne ma mi mwetindet ng'wony ne imuuchi komwet ko uu chooto." 
Mark9:4 Ki took eng' tainnywa Elijah ak Musa, kong'alaalndos ak Jeso." 
Mark9:5 Koleenji `Petero Jeso “Kaneetindoni, myee ketebi eng' yu. Ngeteech keryosyek somok si ko neng'ung' age, ko po Musa age, ak kobunji Elijah age.”" 
Mark9:6 Ma nai kiit ne wolu amu kiga koaragenso miising'. 
Mark9:7 Ki nyo pooldet kotuch icheek ak komang'une pooldanooto tuugeet koleen, “Ni ko Weeriinnyu, chamanennyu; ogas iit ineendet!”" 
Mark9:8 Ye kingo kuskong' eng' yooto kogeer komoswek tugul, ko mata kogeer chii komi kobooto icheeget, kobatee Jeso ineegei." 
Mark9:9 Kingo ta kochoorugei eng' tulweet, kong'at icheek koleenji amat komwachi chii tuguuk che kagogeer agoi kong'eet Weeriitap chii eng' che ki pek." 
Mark9:10 Ki riip ng'olyoondonooto ak koteebegei agobo kaguiyetap ng'eetyeet. 
Mark9:11 ki teebee icheek ineendet koleenji, “Amu nee si komwaei siriik koleen nyoonei Elijah korook?”" 
Mark9:12 Koleenji icheek, “Iman, nyoonei Elijah korook si koweech tuguuk tugul ko uu ye kinye. Kitepto ano anyun si kesir agobo Weeriitap chii keele punei nyalilwogik che chaang' ak kiit ineendet koek puch?" 
Mark9:13 Ago amwaiwok ale, kigonyo Elijah, ak ki yachi agine kiit age tugul ne kimachei icheek ko uu ye ki kisir agobo ineendet.”" 
Mark9:14 Ye kingo pwa ole mi kasubik, kogeer tuiyet ne oo ko kayiem icheek, ak kiteepseen icheek alak eng' siriik." 
Mark9:15 Ye kingo keer tuiyet komugul ineendet, kokwong'yo miising', ak korwai ole mi, kogat." 
Mark9:16 Ak ki teebe icheek kole, “Oteebegei nee ak icheeget?”" 
Mark9:17 Kowolji chiito age eng' tuiyet, koleenji, “Kaneetindoni, kaamutun weeriinnyu, ne tinyei tamirmir ne yaei konamak kuut;" 
Mark9:18 ak oldo tugul ole namjin eng' kimnateet, kowiirchin ng'wony; tabugoni ak konyeei kelek ak kochuchui; ak kaamwachi kasubiguk koon komanda, ago ma imuuch.”" 
Mark9:19 Ki wolji icheek koleenji, “Ee, ibinda ne ma tinyei kayaneet, atebye kobootok kot kotyanit? Amuitoiywok kot kotyanit? Omutwaa ineendet.”" 
Mark9:20 Ak ki imut `icheek ineendet komutyi Jeso. Ye kingo keer `tamirmiryet ne ya Jeso, kobirabirto weeroto miising'. Ki ibutyi ng'wony ak komelmelgei, kotabugani." 
Mark9:21 Ki teebe kwandanyi koleenji, “Ki namei kobooch au kiito?” Ak ki le, “Kobooch ko lakwa." 
Mark9:22 Ki kowiirchi konyil che chaang' ma ak ole mi peek, komachei kobar ineendet; ngimuuchi iyai kiy age tugul, irirenech ak itoretech.”" 
Mark9:23 Ki leenji Jeso, “Ngimuuchi! Imugaksei tuguuk tugul eng' ineendet ne iyani.”" 
Mark9:24 Kowaach anyun kwandap lakwanooto ak kole, “Ayani! Toreto eng' pistoennyu!”" 
Mark9:25 Kingo keer Jeso tuiyet korwou tugul, koger kong' tamirmiryet ne murwoon, koleenji, “Inyee, tamirmiryet ne iyaei lakwani konamak kuut ak ko miing'ak, kang'atiin ale, mong'u eng' ineendet, ak amatata ichut ineendet kogeny.”" 
Mark9:26 Kingo kagowaach tamirmiryet ak kobirto ineendet miising', komanda. Ki igei lakweet ne kagome kot komwa che chaang' kole, “Kagome.”" 
Mark9:27 Ago ki nam Jeso euut ak kong'eet; ak ki tonon. 
Mark9:28 Ak ye kingo kakwo ko, koteebe kasubikyik ineendet komi icheegei kole, “Amu nee si ma kimuuch acheek keon?”" 
Mark9:29 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Ma imuuchi komanda ne uu ni eng' kiy tugul, kobatee saaet.”" 
Mark9:30 Ki pa anyun eng' olooto ak kobun kwenutap Galilaya; ak ki ma mach konai chii age tugul. 
Mark9:31 Amu ki ineeti kasubikyik, koleenjin, “Kindo Weeriitap chii eunegap piik ak kobar ineendet. Ye kagebar, kong'eet kogeny, ko kagobata peetuusyek somogu.”" 
Mark9:32 Ago ki ma nai icheek ng'olyoondonooto, ak ki iywei koteebe ineendet." 
Mark9:33 Ak ki pwa Kapernaum: ak ye ki mi ko koteebe icheek kole, “Ka nee ng'aleek che komwaonu eng' ooreet?”" 
Mark9:34 Ago ki siisyo: amu kitiitos icheegei eng' icheegei eng' ooreet koleen ng'oo ne oo. 
Mark9:35 Ki tep ng'wony anyun, ak koguur chooto taman ak aeng'; ak koleenji, “Ngo machei chii koek ne po tai, koegu ne po let eng' tugul, ak koek otwogindetap tugul.”" 
Mark9:36 Ki nam lakweet ne ming'in ak konde kwenunnywa. Kiganap eng' eunekyik ak koleenji," 
Mark9:37 “Age tugul ne taachei age eng' lagochu mengech eng' kainennyu, ko kataacha; ak age tugul ne taacha ko mataacha anee, ago ineendet ne ki iyookwo.”" 
Mark9:38 Ki leenji `Johana ineendet, “Kaneetindoni, kogigeer chii ko oonei oik eng' kaineng'ung' ak kogietee, amu koma kosubwech.”" 
Mark9:39 Ago ki le Jeso, “Amoete; amu ma mi chii ne yaei poisyet ne po kimnateet eng' kainennyu, ak komuuch kochepchebit komwaitaena yaityo." 
Mark9:40 Amu ineendet ne ma kirindoech ko nenyo. 
Mark9:41 Amu age tugul ne inagok peegap kigombet oee, amu oo po Kristo, amwaiwok iman ale, ma petyin melektanyi." 
Mark9:42 “Ak age tugul ne inachi age eng' chu mengech che iyana, ko kaigai eng' ineendet kirooch kaatinnyi koitap pai ne oo, ak kewiirchi araraita." 
Mark9:43 Ak ngo nachin eung'ung', itil. Kaigai eng' inyee imong'ji saboondo ii po mugung', kosiir itinye eunek aeng' ak iwe Gehenna, maat ne ma misoksei." 
Mark9:44 Ole ma pegu kutikwak, ama misoksei maat." 
Mark9:45 Ak ngo nachin keeldong'ung', itil. Kaigai eng' inyee imong'ji saboondo ii po keelok, kosiir kewiirchin Gehenna ii po keelyek aeng'." 
Mark9:46 Ole ma pegu kutikwak, ama misoksei maat." 
Mark9:47 Ak ngo nachin kondang'ung', ibalu. Kaigai eng' inyee iit laitornatetap Kamuktaindet ii po kong'ak, kosiir kewiirchin Gehenna itinye koonyek aeng';" 
Mark9:48 ole ma pegu kutikwak, ama misoksei maat." 
Mark9:49 “Amu kindoi chii age tugul muunyuk eng' maat. 
Mark9:50 Myachen muunyuk: ago ngo pet anyinyindap muunyuk, kota ondoi nee si kochom? Ingotebee muunyuk mugulelwekwok, ak otebi eng' kaalyeet okweegei eng' okweegei.”" 
Mark10:1 Ki ng'eet anyun eng' olooto, konyo tabanwegap Judea ak pitetap Jordan. Ki iyumjigei ineendet tuiyosyek kogeny, ak ko uu ye ki cham koyaei ko ki ineet icheek." 
Mark10:1 Ki ng'eet anyun eng' olooto, konyo tabanwegap Judea ak pitetap Jordan. Ki iyumjigei ineendet tuiyosyek kogeny, ak ko uu ye ki cham koyaei ko ki ineet icheek." 
Mark10:2 Ki pwanji ineendet `Pharisaik, koteebe ineendet koyomei kole, “Tos chamdaat eng' ng'atuutik koon chii osotyonnyi?”" 
Mark10:3 Ak ki wolji `Jeso koleenji, “Nee ne king'ataak Musa?”" 
Mark10:4 Ak ki le icheek, “Ki cham Musa kesir sireet ne po peesyet, si koon kwo.”" 
Mark10:5 Ago ki leenji `Jeso icheek, “Kisirwak ng'atuutyonooto Musa amu uuindap mugulelwekwok.”" 
Mark10:6 Ago kobooch taunetap yaetap ng'wony, ko ki yai Kamuktaindet icheek muren ak kobogoryo." 
Mark10:7 Amu ng'olyoondoni kobagaaktoi chii kwanda ak kamet, ak konamgei ak osotyonnyi;" 
Mark10:8 ak koek chooto aeng' poorto agenge: si ma ko aeng', ago egu poorto agenge." 
Mark10:9 Chooto anyun che kagotuiyo Kamuktaindet, ko mat kobesyo chii." 
Mark10:10 Ak kiteebe kasubikyik ineendet kogeny eng' ko, agobo ng'olyoondonooto." 
Mark10:11 Ak ki leenji icheek, Chii age tugul ne oonei osotyonnyi, ak kotun age, ko kabaigei." 
Mark10:12 Agot kobogoryot agine ngo pagaakta manong'otyondennyi, ak kotun chiito age, ko kabaigei." 
Mark10:13 Ak ki kimutyi ineendet lagok che mengeechen, si kobiit kotwa icheek: ago ki kergong' kasubikyik icheek." 
Mark10:14 Ago ye kingo keer Jeso, konyit, ak koleenji icheek, Ochamji lagok che mengech kobwanjo; amoete icheek: amu po laitornatetap Kamuktaindet che uu chu." 
Mark10:15 Amwaiwok iman ale, Chii age tugul ne mataachei laitornatetap Kamuktaindet ko uu lakweet ne ming'in, koma itei olooto matiny." 
Mark10:16 Ak kiganap icheeget eng' eunekyik, ak koberuur, kogonoor eunekyik icheek." 
Mark10:17 Ak ye kiwendi eng' ooreet, kolabatyi chiito age ineendet ak kogutung'ji, ak koteebe kole, “Kaneetindoni myee, ayai nee si anyoor saboondo ne po koigeny?”" 
Mark10:18 Ak ki leenji `Jeso ineendet, “Kalya si iguureno ne myee? Ma mi chii ne myee, kobatee agenge, ineendet Kamuktaindet." 
Mark10:19 Ingen inyee ng'atuutik: ‘Amerumisye; Amoipkei; Amechoorse; Amebaoryanji lembech; Ameng'aalse; Teech kwandang'ung' ak kamenng'ung'.’ ” 
Mark10:20 Ago ki leenji, “Kaneetindoni, ki ariip tuguuchuuto tugul kobooch ko aa ming'in.”" 
Mark10:21 Ki keer anyun `Jeso ineendet ak kocham, ak koleenji, “Ta ko rartaat kiit agenge eng' inyee; ui, ialde tuguuk tugul che itinye, ak igoochi kibananook, si inyooru mogornateet eng' kipsengwet: ak inyoo isubwo.”" 
Mark10:22 Ago ki kereer met agobo ng'olyoondonooto, ak kwo eng' arageneet: amu ki tinyei ineendet tuguuk che chaang'." 
Mark10:23 Ak ki keer Jeso komoswek tugul, ak koleenji kasubikyik, “Pichiy ne tya koit laitornatetap Kamuktaindet che tinyei mogornatosyek!”" 
Mark10:24 Ak ki kwong'yo kasubikyik eng' ng'aleekyik. Ago ki wol Jeso kogeny, koleenji, “Lagochu, pichiy ne tya eng' icheek che tiegei mogornatosyek koit laitornatetap Kamuktaindet!" 
Mark10:25 Nyamnyum eng' tambeesyet kochut kondap sindanut, kosiir komong'ji mogoryot laitornatetap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Mark10:26 Ak ki kwong'yo icheek miising', ak koleenji, “Ara ng'oo anyun ne imuuchi konyoor saruunet?”" 
Mark10:27 Ak kingo keer `Jeso icheek, kole, “Ma imugaksei eng' piik, ago ma uu nooto eng' Kamuktaindet; amu imugaksei tuguuk tugul eng' Kamuktaindet.”" 
Mark10:28 Ki toi anyun Petero koleenji, “Keero, kigebagaakte tuguuk tugul ak ki kisubun.”" 
Mark10:29 Ki le Jeso, Amwaiwok iman ale, ma mi chii ne ki pagaach koot, anan ng'eetap kametwagik, anan chepkametwagik, anan kamet, anan kwanda, anan lagok, anan mbareenik, agobo anee, ak logoiywek che myach," 
Mark10:30 ne ma nyooru konyil pogol nguno eng' peetuusyechu, kooriik, ak ng'eetap kametwagik, ak chepkametwagik, ak kametwagik, ak lagok, ak mbareenik, kobooto usiisyosyek; ak eng' peetuusyek che tuun pwoonei, saboondap koigeny." 
Mark10:31 Ago tuun egu che chaang' che po tai che po let; ak koek che po let che po tai. 
Mark10:32 Ak ki mi icheek eng' ooreet kotogostoi Jerusalem; ak ki indoi Jeso: ak ki kwong'yo, ak koiyweis che ki isubi. Ak ki itabaan kogeny chooto taman ak aeng', kotoi komwachi icheek tuguuk che tuun ityin ineendet," 
Mark10:33 kole, “Ogeero, kitogostoi Jerusalem; ak kindoi `Weeriitap chii eunegap tisiik che eecheen ak siriik; ak korwookyi kirwooget ne po meet, ak konde `ineendet eunegap pororyosyek;" 
Mark10:34 ak kochurochur ineendet ak kong'utyi, ak kobire kipchoritiit, ak kobar; ak ye ibata peetuusyek somogu kong'eet kogeny.”" 
Mark10:35 Ak ki riikyi ineendet Jakobo ak Johana, weeriigap Zebedayo, ak koleenji, “Kaneetindoni, kimache iyaiywech kiy age tugul ne kisoomin.”" 
Mark10:36 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Omache ayaiywok nee?”" 
Mark10:37 Ak ki leenji, “Koonech ketebee, age eung'ung' ne po tai, ak age eung'ung' ne po kaataam, eng' telunateng'ung'.”" 
Mark10:38 Ago ki leenji `Jeso icheek, “Mongen kiit ne osoome. Tos omuuchi oee kigombet ne aee? Anan kibatisanenak kabatisanet ne kibatisanena?”" 
Mark10:39 Ak ki leenji, “Kimuuchi.” Koleenji anyun `Jeso icheek, “Kigombet ne aee ko tuun oee ak okweek; ak kabatisanet ne kibatisanena ko tuun kibatisanenok ak okweek nooto;" 
Mark10:40 ago ma anee ne igoitoi kotebee chii eunnyu ne po tai anan eunnyu ne po kaataam: ago po icheeget che kigechopchi.” 
Mark10:41 Ak ye kingo kas chuun tamanu, kotoi pichooto konereekyi miising' Jakobo ak Johana." 
Mark10:42 Ak kiguur Jeso icheeget kobwa ole mi, ak koleenji icheek, “Ongen ole icheeget che kiiti keele pou Pororyosyek, koyaegei koek kiptainik eng' icheek; ak chechwaak che eecheen kobou icheek." 
Mark10:43 Ago ma uu nooto eng' okweek: ago chii age tugul ne machei koek ne oo eng' okweek, koek ne poisyewok:" 
Mark10:44 ak chii age tugul ne machei koek ne po tai eng' okweek, koek otwogindetap tugul." 
Mark10:45 Amu ki ma nyo agot Weeriitap chii si keboisyechi, ago si kobois ineendet ak kogoito saboondanyi koek kiit ne kityage che chaang'.”" 
Mark10:46 Ak kiit anyun Jeriko: ak kingo mandae Jeriko, kobooto kasubikyik ak tuiyet ne oo, ko kitebyei eng' ooreet taban, Bartimayo, weeriitap Timayo, ineendet kipkoraatyat ne soomsei." 
Mark10:47 Ak ye kingo kas kole, niito ko Jeso ne po Nazareth, kotoi kowaach ak kole, “Jeso, Weeriitap Daudi, rireena.”" 
Mark10:48 Ak ki kergong' che chaang' koleenji, “Siis!” Ago k ites kowaach miising' kole, “Weeriitap Daudi, rireena.”" 
Mark10:49 Ak ki tonon Jeso ak kole, “Oguur ineendet.” Ak ki kiguur kipkoratyandanooto, keleenji, “Paibaitu; ng'eet, kuurin ineendet.”" 
Mark10:50 Ak ki wiirta ngoryennyi ak koryakta kwo ole mi Jeso. 
Mark10:51 Ak ki wolji `Jeso ineendet koleenji, “Imache ayaun nee?” Ak kole chiito ne koraat, “Rabboni, amache ageerto.”" 
Mark10:52 Ak ki leenji `Jeso ineendet, “Ui pandang'ung'; kagosaabin kayaneng'ung'.” Ak kigeerto sainooto ak koosup ineendet eng' ooreet." 
Mark11:1 Ak ye kingo riikta Jerusalem, ak Bethphage ak Bethania, eng' tulweetap Mseituni, koyookto aeng' eng' kasubikyik," 
Mark11:2 ak koleenji, “Oba nganaseet ne mi taing'wong'; ak onyooru eng' sainooto oite, moitap sigiryet ko rataat, ne tomo kolaany chii; otyach, ak ogetu." 
Mark11:3 Ak ngo teebenak chii kole, ‘Kalya si oyai ko uu ni?’ Oleenji, ‘Makyingei Kiptaiyat; ak kogoonok ogetu anyun.’ ”" 
Mark11:4 Ki pa anyun, ak konyoor moitap sigiryet ko rataat, eng' saang'utap ormariich, eng' ole pesiap oor; kotyach." 
Mark11:5 Ak kiteebe alak che kitonondos eng' olooto koleenji, “Olyon, ngo tyachi moitap sigiryet?”" 
Mark11:6 Komwachi icheek ko uu ye ki kamwachi Jeso; ak ki unda `pichooto icheeget koba. 
Mark11:7 Ak kiget moitap sigiryet konyo ole mi Jeso, ak kiito ngoroikwak eng' sigiryet; ak ki tebee `Jeso sigiryonooto." 
Mark11:8 Ak kiito piik che chaang' ngoroikwak eng' ooreet; ak ki indooti alage mooriigap keetiik, che kiebei eng' mbareenik." 
Mark11:9 Ak kimwaoti eng' kutit ne oo che ki indoi, ak che ki isubi, koleen “Hosanna! Iberuurot ineendet ne nyoonei eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat!" 
Mark11:10 Iberuurot laitornatet ne nyoonei ne po kwandanyo Daudi. Hosanna eng' ole toroor miising'!” 
Mark11:11 Ak ki mong'ji Jerusalem, ak kwo Hekaluut oriit; ak ye kingo kagogeerot tuguuk tugul, ak kiga koek koskoleny, kwo anyun Bethania kobooto taman ak aeng'." 
Mark11:12 Ak kingo mong' icheeget karon eng' Bethania, koam rubeet ineendet." 
Mark11:13 Ak kingo keer eng' ole loo mogoywet ne tinyei sogeek, konyo, koleen tamangap konyoorchi kiy: ak kingo it ye mi keetoto, koma konyoorchi kiy kobatee sogeek kityo; amu kitom koit ye rure logoegap mogoonik." 
Mark11:14 Ak ki leenji keetoto, Kobooch nguno koma koamenen chii logoek agoi koigeny. Ak kigasei kasubikyik." 
Mark11:15 Ak kiit Jerusalem: ak ki wo Hekaluut oriit, ak kotoi koon che ki aldaisyei ak che ki alisyee Hekaluut, ak kogabui mesosyek che po woliigap silingisyek, ak ng'echerok che po che ki aldoi cheptugenik;" 
Mark11:16 ak ki ma chamji chii age tugul kobun Hekaluut koibei kiy. 
Mark11:17 Ak ki ineet icheek koleenji, “Siraat keele, ‘Koonnyu ko kootap saaet ne po pororyosyek tugul!’ Ago kaoyai okweek koek kebeneetap rebiik.”" 
Mark11:18 Ak ki kas tisiik che eecheen ak siriik, ak kocheeng' ole partoi ineendet: amu ki iywei ineendet, amu kiga kwong' tuiyet komugul agobo kaneetisyennyi." 
Mark11:19 Ak kingo ek koskoleny komanda eng' nganaseet. 
Mark11:20 Ak ye kisiirtoi icheek karon, kogeer mogoywonooto ko kogores kot koit tigitik." 
Mark11:21 Kobwaat anyun Petero, koleenji, “Kaneetindoni, keero, kogores mogoywondoni koichube.”" 
Mark11:22 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Oyan Kamuktaindet." 
Mark11:23 Amwaiwok iman ale, chii age tugul ne leenjin tulwooni, ‘Kitutin ak kewiirchin araraita,’ koma soge eng' muguleldanyi, ago koyan kole, isuldoi tuguuk che kamwa; konyooru tuguuchooto." 
Mark11:24 Nooto anyun amwaiwok ale, Tuguuk alak tugul che osoome eng' saaet, oyan ole kaotaach, ak onyooru." 
Mark11:25 Ak ngo ting'ee chii ng'olyoo, ko ye otonon osaae, onyochi kaat, si konyoiywok kaat lelutikwok Kwandang'wong' agine ne mi kipsengwet.”" 
Mark11:26 Ago ngo monyochi kaat okweek, koma nyoiywok kaat lelutikwok Kwandang'wong' agine ne mi kipsengwet." 
Mark11:27 Ak ki pwa kogeny Jerusalem: ak kingo ta kowendoti eng' Hekaluut, kobwonji ineendet tisiik che eecheen, ak siriik, ak poisyek;" 
Mark11:28 ak kiteebe kole, “Nee kimnateet ne iyae tuguuchu? Anan ng'oo ne kigoonin kimnatoni iyae tuguuchuuto?”" 
Mark11:29 Ak ki leenji `Jeso icheek, “Ateebenok ak anee ng'olyoot agenge, ak owolwo, si amwaiwok kimnateet ne ayae tuguuchuuto." 
Mark11:30 Tos ki punu kabatisanetap Johana kipsengwet, anan ki punu piik? Owolwo.”" 
Mark11:31 Ak kiteebegei icheegei kole, “Ngeele, ‘Ki punu kipsengwet,’ kole ineendet, ‘Kilya anyun si moyan?’" 
Mark11:32 Ago ngot keele, ‘Ki punu piik’ amu ki iywei `icheek piik, amu kiga koyan piik tugul kole maotyot Johana iman." 
Mark11:33 Ak ki wolji Jeso kole, ‘Ma kingen.’ Ak ki leenji Jeso anyun, ‘Ma mwaiwok agane kimnateet ne ayae tuguuchuuto.’ ”" 
Mark12:1 Ak ki toi kong'alaalji icheek eng' kalewenaik kole, “Ki minji chiito age sabibuk mbareet, ak kong'oot, ak kobal keriinget ole kiruruung'e sabibuk, ak koteech koot ne kooi, ak komanakyi meek, ak kwo emet age." 
Mark12:2 Ak kingo it peetuusyegap kesisyet, koyookto otwogindet kwo ole mi meek, si kobiit konyoorunee meechooto logoek che po mbareetap sabibuk." 
Mark12:3 Ak ki nam ineendet ak kobir, ak koon kwo puch." 
Mark12:4 Ak ki iyookyi kogeny otwogindet age; ak kibir metinnyi, ak koteweer." 
Mark12:5 Ak ki iyookto age; ak kobar ineendet: ak ki iyookto alak che chaang'; kobir alak, kobar alak." 
Mark12:6 Kita kotinyei anyun agenge, nooto weeriinnyi ne chamat: ki iyookto ineendet eng' let kwo ole mi icheek, kole, ‘Teechei weeriinnyu." 
Mark12:7 Ago ki ng'alaalso meechooto icheegei, koleen, Niito ne namei tuguuk; obwa, kebar ineendet, si kindii tuguuk.’" 
Mark12:8 Ak ki nam ineendet ak kobar, ak kowiirta komanda eng' mbareet ne po sabibuk." 
Mark12:9 “Yaei nee anyun chiitap ko po mbareet ne po sabibuk? Nyoonei anyun kobarei meechooto, ak komanakyi meek alak mbaranooto po sabibuk." 
Mark12:10 Tom osoman siruutichu; ‘Koita ne ki eesyo teegik, ki kiyai nooto koek metitap luuita." 
Mark12:11 Ki punu ng'olyoondoni Kiptaiyat, ak ko kwang'ut eng' konyekyok?’ ”" 
Mark12:12 Ak ki cheeng'ei ole namdoi ineendet; ago ki iywei tuiyet; amu ki nai kole kamwa kalewenoni agobo icheek: ak ki pagaakta ineendet ak koba. 
Mark12:13 Ak ki iyookyi Pharisaik alak ak che po Herodik, si korate ng'aleekyik." 
Mark12:14 Ak kingo pwa, koleenji ineendet, Kaneetindoni, kingen keele ii po iman, ameiti chii age tugul: amu megeere itoondap chii, ago ineeti iman ooreetap Kamuktaindet: Tos chamdoi ng'atuutik kigoochi kodi Caesarea, anan ma chamdoi?" 
Mark12:15 Kigoite anan acha? Ago ki nai ineendet chombilennywa, ak koleenji icheek, Kalya si otyema? Oibwa dinarit ageer." 
Mark12:16 Ak ki ipchi. Ak ki leenji icheek, Po ng'oo itooni ak sirooni? Ak koleenji, “Po Caesarea.”" 
Mark12:17 Ak ki leenji `Jeso, “Ogoochi Caesarea tuguuk che po Caesarea, ak ogoochi Kamuktaindet tuguuk che po Kamuktaindet.” Ak ki kwong'yo miising' agobo ineendet." 
Mark12:18 Ak ki pwanji ineendet `Sadukaik, che mwaei kole, ma mi ng'eetyeet, ak koteebe ineendet, kole," 
Mark12:19 Kaneetindoni, ki sirwech Musa kole, “Ngo me ng'eetap kametap chii, ak kobagaakta osotyonnyi, ama sich lakwa, kondii ng'eetap kamet osotyondonooto, si kobiit kolalji maat ng'eetap kamet." 
Mark12:20 Ki mi weeriik tisabu che ki tupcho: ak kiitunis weeriit ne oo, kome ama sich lakwa;" 
Mark12:21 ak ki indi agine ne po aeng', kome ama sich lakwa; ak ki igei nooto agine ne po somok:" 
Mark12:22 ak ma pitunee tugul tisap lakwa. Let kome agine kobogoryondonooto. 
Mark12:23 Tuun eng' ng'eetyeet kobunjin ng'oo eng' `icheek osotyondonooto? Amu kiga kobunji chooto tisap.” 
Mark12:24 Ak ki leenji `Jeso icheek, “Ma nooto ne ki koonok oleel, amu mongen siruutik, anan kimnateetap Kamuktaindet?" 
Mark12:25 Amu ye tuun ng'eetyo icheek komong' eng' che ki pek, koma itunisyei, ama kituni; ago tebyei ko uu malaikaisyek eng' kipsengwet." 
Mark12:26 Ago agobo piik che ki kobek keele tuun ng'eetos, ko tomo osoman eng' bukuitap Musa, eng' ole ki mi keetit ne lalei, ko uu ye ki mwachi `Kamuktaindet ineendet, koleenji, ‘Aa Kamuktaindet ne po Abraham, ak aa Kamuktaindet ne po Isak, ak aa Kamuktaindet ne po Jakobo?’" 
Mark12:27 Ineendet koma Kamuktaindet ne po che ki kobek, ago po che saptos; olele miising'.”" 
Mark12:28 Ak ki nyo age eng' siriik, ak kogas koteebegei, ak kingo nai kole kawolji icheek komyee, koteebe ineendet, kole, “Nee ng'atuutyet ne po tai eng' tugul?”" 
Mark12:29 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Ne po tai ko ni, ‘Ogaso ee Israel; Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor nenyo ko Kiptaiyat agenge." 
Mark12:30 Ak cham Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor neng'ung' eng' muguleldang'ung' komugul, ak eng' saboondang'ung' komugul, ak eng' ng'omnateng'ung' komugul, ak eng' kimnateng'ung' komugul.’" 
Mark12:31 Ne po aeng' ko ni, ‘Cham chiitap kokweng'ung' ko uu ole ichamdoigei. Ma miitei ng'atuutyet age ne oo kosiir chu.’ ”" 
Mark12:32 Ak ki leenji siriindet, Iman, Kaneetindoni, kaimwa komyee, ile, ineendet ko agenge; ama mi age kobatee ineendet:" 
Mark12:33 ak ngo cham ineendet eng' muguleldo komugul, ak eng' kaguiyet komugul, ak eng' kimnateet komugul, ak ngo cham chiitap kokwet ko uu ole chamdogei, kosiirei nooto kagoochinoik tugul che kibeelei ak tiseiywek." 
Mark12:34 Ak kingo keer Jeso kole kawol eng' ng'omnateet, koleenji, “Ma ii loo eng' laitornatetap Kamuktaindet.” Ak mata kogany chii koteebe ng'olyoo age tugul." 
Mark12:35 Ak ye ki ineetisyei Jeso eng' Hekaluut, komwa kole, “Lyon si komwaei siriik koleen Kristo ko weeriitap Daudi?" 
Mark12:36 Ki mwa Daudi ineendet eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil, kole, Ki mwachi Kiptaiyat Kiptaiyandennyu, kole, ‘Tebee eunnyu ne po tai, agoi ande puuniguk keldebesaigap keelyeguk.’ ”" 
Mark12:37 “Kuuree Daudi ineendet Kiptaiyat; koegundoi ano anyun weeriinnyi?” Ak ki epchin iit tuiyet ne oo ineendet eng' poiboiyet. 
Mark12:38 Ak eng' kaneetisyennyi, koleenji, “Oriibegei siriik, che chamei kobendat kolaachi ngoroik che kooen, ak kagatosyek eng' ole kiyae mung'aaret," 
Mark12:39 ak ng'echerok che po tai eng' sinagogisyek, ak oldinwek che po tai eng' igoorwek:" 
Mark12:40 ak korebe icheek mosoogik kooriikwak, ak kosaaei saautik che kooen kong'aalsei; nyooru pichu kirwooget ne oo kosiir.”" 
Mark12:41 Ak kitep kotokyigei ole kiyumjin tuguuk che kigoitoi, kogeer ole indoitoi tuiyet sendeisyek ole kiyumjin: ak ki inde mogoreek alak sendeisyek che chaang'." 
Mark12:42 Ak ki nyo mosoget age ne kibanania, ak konde sendeisyek aeng', che aechin ak chepkondet agenge." 
Mark12:43 Ak kiguur kasubikyik anyun kobwa ole mi ineendet ak koleenji, Amwaiwok iman ale, Kagonde mosogani panan che siirei che kagonde piik tugul che indoi tuguukwak ole kiyumjin:" 
Mark12:44 amu kagonde icheek tugul che po chaang'indap tuguukwak; ago kagonde ineendet che po panandanyi, tugul che katinyei, agot che kosabe." 
Mark13:1 Ak ye kimandoi eng' Hekaluut, koleenji age eng' kasubikyik, Kaneetindoni, keero, kie uu koichu ak kie uu teeksoni!" 
Mark13:2 Ak ki leenji `Jeso ineendet, “Tos igeere teeksosyechu eecheen? Matun ng'etu koita agenge eng' paragutap age, ne ma ki wiirchin ng'wony.”" 
Mark13:3 Ak kingo tebyei ng'wony eng' tulweetap mseituni ye tokyindos ak Hekaluut, koteebe ineendet Petero ak Jakobo ak Johana ak Andrea komi icheegei, kole," 
Mark13:4 “Mwaiwech, yaaksei tuguuchuuto auiyo? Ak nee kaboorunet ne tuun ibooru kole kariik kosulda tuguuchuuto tugul?”" 
Mark13:5 Ak ki toi `Jeso koleenji, “Oriipkei si ma ibeetook chii." 
Mark13:6 Pwoonei tuun che chaang' eng' kainennyu, koleen, ‘Aa ineendet!’ ak kobeet che chaang'." 
Mark13:7 Ak ye tuun ogas agobo lugoosyek ak ng'aleek agobo paretapkei, ko moaragense: kanyool koek ko uu nooto; ago tomo koit kagesunet." 
Mark13:8 Amu setyin pororyet age pororyet age, ak setyin laitornatet age laitornatet age; ak kobiit potaneetap ng'wony eng' oldinwek che teerchiin; ak kobiit rubosyek. Tuguuchuuto ko taunetap ng'waninwek." 
Mark13:9 “Ago oriipkei okweek: amu tuun kimutyinok kapkirwook; ak kebirok eng' sinagogisyek; ak oteleli eng' taitap pounik ak laitorinik agobo anee, si koek paornat eng' icheek." 
Mark13:10 Ak kanyool keamji korook logoiywek che myach pororyosyek tugul. 
Mark13:11 Ak ye tuun kimutak kapkirwook, ak kindeak eunegap piik, ko mat ogereer met agobo kiit ne tuun omwae: ago kiit age tugul ne ki koonok eng' sainooto, ko nooto ne omwae: amu ma okweek che ong'alaali, ago Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Mark13:12 Ak kong'wekta `chii ng'eetap kamet kebar, ak kong'wekta `kwanda lakweennyi; ak kong'eetyi `lagok sigiikwak, ak kogoito kebar." 
Mark13:13 Ak kowechok piik tugul amu kainennyu: ago ne muitoi agoi let, kesaru nooto." 
Mark13:14 “Ago ye tuun ogeer kiit ne kiwechei ne po ng'emisyet kotonone ole ma nyoljin kotonone (ingoguiyo ne somani), ingomwechi anyun che mi Judea tuloonook:" 
Mark13:14 “Ago ye tuun ogeer kiit ne kiwechei ne po ng'emisyet kotonone ole ma nyoljin kotonone (ingoguiyo ne somani), ingomwechi anyun che mi Judea tuloonook:" 
Mark13:15 ama choortagei chii ne mi koot parak anan kwo ko, si kobiit konem kiy eng' koonnyi:" 
Mark13:16 amat koweek chii ne mi mbar kwo koip ngoryennyi. 
Mark13:17 Pwo eng' icheek che chiioo ak che tinyei lagok che reritos eng' peetuusyechooto! 
Mark13:18 Ak osaa si ma tuun yaak chooto eng' peetuusyek che po kaititindo. 
Mark13:19 Amu egu nyalilda eng' peetuusyechooto, ne kitom koegu ko uu nooto kobooch taunetap yaetap ng'wony ne ki yai Kamuktaindet, agoi nguno, ama kobiitu ko uu nooto kogeny agoi." 
Mark13:20 Ak nda ki ma til Kiptaiyat peetuusyek konwagitu, ta ma kisaru chii: ago kitil peetuusyek amu che lewenotin che ki lewen." 
Mark13:21 “Ak ngo leenjok chii eng' peetuusyechooto, ‘Ogeero! Mi Kristo oli!’ anan, ‘Ogeero! Miitei olo!’ ko mat oyan." 
Mark13:22 Amu ng'eetos Kristoisyek che po lembech, ak maotik che po lembech, ak koboortoi kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik, si kobeet, agot che kigelewen nda imugaksei." 
Mark13:23 Ago oriipkei: ogeero, kasip amwaiwok tuguuk tugul." 
Mark13:24 “Ago eng' peetuusyechooto, ko kagobata nyalilata, koimenit asiista, kama kooluu arawet," 
Mark13:25 ak kororok kecheik eng' kipsengwet, ak kotumdumgei kimnatosyek che mi kipsengwet." 
Mark13:26 Eng' sainooto kogeer anyun Weeriitap chii konyonei eng' poolik kobooto kimnateet ne oo ak liilindo ne oo. 
Mark13:27 Yeityo koyookto malaikaisyek, ak koyum lewenikyik, kobun usoonaik ang'wan, kobunu tabandap ng'wony agoi tabandap kipsengwet." 
Mark13:28 “Oneetkei kalewenetap mogoywet: ye kang'arng'aritu mooriikyik, ak kong'atyo sogeek, onai ole kariik kesisyet;" 
Mark13:29 uu nooto ak okweek ye ogeer kosuldoi tuguuchu, onai ole kagoriik ineendet, mi kurgotik." 
Mark13:30 Amwaiwok iman ale, Masiirtoi ibini, ama isulda tuguuchuuto tugul." 
Mark13:31 Siirtoi kipsengwet ak ng'wony, ago ma siirtoi ng'aleekyuk." 
Mark13:32 “Ago ma mi chii ne naei agobo peetuunooto anan sainooto, agot malaikaisyek che mi kipsengwet, agot Weeriit, kobatee Kwanda ineegei." 
Mark13:33 Oriipse anyun, ogenisye ak osaae: amu mongen ye egune." 
Mark13:34 Uu chii, ne ki pagaach koonnyi, ak koruto emet age, ak kogoochi otwogikyik kimnateet, chii age tugul ak poisyennyi, ak kong'at riibindet koriipso." 
Mark13:35 Oriipse anyun: amu mongen ye itu chiitap ko po koot, ngo lagat, anan kemoi kween, anan ye iteei kipsoiywet, anan karon;" 
Mark13:36 si ma cheak ak konyoorwok oruitosi. 
Mark13:37 Ak ng'olyoot ne amwaiwok okweek amwachini tugul, ale: Oriipse.”" 
Mark14:1 Ak kingo pata peetuusyek aeng'u kobiit igoortap paska ak magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek: ak ki cheeng' tisiik che eecheen ak siriik ole imuktoi konam eng' ng'aalseet, si kobiit kobar ineendet:" 
Mark14:2 amu ki le icheeget, Amat ongenam eng' igoorto, si ma polyo piik." 
Mark14:3 Ak ye ki mi ineendet Bethania eng' kootap Simion ne ki tinyei mogondosaik, kota kotebyei eng' amisyet, konyo kobogoryot ne tinyei chuboit ne mi mwaita ne nyamdut ne po kamanuutyet ne oo; ak kotui chuboinooto, ak koroong'ji metinnyi." 
Mark14:4 Ak ki mi alage che ki nereektos eng' oriit koleen, Amu nee si kibeet puch mwai?" 
Mark14:5 Amu katayamei kealdae mwai che siirei dinarisyek pogol somok, ak kigoochi kibananook. Ak ki ing'unyng'ung'ji ineendet." 
Mark14:6 Ago ki le Jeso, “Omete; kalya si oiim ineendet? Kayaiywo poisyet ne myee." 
Mark14:7 Amu otinye kotugul kibananook, ak eng' ui tugul ye omache, omuuchi oyachi ne myee: ago ma mi anee kotugul kobootok." 
Mark14:8 Kagoyai ne imuuchi: kasip koiil poortanyu amait ketupo. 
Mark14:9 Ak amwaiwok iman ale, ui tugul ole ki amjin logoiywek che myach eng' ng'wony komugul kemwaitoi agine yautyoni po kobogoryondoni, ak egu niito ne kibwaatee ineendet.”" 
Mark14:10 Ak ki wo Judas Iskaryot, ne ki age eng' taman ak aeng', ole mi tisiik che eecheen, si kobiit kong'wekyi icheeget." 
Mark14:11 Ak kingap kagas icheek, koboiboitu ak kogasyin kogoochi fedhaisyek. Ak ki cheeng' sait ne yamei si kong'wekta ineendet." 
Mark14:12 Ak eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, ye kienyei aarwetap paska, koteebe kasubikyik koleenji, “Imache keebe ano si kechobuun ole iame paska?”" 
Mark14:13 Ak ki iyookto aeng' che po kasubikyik, koleenji, “Oba nganaseet, ak ye otuiye chiito ne ibu tereetap peek, osup ineendet;" 
Mark14:14 ak oldo tugul ole mong'jin ineendet, oleenji chiitap ko po koot, ‘Kale Kaneetindet: Mi ano koonnyu ne po toek, ole anyoone aame igoortap paska kobooto kasubikyuk?’" 
Mark14:15 Ak koboorwok ineendet koot ne oo ne po parak ne choboot ak ko tetat, ak ochobwech olooto.”" 
Mark14:16 Ki pa anyun kasubik, kot koit nganaseet, konyoor ko uu ye kagagemwachi: ak ki chop anyun paska." 
Mark14:17 Ak kingo ek koskoleny konyo kobooto taman ak aeng'. 
Mark14:18 Ak ye kitebyei eng' amisyet, kole Jeso, Amwaiwok iman ale, Ng'wekto age eng' okweek, ineendet ne ki amisyei tuwai." 
Mark14:19 Kotoi anyun koaragenso, ak koleenji ineendet agenge agenge, Tos anee?" 
Mark14:20 Ak ki leenji icheek, Nooto ko agenge eng' taman ak aeng', ne kiburburtoi tuwai eng' taabeet." 
Mark14:21 Amu wendi Weeriitap chii, ko uu ye siraat agobo ineendet: ago Pwo! Eng' chiichooto king'wektae Weeriitap chii! Kita myee eng' chiichooto koma ki sich." 
Mark14:22 Ak ye ki amisyei icheeget, konam magatyat, ak kingo kagoberuur, kobuutul ak kogoochi, ak kole, “Onam magatyandani: ni ko poortanyu.”" 
Mark14:23 Ak yeityo konam kigombet, ak kingo kagomwa kongoi, kogoochi icheek: koee tugul kigombanato." 
Mark14:24 Ak koleenji, “Chu ko korotiikyuk che po arorutyet, che kitumdoi agobo che chaang'." 
Mark14:25 Amwaiwok iman ale, ma aee kogeny che po logoegap sabibuk, agoi peetuunooto ne aee che leelach eng' laitornatetap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Mark14:26 Ak kingo kagotyen tyendo, komanda koba tulweet ne po Mseituni." 
Mark14:27 Koleenji `Jeso icheek, Kinachok okweek tugul: amu ki kisir keele, Abire mestowot, ak koiyesta keechiirek." 
Mark14:28 Ago, ye kaging'eeta, andoenok awe Galilaya." 
Mark14:29 Ago ki leenji Petero, Agot nginach tugul agobo inyee, koma kinacha." 
Mark14:30 Ak ki leenji `Jeso ineendet, Amwaun iman ale, rani, kemouni, kotom koote kipsoiywet konyil aeng', ieesyoa konyil somok." 
Mark14:31 Ak ki mwa eng' kimnateet ne oo kole, “Ngo nyolu kebegu tuwai, koma koi aeesyen.” Ak ki mwa ak icheek tugul ko uu nooto." 
Mark14:32 Ak kiit kooret ne kiguure Gethsemane, ak ki leenji kasubikyik, Otebee yu, ye asaae." 
Mark14:33 Ak ki imut Petero ak Jakobo ak Johana, ak kotoi kokwong'yo miising' ak koaragenso." 
Mark14:34 Ak ki leenji icheek, Kaaragen saboondanyu miising' agoi meet: otebee yu ak oriipse." 
Mark14:35 Ak ki wo tai kitigin, ak kobutyi ng'wony, ak kosa kole, ngo mugaksei, ko myee kosiirtoena sainiito." 
Mark14:36 Ak ki mwa kole, “Abba, Kwanda, imugaksei tuguuk tugul eng' inyee; istaena kigombani; ago, ma ko uu ye amache, ago ko uu ye imache.”" 
Mark14:37 Ak ki nyo ak konyoor icheek koruitos, ak koleenji Petero, “Simion, irue? Ma imuuch iriipse agot sait agenge?" 
Mark14:38 Oriipse ak osaae, si mochut yoomseet: chamei muguleldo iman, ago nyaluli poorto.”" 
Mark14:39 Ak ki wo kogeny, ak kosa komwa ng'aleechugaita." 
Mark14:40 Ak ki nyo kogeny, ak konyoor koruitos, amu kiga nyigisitu miising' konyekwak; ak ki ma kongen kiit ne woljin ineendet." 
Mark14:41 Ak ki nyo ne po somok, ak koleenji icheek, Oruiye anyun nguno, omuuny: kagoyam; kagoit sait; ogeero, kageng'wekyi Weeriitap chii eunegap kiptengeginik." 
Mark14:42 Ong'eetyee, keebe: ogeero, kagoriik ineendet ne ng'wektoo." 
Mark14:43 Ak eng' yooto kota kong'alaali, konyo Judas, age eng' taman ak aeng', kobooto tuiyet che tinyei rotoogap chok ak kirokweek, kobunu ole mi tisiik che eecheen ak siriik ak poisyek." 
Mark14:44 Ak kiga koarorchi ng'wektaindet icheek, koleenji, “Ineendet ne ang'ututi ko ineendet nooto; onam, ak omut ak oriiboote. ”" 
Mark14:45 Ak kingo it, kwo eng' sainooto ole mi ineendet ak kole, “Rabbi!” ak kong'utut." 
Mark14:46 Ak ki iyogoito pichooto eunekwak ak konam ineendet. 
Mark14:47 Ago king'us rotwennyi po chok age eng' che kitonondos eng' ye neegit, ak koep iititap otwogindetap tisiindet ne oo." 
Mark14:48 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji, “Komong'u ak rotoogap chok ak kirokweek, ko uu ye osetyini rebindet, si onama?" 
Mark14:49 Ki ami kobootok peetuusyek tugul eng' Hekaluut aneetisyei, ak ki ma onama. Ago kayaak ni si kobiit kosulda siruutik.”" 
Mark14:50 Ak ki pagaakta icheek tugul ineendet ak komwei. 
Mark14:51 Ak ki isup ineendet mureno age, ne ki ilaachi angeet ineegei ne po katanit, ak konam pichooto ineendet;" 
Mark14:52 ak kometo ngoryonooto po katanit, komwei aach ngor." 
Mark14:53 Ki imut Jeso anyun kwo ole mi tisiindet ne oo: ak koyumjigei ineendet tisiik tugul che eecheen ak poisyek ak siriik. 
Mark14:54 Ak ki isup Petero ineendet eng' ye loo, agoi koit seremutap kootap tisiindet ne oo; ak kitebyei kobooto ng'atik, koyue maat." 
Mark14:55 Ki cheeng' anyun tisiik che eecheen ak kapkirwooget komugul paornateet eng' Jeso si kobiit kobar; ago ki ma nyoor. 
Mark14:56 Amu kibaoryanji che chaang' lembech agobo ineendet ak ma namgei paornatennywa. 
Mark14:57 Ak kitononso alak, kobaoryan lembech agobo ineendet, kole," 
Mark14:58 Kigegas komwaei ineendet koleen, Ang'eme hekaluni ki kiyae eunek, ak ateech age eng' peetuusyek somok ne ma kiyae eunek." 
Mark14:59 Agot eng' nooto koma namgei paornatennywa. 
Mark14:60 Ki tonon anyun tisiindet ne oo eng' kwenunnywa, koteebe Jeso, kole, “Mewolu kiy? Nee ni paoryanjinin pichu?”" 
Mark14:61 Ago ki siis, ama wol kiy. ki teebee kogeny tisiindet ne oo, kole, “Tos ii Kristo inyee, Weeriitap Ne Iberuurot?”" 
Mark14:62 Ak ki le Jeso, “Aa ineendet; ak tuun ogeere Weeriitap chii kotebyei eng' eutap tai ne po kamuktaet, konyonei eng' poolik che po kipsengwet.”" 
Mark14:63 Ak kigereer ngoroikyik tisiindet ne oo, koleen, Ta kemage nee paorinik alak?" 
Mark14:64 Kaogas ng'aleek che yaach che mwaei: obwaati nee? Ak ki irwookyi tugul kole nyoljin meet. 
Mark14:65 Ak ki toi alak kosing'ilji ineendet ak kotuch togeennyi, ak koluch, ak koleenji, “Ng'orse!” Ki nam `riibiik ineendet ak korabach." 
Mark14:66 Ak kingo ta komi Petero seremut ole po ng'wony, konyo age eng' tiibiik che otwogigap tisiindet ne oo;" 
Mark14:67 ak kingo keer Petero koyue maat, kochiilji kong' ineendet ak koleenji, “Ki imi aginye kobooto Nazaretindonooto, Jeso.”" 
Mark14:68 Ago ki tiiyo kole, “Mangen, amaguitosi chooto imwae.” Ak komanda kwo keter; ak kiito anyun kipsoiywet." 
Mark14:69 Ak ki keer chebooto ineendet ak kotoi kogeny komwachi che tonondos eng' ye neegit, koleenji, “Ni ko agenge eng' icheeget.”" 
Mark14:70 Ak kitiiyo kogeny. Ak ne matya koleenji icheek kogeny che kitonondos eng' ye neegit Petero, “Iman ii agenge eng' icheek amu ii Galiilindet.”" 
Mark14:71 Ak ki toi kochubis, ak koyasyo, kole, “Mangen chiichi omwae.”" 
Mark14:72 Ak koma tyanit koote kipsoiywet ne po aeng'. Ak ki ibwaat anyun Petero ng'olyoondonooto, ko uu ye kiga komwachi `Jeso ineendet kole, “Kotom koote kipsoiywet konyil aeng', ieesyoa konyil somok.” Ak kingo pwaat ng'olyoondonooto, koriir." 
Mark15:1 Ak yeityo ko kaech kotet ng'aleek tisiik che eecheen kobooto poisyek ak siriik, ak kapkirwooget komugul, ak korat Jeso, ak komut kwo, ak kogoochi Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Ak kiteebe Pilato kole, “Tos ii Laitoryatap Yahudik?” Ak ki wolji koleenji, “Kaimwa.”" 
Mark15:3 Ak ki itaam `ineendet tisiik che eecheen eng' tuguuk che chaang'. 
Mark15:4 Ak kiteebe Pilato kogeny, kole, “Mewolu kiy? Keero tuguuk che chaang' che kagotaamjin pichu.”" 
Mark15:5 Ago mata kowol ng'olyoo Jeso, kot kokwong' Pilato." 
Mark15:6 Ki cham kotyakyin Pilato piik kimonjororyot agenge eng' peetuutap igoorto, ne kagosoom icheek ineendet." 
Mark15:7 Ak ki mi chiito age ne ki kiguure Barabbas, ne ki rataat kobooto icheek che kichaamsei, icheeget che kiga rumis eng' chaamsonooto." 
Mark15:8 Ki togosta tuiyet ak kotoi kosoom ineendet koyachi ko uu ye cham koyaei kotugul. 
Mark15:9 Ak ki wolji Pilato icheek, koleenji, “Tos omache atyakwok Laitoryatap Yahudik?”" 
Mark15:10 Amu kiga nai kole, ki igoito tisiik che eecheen ineendet amu ng'etkong'." 
Mark15:11 Ak ki cheer tisiik che eecheen tuiyet kole, kityakyi Barabbas." 
Mark15:12 Ak ki wol Pilato kogeny kole, “Aite nee anyun chiichi oguure Laitoryatap Yahudik?”" 
Mark15:13 Ak ki polyo icheek kogeny, kole, “Igartaat ineendet eng' kimurtoiyot.”" 
Mark15:14 Ak ki leenji Pilato icheek, “Kalya, koyai yaityet nee?” Ago ki polyo icheek miising' kole, “Igartaat ineendet eng' kimurtoiyot.”" 
Mark15:15 Ak kimach Pilato kobaibai tuiyet, kotyakyi anyun Barabbas, ak kogoito Jeso, ko kagobire kipchoritiit, si kobiit kigartaat." 
Mark15:16 Ak ki imut kiplugotinik ineendet kwo kapkirwook oriit, ne kiguure Praitorium; ak kiguur kiplugotinik tugul kobwa." 
Mark15:17 Ak ki ilaakyi ngoryeet ne aruus ne piriir, ak kila ngatyetap katook, ak konde metinnyi;" 
Mark15:18 ak ki toi kogat ineendet kole, “Kigatin, Laitoryatap Yahudik!”" 
Mark15:19 Ak kikwer metinnyi eng' tegat, ak kosing'ilji, ak kogutuny kolas ineendet." 
Mark15:20 Ak kingo kagochotachot ineendet, koreegune ngoryeet ne aruus ne piriir, ak kolaakyi ngoroikyik. Ak ki imut kwo saang' kogartaat eng' kimurtoiyot." 
Mark15:21 Ak kibirchi chiito ne kisiirtoi, Simion ne po Kurene, kwandap Aleksanda ak Rupo, kobunu kooret age, koip kimurtoiyotap Jeso." 
Mark15:22 Ak kimut ineendet kwo oldo ne kiguure Golgota, ye kiguure kora, emetap terta." 
Mark15:23 Ak ki igoochi divaik che purugot ak tuguuk che uu igomoik: ago ma taach. 
Mark15:24 Ak kogartaat, ak kopchechigei ngoroikyik, ak koseer parbareek, konai ne tee ne ibei chii tugul." 
Mark15:25 Ak ki igartaat ineendet, ko kaek sait somok." 
Mark15:26 Ak ki kisirchi ng'aleegap kataamset agobo ineendet metinnyi parak keele, “Laitoryat ne po Yahudik.”" 
Mark15:27 Ak ki igartaat rebiik aeng' kobooto ineendet; age eng' eunnyi ne po tai, ak age eng' eunnyi ne po kaataam. [" 
Mark15:28 Ak ki isulda anyun sireet ne mwaei kole, Ak ki kiit ineendet kobooto kiptengeginik.]" 
Mark15:29 Ak ki churochur che ki siirtoi, koliligoti metowekwak, ak koleen, “Haa! Inyee ne ing'eme Hekaluut, ak iteech eng' peetuusyek somok," 
Mark15:30 sarugei, ak ichooruge eng' kimurtoiyot.”" 
Mark15:31 Ak ki churochur ineendet ko uu nooto tisiik che eecheen ak icheek, kobooto siriik kole, “Ki kosar alak; ma imuuchi kosargei." 
Mark15:32 Ingochoorgei nguno Kristo, Laitoryatap Israel, eng' kimurtoiyot, si kobiit kegeer ak kiyan.” Ak kigengenie ineendet ak icheek che kiga kigartaat kobooto ineendet." 
Mark15:33 Ak kingo it sait lo, koimenit emet komugul agoi sait sogool." 
Mark15:34 Ak eng' sait sogool kotwek Jeso eng' kutit ne oo kole, “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabaktani?” Ye kiweech keleen, “Kamuktaindet nenyu, Kamuktaindet nenyu, kebagaakta amu nee?”" 
Mark15:35 Ak kingo kas alak eng' che kitonondos eng' ye neegit, kole, “Ogeero, kuurei Elijah.”" 
Mark15:36 Ak ki labat chiito age, konyiit siki sponjit ak konde tegat, ak kogoochi koe, ak kole, ingotebi ko uu nooto. “Ongegeer ngo nyoonei Elijah kochoor konyo ng'wony.”" 
Mark15:37 Koriir anyun Jeso eng' kutit ne oo, ak kochamda sabennyi kwo." 
Mark15:38 Ki kereer angeet ne kiga kioiye Hekaluut kween kobooch parak agoi ng'wony. 
Mark15:39 Ak kingo keer chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol, ne kitononi eng' ye neegit ineendet, kogoitoi sabennyi kwo ko uu nooto kole, “Iman ko Weeriitap Kamuktaindet chiichi.”" 
Mark15:40 Ak ki mi ak icheek kobogorisyek che kigeerei eng' ye loo: ki mi eng' icheeget Maria Magdalene, ak Maria kametap Jakobo ne ming'in ak ne po Joses, ak Salome;" 
Mark15:41 che ki isubi ak koboisyechin ineendet ye ki mi Galilaya; kobooto kobogorisyek alak che chaang' che kitogosu Jerusalem kobooto ineendet. 
Mark15:42 Ak kingo ek koskoleny, amu ki Chobeet, ki nooto peetuut ne indoune sabato," 
Mark15:43 konyo Joseph ne po Arimatea, chiito ne konyitot ne po kapkirwook ne ki igeni agine laitornatetap Kamuktaindet; ak kwo kap Pilato eng' nyiganateet kosoom muustap Jeso." 
Mark15:44 Ak ki kwong' Pilato amu kagagome: ak koguur chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol koteebe ngo kagome keny. 
Mark15:45 Ak kingo kagonai eng' kiptaiyandanooto, kogoochi anyun Joseph muusto." 
Mark15:46 Ak ki al angeet ne po katanit, ak kochoor ineendet ak kotaae anganooto po katanit, ak konde kererit, ne kiga kebal eng' koita ne oo; ak kimilji koita kogeree kurgeetap kererit." 
Mark15:47 Ak kigeerei Maria Magdalene ak Maria kametap Joses ole kaginde ineendet. 
Mark16:1 Ak kingo kagosiirto sabato koal Maria Magdalene, ak Maria kametap Jakobo, ak Salome, nyamdutik, si kobwa koiil ineendet." 
Mark16:2 Ak eng' karon inne, eng' peetuutap tai ne po wigiit, koit kererit ko kachor asiista." 
Mark16:3 Ak kong'alaaljigei icheegei kole, “Mildaiywech ng'oo koita eng' kurgeetap kererit?”" 
Mark16:4 Ak kingo ng'eet met, kogeer ko kagemilda koita: amu ki oo miising'." 
Mark16:5 Ak kingo chut kererit, kogeer muren kotebyei eng' komostap tai, ne ilaachi ngoryeet ne leel; ak ki kwong'yo." 
Mark16:6 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Amokwong'ye; ocheeng'e Jeso, Nazaretindet, ne kiga kigartaat: kagong'eet; ma komi yu: ogeer ole kiga kinde ineendet!" 
Mark16:7 Ago, oba, omwachi kasubikyik ak Petero, oleenji, Kagondoenak kwo Galilaya: ogeere ineendet eng' olooto, ko uu ye kiga komwaiwok.”" 
Mark16:8 Ak kimanda saang' eng' kererit, ak komwei; amu kiga potanso ak kokwong'yo: ak ma mwachi chii kiy; amu ki iyweis." 
Mark16:9 Ak kingo ng'eet Jeso anyun karon miising' eng' peetuutap tai ne po wigiit, kochunji korook Maria Magdalene, ineendet ne kiga kocherunee Jeso oik tisap." 
Mark16:10 Ki wo komwachi icheeget che ki mi kobooto ineendet, ye kita koarongendos ak koriirtos." 
Mark16:11 Ak kingo kas icheek kole sabei, ak kole, kagogeer ineendet chebyosonooto, koma iyan." 
Mark16:12 Ak kingo pata tuguuchu, kong'aang'jigei eng' itoondo age aeng' eng' icheek kobendi eng' ooreet kooret age." 
Mark16:13 Ki pa anyun ak komwachi chuun alak, ak ki ma iyan chooto ak icheek." 
Mark16:14 Ak kingo pata nooto, kong'aang'jigei icheeget taman ak aeng' kotebyei eng' amisyet; ak koger kong' amu pistoennywa ak uuindap mugulelwekwak, amu ki ma iyan icheeget che ki keer ineendet ko kagong'eet." 
Mark16:15 Ak ki leenji, “Oba ng'wony komugul, oamjinote logoiywek che myach piik tugul." 
Mark16:16 Ineendet ne iyani ak kibatisan kesaru; ago ineendet ne ma iyani ko tuun kirwookyin. 
Mark16:17 Ak isubi kaboorunoichu icheek che iyani: oonei oik eng' kainennyu; ak kong'alaali ng'alaalet ne leel; 
Mark16:18 namei erenook, ak ngo ee tuguuk che parei piich, koma nyooru ng'wanindo matiny; igonoori eunekwak piik che myandos ak kosapcho.”" 
Mark16:19 Ye kingo kagong'alaal ak icheeget `Kiptaiyat Jeso, kimut anyun ineendet kwo kipsengwet, ak kotebee eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet." 
Mark16:20 Ak ki pa anyun, koamdaat eng' oldo tugul, kobois Kiptaiyat kobooto icheek, ak kogimit ng'olyoot eng' kaboorunoik che ki isuboti." 
Luke1:1 Amu ki konde eunekwak che chaang' kotet ng'aleek agobo tuguuchooto ki kosulda eng' kwenunnyo," 
Luke1:2 ko uu ye ki mwaiwech paorinik che ki keer kobooch taunet ak icheek che ki amdoi ng'olyoot. 
Luke1:3 Ko uu ye ki achigil tuguuk tugul kobooch taunet, ko ki abwaat ale myee atetuun eng' sireet, ee inyee Theophilus ne ii tagunoot;" 
Luke1:4 si kobiit inai eng' iman ng'aleechooto ki kineetin. 
Luke1:5 Eng' peetuusyegap laitornatetap Herod eng' Judea ko ki mi tisiindet age ne ki kiguure Zekariah, ne po riipseetap Abijah: ak ki tinyei osotyot ne kisalu kap-Aaron, ak ki kiguure kainennyi Elizabeth." 
Luke1:5 Eng' peetuusyegap laitornatetap Herod eng' Judea ko ki mi tisiindet age ne ki kiguure Zekariah, ne po riipseetap Abijah: ak ki tinyei osotyot ne kisalu kap-Aaron, ak ki kiguure kainennyi Elizabeth." 
Luke1:6 Ak ki po iman icheek tuwai eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, ak kibendotee ng'atuutik tugul ak karureiywek che po Kiptaiyat, ama tinyei leluut." 
Luke1:7 Ak ki ma kotinyei lakwa, amu ki soon Elizabeth, ak kiga koosegitu tuwai." 
Luke1:8 Ak ye kita koyaei tisiisyet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, ko uu teteetap riipsennyi," 
Luke1:9 ko uu piteetap tisiisyet, ko ki kilewen ineendet kwo hekaluutap Kiptaiyat kobeel nyamdutik." 
Luke1:10 Ak ki mi saang' tuiyet komugul ne po piik, kosaaei eng' sait ne kibeelee nyamdutik." 
Luke1:11 Ak ki mong'ji malakaiyatap Kiptaiyat kotonone komostap tai ne po kapkorosuut ne kibeelee nyamdutik. 
Luke1:12 Ak kingo keer Zekariah ineendet koaragen ak koiyweis. 
Luke1:13 Ago ki leenji malaikaiyat ineendet, Mearagen Zekariah: amu kogegasun soomeng'ung', ak ta kosigun osotyondeng'ung' Elizabeth weeriit, ak iguure kainennyi Johana." 
Luke1:14 Inyooru poiboiyet ak kagasetapkei; ak poiboitu piik che chaang' eng' sigennyi. 
Luke1:15 Amu tuun egu ne oo eng' taitap Kiptaiyat, ama eei divai anan maiyo che ng'woneen; ago kinyiiti Kabuuset ne Tiliil, kobooch komi moetap kamet." 
Luke1:16 Ak koweekyi `piigap Israel che chaang' Kamuktaindennywa. 
Luke1:17 Ak kowendot eng' tainnyi eng' muguleldo ak kimnateetap Elijah, si koweech mugulelwek che po kwanisyek kotokyigei lagok, ak kowelel ngelelik si kobendat eng' utaatyetap che po iman; si kochopchi Kiptaiyat piik che chobootiin." 
Luke1:18 Ak ki leenji `Zekariah malaikaiyat, “Anae nee ng'olyoondoniito? Amu koaositu, ak ki kotar kenyiisyek che chaang' osotyondennyu.”" 
Luke1:19 Ak ki wolji `malaikaiyat koleenji, “Aa Gabriel, ne atononi eng' taitap Kamuktaindet; kagiyokwo ang'alaalun, ak aibun logoiywechu myachen." 
Luke1:20 Keero, namoksein kuut, ak memuuchi ing'alaal agoi tuun peetuut ne yaaksei ng'aleechu, amu ma iyan ng'aleekyuk che tuun isuldoi eng' peetuusyekwak.”" 
Luke1:21 Ak ki igen `piik Zekariah kot kokwong'yo, amu ki igagei eng' Hekaluut." 
Luke1:22 Ak ye kingo mong' saang', koma komuuchi kong'alaal, ak ki nai icheek kole, kagogeer kaboorunet ne po kwong'eet eng' Hekaluut. Ki ng'alaaljine pichooto euut ak ki tep konamat kuut." 
Luke1:23 Ak ye kingo keskei peetuusyegap otisyennyi, kwo kaa." 
Luke1:24 Ak ye kingo pata peetuusyechooto komanach osotyonnyi Elizabeth ak kiunygei arawek muut, yeityo komwa kole," 
Luke1:25 “Koyaiywo ko uu niito Kiptaiyat eng' peetuusyek che ki ibwaata, si koistoena sasisyet ne ting'eno piik.”" 
Luke1:26 Ki iyookto `Kamuktaindet malaikaiyat Gabriel eng' arawetap lo kwo nganaseet ne po Galilaya, ne kiguure Nazareth," 
Luke1:27 kwo ole mi chepto pergeiya ne kiga kebwatererchi muren age ne kiguure Joseph, ne po kootap Daudi; ak ki kiguure pergeiyandanooto Maria." 
Luke1:28 Ak ki nyo ole mi chebooto, ak koleenji, “Chamge, inyee ne ii chamat miising', mi Kiptaiyat kobooten.”" 
Luke1:29 Ago ki iimgei miising' ineendet eng' mwaonooto, ak ki ibwaat kole tos egu nee kagatyoni." 
Luke1:30 Ak ki leenji malaikaiyat ineendet, “Meiywei, Maria: amu kainyooru chameet eng' Kamuktaindet." 
Luke1:31 Ak keero, imanachi, ak isich weeriit, ak tuun iguure kainennyi Jeso." 
Luke1:32 Egu ne oo ineendet ak tuun kiguuree Weeriitap Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'; ak kogoochin `Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po kwandanyi Daudi: 
Luke1:33 ak tuun laitorane kootap Jakobo koigeny; punjin laitornatennyi koigeny.” 
Luke1:34 Ak ki leenji `Maria malaikaiyat, “Egundoi ano ng'olyoondoni, amu mangen muren?”" 
Luke1:35 Ak ki wolji malaikaiyat koleenji, “Nyonjinin Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak kouurin kamuktaetap Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'; nooto anyun kiguure ne tiliil, Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, ineendet ne tuun kisichei." 
Luke1:36 Ak keero, managaat agine Elizabeth tupcheng'ung', tuun sichei weeriit eng' osindanyi: ne po lo arawani eng' ineendet ne ki kiguure soon." 
Luke1:37 Amu ma mi ng'olyoo ne punu Kamuktaindet ne ma kiim.” 
Luke1:38 Ak ki le Maria, “Keero, aa chepto ne otwogindetap Kiptaiyat; ingeyaiywo ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung'.” Ak ki wo malaikaiyat kobagaakta ineendet." 
Luke1:39 Ki ng'eet anyun Maria eng' peetuusyechooto kwo kochaakta emetap tuloonook, agoi nganaseetap Judah;" 
Luke1:40 ak ki wo agoi kootap Zekariah ak kogat Elizabeth. 
Luke1:41 Ak ye kingo kas Elizabeth kagateetap Maria, kotoromben lakweet eng' moennyi; ki nyi anyun `Kabuuset ne Tiliil Elizabeth;" 
Luke1:42 ak komwa eng' kutit ne oo, kole, “Ii iberuurot inyee eng' kobogorisyek, ak iberuurot ineendet ne isiche." 
Luke1:43 Ak katepto ano kot anyooru niito, kot konyoonjo kametap Kiptaiyandennyu?" 
Luke1:44 Keero, ye ka ngo it iitiikyuk kutitap kagateng'ung', kotoromben lakweet eng' moennyu eng' poiboiyet." 
Luke1:45 Ak paibai kobogoryondonooto iyani; amu tuun isuldoi tuguuk che ki kemwachi ineendet che punu Kiptaiyat.” 
Luke1:46 Ak ki le Maria, “Itoroori saboondanyu Kiptaiyat," 
Luke1:47 Ak kagobaibait saboondanyu eng' Kamuktaindet Yetindennyu," 
Luke1:48 amu kagogeer nyeraatyetap otwogindennyi. Ogeero, kobooch ra koguureno ibinwek tugul ne paibai," 
Luke1:49 amu kagoyaiywo ineendet ne po kamuktaet tuguuk che eecheen; ak tiliil kainennyi. 
Luke1:50 Tebyei rireenennyi eng' ibinda agoi ibinda eng' icheeget che konyiti ineendet. 
Luke1:51 Ki koboor kimnateet eng' eunnyi; ak kigoiyesta che menotik eng' kabwaatutigap mugulelwekwak. 
Luke1:52 Kagochoor pounik eng' ng'echerokwak, ak kagoeet che nyerootiin." 
Luke1:53 Kagobae che amei rubeet tuguuk che myachen, ak kagoon mogoreek koba puch." 
Luke1:54 Kagotoret otwogindennyi Israel, si kobwaat rireenetapkei," 
Luke1:55 ko uu ye ki ng'alaalji kwanisyekyok, eng' Abraham ak iyotennyi agoi koigeny.”" 
Luke1:56 Ak ki tebi Maria ak Elizabeth neegit arawek somok; yeityo koweek kwo kaa. 
Luke1:57 Ki it anyun peetuut ne sigisye Elizabeth; kosich weeriit. 
Luke1:58 Ak kogas piigap kokwennyi ak piigap ooreennyi kole kagoboorchi Kiptaiyat rireenennyi kwonyooto; ak kiboiboitu tugul. 
Luke1:59 Ak kingo it peetuut ne po sisiit, kobwa icheek koyatita lakweet; kimachei koguure Zekariah, kemwaitae kainetap kwandanyi." 
Luke1:60 Ak ki wol kamet kole, “Achicha; kiguure Johana.”" 
Luke1:61 Ak ki leenji icheek ineendet, Ma mi chii eng' oreng'wong' ne keguure kainanooto." 
Luke1:62 Ki ng'alaaljine icheek euut kwanitap lakweet, koteebe kainet ne machei ketoochi." 
Luke1:63 Kosoom kiit ne kisirei, ak kisir kole, “Johana kainennyi.” Ak ki kwong'yo tugul." 
Luke1:64 Koyaatak anyun kutinnyi sainooto, ak kotyagak ng'elyeptanyi, ak kitwek kolas Kamuktaindet." 
Luke1:65 Ak ki nyoonji kaiyweisyet tugul che ki menyei komoswekwak; ak ki kimwaita ng'aleechuuto tugul koyom emetap tuloonook ne po Judea. 
Luke1:65 Ak ki nyoonji kaiyweisyet tugul che ki menyei komoswekwak; ak ki kimwaita ng'aleechuuto tugul koyom emetap tuloonook ne po Judea. 
Luke1:66 Ak kigonoree mugulelwekwak ng'aleechooto icheek tugul che ki kas, kole, “Tuun egu nee anyun lakwani?” Amu ki mi kobooto ineendet eutap Kiptaiyat." 
Luke1:67 Ki nyi anyun Kabuuset ne Tiliil kwandanyi Zekariah, ak ki maoten, kole:" 
Luke1:68 “Iberuurot Kiptaiyat, Kamuktaindet ne po Israel; amu kagorutoochi piikyik ak koyachi katyaget icheek," 
Luke1:69 Kagong'eetwech kuinetap yetunet eng' kootap Daudi kiboityondennyi 
Luke1:70 Ko uu ye ki mwa eng' kutusweegap maotikyik che tiliileen che ki mi kobooch ko kagitoi ng'wony," 
Luke1:71 si kosarwech eng' puunikyok ak eng' eunegap tugul che wechech. 
Luke1:72 Si koriiree kwanisyekyok, ak kobwaat kayomisennyi ne tiliil;" 
Luke1:73 kayosyet ne ki iyasyechi kwandanyo Abraham, kole koonech" 
Luke1:74 si kobiit kogoonech, ko kagosarwech eng' eunegap puunikyok, keboisyechi ineendet ama eng' kaiyweisyet," 
Luke1:75 eng' tiliilindo ak eng' imanda eng' tainnyi eng' peetuusyekyok tugul. 
Luke1:76 Ee lakwani, kigurenen maotyotap Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'; amu iwendi eng' taitap Kiptaiyat indoi, si kobiit ichop ortinwekyik," 
Luke1:77 si igoochi piikyik naet ne po yetunet eng' nyoetap kaat ne po tengekwogikwak," 
Luke1:78 amu muguleldo ne rireegei ne po Kamuktaindet nenyo, si kochorchech lapkeiyet ne punu parak," 
Luke1:79 si koluuchi icheeget che tebyei eng' mesundeito ak che mi urwetap meet; si kondochi keelyekyok kot koit ooreetap kaalyeet.” 
Luke1:80 Ak ki ner lakwanooto, ak kotesak kogimit eng' saboondo, ak ki meng'ooti surkwen agoi peetuut ne ki iboorchigei Israel." 
Luke2:1 Ki pun anyun ng'atuutyet Caesarea Agusto eng' peetuusyechooto kole, kesir kainaigap piik tugul." 
Luke2:2 Ne po tai sirisyoni ye ki pounindetap Syria, Kurenio." 
Luke2:3 Ki pa anyun tugul si kesir, chii tugul eng' nganasennyi." 
Luke2:4 Ki togos agine Joseph eng' Galilaya kobunu nganaseetap Nazareth, agoi Judea, kot koit nganaseetap Daudi, ne kiguure Bethlehem, amu ki po ineendet kootap Daudi, ak ki po ooreennyi;" 
Luke2:4 Ki togos agine Joseph eng' Galilaya kobunu nganaseetap Nazareth, agoi Judea, kot koit nganaseetap Daudi, ne kiguure Bethlehem, amu ki po ineendet kootap Daudi, ak ki po ooreennyi;" 
Luke2:5 si kobiit kesir ineendet kobooto murerennyi Maria, ne ki chii oo." 
Luke2:6 Ak kiit sigeetap lakweet, kota komi olooto." 
Luke2:7 Ak ki sich weeriinnyi ne po tai; ak kolaakyi ngoroigap lakwandit, ak komogonji kaptugut, amu ki ma komi poroindo eng' kootap toek." 
Luke2:8 Ak ki mi emonooto mestoweek che kitebyei eng' keeweet koriibei akweennywa ne po keechiirek kemoi. 
Luke2:9 Ak ki tonon malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat eng' ole neegitee icheek, ak ki iluuchi `liilindap Kiptaiyat komoswekwak tugul: koiyweis anyun miising'." 
Luke2:10 Ak ki leenji `malaikaiyat icheek, Amoiyweisye; ogeero, aibwok logoiywek che myach che po poiboiyet ne oo ne ityin piik tugul:" 
Luke2:11 amu kagisikwok Yetindet rani, eng' nganaseet ne po Daudi, nooto Kristo Kiptaiyat." 
Luke2:12 Ak ni kaboorunet eng' okweek: Onyooru lakweet ko kagilaakyi ngoroigap lakwandit, korue moinget ne amisye tuuga." 
Luke2:13 Ak ki mi eng' sainooto kobooto malaikaiyandanooto chaang'indap lugosyegap kipsengwet che ki ilasu Kamuktaindet koleen," 
Luke2:14 Po teegisto Kamuktaindet, eng' ole toroor miising', Ak kaalyeet eng' ng'wony piik che chamaatiin eng' ineendet." 
Luke2:15 Ak kingo kagoweek malaikaisyek koba kipsengwet, koleenjigei mestowechooto, Ongebe nguno agoi Bethlehem, si kobiit kegeer ng'olyoondoniito kagoyaak, ne kagoboorwech Kiptaiyat." 
Luke2:16 Ak ki pwa anyun kochook, ak kinyoor Maria ak Joseph, ak lakweet korue moinget ne amisye tuuga." 
Luke2:17 Ak ye kingo keer kobarta mwaet ne kagagemwachi agobo lakwanooto. 
Luke2:18 Ak ki kwong'yo tugul che ki kas ng'aleechooto ki mwachi mestoweek. 
Luke2:19 Ago ki riip Maria ng'aleechooto tugul, kobwaatoti eng' muguleldanyi." 
Luke2:20 Ak ki week anyun mestoweek, kotoroori Kamuktaindet ak kolasunoti eng' tuguuk tugul che kagogas ak che kagogeer, ko uu ye kagagemwachi." 
Luke2:21 Ak kingo it peetuusyek sisiit che kiyatitoe ineendet, keguure kainennyi Jeso, ko uu ye kiga kotoochi malaikaiyat kotomo kemanach." 
Luke2:22 Ak kingo kagobata peetuusyegap katiliilennywa ko uu Ng'atuutyetap Musa, komut ineendet konyo Jerusalem, si kogoochi Kiptaiyat" 
Luke2:23 (ko uu ye ki kisir eng' Ng'atuutyetap Kiptaiyat, keele, Kiguure ne itabaanat agobo Kiptaiyat weeriit age tugul ne yaatei iyoteet)," 
Luke2:24 ak kogoito korosyot ko uu ye ki kimwa eng' Ng'atuutyetap Kiptaiyat, keele, Cheptugenik aeng', anan aarek aeng' che po cheptugenik." 
Luke2:25 Ogeero, ki mi chiito age Jerusalem, ne ki kiguure Simion; ak ki chiito ne po iman ak kigonyiti Kamuktaindet, ne ki igeni kagaigaetap Israel: ak ki tebee `Kabuuset ne Tiliil ineendet." 
Luke2:26 Ak kiga kong'aang'ji ineendet Kabuuset ne Tiliil, kole, ma keerei meet, kotom kogeer Kristo ne po Kiptaiyat." 
Luke2:27 Ki nyo anyun Hekaluut eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil: ak ye kingo muut sigiik lakweet Jeso, si kobiit koyachi ineendet ko uu piteetap Ng'atuutyet," 
Luke2:28 konam anyun lakweet eng' eunekyik, ak kolas Kamuktaindet kole," 
Luke2:29 “Ee, Kiptaiyat, ichamjini nguno otwogindeng'ung' kwo eng' kaalyeet, ko uu ng'olyoondeng'ung';" 
Luke2:30 amu kagogeer konyekyuk yetuneng'ung'," 
Luke2:31 ne ki ichop eng' taitap piik tugul; 
Luke2:32 lapkeiyet ne po ng'ang'utyet ne king'aang'jin Pororyosyek, ak toroornatetap piiguk Israel.”" 
Luke2:33 Ak ki kwong'yo Joseph ak kametap lakweet agobo tuguuchooto kagimwa agobo ineendet; 
Luke2:34 ak ki iberuur Simion icheek, ak koleenji Maria kamennyi, “Keero, kaginde lakwani si kobutyo che chaang' ak kong'eetyo che chaang' eng' Israel; asi koek kaboorunet ne tuun kieesyoi;" 
Luke2:35 (ee agot inyeendet ko tuun torei rotwetap chok muguleldang'ung';) si kobiit kong'ang'agis kabwaatutigap mugulelwegap piik che chaang'.” 
Luke2:36 Ak ki miitei agine Anah, che po Phanuel, ne ki maotyo, ne po ooreetap Asher (ne kiga koosit miising'; ki tebi ak manong'otyot kenyiisyek tisap kobooch ngitun." 
Luke2:37 Ak ki tebi ko kwony ne ki kosiirtoe manong'otyot kenyiisyek tamanwogik sisiit ak ang'wan), koma mandoi eng' Hekaluut, ak kolasu, kobooto karugutetapkei, ak soomutik, kemoi ak peet." 
Luke2:38 Ak ki nyo eng' sainooto ak kogoochi Kamuktaindet kongoi, ak ki ng'alaalji tugul che ki igeni katyaget eng' Jerusalem agobo ineendet." 
Luke2:39 Ak kingo kagogees tugul ko uu Ng'atuutyetap Kiptaiyat, koweektagei koba Galilaya, agoi nganasennywa Nazareth." 
Luke2:40 Ak kiner lakweet, ak kotesak kimnateet, ak ki nyi utaatyet: ak ki mi myeeindap Kamuktaindet kobooto ineendet." 
Luke2:41 Ki cham kobendi sigiikyik kenyiit age tugul Jerusalem eng' igoorto ne po paska. 
Luke2:42 Ak ye ki po kenyiisyek taman ak aeng', kotogosta icheek koba Jerusalem ko uu piteet ne po igoorto;" 
Luke2:43 ak ye kingo woong' peetuusyek, ye ki weeksei, kong'et lakweet Jeso eng' Jerusalem: ak ki ma nai sigiikyik;" 
Luke2:44 ago ki leen mi kobooto piik che ki pendi tugul, koba anyun pandap peetuut komugul; ak ki cheeng' ineendet eng' kwenutap piigap ooreennywa ak che ki ingengei:" 
Luke2:45 ak ye ki ma nyoor ineendet, koweektagei Jerusalem, kocheeng'at." 
Luke2:46 Ak ye kingo keskei peetuusyek somogu, konyoorchi ineendet Hekaluut, kotebyei eng' kwenutap kaneetik, koepchin iit ng'aleekwak, ak koteepse icheeget:" 
Luke2:47 ak ki kwong'yo icheek tugul che ki epchin iit ineendet amu naennyi ak waluunaikyik. 
Luke2:48 Ak ye kingo keer ineendet, kokwong'yo: ak ki leenji `kamennyi ineendet, “Lakwani, kalya si iyaiywech ko uu ni? Keero, kogicheeng'in anee ak kwandang'ung' eng' arageneet.”" 
Luke2:49 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Amu nee si ocheeng'a? Ma onai ole kanyolja atebee poisyetap Abba?”" 
Luke2:50 Ki ma iguiyo icheek ng'olyoondonooto kamwachi. 
Luke2:51 Ki choorgei anyun kobooto icheeget, ak kiit Nazareth; ak kigase iit icheek: ak kigonor kamet ng'aleechooto tugul eng' muguleldanyi." 
Luke2:52 Ki tesak utaatyetap Jeso, ak etunateet, ak myeeindo eng' Kamuktaindet ak eng' piik." 
Luke3:1 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po taman ak muut ne po laitornatetap Tiberia Caesarea, ye ki pounindet ne po Judea Pontio Pilato, ak Herod ko ki kirwoogindet ne po Galilaya, ak ki kirwoogindetap Iturea ak Trakoniti Philipu ng'eetap kametap Herod, ak ki Lusania kirwoogindet ne po Abilene," 
Luke3:1 Ak eng' kenyiit ne po taman ak muut ne po laitornatetap Tiberia Caesarea, ye ki pounindet ne po Judea Pontio Pilato, ak Herod ko ki kirwoogindet ne po Galilaya, ak ki kirwoogindetap Iturea ak Trakoniti Philipu ng'eetap kametap Herod, ak ki Lusania kirwoogindet ne po Abilene," 
Luke3:2 eng' peetuusyek che po tiseinateet ne oo ne po Anas ak Caiaphas, koityi anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet Johana weeriitap Zekariah eng' surkwen." 
Luke3:3 Ak ki nyo komoswek tugul che po tabanwegap Jordan, koamdooti kabatisanetap siguunet agobo nyoetap kaat ne po tengekwogik;" 
Luke3:4 ko uu ye ki kisir eng' bukuitap ng'aleegap maotyot Isaiah, keele, “Kutitap chii ne ititeni eng' surkwen koleen, ‘Ochop ooreetap Kiptaiyat, olitiit ole punooti." 
Luke3:5 Tuun kilong'u atebweet age tugul, ak tuun kiribribi tulweet age tugul ne oo ak ne ming'in, ak tuun kilititi che kunuuren, ak kichaboi ortinwek che sing'ortot;" 
Luke3:6 ak tuun keerei piik tugul yetunetap Kamuktaindet.’ ” 
Luke3:7 Ki mwachi anyun tuiyosyek che kibendi ole mi ineendet, si kobatisan, koleenji, “Ee okweek lagogap erenook che tinye ng'wonet, ng'oo ne kagoteeiywok omweune nereeknateet ne tuun nyoonei?" 
Luke3:8 Oii anyun logoek che nyoljin siguunet, amotau omwa eng' mugulelwekwok ole, ‘Kitinyei kwandanyo Abraham’; amu amwaiwok ale, eng' koichu komuuchi Kamuktaindet kong'eetyi Abraham lagok." 
Luke3:9 Agot nguno ko kaginde aiywet tigitigap keetiik: nooto anyun, keetit age tugul ne ma iyei logoek che myach, keebei, ak kewiirchi ma.”" 
Luke3:10 Ak kiteebe ineendet tuiyosyek kole, “Ki yai nee anyun?”" 
Luke3:11 Ak ki wolji icheek koleenji, “Ineendet ne tinyei sumotik aeng', kogoochi ne ma tinyei; ak ingoyai ko uu nooto agine ne tinyei amitwogik.”" 
Luke3:12 Ak ki pwa ak icheek taagigap aisuruut si kibatisan, ak koleenji ineendet, “Kaneetindoni, ki yai nee?”" 
Luke3:13 Ak ki mwachi `icheek koleenji, “Amomage piik tuguuk che siirei che ki king'at.”" 
Luke3:14 Ak kiteebe kiplugotinik ak icheek koleenji, “Ki yai nee anyun acheek?” Ak ki leenji, “Amomu chii age tugul, anan orebe chii kiy; ago ingoyamak melekwekwok.”" 
Luke3:15 Ak kingo ta koogeni piik kiit ne piitu, ak kogereeri met eng' mugulelwekwak piik tugul agobo Johana, koleen ngo tos Kristo ineendet;" 
Luke3:16 kowolji Johana icheek tugul koleenji, “Abatisanook eng' peek iman; ago nyoonei ineendet ne kiim kosiiro, ne ma nyoljino atyach anoogap kweonikyik. Ibatisanook ineendet eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak maat." 
Luke3:17 Tinyei keibet eng' eunnyi, ak kotiliili komyee rwanyut, ak koyumji nganuuk chogennyi; ago peelei meteteek eng' maat ne ma misoksei.”" 
Luke3:18 Ki amji anyun piik logoiywek che myach kobooto katigonutik alak che chaang'. 
Luke3:19 Ago ye kingo kagoger kong' Johana kirwoogindet Herod agobo Herodias, osotyotap ng'eetap kam, ak agobo tuguuk tugul che yaacheen che kiga koyai Herod," 
Luke3:20 kotesyi niito anyun chuun tugul, nooto kogiger Johana eng' korgoreet." 
Luke3:21 Ak ye kingo kagibatisan piik tugul, ak ko kagibatisan Jeso agine, ak ye ki saaei, koyaatak kipsengwet," 
Luke3:22 ak kochoorchigei ineendet Kabuuset ne Tiliil, eng' kergeindap cheptuget, ak komang'une kutit kipsengwet kole, “Inyeendet ko ii Weeriinnyu chamanennyu; agasenengei.”" 
Luke3:23 Kingo tau Jeso koneetisyei, ko ki neegit kenyiisyek sosom, (koleen icheek abeere) weeriitap Joseph, weeriitap Heli." 
Luke3:24 Heli ko ki weeriitap Matat, weeriitap Lawi, weeriitap Melki, weeriitap Janai, weeriitap Joseph," 
Luke3:25 weeriitap Matatia, weeriitap Amos, weeriitap Nahum, weeriitap Esli, weeriitap Nagai," 
Luke3:26 weeriitap Maat, weeriitap Matatia, weeriitap Semein, weeriitap Josek, weeriitap Joda," 
Luke3:27 weeriitap Joanan, weeriitap Resa, weeriitap Zerubabel, weeriitap Shealtiel, weeriitap Neri," 
Luke3:28 weeriitap Melki, weeriitap Adi, weeriitap Kosam, weeriitap Elmadam, weeriitap Er," 
Luke3:29 weeriitap Jose, weeriitap Elieser, weeriitap Jorim, weeriitap Matat, weeriitap Lawi," 
Luke3:30 weeriitap Simion, weeriitap Judah, weeriitap Joseph, weeriitap Jonam, weeriitap Eliakim," 
Luke3:31 weeriitap Melea, weeriitap Mena, weeriitap Matata, weeriitap Nathan, weeriitap Daudi," 
Luke3:32 weeriitap Jesse, weeriitap Obed, weeriitap Boaz, weeriitap Salmon, weeriitap Naasson," 
Luke3:33 weeriitap Aminadab, weeriitap Armi, weeriitap Hesron, weeriitap Peres, weeriitap Judah," 
Luke3:34 weeriitap Jakobo, weeriitap Isak, weeriitap Abraham, weeriitap Tera, weeriitap Nahor," 
Luke3:35 weeriitap Serug, weeriitap Reu, weeriitap Peleg, weeriitap Eber, weeriitap Shelah," 
Luke3:36 weeriitap Kainan, weeriitap Arphaksad, weeriitap Shem, weeriitap Noah, weeriitap Lamek," 
Luke3:37 weeriitap Methuselah, weeriitap Enok, weeriitap Jared, weeriitap Maalaleel, weeriitap Kainan," 
Luke3:38 weeriitap Enos, weeriitap Set, weeriitap Adam, weeriitap Kamuktaindet." 
Luke4:1 Ak ki week Jeso kobunu Jordan ko nyiitaat Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak ki imut Kabuuset ne Tiliil kwo surkwen" 
Luke4:2 ak kotebi peetuusyek artam koyomei chesawilyet. Ak ma am kiy eng' peetuusyechooto: ak ye kingo keskei peetuusyechooto, koam rubeet." 
Luke4:3 Ak ki leenji chesawilyet, “Ngo ii Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, ing'at kooi koek magatyat.”" 
Luke4:4 Ak ki wolji `Jeso ineendet koleenji, “Ki kisir keele, ‘Ma sabei chii eng' magatyat ineegei.’ ”" 
Luke4:5 Ak ki imut anyun yoomindet kotogosta, kwo koboorchi laitornatosyek tugul che po ng'wony eng' sainooto." 
Luke4:6 Ak ki leenji anyun chesawilyet ineendet, Agoonin kimnatoni tugul, ak telunatennywa tugul; amu ki kigoono; ak agoochini age tugul ne amakyini." 
Luke4:7 Ngot iloswa anyun, eng' tainnyu, kobunjinin tugul." 
Luke4:8 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji, “Ki kisir keele, ‘Ilasu Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor neng'ung', ak iboisyechi ineendet ineegei.’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Ki imut anyun ineendet Jerusalem, kwo kotonone kimonjogutap Hekaluut, ak koleenji, “Ngo ii Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, iwiirchigei ng'wony eng' yu," 
Luke4:10 amu ki kisir keele, ‘Iyogu malaikaisyekyik agobo inyee, si koriibin,’" 
Luke4:11 ak kogeny, ‘Eng' eunekwak kotaachin, si ma rus koita keeldong'ung'.’ ”" 
Luke4:12 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji, “Ki kimwa keele, ‘Meyoom Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet neng'ung'.’ ”" 
Luke4:13 Ak ye kingo kes chesawilyet yoomseet age tugul, kobagaakta ineendet ne matya." 
Luke4:14 Koweek anyun Jeso Galilaya eng' kimnateetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil: ak ki yom logoiywek korotinwek tugul agobo ineendet eng' ole neegitee olooto. 
Luke4:15 Ak ki ineetisyei eng' sinagogisyekwak, ak ki ilas `ineendet piik tugul." 
Luke4:16 Ki nyo anyun Nazareth, ole kinerchin: ki wo sinagogit, eng' peetuutap sabato, ko uu ye ki cham kowendi, ak kotonon si kobiit kosoman." 
Luke4:17 Ak ki kigoochi ineendet bukuit ne mamanat ne po maotyot Isaiah. Ak ki ng'aany bukuit, konyoor ole ki kisir keele," 
Luke4:18 Mi Kabuusetap Kiptaiyat kobooto, Ami ki ila si kobiit aamji kibananook logoiywek che myach: Ki iyookwo si kobiit aamji luulenik katyaget, Asi kobiit kogeerto kipkoratinik, Ak atyach che ki kiguoten." 
Luke4:19 Si kobiit aamda kenyiit ne chamat eng' Kiptaiyat. 
Luke4:20 Ak ki maman bukuit, ak koweekyi kogeny kiboityot, ak kotep ng'wony: ak ki ichiilji kong' `ineendet piik tugul che ki mi sinagogit." 
Luke4:21 Ak ki toi koleenji pichooto, Kagosulda rani siruutyoni eng' iitiikwok." 
Luke4:22 Ak kibaoryanji tugul ineendet ak kokwong'yo eng' ng'aleek che po myeeindo che kamang'une kutinnyi: ak ki le icheek, Tos ma weeriitap Joseph niito?" 
Luke4:23 Ak ki wolji icheek koleenji, “Iman omwaiwo kalewenoni, ‘Isaapkei inyee, chepkerichot!’ Ak omwae ole, ‘Yai chooto ak icheek eng' yu eng' emoning'ung', tuguuk tugul che ki kegas keele ki yaak eng' Kapernaum.’ ”" 
Luke4:24 Ak ki leenji, “Amwaiwok iman ale, ma mi maotyondo ne chamaksei eng' emennyi." 
Luke4:25 Ago amwaiwok iman ale, ki mi mosoogik che chaang' Israel eng' peetuusyek che po Elijah, yu kiga kiger kipsengwet kenyiisyek somok ak arawek lo, yu kiga nyo rubeet ne oo emet tugul;" 
Luke4:26 ago ma kiyookto Elijah kwo ye mi age eng' icheek, kobatee ki wo Sarepta eng' emetap Sidon agoi kootap kwony age ne kiga kosiirtoe manong'otyot." 
Luke4:27 Ak ki mi che chaang' che ki tinyei mogondosaik eng' Israel eng' peetuusyegap maotyot Elisha; ak ki ma kisoop chii eng' icheek kobatee Naaman ineegei, Syrianindet.”" 
Luke4:28 Ak ki nyi nereegek icheek tugul eng' sinagogit ye kingo kas ng'aleechuuto; 
Luke4:29 ak king'eetyo kotoorta ineendet komanda eng' nganaseet, ak ki imut kwo tulweet parak ole ki kiteech nganasennywa, koleen kotoortae chemng'eisut." 
Luke4:30 Ago kisiirtoe kwenunnywa kwo. 
Luke4:31 Ak kichoorchigei anyun Kapernaum, nganaseet ne po Galilaya. Ak ki ineet piik eng' peetuutap sabato:" 
Luke4:32 ak ki kwong'yo eng' kaneetisyennyi; amu ki tinyei kimnateet ng'olyoondennyi. 
Luke4:33 Ak ki mi chii sinagogit, ne ki tinyei tamirmiryetap oindet ne murwoon; ak ki waach eng' waagaat ne oo," 
Luke4:34 kole, “Pagaaktech! Kiting'egei nee ak inyee, Jeso ne po Nazareth? Kenyo inyee si ibarech? Kaanain inyee ale ii Ne Tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet.”" 
Luke4:35 Ak ki kergong' `Jeso ineendet ak koleenji, “Siis, ak imong'u eng' ineendet” Ak kingo kagowiirchi oindet kwenunnywa, komang'une ineendet anyun, ko mata koita kiy."
