Luke4:36 Ak ki kwong'yo pichooto tugul, ak kong'alaaljigei icheegei kole, “Nee ng'olyoondoni? Amu kang'at eng' kimnateet ak kamuktaet tamirmirik che murwonen, si komong'.”" 
Luke4:37 Ak ki yom anyun logoiywek komoswek tugul che po emonooto agobo ineendet. 
Luke4:38 Ak ki manda eng' sinagogit ak kwo kap Simion. Ki amei kametap osotyotap Simion eseet ne koroom; ak ki saisai `piik Jeso agobo ineendet. 
Luke4:39 Ak kotonon eng' ye neegit, ak koger kong' eseet; ki pagaakta anyun eseet ineendet: ak koma tyanit kong'eet ak koboisyechi icheek." 
Luke4:40 Ak ye ki neegit kororokto asiista, komutyi piik tugul piikwak che ki myandos eng' korotwek che teerchiin: ak ki igonoor eunekyik age tugul eng' icheek, ak kosaap." 
Luke4:41 Komang'une anyun `oik piik che chaang', kowaachei koleen, Inyeendet ko ii Weeriitap Kamuktaindet. Koger kong' `Jeso icheeget, ma chamji kotwek, amu ki ingen icheek kole, ineendet ko Kristo." 
Luke4:42 Ak ye kingo kagoeech, komong' eng' olooto kwo surkwen. Ki cheeng'at `tuiyosyek ineendet, koba ole mi, komach icheeget koraany ineendet kole, amat kwo kobagaakta icheek." 
Luke4:43 Ago ki leenji icheek, Kanyolja aamda logoiywek che myach che po laitornatetap Kamuktaindet eng' nganasook alak ak icheek: amu ki kiyokwo agobo nooto." 
Luke4:44 Ak ki amdaat anyun eng' sinagogisyek che po Galilaya. 
Luke5:1 Ak ye kingo ta kogiichi tuiyet ineendet, ak kogasei ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet, kotonon ineendet eng' ngeguutap araraita ne po Genesaret;" 
Luke5:2 ak ki keer moingonik aeng' che po peek kotonondos eng' ngeguutap araraita: ago kiga kochoorgei ramik koba komwet regereiywekwak che kiname njireenik. 
Luke5:3 Ak ki laany moinget age, ne ki po Simion, kosoom kole, konaktae kolooit kitigin eng' ngeguut. Ak ki tep ng'wony anyun ak koneet tuiyosyek komi moinget." 
Luke5:4 Ak ye kingo kagogees ng'alaalennyi, koleenji Simion, “Ta ikweri moinget kwo ole chaang' peek, ak ochoorte regereiywekwok oramisye.”" 
Luke5:5 Ak ki wol Simion kole, “Kiptaiyat, ko ki poisye kemout komugul, ama kinyooru kiy. Ago achoortoi regereiywot amu ng'olyoondeng'ung'.”" 
Luke5:6 Ak ye kingo kagoyai ko uu nooto, konam njireenik ng'iisyat; kot kotoi kong'etyo regereiywekwak;" 
Luke5:7 ak king'wech piik che kiboisyei tugul che ki mi moinget age, kole kobwa kotoret. Kobwa anyun, ak konyiit moingonik tuwai, kot kotoi moingonik kosu." 
Luke5:8 Ago ye kingo keer Simion Petero, kobutyi kotung'oigap Jeso, ak kole, “Istoenage, amu aa chii ne po tengek, ee Kiptaiyat!”" 
Luke5:9 Amu ki kwong', ak tugul che ki mi kobooto ineendet, agobo njireenik che kiga nam;" 
Luke5:10 ki kwong'yo ak icheek Jakobo ak Johana weeriigap Zebedayo, che kiboisyei tugul kobooto Simion. Ak ki leenji `Jeso Simion, “Ameiyweisye; kobooch nguno iegu ne irame piik.”" 
Luke5:11 Ak ye kingo kagoget moingonikwak kobwa ngeguut, kobagaakta tugul, ak koosup ineendet." 
Luke5:12 Ak kingo ta komiitei nganaseet age, ogeero, chiito ne ki nyiitaat mogondosaik: ak ye kingo keer ineendet Jeso, kobut kogutuny, ak kosaisai kole, “Kiptaiyat, ngot icham, imuuchi itiliilo.”" 
Luke5:13 Ak ki iyogoito Jeso anyun eunnyi, ak kotwa ak kole, “Kaacham. Tiliiliitu.” Ak koma tyanit, kobagaakta mogondosaik ineendet." 
Luke5:14 Ak ki ng'at anyun koleenji, amat imwachi chii. Kileenji, “Ui ak iboorchigei tisiindet, ak igoite che po katiliileng'ung', ko uu ye ki ng'at Musa, koek paornateet eng' icheeget.”" 
Luke5:15 Ak kitesak miising' koiyesta logoiywekyik: ak ki iyumgei tuiyosyek che chaang' kobwa si kogas ng'aleekyik ak kisoop eng' myanwekwak. 
Luke5:16 Ago kiitabaangei ineegei kwo surkwen kosa. 
Luke5:17 Ak ki ineetisyei eng' peetuut age eng' peetuusyechooto; ak ki mi Pharisaik ak kaneetik che po ng'atuutik kotebyei eng' olooto, che ki punu nganaseet age tugul ne po Galilaya ak ne po Judea ak ne po Jerusalem: ak ki mi kamuktaetap Kiptaiyat kobooto ineendet kosaabe piik." 
Luke5:17 Ak ki ineetisyei eng' peetuut age eng' peetuusyechooto; ak ki mi Pharisaik ak kaneetik che po ng'atuutik kotebyei eng' olooto, che ki punu nganaseet age tugul ne po Galilaya ak ne po Judea ak ne po Jerusalem: ak ki mi kamuktaetap Kiptaiyat kobooto ineendet kosaabe piik." 
Luke5:18 Ak ogeero, kilau `piik chiito eng' itoogut ne ki meat poorto. Ki cheeng' ooreet ne imute kwo ko, ak konde ineendet tainnyi." 
Luke5:19 Ak ye ki mata konyoor ole imute kwo ko amu chaang'indap piik, kolaany koot parak, ak kochoortae ineendet itogunnyi kobun ole ki kisyep, agoi kwenut eng' taitap Jeso." 
Luke5:20 Ak kingo keer Jeso kayanennywa, koleenji, “Chiichi, kagenyoun kaat tengekwogiguk.”" 
Luke5:21 Ak ki toi siriik ak Pharisaik kobwaat agobo ng'olyoondonooto kole, Ng'oo niito mwaei ng'aleechu yaacheen? Ng'oo ne imuuchi konyochi chii kaat tengekwogik kobatee Kamuktaindet ineegei?" 
Luke5:22 Ago ye kingo nai Jeso anyun kabwaatutikwak, kowolji koleenji, Obwaati nee eng' mugulelwekwok?" 
Luke5:23 Nee ne nyumnyum, ngeele, Kaginyoun kaat tengekwogiguk; anan ngeele, Ng'eet ak iwendote?" 
Luke5:24 Ago si kobiit onai ole tinyei kimnateet Weeriitap chii eng' ng'wony konyochi kaat piik tengekwogik (koleenji chiito ne ki meat poorto), Amwaun ale, Ng'eet, ip itogung'ung' ak iwe koong'ung'." 
Luke5:25 Ak king'eet anyun eng' tainnywa, ak ki ip kiit ne karue, ak kwo koonnyi, kolasunoti Kamuktaindet." 
Luke5:26 Ak kokwong'yo icheek tugul ak kolas Kamuktaindet; ak ki nyi icheek kaiyweisyet, ak kole, “Kagegeer rani tuguuk che kikwong'ee.”" 
Luke5:27 Ak kingo pata tuguuchu kwo kogeer taagindetap aisuruut, ne kiguure Lawi, kotebyei eng' ole kitaage aisuruut, ak ki leenji, “Isubwo.”" 
Luke5:28 Ak ki pagaakta tugul, ak kong'eet koosup ineendet." 
Luke5:29 Ak kichopchi Lawi ineendet igoorto ne oo eng' koonnyi; ak ki mi tuiyet ne oo ne po taagigap aisuruut ak piik alak che kitebyei eng' amisyet kobooto ineendet. 
Luke5:30 Ak ki ing'unyng'ung'ji Pharisaik ak siriikwak kasubikyik, kole, Kalya si oamisyei ak oeeisei kobooto taagigap aisuruut ak kiptengeginik?" 
Luke5:31 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji, “Ma mage kiy chepkerichot piik che chamegei; kobatee che myandos." 
Luke5:32 Ki ma anyoo aguur che po iman, ago kiptengeginik, si kosik.”" 
Luke5:33 Ak ki leenji ineendet, “Irugutegei konyil che chaang' kasubigap Johana, ak kosaaei, ak yaei ko uu nooto ak icheek che po Pharisaik; ago amisyei cheguuk ak koeisei.”" 
Luke5:34 Ak ki leenji Jeso icheek, Tos omuuchi ogoochi korugutkei che kogiguurchi katunisyet, kota komi sandet kobooto icheeget?" 
Luke5:35 Ago pwoonei peetuusyek che tuun ki istoe icheek sandet, korugutkei anyun eng' peetuusyechooto." 
Luke5:36 Ak ki mwachi icheek anyun kalewenet kogeny koleenji, “Ma mi chii ne kererei akwot ne po ngoryeet ne leel ak konapchi ngoryeet ne oos; amu ngo yai ko uu nooto ko kereri nooto leel, ak kogeny, ma namegei akwot ne leel ak ne oos." 
Luke5:37 Ama mi chii ne indoi divaik che leelach lolotinwek che oosen; ngo yai ko uu nooto ko kereri divaik lolotinwek, ak kotumdagei, ak kong'emogis lolotinwek." 
Luke5:38 Ago kanyool kinde divaik che leelach lolotinwek che leelachen. 
Luke5:39 Ama mi chii ne ngo kagoee divaik che po keny kota komach che leelach: amu mwaei kole, ‘Myachen che po keny.’ ”" 
Luke6:1 Ak ki punei mbareenigap peek eng' peetuutap sabato; ak kibut kasubikyik mesiisegap peek, koboor ak koam." 
Luke6:2 Ago ki mwa alage che po Pharisaik kole, “Amu nee si oyai eng' peetuutap sabato ne ma chamdaat eng' ng'atuutik?”" 
Luke6:3 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji, “Tom osoman agot ng'olyoondoni, ne ki yai Daudi, ye kingo am rubeet, kobooto che ki miitei ak ineendet?" 
Luke6:4 Ki wo kootap Kamuktaindet ak kocher magatiinik che itabaanatiin, koam ak kobutyi che ki mi kobooto ineendet; che ma chamdaat eng' ng'atuutik koam chii kobatee tisiik icheegei.”" 
Luke6:5 Ak ki mwachi icheek koleenji, “Weeriitap chii ko Kiptaiyatap sabato.”" 
Luke6:6 Ak ki wo sinagogit eng' sabato age, ak koneetis: ak ki mi chii olooto, ne ki meat eunnyi ne po tai." 
Luke6:7 Ak ki riip ineendet siriik ak Pharisaik kole kogeer ngo tos isoop chii eng' peetuutap sabato; si konyoor ooreet ne itaame. 
Luke6:8 Ago ki nai kabwaatutikwak; ak koleenji chiichooto ne ki tinyei euut ne meat, Ng'eet, tonon eng' kween. Ak king'eet kotonon." 
Luke6:9 Ki leenji `Jeso icheek, “Ateebenok, ale, tos chamdaat eng' ng'atuutik keyai ne myee eng' sabato, anan keyai ne ya? Kesar saboon, anan kebar?”" 
Luke6:10 Ak ki keerot `Jeso piik tugul, koleenji chiichooto, Chuul eung'ung'. Ak ki yai ko uu nooto: ak ki myeiit eunnyi ko uu ye konye." 
Luke6:11 Ak ki nereekso miising': ak ki ng'alaaljigei icheegei agobo kiit ne itoi Jeso. 
Luke6:12 Ki wo Jeso anyun eng' peetuusyechooto, tulweet kosa; ak ki sa Kamuktaindet kemout komugul." 
Luke6:13 Ak ye kingo eech, koguur kasubikyik: ak ki lewen eng' chooto taman ak aeng', che kiguure kainennywa che kiyooktoi;" 
Luke6:14 Simion, ne kiguure kainennyi ne po aeng' Petero, ak Andrea ng'eetap kamet, ak Jakobo ak Johana, ak Philipu ak Bartolomayo," 
Luke6:15 ak Matayo ak Thomas, ak Jakobo weeriitap Alphayo ak Simion ne ki kiguure Selote," 
Luke6:16 Judas weeriitap Jakobo, ak Judas Iskaryot, ne ki ng'wektaindet." 
Luke6:17 Ak kichoortagei kobooto icheeget, ak kotonone ye ribrip, kobooto tuiyet ne oo ne po kasubikyik, ak piik che chaang' che ki punu Judea komugul ak Jerusalem, ak ngeguutap araraita ole po komostap Tyro ak Sidon, che kibwanei kogasei ineendet ak kisoop eng' myanwekwak;" 
Luke6:17 Ak kichoortagei kobooto icheeget, ak kotonone ye ribrip, kobooto tuiyet ne oo ne po kasubikyik, ak piik che chaang' che ki punu Judea komugul ak Jerusalem, ak ngeguutap araraita ole po komostap Tyro ak Sidon, che kibwanei kogasei ineendet ak kisoop eng' myanwekwak;" 
Luke6:18 ak ki kisoop icheeget che ki inyalili oik che murwonen. 
Luke6:19 Ak ki cheeng' tuiyet komugul kotwa ineendet: amu ki punu ineendet kamuktaet, ak kosoop icheek tugul." 
Luke6:20 Ak kigeerot kasubikyik, ak kole, “Oboiboi okweek che oo ponoon, amu neng'wong' laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Luke6:21 Oboiboi okweek che amok rubeet nguno, amu tuun obiyong'dosi. Oboiboi okweek che orirtosi nguno, amu tuun ororitosi." 
Luke6:22 “Oboiboi okweek ye wechok piik ak kowook, kochurook ak kong'emenok kainai agobo Weeriitap chii." 
Luke6:23 Oboiboitu eng' peetuunooto ak otorombense eng' poiboiyet, amu, ogeero, oo melektang'wong' eng' kipsengwet; amu ki yachi `kwanisyekwak maotik ko uu nooto." 
Luke6:24 Ago pwo eng' okweek che oo mogore! Amu kaotaach kagaigaeng'wong'. 
Luke6:25 Pwo eng' okweek che oo piyong'otin nguno! Amu tatun koamok rubeet. Pwo eng' okweek che ororitosi nguno! Amu tatun oteitosi ak orirtosi. 
Luke6:26 Pwo eng' okweek ye mwaei piik tugul che myach agobo okweek! Amu kigoyachi ko uu nooto kwanisyekwak maotik che po lembech. 
Luke6:27 “Ago amwaiwok okweek che ogase, ale, Ocham puunikwok, oyachi che myach icheek che wechok," 
Luke6:28 oberuur icheek che chubook, ak osachi icheek che usook." 
Luke6:29 Ak ineendet ne irabaachin matanda age igoochi matanda age; ak ineendet ne rebenen ngoryeeng'ung' ko meete agot sumeng'ung'. 
Luke6:30 Igoochi chii age tugul ne soomin; ak ineendet ne rebenen tuguuguk ko matata isoom kogeny. 
Luke6:31 Ak ko uu ye omache koyaiywok piik, oyachi ak okweek ko uu nooto." 
Luke6:32 “Ngo cham anyun icheeget che chamok, otinye kongoi nee? Amu agot kiptengeginik kochamei ak icheek icheeget che chamei." 
Luke6:33 Ak ngo yachi che myach icheeget che yaiywok che myach, otinye kongoi nee? Amu agot kiptengeginik koyaei ko uu nooto." 
Luke6:34 Ak ngo pesendochi piik che omang'u ole tuun onyoorunee, otinye kongoi nee? Amu agot kiptengeginik ko pesendochin kiptengeginik alak, si konyoor che tee chugicheta." 
Luke6:35 Ago ocham puunikwok, ak oyai ne myee, ak obesende, amongen onyooru kogeny; si koeet melektang'wong', ak oegu weeriitap Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising'; amu tala ineendet eng' icheeget che ma tinyei kongoi ak che yaacheen." 
Luke6:36 Oegu che tinyei rireenetapkei, ko uu Kwandang'wong' ne tinyei rireenetapkei." 
Luke6:37 “Amorwookyi, si tuun koma kirwookwok: amogikyi, si tuun koma ki kikyok: otyach, si tuun kityaachak:" 
Luke6:38 ogoite, si tuun kegoonok; kerutyet ne myee, ne ki kigony, ne ki kisaisach, kot korara, chooto che tuun indoi piik tegetikwok. Amu kerutyet ne ogere ko nooto ne tuun kigerunenok ak okweek.”" 
Luke6:39 Ak ki mwachi kalewenet koleenji, “Imuuchi kipkoraatyat kondochi kipkoraatyat? Tos marorokyin tuwai keriinget?" 
Luke6:40 Ma siirei kasubindet kaneetindennyi: ago ineendet ne ki konetak kogergeitu ak kaneetindennyi. 
Luke6:41 Ak amu nee si igeere petbetyat ne miitei kondap ng'eetap kamenng'ung', ago mebwaati pambaniat ne mi kondang'ung' inyeendet?" 
Luke6:42 Anan imuktoi ano ileenji ng'eetap kamenng'ung', Tupchennyu, inganemun petbetyat ne miitei kondang'ung', ago mebwaati inyee pambaniat ne mi kondang'ung' inyeendet? Ee, chombilindoni, inemu korook pambaniat ne mi kondang'ung' inyeendet, si ye kaigeerte komyee imuuch anyun inemu petbetyat ne mi kondap ng'eetap kamenng'ung'." 
Luke6:43 “Amu ma mi keetit ne myee ne yiei logoek che yaach; ama mi keetit ne ya ne yiei logoek che myach. 
Luke6:44 Amu kinae keetit age tugul logoekyik. Amu ma putei piik logoegap mogoonik eng' katook, ak ma putei piik logoegap sabibuk eng' keetitap katook." 
Luke6:45 Inemu chiito ne myee kiit ne myee kobunu konorwet ne myee ne mi muguleldanyi; ak inemu chiito ne ya kiit ne ya kobunu konorwet ne ya ne mi muguleldanyi: amu che mwaei kutinnyi ko che nyiitaat muguleldo. 
Luke6:46 “Amu nee si oguureno Kiptaiyat, Kiptaiyat, amoyae tuguuk che amwae?" 
Luke6:47 Chii age tugul ne nyoonjino, ak kogas ng'aleekyuk, ak koyai, aboorwok chiito ne kergei:" 
Luke6:48 kergei ineendet ak chiito ne teechei koot, ne ki pal kororokto miising', ak konde lumeiywot rwandet: ak ye kingo chang'a peek, koryep peegap mogoch koyooto, ama imuuch kotumdum: amu kiga kiteech komyee." 
Luke6:49 Ago ineendet ne kasei, ama yaei, ko kergei ak chiito ne ki teech koot ng'ung'unyek ama lumji ng'wony lumeiywot; ak ki ryep peegap mogoch, ak ki luul koma tyanit; ak ki eet luuletap koyooto!”" 
Luke7:1 Ak kingo kagogesyi ng'aleekyik tugul iitiigap piik, kwo anyun Kapernaum." 
Luke7:2 Ki mi chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol, ne ki tinyei otwogindet ne ki chamei kot, ak kimyani otwogindonooto ne ki neegit kome." 
Luke7:3 Ak ye kingo kas agobo Jeso, koyookto ineendet poisyegap Yahudik, koba komwachi konyo kosoop otwogennyi." 
Luke7:4 Ak ye kingo it icheeget ole mi Jeso, kosaisai ineendet miising', koleenji, “Nyoljin ineendet iyachi ko uu nooto:" 
Luke7:5 amu chamei pororyennyo, ak kiteekwech ineendet sinagoginnyo.”" 
Luke7:6 Kwo anyun Jeso kobooto icheeget. Ak ye ki ma kota ko loo eng' koyooto, koyookto kiptaiyandanooto choronokyik koba ole mi ineendet ak koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, amata iimge: amu anee, koma aa chiito ne nyolu inyoo koonnyu:" 
Luke7:7 nooto anyun, agot anee, koma aiitkei ale nyolu anyoonjin: ago mwaa ng'olyoot kityo, ak kosap otwogindennyu." 
Luke7:8 Agot anee, nganda aa chii ne kiboiywa, atinye kiplugotinik che abou, ak ngaleenji ni, Ui, kowendi; ak ngaleenji age, Nyoo, konyonei; ak ngaleenji otwogindennyu, Yai ni, koyaei.”" 
Luke7:9 Ak ye kingo kas Jeso ng'aleechuuto, kokwong' agobo ineendet, ak kiwelelgei ak koleenji tuiyet ne ki isubi ineendet, “Amwaiwok ale, tomo anyooru kayaneet ne oo ne tee ni, achicha, agot eng' Israel.”" 
Luke7:10 Ak kingo week anyun che kiga kiyookto, koba kaa, konyoor otwogindonooto ko kagosap." 
Luke7:11 Ak ye kingo kagobata peetuunooto, kwo nganaseet ne kiguure Nain; ak ki pa kasubikyik kobooto ineendet ak tuiyet ne oo." 
Luke7:12 Ak ye kiga riikta ormariichetap nganaseet, ogeero, ki kisutei muusto, ne ki weeriit ne ki ii kamet ineegei, ak ki kwony ne ki kasiirtoe manong'otyot chebyosonooto: ak ki mi kobooto ineendet piik che chaang' che po nganaseet." 
Luke7:13 Ak ye kingo keer `Kiptaiyat ineendet, koriiree, ak koleenji, “Amat iriir.”" 
Luke7:14 Ak kiriikta ye neegit ak kotwa kiit ne ki kisute ineendet: ak kitononso anyun che kisutei. Ak ki leenji `Jeso ineendet, Neranani, kamwaun ale, Ng'eet." 
Luke7:15 Ak ki ng'eet anyun ne koga kome, ak kotoi kong'alaal. Ak ki igoochi kamet." 
Luke7:16 Ak ki iyweis tugul: ak kolas Kamuktaindet kole, “Kagong'eet eng' kwenunnyo maotyot ne oo: ak, Kagorutoochi `Kamuktaindet piikyik.”" 
Luke7:17 Ak ki yom ng'olyoondoniito agobo ineendet Judea komugul, ak korotinwek tugul che kiyiem olooto." 
Luke7:17 Ak ki yom ng'olyoondoniito agobo ineendet Judea komugul, ak korotinwek tugul che kiyiem olooto." 
Luke7:18 Ak ki mwachi `kasubigap Johana ineendet tuguuchuuto tugul. 
Luke7:19 Ak kiguurchigei Johana aeng' che po kasubikyik ak koyookto koba ole mi Kiptaiyat, koteebe kole, “Tos inyeendet ni nyoonei, anan kigeni age?”" 
Luke7:20 Ak ye kiga it piik ole mi ineendet, koleenji, “Kagoyokwech Johana Kabatisanindet kebwa ole imi, kole, ‘Tos inyeendet ne nyoonei, anan kigeni age?’ ”" 
Luke7:21 Eng' sainooto kosoop che chaang' che ki tinyei myanwogik ak korotwek ak tamirmirik che yaacheen; ak ki igoochi kipkoratinik che chaang' kogeerto. 
Luke7:22 Kowolji koleenji, “Oba omwachi Johana tuguuk che kaogeer ak che kaogas; kigoochin kipkoratinik kogeerto, ak pendoti che koing'waldos, kitiliili che tinyei mogondosaik, ak kastoi che ming'otin, king'eeti che ki kobek, ki amjin kibananook logoiywek che myach." 
Luke7:23 Ak paibai age tugul ne ma nyoorunena kanagut.” 
Luke7:24 Kingo kagoba che kiga koyookto Johana, kotoi komwachi tuiyosyek agobo Johana, kole, “Ki omande surkwen ogeer nee? Tegat ne itumdumi usoonet?" 
Luke7:25 Ago ki omande ogeer nee okweek? Chiito ne ilaachi ngoroik che tangusen? Ogeero, icheeget che ilaachi ngoroik che po lelesta, ak che meng'iisyei eng' talbisto, komiitei kooriigap laitorinik." 
Luke7:26 Ago ki omande ogeer nee? Maotyot? Ee, amwaiwok ale, siirei maotyot." 
Luke7:27 Niito ne ki kisir agobo ineendet, keele, ‘Ogeero, ayooktoi kiboityondennyu kondoenen, ne chobei oreng'ung' eng' taing'ung'.’" 
Luke7:28 Amwaiwok ale, eng' che ki sich kobogorisyek koma mi ne oo ne siirei Johana: kobatee ineendet ne ming'in eng' laitornatetap Kamuktaindet ko oo kosiir ineendet.”" 
Luke7:29 Ak ye kingo kas piik tugul, kobooto taagigap aisuruut, koiityi imanda Kamuktaindet, amu kiga kibatisan eng' kabatisanetap Johana." 
Luke7:30 Ago ki eesyo Pharisaik ak ng'amotigap Ng'atuutik, kirwoogutigap Kamuktaindet, ma makyigei, amu ki ma ibatisan ineendet icheeget." 
Luke7:31 Ak ki le Kiptaiyat, “Aroge nee piigap ibini, ak kergei ak nee?" 
Luke7:32 Kergei ak lagok che tebyei eng' ye mi ole keyae mung'aaret, ak koguuregei; koleen, ‘Kigegutwak ndurerusyek, ak ma oureren; ki kiriirchok, ak ma oriirye.’" 
Luke7:33 Amu ki nyo Johana Kabatisanindet ama am magatya anan divaik; ak omwae anyun ole, ‘Tinyei oindet.’" 
Luke7:34 Ki nyo Weeriitap chii koamis ak koeeiso; ak omwae ole, ‘Ogeero, kipkeiya chiichi, ak eeindetap divaik, chorweetap taagigap aisuruut ak kiptengeginik!’" 
Luke7:35 Ak naat utaatyet keele po iman, eng' lagokyik tugul.”" 
Luke7:36 Ak ki mach age eng' Pharisaik kole koamis ak ineendet. Ak ki wo kootap Pharisaindonooto, ak kotep ng'wony koamis." 
Luke7:37 Ak ogeero, kobogoryot age ne ki mi nganaseet, ne ki kiptengekyo; ye kingo nai kole, tebyei ng'wony Jeso koamisyei eng' kootap Pharisaindonooto, koip chuboit ne mi mwaita ne nyamdut," 
Luke7:38 ak ki tonon eng' let ole neegitee keelyekyik, koriirei, ak ki toi kosachi peegap kong' keelyekyik, ak kouuse suumeekyik, ak kong'utut keelyekyik ak koilee mwaata." 
Luke7:39 Ak ye kingo keer nooto Pharisaindonooto ne kiguurei ineendet, komwa eng' oriitinnyi, kole, “Nda ka maotyo chiichi, ta kagonai kole ng'oo kobogoryondoni katwa ineendet ak chii ne uu nee, kole kiptengekyot.”" 
Luke7:40 Ak ki wolji Jeso ineendet koleenji, “Simion, atinye ng'olyoot ne amache amwaun.” Ak ki le, “Kaneetindoni, mwaa anyun.”" 
Luke7:41 Kole, “Ki mi pesendoindet anum ne ki tinyei pesenikyik aeng': kibesen age dinarisyek pogol muut, ak kibesen age konom." 
Luke7:42 Ak ye ki ma kotinyei kiy ne yaakyin, konyochi kaat icheek tuwai. Ng'oo anyun eng' icheek tuwai ne chamei ineendet kosiir?”" 
Luke7:43 Kowol Simion kole, “Aleen ineendet ne ki kinyochi kaat che chaang'.” Ak ki leenji, “Kairwooch komyee.”" 
Luke7:44 Ak kingo weleljigei kobogoryot, koleenji Simion, Igeere kobogoryondoni? Kaanyo koong'ung' ama inaga peek aune keelyekyuk: ago kagosachi keelyekyuk peekyik po kong' kobogoryondoni, ak kouuse suumeekyik." 
Luke7:45 Ma ing'ututa; ago ineendet, kobooch ngap anyoo, kotomo kobagaakta kong'utut keelyekyuk." 
Luke7:46 Ma iilee metinnyu mwaita: ago kagoiile inee keelyekyuk mwaita ne nyamdut. 
Luke7:47 Nooto anyun ne kamwaun ale, kagenyochi kaat tengekwogikyik, che ka chaang'; amu chamei miising': ago ineendet ne kinyochin kaat kitigin, kochamei agine kitigin." 
Luke7:48 Koleenji kobogoryondonooto, “Kagenyoun kaat tengekwogiguk.”" 
Luke7:49 Ak ki toi icheeget che ki miitei amisyet kobooto ineendet, komwa eng' oriitinnywa, kole, “Ng'oo ni kot konyochi kaat piik tengekwogik?”" 
Luke7:50 Ak ki leenji kobogoryot, “Kagosaruun kayaneng'ung'; ui eng' kaalyeet.”" 
Luke8:1 Ak kingo pata nooto, ne matyanit, kowendote nganasook che eecheen ak che mengeechen koamdaati ak komwaitaati logoiywek che myach che po laitornatetap Kamuktaindet, ak ki mi tamanu ak aeng' kobooto ineendet," 
Luke8:2 ak kobogorisyek alak che kiga kosoop eng' tamirmirik che yaacheen ak myanwogik, Maria ne kiguure Magdalene, ne kimandae oik tisabu," 
Luke8:3 ak Joana osotyotap Kusa kiboityotap Herod, ak Susannah, ak kobogorisyek alak che chaang', che kiboisyechin ineendet eng' tuguukwak." 
Luke8:4 Ak kingo yomogei tuiyet ne oo, ak kobwonji ineendet che ki punu nganaseet age tugul, kong'alaal eng' kalewenet kole:" 
Luke8:5 Ki wo kolindet koleeta kesweekyik: ak ye kita koletoi, kobutyi alak ooreet taban; ak ki kityegat, ak koam toriitik che po parak." 
Luke8:6 Ak ki ibutyi alak rwandet; ak ye kingo piityo, koyaamyo, amu ma nyoor peek." 
Luke8:7 Ak ki ibutyi alak kwenutap katook; ak ki piityo katook kobooto keswechooto, ak kogiich." 
Luke8:8 Ak ki ibutyi alak ng'ung'unyek che myach, ak kobiityo, ak kooi age tugul pogol. Ak ye kita komwaei tuguuchu, komwa eng' kutit ne oo, kole, “Ineendet ne tinyei iitiik che kastoe, kogas!”" 
Luke8:9 Ak kiteebe kasubikyik ole teptoi kalewenoni. 
Luke8:10 Ak ki le, “Kagigoonok okweek onai ung'ootik che po laitornatetap Kamuktaindet: ago kimwachin alak eng' kalewenaik; ‘si ye keertoi koma keerei kiy, si ye kasei koma naei.’" 
Luke8:11 “Kalewenonooto ko ni: Kesweek ko ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet. 
Luke8:12 Ak chooto mi ooreet taban ko icheeget che ki kogas; yeityo konyo chesawilyet, ak konem ng'olyoot eng' mugulelwekwak, si ma nyoor kayaneet ak kesar." 
Luke8:13 Ak icheeget che mi rwandet parak, ko ye kagas ng'aleek, koyan eng' poiboiyet, ak ma tinyei tigitik. Iyani ne matya, ak kochuchuigei eng' peetuutap yoomseet." 
Luke8:14 Ak che ki ibutyi katook, ko icheeget che ki kas, ak ye kaba kogiich kererwegap met ak mogornatosyek, ak poiboiyetap tuguugap sabooni, ama iyo logoek che nyiitootiin." 
Luke8:15 Ak che mi ng'ung'unyek che myach, ko icheeget, che ye kagogas ng'olyoot, konam komyee, eng' mugulelwek che po telunateet ak ko myachen, ak koiiyo logoek eng' kagiiletapkei." 
Luke8:16 “Ma mi chii ne ye kagonaam tait kotuge kiy, anan konde kurereetap itoogut; ago indoi kiit ne tonone tait, si kobiit kogeer lapkeiyet piik che pwoonei ko." 
Luke8:17 “Amu ma mi kiy ne keunyei ne ma tuun ng'ang'oksei; ama mi kiy ne po ung'oot, ne ma tuun naaksei eng' ole lapkei." 
Luke8:18 “Oriipkei anyun eng' ole ogastoi: amu age tugul ne tinyei ko tuun kigoochin; ak ineendet ne ma tinyei ko tuun kirebe agot ne leen tinyei.” 
Luke8:19 Ak ki pwanji ineendet `kamet ak che tupcho, ago ki ma imuuch koriikyi amu chaang'indap piik." 
Luke8:20 Ak ki kimwachi keleenji, Tonondos kamenng'ung' ak che otupche eng' saang', machei kogeerin." 
Luke8:21 Ago ki wolji koleenji, “Kamennyu ak che kitupche ko chu kasei ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet, ak koyai.”" 
Luke8:22 Ak ki laany moingetap peek eng' peetuut age eng' peetuusyechooto, kobooto kasubikyik; ak ki leenji, “Ongelandae araraita keebe pitoniin.” Kotoi anyun koba." 
Luke8:23 Ak kingo ta kobendi, koru Jeso konuuch: kochoorchigei anyun usoonet ne oo araraita; kot komachei konyi peek moinget ak ki nyoonji ng'oiyondit." 
Luke8:24 Ak ki pwa ole mi ineendet ak kong'eet, koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, Kiptaiyat, kagibegu!” Kong'eet anyun, ak koger kong' usoonet ak wasetapkei ne po peek: kosiis anyun araraita komung'do." 
Luke8:25 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Mi ano kayaneng'wong'?” Ki iyweis ak kokwong'yo, koleenjigei icheegei, “Ng'oo chiichi anyun, ne ng'atei agot usoonet ak peek, kot kogas iit ineendet?”" 
Luke8:26 Ki it anyun emetap Gerasenik, ne tokyingei Galilaya." 
Luke8:27 Ak ye kingo nyo ngeguutap araraita, kotuiyo ak ineendet chiito age ne ki punu nganaseet, ne ki tinyei oik; ak ki ma kolaachi ngoroik kobooch peetuusyek che chaang', ak ki ma komenyei ko, ago kitebote kereeriisyek." 
Luke8:28 Ak kingo keer Jeso, kowaach ak kobutyi tainnyi ak ki mwa eng' kutit ne oo kole, “Ating'enen nee, Jeso Weeriitap Kamuktaindet Ne Toroor Miising'? Kasoomin ale, amenyaliila.”" 
Luke8:29 Amu ki ng'at tamirmiryet ne murwoon komong' eng' chiichooto. Amu kiga nam eng' peetuusyek che chaang': ak ki kiriibei miising', ak kiga kirate nyororosyek ak mugurek; ak king'etyei tuguuk che kirate, ak ki oonei oindet ineendet kwo surkwen." 
Luke8:30 Ak kiteebe Jeso, koleenji, “Kiguurenen nee?” Ak ki le, “Chaang'indo”; amu kiga chut oik che chaang' ineendet." 
Luke8:31 Ak ki soom kole si ma ng'at koba keriinget ne ma tinyei ole poochin. 
Luke8:32 Ak ki mi olooto akweet ne oo ne po toorook che ki agetoos eng' tulweet: ak ki soom icheek miising' kole kochamji kochut tooroochooto. Kochamji anyun. 
Luke8:33 Ak ki mong' anyun oik eng' chiichooto, ak kochut toorook: ak ki rwai akweet kochoortaegei chemng'eisut koba araraita, ak kobek." 
Luke8:34 Ak kingo keer che ki iyagisyei tuguuk che kabiit, komwaei, ak koba komwaita eng' nganaseet ak eng' emet agobo nooto." 
Luke8:35 Ak ki pa kogeer kiit ne kagoyaak; ak ki pwa ole mi Jeso, konyoor chiichooto ne kamandae oik, kotebyei eng' keelyegap Jeso, kolaagat, ak kotinyei ng'omnatennyi: ak ki iywei." 
Luke8:36 Ak ki mwachi icheek che kageerei tuguuk che kabiit, ole kagisaapto chiito ne katinyei oik." 
Luke8:37 Ak ki soom anyun piik tugul che po ole neegitee emetap Gerasenik kole, kwo kobagaakta icheek; amu kiga nam icheek kaiyweisyet ne oo. Ki laany anyun moingetap peek, ak koweektagei." 
Luke8:38 Ago ki soom ineendet chiito ne kamandae oik kole, kotebi tuwai; ago ki mwachi kwo, koleenji," 
Luke8:39 “Iweekyigei koong'ung', ak imwaite tuguuk che eecheen che kagoyaun Kamuktaindet.” Ak ki wo anyun, komwaitaat eng' nganaseet komugul tuguuk che eecheen che kagoyachi Jeso." 
Luke8:40 Ak ye ki weeksei Jeso, kotaach tuiyet; amu ki igeni piik tugul ineendet." 
Luke8:41 Ak ogeero, ki nyo chiito age ne keguure Jairo; ki pounindetap sinagogit: ak ki ibutyi keelyegap Jeso, ak kosoom ineendet kole, konyo koonnyi:" 
Luke8:42 amu ki tinyei chepto ne ki kisich ineegei, ne ki po olo po kenyiisyek taman ak aeng', ak ki neegit kome. Ago ki igiigoti tuiyosyek ineendet kowendi." 
Luke8:43 Ak ki mi kobogoryot age ne kimandae korotiik kenyiisyek taman ak aeng', ne kiga koboisyee tuguukyik tugul eng' chepkerichinik, ama imuuch kosoop ineendet age tugul eng' icheek." 
Luke8:44 Ki nyo anyun kobun let eng' ineendet ak kotwa tabandap ngoryennyi: ak koma tyanit kosiisyo korotiik. 
Luke8:45 Ak ki le Jeso, Ng'oo ne katwaa? Ak kingo tiiyo tugul, koleenji Petero ak che ki mi kobooto ineendet, Kaneetindoni, kariichin tuiyosyek ak kagogiichin." 
Luke8:46 Ago ki le Jeso, Kagotwaa chii: amu kaanai ale, kagomandaena kimnateet." 
Luke8:47 Ak ye kingo keer kobogoryot kole, ma imuuch koung'ak, konyo kobotanonu, ak kobutyi ng'wony eng' tainnyi ak komwaita eng' taitap piik tugul kiit ne kaigoochi kotwa ineendet ak ole kagisaapto." 
Luke8:48 Ak ki leenji, “Chebi, kagosaabin kayaneng'ung'; ui eng' kaalyeet.”" 
Luke8:49 Ak ye kita kong'alaali, konyo chii ne ki punu kootap pounindetap sinagogit, kole, “Kagome cheptong'ung' amatata iim Kaneetindet.”" 
Luke8:50 Ago kingo kas Jeso, kowolji koleenji, “Meiywei. Iyan kityo, si kisoop.”" 
Luke8:51 Ak ye kingo kagoit koot, koma kochamji chii age tugul kwo ko kobooto ineendet, kobatee Petero, ak Johana, ak Jakobo, ak kwandap chebooto ak kamet." 
Luke8:52 Ak ki riirtos piik tugul, ak koteeitos agobo ineendet: ago ki le, “Morirtosi; amu ma me ineendet, ago inuuchi.”" 
Luke8:53 Ak kirorechi ineendet anyun kochot, amu ki ingen kole kagome." 
Luke8:54 Ago ki nam ineendet eutap chebooto, ak koguur, kole, “Chebi, ng'eet”" 
Luke8:55 Koweek anyun saboondanyi, ak kong'eet. Ak ki ng'at kole, kigoochi kiy ne amei." 
Luke8:56 Ak ki kwong'yo miising' sigiikyik; ak ki ng'at ineendet icheek koleenji, amomwachi chii age tugul kiit ne kagoyaak." 
Luke9:1 Ki kuur anyun taman ak aeng' koyumgei, ak kogoochi kimnateet ak pounateet koboi oik tugul, ak kosoop che myandos." 
Luke9:2 Ak ki iyookto koamda laitornatetap Kamuktaindet, ak kosoop che myandos." 
Luke9:3 Koleenji, “Amoip kiy ne po pandang'wong', agot kirokto, anan lolet, anan magatyat, anan fedhaisyek; amoibote sumotik aeng'." 
Luke9:4 Ak koot age tugul ne omong'jini, otebee olooto agoi obe." 
Luke9:5 Ak alak tugul che mataachak, ye omande eng' nganasanooto, olelekte temburyek eng' keelyekwok si koek paornateet agobo icheek.”" 
Luke9:6 Koba anyun kobunoot nganasook, koamdaati logoiywek che myach, ak kosaaboti eng' oldo tugul." 
Luke9:7 Ak ki kas anyun kirwoogindet Herod tuguuk tugul che ki koyaak: ki iimgei miising', amu kimwaei alak kole, kagong'eet Johana eng' che ki pek;" 
Luke9:8 ak kileen alak, kogotook Elijah: koleen alak, kong'eet age eng' maotik chu ki po keny." 
Luke9:9 Ak ki le Herod, “Ki atil metitap Johana; ago ng'oo anyun chiichi, ne agase tuguuk che uu chooto agobo ineendet?” Ak ki cheeng' kole kogeer ineendet." 
Luke9:10 Ak ye kingo week che kiyooktoi, komwachi ineendet tuguuk che kogoyai. Ak ki imut icheek koba taban icheegei agoi nganaseet ne kiguure Bethsaida." 
Luke9:11 Ago kingo nai tuiyosyek koosup: ak kitaach icheeget, ak kong'alaalji agobo laitornatetap Kamuktaindet, ak ki isoop icheek che kimachei kisoop." 
Luke9:12 Ak ye kimachei koimen, kobwa anyun tamanu ak aeng' koleenji ineendet, Ileenji tuiyet koba, si koit nganasook ak emet, si konyoor ole ruitos, ak amitwogik: amu kimi surkwen." 
Luke9:13 Ago ki leenji icheek, “Ogoochi okweek amitwogik.” Ak ki le, “Ma kitinye kiy kobatee magatiinik muut ak njireenik aeng'; kobatee keebe kealji amitwogik pichu tugul.”" 
Luke9:14 Amu ki olo po murenik eliphuusyek muut. Ak ki leenji kasubikyik, Ochop kotep ng'wony ak ingobeate konom." 
Luke9:15 Ak ki yai anyun ko uu nooto, ak ki chop tugul kotep ng'wony." 
Luke9:16 Ak ki nam magatinichooto muut ak injirenichooto aeng', ak ki inyal kipsengwet, ak koberuur, ak kotonaton; ak kogoochi kasubik si kobiit kogoochi kabuureito." 
Luke9:17 Ak ki amis, kot kobiyong'so: ak ki kiyum katuganik che ki ng'et eng' kererutik, ak ki ek kereboonik taman ak aeng'." 
Luke9:18 Ak ye ki saaei ineegei, ko ki mi kasubik kobooto ineendet: ak kiteebe icheeget koleenji, “Mwaei tuiyosyek kole aa ng'oo?”" 
Luke9:19 Ak ki wolji icheek koleenji, “Leen Johana Kabatisanindet; koleen alage, Elijah; koleen alak, kagong'eet maotyot age eng' chu ki po keny.”" 
Luke9:20 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Ago oleen okweek aa ng'oo?” Ak ki wol Petero kole, “Ii Kristo ne po Kamuktaindet.”" 
Luke9:21 Ago ki itigon icheek, ak kong'at koleenji, amomwachi chii ng'olyoondoniito;" 
Luke9:22 kole, “Kanyolji Weeriitap chii konyalil eng' tuguuk che chaang', ak koeesyo poisyek ineendet ak tisiik che eecheen ak siriik, ak kebar, ak king'eet eng' peetuutap somok.”" 
Luke9:23 Ki mwachi tugul koleenji, “Ngo machei chii age tugul kosubwo, ko ingoeesyogei, ak koip kimurtoiyondennyi peetuut age tugul, ak kosubwo." 
Luke9:24 Amu age tugul ne machei kosar saboondanyi kobeeti; ak age tugul ne ibeeti saboondanyi agobo anee, ko nooto ne saru." 
Luke9:25 Amu keljin nee chii, ngo nyoor ng'wony komugul ak kobeetkei anan kerebe saboondanyi?" 
Luke9:26 Amu age tugul ne ililanjino ak ng'aleekyuk ko tuun ililanjin agine Weeriitap chii chiichooto, ye tuun nyoonei eng' toroornatennyi, ak ne po Kwanda, ak ne po malaikaisyek che tiliileen." 
Luke9:27 Ago amwaiwok iman ale, miitei alak eng' che tonondos eng' yuto che ma koi chamcham meet matiny, kot kogeer laitornatetap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Luke9:28 Ak kingo keskei olo po peetuusyek sisiit, kobooch ngo mwa ng'aleechooto, komut Petero ak Johana ak Jakobo, kotogosta tulweet koba kosa." 
Luke9:29 Ak ye kita kosaaei, kowalak itoondap togeennyi, ak koleelagitu ngoroikyik kot koliil piich." 
Luke9:30 Ak ogeero, ki ng'alaalyo ak `ineendet piik aeng'u; ki Musa ak Elijah;" 
Luke9:31 che ki kotook eng' liilindo, ak kiga ng'alaal agobo meennyi ne kimachei kosulda eng' Jerusalem." 
Luke9:32 Ak kiga pirto met Petero kobooto icheeget che ki mi ak ineendet: ago ye kingo kos, kogeer liilindanyi, ak pichooto aeng' che kitonondos kobooto ineendet." 
Luke9:33 Ak ye kimachei koobeesyo ak ineendet, koleenji Petero Jeso, Kaneetindoni, myee amu kimi yuto: si keteech keryosyek somok; neng'ung' age, ko po Musa age, ko po Elijah age: kimwaei ama nai kiit ne mwaei." 
Luke9:34 Ak ye kita komwaei tuguuchuuto, konyo pooldet, ak kotuch icheeget: ak ki iyweis ye kingo chut pooldet." 
Luke9:35 Ak ki mong' kutit eng' pooldet, ak kole, “Ni Weeriinnyu, ne ki alewen; ogas ineendet.”" 
Luke9:36 Ak ye kingo pata kutinooto, kotook Jeso ineegei. Ak kosiisyo anyun, ama mwachi chii eng' peetuusyechooto kiit age tugul ne kiga kogeer." 
Luke9:37 Ak peetuut ne ki isubi peetuunooto, ye kingo choorugei eng' tulweet, kotuiyo ak ineendet tuiyet ne oo." 
Luke9:38 Ak ogeero, kibol chiito age eng' tuiyet, kole, “Kaneetindoni, asaain ale, riiree weeriinnyu; amu ki kisich ineegei:" 
Luke9:39 ak keero, namei ineendet tamirmiryet, ak koma tyanit kowaach; ak kobirabirto kot kobun pugat kutinnyi, konyalili miising' ama chamei komanda." 
Luke9:40 Ak koariirchi kasubiguk ale koon; ago ma imuuch.” 
Luke9:41 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji, “Ee ibini ma tinyei kayaneet ak komaasat, atebye kobootok, ak amuitoi agobo okweek kot kotyanit? Imutu weeriing'ung' konyo yu.”" 
Luke9:42 Ak kingo ta konyonei, kowiirchi ng'wony oindet ineendet ak kobirabirto miising'. Ago ki kergong' `Jeso tamirmiryet ne murwoon, ak kosoop lakweet, ak koweekyi kwanda." 
Luke9:43 Ak ki kwong'yo tugul agobo ooindap Kamuktaindet. Ago kingo ta kokwong'dos tugul agobo tuguuk che kayai Jeso, koleenji kasubikyik," 
Luke9:44 “Ongochut ng'aleechu iitiikwok: amu tuun kigoitoi Weeriitap chii kwo eunegap piik.” 
Luke9:45 Ago ma iguiyo icheek mwaonooto; kiung'ak eng' icheeget, si ma nai: ak ki iywei koteebe ineendet agobo mwaonooto." 
Luke9:46 Kotoi anyun koteebegei kole, ng'oo ne egu ne oo eng' acheek?" 
Luke9:47 Ak kingo nai Jeso kabwaatutigap mugulelwekwak, konam lakweet ne ming'in, ak konde ye neegit ineendet," 
Luke9:48 ak ki leenji icheek, Chii age tugul ne taachei lakwani ming'in eng' kainennyu ko kataacha: ak chii age tugul ne taacha ko kataach ineendet ne ki iyookwo: amu ineendet ne ming'in eng' okweek tugul, ko nooto ne oo." 
Luke9:49 Ak ki wolji Johana koleenji, “Kiptaiyandani, kogigeer chii ko oonei oik eng' kaineng'ung'; ak ko ki etee, amu ma kibendoti tugul.”" 
Luke9:50 Ago ki leenji `Jeso ineendet, “Amoete ineendet; amu ineendet ne ma kirindook ko neng'wong'.”" 
Luke9:51 Ak ye ki neegit miising' koit peetuusyek che kitaage ineendet eng' parak, ko ki iljigei kotokyi togeennyi Jerusalem;" 
Luke9:52 koyookto che ibei ng'aleek koba kondoe ineendet: koba anyun, komong'ji nganaseet age ne po Samarik, ak kochopchi oldo." 
Luke9:53 Ak ma taach ineendet, amu kiga kotokyi togeennyi Jerusalem." 
Luke9:54 Ak ye kingo keer nooto kasubikyik Jakobo ak Johana, koleenji, Kiptaiyat, tos imache keng'at maat kochoorgei eng' kipsengwet, si kowong' icheeget (ko uu ye ki yai Elijah)?" 
Luke9:55 Ago kiweleljigei icheek, ak koger kong'." 
Luke9:56 Koba anyun nganaseet age. 
Luke9:57 Ak kingo ta kobendi eng' ooreet, koleenji chiito age, Asubun eng' oldo tugul ole iwendi." 
Luke9:58 Koleenji Jeso ineendet, Tineyi lelwek keriingonik, ak kotinyei toriitik che po parak kesonok; ago ma tinyei Weeriitap chii ole indoi metinnyi." 
Luke9:59 Ak ki leenji age, Isubwo. Ago ki leenji chiichooto, Kiptaiyat, chamwo awo korook atup abba." 
Luke9:60 Ago ki leenji, Pagakte che pegu kotup chechwaak che pegu; ago ui inyee ak iamdaate ng'aleegap laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Luke9:61 Kole age agine, Tuun asubun, Kiptaiyat; ago chamwo korook awo agoochi piigap koonnyu saisere." 
Luke9:62 Ago ki leenji `Jeso ineendet, Ma mi chii ne namei mogombetap tuuga, ak koguskong' kogeer let, ne nyoljin laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Luke10:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu kolewen Kiptaiyat piik alak tamanwogik tisap ak icheek, ak koyookto kobee aeng' kole, kondoe ineendet koba nganaseet age tugul ak komosta age tugul ole tuun punooti." 
Luke10:2 Ago ki leenji icheek, Oo kesisyet ago ng'ering' kesik: nooto anyun osoom Kiptaiyat ne po kesisyet, si kobiit koyookyi kesik kesisyennyi." 
Luke10:3 Oba: ogeero kaayooktok ko uu aaregap keechiirek eng' kwenutap suik. 
Luke10:4 Amoip lolet, anan suberet, anan kweonik: amogat chii eng' ooreet." 
Luke10:5 Ak koot age tugul ne omong'jini, omwa ole, Ingotep kaalyeet eng' kooi." 
Luke10:6 Ak ngo miitei weeriitap kaalyeet yooto, kotebee kalyeng'wong' ineendet: ak ngo ma mi, koweekyinogei okweek." 
Luke10:7 Ak otebee koyooto anyun, ak tuguuk che koonok, oam ak oee: amu nyoljin kiboityot melektanyi. Amoitote kooriik." 
Luke10:8 Ak nganaseet age tugul ne omong'jini, ak kotaachak, oam tuguuk che kindoi taing'wong';" 
Luke10:9 ak osoop che myandos eng' olooto, ak oleenji icheek, Kagorikyok laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Luke10:10 Ago nganaseet age tugul ne omong'jini, ama taachok, omande obe ortinwekyik ak omwa ole," 
Luke10:11 kagibukyok temburyek che po nganaseng'wong', che kanam keelyekyok; ago onai ni, ole, kagoriik laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Luke10:12 Ago amwaiwok ale, Tuun kaigaitu Sodom eng' peetuunooto, kosiir nganasanooto." 
Luke10:13 “Pwo! Wee Korazin! Pwo! Wee Bethsaida! Amu nda kiga kiyai eng' Tyro ak Sidon poisyonik che po kamuktaet ko uu che kogiyai eng' okweek, ta kiga kosik keny, ak kotebee oreek kolaachi kuniok." 
Luke10:14 Ago tuun kaigaitu Tyro ak Sidon eng' kirwooget, kosiirok." 
Luke10:15 Ak inyee Kapernaum, Tos tuun kitoroorin iwe kipsengwet? Kiwiirchinin ng'wony kot iit ye mi che ki kobek." 
Luke10:16 “Ineendet ne kasook kogasa agane; ak ineendet ne eesyook koeesyoo agane; ak ineendet ne eesyoo koeesyoi ineendet ne ki iyookwo.” 
Luke10:17 Ki week anyun pichooto tamanwogik tisabu eng' poiboiyet, ak komwa kole, “Kiptaiyat, agot oik kogaseech iit eng' kaineng'ung'.”" 
Luke10:18 Ak ki leenji, “Ki ageer Setani kochoorugei eng' kipsengwet ko uu kalyeleet." 
Luke10:19 Ogeero, kaagoonok kamuget si kobiit otyech erenook ak melmelwek, ak oterter kimnateet tugul ne po puunyoot; ak ma mi kiy ne imuuchi kong'emak." 
Luke10:20 Ago amoboiboitu amu ng'olyoondoni, amu kasok iit oik; ago oboiboitu amu siraatiin kainaikwok eng' kipsengwet.”" 
Luke10:21 Eng' sainooto kobaibait Jeso eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak kole, “Aweegun kongoi, ee Abba, Kiptaiyat ne po kipsengwet ak ng'wony, amu ki iung'e tuguuchu che utaatiin ak che ng'oomeen, ak ki ing'aang'ji manyurunik: ee, Abba; amu ki chamak ko uu nooto eng' taing'ung'." 
Luke10:22 “Ki kogoono tuguuk tugul Abba: ak ma mi chii ne ingen Weeriit kole ng'oo, kobatee Kwanda; ama nai chii Kwanda kole ng'oo, kobatee Weeriit, ak chii age tugul ne chamei Weeriit, kong'aang'jin.”" 
Luke10:23 Ak kiweleljigei kasubik, ak koleenji eng' ung'oot, “Iberuurotin koonyek che keerei tuguuk che ogeere:" 
Luke10:24 amu amwaiwok ale, kimachei maotik che chaang' ak laitorinik kogeer tuguuk che ogeere, ago ki ma keer; ak kimachei kogas tuguuk che ogase, ago ki ma kas.”" 
Luke10:25 Ogeero, ki tonon ng'amotyot age ne po ng'atuutik koyoom ineendet, kole, “Kaneetindoni, ayai nee si tuun anyooru saboondap koigeny?”" 
Luke10:26 Ak ki leenji, “Ki kisir nee eng' Ng'atuutik? Isomandoi ano?”" 
Luke10:27 Ak ki wolji ineendet koleenji, “Cham Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne Toroor neng'ung' eng' muguleldang'ung' komugul, ak eng' saboondang'ung' komugul, ak eng' kimnateng'ung' komugul, ak eng' ng'omnateng'ung' komugul; ak icham chiitap kokweng'ung' ko uu ye ichamdoige.”" 
Luke10:28 Ak ki leenji, “Kewolu komyee: yai ko uu nooto, si isap.”" 
Luke10:29 Ago ye kimachei komyeeitkei, koleenji Jeso, “Ng'oo chiitap kokwennyu?”" 
Luke10:30 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Kichoortaegei chiito age Jerusalem kwo Jeriko; ak kotuiyo ak rebiik, che kirebe ngoroik ak kobir, ak koba, kobagaakta ko neegit kome." 
Luke10:31 Ak kichoortaegei tisiindet age oranooto; ak kingo keer ineendet korop taban. 
Luke10:32 Ak ye kingo it Lawindet yooto, ak kogeer, korop taban agine ko uu nooto." 
Luke10:33 Ago ye kita kowendi Samarindet age eng' pandanyi, koit ye mi chiichooto: ak ye kingo keer ineendet, koriiree," 
Luke10:34 kwo ole mi ineendet, koratyi ole kagibir, ak kosachinot mwaita ak divaik; ak kiganapchi chiichooto sigiryennyi, ak komut kwo kootap toek, ak koriip ineendet." 
Luke10:35 Ak mutai konem dinarisyek aeng', kogoochi chiitap ko po koot, ak koleenji, ‘Riip ineendet; ak tuguuk alak tugul che inyae che siirei chu, kotuun kaweege, anyo ayaagun.’" 
Luke10:36 Eng' chuuto somok, ileen ng'oo ne ki ek chiitap kokwennyi eng' chiichooto kituiye rebiik?”" 
Luke10:37 Ak ki le, “Ineendet ne kirireegei chiichooto.” Ak ki leenji Jeso, “Ui, iyai ko uu nooto.”" 
Luke10:38 Ak ye kita komi pandanywa, komong'ji anyun nganaseet age: ak kitaach eng' koonnyi kobogoryot age ne keguure Marta." 
Luke10:39 Ak ki tinyei chepkamet ne kiguure Maria, ne kitebyei eng' ole po keelyegap Kiptaiyat, kogasei ng'olyoondennyi." 
Luke10:40 Ago ki iimgei Marta eng' poisyonik che chaang'; ak konyonji ineendet ak koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, meiti kiy ak kabagaakta tupchennyu abois aneege? Mwachi anyun kotoreta.”" 
Luke10:41 Ago ki wolji Kiptaiyat koleenji, “Marta, Marta, igereeri met ak iimige agobo tuguuk che chaang':" 
Luke10:42 ago kiit agenge ne kemachei: amu kagolewen Maria kebeberta ne myee, ne ma kirebe.”" 
Luke11:1 Ak ye kita kosaaei eng' oldo age, ak kingo kes, koleenji age eng' kasubikyik, Kiptaiyat, ineetech kesaa, ko uu ye ki ineeti Johana kasubikyik." 
Luke11:2 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Ye osaae, omwa ole, ‘Kwandanyo, ingoloosunok kaineng'ung'. Ingonyo laitornateng'ung'." 
Luke11:3 Koonech ye kiech amitwogikyok che po kotugul. 
Luke11:4 Nyoiywech kaat tengekwogikyok; ko uu ye kinyoe kaat acheek pesenwogikyok. Amemutech ole mi yoomseet.’ ” 
Luke11:5 Ak ki leenji, “Ng'oo eng' okweek ne tinyei chorweet, ak kwo ole mi kemoi kween, ak koleenji, ‘Chorwani, koono magatiinik somok abesen;" 
Luke11:6 amu kagoit chorwennyu ne punu rutoi, ama tinye kiy ne agoochini.’" 
Luke11:7 Ak kowolji ne mi ko, koleenji, ‘Mat iima; kaager kurgeet, ak kageruiye ak lagokyuk; ma amuuchi ang'eet agoonin.’" 
Luke11:8 Amwaiwok ale, agot ngo ma ng'eet kogoochi, amu chorwennyi, ko amu soomsennyi ko nooto ne igoochin kong'eet kogoochi kiy tugul ne machei." 
Luke11:9 Ak amwaiwok agane ale, Osoom, si kegoonok; ocheeng', si onyooru; ogonygony, si keyatwok." 
Luke11:10 Amu age tugul ne soomei, kigoochin; ak nyooru ne cheeng'ei; ak ineendet ne igonygonyi keyatyin." 
Luke11:11 Ak ng'oo eng' okweek kwanda ne ngo soom weeriit magatyat, ko tos igoochi koita? Anan ngo soom njiryot, ko tos igoochi ereneet kogeere njiryot?" 
Luke11:12 Anan ngo soom koitap ingok, ko tos igoochi melmeldo?" 
Luke11:13 Ngo ngen okweek che oo yaach ogoochi lagokwok tuguuk che myach, siirei anyun ne tya kagoitoet ne igoochin Kwandang'wong' ne mi kipsengwet Kabuuset ne Tiliil icheek che soomei ineendet!”" 
Luke11:14 Ak ki oon ineendet oindet ne namaat kuut. Ak ye kingo kagomanda oindet, kong'alaal anyun ne kinamat kuut; ak ki kwong'yo tuiyosyek." 
Luke11:15 Ago ki le alak, Oone oik eng' Beelsebul, laitoryat ne po oik." 
Luke11:16 Ak kityem alak ineendet komage kaboorunet ne punu kipsengwet. 
Luke11:17 Ago ki nai ineendet kabwaatutikwak, koleenji, “Laitornatet age tugul ne pchegei ko ng'emaksei; ak koot age tugul ne pchegei koluulei." 
Luke11:18 Ak ngo pchegei agine Setani, kotonondoi ano laitornatani? Amu omwae ole, aoone oik eng' Beelsebul." 
Luke11:19 Ngot aoone oik eng' Beelsebul, koonei weeriikwok eng' ng'oo? Nooto anyun ne igoochin icheeget koek kirwoogikwok." 
Luke11:20 Ago ngot aoone oik eng' mornetap Kamuktaindet, ko kanyonjok anyun laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Luke11:21 “Ak chii ne tinyei kimnateet ak kotinyei kariikyik che riibe koonnyi, kotebyei tuguukyik eng' kaalyeet:" 
Luke11:22 ak ye nyoonji chiito ne kiim kosiir ineendet ak koterteer, korebe anyun ineendet kariikyik tugul che cham komang'u, ak kopcheita pareiywekyik." 
Luke11:23 Ineendet ne ma kimi tuwai kogirindaa; ak ineendet ne ma kiyumi tuwai koiyestooti. 
Luke11:24 “Ye kagomanda tamirmiryet ne murwoon eng' chiito, kosiir ole ma mi peek, kocheeng'oti ole imuung'ee; ak ye mata konyoor, komwa anyun kole, ‘Aweektoigei koonnyu ole ki abunu.’" 
Luke11:25 Ak ye iit, konyoor kobugot ak ko choboot." 
Luke11:26 Kwo anyun, komut oik tisap alak che yaacheen kosiir ineendet; kochut anyun oriit ak komeny olooto: ak yaitu kagesunetap chiichooto kosiir ne po tai.”" 
Luke11:27 Ak ye kita komwaei ng'aleechu, komwa kobogoryot age eng' tuiyet, kole, “Iberuurot moet ne kisichin, ak kinaik che ki irerye.”" 
Luke11:28 Ago ki le ineendet, “Iberuurotin kosiir che kasei ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet, ak koriip.”" 
Luke11:29 Ak ye kingo yumjigei ineendet tuiyosyek, kotoi komwa kole, “Ibini, ko ibinda ne ya: cheeng'ei kaboorunet; ago ma kigoochin kaboorunet kobatee kaboorunetap Jona." 
Luke11:30 Amu ko uu ye ki ek kaboorunet Jona eng' piigap Nineveh, ko uu nooto Weeriitap chii eng' ibini." 
Luke11:31 Tuun ng'eetei laitoryat kobogoryot ne po murot tai eng' kirwooget kobooto piigap ibini, ak korwookyi icheek: amu ki pun tabanwegap emet konyo kogas utaatyetap Solomon; ak ogeero, miitei yu ne oo kosiir Solomon." 
Luke11:32 Tuun tonondos piigap Nineveh ak ibini eng' kirwooget, ak korwookyi: amu kisik icheek eng' amdaetap Jona; ak ogeero, mi yu ne oo kosiir Jona." 
Luke11:33 “Ma mi chii ne ngo kagonaam tait, konde ole ung'aat, anan kitonget oriit, ago indoi kiit ne tonone, si kobiit kogeer lapkeiyet che pendi ko." 
Luke11:34 Taitap poortang'ung' kondang'ung': ngo myee kondang'ung', ko nyiitaat poortang'ung' komugul lapkeiyet; ago ngo ya kondang'ung' ko nyiitaat poortang'ung' agine mesundeito." 
Luke11:35 Keer anyun ngo lapkeiyet ne mi oriing'ung' ko mesundeito. 
Luke11:36 Ngo nyiitaat poortang'ung' komugul lapkeiyet, ama tinyei ye imen, kolapkeitu anyun poortang'ung' tugul, ko uu ye koonin lapkeiyet tait ne ikweng'sei komyee.”" 
Luke11:37 Ak ye kita kong'alaali, koguur Pharisaindet age kwo koamis tuwai: ak ki wo ko ak kotep ng'wony koamis." 
Luke11:38 Ak ye kingo keer Pharisaindet, kokwong', amu ki amis ama iun euut korook." 
Luke11:39 Koleenji `Kiptaiyat, Okweek Pharisaik, ouni parak kigombet ak sanit; ago nyiitaat oriing'wong' rebisyet ak yaityet." 
Luke11:40 Okweek che oo perber, ineendet ne kiyaei saang' koma ne kiyaei oriit agine?" 
Luke11:41 Ogoite kagoochinoik che po tuguuk che mi oriit; ak ogeero, tiliiliitu tuguuk tugul eng' okweek." 
Luke11:42 Ago pwo eng' okweek Pharisaik! Amu ogoitoi kebebertap taman ne po heduosmon ak keetiik che mengech che ng'uu, ak che po sogeek alak tugul, ak ometoi kirwooget ak chamyetap Kamuktaindet: ago kita nyolu oyai chuuto, amomete chuun alak." 
Luke11:43 Pwo eng' okweek Pharisaik! Amu ochame ng'echerok che torooreen eng' sinagogisyek, ak kagatosyek che kigatok eng' ole kiyae mung'aaret." 
Luke11:44 Pwo eng' okweek! Amu oo kerge ak kereeriisyek che mataagu, ama naei piik che punooti parak." 
Luke11:45 Ak ki wolji ng'amotyot age ne po ng'atuutik, koleenji, “Kaneetindoni, ngot imwa ko uu nooto ko keteweerech agacheek.”" 
Luke11:46 Ak kole, “Pwo eng' okweek ng'amotigap Ng'atuutik! Amu oganapchini piik lautik che pichiien eng' laiset, ago okweek ko motwae lautichooto agot eng' mornet agenge." 
Luke11:47 Pwo eng' okweek! Amu oteeche kereeriisyegap maotik, ago ki parei kwanisyekwok." 
Luke11:48 Ki oegu anyun paorinik ak ochamyechini poisyonigap kwanisyekwok: amu icheeget che kibarei ak oteeche okweek kereeriisyekwak. 
Luke11:49 Ki le anyun `utaatyetap Kamuktaindet amu nooto, ‘Tuun ayookyini maotik ak che kiyooktoi; ak kobar alak eng' icheek ak kousaus alak,’" 
Luke11:50 si kobiit komage ibini, korotiigap maotik tugul, che ki kitumda kobooch ko kagilumda ng'wony;" 
Luke11:51 kobooch korotiigap Abel agoi korotiigap Zekariah, ne kime eng' kwenutap kaptisisyet ak Hekaluut: ee, amwaiwok ale, tuun kimage ibini." 
Luke11:52 “Pwo eng' okweek ng'amotigap ng'atuutik! Amu ki oip yaateiwot ne po ng'omnateet ama obe oriit okweeget, ak ki oger che kita mong'jin.”" 
Luke11:53 Ak ye kingo mong' eng' olooto, kotoi siriik ak Pharisaik koriich ineendet miising', ak kogilgilye, si kobiit komwa ng'aleek che chaang';" 
Luke11:54 koriip kole tamangap konyoor ng'olyoo ne mang'une kutinnyi. 
Luke12:1 Eng' saisyechooto, ye kingo yumgei piik ng'iisyat che po tuiyet, kot kotyechkei icheegei, kosip kotoi koleenji kasubikyik, Oriibegei mermeregap Pharisaik, nooto chombilisyet." 
Luke12:2 Ago ma mi kiy ne tugoot, ne ma tuun king'aanyei, anan ne ung'aat, ne ma tuun naaksei." 
Luke12:3 Amu kiy age tugul ne omwae eng' mesundeito kotun kegasei eng' ole lapkei; ak che ki ochaamji itit eng' koot oriit kotun kemwaitoi eng' koot parak. 
Luke12:4 Ak amwaiwok choronokyuk ale, Amoiywei che parei poorto, yeityo ko mata komuuch koyai kiy age." 
Luke12:5 Ago ateiywok si onai ineendet ne kanyool oiywei: Oiywei ineendet, ne ngo kagobar komuuchi kowiirchi Gehenna; ee, amwaiwok ale, Oiywei ineendet." 
Luke12:6 Tos ma ki aldae toriitik muut che mengeechen kebebertap muut ne po dinarit? Ama utye Kamuktaindet agot agenge. 
Luke12:7 Ago iitotin suumeek tugul che po metowekwok. Amoiywei anyun: osiire okweek toriitik che chaang' che mengeechen. 
Luke12:8 Ak amwaiwok ale age tugul ne ibortaa eng' taitap piik, kotun iboortoi agine Weeriitap chii chiichooto eng' taitap malaikaisyek che po Kamuktaindet." 
Luke12:9 Ago ineendet ne eesyoa eng' taitap piik kotun keesyoi agine eng' taitap malaikaisyek che po Kamuktaindet. 
Luke12:10 Ak age tugul ne mwaei ng'olyoo ne ya agobo Weeriitap chii, kenyochin kaat: ago ineendet ne chubei Kabuuset ne Tiliil koma kinyochin kaat ineendet." 
Luke12:11 Ak ye kimutak ye mi sinagogisyek, ak taitap kirwoogik, ak pounik, ko matogereer met agobo kiit ne owolu anan omwae:" 
Luke12:12 amu ineetook Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' sainooto kiit ne nyolu omwa. 
Luke12:13 Ki leenji anyun chiito age eng' tuiyet, Kaneetindoni, mwachi weeriit ne kitupche kopcheiywa tuguukyok." 
Luke12:14 Ago ki leenji ineendet, Chiichi, ng'oo ne kindea aek kirwoogindet anan pcheindet eng' okweek?" 
Luke12:15 Ak ki leenji icheek, Ogeer, ak oriipkei eng' kasetap myat tugul: amu ma tebyei saboondap chii eng' chaang'indap tuguuk che tinyei." 
Luke12:16 Ak ki mwachi kalewenet koleenji, “Ki mi mogoryot age ne kiga rur mbareennyi miising'." 
Luke12:17 Ak ki ibwaat eng' muguleldanyi kole, ‘Ayae nee, amu ma tinye ole agonoree peekyuk?" 
Luke12:18 Ak ki le, Ayae ko uu ni: abute chogenikyuk, si ateech che eecheen kosiir chu: si agonoree peekyuk ak tuguukyuk tugul che myach." 
Luke12:19 Si aleenji saboondanyu, Saboondanyu, itinye tuguuk che chaang' che myachen che konorotiin che yamei kenyiisyek che chaang'; imuuny, amisye, eeise, ak ibaibaitu.’" 
Luke12:20 Ago ki leenji Kamuktaindet, ii perber inyee, kimachei saboondang'ung' kemouni po ra; ara, si kobunji ng'oo anyun, tuguuchooto koichop?”" 
Luke12:21 Ki igees Jesu kole, “Uu nooto anyun chiito ne konorchingei mogornateet ineegei, ne ma mogoryo eng' Kamuktaindet.”" 
Luke12:22 Ki leenji anyun kasubikyik, Nooto anyun amwaiwok ale, Amogereer met agobo sabeeng'wong', eng' tuguuk che oame; anan agobo poorwekwok, eng' tuguuk che olaachi." 
Luke12:23 Amu siirei sabeet amitwogik, ak siirei poorto ngoroik." 
Luke12:24 Obwaat chepkuginik, amu ma kolei, ama kesei; ama tinyei ole konoree anan choget; ago Kamuktaindet ne paei: osiire toriitik konyil ata!" 
Luke12:25 Ak ng'oo eng' okweek ne imuuchi kogereer met si kotes koindonyi eng' kakwautyet agenge ne po euut? 
Luke12:26 Ngo momuuchi anyun oyai agot kiy kitigin, ko amu nee anyun si ogereer met agobo tuguuk alak?" 
Luke12:27 Obwaat taaptook, ole pititoi: ma poisyei, anan koletis; ago amwaiwok ale, Agot Solomon, eng' talbistanyi tugul, ko ki ma kolumegei ko uu age eng' chuuto." 
Luke12:28 Ago ngo laaksechin Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto susweek che po keeweet che mi ra, ak mutai kewiirchi ma, kotos siirei ne tya anyun kolaaksewok okweek, che otinye kayaneet ne ming'in!" 
Luke12:29 Amocheeng' che oame, anan che oee, amosage." 
Luke12:30 Amu cheeng'ei tuguuchuuto tugul pororyosyegap ng'wony: ago ingen Kwandang'wong' kole omakyinige tuguuchuuto. 
Luke12:31 Ago ocheeng' okweek laitornatetap Kamuktaindet, si keteswook tuguuchuuto tugul." 
Luke12:32 Amoiywei, okweek akweet ne ming'in; amu paibai Kwandang'wong' kogoonok laitornatet." 
Luke12:33 Oalde che otinye, si ogoite kagoochinoik; onapchigei suberok che maosegitu, konorwet eng' kipsengwet ne ma pegu, ole mariikyin chooriik, ama ng'emei kuutik." 
Luke12:34 Amu ole mi konorweng'ung', ko olooto ole mi muguleldang'ung' agine." 
Luke12:35 Ongogermenogis suenutikwok, ak ongolalyo taisyekwok;" 
Luke12:36 ak ogergeitu ak piik che igeni kiptaiyannywa, kobunu igoortap katunisyet: si ye nyo ak kogongony, koyatyi sainooto." 
Luke12:37 Poiboen otwogichooto, che nyooru kiptaiyandanooto koriipsei ye nyo: amwaiwok iman ale, kermenigei ineendet ak chobei pichooto kotep ng'wony eng' ole amisye, ak kwo kobai icheek." 
Luke12:38 Ak ngo nyo eng' riipseet ne po aeng', anan ne po somok, ak konyoorta ko uu nooto, ko poiboen anyun otwogichooto." 
Luke12:39 Ago onai ni ole, nda ki ingen kiptaiyatap koot sait ne nyoonei choriindet, ta kiriipsei, ta ki ma kobagaaktoi koonnyi kobut choriindet." 
Luke12:40 Ochopkei ak okweek: amu nyoonei Weeriitap chii eng' sait ne mobwaati. 
Luke12:41 Ki leenji anyun Petero, Kiptaiyat, imwaiwech acheek kalewenoni, anan imwachini piik tugul?" 
Luke12:42 Kole anyun Kiptaiyat, Ng'oo anyun riibindet ne kiyani ak ko ng'oom, ne indoi kiptaiyandennyi kotononji koonnyi, ak kogoochi amitwogikwak che yamei eng' peetuut ne makyin?" 
Luke12:43 Paibai otwogindonooto, ne nyooru kiptaiyandennyi koyaei ko uu nooto." 
Luke12:44 Amwaiwok iman ale, indoi chiichooto kotononji tuguukyik tugul." 
Luke12:45 Ago ngo mwa otwogindonooto eng' muguleldanyi, kole, “Igaegei kiptaiyandennyu ma sip koitu,” ak kotoi kobir otwogik che murenik ak che tiibiik, ak koamis ak koeeiso, ak kobogit;" 
Luke12:46 weeksei anyun kiptaiyat ne po otwogindonooto eng' peetuut ne kama koogeni, ak eng' sait ne ma naei, ak kobir miising', ak kopchechi kebebertanyi kobooto che ma tinyei kayaneet." 
Luke12:47 Ak otwogindonooto, ne ki ingen mageetap kiptaiyandennyi, ama kochopkei, anan koyai ko uu magennyi, kebire pirutik che chaang';" 
Luke12:48 ago ineendet ne ki ma kongen, ak koyai tuguuk che nyoljin pireet, kebirei pirutik che ng'ering'en. Ak age tugul ne ki kigoochi che chaang', kotun kimage che chaang': ak ineendet ne ki kigoochi koriip tuguuk che chaang', kotun kimage ineendet che siirei." 
Luke12:49 “Ki anyoo awirchi maat ng'wony; nee anyun neta amache, ngo kagolal nguno!" 
Luke12:50 Ago atinye kabatisanet ne tatun kibatisanena; kamarigitya ne tya agoi kosulda! 
Luke12:51 Tos oleen ki anyoo agoonu kaalyeet konyo ng'wony? Amwaiwok ale, Achicha; ago peesyet:" 
Luke12:52 amu kobooch nguno kopchegei piik muutu che mi koot agenge, suryee somogu aeng', ak kosurye aeng' somok." 
Luke12:53 Pchegei, kwanda ak weeriit, ak weeriit ak kwanda; kamet ak cheptonyi, ak chepto ak kamet; kametap weeriit ak osotyonnyi, ak osotyotap weeriit, ak kametap weeriit.”" 
Luke12:54 Ki mwachi anyun tuiyet koleenji, “Ye ogeer kotogosune pooldet cherongo, ole, ‘Machei koroobon’; ak koyaak ko uu nooto anyun." 
Luke12:55 Ak ye ogeer usoonet ne usune murot tai, ole, ‘Machei koit kemeut ne ng'waan’; ak koyaak ko uu nooto." 
Luke12:56 Chombilichu, ongen obesye ole teptoi ng'wony ak kipsengwet; kalya anyun si monai ole teptoi peetuusyechu?" 
Luke12:57 “Kalya si morwoch okweegei agobo tuguuk che po imanda? 
Luke12:58 Amu ye ta obendi ak punyondeng'ung' taitap kirwoogindet, igiilgei obendi eng' ooreet si kounden; si mata komutin taitap kirwoogindet, ak komutyin kirwoogindet asigarindet, ak kotoorchin asigarindet korgoreet." 
Luke12:59 Amwaun ale, Ma koi imang'une olooto, agoi iyaakte sendeiyot ne po let.”" 
Luke13:1 Ki mi piik alage eng' peetuusyechooto che ki mwachi ineendet agobo piigap Galilaya, che kiburuch Pilato korotiikwak ak tiseiywekwak." 
Luke13:2 Ak kowolji koleenji, “Tos oleen ki kiptengeginik pichooto po Galilaya kosiir piigap Galilaya tugul, amu kinyoor nyalilwogichu?" 
Luke13:3 Amwaiwok ale, Achicha: ago, ngot ko mosigu okweek, olustosi okweek tugul ko uu nooto." 
Luke13:4 Anan chooto taman ak sisiit, che kisyep koot ne koi ne po Siloam, ak kobar, tos oleen ki kiptengeginik kosiir piik tugul che ki menyei Jerusalem?" 
Luke13:5 Amwaiwok ale, Achicha: ago, ngot ko mosigu ak okweek, olustosi tugul ko uu nooto.”" 
Luke13:6 Ak ki mwa kalewenoni, koleenji, “Ki mi chiito age ne ki tinyei mogoywet ne kiga minji mbareennyi ne po sabibuk; ak ki nyo kocheeng' logoegap keetoto, amanyoorchi kiy." 
Luke13:7 Koleenji riibindetap mbareetap sabibuk, ‘Keero, kenyini ko ne po somok anyoone acheeng'e logoek eng' mogoywoni amanyoorunee kiy: ep koluul; amu nee si koamei ng'ung'unyek puch?’" 
Luke13:8 Ak ki wolji koleenji, ‘Kiptaiyat, ingotebi kenyini agine, si kota asemberchi ak ande ng'atateek:" 
Luke13:9 ak ngo i logoek kong'etee nguno, ko myee; ak ngo ma i, iep anyun koluul.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Ak ki ineetisyei eng' sinagogit age eng' peetuutap sabato. 
Luke13:11 Ak ogeero, kobogoryot age ne ki tinyei tamirmiryet ne po nyalulet kenyiisyek taman ak sisiit; ak kigarigak, ak ki ma kota komuuchi kochuulgei agot kitigin." 
Luke13:12 Ak kingo keer `Jeso ineendet, koguur ak koleenji, “Kobogoryondoni, kagityachin eng' nyaluleng'ung'.”" 
Luke13:13 Ak ki igonoor eunekyik ineendet, kochuulak sainooto ak kolas Kamuktaindet." 
Luke13:14 Ki nereech anyun pounindetap sinagogit, amu ki isoop `Jeso chiito eng' peetuutap sabato, ak komwachi tuiyet koleenji, “Miitei peetuusyek lo che nyolu koboisyee piik; obwa anyun eng' peetuusyechooto si kisaabok, ama eng' peetuutap sabato.”" 
Luke13:15 Ago ki wolji Kiptaiyat, koleenji, “Okweek chombilik, tos ma yaatei age tugul eng' okweek eitonyi anan sigiryennyi eng' piiy eng' peetuutap sabato, ak kokweri koe peek?" 
Luke13:16 Ak kobogoryondoni, ne cheptap Abraham, ne ki korat Setani kenyisyechu taman ak sisiit, tos manyol kityaach eng' ratuutyoni eng' peetuutap sabato?”" 
Luke13:17 Ak ye kingo ta komwaei tuguuchu, kolilaanso puunikyik tugul: ago kiboiboitu tuiyet komugul agobo tuguuk che torooreen che ki yaei ineendet." 
Luke13:18 Ki mwa anyun, kole, “Kergei laitornatetap Kamuktaindet ak nee? Ak tos aroge nee?" 
Luke13:19 Kergei ak keswootap karadali, ne ki nam chiito, ak komiinji mbareennyi; ak ki piit, agoi koek keetit; ak ki tebee toriitik che po parak mooriikyik.”" 
Luke13:20 Ak ki mwa kogeny kole, “Aroge nee laitornatetap Kamuktaindet?" 
Luke13:21 Kergei ak mermereek, che ki nam kobogoryot, ak koburukto peek che ng'ootiin che po kitongok somok, agoi kogut tugul.”" 
Luke13:22 Ak kibunoot nganasook che eecheen ak che mengech, koneetisyoti, kobunei ooreet ne wendi Jerusalem." 
Luke13:23 Ak ki leenji chiito age, Kiptaiyat, tos ng'ering' che tuun kisaru? Ak ki leenji," 
Luke13:24 Ogiilgei obun kurgeet ne mariich: amu amwaiwok ale, cheeng'ei tuun che chaang' kobun yooto, ago ma tuun imuuchi." 
Luke13:25 Ak ye tuun kang'eet chiitap ko po koot, ak koger kurgeet, ak otau anyun otononse eng' saang', ak ogonygony kurgeet, ole, “Kiptaiyat, yaatwech.” Ak kowolwok ineendet kole, “Mangenok, ak ole obunu.”" 
Luke13:26 Otau anyun ole, “Ki kiamisyei ak ki kiee eng' taing'ung', ak ki ineetisyei eng' ortinwekyok.”" 
Luke13:27 Ak tuun mwaei kole, “Mangen ole obunu; oba eng' anee, okweek tugul yaigap tengek!”" 
Luke13:28 Koek anyun riirek ak nyeetap kelek, ye tuun ogeer Abraham, ak Isak, ak Jakobo, ak maotik tugul, eng' laitornatetap Kamuktaindet, ak kewiirchok okweeget saang'." 
Luke13:29 Ak tuun pwoonei kobunu kong'asiis ak cherongo, ak murot kaataam ak murot tai, ak kotep ng'wony koamis eng' laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Luke13:30 Ak ogeero, mi che po let che tuun egu che po tai, ak miitei che po tai che tuun egu che po let." 
Luke13:31 Ki pwa Pharisaik alak eng' sainooto ak koleenji, “Ng'eet mande, ui eng' oli, amu machei kobarin Herod.”" 
Luke13:32 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Oba omwachi lelwandonooto, oleenji: ‘Keero, aoone oik ak asoobi piik rani ak mutai, ak eng' peetuutap somok abegechi." 
Luke13:33 Ago kanyool awo pandanyu rani ak mutai ak peetuut ne po somok: amu ma nyooljin komechi maotyondo oldo age kobatee Jerusalem.’ 
Luke13:34 “Ee, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, inyee ne ibare maotik, ak ilage koik che kiyogun! Ki amach konyil ata ayum lagoguk, ko uu ngokyet ne iyumjin aarekyik kebebaikyik, ago ki ma ocham!" 
Luke13:35 Ogeero, kagebagakwok koonng'wong' koek kipkuubere: ak amwaiwok ale, Maogeera, agoi tuun ole, ‘Iberuurot ne nyoonei eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat.’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Ak ye kingwo kootap age eng' pounik che po Pharisaik eng' peetuutap sabato, si koamis, koriibot icheek ineendet." 
Luke14:2 Ak ogeero, ki mi chii tainnyi ne ki lolosenot poorto." 
Luke14:3 Ak ki wolji Jeso ng'amotigap ng'atuutik ak Pharisaik, koleenji, Tos chamdaat eng' ng'atuutik kisoop chii eng' peetuutap sabato, anan achicha?" 
Luke14:4 Ago ki siisyo. Ak ki nam ineendet ak kosoop, ak kounda kwo." 
Luke14:5 Ak koleenji icheeget, Ng'oo eng' okweek ne tinyei sigiryet anan eito ne kagobutyi keriinget, ama sutu sainooto amu peetuutap sabato?" 
Luke14:6 Ak ki mata komuuch anyun kowolji ineendet kogeny agobo tuguuchuuto. 
Luke14:7 Ak ki mwachi kalewenet che kiga kiguur, ye kingo keer ole lewendoi ng'echerok che po tai; koleenji icheek," 
Luke14:8 Ye kaguurchin chii age tugul igoortap katunisyet, ko metebee ng'echereet ne po tai; amu abeere kagiguur age ne konyitot kosiirin," 
Luke14:9 si ye nyo ineendet ne kaguurok okweek tuwai, komwaun kole, istochigei chiichi; itau anyun iwe ole po let eng' kalilanet." 
Luke14:10 Ago ye kiguurin, itebee olo po let; ak ye nyo anyun ne kaguurin, komuuchi koleenjin, Chorwani, ui oliin po tai: inyooru anyun teegisto eng' che oamisyei tugul." 
Luke14:11 Amu age tugul ne itoroorigei kiming'ini; ak ineendet ne iming'inegei kitoroori. 
Luke14:12 Ki mwachi anyun chiichooto kiga kuurso agine, koleenji, “Ye ichop amitwogik che po peet anan che po koskoleny, ko mat iguur choronoguk, anan che otupche, anan tilyonutiguk, anan mogoreek che po kokwet; abeere tos kuurin ak icheek, ak koweegun cheguuk." 
Luke14:13 Ago ye ichop igoorto, iguur kibananook, ak che po mugungon, ak che ing'waldos, ak che koryotiin:" 
Luke14:14 si kiberuurin; amu ma tinyei icheeget che weegun: amu tuun kiweegun eng' ng'eetyeetap che po iman.” 
Luke14:15 Ak kingo kas tuguuchuuto chiito age ne ki mi kobooto ineendet eng' amisyet, koleenji, “Paibai ineendet ne tuun amisyei eng' pounatetap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Luke14:16 Ago ki leenji, “Ki chop chiito age amitwogik che chaang' che po koskoleny; ak koguur piik che chaang':" 
Luke14:17 ak ki iyookto otwogindennyi eng' saitap amitwogik, koguur che kiga kemwachi, koleenji, ‘Obwa; amu kagochobogis tuguuk tugul.’" 
Luke14:18 Ak kotoi tugul eng' mageet agenge komwa kiit ne karaany. Ki leenji chiito ne po tai, ‘Kaal mbareet, kanyolja awo ageer: asoomin ale nyoiywo kaat.’" 
Luke14:19 Kole age, ‘Kaal eiik taman che po chogit, kawe atyem icheek: asoomin ale nyoiywo kaat.’" 
Luke14:20 Kole age, ‘Kaatunisye, nooto anyun ma muuchi anyo.’" 
Luke14:21 Konyo anyun otwogindonooto, ak kotetyi kiptaiyandennyi ng'aleechuuto tugul. Konereech anyun chiitap ko po koot, ak koleenji otwogindennyi, ‘Ui chaakte ortinwek che eecheen ak che mengeechen che po nganaseet, ak imutu yu kibananook, ak che po mugungon ak che koryotiin ak che ing'waldos.’" 
Luke14:22 Ak ki le otwogindonooto, ‘Kiptaiyat, kagoyaak kiit ne kageng'at, ago ta komi poroindo.’" 
Luke14:23 Koleenji anyun kiptaiyat otwogindennyi, ‘Ui ortinwek che eecheen ak kiwotosyegap mbareenik, ak ichiich kobwa ko, si konyi koonnyu." 
Luke14:24 Amu amwaiwok ale, ma mi agot agenge eng' che kiga kemwachi ne chamchami amitwogikyuk.’ ”" 
Luke14:25 Ak ye kingo ta kobendi inee ak tuiyosyek che chaang', kowelelgei ak koleenji," 
Luke14:26 “Ngo nyoonjo chii, ama wech kwanda, ak kamet, ak osotyonnyi, ak lagokyik, ak weeriik che tupcho, ak chepkametinik, ee ak saboondanyi agine, koma imuuchi koek kasubindennyu." 
Luke14:27 Ak chii age tugul ne ma ibei kimurtoiyondennyi, ak kosubwo, koma imuuchi koek kasubindennyu." 
Luke14:28 Amu ng'oo eng' okweek, ne machei koteech koot ne kooi, ama toi kotep ng'wony korook ak koiit tuguuk, ngo tinyei che yamei kogesune koot?" 
Luke14:29 Si ma ye kagotonon lumeiywot, ak koma komuuch kogees, kotoi kochurachur ineendet tugul che keerei," 
Luke14:30 kole, ‘Ki toi chiichi koteekso ago ma imuuch kogees.’" 
Luke14:31 “Anan ng'oo laitoryat ne wendi kobaregei ak laitoryat age, ama tep ng'wony korook ak korar ole teptoi, ngo tos imuuchi ineendet ak piik eliphuusyek taman kotuiyo ak ne setyin ineendet ak piik eliphuusyek tiptem?" 
Luke14:32 Anan, ye ta komi age ole loo, koyookto ng'olyoot, si koteep agobo kaalyeet." 
Luke14:33 Nooto anyun, chii age tugul eng' okweek ne ma pagaaktoi tuguukyik tugul, koma imuuchi koek kasubindennyu." 
Luke14:34 “Myachen muunyuk: ago ngo kagogeskei anyinyindanyi, kota ki anyinyee nee?" 
Luke14:35 Ma kotilei kiy eng' emet anan eng' kapng'atat: kilaktoi. Ineendet ne tinyei iitiik che kastoe, kogas.”" 
Luke15:1 Ak kiriikyi ineendet taagigap aisuruut tugul ak kiptengeginik si kobiit kogas ineendet. 
Luke15:2 Ak ki ing'unyng'ung'so Pharisaik ak siriik, kole, “Taachei chiichi kiptengeginik, ak koamisyei tugul.”" 
Luke15:3 Ak ki mwachi icheek kalewenoni, koleenji," 
Luke15:4 Ng'oo chii eng' okweek, ne tinyei keechiirek pogol, ak ngo pet agenge eng' chooto, ko tos ma pagaaktoi chooto tamanwogik sogool ak sogool eng' surkwen, ak kwo kocheeng'at nooto kabet, agoi konyoor?" 
Luke15:5 Ak ye kigonyoor, konde tigikyennyi, ak kobaibait." 
Luke15:6 Ak ye kagoit kaa, koguur choronokyik kobooto piigap kokwennyi koyumgei, ak koleenji, “Ongeboiboitu tugul, amu kaanyooru keechiiryennyu ne koga pet.”" 
Luke15:7 Amwaiwok ale, egu ko uu nooto tuun agine poiboiyet eng' kipsengwet agobo kiptengekyot agenge ne kasik, ne siirei piik che po iman tamanwogik sogool ak sogool, che ma mage kiy siguunet." 
Luke15:8 Ng'oo kobogoryot ne tinyei fedhaisyek taman, ak ngo pet fedhaiyat agenge, kotos ma inaami tait ak kobuch koot, ak kocheeng' miising' agoi konyoor?" 
Luke15:9 Ak ye kagonyoor, koguur anyun choronokyik kobooto piigap kokwennyi koyumgei ak kole, “Ongeboiboitu tugul, amu kaanyooru fedhaiyandennyu ne koga kobet.”" 
Luke15:10 Uu nooto anyun, amwaiwok ale, mi poiboiyet eng' taitap malaikaisyegap Kamuktaindet eng' kiptengekyot agenge ne kasik." 
Luke15:11 Ak ki mwa kole, “Ki mi chii anum ne ki tinyei weeriik aeng'." 
Luke15:12 Ki leenji weeriit ne ming'in kwandanyi, Abba, koono tuguuk che ka tatun punjino. Ak kipchechi icheek tuguukyik." 
Luke15:13 Ak kingo pata peetuusyek che matya koyum weerooto ming'in tuguukyik tugul, ak kwo emet ne loo; kwo koserser eng' olooto tuguukyik eng' atepto ne ya." 
Luke15:14 Ak kingo kagogesta tugul, konyo rubeet ne oo emonooto; kotoi anyun kobanan." 
Luke15:15 Ak ki wo kogakta chiito age ne po emonooto; ak ki iyookto kwo koyaga toorook eng' mbareet. 
Luke15:16 Ak kimachei miising' kole kobiyo meteteek che ki amei toorook: amu ma igoochi chii kiy. 
Luke15:17 Ak kingo pwaat, komwa kole, ‘Tya otwogik che po abba che tinyei amitwogik che yamei kot kosiir, ago anee, ko kabara rubo eng' yu!" 
Luke15:18 Ang'eete ak awe kap Abba aleenji, Abba, ki achalwogenji kipsengwet ak ki achalwogen eng' taing'ung':" 
Luke15:19 ma ko nyoljino kota keguureno weeriing'ung': ingaek ko uu age eng' otwogiguk.’ 
Luke15:20 Ki ng'eet anyun kwo kapkwandanyi. Ago, ye kita komi ole loo, kogeer ineendet kwandanyi, ak koriiree ineendet, ak kilabat kwo kosuup kaatit, ak kong'utut." 
Luke15:21 “Ak ki leenji weeriit, Abba, ki achalwogenji kipsengwet, ak ki achalwogen eng' taing'ung': ma ko nyoljino kota keguureno weeriing'ung'." 
Luke15:22 Ago ki leenji kwanda otwogikyik, Oibu ochogune ngoryeet ne karaaran ne siirei tugul, ak olaakyi; ak ondechi peteiyot mornennyi, ak olaakyi kweonik:" 
Luke15:23 ak ogetu moita ne neraat, ak oeny, si keam, ak keboiboitu:" 
Luke15:24 amu weeriinnyu ni, ne kiga kome, ago kagosap kogeny; kiga kobet, ak kagobiit. Ki toi anyun koboiboitu." 
Luke15:25 “Ak ki mi weeriinnyi ne oo mbar: ak kingo riik ye neegit koot, kogas cheetap tyendo ak ureryet." 
Luke15:26 Ak kiguur age eng' otwogik, ak koteebe kole, nee tuguuchu." 
Luke15:27 Ak ki leenji, ‘Kagoit ng'eetap kamenng'ung'; ak kagoeng'ji kwandang'ung' moita ne neraat, amu kagotaach ineendet kochamegei.’" 
Luke15:28 Ago kinereech, ak ki eesyo kwo ko: ak ki mong' saang' kwandanyi, kogaigai." 
Luke15:29 Ago ki wolji kwandanyi koleenji, Keero, ki aootin eng' kenyisyechu chaang', ama abut ng'atuutyeng'ung': ak ki ma igoono arwa, si keboiboitu ak choronokyuk:" 
Luke15:30 ago ye ka ngo nyo weeriitang'ung'et, ne kigoam tuguuguk ak chepkugonik, ieng'ji anyun moita ne neraat." 
Luke15:31 Ak ki leenji, ‘Weeri, kimi tuwai kotugul, ak tuguukyuk tugul ko cheguuk." 
Luke15:32 Ago kanyoolu keboiboitu ak kigaske: amu kiga kome weeri otupche, ago kagosap kogeny; kiga kobet, ago kagobiit.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Ak ki leenji ineendet kasubikyik kogeny, ki mi chii anum ne ki mogoryo, ne ki tinyei riibindet ne kitononjin koonnyi; ak ki kimwaita chiichooto eng' tainnyi keele, iserseri tuguugap mogoryondonooto." 
Luke16:2 Ak kiguur ineendet koleenji, “Nee ni agase agobo inyee? Koonu koitetap riipseng'ung'; amu ma iegu riibindet kogeny.”" 
Luke16:3 Ak ki le riibindonooto eng' muguleldanyi, Ayae nee anyun, amu kagoistaa kiptaiyandennyu eng' poisyet? Ama tinye kimnateet ne abatisye; ak ngale, Asoomso, alilani." 
Luke16:4 Kaanai kiit ne ayae, si ye kageona eng' poisyet, kotaacha eng' kooriikwak." 
Luke16:5 Ak kingo kuur age tugul eng' pesenigap kiptaiyandennyi, koleenji ne po tai, Ki ibesen ata tuguugap kiptaiyandennyu?" 
Luke16:6 Kole, Tereenik pogol che po mwanik. Ak ki leenji, Nam kartasing'ung', ak itep ng'wony si isir konom, ichokyi." 
Luke16:7 Yeityo koleenji age, Ki ibesen ata inyee? Kole, Tereenik pogol che po nganuuk. Koleenji, Nam kartasing'ung', si isir tamanwogik sisiit." 
Luke16:8 Ak ki ichoi kiptaiyandennyi otwogindonooto ki ma ko po imanda amu kayai eng' ng'ulaatyet: amu ng'ulaatiin weeriigap ng'wonyuni eng' ibindanywa kosiir weeriigap lapkeiyet. 
Luke16:9 Ak amwaiwok ale, Oyachigei choronok eng' ooreetap mogornatosyek che ma po imanda; si ye tuun igeskei, ko tuun kotaachak eng' kooriik che po koigeny." 
Luke16:10 Ineendet ne kiyani eng' che ng'ering', kiyani agine eng' che chaang': ak ineendet ne ma kiyani eng' che ng'ering' koma kiyani agot eng' che chaang'." 
Luke16:11 Uu nooto anyun, ngo ki ma oegu che kiyani eng' mogornatosyek che ma po imanda, ko ng'oo ne tos iyanak eng' mogornatosyek che po imanda?" 
Luke16:12 Ak ngo ki mata oegu che kiyani eng' tuguugap chiito age, ko tos ng'oo anyun ne koonok tuguuk che chekwok?" 
Luke16:13 Ma mi otwogindet ne imuuchi koot kiptainik aeng': amu tos wech age, ak kocham age; anan konamgei ak age, kosas age. Momuuchi oot Kamuktaindet ak mogornateet." 
Luke16:14 Ak ki kas Pharisaik tuguuchuuto tugul. Ki chamei silingisyek icheeget, ak kororechi ineendet." 
Luke16:15 Ak ki leenji, “Okweget che omyeeitige eng' taitap piik; ago ingen Kamuktaindet mugulelwekwok: amu kiit ne itoroori piik ko wegot miising' eng' taitap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Luke16:16 Ki tebi Ng'atuutyetap Musa ak kaneetisyosyegap maotik agoi koit Johana: kobooch peetuunooto keamdoi logoiywek che myach che po laitornatetap Kamuktaindet, ak komong'jin chii tugul eng' kimnateet." 
Luke16:17 Ago nyumnyum kosiirto kipsengwet ak ng'wony, kosiir kobut siruutyet agenge ne po Ng'atuutik." 
Luke16:18 Age tugul ne oonei osotyonnyi, ak kotun age, ko kabaigei: ak chiito ne ituni ineendet ne ki koon manong'otyot ko kabaigei." 
Luke16:19 Ak ki mi chii anum ne ki mogoryo ne ki ilaachi ngoroik che arusen ne piriir, ak che po katanit ne karaaran, ak kibaibai peetuut age tugul, ak kotalbisi:" 
Luke16:20 ak ki mi kibanania ne ki kiguure Lazaro ne ki kimogoni eng' kurgennyi, ak ki nyiitaat mook poortanyi," 
Luke16:21 ak kimachei kebae tuguuk che ibutos eng' meesetap mogoryondonooto; ee, ki pwa agot sesenik ak komel mookyik." 
Luke16:22 Ak kime kibananiandanooto peetuut age, komut ineendet malaikaisyek konde tegetap Abraham: ak kime agine mogoryondonooto, ak ki kitup." 
Luke16:23 Ak ye ki mi ye mi che ki kobek konyal parak, komi nyalilda ne oo, kogeer Abraham komi ole loo, komi Lazaro tegeennyi." 
Luke16:24 Ak ki ite kole, “Abba Abraham, rireena, ak iyoogu Lazaro, koting'e peek walitap mornennyi, si kotiswa ng'elyeptanyu, amu ami ng'wanindo miising' eng' mai lalei.”" 
Luke16:25 Ago ki le Abraham, “Weeri, ibwaat ile kingo ta isabe ko ki inyooru tuguuguk che myach, ki uu nooto Lazaro, kinyooru tuguuk che yaach: ago nguno kigoigoi ineendet eng' yu, ago inyee, imi ng'wanindo ne oo." 
Luke16:26 Ak ne siirei chu tugul, ko ki kinde chemng'eisut ne oo ne ioitoseech acheek ak okweek, si che machei kolong' olo omi koma imuuchi, ak che machei kolong' ole ki mi koma imuuchi.”" 
Luke16:27 Ak ki le, “Asaain anyun, abba, ale, iyookte ineendet kwo ye mi abba;" 
Luke16:28 amu atinye che kitupche muut; kwo koteechi icheek, si ma pwa ole mi nyalilda ne oo.”" 
Luke16:29 Ak ki leenji Abraham, “Tinyei icheek Musa ak maotik; ingogas icheek.”" 
Luke16:30 Ago ki le, “Achicha, abba Abraham: ago ngot kwo chii ole mi icheek ne punei ye mi che ki kobek, kosigu.”" 
Luke16:31 Ak ki leenji, “Ngot koma kas Musa ak maotik, koesyoi koyan agot chiito ne ng'eetei eng' che ki kobek.”" 
Luke17:1 Ki leenji kasubikyik anyun, “Pwoonei kanagutik matiny: ago pwo! Eng' chiichooto punu!" 
Luke17:2 Kita kaigai eng' ineendet kirooch kaatinnyi koitap pai ne oo ak kewiirchi araraita, kosiir ye inachi age eng' chu mengech." 
Luke17:3 Oriipkei: ngo chiliilun ne otupche, iger kong'; ak ngo sik, inyochi kaat." 
Luke17:4 Ak ngo chalwogenjin konyil tisap eng' peetuut agenge, ak ngo week ole imi konyil tisap koleen, Kaasigu; inyochi kaat.”" 
Luke17:5 Ak ki leenji che kiyooktoi Kiptaiyat, Teswech kayanennyo." 
Luke17:6 Ak ki le Kiptaiyat, Ndotinye kayaneet ne uu keswootap karadali, ko ye omwachi mogoywoni, oleenji, Kitutin, ak keminin eng' araraita; kogasook iit." 
Luke17:7 Ago mi ng'oo eng' okweek ne tinyei otwogindet ne ibatisyei anan ne iyagi keechiirek, ne leenjin ye kait kobunu mbar, “Nyoo tebi ng'wony iamisye?”" 
Luke17:8 Tos ma kaigai koleenji ineendet, Chobwa tuguuk che aame, kermenge ak iboisyeiwo, agoi aamisye ak aeeise; si yeityo iamisye ak ieeise aginye?" 
Luke17:9 Tos weekyin otwogindonooto kongoi amu kayai tuguuk che kagaging'at? 
Luke17:10 Uu nooto tuun ak okweek, ye kaoyai tuguuk tugul che kaging'atak, omwa ole, Ki otwogik che ma tilei kiy; kageyai che kanyooljinech keyai." 
Luke17:11 Ak ye ki mi ooreet kowendi Jerusalem, kobun kwenutap Samaria ak Galilaya." 
Luke17:12 Ak kingo mong'ji nganaseet age, kotuiyo ak murenik taman che ki tinyei mogondosaik, che kitonondos eng' ole loo:" 
Luke17:13 ak kiwaach kole, “Jeso Kiptaiyat, rirenech.”" 
Luke17:14 Ak kingo keer icheek, koleenji, “Oba oboorchigei tisiik.” Ak ye kingap kaba, kotiliiliitu." 
Luke17:15 Ak kingo keer age eng' icheek kole kagosap, koweek, kolasunonu Kamuktaindet eng' kutit ne oo;" 
Luke17:16 ak ki ibutyi keelyekyik koweekyi kongoi; ak ki Samarindet chiichooto. 
Luke17:17 Ak ki wol Jeso kole, “Kama kitiliil taman? Ago mi ano chugai sogoolu?" 
Luke17:18 Tos ma piit agot agenge ne kaweek kogoochi kalasunet Kamuktaindet, kobatee toondoni?" 
Luke17:19 Ak koleenji ineendet, Ng'eet, si iwe: kagosaabin kayaneng'ung'.”" 
Luke17:20 Ak kingo teebee Pharisaik kole “Nyoonei au laitornatetap Kamuktaindet”, kowolji icheek koleenji, “Ma nyoonei laitornatetap Kamuktaindet kegeeronu:" 
Luke17:21 ama kimwaei keele, Ogeero, mi oli! Anan mi oliin! Amu, ogeero, mi laitornatetap Kamuktaindet kwenung'wong'.”" 
Luke17:22 Ak ki leenji kasubikyik, Tuun pwoonei peetuusyek, che tuun omache ogeer peetuut agenge ne po Weeriitap chii, ak mogeere." 
Luke17:23 Ak tuun leenjinok, Ogeero, mi oliin! Ogeero, mi oli! Amat obe, anan osup icheek:" 
Luke17:24 amu uu kalyeleet, ne ilyelune komosta age eng' kipsengwet, ak kooluu agoi komosta age ne po kipsengwet; tuun uu nooto Weeriitap chii agine eng' peetuunnyi." 
Luke17:25 Ago kanyool konyalil eng' tuguuk che chaang' ak koeesyo ineendet ibini. 
Luke17:26 Ak ko uu ole ki piitunda eng' peetuusyegap Noah, ko tuun uu nooto eng' peetuusyegap Weeriitap chii." 
Luke17:27 Ki amisyei, kieisei, kiitunisyei, ak ki igoitoi kitun, agoi peetuut ne ki wo Noah moinget oriit, ak ki nyo maraneet, ak kobar tugul." 
Luke17:28 Uu nooto agine, ole ki piitunda peetuusyegap Lot; ki amisyei, kieisei, ki alisyei, ki aldaisyei, ki koolsei, ak kiteeksei;" 
Luke17:29 ago eng' peetuut ne kimanda Lot eng' Sodom koroobon maat ak koik che laldos che ki punu kipsengwet, ak kobar tugul:" 
Luke17:30 uu nooto eng' peetuut ne kibooru Weeriitap chii. 
Luke17:31 Eng' peetuunooto, ko mat kochoorgei ineendet ne mi koot parak, koip tuguukyik che mi ko; amat koweek agine ineendet ne mi mbar." 
Luke17:32 Obwaat osotyotap Lot. 
Luke17:33 Age tugul ne cheeng'ei kosar saboondanyi kobeeti: ak age tugul ne ibeeti saboondanyi koriibei. 
Luke17:34 Amwaiwok ale, Tuun ruitos piik aeng'u eng' itoogut agenge eng' kemounooto; kimuti age, kebagaakta age." 
Luke17:35 Tuun ng'oisei kobogorisyek aeng'u kibagenge; kimuti age, kebagaakta age." 
Luke17:36 Tuun mi piik aeng'u mbar: kimuti age, kebagaakta age." 
Luke17:37 Ak ki wolji ineendet koleenji, “Ano, Kiptaiyat?” Ak ki leenji, Ole mi muusto, koyumjingei olooto motong'wek ak icheek." 
Luke18:1 Ki mwachi anyun kalewenet kole, Kanyool kosa peetuusyek tugul, amat chorirenso;" 
Luke18:2 koleenji, “Ki miitei nganaseet age kirwoogindo ne ki ma koywei Kamuktaindet, ak ki ma koiti chii:" 
Luke18:3 ak ki mi mosoget age nganasanooto; ne kinyonei ole mi kotugul, koleen, ‘Ibesyeiwo kirwooget ne po iman eng' punyondennyu.’" 
Luke18:4 Ak ki eesyo eng' peetuusyek alak: ago eng' let, komwa eng' oriitinnyi kole, ‘Agot ngo ma ywei Kamuktaindet, amaiiti chii;" 
Luke18:5 ago amu inyalila mosogani, abesyechini anyun, si ma konyonei kotugul koiima.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Ak ki le Kiptaiyat, “Ogas kiit ne ki mwa kirwoogindet ne ma po imanda." 
Luke18:7 Tos ma yachin Kamuktaindet imanda che lewenotin, che riirchin ineendet peet ak kemoi, ak muitoi ineendet eng' icheek?" 
Luke18:8 Amwaiwok ale, yachin ineendet icheek imanda kochokyin. Ago ye tuun nyo Weeriitap chii, ko tos nyooru kayaneet eng' ng'wony?”" 
Luke18:9 Ak ki mwachi kogeny kalewenoni alak che ki imang'ugei kole, ki po imanda, ak kosasei piik tugul," 
Luke18:10 koleenji, “Ki togosta piik aeng'u Hekaluut koba kosa; Pharisaindet age, ko taagindetap aisuruut age." 
Luke18:11 Ki tonon Pharisaindet kosa kong'alaal ineegei kole, ‘Kamuktaindet, amwaun kongoi, amu ma ki kergei ak piik alak, che rebiik, che ma po iman, che ibegei, anan taagindoni po aisuruut." 
Luke18:12 Arugutige konyil aeng' eng' wigiit; agoitoi kebeberta ne po taman eng' tuguuk tugul che anyooru.’ 
Luke18:13 Ago ki tonon taagindetap aisuruut eng' ye loo, ak ma cham agot konyal kipsengwet, ago kiluch tegeennyi, kole, ‘Kamuktaindet, rireena, aa kiptengekyo.’" 
Luke18:14 Amwaiwok ale, kichoortagei chiichooto koonnyi ko kagoek ne po imanda kosiir nin age: amu chii age tugul ne itoroorigei kiming'ini; ak age tugul ne iming'inigei ko tuun kitoroori.”" 
Luke18:15 Ak ki imutyi `piik ineendet manyurunik, si kobiit kotwa icheek: ago ye kingo keer kasubik, koger kong'."
