Luke18:16 Ago kiguur Jeso icheek kobwonji, ak koleenji, “Ochamji lagok che mengech kobwanjo, amat oete: amu po che uu chu laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Luke18:17 Amwaiwok iman ale, Age tugul ne mataachei laitornatetap Kamuktaindet ko uu lakweet ne ming'in, koma koi mong'ji olooto matiny.”" 
Luke18:18 Ak ki teebe ineendet pounindet age, kole, “Kaneetindoni myee, ayai nee si kobiit anyoor saboondap koigeny?”" 
Luke18:19 Ak ki leenji Jeso, “Amu nee si iguureno ne myee? Ma mi ne myee, kobatee agenge, nooto ko Kamuktaindet." 
Luke18:20 Ingen ng'atuutik: ‘Amoipkei, Amerumisye, Amechoorse, Amebaoryan lembech, teech kwandang'ung' ak kamenng'ung'.’ ”" 
Luke18:21 Ak ki le, “Ki ariip tuguuchuuto tugul kobooch ko aa neran.”" 
Luke18:22 Ak ye kingo kas Jeso, koleenji, “Ta ko rartaat kiit agenge eng' inyee: alde tugul che itinye, ak ipchechi kibananook, si inyooru konorwet eng' kipsengwet: ak inyoo, isubwo.”" 
Luke18:23 Ago ye kingo kas ineendet tuguuchu, koaragen miising'; amu ki mogoryo kot." 
Luke18:24 Ak kingo keer `Jeso ineendet, komwa kole, “Pichii ne tya eng' che tinyei mogornatosyek komong'ji laitornatetap Kamuktaindet!" 
Luke18:25 Amu nyumnyum eng' tambeesyet kochut kondap sindanut, kosiir komong'ji mogoryot laitornatetap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Luke18:26 Ki mwa anyun che ki kasei, kole, “Ng'oo anyun ne kesaru?”" 
Luke18:27 Ki le, “Tuguuk che ma imugaksei eng' piik komugaksei eng' Kamuktaindet.”" 
Luke18:28 Kole Petero, “Keero, kigebagaakte tuguukyok, ak kisubun!”" 
Luke18:29 Ak ki leenji icheek, Amwaiwok iman ale, Ma mi chii ne ki pagaakta koot, anan osotyot, anan che tupcho, anan sigiik, anan lagok, agobo laitornatetap Kamuktaindet," 
Luke18:30 ne ma nyooru che chaang' kosiir eng' peetuusyechu, ak saboondap koigeny eng' peetuusyek che tuun pwoonei." 
Luke18:31 Ak ki imut taman ak aeng' kobwa ole mi, ak koleenji, “Ogeero, kitogostoi Jerusalem, ak kosulda tuguuk tugul che kisir maotik agobo Weeriitap chii." 
Luke18:32 Amu kindoi ineendet eunegap Pororyosyek, si kechurachur, ak kiteweer, ak kesing'ilji:" 
Luke18:33 ak kobire kipchoritiit, ak kobar: ak kong'eet kogeny eng' peetuutap somok.”" 
Luke18:34 Ak ki ma iguiyo icheeget tuguuchuuto, agot agenge; ak kiung'ak mwaoniito eng' icheek, ak ki ma ibesyo tuguuk che kiga kimwa." 
Luke18:35 Ak kingo riikyi Jeriko, ko kitebyei ng'wony kipkoratya eng' ooreet taban kosoomsei:" 
Luke18:36 ak kingo kas kosiirtoi tuiyet, koteep kole, “Nee chu?”" 
Luke18:37 Ak ki mwachi icheek ineendet koleenji, “Jeso ne po Nazareth ne siirtoi.”" 
Luke18:38 Ak kiwaach, kole, “Jeso, Weeriitap Daudi, rireena.”" 
Luke18:39 Ak ki kergong' ineendet anyun che ki indoi, kole kosiis: ago kites kowaach miising' kole, “Weeriitap Daudi, rireena.”" 
Luke18:40 Ak ki tonon Jeso, ak kong'at kimut ineendet kwo ole mi: ak ye kiga riik, koteebe ineendet," 
Luke18:41 kole, “Imache ayaun nee?” Ak ki le, “Kiptaiyat, amache ageerto.”" 
Luke18:42 Ak ki leenji Jeso, “Keerte: kagosaabin kayaneng'ung'.”" 
Luke18:43 Ki keerto anyun koma tyanit, ak koosup ineendet, kolasunoti Kamuktaindet: ak kingo keer tuiyet komugul, kogonyit Kamuktaindet." 
Luke19:1 Kimong'ji anyun Jeriko ak kobun kwenut. 
Luke19:2 Ak ogeero, chiito ne kiguure Zakayo; ak ki ne oo ineendet eng' taagigap aisuruut, ak ki mogoryo." 
Luke19:3 Ak ki cheeng'ei kole kogeer Jeso si konai kole ng'oo ineendet; ago ki ma imuuch amu tuiyet, amu ki nwach." 
Luke19:4 Ak ki labat kondo, kwo kolaany mogoywet si kogeer ineendet: amu ki nyo kosiirtoe oranooto." 
Luke19:5 Ak ye kingo it Jeso yooto, konyal keetoto, ak koleenji, “Zakayo, chooruge, chogu; amu kanyolja aru koong'ung' ra." 
Luke19:6 Ak ki chook, kochoorgei, ak kotaach ineendet eng' poiboiyet." 
Luke19:7 Ak ye kingo keer pichooto, kong'unyng'ung'so tugul, kole, ‘kawo kotebi eng' kootap chiito ne kiptengekyo.’" 
Luke19:8 Ak ki tonon Zakayo, ak koleenji Kiptaiyat, Keero, Kiptaiyat, agoochini kibananook kebebertap tuguukyuk; ak ngo ki aibe chii age tugul kiy eng' ng'aalseet, aweekyini konyil ang'wan." 
Luke19:9 Ak ki leenji Jeso, Kagonyo yetunet rani kooi, amu weeriitap Abraham agine ineendet." 
Luke19:10 Amu ki nyo Weeriitap chii kocheeng' ak kosar ne kiga kobet.” 
Luke19:11 Ak ye kingo ta kogasei icheek tuguuchu, kotes komwa kalewenet, amu ki neegit Jerusalem, ak ki ibwaati icheeget koleen taagu laitornatetap Kamuktaindet sainooto." 
Luke19:12 Ki mwa anyun kole, “Ki wo chii anum ne tagunoot emet ne loo, kwo konam pounateet kobunji, ak koweek." 
Luke19:13 Yeityo koguur otwogikyik taman, ak kogoochi fedhaisyek taman, ak koleenji, Oboisyee agoi tuun aitu." 
Luke19:14 Ago kiwech ineendet piigap emennyi, koyookto ng'olyoot kosube ineendet, kole, ‘Ma kimache chiichi koboiywech.’" 
Luke19:15 “Ak ye kingo week kogeny, ko kagonam pounateet, kong'at keguur otwogichooto, chu kiga kigoochi fedhaisyek, kobwa ole mi ineendet, si kobiit konai che kinyoor pichooto eng' poisyet." 
Luke19:16 Ak ki nyo tainnyi chiito ne po tai, kole, ‘Kiptaiyat, ki konyoor fedhaiyandeng'ung' fedhaisyek alak taman.’" 
Luke19:17 Ak ki leenji ineendet, Ki iyai ne myee, otwogindoni myee: amu ki iegu ne kiyani eng' kiit ne ming'in miising', pou nganasook taman." 
Luke19:18 Ak ki nyo ne po aeng', kole, ‘Kiptaiyat, kigonyoor fedhaiyandeng'ung' fedhaisyek muut alak.’" 
Luke19:19 Ak ki leenji nooto agine, ‘Pou nganasook muut aginye.’" 
Luke19:20 “Ak ki nyo age, kole, ‘Kiptaiyat, keero, ineni fedhaiyandeng'ung' ne kigaratyi angeet ak agonor:" 
Luke19:21 amu ki aiywein, amu ii chii ne kolgol: inemu ne ki ma inde ng'wony, ak igese che ki ma igol.’" 
Luke19:22 Koleenji anyun ineendet, Arwoogun agobo ne kemwa eng' kuting'ung', otwogindoni ya. Ki ingen ile aa chii ne kolgol, anemu ne ki ma ande ng'wony, ak agese che ki ma agool;" 
Luke19:23 kilya anyun si mende fedhaisyekyuk ole kiwalawale, ta kaanyooru ko kaitu kobooto che kitesak?" 
Luke19:24 Ak ki mwachi icheek che kitonondos eng' ye neegit, koleenji, ‘Orebe ineendet fedhaiyat, ak ogoochi ineendet ne tinyei fedhaisyek taman." 
Luke19:25 Ak ki leenji icheek ineendet, Kiptaiyat, tinyei ineendet fedhaisyek taman." 
Luke19:26 Amwaiwok ale, chii age tugul ne tinyei, kigoochin; ago ineendet ne ma tinyei, kerebe agot ne tinyei." 
Luke19:27 Ago omutu anyun puunichuchuk kobwa yu, che ma chamei aboi, si obar eng' tainnyu.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Ak ye kiga komwa ko uu nooto, kwo kondo, kotogostoi Jerusalem." 
Luke19:29 Ak ye kingo kagoriikta Bethphage ak Bethania, eng' tulweet ne kiguure tulweetap Mseituni, koyookto aeng' che po kasubikyik," 
Luke19:30 koleenji, “Oba agoi oit nganaseet ne mi taing'wong'; ak ye oit ogeer moitap sigiryet ne rataat, ne tomo kolaany chii: otyach, ak ogetu." 
Luke19:31 Ak ngo teebenak chii age tugul, kole, ‘Kalya si otyach? Oleenji anyun, Makyingei Kiptaiyat.’ ”" 
Luke19:32 Koba anyun che kagagiyookto, ak konyoor ko uu ye kagamwachi ineendet icheek." 
Luke19:33 Ak ye kita kotyachi moitap sigiryet, koleenji piigap ko po, Kalya si otyach moitap sigiryet?" 
Luke19:34 Ak ki leenji, “Makyingei Kiptaiyat.”" 
Luke19:35 Ak kiget konyo ole mi Jeso: yeityo koiito ngoroikwak eng' moata po sigiryet, ak koganapchi Jeso parak." 
Luke19:36 Ak ye kiwendi, koiitoot ngoroikwak eng' ooreet." 
Luke19:37 Ak kingo riikta tegeiyatap tulweetap Mseituni, kotoi tuiyet tugul ne po kasubik koboiboitu ak kolas Kamuktaindet eng' kutit ne oo agobo poisyonik tugul che po kamuktaet che kiga kogeer;" 
Luke19:38 koleen, Iberuurot Laitoryat ne nyoonei eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat: kaalyeet eng' kipsengwet, ak liilindo eng' ole toroor miising'." 
Luke19:39 Ak ki leenji Pharisaik alage che po tuiyet ineendet, Kaneetindoni, kergong' kasubiguk." 
Luke19:40 Ak ki wolji koleenji, “Amwaiwok ale, ngot kosiisyo chu, koboldos koik.”" 
Luke19:41 Ak kingo riik, kogeer nganaseet ak koriirchi," 
Luke19:42 koleen, Nda kengen eng' peetuuni, agot inyee, tuguuk che po kaalyeet! Ago nguno ko kagoung'ogis eng' konyeguk." 
Luke19:43 Amu tuun pwonjinin peetuusyek che teechei puuniguk irimeet koyiemin komoswek tugul, ak kogerchin ko eng' komosta age tugul," 
Luke19:44 ak kowiirchin ng'wony, ak lagoguk che mi oriing'ung'; ama pagaagun agot koita agenge ne mi paragutap age; amu ki ma inai peetuutap rutochineng'ung'." 
Luke19:45 Ak ki wo Hekaluut oriit, ak kotoi koon komanda che ki aldaisyei," 
Luke19:46 koleenji icheek, Ki kisir keele, Egu koonnyu kootap saaet: ago kaoyai koek kebeneetap rebiik." 
Luke19:47 Ak ki ineetisyei peetuut age tugul eng' Hekaluut. Ago ki cheeng' tisiik che eecheen ak siriik ak che taagunotiin eng' piik, kobar ineendet:" 
Luke19:48 ak ma nyoor kiit ne ki imuuchi koyai; amu ki epchin iit piik tugul ineendet miising'. 
Luke20:1 Ak ye ki ineeti piik eng' peetuut age eng' Hekaluut, ak koamdoi logoiywek che myach, kobwonji ineendet tisiik che eecheen ak siriik kobooto poisyek koche ineendet;" 
Luke20:2 ak ki mwachi ineendet koleenji, “Mwaiwech; iyae tuguuchu kimnateetap ng'oo? Ak ko ng'oo ne kigoonin kimnatoni?”" 
Luke20:3 Ak ki wolji koleenji, “Ateebenok agane teebut; ak omwaiwo:" 
Luke20:4 Kabatisaneetap Johana ko ki punu kipsengwet, anan ki punu piik?”" 
Luke20:5 Ak ki ng'alaaljigei icheegei, kole, “Ngot kemwa keele, Ki punu kipsengwet; komwa kole, Ko kilya si moyan ineendet?" 
Luke20:6 Ago ngot kemwa keele, Ki punu piik; kolachech piik tugul eng' koik: amu ki iyani icheek kole, ki maotyo Johana.”" 
Luke20:7 Ak ki wol kole, “Ma kingen ole ki punu.”" 
Luke20:8 Ak ki leenji `Jeso icheek, “Agot anee koma mwaiwok kimnateet ne ayae tuguuchu.”" 
Luke20:9 Ak ki toi komwachi piik kalewenoni, kole: Kimin chii sabibuk eng' mbar, ak komanakyi meek, ak kwo emet age kotebi peetuusyek che chaang'." 
Luke20:10 Ak kingo it peetuut koyookyi otwogindet meechooto, si kobiit kogoochi icheek ineendet logoegap mbaranooto: ago kibir meek ineendet ak koon kwo puch." 
Luke20:11 Ak ki iyookto kogeny otwogindet age: ak kibir nooto agine, ak koteweer, ak koon kwo puch." 
Luke20:12 Ak ki iyookto kogeny ne po somok: ak ki iguoten agine ak kotoorchi saang'. 
Luke20:13 Ak ki le chiitap ko po mbareet, Ayai nee anyun? Ayooktoi weeriinnyu chamanennyu: tamangap kogonyit ineendet." 
Luke20:14 Ago ye kingo keer meek ineendet, kong'alaaljigei icheegei, kole, Niito ne tuun punjin tuguuk: ongebar anyun, si kindii tuguuk." 
Luke20:15 Ak ki toorta komanda eng' mbareetap sabibuk ak kobar. Itoi nee anyun chiitap ko po mbareet pichooto? 
Luke20:16 Nyoonei anyun ineendet ak kobar meechooto tugul, ak kogoochi piik alak mbareetap sabibuk. Ak ye kingo kas icheek, komwa kole, “Achicha, mat koek ko uu nooto.”" 
Luke20:17 Ak ki ichiilji kong' icheek ak kole, “Nee anyun ne ki kisir keele, ‘Koita ne ki eesyo teegik, Ki kiyai nooto koek metitap luuita?’" 
Luke20:18 Ak chii age tugul ne ibutyin koyata koilei konyaknyagansei; ak ineendet ne ibutyin koyata, konyirnyiraksei.”" 
Luke20:19 Ak ki cheeng' siriik ak tisiik che eecheen konam ineendet eng' sainooto; ak ki iywei icheek piik: amu ki nai kole mwaei kalewenoni agobo icheek. 
Luke20:20 Ak kiriibooti icheeget ineendet ak koyookto segeik, che ki yaigei koek che po imanda, si kobiit koname ineendet ng'aleekyik, si kogoito ineendet kwo taitap pounateet ak kimnateetap pounindet." 
Luke20:21 Ak kiteebe ineendet kole, “Kaneetindoni, kingen keele imwae ak ineetisyei eng' iman, ago metiytiy chii, ak ineeti iman ooreetap Kamuktaindet:" 
Luke20:22 Tos chamdoi ng'atuutik kigoochi kodi Caesarea, anan achicha?”" 
Luke20:23 Ago ki nai ng'aalseennywa, ak koleenji icheek," 
Luke20:24 Oboorwo dinarit, Po ng'oo itooni ak siruutik che tinyei? Ak ki le, po Caesarea." 
Luke20:25 Ak ki leenji icheek, Ogoochi Caesarea tuguuk che po Caesarea, ak ogoochi Kamuktaindet tuguuk che po Kamuktaindet." 
Luke20:26 Ak ki ma imuuch koname mwaonooto eng' taitap piik; ak ki kwong'yo eng' waluunennyi, ak ki siisyo." 
Luke20:27 Ak ki pwanji ineendet `Sadukaik alak, icheeget che mwaei kole, ma mi ng'eetyeet; ak kiteebe ineendet," 
Luke20:28 kole, “Kaneetindoni, kisirwech Musa, kole, ‘Ngo me ng'eetap kam, ago tinyei osotyot, ne tomo kosich lakwa, kondii ng'eetap kam osotyondonooto, si kolalji ma ng'eetap kam.’" 
Luke20:29 Ki mi anyun weeriik tisabu che kitupcho: ak kiitunis ne po tai, ak kime ama ki sich lakwa;" 
Luke20:30 ak ki indi ne po aeng'; 
Luke20:31 ak uu nooto ne po somok; ak ki igei nooto tugul ko tisap, ki pek ama sich lakwa." 
Luke20:32 Ak kingo pata kome agine kobogoryondonooto. 
Luke20:33 Tuun eng' ng'eetyeet anyun koegu osotyotap ng'oo eng' icheek? Amu kiitun icheek tugul ko tisap.” 
Luke20:34 Ki leenji `Jeso icheek, “Itunisyei weeriitap peetuusyechu, ak kogoitoi kitun:" 
Luke20:35 ago che kiityin keele nyoljin konyoor peetuusyechooto pwoonei, ak ng'eetyeet eng' che ki pek, koma tuun itunisyei, ama kigoitoi kitun:" 
Luke20:36 amu ma komuuchi kobek agoi: amu kergeitu ak malaikaisyek; ak icheeget ko weeriigap Kamuktaindet, amu weeriitap ng'eetyeet." 
Luke20:37 Ago ng'eetos che ki kobek, amu ki iboor Musa agine eng' siruutik che tiliileen. Ye ki kisir agobo timdo ne kilolei, ye kiguure Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindetap Abraham, ak Kamuktaindetap Isak, ak Kamuktaindetap Jakobo." 
Luke20:38 Ineendet koma Kamuktaindet ne po che ki kobek, ago po che saptos; amu saptos tugul eng' ineendet.”" 
Luke20:39 Ak ki wolji siriik alak koleenji, “Kaneetindoni, kaimwa komyee.”" 
Luke20:40 Amu ki mata kogany icheek koteebe ineendet teebut age tugul kogeny. 
Luke20:41 Ak ki leenji icheek, Teptoi ano si komwaei icheek kole, “Kristo ko weeriitap Daudi?" 
Luke20:42 Amu ki mwa Daudi ineendet eng' bukuitap Tyenwogigap Kalasunet, kole, ‘Ki leenji Kiptaiyat Kiptaiyandennyu, Tebee eunnyu ne po tai," 
Luke20:43 Agoi ayai puuniguk koek ng'echereetap keelyeguk.’ 
Luke20:44 Kuuree anyun Daudi ineendet Kiptaiyat, koegundoi ano anyun weeriinnyi?”" 
Luke20:45 Ak ki mwachi kasubikyik kogasei piik tugul koleenji," 
Luke20:46 Oriipkei eng' siriik, che chamei kobendat kolaachi ngoroik che kooen, ak kochamei kagatosyek eng' ole kiyae mung'aaret, ak ng'echerok che po tai eng' sinagogisyek, ak oldinwek che po tai eng' igoorwek;" 
Luke20:47 ak korebe mosoogik kooriikwak, ak kosaaei saautik che kooen kong'aalsei: tuun nyooru chuuto kirwooget ne oo kosiir." 
Luke21:1 Ak ki keer `Jeso mogoreek kondai kagoochinoikwak ole kiyumjin 
Luke21:2 ak kogeer mosoget age ne kibanania kondai sendeisyek aeng' che mengech. 
Luke21:3 Ak ki le, Amwaiwok iman ale, Kagonde mosogani panan che siirei cho tugul:" 
Luke21:4 amu kagonde chu tugul eng' chaang'indonywa ole kindoi kagoochinoik; ago kagonde ineendet eng' panandanyi tugul che tinyei, agot che kosabe." 
Luke21:5 Ak kingo ta kong'alaali alak agobo Hekaluut, ole ki kimusaganda eng' koik che korooron ak kagoochinoik, kole," 
Luke21:6 Eng' tuguuchu ogeere, ko tuun pwoonei peetuusyek, che ma ng'etunee koita agot agenge paragutap age, ne ma tuun ki wiirchin ng'wony." 
Luke21:7 Ak kiteebe, kole, “Kaneetindoni, egu anyun tuguuchuuto auyo? Ak uu nee kaboorunet ye tuun machei koriik kosulda tuguuchuuto?”" 
Luke21:8 Ak ki le, Oriipkei si ma kibeetook: amu tuun pwoonei piik che chaang' eng' kainennyu, koleen, Aa ineendet; ak, Kagoriik peetuusyek: amosup icheek." 
Luke21:9 Ak ye tuun ogas agobo lugoosyek ak chemargeet, ko matoaragense: amu kanyool kosip kosulda tuguuchooto korook; ago tomo koriik kagesunet." 
Luke21:10 Koleenji anyun icheek, Tuun setyin pororyet age pororyet age, ak setyin laitornatet age laitornatet age:" 
Luke21:11 ak kobiit potanosyek che eecheen che po ng'wony, ak rubosyek eng' oldinwek alak, ak korotwek; ak kobiit kamuisosyek ak kaboorunoik che eecheen che punu kipsengwet." 
Luke21:12 Ago ye tomo kobiit chuuto, konamak eng' eunekwak, ak kousok, ak komutak obe sinagogisyek ak korgorosyek, komutak taitap laitorinik ak pounik agobo kainennyu." 
Luke21:13 Egu paornateet eng' okweek. 
Luke21:14 Oegu che pegechinotin eng' mugulelwekwok, si mosip ogereer met agobo ole owolundoi:" 
Luke21:15 amu agoonok kutit ak utaatyet, ne ma imuuchi puunikwok tugul kota kowol kiy anan kogirindaak." 
Luke21:16 Ak kong'wektak sigiikwok, ak che otupche, ak che po oreng'wong', ak choronok; ak kebar alak eng' okweek." 
Luke21:17 Ak kowechok piik tugul agobo kainennyu. 
Luke21:18 Ak ma petei sumeiyot agenge ne po metowekwok. 
Luke21:19 Ak eng' muitaeng'wong' onyooru saboonwekwok. 
Luke21:20 Ak ye tuun ogeer lugoosyek koyiem Jerusalem, onai anyun ole, kagoriik ng'emisyennyi." 
Luke21:21 Ingomwechi anyun che mi Judea tuloonook; ak ingomanda che mi kwenutap nganasanooto; ak amat kota koba oriit icheek che mi emonooto. 
Luke21:21 Ingomwechi anyun che mi Judea tuloonook; ak ingomanda che mi kwenutap nganasanooto; ak amat kota koba oriit icheek che mi emonooto. 
Luke21:22 Amu chuuto ko peetuusyegap mugetuut, si kobiit kosulda tuguuk tugul che ki kisir." 
Luke21:23 Pwo eng' icheek che chiioo ak che tinyei lagok che reritos eng' peetuusyechooto! Amu piitu pichiindo ne oo eng' ng'wony, ak nereeknateet eng' pichuuto." 
Luke21:24 Ak kobutyo icheek eng' ng'atibindap rotwetap chok, ak kimut luulenik koba pororyosyek tugul: ak kotyech Pororyosyek Jerusalem, agoi kosulda peetuusyegap Pororyosyek." 
Luke21:25 Ak kobiit kaboorunoik eng' asiista ak eng' arawet ak eng' kecheik; ak kobiit eng' ng'wony pichiindap pororyosyek, ak peng'jinet amu kamuutetap araraita ak peek che mildogei;" 
Luke21:26 ak kobek mugulelwegap piik amu kaiyweisyet, ak amu kagenisyetap tuguuk che pwaanjin ng'wony: amu kitumdumi kimnatosyegap kipsengwet." 
Luke21:27 Ak eng' peetuunooto kogeer anyun Weeriitap chii konyonei eng' pooldet kobooto kimnateet ak liilindo ne oo. 
Luke21:28 Ak ye toi kosulda tuguuchuuto, ogeer parak, ak oyot metowekwok; amu kariik katyageng'wong'." 
Luke21:29 Ak ki mwachi icheek kalewenet; kole, “Ogeer mogoywet, ak keetiik tugul:" 
Luke21:30 ye ing'atyo ogeere ak onae okweek ole, kariik kesisyet." 
Luke21:31 Uu nooto anyun ak okweek, ye ogeer koyaagiis tuguuchuuto, onai ole kariik laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Luke21:32 Amwaiwok iman ale, Masiirtoi ibini, agoi kosulda tuguuk tugul." 
Luke21:33 Siirtoi kipsengwet ak ng'wony: ago ma koi siirto ng'aleekyuk. 
Luke21:34 “Ago oriipkei anyun okweek, si ma nyi mugulelwekwok keiyandit, ak pogitet, ak kaimutigap sabeetap peetuusyechu, ak konyonjok peetuunooto kocheak ko uu mesteet:" 
Luke21:35 amu uu nooto tuun nyoonjin piik tugul che menyei ng'wony komugul. 
Luke21:36 Ago oriipkei eng' peetuut age tugul, ak osaae, si kobiit oterteerisye, ochilile tuguuchuuto tugul pwoonei, ak otononse eng' taitap Weeriitap chii.”" 
Luke21:37 Ak ki ineetisyei eng' Hekaluut peetuut age tugul; ak kimandoi kemout age tugul, kowendi kotebyei eng' tulweet ne kiguure tulweetap Mseituni." 
Luke21:38 Ak kimusyin piik tugul ineendet eng' Hekaluut, si kobiit kogas ineendet." 
Luke22:1 Ki riik anyun igoorto ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, ne kiguure Paska." 
Luke22:2 Ak ki cheeng' tisiik che eecheen ak siriik ole partoi ineendet; amu ki iywei icheek piik. 
Luke22:3 Ak kichut Setani Judas ne kiguure Iskaryot, ne ki age eng' taman ak aeng'." 
Luke22:4 Ak ki wo kong'alaal ak tisiik che eecheen ak kiptainik, ole ng'wektochindoi ineendet icheek." 
Luke22:5 Kiboiboitu anyun pichooto, ak kochamyechi kogoochi ineendet fedhaisyek." 
Luke22:6 Kocham anyun ineendet ak kocheeng' poroindo kong'wekyi ineendet icheek eng' ole ma mi piik che chaang'. 
Luke22:7 Ak kiit anyun peetuut ne po magatiinik che ma kinde mermereek, peetuut ne ki kanyool koeny aarwetap paska." 
Luke22:8 Ak ki iyookto Petero ak Johana, kole, “Oba ochobwech paska, si kobiit keam.”" 
Luke22:9 Ak ki leenji, “Imache keebe kechop eng' ano?”" 
Luke22:10 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Ogeero, ye omong'ji nganaseet, kotuiyenok chiito ne ibei tereetap peek; osup ineendet agoi koot oriit ole wendi." 
Luke22:11 Ak omwachji chiitap ko po koot, oleenji, ‘Kateebenen Kaneetindet, kole, Mi ano kootap toek, ole anyoone aame paska kobooto kasubikyuk?’" 
Luke22:12 Koboorwok anyun koot ne oo ne mi parak ne tetotin tuguuk: ochop eng' olooto.” 
Luke22:13 Ak ki pa anyun, ak konyoor ko uu ye kagagemwachi: ak ki chop paska." 
Luke22:14 Ak ye kingo it sait, kotep ng'wony, kobooto che kiyooktoi." 
Luke22:15 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Eng' mageet ko koamach aam paskaini kobootok kotom anyalil;" 
Luke22:16 amu amwaiwok ale, kobooch nguno koma aame agoi kosulda eng' laitornatetap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Luke22:17 Ak ki taach kigombet, ak kingo kagogoito kongoi, kole, “Onam ni, ak opchechigei;" 
Luke22:18 amu amwaiwok ale, kobooch nguno koma aee che po logoegap sabibuk, agoi koit laitornatetap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Luke22:19 Ak ki nam magatyat, ak kingo kagomwa kongoi, kobuutul, ak kogoochi icheek, ak kole, “Ni ko poortanyu ne kigoitoi agobo okweek; oyae ko uu ni si obwaatena.”" 
Luke22:20 Ko uu nooto kigombet agine, kingo kagobata amitwogik che po lagat, kole, “Kigombani ko arorutyet ne leel ne po korotiikyuk, che kitumdoi agobo okweek." 
Luke22:21 “Ago ogeero, ineendet ne ng'wektoo ko mi eunnyi kobooto eng' mesani." 
Luke22:22 Amu wendi Weeriitap chii iman, ko uu ye ki king'at; ago pwo eng' chiichooto ng'wektoi ineendet!”" 
Luke22:23 Ak ki toi anyun koteebegei icheegei, kole ng'oo eng' icheek ne yaei kii." 
Luke22:24 Ki ng'eet anyun tiyet eng' kwenunnywa, kole ng'oo ne kiiti keele ne oo eng' icheek." 
Luke22:25 Ak ki leenji icheek, Laitorani laitorinik eng' Pororyosyek: ak icheeget che tinyei pounateet eng' icheek keguure Toretik." 
Luke22:26 Ago, ma uu nooto eng' okweek: ago ingoigei ne oo eng' okweek ne ming'in; ak ineendet ne oo koigei ne otisyei." 
Luke22:27 Ng'oo ne oo anyun, ineendet ne tebyei eng' amisyet, anan ineendet ne otisyei? Tos ma ineendet ne tebyei eng' amisyet? Ago ami kwenung'wong' ko uu chiito ne otisyei." 
Luke22:28 Ago okweek ko oo che ki otebi kobooto eng' yoomsosyekyuk; 
Luke22:29 ak kaagoonok laitornatet, ko uu ye kigogoono Abba," 
Luke22:30 si kobiit oamisye ak koeise mesennyu eng' laitornatennyu, ak tuun otebee ng'echerok che po laitornatet, orwookyini ortinwek taman ak aeng' che po Israel." 
Luke22:31 Simion, Simion, keero, kagosoom Setani kole konamak, si kosesak ko uu nganuuk:" 
Luke22:32 ago ki asaa agobo inyee, si ma pek kayaneng'ung': ak ye kaiwalage, igimit che otupche." 
Luke22:33 Ak koleenji ineendet, Kiptaiyat, kaachoboge keebe tuwai korgoreet agot meet." 
Luke22:34 Ak ki mwa kole, “Amwaun Petero, kotom koote kipsoiywet rani, ieesyoa konyil somok ile, mengeno.”" 
Luke22:35 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Kinga yootok ko motinye agot lolet, anan suberet, anan kweonik, ko tos kirarta kiy eng' okweek?” Ak ki le, “Ma rarwech kiy.”" 
Luke22:36 Ak ki leenji, “Ago ineendet ne tinyei lolet koibot nguno, ak uu nooto suberet agine: ak ineendet ne ma tinyei rotwetap chok, koalda ngoryennyi, si koale." 
Luke22:37 Amu amwaiwok ale, kiit ne ki kisir ko kanyool kosulda eng' anee, keele, Ki kiit ineendet kobooto kiptengeginik: amu tinyei kagesunet ng'aleek che ki kisir agobo anee.”" 
Luke22:38 Ak ki le, “Kiptaiyat, keero, mi yu rotoogap chok aeng'u.” Ak ki leenji icheek, “Kagoyam.”" 
Luke22:39 Komong' saang' anyun, ak kwo agoi tulweetap Mseituni, ko uu piteennyi; ak ki isup kasubik ineendet." 
Luke22:40 Ak ye kingo kagoit olooto, koleenji icheek, Osaa si mochut yoomseet." 
Luke22:41 Ak ki istoegei icheek ye tee ye itei koita ngewiirta; ak kigutuny kosa," 
Luke22:42 kole, “Abba, ngot igeer ak icham, iistoena kigombani: ma ko uu magennyu ago ingoyaak ko uu mageng'ung'.”" 
Luke22:43 Ak ki mong'ji ineendet malaikaiyat ne ki punu kipsengwet kogimit ineendet. 
Luke22:44 Ak ye ki mi ineendet nyalilda ne ng'waan, kotes kosa miising': ak ki kergeitu kaotikyik ak korotiik che sachin ng'wony." 
Luke22:45 Ak kingo ng'eet eng' saaennyi, konyo ole mi kasubikyik, ak konyoor koruitos amu arageneet," 
Luke22:46 ak ki leenji icheek, “Kalya si oruiye? Ong'eetyee, osaa, si mochut yoomseet.”" 
Luke22:47 Ak kingo ta ko ng'alaali, ogeero, tuiyet, kobooto ineendet ne kiguure Judas, age eng' taman ak aeng', ki indoune icheek; ak koriikyi ineendet Jeso si kong'utut." 
Luke22:48 Ago ki leenji Jeso, Judas, ing'wektoi Weeriitap chii eng' ng'ututet?" 
Luke22:49 Ak kingo keer che ki mi kobooto ineendet kiit ne machei koyaak, kole, “Kiptaiyat, ki ep eng' rotwetap chok?”" 
Luke22:50 Ak ki ep age eng' icheek otwogindetap tisiindet ne oo, ki ep iitinnyi ne po tai." 
Luke22:51 Ago ki wolji Jeso koleenji, “Omete; kagoyam.” Ak kitwa itinnyi, kosoop." 
Luke22:52 Ak ki leenji `Jeso tisiik che eecheen, ak kiptainigap Hekaluut, ak poisyek che kigabwa kogirinda ineendet, Kobwa ak rotoogap chok ak kirokweek, ko uu ye obwanjini rebindet?" 
Luke22:53 Ye ki ami kobootok peetuut age tugul eng' Hekaluut, koma oyogocha eunekwok: ago saing'wong' ni, ak kimnateet ne po mesundeito." 
Luke22:54 Ki nam anyun ineendet ak komut kwo kootap tisiindet ne oo. Ak ki isubi Petero eng' ye loo. 
Luke22:55 Ak ye kiga kolal maat eng' kok, kotep ng'wony tugul, ak ki tebee Petero kwenunnywa." 
Luke22:56 Ak kingo keer chepto age ineendet kotebyei eng' ye mi lapkeiyetap maat, kochiilji kong' ineendet, kole, “Ki mi chiichi agine kobooto ineendet.”" 
Luke22:57 Ago ki tiiyo, kole, “Kobogoryondoni, mangen ineendet.”" 
Luke22:58 Ak ne matya kogeer chiito age ak koleenji, “Ii agenge aginye eng' icheek.” Ak ki le Petero, “Chiichi, ma po pichooto.”" 
Luke22:59 Ak ye kingo keskei olo po sait agenge, kole chiito age eng' kimnateet, Iman ki mi chiichi agine kobooto ineendet: amu Galiilindet ineendet." 
Luke22:60 Ago ki le Petero, “Chiichi, mangen cho imwae.” Ak kota komwaei, koote kipsoiywet sainooto." 
Luke22:61 Ak ki welelgei anyun Kiptaiyat, ak kogeer Petero. Ak ki ibwaat Petero ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat, ko uu ye kagagomwachi, kole, “Kotom koote kipsoiywet rani, ieesyoa konyil somok.”" 
Luke22:62 Ak kimanda saang', kwo koriir eng' ng'wanindo." 
Luke22:63 Ak kichombil `piik Jeso che kinamei ineendet ak kobir. 
Luke22:64 Ak ki tuch konyekyik, ak koteebe, kole, “Ng'orse: ng'oo ne kamasin?”" 
Luke22:65 Ak ki mwa ng'aleek alak che chaang' che yaacheen agobo ineendet, kochurachuri ineendet." 
Luke22:66 Ak kingo kagoeech, koyumgei poisyegap pichooto, tisiik che eecheen ak siriik; ak ki imut ineendet kwo kapkirwoogennywa, kole," 
Luke22:67 Ngo ii Kristo, imwaiwech. Ago ki leenji icheek, Agot ndamwaiwok, ko moyani:" 
Luke22:68 ak ngot ateebenak, ko mowolu." 
Luke22:69 Ago kobooch nguno kotebee Weeriitap chii eutap tai ne po kamuktaet ne po Kamuktaindet. 
Luke22:70 Ak ki le icheek tugul, Tos ii Weeriitap Kamuktaindet anyun? Koleenji icheek, Omwae ole aa ineendet." 
Luke22:71 Ak ki le icheek, Ta kemage nee paornateet age? Amu kagegas acheeget eng' kutinnyi." 
Luke23:1 Ki ng'eetyo anyun tuiyet komugul, ak komutyi ineendet Pilato." 
Luke23:2 Ak ki toi anyun kotaam ineendet, kole, “Ki kinyooru chiichi komaasi pororyennyo, ak koetei kigoochi Caesarea kodi, ak komwaei ineendet kole, ‘Aa Kristo laitoryat.’ ”" 
Luke23:3 Ak kiteebe ineendet Pilato, kole, “Ii laitoryatap Yahudik?” Ak ki wolji kole, “Kaimwa.”" 
Luke23:4 Ak ki leenji Pilato tisiik che eecheen ak tuiyosyek, “Ma anyoorchi lelutyet chiichi.”" 
Luke23:5 Ago ki isimji miising', kole, Ki inde chaamset piik, koneetoti eng' Judea komugul, kotoune Galilaya agoi koit oli." 
Luke23:5 Ago ki isimji miising', kole, Ki inde chaamset piik, koneetoti eng' Judea komugul, kotoune Galilaya agoi koit oli." 
Luke23:6 Ago kingo kas Pilato ng'olyoondonooto, koteep kole, “Tos Galiilindet chiichi?”" 
Luke23:7 Ak kingo nai kole po pounateet ne po Herod, koyookto kimutyi Herod, ne ki mi agine Jerusalem peetuusyechooto." 
Luke23:8 Kingo keer Herod Jeso, kobaibait miising': amu kimachei kobooch keny kogeer ineendet, amu kiga kogas tuguuk che chaang' agobo ineendet; ak kimachei kogeer kwang'utyet age koyaak eng' ineendet." 
Luke23:9 Ak kiteepse ineendet eng' ng'aleek che chaang'; ago ma wolji kiy. 
Luke23:10 Ak kitonondos tisiik che eecheen ak siriik, ak kotaam ineendet eng' kimnateet." 
Luke23:11 Ak ki iming'in ineendet Herod ak asigarikyik, ak kochombil, ak kolaakyi ngoryeet ne karaaran miising' ak koweekyi Pilato kogeny." 
Luke23:12 Ak ki ek choronoi Herod ak Pilato eng' peetuunooto: amu kita kosurtos icheegei eng' tai. 
Luke23:13 Ki kuur anyun Pilato tisiik che eecheen ak pounik kobooto piik kobwa tugul," 
Luke23:14 ak ki leenji icheek, “Komutwaa chiichi ak komwa ole imaasi piik: ak ogeero, kaateebe aneendet eng' taing'wong', ak ma anyoorchi chiichi lelutyet eng' ng'aleechooto otaame ineendet:" 
Luke23:15 achicha, agot Herod agine; amu kaweekwech ineendet; ak ogeero, ma yai kiy ineendet ne nyoljin meet." 
Luke23:16 Nooto anyun, abire ineendet, ak yeityo atyach.”" 
Luke23:17 Amu ki ng'atuutyet kotyakyi agenge eng' peetuutap igoorto. 
Luke23:18 Ago ki polyo tugul, kole, “Iste chiichi, ak ityakwech Barabbas:”" 
Luke23:19 ne kiga kitoorchi korgoreet, amu chaamset ne ki yai eng' nganaseet, ak rumisyet." 
Luke23:20 Ak ki ng'alaalji Pilato icheeget kogeny, komachei kotyach Jeso;" 
Luke23:21 ago ki polyo icheek, kole, “Igartaat eng' kimurtoiyot, igartaat ineendet eng' kimurtoiyot.”" 
Luke23:22 Ak ki mwachi icheek ne po somok, koleenji, “Kalya, nee yaityet ne ki yai chiichi? Ma anyoorchi ng'olyoot ineendet ne nyoljin kome: nooto anyun abire ineendet si atyach.”" 
Luke23:23 Ago ki tes kobolyo miising', komachei kole kigartaat. Ak ki iterteeris kutusweekwak." 
Luke23:24 Ak kitil anyun Pilato kirwooget koyaak ko uu ye kimach icheek. 
Luke23:25 Ak ki ityaach ineendet ne kiga kitoorchi korgoreet agobo chaamset ak rumisyet, ne kagagosoom icheek; ago ki igoito `ineendet Jeso si kobiit koyachi ko uu ye kimachei." 
Luke23:26 Ak kingo ta komuti ineendet, konam Simion, Kurenindet, ne ki punu kooret age, ak kosutyi kimurtoiyot, si kobiit koip kosubi Jeso." 
Luke23:27 Ak ki isubi tuiyet ne oo ne po piik, kobooto kobogorisyek che ki iteiyoti ak koriirchinoti ineendet." 
Luke23:28 Ago kiweleljigei Jeso icheek koleenji, “Tiibiigap Jerusalem, amorirye agobo anee, ago oriirchigei, ak lagokwok." 
Luke23:29 Amu, ogeero, pwoonei peetuusyek, che tuun leen icheek, iberuurotin che soon ak mootinwek che ma iiyo, ak kinaik che ma kireri." 
Luke23:30 Yeityo kotoi icheek koleenji tuloonook, Oluuljech; ak koleenji tuloonook che mengech, Otuchech." 
Luke23:31 Amu ngot koyai tuguuchu eng' keetit ne tuon, koteptoi ano anyun eng' ne yaamaat?”" 
Luke23:32 Ak ki miitei kiptengeginik aeng'u, che ki kimuti kobooto ineendet, koba kebar." 
Luke23:33 Ak kingo it ye kiguure Terta, ko yooto ole ki kigartate ineendet ak kiptengeginichooto, age eng' komostap tai ak age eng' komostap kaataam." 
Luke23:34 Ak ki le Jeso, Abba, nyochi kaat icheek; amu ma nai kiit ne yaei. Ak kipchechigei ngoroikyik, eng' seretap parbareek." 
Luke23:35 Ak kitonondos piik kogeerei. Ak kororechi ineendet pounik kole, Kisaru alak; ingosargei ibak ngo Kristo niito, ne lewenot ne po Kamuktaindet." 
Luke23:36 Ak kichurochur ak icheek kiplugotinik ineendet, kobwanei ye mi ineendet, kogoochin siki," 
Luke23:37 koleen, Ngo ii Laitoryatap Yahudik, isarugei." 
Luke23:38 Ak ki mi siruutik metinnyi parak, che mwaei koleen, NI KO LAITORYAT NE PO YAHUDIK." 
Luke23:39 Ak kichurachur ineendet age eng' kiptengeginichooto kiga kigartaat, kole, “Tos ma ii Kristo inyee? Sarugei ak isarwech ak acheek.”" 
Luke23:40 Ago ki wol age, ak koger kong' kole, “Meiywei Kamuktaindet, agot inyee, ak imi kagikyinonooto?" 
Luke23:41 Ago po iman nenyo; amu kagigoonech ko uu poisyonikyok: ago ma yai chiichi kiy ne ma nyolu.” 
Luke23:42 Ak ki le, “Jeso, ibwaata ye tuun inyone eng' laitornateng'ung'.”" 
Luke23:43 Ak ki leenji `Jeso ineendet, Amwaun iman, ale, Kitebye tuwai rani eng' Paradiso." 
Luke23:44 Ak ki olo po sait lo, koimenit emet komugul agoi sait sogool," 
Luke23:45 ak ki ma kota kooluu asiista: ak kigereer kwenutap angeet ne kiga kioiye Hekaluut. 
Luke23:46 Ak kitwek Jeso eng' kutit ne oo, kole, “Abba, kande saboondanyu euneguk: ak kingo kagomwa ni, kogoito saboondonyi.”" 
Luke23:47 Ak kingo keer chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol tuguuk che kayaagiis, kolas Kamuktaindet kole, “Koga po iman chiichi.”" 
Luke23:48 Ak kingo keer tuguuk che kayaagiis tuiyosyek tugul che kiga koyumgei si korat setyo, koweigei kolugotegei tegetik." 
Luke23:49 Ak kitonondos eng' ye loo tugul che ki ingengei, ak kobogorisyek che ki isubu ineendet kobunu Galilaya, kole si kogeer tuguuchuuto." 
Luke23:50 Ak ogeero, chiito ne ki kiguure Joseph, chiitap kapkirwook, chiito ne myee, ak ko po imanda" 
Luke23:51 (ak ki ma kochamei chiichooto kirwoogennywa ak poisyennywa), ki po Arimatea ineendet, nganaseet ne po Yahudik, ne ki igeni agine laitornatetap Kamuktaindet:" 
Luke23:52 ki wo chiichito ole mi Pilato, kwo kosoom poortap Jeso." 
Luke23:53 Kochoor konyo ng'wony, ak kotaae angeet ne po katanit, ak konde kererit ne ki kibal rwandet, ne kitom ketupchi chii." 
Luke23:54 Ak ki peetuutap Chobeet, ak kiga riik sabato." 
Luke23:55 Ak ki isubu kobogorisyek, che kigabwa kobooto ineendet kobunu Galilaya, ak kogeer kererit, ak ole ki kindoitoi poortanyi." 
Luke23:56 Ak ki weigei, koba kochop nyamdutik ak mwanik. Ak ki imuuny eng' peetuutap sabato ko uu ng'atuutyet." 
Luke24:1 Ak eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po wigiit, ko kaeech emet, kobwa kererit, koibu nyamdutik che kiga kochop." 
Luke24:2 Ak kinyoor ko kagemilda koita eng' kererit. 
Luke24:3 Ak ki pa oriit, amanyoor poortap Kiptaiyat Jeso." 
Luke24:4 Ak kingap kagereer met agobo nooto, ogeero, kitonondos eng' ye neegit icheek murenik aeng'u che tinyei ngoroik che liilei piich:" 
Luke24:5 ak kingo iyweis, kong'uruuk, kotiing'e togoochikwak ng'wony, koleenji icheek, Amu nee si ocheeng'e ne sabei eng' ye mi che ki kobek?" 
Luke24:6 Ma komi yu, ago kagong'eet: obwaat kiit ne kimwaiwok kota komi Galilaya," 
Luke24:7 koleen kanyool kinde eunegap piigap tengek Weeriitap chii, ak kigartaat, ak kong'eet eng' peetuutap somok." 
Luke24:8 Kobwaat anyun ng'aleekyik," 
Luke24:9 ak koweektagei eng' kererit, ak komwachi taman ak agenge, ak chuun tugul alak." 
Luke24:10 Ki Maria Magdalene, ak Joana, ak Maria kametap Jakobo, ak kobogorisyek alak che ki mi kobooto icheek, che ki mwachi che kiyooktoi tuguuchooto." 
Luke24:11 Ak ki keer pichooto ng'aleechooto ko uu tangoi; ak ki ma iyan icheek. 
Luke24:12 Ago king'eet Petero, ak kolabat kererit; ki ing'uruuk koiit oriit, kogeer ngoroik icheegei; ak kwo, kokwong'oti agobo tuguuk che kagoyagis." 
Luke24:13 Ak ogeero, kibendi aeng'u eng' icheeget peetuunooto nganaseet age ne kiguure Emmaus, ne ki pandap maelisyek tisap ak nusu kong'etee Jerusalem." 
Luke24:14 Ak ki ng'alaaljinotigei agobo ng'aleechuuto tugul koyaagiis. 
Luke24:15 Ak kingo ta kong'alaaljinotegei ak koteebegei, koriikyi Jeso icheek ak koba tugul." 
Luke24:16 Ago kigerogis konyekwak si ma nai ineendet. 
Luke24:17 Ak ki leenji icheek, Nee ng'aleechu omwachinotige okweegei obendi? Ak kitononso, kosiiriny togoochikwak." 
Luke24:18 Ak ki wolji age eng' icheek, ne keguure Kleopa, koleenji, “Tos ii too inyee eng' Jerusalem si menai tuguuk che koyaagiis eng' olooto eng' peetuusyechu?”" 
Luke24:19 Ak ki leenji icheek, Nee tuguuchooto? Ak ki leenji, “Tuguuk che kiyaak agobo Jeso ne po Nazareth ne ki maotyot ne kiim eng' poisyet ak ng'olyoot eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ak eng' piik tugul:" 
Luke24:20 ak ko uu ole ki igoito tisiik che eecheen ak pounikyok si kirwookyi kirwooget ne po meet, ak kigartaat." 
Luke24:21 Ago kogimang'u keleen ineendet ne ityaachi Israel. Ee, ak kobooto chooto tugul ko peetuutap somok rani kobooch ngap kobata ng'aleechuuto." 
Luke24:22 Ak kagoonech kobogorisyek alak che kagimi tugul kekwong', che kagamusta kererit;" 
Luke24:23 ak ye kamata konyoor poortanyi, kobwa, kole, kamong'ji icheek malaikaisyek, che kamwa kole, sabei ineendet." 
Luke24:24 Ak kaba alak kererit che kami kobootech, konyoor ko uu nooto ko uu ye kagamwa kobogorisyek: ago ma keer ineendet.”" 
Luke24:25 Ak ki leenji anyun pichooto, “Ee, che perberen ak ko tamusen mugulelwek kot ko mata koyan tuguuk tugul che ki mwa maotik!" 
Luke24:26 Ki ma nyoljin Kristo konyalil eng' tuguuchu, si komong'ji toroornatennyi?”" 
Luke24:27 Ak ki toi kobooch Musa ak maotik tugul, ak ki iarorchi icheek eng' siruutik tugul ng'aleek agobo ineendet." 
Luke24:28 Ak kingo riikta nganaseet ole kibendi koigei ineendet ne machei kosiirto. 
Luke24:29 Ak ki isimji, kole, “Tebi kobootech: amu kariikta koimen, ak machei koratarat.” Ak ki wo ko kotebi tugul." 
Luke24:30 Ak ye kingo kagotebi ng'wony tugul koamisyei, konam magatyat, koberuur, kobuutul, ak kogoochi icheek." 
Luke24:31 Ak ki yaatagis konyekwak, ak konai ineendet; kobetito eng' tainnywa." 
Luke24:32 Ak ki leenjigei icheegei, Tos kama lal maat eng' mugulelwekyok, yu kang'alaalwech eng' ooreet, kong'ang'wech siruutik?" 
Luke24:33 Ak ki ng'eetyo eng' sainooto, koweektagei Jerusalem, ak ki nyoor taman ak agenge ko katuiyo, ak che ki mi kobooto icheek," 
Luke24:34 kole, “Kang'eet Kiptaiyat iman, ak kang'aang'jigei Simion.”" 
Luke24:35 Ak ki mwachi ng'aleek che kayaak eng' ooreet, ak ko uu ye kagonyit ineendet kobuutuli magatyat." 
Luke24:36 Ak kingo ta komwaei tuguuchu, kotonon ineendet eng' kwenunnywa, ak koleenji icheek, Ingotep kaalyeet eng' okweek." 
Luke24:37 Ago ki aragenso ak koiyweis, ak kileen kageer tamirmir." 
Luke24:38 Ak ki leenji icheek, Koaragenji nee? Ak amu nee si kong'eetyo kererwegap met eng' mugulelwekwok?" 
Luke24:39 Ogeer eunekyuk ak keelyekyuk, ole aa ineendet: osapsaba, ak ogeer; amu ma tinyei `tamirmiryo poor ak kaawo, ko uu yu ogeere atinye." 
Luke24:40 Ak ye kiga komwa ni, koboorchi eunekyik ak keelyekyik." 
Luke24:41 Ak kingo tomo koyan icheek amu poiboiyet, ak kwong'eet, koleenji, Otinye eng' yu kiy ne ki amei?" 
Luke24:42 Ak ki igoochi kebebertap njiryot ne kagibeel. 
Luke24:43 Ak ki nam ak koam eng' tainnywa. 
Luke24:44 Ak ki leenji icheek, Chu ko ng'aleekyuk che ki kamwaiwok, ye kingo ta ami kobootok, ko uu ye kanyool kosulda tuguuk tugul, che ki kisir eng' Ng'atuutik che po Musa, ak eng' maotik, ak eng' tyenwogigap kalasunet, agobo anee." 
Luke24:45 Koyaat anyun ng'omnootosyekwak, si kobiit konai siruutik;" 
Luke24:46 ak ki leenji icheek, Ki kisir ko uu nooto, keele, nyoljin Kristo konyalil, ak kong'eet kogeny eng' che ki kobek eng' peetuutap somok;" 
Luke24:47 ak keamdaat eng' pororyosyek tugul siguunet ak nyoetap kaat ne po tengekwogik eng' kainennyi, ki taune Jerusalem." 
Luke24:48 Oo paorinigap tuguuchuuto. 
Luke24:49 Ak ogeero, ayoogu kayomisetap Abba kotebi eng' okweek: ago otebi okweek eng' nganaseet, agoi kilaakwok kimnateet ne punu parak." 
Luke24:50 Ak ki indochi icheek agoi koit Bethania: ak ki namji parak eunekyik, ak koberuur icheek." 
Luke24:51 Ak kingo ta koberuuri icheek, kobesyegei anyun, ak ki kimut kwo kipsengwet." 
Luke24:52 Ak ki ilas ineendet ak koweektagei Jerusalem eng' poiboiyet ne oo: 
Luke24:53 ak ki mi kotugul Hekaluut, kolasu Kamuktaindet." 
John1:1 Eng' taunet ko ki mi Ng'olyoot, ak ki mi Ng'olyoot ak Kamuktaindet, ak Ng'olyoot ko ki Kamuktaindet." 
John1:2 Ki mi ineendet ak Kamuktaindet eng' taunet. 
John1:3 Ki kiyai tuguuk tugul eng' ineendet; ak ma mi kiy agot agenge ne ki piit ama eng' ineendet. Kiy ne ki yaak 
John1:4 eng' ineendet ko ki saboondo, ak saboonooto ko ki lapkeiyetap piik," 
John1:5 ak iluu lapkeiyet eng' mesundeito; ak ma iterteer `mesundeito lapkeiyonooto. 
John1:6 Ki nyo chii ne ki iyook Kamuktaindet, ne ki kiguure Johana." 
John1:7 Ki nyo chiichooto koek paoryat, si kobaoryanji lapkeiyet, si kobiit koyan piik tugul amu ineendet." 
John1:8 Ki ma ko lapkeiyonooto ineendet, ago ki nyo si kobaoryanji lapkeiyonooto." 
John1:9 Ki mi lapkeiyet ne po iman, ne nyoonei ng'wony, ne iluuchin chii tugul." 
John1:10 Ki mi ng'wony ineendet, ak ki kiyai ng'wony eng' ineendet, ak ki ma nai `ng'wony ineendet." 
John1:11 Ki nyoonji chechiik, ak ki ma taach ineendet `piikyik." 
John1:12 Ago tugul che kitaach ineendet, ko ki igoochi kamuget koek lagogap Kamuktaindet, icheek che iyani kainennyi," 
John1:13 che ki kisich ama eng' korotiik, anan eng' mageetap poorto, anan eng' mageetap chii, ago eng' Kamuktaindet." 
John1:14 Ak ki ek Ng'olyoot poorto ak komeny kwenunnyo (ak ki kigeer toroornatennyi, toroornatet ne uu ne po ne ki kisich ineegei kobunu Kwanda), ko nyiitaat myeeindo ak imanit." 
John1:15 Ki paoryanji ineendet `Johana, koititen kole, “Ineendet ni ne ki amwaitoi ale, ‘Ineendet ne isubwo koegu ne po tai eng' anee, amu ki po tai ineendet eng' anee.’ ”" 
John1:16 Amu ko ki kitaach acheek tugul che po nyiennyi, ak myeeindo eng' myeeindo." 
John1:17 Amu ki kigoon ng'atuutyet eng' Musa; konyo myeeindo ak imanit eng' Jeso Kristo. 
John1:18 Ma mi chii ne ki keer Kamuktaindet ole kigoi; kigong'ang'wech Kamuktaindet Weeriit ne ki kisich ineegei, ne mi tegetap Kwanda." 
John1:19 Ak ni ko paornateetap Johana, ye kingo yook `Yahudik Tisiik ak Lawiik eng' Jerusalem koba koteebe kole, “Ii ng'oo inyee?”" 
John1:20 Ak ki ng'aany ineendet, ama tiiyo; ki ng'aany kole, “Ma aa Kristo anee.”" 
John1:21 Ak kiteebe ineendet kole, “Ara ii ng'oo anyun? Ii Elijah?” Ak ki le, “Ma aa ineendet.” “Ii maotyondonooto?” Ak ki wol kole, “Achicha.”" 
John1:22 Ki leenji anyun ineendet, “Ii ng'oo inyee? Si kobiit kewolji che koiyookwech. Imwae nee agobo inyegei?”" 
John1:23 Ki le, “Aa kutitap chii ne ititeni eng' surkwen, ‘Olitit ooreetap Kiptaiyat,’ ” ko uu ye ki mwa maotyot Isaiah." 
John1:24 Ak icheeget che ki kiyok ko ki po Pharisaik. 
John1:25 Ak kiteebe ineendet, koleenji, “Kalya anyun si ibatisanisyei, ngo ma ii Kristo, anan Elijah, anan maotyondonooto?”" 
John1:26 Kowolji Johana pichooto koleenji, “Abatisanisye peek: ago tononi eng' kwenung'wong' age ne mongen," 
John1:27 ineendet ne isubwo, ne ma nyoljino atyach anoogap kweonikyik.”" 
John1:28 Kiyaogis tuguuchuuto eng' Bethania Jordan komosin, ole ki ibatisanisye Johana." 
John1:29 Eng' peetuut ne po aeng' kogeer `Johana Jeso konyonjin, ak kole, “Ogeero, Aarwet ne po Kamuktaindet, ne ibei tengektap ng'wony!" 
John1:30 Ineendet ni ne ki amwa ale, ‘Isubwo chiito ne egu ne tai eng' anee amu ki po tai eng' anee.’" 
John1:31 Ak ki ma angen anee ineendet; ago si kobiit kibarta ineendet eng' Israel, ki anyoo anyun amu nooto abatisane peek.”" 
John1:32 Ak kibaoryan Johana, kole, “Ki ageer Kabuuset ne Tiliil kochoorugei eng' kipsengwet ko uu cheptuget; ak kotebee ineendet." 
John1:33 Ak ki ma angen ineendet: ago ineendet ne ki iyookwo abatisane peek, ko ineendet ne kimwaiwo koleenjo, ‘Chiichooto igeere kochorchingei Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak koteebee ineendet, ko nooto ne ibatisane Kabuuset ne Tiliil.’" 
John1:34 Ak ki ageer, ak ki abaoryan ale niito ko Weeriitap Kamuktaindet.”" 
John1:35 Kogeny eng' peetuut ne ki isubu peetuunooto, ko kitononi Johana, ak aeng' che po kasubikyik;" 
John1:36 ak ki keerot `ineendet Jeso kowendoti, ak kole, “Ogeero, Aarwet ne po Kamuktaindet!”" 
John1:37 Ak ki kas chooto aeng' che po kasubikyik kong'alaali ineendet, ak koosup Jeso." 
John1:38 Ak kiwelelgei Jeso, ak kogeer icheek kosubu, ak koleenji, “Ocheeng'e nee?” Ak ki leenji ineendet, “Rabbi (ye kiweech keele, Kaneetindet), imenye ano?”" 
John1:39 Koleenji icheek, “Obwa si ogeer.” Ki pwa anyun kogeer ole menyei, ak ki tebi kobooto ineendet peetuunooto; ki olo po sait taman." 
John1:40 Ki Andrea, ne tupcho ak Simion Petero, age eng' chooto aeng' che kigasei kong'alaali Johana, ak ki isup ineendet." 
John1:41 Ki sip konyoor Simion ne tupcho, ak koleenji, “Kagenyooru Mesia” (ye kiweech, ko Kristo)." 
John1:42 Ki imutyi `ineendet Jeso. Ki keer `Jeso ineendet ak kole, “Ii Simion weeriitap Johana. Ta keguurenen Kepa” (ye kiweech, ko Petero)." 
John1:43 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi ko kimach anyun Jeso kwo Galilaya. Ki nyoor `ineendet Philipu ak koleenji, “Isubwo.”" 
John1:44 Ki punu Philliph Bethsaida, nganaseet ne po Andrea ak Petero." 
John1:45 Ki nyoor `Philipu Nathanael ak koleenji, “Kagenyooru ineendet ne ki sir Musa eng' Ng'atuutyet ak kosir maotik, nooto Jeso ne po Nazareth weeriitap Joseph.”" 
John1:46 Ak ki leenji `Nathanael ineendet, “Tos imuuchi kobun Nazareth kiy age tugul ne myee?” Koleenji `Philipu ineendet, “Nyoo si igeer.”" 
John1:47 Kingo keer `Jeso Nathanael konyonei ole mi ineendet, ak komwa agobo ineendet kole, “Ogeero, Yahudyot iman, ne ma tinyei ng'aalseet!”" 
John1:48 Koleenji `Nathanael ineendet, “Kenaena nee?” Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Kageerin, ye kemi mogoywet keel, kotom koguurin Philipu.”" 
John1:49 Kowolji Nathanael kole, “Rabbi, ii Weeriitap Kamuktaindet; ii Laitoryatap Israel!”" 
John1:50 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Iyani amu kamwaun ale, kaagerin ye kemi mogoywet keel? Tatun igeere tuguuk che eecheen che siirei chu.”" 
John1:51 Ak ki leenji, “Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, tatun ogeere kipsengwet koyatoksei, ak kotogostoi malaikaisyek che po Kamuktaindet ak kochoorchigei Weeriitap chii.”" 
John2:1 Eng' peetuut ne po somok ko ki mi katunisyet eng' Kana ne po Galilaya; ak ki mi olooto kametap Jeso. 
John2:2 Kiga kiguurchi katunisyet Jeso agine kobooto kasubikyik. 
John2:3 Ye kingo rar divaik, koleenji `kametap `Jeso ineendet, “Ma kotinyei icheek divaik.”" 
John2:4 Ak ki leenji `Jeso ineendet, “Chebyosoni, kiting'egei nee ak inyee? Tom koit sainnyu.”" 
John2:5 Koleenji kamet otwogik, “Kiy age tugul ne kamwaiwok, oyai.”" 
John2:6 Ak ki mi olooto tereenik lo che eecheen che po peek, che po koik, ko uu piteetap katiliiletap Yahudik; kiyamei age tugul debeisyek muut anan ko lo." 
John2:7 Koleenji `Jeso icheek, “Onyiit peek tereenichooto.” Ki inyiit anyun miising'." 
John2:8 Ak ki leenji, “Osiilu nguno, ak oipchi pounindetap igoorto.” Ak ki ipchi anyun." 
John2:9 Ak ye kingo chamcham pounindetap igoorto peek che kagoek divaik, ama nai ole kabunu (ago ki ingen otwogik che kasiilei peek), koguur pounindonooto sandet," 
John2:10 ak koleenji, “Igoitoi chii tugul divaik che myach korook; ak ye kagoee piik miising', kogoon che ma myach: kaigonor divaik che myach agoi nguno.”" 
John2:11 Taunet niito ne po kaboorunoikyik ne ki yai Jeso eng' Kana ne po Galilaya, ak ki iboortoi toroornatennyi; ak ki iyan ineendet kasubikyik." 
John2:12 Kingo pata niito, kochoortagei Kapernaum, kobooto kamet, ak che tupcho, ak kasubikyik: ak kibeni olooto peetuusyek che matya." 
John2:13 Ak kiga riik paska ne po Yahudik, ak kitogosta Jeso Jerusalem." 
John2:14 Ak kinyoor kotebyei eng' Hekaluut che ki aldoi eiik ak keechiirek ak cheptugenik, ak woliigap silingisyek:" 
John2:15 ak ki yai kipchoritiit ne po rogoonik che ki sach, ak koon tugul komanda eng' Hekaluut, kobooto keechiirek ak eiik; ak koranda silingisyek che po walik, ak kogabui mesosyekwak;" 
John2:16 ak ki leenji icheeget che ki aldoi cheptugenik, “Oip tuguuchu koba eng' oli; amoyai kootap Abba koek ole kiyae mung'aaret.”" 
John2:17 Ki ibwaat anyun kasubikyik kole ki kisir keele, “Ama ng'etkonda agobo koong'ung'.”" 
John2:18 Ki wolji anyun Yahudik koleenji, “Iboorwech kaboorunet ngoro, amu iyae tuguuchu?”" 
John2:19 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Ong'em hekaluni, si ang'eet kogeny eng' peetuusyek somok.”" 
John2:20 Ki le anyun Yahudik, “Ki kiteech hekaluni eng' kenyiisyek artam ak lo, ak ing'eeti inyee eng' peetuusyek somok?”" 
John2:21 Ago ki ng'alaali ineendet agobo Hekaluut ne nooto ko poortanyi. 
John2:22 Ye kingi ng'eet anyun ineendet komong' eng' che ki pek, kobwaat kasubikyik kole kiga komwa ng'olyoondoniito; ak ki iyan siruutyet, ak ng'olyoot ne ki kamwa Jeso." 
John2:23 Ye ki mi Jerusalem eng' paska, komi igoorto, koyan piik che chaang', kainennyi, kogeerei kaboorunoikyik che ki yai." 
John2:24 Ago ki ma chamdagei Jeso, amu ki ingen piik tugul," 
John2:25 ak amu ki ma komage kiy chii ne paoryani agobo chii age; amu ki ingen ineendet kiit ne mi chii oriit. 
John3:1 Ki mi chii ne po Pharisaik, ne ki kiguure Nikodemo, ki pounindet ne po Yahudik:" 
John3:2 ki nyo chiichooto ole mi ineendet kemoi, ak koleenji, “Rabbi, kingen keele ii kaneetindet ne punu Kamuktaindet: amu ma mi chii ne imuuchi koyai kaboorunoichu iyae inyee, ngo ma mi Kamuktaindet kobooto ineendet.”" 
John3:3 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Amwaun, iman, iman, ale, ngot koma ki sich chii eng' sigeet ne leel, koma koi imuuch kogeer laitornatetap Kamuktaindet.”" 
John3:4 Koleenji `Nikodemo ineendet, “Kisiktoi ano chii ye kagoosit? Imuuchi kogetyigei moetap kamet kogeny, ak kesich?”" 
John3:5 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Amwaun, iman, iman ale, ngot koma ki sich chii eng' peek ak Kabuuset ne Tiliil, koma koi imuuch komong'ji laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
John3:6 Ne ki kisich eng' poorto ko poorto; ak ne ki kisich eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ko kabuuset. 
John3:7 Amekwong' amu kamwaun ale, ‘Kanyool kesichok eng' sigeet ne leel.’" 
John3:8 Usyin koristo ole machei, ak igase cheennyi, ago mengen ole punu, anan ole wendi. Ara uu nooto chii age tugul ne kagisich eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil.”" 
John3:9 Kowolji Nikodemo koleenji, “Imuuchi kobiitunda ano tuguuchu?”" 
John3:10 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Ii kaneetindetap Israel, ameguitosi tuguuchu?" 
John3:11 Amwaun, iman, iman, ale kimwae ne kingen, ak kebaoryanjini ne kagegeer; amotaache paornatennyo." 
John3:12 Ngamwaiwok tuguuk che po ng'wony, amoyani, omuktoi ano oyan ngamwaiwok tuguuk che po kipsengwet?" 
John3:13 Ma mi chii ne ki togosta kipsengwet, kobatee ineendet ne ki choorgei eng' kipsengwet, ineendet ko Weeriitap chii ne mi kipsengwet." 
John3:14 Ak ko uu ye ki igartaat Musa ereneet eng' surkwen, kigartoti ko uu nooto Weeriitap chii matiny:" 
John3:15 si konyoor saboondap koigeny eng' ineendet age tugul ne iyani. 
John3:16 Amu ki cham Kamuktaindet ng'wony miising', kot kogoito Weeriinnyi ne ki kisich ineegei, si ma lus age tugul ne iyani ineendet, ago si konyoor saboondap koigeny." 
John3:17 Amu ki ma iyookyi `Kamuktaindet Weeriit ng'wony korwookyi ng'wony; ago si kesar ng'wony eng' ineendet.” 
John3:18 Ma kirwookyin chii ne iyani ineendet: ago ineendet ne ma iyani, ko kagirwookyi, amu ma iyan eng' kainetap Weeriitap Kamuktaindet ne ki kiii ineegei." 
John3:19 Ak ni kirwooget, amu ki nyoonji ng'wony lapkeiyet, ak ki cham piik mesundeito kosiir lapkeiyet; amu ki yaach poisyonikwak." 
John3:20 Amu wechei lapkeiyet chii tugul ne yaei yaityo, ama nyoonei ineendet ole mi lapkeiyet, si ma ng'ang'agis poisyonikyik." 
John3:21 Ago nyoonei ole mi lapkeiyet ineendet ne yaei imanda, si kobiit kibarta poisyonikyik, keele ki kiyai eng' Kamuktaindet." 
John3:22 Kingo pata tuguuchu konyo Jeso ak kasubikyik emet ne kiguure Judea; ak kibeni olooto kobooto icheek, ak kobatisanis." 
John3:22 Kingo pata tuguuchu konyo Jeso ak kasubikyik emet ne kiguure Judea; ak kibeni olooto kobooto icheek, ak kobatisanis." 
John3:23 Ak ki ibatisanisyei Johana agine eng' Aenon ne neegitee Salim, amu ki mi peek che chaang' olooto; ak ki pwa piik, ak ki kibatisan." 
John3:24 Amu kitom ketoorchi Johana korgoreet. 
John3:25 Ki piit anyun teebutyet eng' alak che po kasubigap Johana ak Yahudyot agobo katiliilet. 
John3:26 Ak ki pwanji Johana, ak koleenji, “Rabbi, ibatisanisyei ineendet ne ki mi kobooten eng' Jordan komosin, ne ki ibaoryan agobo ineendet, ak pwaanjin ineendet `piik tugul.”" 
John3:27 Kowol Johana kole, “Ma koi imuuch chii kotaach kiy, ngo ma kigoochi eng' kipsengwet." 
John3:28 Ki obaoryanjo okweeget ole ki amwa ale, ‘Ma aa Kristo’, ago oleen ki kiyokwo andoune ineendet." 
John3:29 Sandet ineendet ne tinyei murereet: ago paibai miising' chorweetap sandet, ne tononi koepchin iit ineendet, amu kutitap sandet: isuldaat anyun poiboiyoninyu." 
John3:30 Nyoljin ineendet koeet ne matiny, ago aming'initu.”" 
John3:31 Oo ineendet ne punu parak kosiir tugul: ineendet ne po ng'wony ko po ng'wony, ak ng'alaali che po ng'wony: ineendet ne punu kipsengwet ko oo kosiir tugul." 
John3:32 Paoryanjin ineendet kiit ne ki kogeer ak ne ki kogas; ama mi chii ne taachei paornatennyi. 
John3:33 Ineendet ne kagotaach paornatennyi ko kagonde ng'ooksennyi, kole po iman Kamuktaindet." 
John3:34 Amu ng'alaali ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet ineendet ne ki iyoogu Kamuktaindet; amu ma koonu ineendet Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' karagendoet. 
John3:35 Chamei Kwanda Weeriit, ak ki konde tuguuk tugul eunnyi." 
John3:36 Tinyei saboondap koigeny ne iyani Weeriit; ama keerei saboondo ne ma kase iit Weeriit, ago tebee nereegegap Kamuktaindet paragunnyi." 
John4:1 Ye kingo nai Kiptaiyat kole ki kogas Pharisaik kole ki yaei `Jeso piik koek kasubik ak kobatisani che siirei che ki ibatisan Johana 
John4:2 (ago ma Jeso ineendet ne ki ibatisanisyei, ago kasubikyik)," 
John4:3 kong'eet eng' Judea, kwo kogeny Galilaya." 
John4:3 kong'eet eng' Judea, kwo kogeny Galilaya." 
John4:4 Ak ki kanyool kobun Samaria. 
John4:5 Ki it anyun nganaseet ne po Samaria, ne kiguure Sykar, ne neegitee kooret ne ki igoochi Jakobo weeriinnyi Joseph:" 
John4:6 ak ki mi olooto keriingetap peek ne po Jakobo. Kitebyei anyun Jeso eng' ye neegitee keriingetap peek, amu ng'etatetap pandanyi. Ki olo po sait lo." 
John4:7 Ki nyo kobogoryot ne po Samaria kosiil peek: koleenji Jeso, Inaga aee." 
John4:8 Amu kigaba kasubikyik nganaseet koal amitwogik. 
John4:9 Ki leenji anyun kobogoryot ne po Samaria, Katepto ano si isooma peek che iee, ak inyee ko ii Yahudyot, ak anee ko aa kobogoryotap Samaria? (Amu ma namegei Yahudik ak Samarik.)" 
John4:10 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Nda kengen konunetap Kamuktaindet, ak ineendet ne kalenjin, ‘Inaga peek aee,’ ta kaisoom ineendet, ak ta kagogoonin peegap saboon.”" 
John4:11 Koleenji kobogoryot, Kiptaiyat, metinye kiit ne isiile, ak loo keriinget: inyoorchini ano anyun peechooto po saboon?" 
John4:12 Ii oo inyee eng' kwandanyo Jakobo, ne ki koonech keriingoni, ne kiee ineendet ak weeriikyik, ak tuukyik?" 
John4:13 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Age tugul ne eei peechu kota koamei melel kogeny:" 
John4:14 ago age tugul ne eei peek che agoochini koma koamei melel agoi; ago egu peek che agoochini kondap peek eng' ineendet, che kuutu agoi saboondap koigeny.”" 
John4:15 Koleenji kobogoryot, Kiptaiyat, inaga peechooto, si ma koama melel, si ma anyoone asiile peek eng' oli loo." 
John4:16 Koleenji Jeso kobogoryondonooto, Ui, iguur manong'otyondeng'ung', ak obwa yuto." 
John4:17 Kowolji kobogoryot koleenji, “Ma tinyei manong'otyot.” Koleenji Jeso, “Kaimwa komyee ile, ‘Ma tinye manong'otyot’," 
John4:18 amu ki otebi ak manong'otaik muut; ak ineendet ne omi tuwai nguno koma manong'otyondeng'ung': kaimwa anyun iman niito.” 
John4:19 Koleenji kobogoryot, Kiptaiyat, kaageer ale ii maotyo." 
John4:20 Ki saaei kwanisyekyok eng' tulwooni; ak oleen okweek, Jerusalem ole kanyool kosaae piik." 
John4:21 Koleenji Jeso, Kobogoryondoni, iyana, nyoonei sait, ye ma kosaae Kwanda eng' tulwooni, anan eng' Jerusalem." 
John4:22 Osae ne mongen: kisaae acheek ne kingen: amu punu yetunet Yahudik. 
John4:23 Ago nyoonei sait, ak kagoit nguno, ye saaei Kwanda saaik che po iman eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak imanit: amu cheeng'oti Kwanda che uu chooto koek che saaei ineendet." 
John4:24 Kamuktaindet ko kabuuset: ak kanyool kosa ineendet eng' kabuuset ak imanit che saaei ineendet. 
John4:25 Koleenji kobogoryot, Angen ale nyoonei Mesia (ne keguure Kristo): ye nyo ineendet, komwaiwech tuguuk tugul." 
John4:26 Koleenji Jeso, Aa ineendet ne ang'alaalun." 
John4:27 Ki pwa anyun kasubikyik; ak ki kwong'yo amu ki ng'alaali ak kobogoryot; ago ma mwachi chii kole, “Icheeng'e nee? Anan, Kalya si ong'alaal ak ineendet?”" 
John4:28 Ki pagaakta anyun kobogoryot tereennyi po pei, ak kwo nganaseet, ak komwachi piik koleenji," 
John4:29 Obwa ogeer chiito ne kamwaiwo tuguuk tugul che ki ayai atkinye kora: tos Kristo niito? 
John4:30 Ki mong' anyun eng' nganaseet kobwa ole mi ineendet. 
John4:31 Kingo ta kobwanei, kosoom kasubikyik, kole, “Rabbi, amisye.”" 
John4:32 Ago ki leenji icheek, “Atinye amitwogik che aame che mongen.”" 
John4:33 Koleenjigei anyun kasubikyik, “Tos kagoipchi chii kiy ne amei?”" 
John4:34 Koleenji Jeso, “Amitwogikyuk ko ayai mageetap ineendet ne ki iyookwo, ak ageesu poisyennyi." 
John4:35 Momwae okweek ole, ‘Ta komi arawek ang'wanu, si koit kesisyet?’ Ogeero, amwaiwok ale, ‘Ong'eet met, ak ogeer mbareenik ole kagoleelagitu, kagoyam keges." 
John4:36 Ineendet ne kesei kotaachei melekto, ak koyumi logoek che po saboondap koigeny; si koboiboitu tuwai ne koolei ak ne kesei." 
John4:37 Amu po iman mwaoni eng' ni, kolei age, kogesei age." 
John4:38 Ki ayooktook oges che ki ma onyalilji: kigonyalilji alage, ak kaonam okweek uuindap poisyennywa.’ ”" 
John4:39 Ki iyan anyun ineendet Samarik che chaang' che po nganasanooto amu ng'olyootap kobogoryot, ne kibaoryan kole, “Kamwaiwo tuguuk tugul che ki ayai atkinye kora.”" 
John4:40 Nooto anyun, ye kingo pwanji ineendet `Samarik, kosoom kole kotebi kobooto icheek; ak ki peni olooto peetuusyek aeng'." 
John4:41 Ak ki iyan alak che chaang' amu ng'olyoondennyi; 
John4:42 ak ki leenji kobogoryot, “Kiyani nguno, ma amu ng'alaaleng'ung': amu kagegasyige; ak kingen iman keele niito ko Yetindetap ng'wony.”" 
John4:43 Ak kingo pata peetuusyechooto aeng'u kong'eet eng' olooto kwo Galilaya. 
John4:44 Amu kibaoryan Jeso ineendet kole, “Ma tinyei maotyondo teegisto eng' emennyi.”" 
John4:45 Ak kingo nyo anyun Galilaya, kotaach ineendet piigap Galilaya, ko kagogeer tuguuk tugul che ki yai ineendet eng' Jerusalem eng' igoorto: amu kigaba ak icheek igoorto." 
John4:46 Ki nyo anyun ineendet kogeny Kana ne po Galilaya, ole kiyae peek koek divaik. Ak ki mi kiboityot age ne po kaplaitoryat, ne ki myani weeriinnyi eng' Kapernaum." 
John4:47 Ye kingo kas kole kagomong' Jeso eng' Judea konyo Galilaya, kwo ole mi ineendet, ak ki soom kochoorgei, kosoop weeriinnyi; amu ki neegit kome." 
John4:47 Ye kingo kas kole kagomong' Jeso eng' Judea konyo Galilaya, kwo ole mi ineendet, ak ki soom kochoorgei, kosoop weeriinnyi; amu ki neegit kome." 
John4:48 Koleenji anyun `Jeso ineendet, Ngot ko mogeer kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik, koma koi oyan matiny." 
John4:49 Koleenji kiboityondonooto, Kiptaiyat, chooruge kotom kome lakweennyu." 
John4:50 Koleenji `Jeso ineendet, Ui inyee; sabei weeriing'ung'. Koyan anyun chiichooto ng'olyoot ne kamwachi Jeso, ak kwo." 
John4:51 Ak ye kita kochoortagei, kotuiyo ak otwogikyik, ak koleenji, Sabei weeriing'ung'." 
John4:52 koteebee anyun kole kogaigaitu kotya. Koleenji anyun pichooto ineendet, Kobagaakta eseet ineendet amut sait tisap." 
John4:53 Konai anyun kwanda kole ko sainooto ne komwachin Jeso koleenjin, Sabei weeriing'ung': ak ki iyan ineendet ak koonnyi komugul." 
John4:54 Nooto kaboorunet ne po aeng' ne ki yai Jeso kobooch ngo mong' eng' Judea konyo Galilaya. 
John4:54 Nooto kaboorunet ne po aeng' ne ki yai Jeso kobooch ngo mong' eng' Judea konyo Galilaya. 
John5:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu kobiit igoorto ne po Yahudik; ak kotogosta Jeso Jerusalem. 
John5:2 Ak miitei Jerusalem tamboiyot, ne kainennyi ko Betesda eng' kutitap Yahudik, ye neegitee ormariichetap keechiirek; ki tinyei keterusyek muut." 
John5:3 Ki ruitos eng' olooto piik che chaang' che ki myandos: che koryotiin, che ing'waldos, ak che meiyotiin poorwek, [kogeni wasetap peek:" 
John5:4 amu ki chorchingei malaikaiyat ne po Kiptaiyat tamboiyot peetuusyek alak, kowendi kowasei peek: si kisoop chii age tugul ne sip kochutei ko kawaskei peek, eng' myando age tugul ne ki tinyei.]" 
John5:5 Ak ki mi yooto chiito age, ne kiga komyan kenyiisyek sosom ak sisiit." 
John5:6 Ak ye kingo keer Jeso chiichooto koruei, ak konai kole ki uu nooto eng' peetuusyek che chaang', koleenji, “Imache kisaabin?”" 
John5:7 Kowolji chiito ne myani koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, ma tinye chii, ne indea tamboiyot, ko kawaskei peek: amu ye ta anyoone, kosip kochoortagei age.”" 
John5:8 Koleenji Jeso anyun, “Ng'eet, ip itogung'ung', ak iwe.”" 
John5:9 Ak kisop chiichooto koma tyanit, ak koip itogunnyi ak kwo. Ak ki sabato peetuunooto." 
John5:10 Ki leenji anyun Yahudik ineendet ne kagisoop, “Peetuutap sabato niito, ma chamdaat eng' ng'atuutik iip itogung'ung'.”" 
John5:11 Ago ki wolji icheek koleenji, “Kamwaiwo ineendet ne kagosaaba, koleenjo, ‘Ip itogung'ung', ak iwe.’ ”" 
John5:12 koteebee anyun pichooto ineendet kole, “Ng'oo chiichooto kamwaun kole, ‘Ip itogung'ung' ak iwe?’ ”" 
John5:13 Ago ki ma nai ineendet ne kagisoobi kole ka ng'oo: amu kiga kwo Jeso, amu ki mi piik che chaang' olooto." 
John5:14 Kingo pata nooto konyoorchi Jeso ineendet Hekaluut, ak koleenji, Keero, kagisaabin: amatata iyai tengek, si ma nyoonjin kiit age ne ya ne siirei ni." 
John5:15 Ki wo anyun chiichooto, ak komwachi Yahudik kole Jeso ne kagosoop ineendet." 
John5:16 Ki us anyun Yahudik Jeso amu ng'olyoondoniito, amu ki yai tuguuchu eng' peetuutap sabato." 
John5:17 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji, “Poisyei Abba agoi kora, ak aboisyei agane.”" 
John5:18 Ki cheeng' anyun Yahudik miising' kole kobar ineendet amu niito, amu ki ma pistoe sabato kityo, ago mwaei kole Kamuktaindet Kwandanyi, koyaegei kogergeit ak Kamuktaindet." 
John5:19 Ki wolji anyun Jeso icheek koleenji, “Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, ‘Ma yaei kiy Weeriit ineegei, ago ne keerei koyaei Kwanda: amu tuguuk tugul che yaei ineendet, koyaei chooto agine Weeriit ko uu nooto." 
John5:20 Amu chamei Kwanda Weeriit, ak koboorchin tuguuk tugul che yaei ineendet: ak ta koboorchin poisyonik che eecheen che siirei chu, si kobiit okwong'ye." 
John5:21 Amu ko uu ye ing'eeti Kwanda che ki kobek ak kosoobi, isoobi Weeriit ko uu nooto agine che machei." 
John5:22 Amu ma irwookyin Kwanda chii age tugul, ago Ki kogoochi Weeriit kirwooget tugul;" 
John5:23 si kobiit koteech tugul Weeriit, ko uu ye teechei Kwanda. Ineendet ne ma teechei Weeriit koma teechei Kwanda ne ki iyook ineendet.’ ”" 
John5:24 “Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, Ineendet ne kasei ng'olyoondennyu, ak koyani ineendet ne ki iyookwo, kotinyei saboondap koigeny, ama wendi ole mi kirwooget, ago kagomong' eng' meet komong'ji saboondo." 
John5:25 Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, Nyoonei sait, ak kagoit, ye kas che ki kobek kutitap Weeriitap Kamuktaindet; ak saptos icheeget che kasei." 
John5:26 Amu ko uu ye tinyei Kwanda saboondo ineegei, uu nooto Ki kogoochi Weeriit kotepto saboondo:" 
John5:27 ak ki igoochi kimnateet koyai kirwooget, amu Weeriitap chii ineendet." 
John5:28 Amokwong'ee niito: amu nyoonei sait, ne tuun kasei kutinnyi tugul che mi kereeriisyek," 
John5:29 ak komong'; ng'eetyin saboondo che kiyaei ne myee; ak kong'eetyi kirwooget icheeget che kiyaei ne ya.” 
John5:30 Ma muuchi ayai kiy aneege: arwoochi ko uu ye agase, ak po iman kirwoogennyu; amu ma cheeng'e ayai magennyu, ago mageetap ineendet ne ki iyookwo." 
John5:31 Ngabaoryanjinigei, koma po iman paornatennyu." 
John5:32 Mi age ne paoryanjino; ak angen ale po iman paornateet ne paoryanjino. 
John5:33 Ki oyokyi ng'olyoot Johana, ak kibaoryanji imanda." 
John5:34 Ago paornateet ne ataache koma punu chii: ago amwae tuguuchu, si kobiit kesorwok." 
John5:35 Kitait ineendet ne kilalei kokweng'sei: ak ki ocham oboiboitune lapkeiyennyi eng' peetuusyek che matya. 
John5:36 Ago paornateet ne atinye ko oo kosiir ne po Johana: amu poisyonik che ki koono Kwanda agees, chooto che ayae, ko che paoryanjino, kole ki iyookwo Kwanda." 
John5:37 Ak kibaoryanjo Kwanda ineendet ne ki iyookwo. Tom ogas kutinnyi ole kinye kora, ak tomo ogeer itoondanyi." 
John5:38 Ama tebyei eng' okweek ng'olyoondennyi: amu moyani ineendet ne ki iyoogu Kamuktaindet. 
John5:39 Cham osyachi eng' siruutik, amu oleen otinye saboondap koigeny eng' chooto; ago chooto che paoryanjino;" 
John5:40 ago mochame obwanjo, si kobiit konyooru saboondo." 
John5:41 Mataache kalasunet eng' piik. 
John5:42 Ago angenok ale motinye chamyetap Kamuktaindet eng' oriing'wong'. 
John5:43 Ki anyoo eng' kainetap Abba, ama otaacha: ngo nyo age eng' kainennyi otaache ineendet." 
John5:44 Omuuchi eng' nee oyan, che otaagegei kalasunet, amocheeng'e kalasunet ne punu Kamuktaindet ne mi ineegei?" 
John5:45 Mo leen ang'ang'ndook eng' Kwanda: miitei age ne ng'ang'dook, Musa nooto, ne omang'u." 
John5:46 Amu nda ki koyan Musa, ta oyana; amu kisir agobo anee." 
John5:47 Ago ngo moyani siruutikyik, omuktoi ano oyan ng'aleekyuk?" 
John6:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu kwo Jeso pitet age ne po araraitap Galilaya, nooto ko araraitap Tiberia." 
John6:2 Ak ki isup ineendet tuiyet ne oo, amu ki keer kaboorunoik che ki yachi che myandos." 
John6:3 Ak kitogosta Jeso tulweet, kwo kotep ng'wony eng' olooto kobooto kasubikyik." 
John6:4 Ak kiga riik paska, igoorto ne po Yahudik." 
John6:5 Kingo ng'eet met anyun Jeso, kogeer tuiyet ne oo konyonjin ineendet, koleenji Philipu, Ki ale ano magatiinik si koam pichu?" 
John6:6 Kimwaei ni kotyeme ineendet: amu ki ingen ineendet kiit ne machei koyai. 
John6:7 Kowolji `Philipu ineendet koleenji, “Mayamei icheek magatiinik che po dinarisyek pogol aeng', si konyoor age tugul kitigin.”" 
John6:8 Koleenji ineendet age ne po kasubikyik, Andrea, ng'eetap kametap Simion Petero," 
John6:9 “Mi yu weeriit age, ne tinyei magatiinik muut che po sairi, ak njireenik aeng': ago yamei nee anyun chuuto eng' piik che tee chu?”" 
John6:10 Ki mwa Jeso kole, “Ochop piik kotep ng'wony.” Ak ki mi susweek che chaang' olooto. Ki ibuur anyun piik; ki olo po eliphuusyek muut murenjoto." 
John6:11 Ki nam anyun `Jeso magatiinik; ak kingo kagogoito kongoi, koropchi icheeget che kitebyei ng'wony; ak ko uu nooto ak icheek njireenik che tee che machei." 
John6:12 Ak ye kingo piyong'so, koleenji kasubikyik, “Oyum katuganik che kang'et, si ma pet kiy.”" 
John6:13 Koyum anyun katuganichooto, ak konyiit kereboonik taman ak aeng' katuganichooto po magatiinik muut che po sairi, che kang'etune icheeget che kaamisyei." 
John6:14 Ye kingo keer anyun pichooto kaboorunet ne kayai, kole, “Ni maotyot iman ne nyoonjin ng'wony.”" 
John6:15 Kingo nai Jeso kole neegit kobwa si konam ineendet eng' kimnateet, si koyai ineendet koek laitoryat, kwo kogeny tulweet ineegei." 
John6:16 Ak ye kingo ek koskoleny, kochoortagei kasubikyik koba araraita;" 
John6:17 ak ki laany moingetap peek, kolandae araraita koba Kapernaum. Ak kiga koimenit, ak kitom koit Jeso ole mi icheek." 
John6:18 Ak kiwasegei araraita amu kiusei usoonet ne oo. 
John6:19 Ye kingo kagoba anyun eng' araraita ole po maelisyek somok anan ko somok ak kebeber, kogeer Jeso kowendoti eng' araraita parak, ak koriikyin moinget: ak ki iyweis." 
John6:20 Ago ki leenji icheek, Anee; amoiywei." 
John6:21 Kocham anyun kotaach ineendet eng' moinget: ak ne matyaniit, koit moinget emet ole kibendi." 
John6:22 Kibetuut ne ki isubi nooto kogeer tuiyet ne kitononi eng' araraita pitoniin, kole ma mi moinget age olooto, kobatee agenge, ak ki ma laany Jeso moingonooto kobooto kasubikyik, ago ki pa kasubikyik icheegei" 
John6:23 (ago ki pwa moingonik alage eng' Tiberia ye neegitee kooret ole ki ame magatiinik ye kingo kagogoito Kiptaiyat kongoi): 
John6:24 Ye kingo keer tuiyet anyun kole ma mi Jeso olooto, anan kasubikyik, kolaany icheek moingonik, ak kobwa Kapernaum, kocheeng'onu Jeso." 
John6:25 Ak ye kingo nyoor ineendet eng' pitet age ne po araraita, koleenji, Rabbi, koinyone au oli?" 
John6:26 Kowolji Jeso icheek koleenji, “Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, Ocheeng'a, ma amu koogeer kaboorunoik, ago amu kooam magatiinik ak obiyong'se." 
John6:27 Amoboisye agobo amitwogik che pegu, ago oboisye agobo amitwogik che tebyei agoi saboondap koigeny, che koonok Weeriitap chii. Amu kigong'ooch ineendet Kwanda, ne ineendet ko Kamuktaindet.”" 
John6:28 Ki leenji anyun icheek ineendet, “Ki yai nee, si kobiit keyai poisyonik che po Kamuktaindet?”" 
John6:29 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Ni poisyetap Kamuktaindet, ale oyan ne ki iyoogu ineendet.”" 
John6:30 Ki leenji icheek ineendet anyun, “Nee kaboorunet ne iyae, si kegeer, ak kiyanin? Iyae nee?" 
John6:31 Ki am kwanisyekyok mana eng' surkwen; ko uu ye ki kisir keele, ‘Ki igoochi icheek magatyat ne punu kipsengwet koam.’ ”" 
John6:32 Koleenji anyun `Jeso icheek, “Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, ki ma ko Musa ne ki koonok magatyandanooto ki punu kipsengwet; ago koonok Abba magatyat ne po iman ne punu kipsengwet." 
John6:33 Amu magatyat ne po Kamuktaindet ko nooto choorugei eng' kipsengwet, ak kogoochi ng'wony saboondo.”" 
John6:34 Koleenji anyun `icheek ineendet, “Kiptaiyat, koonech magatyandaniito agoi.”" 
John6:35 Koleenji `Jeso icheek, “Aa magatyat ne po saboon: ineendet ne nyoonjino koma kasei rubeet agoi, ak ineendet ne iyana koma amei melel agoi." 
John6:36 Ago kaamwaiwok ale, koogeera, ama oyan." 
John6:37 Pwonjino tugul che koono Kwanda; ak ineendet ne nyoonjino koma oone matiny. 
John6:38 Amu ki achooruge eng' kipsengwet, ma si ayai magennyu, ago mageetap ineendet ne ki iyookwo." 
John6:39 Ak ni mageetap ineendet ne ki iyookwo, ale, eng' tugul che ki koono ineendet, koma petena agot agenge, ago tatun ang'eeti eng' peetuutap let." 
John6:40 Amu ni mageetap Abba, ale chii age tugul ne keerei Weeriit, ak koyan ineendet, konyooru saboondap koigeny; ak ang'eeti ineendet eng' peetuutap let.”" 
John6:41 Ki ing'unyng'ung'so anyun Yahudik, agobo ineendet, amu ki mwa kole, “Aa magatyat ne ki choorgei eng' kipsengwet.”" 
John6:42 Ak ki le, “Tos ma Jeso niito, weeriitap Joseph, ne kingen kwandanyi ak kamet? Amunee anyun si komwa kole, ‘Ki achooruge eng' kipsengwet?’ ”" 
John6:43 Kowolji Jeso anyun koleenji, “Among'unyng'ung'se okweegei eng' okweegei." 
John6:44 Ma imuuchi chii konyoonjo, ama ichuut Kwanda ne ki iyookwo: ak ang'eeti ineendet eng' peetuutap let." 
John6:45 Ki kisir eng' maotik, ak kineeti tugul eng' Kamuktaindet. Age tugul ne kagogas eng' Kwanda, ak kagonetkei, konyonjino." 
John6:46 Moleen ki kogeer chii age tugul Kwanda, kobatee ineendet ne ki punu Kamuktaindet, ki kogeer ineendet Kwanda." 
John6:47 Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, Ineendet ne iyani, kotinyei saboondap koigeny." 
John6:48 Aa magatyat ne po saboon. 
John6:49 Ki am kwanisyekwok mana eng' surkwen, ak ki pek." 
John6:50 Ni magatyat ne choorugei eng' kipsengwet, ne ngo am chii, koma meei." 
John6:51 Aa magatyat ne sabei ne ki choorgei eng' kipsengwet: ngo am chii age tugul magatyandani, kosabei koigeny: ee, ak poortanyu ko magatyat ne agoitoi agobo saboondo ne po ng'wony.”" 
John6:52 Kiboryo anyun Yahudik icheegei, kole, “Imuktoi ano chiichi kogoonech poortanyi keam?”" 
John6:53 Koleenji Jeso anyun icheek, “Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, ngot ko moam poortap Weeriitap chii ak oee korotiikyik, ko mosiche saboondo eng' oriiting'wong'." 
John6:54 Ineendet ne amei poortanyu ak koeei korotiikyuk kotinyei saboondap koigeny; ak ang'eeti ineendet eng' peetuutap let. 
John6:55 Amu amdit iman poortanyu, ak korotiikyuk ko che kieei iman." 
John6:56 Ineendet ne amei poortanyu ak koeei korotiikyuk komenya, ak amenye ineendet." 
John6:57 Ko uu ye ki iyookwo Kwanda ne sabei, ak asabe amu Kwanda; uu nooto ineendet ne ama, sabei agine amu anee." 
John6:58 Ni magatyandanooto ne ki choorgei eng' kipsengwet: ma ko uu ye ki am kwanisyek ak kobek: ineendet ne amei magatyandani kosabei koigeny.” 
John6:59 Ki mwa tuguuchu eng' sinagogit, kota koneetisyei eng' Kapernaum." 
John6:60 Ye kingo kas ni che chaang' eng' kasubikyik, komwa kole, “Uui ng'olyoondoni: imuuchi ng'oo kogas?”" 
John6:61 Ago ki nai Jeso eng' oriitinnyi kole ing'unyng'ung'jin kasubikyik ng'olyoondoniito. Koleenji icheek, “Tos kagonachak niito?" 
John6:62 Teptoi ano anyun ngot ko tuun ogeer Weeriitap chii kotogostoi ole ki mi atkinye? 
John6:63 Kabuuset ne igoitoi saboondo; ma tilei kiy poorto: ng'aleek che kaamwawok ko kabuuset ak saboondo. 
John6:64 Ago miitei alak eng' okweek che ma iyani.” Amu ki nai Jeso kobooch taunet icheeget che ma iyani, ak ineendet ne kimachei kong'wekta ineendet." 
John6:65 Ak ki le, “Nooto kamwaiwok, ale, ma koi imuuch chii konyoonjo kobatee ne igoochin Kwanda.”" 
John6:66 Kobooch yooto kochuchuigei che chaang' che po kasubikyik, amata kobendat ak ineendet." 
John6:67 Ki leenji anyun Jeso chooto taman ak aeng', Obendi ak okweek?" 
John6:68 Kowolji anyun Simion Petero, koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, kibendi ole mi ng'oo? Itinye ng'aleek che po saboondap koigeny." 
John6:69 Ak ki kiyan ak kingen keele ii Ne Tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet.” 
John6:70 Kowolji Jeso icheek koleenji, “Ki ma alewenok taman ak aeng', ak chesawilyet age eng' okweek?”" 
John6:71 Kimwaei anyun agobo Judas ne po kap Simion Iskaryot, amu inee ne kimachei kong'wekta ineendet, ne ki agenge eng' taman ak aeng'." 
John7:1 Ak kingo pata tuguuchu kowendot Jeso eng' Galilaya: amu ma cham kowendot eng' Judea, amu ki cheeng'ei Yahudik kobar ineendet." 
John7:1 Ak kingo pata tuguuchu kowendot Jeso eng' Galilaya: amu ma cham kowendot eng' Judea, amu ki cheeng'ei Yahudik kobar ineendet." 
John7:2 Ak kiga riik igoortap Yahudik, igoorto ne po keryosyek." 
John7:3 Ki leenji anyun tupchosyekyik, Ui eng' oli, ui agoi Judea, si kogeer kasubiguk ak icheek poisyoniguk che iyae." 
John7:3 Ki leenji anyun tupchosyekyik, Ui eng' oli, ui agoi Judea, si kogeer kasubiguk ak icheek poisyoniguk che iyae." 
John7:4 Amu ma mi chii ne yaei kiy eng' ung'oot, ak kocheeng' kobartagei. Ngiyai tuguuchu, iboorchigei ng'wony." 
John7:5 Amu agot tupchosyekyik ak icheek, koma iyan ineendet." 
John7:6 Koleenji anyun `Jeso icheek, “Tom koit peetuunnyu; ago mi peetuung'wong' kotugul." 
John7:7 Ma imuuchi ng'wony kowechok; ago wecho anee amu abaoryani agobo ng'wony ale yaach poisyonikyik. 
John7:8 Otogosyi okweek igoorto. Tom atogosyini anee igoorita, amu tomo kosulda peetuunnyu.”" 
John7:9 Ak kingo kagomwachi tuguuchuuto, kota kotebi eng' Galilaya." 
John7:10 Ago ye kingo togosta tupchosyekyik igoorto, kotogosta agine, ago ma ibartaatkei, ago ki wo ko uu ne ung'ootegei." 
John7:11 Ki cheeng' anyun Yahudik ineendet eng' igoorto, ak kole, “Mi ano ineendet?”" 
John7:12 Ak ki mi kang'unyng'unyet ne oo eng' tuiyosyek agobo ineendet: amu ki le alak, Myee chiichi; kole alak, Achicha, ago imaasi tuiyet." 
John7:13 Ago ma mwa chii ng'olyoo kotook agobo ineendet amu ki iywei Yahudik. 
John7:14 Ago ye kingo kagoit kwenutap igoorto kotogosta Jeso kwo Hekaluut, ak koneetis." 
John7:15 Kokwong'yo anyun Yahudik kole, “Kinaita ano chiichi siruutik, ago tomo koneetkei?”" 
John7:16 Kowolji anyun Jeso koleenji, “Kaneetisyennyu koma nenyu, ago po ineendet ne ki iyookwo." 
John7:17 Ngo machei chii age tugul koyai mageennyi, konai kaneetisyoni, ngo po Kamuktaindet, anan ngamwae aneege." 
John7:18 Ineendet ne mwaei che chechiik ineegei kocheeng'ei toroornatennyi: ago ne cheeng'ei toroornatetap ne ki iyook ineendet ko po iman, ama mi kiy ne ma po imanda eng' ineendet." 
John7:19 Tos ki ma koonok Musa Ng'atuutyet, ago ma mi chii eng' okweek ne yaei Ng'atuutyet? Amu nee si ocheeng'e obara?”" 
John7:20 Kowol tuiyet, kole, “Itinye oindet: cheeng'ei ng'oo kobarin?”" 
John7:21 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Ki ayai poisyet agenge, ak okwong'ye okweek tugul." 
John7:22 Kigoonok Musa kamuratanet amu nooto (ago ma po Musa, po kwanisyek); ak omuratani chii eng' sabato." 
John7:23 Ngeyatitoi chii eng' peetuutap sabato, si ma putok Ng'atuutyetap Musa, ko tos onereekyino, amu kaasoop chii komyee eng' peetuutap sabato?" 
John7:24 Amorwooch ko uu ye ogeere, ago orwooch kirwooget ne po imanda.”" 
John7:25 Ki mwa alak eng' chooto po Jerusalem kole, “Ma ineendet ni ne kocheeng'ei icheek kobar?" 
John7:26 Ak ogeero, mwaitooti kotook, ama mwachi kiy icheek ineendet. Tos ingen pounik komyee kole, niito ko Kristo?" 
John7:27 Ago kingen ole punu chiichi: ago ye nyo Kristo, koma naei chii ole punu.”" 
John7:28 Ki ng'alaal anyun Jeso eng' kutit ne oo eng' Hekaluut, koneetisyei, kole, “Ongeno, ak ongen ole abunu; ak kama anyoo aneege, ago po iman ineendet ne ki iyookwo, ne mongen okweek." 
John7:29 Angen ineendet; amu abunu ineendet ak ki iyookwo ineendet. 
John7:30 Ki cheeng' anyun pichooto konam ineendet: ama nam chii ineendet, amu kitom koit peetuunnyi." 
John7:31 Ak ki iyan ineendet che chaang' che po tuiyet; ak ki le, Ye nyo Kristo, ko tos yai kaboorunoik che siirei cho koyaei chiichi?”" 
John7:32 Kigasei Pharisaik kong'unyng'ung'jin tuiyet tuguuchuuto agobo ineendet; ak ki iyook tisiik che eecheen ak Pharisaik kiptainik kobwa konam ineendet. 
John7:33 Kole Jeso anyun, Ta ami kobootok ne matya, si awo ole mi ineendet ne ki iyookwo." 
John7:34 Tuun ocheeng'a, amonyoorwo: ak ole ami, ko momuuchi obwa." 
John7:35 Komwachigei anyun Yahudik kole, “Wendi ano chiichi si ma kinyooru ineendet? Tos wendi ole mi icheeget che ki koiyestoochi Yunanik, si koneet Yunanik?" 
John7:36 Nee anyun ng'olyoondoni kamwa, kole ocheeng'a, amonyoorwo! Ak ole ami, ko momuuchi obwa?”" 
John7:37 Eng' peetuut ne po let, peetuunooto oo po igoorto, kotonon Jeso ak komwa eng' kutit ne oo, kole, “Ngo amei chii melel, ko ingonyoonjo, ak koe." 
John7:38 Ineendet ne iyana, ko uu ye ki komwa siruutyet, kole punu moennyi ainoosyegap peek che sabei." 
John7:39 Ago ki mwaei niito agobo Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ne tuun taachei icheek che iyani ineendet: amu ki tom kegon Kabuuset ne Tiliil; amu kitom kitoroor Jeso.”" 
John7:40 Ye kingo kas alak che po tuiyet ng'aleechuuto, kole, “Niito maotyot iman." 
John7:41 Kole alak, ‘niito ko Kristo.’ Ago ki le alage, ‘tos punu Kristo Galilaya?’" 
John7:42 Ma mwa siruutyet, kole, ‘mang'une Kristo kesweek che po Daudi, ak kobun Bethlehem, nganaseet ole ki mi Daudi?’ ”" 
John7:43 Ki piit anyun toiyet eng' tuiyet agobo ineendet. 
John7:44 Ak kimach alak konam ineendet; ago ma nam chii ineendet. 
John7:45 Ki pwa anyun kiptainik ole mi tisiik che eecheen ak Pharisaik; ak koleenji, “Kalya si momutu ineendet?”" 
John7:46 Kowol kiptainik kole, “Kitom kong'alaali chii ko uu ni.”" 
John7:47 Kowolji anyun Pharisaik icheek, koleenji, “Kagibeetook ak okweek?" 
John7:48 Ki koyan ineendet age tugul eng' pounik, anan eng' Pharisaik?" 
John7:49 Ago chubootiin pichu che ma naei Ng'atuutyet.” 
John7:50 Ki leenji Nikodemo (ne kigawo ole mi ineendet atkinye tai, ne ki age eng' icheek)," 
John7:51 Tos irwookyin chii Ng'atuutyennyo, kotom kegas ng'aleekyik ak kenai kiit ne yaei?" 
John7:52 Kowolji anyun ineendet koleenji, “Ii po Galilaya aginye? Cheeng', ak igeer amu ma mang'une Galilaya maotyondo.”" 
John7:53 Ki wo chii tugul anyun koonnyi: 
John8:1 Ago ki wo Jeso tulweetap Mseituni. 
John8:2 Ak kimus karon konyo Hekaluut, ak ki pwa piik tugul ole mi ineendet; ak ki tep ng'wony, koneet icheek." 
John8:3 Ak ki imut siriik ak Pharisaik kobogoryot ne ki kinamji ibeetapkei; ak ye kingo kaginde kwenut," 
John8:4 keleenji, “Kaneetindoni, kaginam kobogoryondoni eng' ibeetapkei, kota komi ibeetapkei." 
John8:5 Ki ng'atech Musa eng' Ng'atuutyet kole, Kilage koik ne uu niito: ara ileen nee inyee?”" 
John8:6 Ki mwaei ng'olyoondoniito kotyemei ineendet, si kosich kiit ne kitaame. Ago ki ing'uruuk Jeso, kosir ng'wony eng' mornennyi." 
John8:7 Ago ye kingo ta koteepse ineendet, kotonon, ak koleenji, “Ingotoi ne ma tinye tengek eng' okweek kowiir eng' koita.”" 
John8:8 Ak ki ing'uruuk kogeny kosir ng'wony eng' mornennyi. 
John8:9 Ak ye kingo kas icheek ng'olyoondonooto, komanda kobee agenge agenge, kobooch ne oo agoi ne po let: ak ki ng'et Jeso ineegei, ak kobogoryondonooto eng' ole ki mi, kotononi eng' kween." 
John8:10 Kotonon Jeso anyun ak koleenji, “Kobogoryondoni, mi ano icheek? Ma igikyin chii?”" 
John8:11 Ak ki le, “Ma igiikyo chii, Kiptaiyat.” Ak ki leenji Jeso, “Ma kiikyinin agane, ui anyun; kobooch nguno, koma tata iyai tengek.”" 
John8:12 Ki mwachi Jeso anyun icheek kogeny, koleenji, “Aa lapkeiyet ne po ng'wony: ineendet ne isuba ko ma wendoti eng' mesundeito, ago nyooru lapkeiyetap saboondo.”" 
John8:13 Koleenji anyun `Pharisaik ineendet, “Ibaoryanjinigei; ma po iman paornateng'ung'.”" 
John8:14 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Agot ngabaoryanjinigei, ko po iman paornatennyu; amu angen ole abunu, ak ole awendi; ago mongen ole abunu, anan ole awendi." 
John8:15 Orwoochi ko uu mageetap poorto; marwookyini chii anee. 
John8:16 Ee, agot ngarwoch, ko po iman kirwoogennyu; amu ma mi aneege, ago kimi ak Kwanda ne ki iyookwo." 
John8:17 Ee, ak ki kisir eng' Ng'atuutyeng'wong' keele, po iman paornateetap piik aeng'." 
John8:18 Aa ineendet ne abaoryanjinigei, ak paoryanjino Kwanda ne ki iyookwo.”" 
John8:19 Koleenji anyun icheek ineendet, “Mi ano Kwandang'ung'?” Kowol Jeso kole, “Mongeno, anan Abba. Nda ki konaa, ta ki ongen Abba agine.”" 
John8:20 Ki mwa ineendet ng'aleechu eng' ole kigonoree silingisyek, ye ki ineetisyei eng' Hekaluut: ak ma nam chii ineendet; amu kitom koit sainnyi." 
John8:21 Ki mwachi anyun icheeget kogeny, koleenji, “Awendi, ak tuun ocheeng'a, ak obegu eng' tengektong'wong': ole awendi, ko momuuchi obwa.”" 
John8:22 Ki le anyun Yahudik, Tos pargei, amu mwaei kole, “Ole awendi, ko momuuchi obwa?”" 
John8:23 Ak ki leenji, “Oo po oli po ng'wony, aa po parak: oo po ng'wonyuni; ma po anee ng'wonyuni." 
John8:24 Nooto kaamwaiwok, ale, obegu eng' tengekwogikwok: amu ngo moyuani ole aa ineendet, obegu eng' tengekwogikwok.”"
