John8:25 Ki leenji anyun icheek ineendet, “Ii ng'oo?” Koleenji Jeso, “Nooto ki amwaiwok kobooch taunet." 
John8:26 Atinye tuguuk che chaang' che amwae ak che arwoochi agobo okweek: ago po iman ineendet ne ki iyookwo; ak amwachini ng'wony tuguuk che ki agas eng' ineendet.” 
John8:27 Ago ma iguiyo kole mwachin agobo Kwanda. 
John8:28 Ki leenji Jeso anyun, Ye kaouite Weeriitap chii, onai anyun eng' peetuunooto ole aa ineendet, amayae kiy aneege, ago amwae tuguuchu ko uu ye ki ineeta Kwanda." 
John8:29 Ak kimi tuwai ak ineendet ne ki iyookwo; ma pagaakta aneege; amu ayae kotugul tuguuchooto chamaksei eng' ineendet. 
John8:30 Ak ye kita komwaei tuguuchu, koyan ineendet che chaang'." 
John8:31 Ki leenji Jeso anyun Yahudichooto kiga koyan ineendet, Ngot otebye okweek eng' ng'olyoondennyu, ko oo kasubikyuk iman;" 
John8:32 ak onai imanda, ak kotyachak imanda." 
John8:33 Kowolji icheek ineendet koleenji, “Ki kesweegap Abraham, ak tomo keegu otwogigap chii age tugul ole kinye kora. Imwaitoi ano anyun ile, ‘Kityaachok?’ ”" 
John8:34 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, age tugul ne yaei tengek ko otwogindetap tengek." 
John8:35 Ak ma tebyei otwogindet eng' koot koigeny; tebyei weeriit koigeny. 
John8:36 Ngo tyachak anyun Weeriit, ko otyagotin iman." 
John8:37 Angen ale oo kesweegap Abraham; ago ocheeng'e obara, amu ma tinyei ng'olyoondennyu ole tebee eng' okweek." 
John8:38 Amwae tuguuk che ki ageer eng' Abba: ak oyae tuguuchooto ki ogas eng' kwandang'wong'.” 
John8:39 Kowolji koleenji, “Kwandanyo ko Abraham.” Koleenji Jeso, “Nda ki oo lagogap Abraham, ta ki oyae poisyosyegap Abraham." 
John8:40 Ago ngo ocheeng'e obara, chiito ne kamwaiwok ng'aleek che po iman, che ki agas eng' Kamuktaindet: ki ma yai ko uu nooto Abraham." 
John8:41 Oyae poisyonik che po kwandang'wong'.” Ki leenji anyun ineendet, “Ki ma kisichech eng' sokseet; ki tinyei Kwanda agenge, nooto ko Kamuktaindet.”" 
John8:42 Komwachi Jeso icheek koleenji, “Nda ka Kwandang'wong' Kamuktaindet, ta kaochama; amu ki anyoo abunu Kamuktaindet. Ki ma anyoo aneege, ago ki iyookwo ineendet." 
John8:43 Amu nee si monai chooto amwae? Amu momuuchi ogas ng'olyoondennyu. 
John8:44 Oo po kwandang'wong' chesawilyet, ak ochame oyai magutigap kwandang'wong'. Ki rumiindet kobooch taunet, ama tononi eng' imanit, amu ma mi imanit eng' ineendet. Ye mwaei lembech, komwaei agobo tuguukyik, amu kiplembechwa ineendet ak kwanda ne po nooto." 
John8:45 Ago moyana amu amwae imanit. 
John8:46 Ng'oo eng' okweek ne igiikyino kole atinye tengek? Ngot amwae imanit, ko amu nee anyun si moyana?" 
John8:47 Ineendet ne po Kamuktaindet kogasei ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet: nooto anyun mogase okweek, amu mo po Kamuktaindet.”" 
John8:48 Kowolji anyun Yahudik koleenji, “Ma kimwae acheek iman keele, ii Samarindet, ak itinye oindet?”" 
John8:49 Kowol Jeso kole, “Ma tinyei oindet; ago agonyiti Abba, ak oteweera." 
John8:50 Ago ma cheeng'e toroornatennyu: miitei agenge ne cheeng'ei ak korwoochi. 
John8:51 Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, ngo riip chii ng'olyoondennyu koma keerei meet agoi.”" 
John8:52 Koleenji anyun Yahudik, “Kingen nguno keele itinye oindet. Ki kome Abraham, ak ki kobek maotik; ak imwae ile, ‘Ngo riip chii ng'olyoondennyu, koma chamchami meet agoi.’" 
John8:53 Tos ii oo isiir kwandanyo Abraham, ne ki kome? Ki kobek maotik. Iyaegei iegu ng'oo?”" 
John8:54 Kowol Jeso kole, “Ngot atoroorige, ko puch toroornatennyu. Kwandanyu ne itoroora; ne omwae ole, ‘Ineendet ko Kamuktaindet neng'wong',’" 
John8:55 ak tomo onai ineendet. Ago angen ineendet; ak ngot amwa ale, mangen ineendet, aegu kiplembechwa, ko uu okweek: ago angen ineendet ak ariibe ng'olyoondennyi." 
John8:56 Ki paibai kwandang'wong' Abraham kogeer peetuunnyu; ak ki keer, ak kogaskei.”" 
John8:57 Koleenji Yahudik anyun, “Tom iit kenyiisyek konom, ak ki igeer Abraham?”" 
John8:58 Koleenji Jeso, “Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, Kingo tomo kobiit Abraham, ami.”" 
John8:59 Ki inem anyun koik komachei kowiire ineendet: ago ki unygei Jeso, ak komanda eng' Hekaluut." 
John9:1 Ak ye ki siirtoi, kogeer chiito ne ki koraat kobooch ko kagisich." 
John9:2 Ak kiteebe ineendet kasubikyik, koleenji, “Rabbi, ng'oo ne ki yai tengekto, chiichi anan sigiikyik, si kesich ko koraat?”" 
John9:3 Kowol Jeso kole, “Ki ma yai chiichi tengekto, anan sigiikyik; ago si kobiit kotook poisyosyegap Kamuktaindet eng' ineendet." 
John9:4 Kanyool keyai poisyosyegap ineendet ne ki iyookwo, kota ko peet: nyoonei kemout, ye ma komuuchi chii kobois." 
John9:5 Ye ta ami, ko aa lapkeiyetap ng'wony.”" 
John9:6 Ye kingo kagomwa ko uu nooto, kong'utyi ng'ung'unyek, ak kotangwar, ak koilee konyekyik ng'ung'unyechooto," 
John9:7 ak koleenji, “Ui iunde eng' tamboiyotap Siloam” (ye kiweech keele, “Kiyookto”). Ki wo anyun, ak koun, ak konyo kogeertoi." 
John9:8 Ki mwa anyun piigap kokwet, ak che kiga kogeer ineendet eng' tai kole soomindet, kole, “Tos ma ineendet ni ne ki cham kotebyei ak kosoomsei?”" 
John9:9 Kole alage, Ineendet: kole alage, Achicha, ago kerge ak ineendet. Kole chiichooto, Aa ineendet." 
John9:10 Ki leenji anyun icheek ineendet, Kagiyatita ano konyeguk?" 
John9:11 Kowol kole, “Katangwar ng'ung'unyek chiito ne keguure Jeso, ak koilee konyekyuk, ak koleenjo, ‘Ui Siloam ak iunde.’ Kaawe anyun ak aun, ak ageerte.”" 
John9:12 Ak ki leenji, “Mi ano ineendet?” Kole, “Mangen.”" 
John9:13 Ki imut icheek chiichooto ki koraat eng' tai, kwo ole mi Pharisaik." 
John9:14 Ki sabato peetuunooto ye kitangwari Jeso ng'ung'unyek, si koyate konyegap chiichooto." 
John9:15 koteebee anyun Pharisaik kogeny ineendet kole, katepto ano si igeerte? Ak ki leenji, “Kagoiile konyekyuk ng'ung'unyek che katangwar, ak kaaun, ak kaageerte.”" 
John9:16 Kole alak che po Pharisaik anyun, Ma punu Kamuktaindet chiichi, amu ma riibei sabato. Ago ki le alage, Imuktoi ano chii ne kiptengekyo koyai kaboorunoik che uu chu? Ak ki piit toiyet eng' kwenunnywa." 
John9:17 Ki leenji anyun kogeny chiito ne koraat, Imwae nee agobo ineendet, amu kayaat konyeguk? Ak ki le, “Maotyo.”" 
John9:18 Ma iyan anyun Yahudik agobo ineendet, kole, ko koraat ak kagogeerto. Koguur sigiigap chiichooto kagogeerto," 
John9:19 ak koteebe koleenji, “Tos weeriing'wong' ni, ne omwae ole ki kisich ko koraat? Katepto ano si kogeerto nguno?”" 
John9:20 Kowol sigiikyik kole, “Kingen keele weeriinnyo niito, ak kingen keele ki kisich ko koraat:" 
John9:21 ago ma kingen ole katepto si kogeerto nguno; ak ma kingen ineendet ne kayaatei konyekyik: oteebe ineendet; kogoeet; ingomwa ineegei.” 
John9:22 Ki mwa ng'aleechu sigiikyik, amu ki iywei Yahudik: amu kiga sip kochamyechi Yahudik, kole, ngo ng'aany chii age tugul kole Kristo ineendet, kibeetoi eng' sinagogit." 
John9:23 Ki mwa anyun sigiikyik amu nooto kole, “Oteebe, amu kogoeet ineendet. ”" 
John9:24 Ki kuur anyun ne po aeng' pichooto chiichooto ki koraat, ak koleenji, “Igoochi Kamuktaindet kalasunet: kingen keele kiptengekyo chiichi.”" 
John9:25 Kowol anyun ineendet kole, “Ngo kiptengekyo chiichooto, ko mangen. Angen kiit agenge, ale, koa koraat, ago ageertoi nguno.”" 
John9:26 Koleenji anyun icheek ineendet, “Kayaun nee? Kayatita ano konyeguk?”" 
John9:27 Kowolji icheek koleenji, “Kaamwaiwok, ama ogas, kalya si omach ogas kogeny? Omache oegu ak okweek kasubikyik?”" 
John9:28 Ak king'emji kuut ineendet kole, “Ii kasubindennyi so? Ago ki kasubigap Musa acheek.”" 
John9:29 Kingen keele kigong'alaalji `Kamuktaindet Musa: ago ma kingen kole po chiichi. 
John9:30 Kowolji chiichooto icheeget koleenji, “Kwang'ut niito anyun, amu mongen ole punu, ago kagoyat konyekyuk." 
John9:31 Kingen keele ma kasei Kamuktaindet kiptengeginik: ago ngo lasu chii age tugul Kamuktaindet, ak koyai magennyi, kogasei ineendet." 
John9:32 Kobooch ngetoi ng'wony koma ki kas keele ki yaat chii konyegap chiito ne ki kisich ko koraat. 
John9:33 Nda ma punu Kamuktaindet chiichi koma koi imuuch koyai kiy.” 
John9:34 Kowolji ineendet koleenji, “Ki kisikten iman tengekwogik, ak ineetech?” Ak ki toorta ineendet kwo saang'." 
John9:35 Ki kas Jeso kole kagetoorta ineendet kwo saang'; ak kingo nyoor ineendet, koleenji, “Tos iyani Weeriitap Kamuktaindet?”" 
John9:36 Ak ki wol kole, “Ng'oo nooto, Kiptaiyat, si kobiit ayan ineendet?”" 
John9:37 Koleenji Jeso, Kaigeer ineendet ak ko ineendet ni ng'alaali kobooten." 
John9:38 Ak ki le, Kiptaiyat, ayani. Ak kogutung'ji kolas ineendet." 
John9:39 Ak ki le Jeso, “Ki anyoo ng'wonyuni amu kirwooget, si kobiit kogeerto che ma keertoi; ak kogoryo che keertoi.”" 
John9:40 Ki kas tuguuchuuto alak che po Pharisaik che ki mi kobooto ineendet ak koleenji, “Ki koryotin agacheek?”" 
John9:41 Koleenji Jeso, “Nda oo koryotiin okweek, ta motinye tengek; ago nguno omwae ole, ‘Kigeertoi’ nooto anyun, tebyei tengektong'wong'.”" 
John10:1 Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, Choriin ak ko rebin ineendet ne ma punei kurgeetap piutap keechiirek, ne laanyei oldo age." 
John10:2 Ago mestowotap keechiirek ineendet ne punei kurgeet. 
John10:3 Yaatyin ineendet riibindetap kurgeet; ak kasei keechiirek kutinnyi: ak kuurei keechiirekyik eng' kainaikwak, ak kondoe icheek." 
John10:4 Ak ye kagomaanda ineendet chechiget tugul koba saang', kondoe, ak koosup keechiirek ineendet: amu ingen kutinnyi." 
John10:5 Ak ma chamei koosup toondet, ago mwee: amu ma naei kutusweegap toek." 
John10:6 Komwachi Jeso icheek kalewenoni: ago ma iguiyo icheek kole nee tuguuchooto ki kamwachi. 
John10:7 Koleenji anyun Jeso icheek kogeny, Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, Aa kurgeetap keechiirek." 
John10:8 Choriik ak ko rebiik tugul che ki indounena: ago ma kas keechiirek icheek. 
John10:9 Aa kurgeet: ngwo chii age tugul ko ne puna anee, kesaru, ak kwo ko, ak komanda saang', ak konyoor ole kiyage." 
John10:10 Nyoonei choriindet si kochoor, ak kobar, ak kong'em kityo: ki anyoo si kobiit konyoor saboondo, ak kotepto saboonooto inne." 
John10:11 Aa mestowot ne myee: igoitoi mestowot ne myee saboondanyi agobo keechiirek. 
John10:12 Ago ineendet ne otwogin, ne ma mestowot, ne ma chiitap ko po keechiirek, kogeerei konyonei suiyot, ak kobagaakta keechiirek, ak komwei, ak konam anyun suiyot icheek, ak koiyesta." 
John10:13 Mweei ineendet ne otwogin amu otwogin koma mage kiy keechiirek. 
John10:14 Aa mestowot ne myee. Angen chechuuk ak kongeno chechuuk," 
John10:15 ko uu ye ingeno Kwanda, ak angen Kwanda; ak agoitoi saboondanyu agobo keechiirek." 
John10:16 Ak atinye keechiirek alak, che ma po piuni: kanyool aget chooto ak icheek, si kogas kutinnyu: ak koek akweet agenge, ak mestowot agenge." 
John10:17 Chama anyun Kwanda amu nooto, amu agoitoi saboondanyu, si kobiit anam kogeny." 
John10:18 Marebena chii, ago agoitoi aneege. Atinye kimnateet agoito, ak atinye kimnateet anam kogeny. Ki ataach ng'atuutyoni eng' Abba." 
John10:19 Ki piit toiyet kogeny eng' Yahudik agobo ng'aleechuuto. 
John10:20 Ak ki le che chaang' eng' icheek, Tinyei oindet, ak koamei iywek; kalya si ogas ineendet?" 
John10:21 Kole alage, Ma po ng'aleechu chii ne tinyei oindet. Tos imuuchi oindet koyaat konyegap chiito ne koraat?" 
John10:22 Ak kimi igoortap katabaanet eng' Jerusalem: ak kibetusyegap kaititindo; 
John10:23 ak kiwendot Jeso eng' Hekaluut eng' keterut ne po Solomon. 
John10:24 Ki pwa anyun Yahudik koyiem ineendet, koleenji, “Igoonech kigenisye eng' saget kot kotyanit? Ngo ii Kristo, imwaiwech komyee.”" 
John10:25 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Ki amwaiwok, amoyani, poisyosyek che ayae eng' kainetap Abba ko chooto che paoryanjino." 
John10:26 Ago moyani, amu mo po keechiirekyuk." 
John10:27 Kasei kutinnyu keechiirekyuk, ak angen icheek, ak kosuba." 
John10:28 Agoochini icheek saboondap koigeny; ak ma koi lusyo, ama rebena chii icheek eng' eunnyu." 
John10:29 Oo Abba, ne ki koono icheek, kosiir tugul; ama mi chii ne imuuchi korep icheek eng' eutap Abba." 
John10:30 Anee ak Kwanda, ko ki agenge.”" 
John10:31 Ki nam anyun Yahudik koik kogeny koleen kolach ineendet. 
John10:32 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Koaboorwok poisyosyek che chaang' che myach che punu Kwanda; olacha agobo poisyo nee eng' chooto?”" 
John10:33 Kowolji `Yahudik ineendet koleenji, “Ma kilachin amu poisyet ne myee, ago amu chotisyet; ak amu inyee ne ii chii, iyaegei iegu Kamuktaindet.”" 
John10:34 Kowolji `Jeso pichooto, koleenji, “Tos ma siraat eng' Ng'atuutyeng'wong' keele, ‘Ki amwa ale, oo kamuktaik?’" 
John10:35 Ngo kigoguure ineendet icheek ‘kamuktaik’, icheeget che ki nyoonji ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet (ama imugaksei kebut siruutyet)," 
John10:36 tos omwae agobo ineendet, ne kiitabaan Kwanda ak koyookto kwo ng'wony, oleenjini, ichotisyei; amu ki ale, ‘Aa Weeriitap Kamuktaindet?’" 
John10:37 Ngot koma yai poisyosyegap Kwandanyu, ko matoyana." 
John10:38 Ago ngayai, ko agot ngo moyana, oyan poisyosyek: si kobiit onai ak oyan ole mi Kwanda eng' anee, ak anee eng' Kwanda.”" 
John10:39 Ki cheeng' anyun kogeny konam ineendet: ago kibetito eng' eunekwak. 
John10:40 Ak ki wo kogeny Jordan komosin ole ki ibatisanisye Johana eng' tai; ak ki tebi eng' olooto. 
John10:41 Ak ki pwanji `che chaang' ineendet; ak kole, “Ki ma yai Johana kaboorunet; ago tuguuk alak tugul che ki mwa Johana agobo chiichi ko po iman.”" 
John10:42 Ak ki iyan ineendet che chaang' eng' olooto. 
John11:1 Ak kimyan chiito age ne kiguure Lazaro, ne po Bethania, ne po nganaseetap Maria ak chepkamet Marta." 
John11:2 Ak ki Maria niito ne ki iil Kiptaiyat eng' mwaita, ak kouuse keelyekyik suumeekyik, ne ki tinyei ng'eetap kamet, Lazaro, ne kimyan." 
John11:3 Ki iyookyi chepkametwogichooto ineendet ng'olyoot, koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, keero, myani ineendet ne ichame.”" 
John11:4 Ago ye kingo kas Jeso nooto kole, “Ma po meet myanooto, ago po toroornatetap Kamuktaindet, ak kilasune Weeriitap Kamuktaindet nooto.”" 
John11:5 Ak ki chamei Jeso Marta, ak chepkamet, ak Lazaro." 
John11:6 Kingo kas anyun kole myani, kota kotebi peetuusyek aeng' eng' ole ki mi." 
John11:7 Kingo pata niito anyun, koleenji kasubik, Ongebe Judea kogeny." 
John11:7 Kingo pata niito anyun, koleenji kasubik, Ongebe Judea kogeny." 
John11:8 Koleenji kasubik, “Rabbi, kocheeng'ei Yahudik kolachin eng' koik; ak iwendi oliindo kogeny?”" 
John11:9 Kowol Jeso kole, “Tos ma mi saisyek tamanu ak aeng' eng' peetuut? Ngo wendot chii peet, koma kinachi, amu keerei lapkeiyetap ng'wonyuni." 
John11:10 Ago ngo wendot chii kemoi, kinachi, amu ma mi lapkeiyet eng' ineendet.”" 
John11:11 Komwa tuguuchu: ak ye ibata koleenji icheek, Inuuchi chorwennyu Lazaro; ago awendi, si ang'eet ineendet eng' rwondo." 
John11:12 Koleenji anyun kasubik ineendet, Kiptaiyat, ngot konuuchi, ko kaagaa ta kosabei." 
John11:13 Ago kimwaei Jeso agobo meennyi: ak kileen icheek abeere mwaei agobo rwondo ne kiga konuuch. 
John11:14 Ki mwachi anyun Jeso icheek komyee, koleenji, “Kogome Lazaro." 
John11:15 Ago abaibai agobo okweek amu ki ma ami oliindo, si kobiit oyan; ago ongebe ole mi ineendet.”" 
John11:16 Koleenji anyun Thomas, ne kiguure Didumo, kasubik chuun alak, “Ongebe ak acheek, si kobiit kebegu ak ineendet.”" 
John11:17 Ye kingo it Jeso anyun, konyoor kole kiga kotebee kererit peetuusyek ang'wan." 
John11:18 Ki neegitee Bethania Jerusalem, ki po olo po maelisyek aeng';" 
John11:19 ak kigabwonji che chaang' che po Yahudik Marta ak Maria si kogaigai icheek agobo ng'eetap kamet. 
John11:20 Kingo kas anyun Marta kole, nyoonei Jeso, kwo kotorookta ineendet; ago kita kotebi Maria eng' ko." 
John11:21 Koleenji Marta anyun Jeso, Kiptaiyat, nda ki imi yu, ta ki ma komeei weeriit ne kitupche." 
John11:22 Ago angen agot nguno ale, kiit age tugul ne isoome Kamuktaindet, kogoonin Kamuktaindet." 
John11:23 Koleenji `Jeso ineendet, Ta kong'eetei ng'eetap kamenng'ung'." 
John11:24 Koleenji Marta ineendet, Angen ale ng'eetei eng' ng'eetyeet ne po peetuutap let." 
John11:25 Koleenji Jeso, Aa ng'eetyeet, ak saboondo: ineendet ne iyana, agot ngo me, kota kosabei:" 
John11:26 ak chii age tugul ne sabei ak koyanan koma meei matiny. Tos iyani inyee niito? 
John11:27 Koleenji, “Wee Kiptaiyat; kaayan ale ii Kristo, Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, ne nyoonei ng'wony.”" 
John11:28 Ak ye kingo kagomwa niito chebooto, kwo, ak koguur Maria, chepkamet, eng' ung'oot, kole, “Miitei yu Kaneetindet; kuurin.”" 
John11:29 Ak ye kingo kas nooto, kong'eet kochaakta kwo ole mi ineendet." 
John11:30 (Ago ki tomo koit Jeso nganasanooto, ago kita komi ole kiga tuiyechi ak Marta.)" 
John11:31 Ki isup anyun Yahudik chebooto, icheeget che ki mi kobooto ineendet eng' ko kogoigoi, ye kingo keer kong'eet Maria, ak kochaakta komanda saang', koleen wendi kererit koriirei eng' olooto." 
John11:32 Ye kingo it anyun Maria ole mi Jeso, ak kogeer ineendet, kobutyi keelyekyik, ak koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, nda ki imi yu, ta ki ma komeei weeriit ne kitupche.”" 
John11:33 Ye kingo keer Jeso anyun ineendet koriirei, ak koriirtos ak icheek Yahudik che kigabwa kobooto ineendet, kogas king'wan eng' muguleldo, koaragen," 
John11:34 ak kole, “Ki onde ano?” Koleenji, “Nyoo, Kiptaiyat, keer.”" 
John11:35 Koriir Jeso. 
John11:36 Kole anyun Yahudik, “Ogeer anyuno ole ki chamdoi ineendet!”" 
John11:37 Ago ki le alak eng' icheek, “Kiga temenee chiichi, ne kiyatei konyegap chiito ne ki koraat, koger si ma me agine chiichi?”" 
John11:38 Kogas anyun Jeso king'wan kogeny eng' oriitinnyi konyonei kererit. Ki kebeneet, ak kigegere koita kurgeet." 
John11:39 Kole Jeso, “Oiste koita.” Koleenji Marta, chepkametap ineendet ne kime, “Kiptaiyat, kogobul amu kobooch ngo me ko peetuusyek ang'wan.”" 
John11:40 Koleenji `Jeso ineendet, “Kama amwaun ale, ngiyani, igeere toroornatetap Kamuktaindet?”" 
John11:41 Koisto anyun koita. Ak ki ing'eet metit Jeso ak kole, “Abba, amwaun kongoi ale kaigasa." 
John11:42 Ak kaanai ale igasa eng' ui tugul, ago kaamwa ni amu tuiyoni tononi eng' yuto, si kobiit koyan kole ki iyookwo.”" 
John11:43 Ak ye kingo kagomwa ko uu nooto, komwa eng' kutit ne oo, kole, “Lazaro, mong'u.”" 
John11:44 Komong' anyun ineendet ne kiga me, ko ratotiin eunek ak keelyek eng' ngoroik che po kererit; ak kiga kirate togeennyi angeet. Koleenji Jeso pichooto, “Otyach, ak ounde kwo.”" 
John11:45 Ki iyan anyun ineendet che chaang' che po Yahudik che kigabwa ole mi Maria, ak kogeer tuguuk che kayai Jeso." 
John11:46 Ago ki pa alak ole mi Pharisaik, ak komwachi icheek tuguuk che kagoyai Jeso." 
John11:47 Ki kuur anyun `tisiik che eecheen ak Pharisaik tuiyetap kirwoogik, ak kole, Ki yai nee? Amu yaei chiichi kaboorunoik che chaang'." 
John11:48 Ngot kebagaakte ineendet ko uu ni, koyani `ineendet piik tugul: asi kobwa Romanik korebenech emennyo ak pororyennyo." 
John11:49 Ak ki leenji age eng' icheek, ne ineendet ko Caiaphas ne ki tisiindet ne oo kenyinooto, “Mongen okweek kiy age tugul," 
John11:50 mongen ole myeeitu eng' okweek ngo mechi piik chiito agenge, si ma pet pororyet komugul.”" 
John11:51 Ki ma komwaei ineegei nooto, ago ki maoten amu ki tisiindet ne oo kenyinooto kole, ki neegit komechi Jeso pororyet;" 
John11:52 ma agobo pororyet ineegei, ago si kobiit koyum lagogap Kamuktaindet che yestootin si kobiit koek agenge." 
John11:53 Kobooch peetuunooto anyun ak kwo tai, korwoogot agobo ole partoi ineendet." 
John11:54 Mata kowendot Jeso anyun eng' ole taagu eng' ole mi Yahudik, ago ki wo eng' olooto kwo emet ne neegitee surkwen, agoi nganaseet ne kiguure Ephraim; ak ki tebi eng' olooto kobooto kasubik." 
John11:55 Kiga koriik paska ne po Yahudik: ak ki pa che chaang' eng' emet kotogosta Jerusalem kotom koit paska, koba koanyinygei." 
John11:56 Ki cheeng' anyun Jeso, ak koleenjigei, kotonondos eng' Hekaluut, Obwaati nee okweek? Tos oleen ma nyoonei ineendet igoorto?" 
John11:57 Kiga ng'at tisiik che eecheen ak Pharisaik, kole, ngo nai chii age tugul ole miitei, koboor, si kobiit konam icheek ineendet." 
John12:1 Ak kingo ta komi peetuusyek lo si koit paska konyo Jeso Bethania, ole ki mi Lazaro, ne ki ing'eeti Jeso komong' eng' che ki pek." 
John12:2 Kichopchi icheek eng' olooto ineendet amitwogik che po lagat: koboisyechi Marta; ago ki mi Lazaro kobooto icheek che ki amisyei ak ineendet. 
John12:3 Ki inem anyun Maria mwaita ne nyamdut ne po ratilit agenge, ne po kamanuutyet ne oo, ak koilee keelyegap Jeso, ak kouuse suumeekyik keelyekyik: ak ki nyi koot nyamdutyet ne po mwaata." 
John12:4 Ago ki le Judas Iskaryot, ne ki agenge ne po kasubikyik, ne kimachei kong'wekta ineendet," 
John12:5 “Ko amu nee si ma ki aldae mwai dinarisyek pogol somok, si kigoochi kibananook?”" 
John12:6 Ki mwa ni anyun, ma amu ki riiree kibananook; ago amu ki choriin, ak ki tinyei lolet, ak ki ibei tuguuk che mi oriit." 
John12:7 Kole Jeso, “Omete kogonorchi peetuutap tubeennyu." 
John12:8 Amu mi kibananook kobootok kotugul; ago ma mi anee ak okweek kotugul.” 
John12:9 Ki nai anyun piik che chaang' che po Yahudik kole mi olooto: ak ki pwa, ma agobo Jeso ineegei, ago si kobiit kogeer Lazaro agine, ne kiga kong'eet ineendet eng' che ki pek." 
John12:10 Ago ki irwooch tisiik che eecheen kole kobar Lazaro agine; 
John12:11 amu kiitabaangei che chaang' che po Yahudik, koba koyan Jeso amu ineendet." 
John12:12 Ak eng' peetuut ne ki isubi nooto, ye kingo kas tuiyet ne oo ne po piik che kigabwa igoorto, kogas kole nyoonei Jeso Jerusalem." 
John12:13 Ki nam anyun mooriik che po sosik, ak koba kotorookta ineendet ak komwa eng' kutit ne oo kole, “Hosanna! Iberuurot ineendet ne nyoonei eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat, nooto Laitoryatap Israel.”" 
John12:14 Ak ye kingo kagonyoor Jeso moitap sigiryet, kolaany; ko uu ye ki kisir keele:" 
John12:15 “Meiywei, inyee, ee, cheptap Zion. Keero, nyoonei Laitoryandeng'ung', kobunu moitap sigiryet!”" 
John12:16 Ki ma iguiyo kasubikyik eng' tai tuguuchuuto: ago kingo kagitoroor Jeso, kobwaat anyun icheek kole ki kisir tuguuchuuto agobo ineendet, ak kiga keyachi ineendet tuguuchuuto." 
John12:17 Kibaoryan anyun tuiyet ne ki mi kobooto ineendet ye kiguurei Lazaro komong' eng' kererit, ak ki ing'eet ineendet eng' che ki pek." 
John12:18 Ki pa anyun tuiyet amu nooto kotorookta ineendet, amu ki kas kole kiga koyai kaboorunoni." 
John12:19 Kimwachigei anyun Pharisaik icheegei kole, “Ogeero, ma oterter eng' kiy: ogeero, kagosup `ineendet piik tugul che po ng'wony.”" 
John12:20 Ak ki mi Yunanik alage eng' che kigaba kotogosta kosa eng' igoorto. 
John12:21 Ki pwa chooto anyun ole mi Philipu, ne po Bethsaida ne po Galilaya, ak koteebe ineendet kole, “Kiptaiyat, kimache kegeer Jeso.”" 
John12:22 Ki nyo Philipu komwachi Andrea: ak ki pwa Andrea ak Philipu komwachi Jeso. 
John12:23 Ak ki wolji Jeso koleenji, “Kait sait, ne kitoroore Weeriitap chii." 
John12:24 Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, Ngo ma me paiywat ne ibutyin ng'ung'unyek, kotebyei ineegei; ago ngo me, koiyiei che chaang'." 
John12:25 Ineendet ne chamei saboondanyi kobeeti; ak ineendet ne wechei saboondanyi eng' ng'wonyuni koriip kot koit saboondap koigeny. 
John12:26 Ngo poisyeiwo chii age tugul, ko nyolu kosubota; ak si ole ami, komi olooto agine kiboityondennyu: ngo poisyeiwo chii, koteechei ineendet Kwanda." 
John12:27 “Nyalili nguno saboondanyu; amwae nee anyun? Tos amwa ale ‘Abba we, sarwo eng' saini?’ Ago ki anyo amu niito si anyoor eng' saini." 
John12:28 Abba, itoroor kaineng'ung'.” Ki mong' anyun kutit eng' kipsengwet, kole, “Ki atoroor ak ta atoroori kogeny.”" 
John12:29 Ki mwa anyun tuiyet ne kitononi eng' olooto kogasei, kole, katul. Kole alak, “Kang'alaalji malaikaiyat.”" 
John12:30 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Kama nyo kutini agobo anee, ago agobo okweek." 
John12:31 Kabiit nguno kirwoogetap ng'wonyuni: ak kagitoorta anyun nguno ne oo ne po ng'wony komanda. 
John12:32 Ak ye kiuita eng' ng'wony, amutyige piik tugul.”" 
John12:33 Ago ki mwa ni, koboortoi meet ole meitoi." 
John12:34 Ki wolji anyun tuiyet ineendet, koleenji, “Kigegas eng' Ng'atuutik keele tebyei Kristo koigeny. Teptoi ano anyun si imwa ile, kanyool keuito Weeriitap chii? Ng'oo Weerooto po chii?”" 
John12:35 Koleenji Jeso anyun, “Ta komi lapkeiyet eng' kwenung'wong' eng' peetuusyek che matya. Obendoti ye ta otinye lapkeiyet, si ma namak mesundeito: ak ineendet ne wendoti eng' mesundeito koma naei ole wendi." 
John12:36 Ye ta otinye lapkeiyet, oyan lapkeiyet, si kobiit oegu weeriitap lapkeiyet. Ki mwa Jeso tuguuchu, ak kwo koung'egei icheek.”" 
John12:37 Ago nga kiga koyai kaboorunoik che chaang' che tee cho eng' tainnywa, koma iyan ineendet." 
John12:38 Kiyaak niito si kobiit kosulda ng'olyootap maotyot Isaiah, ne ki mwa, kole, “Kiptaiyat, ki iyan ng'oo ng'aleekyok? Ak kigeng'aang'ji ng'oo eutap Kiptaiyat?”" 
John12:39 Ma imuuch anyun koyan amu ng'olyoondoniito, amu ki mwa Isaiah kogeny, kole," 
John12:40 “Ki kotuch `ineendet konyekwak, ak Ki kogoochi ineendet mugulelwekwak kouegitu; si ma keere konyekwak, anan konai eng' mugulelwekwak, ak koweek, ak asoop icheek. ”" 
John12:41 Ki mwa tuguuchu Isaiah, amu ki keer toroornatennyi; ak ki ng'alaal agobo ineendet." 
John12:42 Ago ki iyan ineendet che chaang' agot eng' pounik; ago ma ng'aany ineendet amu Pharisaik, si ma ki oon icheek eng' sinagogit:" 
John12:43 amu ki chamei kalasunetap piik kosiir kalasunetap Kamuktaindet. 
John12:44 Ak ki mwa Jeso eng' kutit ne oo, kole, “Ineendet ne iyana, koma iyana anee, ago iyani ineendet ne ki iyookwo." 
John12:45 Ak ineendet ne keera kogeerei ineendet ne ki iyookwo. 
John12:46 Ki anyoo aegu lapkeiyet eng' ng'wony, si ma kotebyei eng' mesundeito chii age tugul ne iyana." 
John12:47 Ak ngo kas chii age tugul ng'aleekyuk, ama riip, ko marwookyini ineendet: amu ki ma anyoo arwookyi ng'wony, ago ki anyoo asaru ng'wony." 
John12:48 Ineendet ne eesyoa, ama taachei ng'aleekyuk, kotinyei ne irwookyin: ng'olyoot ne ki amwa, nooto ne irwookyin ineendet eng' peetuutap let." 
John12:49 Amu ki ma amwae aneege; ago ki koono Kwanda ne ki iyookwo, ng'atuutyet, ne kanyool amwa, ak ne kanyool aamda." 
John12:50 Ak angen ale saboondap koigeny ng'atuutyennyi: tuguuk che amwae anyun, ko ko uu ye ki mwaiwo Kwanda, amwae ko uu nooto.”" 
John13:1 Ak ye kingo tomo koit igoortap paska, konai Jeso kole kagoit sainnyi ne wendi eng' ng'wony kwo ole mi Kwanda, ko kagocham chechiik che mi ng'wony, kocham anyun agoi peetuutap let." 
John13:2 Ak eng' saitap amitwogigap lagat, ko kagonde chesawilyet ng'wektaet muguleldap Judas Iskaryot, ne po kap Simion," 
John13:3 ko kagonai Jeso kole kagonde Kwanda tuguuk tugul eunekyik, ak kole ki punu Kamuktaindet, ak wendi ole mi Kamuktaindet," 
John13:4 kong'eet eng' amitwogik, ak konde taban ngoroikyik, ak konam angeet ne kiusegei, kogermenegei." 
John13:5 Ak koroong'ji peek sanit, ak kotoi koun keelyegap kasubik, ak kouuse anganooto kiga kermenegei." 
John13:6 Konyo anyun ole mi Simion Petero. Yeityo koleenji Petero, Kiptaiyat, tos iuni inyee keelyekyuk?" 
John13:7 Kowolji `Jeso ineendet koleenji, “Kiit ne ayae, ko mengen nguno; ago tatun inae.”" 
John13:8 Koleenji Petero, Ma koi iun keelyekyuk. Kowolji Jeso koleenji, Ngo maunin, koma kiting'egei kiy." 
John13:9 Koleenji Simion Petero ineendet, Kiptaiyat, ma keelyekyuk kityo, ago eunekyuk ak icheek ak metinnyu." 
John13:10 Koleenji `Jeso ineendet, “Ineendet ne kagouungei koma komachei kouungei kogeny, kobatee keelyekyik, amu iuunoot inne: ak ouunootin okweek, ago ma okweek tugul.”" 
John13:11 Amu ki ingen ne kimachei kong'wekta ineendet; ki mwa amu nooto kole, “Ma ouunootin tugul.”" 
John13:12 Ak ye kingo kagoun anyun keelyekwak, ak konem ngoroikyik, ak kotep ng'wony kogeny, koleenji, “Tos ongen ne kayaiywok?" 
John13:13 Oguureno Kaneetindet, ak Kiptaiyat: ak omwae komyee; amu aa ineendet." 
John13:14 Ngo anee anyun ne aa Kiptaiyat ak Kaneetindet, ne kaun keelyekwok, ko kanyoljok ak okweek ounjige keelyek." 
John13:15 Amu kaboorwok, si oyai ak okweek ko uu ne kayaiywok." 
John13:16 Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, ma oo otwogindet kosiir kiptaiyandannyi; ama oo ineendet ne ki kiyok kosiir ineendet ne ki iyoogu." 
John13:17 Ngo nai tuguuchu, ko oboiboi ngo yai." 
John13:18 “Ma mwaei agobo okweek tugul: angen che ki alewen: ago si kobiit kosulda siruutyet, ne ki le, Ineendet ne amei magatyandennyu, ko kagong'eet kwaryandennyi koyaiywo ne ya." 
John13:19 Kasip amwaiwok kobooch nguno kotom kosulda, si ye isulda, oyan ole aa ineendet." 
John13:20 Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, Ineendet ne taachei age tugul ne ayoogu ko kataacha; ak ineendet ne taacha ko kataach kineendet ne ki iyookwo.”" 
John13:21 Kingo kagomwa Jeso ko uu nooto, koimgei eng' muguleldanyi, ak kobaoryan, kole, “Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, Ng'wektoo age eng' okweek.”" 
John13:22 Kogeergei anyun kasubik, ama naei kole, ngo mwaei agobo ng'oo." 
John13:23 Ak ki mi meset agenge ne po kasubikyik ne kitiegei tegetap Jeso ne ki chamat eng' Jeso. 
John13:24 Kong'wech anyun Simion Petero ineendet, koleenji, “Mwaiwech, tos mwaei ineendet agobo ng'oo?”" 
John13:25 Koleenji anyun ne kitiegei tegetap Jeso, “Kiptaiyat, ng'oo nooto?”" 
John13:26 Kowol Jeso anyun kole, “Ineendet ne agoochini kererutyet, ye kaaburburte.” Ak ye kingo kagoburburto kererutyet, kogoochi Judas, ne po kap Simion Iskaryot." 
John13:27 Ak kingo kagotaach kererutyet, kochut Setani ineendet. Koleenji `Jeso ineendet anyun, Yai chokyi ne imache iyai." 
John13:28 Koma konai chii eng' che ki mi amisyet kole kamwachi ineendet agobo nee. 
John13:29 Amu kileen alak eng' icheek kaleenji Jeso, “Ui al tuguuk che kimache eng' igoorto”, amu kiting'oti Judas lolet; anan ko kaleenji kogoochi kiy kibanaok." 
John13:30 Kingo kagotaach anyun ineendet kererutyet, komanda sainooto: ak ki kemoi." 
John13:31 Ye kingo kagomanda saang', komwa Jeso kole, “Kagitoroor nguno Weeriitap chii, ak kagitoroor Kamuktaindet eng' ineendet;" 
John13:32 ak tuun itoroori `Kamuktaindet ineendet eng' oriitinnyi; ak kotoroori ineendet eng' sainooto. 
John13:33 “Lagochu mengech, ta atebye kobootok ne matya. Tuun ocheeng'a: ak ko uu ye ki amwachi Yahudik aleenji, Ole awendi, ko momuuchi obwa; amwaiwok nguno ak okweek ko uu nooto." 
John13:34 Agoonok ng'atuutyet ne leel, ale, ochamye; ko uu ye ki achamak, ochamyee ak okweek." 
John13:35 Naei piik tugul kole oo kasubikyuk, ngo chamdosi.”" 
John13:36 Ki leenji anyun Simion Petero, Kiptaiyat, iwendi ano? Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Ole awendi, ko memuuchi isubwo nguno; ago tatun isubwo.”" 
John13:37 Koleenji Petero, Kiptaiyat, kalya si ma muuchi asubun agot nguno? Agoitoi saboondanyu agobo inyee." 
John13:38 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Igoitoi saboondang'ung' agobo anee? Amwaun, iman, iman, ale, kotom koote kipsoiywet, ieesyoa konyil somok.”" 
John14:1 Amogoochi mugulelwekwok koiimgei: oyani Kamuktaindet, oyana agane." 
John14:2 Miitei kooriik che chaang' eng' kootap Abba; nda ki ma ko uu nooto, ta ki amwaiwok; awendi achobwok kooret." 
John14:3 Ak ye awe achobwok kooret, anyoone kogeny amutok; si ole ami omite ak okweek." 
John14:4 Ak ole awendi, ongen ooreet." 
John14:5 Koleenji Thomas, Kiptaiyat, ma kingen ole iwendi; kinaitoi ano anyun ooreet?" 
John14:6 Koleenji Jeso, Aa ooreet, ak iman, ak saboondo: ma nyoonjin chii Kwanda, ama eng' anee." 
John14:7 Nda ki onaa, ta ki onai Abba agine: ak kaonai ineendet anyun kobooch nguno, ak kaogeer ineendet." 
John14:8 Koleenji Philipu, Kiptaiyat, iboorwech Kwanda, si koyamech." 
John14:9 Koleenji Jeso, Ki kitebi tugul ak okweek peetuusyek che chaang', ak tomo inaa, Philipu? Ineendet ne ki kogeero ko ki kogeer Kwanda: imwae eng' nee anyun, ile, Iboorwech Kwanda?" 
John14:10 Tos meyani ile ami eng' Kwanda, ak Kwanda eng' anee? Ng'aleek che amwaiwok koma mwaei aneege: ago Kwanda ne menya ne yaei poisyonikyik." 
John14:11 Iyana amu ami eng' Kwanda, ak Kwanda eng' anee: anan oyana agobo poisyonik icheeget." 
John14:12 Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, Ineendet ne iyana, koyaei agine poisyonik che ayae; ak koyaei poisyonik che eech eng' chuuto; amu awendi ole mi Kwanda." 
John14:13 Ak kiit age tugul ne osoome eng' kainennyu, ayae, si kegonyit Kwanda eng' Weeriit." 
John14:14 Ngot osoom kiy age tugul eng' kainennyu, ayae kioto." 
John14:15 Ngot ochama, oriibe ng'atuutikyuk." 
John14:16 Ak asoom Kwanda, ak kogoonok kagaigaindet age, si kotebi kobootok koigeny," 
John14:17 nooto Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne po imanit, ne ma imuuchi ng'wony kotaach; amu ma keerei ineendet, ama naei ineendet: ago ongen ineendet: amu tebyei kobootok, ak tuun tebyei eng' oriing'wong'." 
John14:18 Ma pagaaktook ko uu kibananook: anyonjinok. 
John14:19 Ta komi kitigin, si ma kogeero ng'wony; ago ogeera: amu asabe, osaptosi ak okweek." 
John14:20 Eng' peetuunooto onai ole ami eng' Abba, ak okweek eng' anee, ak anee eng' okweek." 
John14:21 Ineendet ne tinyei ng'atuutikyuk, ak koriibei, ko nooto ne chama: ak ineendet ne chama kochamaat eng' Abba, ak achame ineendet ak ang'aang'jigei ineendet." 
John14:22 Koleenji `Judas (ma Iskaryot), Kiptaiyat, kalya si ing'ang'weige, ama ing'aang'jige ng'wony?" 
John14:23 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Ngo chama chii, koriip ng'olyoondennyu: ak kocham Abba ineendet ak kebwonji ineendet, ak kemeny kobooto ineendet." 
John14:24 Ineendet ne ma chama ko ma riibei ng'aleekyuk: ak ma nenyu ng'olyoot ne ogase, ago po Kwanda ne ki iyookwo." 
John14:25 Kaamwaiwok tuguuchu, kota ami kobootok." 
John14:26 Ago ineetook tuguuk tugul Kagaigaindet, Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ne iyoogu Kwanda eng' kainennyu, ak kobwaatwok tugul che kaamwaiwok." 
John14:27 Abagakwok kaalyeet; agoonok kalyennyu: ma koonok ko uu ye koonu ng'wony. Among' koiimgei mugulelwekwok, anan koiyweis." 
John14:28 Kaogas ko uu ye kaamwaiwok ale, Awendi, ak anyoone ole omi. Ngot ochama, ko oboiboi, amu awendi ole mi Kwanda: amu oo Kwanda eng' anee." 
John14:29 Ak kaamwaiwok nguno kotom koyaak, si ye kagoyaak, oyan." 
John14:30 Ma ng'alaalwok miising', amu nyoonei ne oo ne po ng'wony: ama tinyei kiy eng' anee;" 
John14:31 ago si konai ng'wony kole achame Kwanda, ak ko uu ye ki koono Kwanda ng'atuutyet, ayae ko uu nooto. Ong'eetyee, keebe.”" 
John15:1 Aa keetit ne po iman ne po sabibuk, ak semberindet Abba." 
John15:2 Tilei temeet age tugul ne mi eng' anee ne ma iyei logoek, ak kotiliili temeet age tugul ne yiei logoek si koi logoek alak." 
John15:3 Oo tiliileen nguno amu ng'aleek che kaamwaiwok. 
John15:4 Omenya, ak amenyok. Ko uu ye ma imuuchi temeet koi logoek ineegei, ngot koma menyei keetit; ko momuuchi ak okweek, ngot ko momenya." 
John15:5 Aa keetitap sabibuk, ko oo mooriik: ineendet ne menya, ak amenye ineendet, ko nooto ne yiei logoek che chaang': amu momuuchi oyai kiy okweegei ngo ma mi anee kobootok." 
John15:6 Ngo ma menya chii, kewiirtoi ineendet ko uu temetap keetit, si koyaam; ak koyum piik, ak kowiirchi ma, ak kolalyo." 
John15:7 Ngot omenya, ak komenyok ng'aleekyuk, osoom anyun kiy age tugul ne omache, si keyaiywok." 
John15:8 Kigonyiti Abba eng' niito, ye oiyie logoek che chaang'; si oegu kasubikyuk." 
John15:9 Ko uu ye ki chama Kwanda, ko uu nooto ki achamak agane; otebi eng' chamyennyu." 
John15:10 Ngot oriibe ng'atuutikyuk, otebye anyun eng' chamyennyu; ko uu ye ki ariip ng'atuutik che po Abba, ak atebye eng' chamyennyi." 
John15:11 Kaamwaiwok tuguuchu, si kotebi eng' okweek poiboiyennyu, si kobiit kosulda poiboiyeng'wong'." 
John15:12 Ng'atuutyennyu ni, ale ochamye, ko uu ye ki achamak." 
John15:13 Ma tinyei chii chamyet ne siirei ni, ale kogoito chii saboondanyi agobo choronokyik." 
John15:14 Oo choronokyuk, ngot oyai tuguuk che ang'atook." 
John15:15 Ma aguurenok otwogik; amu ma naei otwogindet kiit ne yaei kiptaiyandennyi: ago kaaguurenok choronok; amu kaang'ang'wok tuguuk tugul che ki agase Abba. 
John15:16 Ki ma olewena, ago ki alewenok, ak ki andeak, ale obe ak oii logoek, si kobiit kotebi logoekwok: si kobiit kogoonok Kwanda kiit age tugul ne osoome eng' kainennyu." 
John15:17 Ang'atwok tuguuchu, ale ochamye." 
John15:18 Ngo wechok ng'wony, onai ole ki kowecha kotom kowechok." 
John15:19 Nda oo po ng'wony, ta chamei ng'wony chechiik: ago amu mo po ng'wony, ago ki alewenok eng' ng'wony, kowechok ng'wony anyun amu nooto." 
John15:20 Obwaat ng'olyoot ne ki amwaiwok, Ma siirei otwogindet kiptaiyandennyi. Ngot kogiusa anee, kousok ak okweek; ngot ko ki nam ng'olyoondennyu, konamei neng'wong' agine." 
John15:21 Ago yaiywok tuguuchu tugul agobo kainennyu, amu ma nai ineendet ne ki iyookwo." 
John15:22 Nda ki ma anyoo ang'alaalji icheek, ta ma tinyei tengek: ago nguno koma tinyei kiit ne ityagegei agobo tengektonywa." 
John15:23 Ineendet ne wecho ko kawech Abba agine. 
John15:24 Nda ki ma ayai eng' kwenunnywa poisyonik che ki ma yai chiito age, ta ki ma kotinyei tengek: ago nguno ko kagogeerech ak kagowechech anee ak Abba." 
John15:25 Ago, si kosulda ng'olyoot ne ki kisir eng' Ng'atuutikwak, keele, Ki kowecha puch." 
John15:26 Ago ye kagoit Kagaigaindet, ne tuun ayookwok kobunu Kwanda, Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne po imanit, ne punu Kwanda, konyo kobaoryanjo:" 
John15:27 ak obaoryani ak okweek, amu ki omi kobooto kobooch taunet." 
John16:1 Kaamwaiwok tuguuchu, si ma kinachak." 
John16:2 Oonok eng' sinagogisyek. Nyoonei sait, ne ibwaati chii tugul ne parok kole, ayachini Kamuktaindet poisyet." 
John16:3 Ak yaei tuguuchu, amu ma nai Kwanda, anan anee." 
John16:4 Ago kaamwaiwok tuguuchu, si ye nyo sainnywa, omuuchi obwaat ole ki amwaiwok agobo chuuto. “Ago ki ma amwaiwok tuguuchu eng' taunet, amu ki ami kobootok." 
John16:5 Ago kawe nguno ole mi ineendet ne ki iyookwo; ama mi age eng' okweek ne teebena kole, ‘Iwendi ano?’" 
John16:6 Amu kaamwaiwok tuguuchu, ko kanyi mugulelwekwok arageneet." 
John16:7 Ago amwaiwok ne po iman: myee eng' okweek ngawe: amu ngo mawe, ko manyonjinok Kagaigaindet; ago ngot awe, ayookwok ineendet." 
John16:8 Ak ye kagonyo ineendet, kogikyi ng'wony agobo tengekto, ak imanda, ak kirwooget:" 
John16:9 agobo tengekto, amu ma iyana;" 
John16:10 agobo imanda, amu awendi ole mi Kwanda, ama ogeero kogeny;" 
John16:11 agobo kirwooget, amu ki kirwookyi ne oo ne po ng'wonyuni.”" 
John16:12 “Ta atinye tuguuk che chaang' che kata ta amwaiwok, ago ma omuuchi omuite nguno." 
John16:13 Ago ye tuun kagonyo ineendet, Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne po imanit, kondoiywok agoi oit imanda tugul: amu ma mwaei ineegei; ago mwaei tuguuk tugul che kasei: ak kong'ang'wok tuguuk che pwoonei." 
John16:14 Itoroora: amu namei chechuuk, ak kong'ang'wok." 
John16:15 Chechuuk tuguuk tugul che tinyei Kwanda: nooto kaamwa, ale, namei chechuuk, ak koboorwok.”" 
John16:16 “Tomo kitigin, si ma ogeera kogeny; ak mi kitigin kogeny, si ogeero.”" 
John16:17 Kong'alaaljigei anyun alak eng' kasubikyik kole, “Nee ni kamwaiwech kole, ‘Mi kitigin, si ma ogeera; ak mi kitigin kogeny, si ogeera: ak, Amu awendi ole mi Kwanda?’ ”" 
John16:18 Kole anyun, “Nee ni kamwa kole, ‘Mi kitigin?’ Ma kingen kiit ne mwaei.”" 
John16:19 Ki nai Jeso anyun kole, machei koteebe pichooto ineendet, ak ki leenji, “Tos oteebegei okweegei agobo ng'olyoondoni kaamwa ale mi kitigin, si ma ogeera, ak mi kitigin kogeny, si ogeera?" 
John16:20 Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale orirtosi ak oteitosi, ago paibai ng'wony: oaragendosi, ago kiweechi arageneng'wong' koek poiboiyet." 
John16:21 Arageni tamonet ye machei kosigiis, amu kait sainnyi; ago ye kagosich lakweet, koma kobwaati ng'wanindo kogeny, eng' poiboiyet amu kagesikyi chii ng'wony." 
John16:22 Nooto anyun otinye arageneet nguno: ago ta ageerok kogeny, ak poiboi mugulelwekwok, ama rebenok chii poiboiyeng'wong'." 
John16:23 Ama oteebena kiy eng' peetuunooto. Amwaiwok, iman, iman, ale, Ngot osoom Kwanda kiy age tugul, kogoonok eng' kainennyu." 
John16:24 Tom osoom kiy eng' kainennyu: osoom, si onyooru, si kobiit kosulda poiboiyeng'wong'.”" 
John16:25 “Kaamwaiwok tuguuchu eng' kalewenaik: ago nyoonei sait, ye ma ang'alaalwok eng' kalewenaik, ago aboorwok komyee agobo Kwanda." 
John16:26 Osoome peetuunooto eng' kainennyu: amamwaiwok, ale ateebee Kwanda kiy agobo okweek;" 
John16:27 amu chamok ineendet Kwanda, amu ki ochama, ak ki oyan ole ki abunu Kwanda." 
John16:28 Ki abunu Kwanda, anyoonji ng'wony: abagaaktoi ng'wony kogeny, ak agetitegei ole mi Kwanda.”" 
John16:29 Koleenji kasubikyik, “Keero, ing'alaali nguno komyee kotook, ama imwae kalewenet.”" 
John16:30 Kingen nguno keele ingen tuguuk tugul, ama nyoljin chii koteebenen kiy: kiyani eng' niito keele ki ibunu Kamuktaindet." 
John16:31 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Oyani nguno?" 
John16:32 Ogeero, nyoonei sait, ee, kagonyo nguno, ye kiyestook, kwo chii tugul oldanyi, ak obagaakta aneege: ago ma mi aneege, amu mi Kwanda kobooto." 
John16:33 Kaamwaiwok tuguuchu, si kobiit onyoorunena kaalyeet. Otinye nyalilda eng' ng'wony! Ago onyiganitu; amu kaaterter ng'wony.”" 
John17:1 Ki mwa Jeso ng'aleechu; ak konyal kipsengwet, ak kole, “Abba, kagonyo sait; itoroor Weeriing'ung', si kotoroorin Weeriit;" 
John17:2 ko uu ye ki igoochi ineendet kimnateet koboi piik tugul, si kobiit kogoochi saboondap koigeny tugul che ki igoochi ineendet." 
John17:3 Ak ni saboondap koigeny, ale konain Kamuktaindet ne inyeendet inyegei ne po iman, ak Jeso Kristo, ne ki iyoogu." 
John17:4 Ki atoroorin eng' ng'wony, amu kaagesu poisyet ne ki igoono ayai." 
John17:5 Ak nguno, ee Abba, itoroora eng' inyeendet inyegei eng' toroornatet ne ki atinye kemi tuwai kotom kobiit ng'wony." 
John17:6 Ki aboorchi kaineng'ung' piik che ki igoono eng' ng'wony. Ki cheguuk, ak ki igoono; ak ki koriip ng'olyoondeng'ung'." 
John17:7 Kagonai nguno kole punun tuguuk tugul che ki igoono; 
John17:8 amu ki agoochi icheek ng'aleek che ki igoono ak ki kotaach, ak ki konai iman kole ki abunu ole imi, ak ki koyan kole ki iyookwo." 
John17:9 Asaae agobo icheek: ma saae agobo ng'wony, ago agobo icheek che ki igoono; amu cheguuk:" 
John17:10 ak tuguuk tugul chechuuk ko cheguuk, ak cheguuk ko chechuuk: ak ki itoroora eng' icheek." 
John17:11 Ak ma amite ng'wony, ago mi ng'wony chu, ak anyoone ole imi. Abba ne Tiliil, riip eng' kaineng'ung' icheek che ki igoono, si kobiit koek agenge, ko uu acheek." 
John17:12 Ki ariip eng' kaineng'ung' icheek che ki igoono, ye kota kemi ak icheek: ki ariip icheek, ama pet agot agenge eng' icheek, kobatee weeriitap luseet; si kobiit kosulda siruutyet." 
John17:13 Ak kanyonjin nguno; ak amwae tuguuchu eng' ng'wony, si kobiit kosulda poiboiyennyu eng' icheek." 
John17:14 Ki agoochi ng'olyoondeng'ung'; ak kawech ng'wony icheek, amu ma po ng'wony, ko uu ye ma po ng'wony anee." 
John17:15 Masaae ale imut icheek eng' ng'wony, ago ale iriip icheek eng' ineendet ne ya." 
John17:16 Ma po ng'wony icheek, ko uu ye ma po ng'wony anee." 
John17:17 Itiliil icheek eng' imanit: imanit ng'olyoondeng'ung'. 
John17:18 Ko uu ye ki iyookwo anyo ng'wony, ko uu nooto kaayookte icheek koba ng'wony." 
John17:19 Ak atabaanige agobo icheek si kobiit kitabaan icheek eng' imanit. 
John17:20 Amasaae agobo chu kityo, ago asaae agobo icheek che tuun iyana amu ng'olyoonnywa;" 
John17:21 si kobiit koek icheek tugul agenge; ko uu ye imi inyee Abba, eng' anee, ak anee eng' inyee, si kobiit kotep icheek eng' acheek: si kobiit koyan ng'wony kole ki iyookwo." 
John17:22 Ak kaagoochi icheek toroornatet ne ki igoono; si kobiit koek agenge ko uu ye ki agenge acheek; 
John17:23 anee eng' icheek, ak inyee eng' anee, si kobiit koek icheek che ititaatiin eng' agenge; si kobiit konai ng'wony kole ki iyookwo, ak ichame icheek, ko uu ye ichama.”" 
John17:24 Abba, amache ale kotebi kobooto eng' ole ami, icheek che ki igoono; si kobiit kogeer toroornatennyu ne ki igoono; amu ki ichama kotom kelumda ng'wony." 
John17:25 “Ee Abba ne po imanda, ki ma kongenin ng'wony, ago ki angenin; ak ki konai chu kole, ki iyookwo." 
John17:26 Ki ang'aang'ji icheek kaineng'ung', ak ta ang'aang'jini; si kobiit kotebee icheek chamyet ne ki ichamena, ak anee eng' icheek.”" 
John18:1 Ye kingo kagomwa Jeso ng'aleechu, koba ak kasubikyik kolanda eng' kereruut ne kiguure Kedron, ole ki mi mbareet, ole ki wo ineendet, kobooto kasubikyik." 
John18:2 Ak ki ingen koronooto Judas agine, ne king'wektoi ineendet: amu ki cham kowendi Jeso yooto kobooto kasubikyik." 
John18:3 Ak kingo kagonyoor Judas lugeetap kiplugotinik, ak kiptainik che punu tisiik che eecheen ak Pharisaik, kobwa kotinyei taisyek ak kegenganik ak kariik che po lugeet." 
John18:4 Kwo anyun Jeso, ko kagonai tuguuk tugul che pwaanjin ineendet ak koleenji, “Ocheeng'e ng'oo?”" 
John18:5 Kowolji koleenji, “Jeso ne po Nazareth.” Koleenji Jeso, “Aa ineendet.” Ak ki tononi kobooto icheek Judas agine, ne king'wektoi ineendet." 
John18:6 Ye kingo mwachi anyun kole, “Aa ineendet,” kobee patai ak kobutyo." 
John18:7 Ki teebe anyun icheek kogeny, kole, “Ocheeng'e ng'oo?” Ak kole, “Jeso ne po Nazareth.”" 
John18:8 Kowol Jeso, kole, “Kaamwaiwok ale aa ineendet; nooto anyun ngo cheeng'a ounde chu koba.”" 
John18:9 Si kosulda ng'olyoot ne ki mwa kole, “Ma petena agot agenge eng' chooto ki igoono.”" 
John18:10 King'us anyun Simion Petero rotwetap chok ne ki tinyei, ak koep otwogindetap tisiindet ne oo, koep iitinnyi ne po tai. Ki kiguure otwogindonooto Malko." 
John18:11 Koleenji Jeso anyun Petero, Weekyi rotweet choget: tos maee kigombet ne kagoono Kwanda?" 
John18:12 Konam anyun lugeet ak kiptaiyat ne oo, ak kiptainik che po Yahudik, Jeso ak koraat ineendet," 
John18:13 ak komutyi Anas korook; amu ki kabyugoit ne po Caiaphas, ne ki tisiindet ne oo kenyinooto." 
John18:14 Caiaphas nooto ne ki iboorchi Yahudik kole, nyolu komechi chiito agenge piik." 
John18:15 Ki isup anyun Simion Petero Jeso, ak age eng' kasubik. Amu ki ingengei tisiindet ne oo ak nooto agenge eng' kasubik, koba koot oriit kobooto Jeso agoi kapkirwoogetap tisiindet ne oo." 
John18:16 Kitononi Petero eng' saang' ye neegit kurgeet. Ki manda anyun chiichooto agenge eng' kasubik ne ki ingengei ak tisiindet ne oo, ak kong'alaalji chepto ne kiriibei kurgeet, ki imut Petero konyo ko." 
John18:17 Koleenji anyun chepto ne kiriibei kurgeet Petero, Ma ii agenge eng' kasubigap chiichi? Kole, Ma anee." 
John18:18 Ak kitonondos eng' yooto otwogik ak kiptainik, che kiga kolaal maat ne po nesek, amu ki kaitit; ak kiyue maat: ak kitononi Petero agine kobooto icheek, koyue maat." 
John18:19 Ki teebe anyun tisiindet ne oo Jeso agobo kasubikyik ak kaneetisyennyi. 
John18:20 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Ki ang'alaalji ng'wony, amauny ng'olyoo; ki aneetisye kotugul eng' sinagogisyek, ak eng' Hekaluut, ole tuiyechin Yahudik tugul; amamwa kiy eng' ung'oot." 
John18:21 Amu nee si iteebena? Teebe icheek che ki kas kiit ne ki amwachi icheek; keero, ingen chu tuguuk che ki amwa.”" 
John18:22 Ak ye kingo kagomwa ko uu niito, korabach Jeso age eng' kiptainik che kitonondos eng' yooto kole, “Iwoljini tisiindet ne oo ko uu nooto?”" 
John18:23 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Ngot ko kaamwa ne ya, ibaoryan agobo nooto ya: ago ngot ko myee, ko amu nee si irabaacha?”" 
John18:24 Ki iyookto anyun Anas ineendet ko rataat kwo kap Kaiapa, tisiindet ne oo." 
John18:25 Ak kitononi Simion Petero koyue maat. Koleenji anyun icheek ineendet, Ma ii age aginye ne po kasubikyik? Kotiiyo kole, “Ma aa ineendet.”" 
John18:26 Kole otwogindet age ne po tisiindet ne oo ne kitilyonut ak chiichooto kiebei Petero itinnyi, Koma ageerin eng' mbar omi ak ineendet." 
John18:27 Kotiiyo anyun Petero kogeny; ak eng' sainooto koote kipsoiywet. 
John18:28 Ki imut Jeso anyun kong'etee kap Kaiapa kwo Praitorium: ak kita ko karon miising'; ak ma pa icheeget Praitorium oriit, si ma ng'woneegitu, ago si kobiit koam paska." 
John18:29 Ki manda Pilato anyun kwo ole mi icheek, ak kole, “Nee ng'olyoo ne orwookyine chiichi?”" 
John18:30 Kowolji koleenji, “Nda koma ko chalwogin chiichi, ta koma kimutu ineendet konyo taing'ung'.”" 
John18:31 Koleenji Pilato icheek anyun, Onam ineendet okweek, ak orwookyi ko uu ng'atuutyeng'wong'. Koleenji anyun Yahudik, Ma chamdaat eng' acheek kebar chii age tugul:" 
John18:32 si kobiit kosulda ng'olyootap Jeso, ne ki mwa, kobooru meet ole meitoi ineendet." 
John18:33 Ki wo anyun kogeny Pilato Praitorium oriit, ak koguur Jeso, koleenji, “Tos ii Laitoryatap Yahudik?”" 
John18:34 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Imwae ng'olyoondoni inyegei anan komwaun alak agobo anee?”" 
John18:35 Kowol Pilato kole, “Aa Yahudyot? Kagomutun tainnyu pororyeng'ung' ak tisiik che eecheen. Ki iyai nee?”" 
John18:36 Kowol Jeso, kole, “Ma po ng'wonyuni laitornatennyu: nda po ng'wonyuni laitornatennyu, ko kata yaei pooryeet kasubikyuk si ma kindea eunegap Yahudik: ago nguno koma po laitornatennyu oli.”" 
John18:37 Koleenji anyun Pilato ineendet, “Ara, ii laitoryat so?” Kowol Jeso kole, “Imwae ile aa laitoryat. Ki kisicha amu niito, ak ki anyoo ng'wony amu niito, si kobiit abaoryanji imanit. Kasei kutinnyu chii age tugul ne po imanit.”" 
John18:38 Koleenji Pilato, Nee imanit? Ak ye kingo kagomwa ko uu ni, komanda kogeny ole mi Yahudik, ak koleenji, “Ma anyoorchi anee leluut ineendet." 
John18:39 Ago otinye piteet, ole atyakwok age eng' paska: ara omache atyakwok Laitoryatap Yahudik?”" 
John18:40 Kobolyo anyun kogeny, kole “Ma chiichi, ago Barabbas!” Ago anyun, ki rebindet Barabbas." 
John19:1 Ki nam anyun Pilato Jeso, ak kobire kipchoritiit." 
John19:2 Ak kita kiplugotinik ngatyet ne po katook, ak konde metit, ak kolaakyi ineendet ngoryeet ne aruus ne piriir;" 
John19:3 ak kobwa ole mi ineendet kole, “Kigatin, Laitoryatap Yahudik!” Ak korabach ineendet." 
John19:4 Ak kimanda Pilato kogeny, ak koleenji icheek, “Ogeero, kamutwak ineendet konyo taing'wong', si onai ole ma anyoorchi anee leluut ineendet.”" 
John19:5 Komong' Jeso anyun konyo saang', ko kerat metit eng' ngatyetap katook, kolaaganu ngoryonooto aruus ne piriir. Ak koleenji Pilato pichooto, “Ogeer chiichi anyun o!”" 
John19:6 Ye kingo keer anyun ineendet tisiik che eecheen ak kiptainik, kobolyo, kole, “Igartaat! Igartaat!” Koleenji Pilato, “Omut okweek ineendet ak ogartaat; amu ma anyoorchi leluut.”" 
John19:7 Kowolji Yahudik koleenji, “Ki tinyei ng'atuutyet, ak kanyool kome amu ng'atuutyonooto, amu ki yaigei koek Weeriitap Kamuktaindet.”" 
John19:8 Ye kingo kas anyun Pilato mwaonooto, koywei miising';" 
John19:9 ak ki wo Praitorium oriit kogeny, ak koleenji Jeso, Ibunu ano? Ago ma wolji `Jeso ineendet." 
John19:10 Koleenji Pilato anyun ineendet, “Metwekwa? Mengen ile atinye kimnateet atyachin, ak atinye kimnateet agartatin?”" 
John19:11 Kowolji Jeso koleenji, “Kama ko tetinye kimnateet iyaiywo kiy, nda kama kigoonin eng' parak; nooto anyun, tinyei ineendet ne koindea euneguk tengekto ne oo kosiir.”" 
John19:12 Kobooch yooto kocheeng' Pilato kotyach ineendet: ago ki polyo Yahudik, kole, “Ngot ityaach chiichi, koma ii chorweet ne po Caesarea: reenyei Caesarea chii age tugul ne yaegei koek laitoryat.”" 
John19:13 Ye kingo kas anyun Pilato ng'aleechuuto, komut Jeso komong' saang', ak kotep ng'wony eng' ng'echereetap kirwooget eng' ole kiguure Teteetap Koik, ago kiguure eng' kutitap Yahudik, Gabata." 
John19:14 Ki chobetap paska peetuunooto: ak ki olo po sait lo. Ak ki leenji Yahudik, “Ogeero, Laitoryandeng'wong'!”" 
John19:15 Kobolyo pichooto kole, “Iste ineendet! Iste ineendet! Igartaat ineendet!” Koleenji Pilato anyun icheek, agartaat laitoryandeng'wong'? Kowol tisiik che eecheen, kole, ma kitinye laitorya kobatee Caesarea." 
John19:16 Kogoito anyun Pilato ineendet kigartaat. Konam anyun icheek Jeso ak komut: 
John19:17 ak komanda, koibei ineegei kimurtoiyot, agoi koit ole kiguure Kooretap terta, ne kiguure eng' kutitap Yahudik, Golgota:" 
John19:18 ole ki igartate icheek ineendet, kobooto aeng' alak, age komosi ak age komosi, ak ki mi Jeso kween." 
John19:19 Ak kisir anyun Pilato sireet, ak konde kimurtoiyot. Ki kisir keele, “JESO NE PO NASARET, LAITORYAT NE PO YAHUDIK.”" 
John19:20 Kosoman anyun Yahudik che chaang' sironiito: amu kineegite nganaseet ole ki kigartate Jeso: ak ki kisir eng' kutitap Yahudik, ak Romanik, ak Yunanik." 
John19:21 Koleenji anyun tisiik che eecheen che po Yahudik Pilato, “Amesir ile, Laitoryat ne po Yahudik: ago, ki mwa kole, ‘Aa Laitoryat ne po Yahudik.’ ”" 
John19:22 Kowol Pilato kole, “Kiit ne kaasir ko kaasir.”" 
John19:23 Ye kingo kagogartaat anyun kiplugotinik Jeso, konam ngoroikyik, kopchei koek kebeberwek ang'wan, koip asigarindet age tugul kebeberta age; ak ko uu nooto sumet agine: ak ki ma kotinyei sumet ole ki kituiye, ki kinap koek agenge kongeete parak agoi kapkelyen." 
John19:24 Koleenjigei anyun icheegei, “Amongegereer, ago ongeseer parbareek, si kenai chiito ne punjin: si kosulda siruutyet ne mwaei kole, Kipchechigei ngoroikyuk, Ak kolotyigei ngoryennyu. Ki yai anyun kiplugotinik tuguuchuuto.”" 
John19:25 Ago kitonondos eng' ye neegitee kimurtoiyotap Jeso kamet, ak chepkametap kamet, Maria ne po Klopa, ak Maria Magdalene." 
John19:26 Ye kingo keer Jeso anyun kamet, ak nooto agenge eng' kasubikyik ne ki chamei Jeso kotonondos eng' yooto, koleenji kamet, “Chebyosoni, keer weeriing'ung'!”" 
John19:27 Koleenji anyun nooto agenge eng' kasubikyik, “Keer kamenng'ung'!” Ak kobooch sainooto komut ineendet chebyosonooto kwo koonnyi." 
John19:28 Kingo pata chooto, ko kagonai Jeso kole kagogeskei tuguuk tugul, si kobiit kosulda siruutyet, komwa kole, “Ama melel.”" 
John19:29 Kiga kinde yooto tereet ne nyiitaat siki: konyiit anyun sponjit siki ak koyogoochine husop, konde kutinnyi." 
John19:30 Ye kingo kagotaach Jeso siki, komwa kole, “Kagogeskei.” Ki abuch anyun metinnyi, ak kogoito saboondanyi." 
John19:31 Amu ki Chobeet ak ki ma kemakyin muuswek kotebee kimurtoiyot eng' sabato (amu ki oo peetuunooto po sabato), kosoom Yahudik Pilato kole keiri keelyekwak, si kesutei." 
John19:32 Kobwa anyun kiplugotinik, ak koiri keelyegap ne po tai, ak ne po age ne kiga kigartaat kobooto ineendet." 
John19:33 Ago ye kingo pwa ye mi Jeso, ak kogeer kole kagome, ko mata koiri keelyekyik:" 
John19:34 ago kitoore ng'otit karaastanyi age eng' kiplugotinik, ak koma tyanit komong' korotiik ak peek." 
John19:35 Ak kibaoryan ineendet ne ki keer, ak ko po iman paornatennyi: ak ingen ineendet kole mwaei iman, si kobiit oyan ak okweek." 
John19:36 Ki yaak tuguuchu, si kobiit kosulda siruutyet ne ki le, “Ma ki iriei kowennyi.”" 
John19:37 Ak kogeny mwaei siruutyet age kole, “Tuun keerei icheek ineendet ne kitoorei.”" 
John19:38 Ak kingo pata tuguuchu, kwo Joseph ne po Arimatea, ne ki agenge eng' kasubigap Jeso eng' ung'oot, amu ki iywei Yahudik, kosoom Pilato kole kosut muustap Jeso: ak ki chamji Pilato. Konyo anyun koip poortanyi." 
John19:39 Ak ki nyo agine Nikodemo, ne ki nyoonji Jeso kemoi atkinye tai, koibu tuguuk che uu igomoik che ki kiburukto nyamdutik alak, che ki olo po ratilisyek pogol." 
John19:40 Kisut anyun muustap Jeso, ak kotaa eng' ngoroik che po katanit kobooto nyamdutik, ko uu piteetap Yahudik ye tubisyei." 
John19:41 Ki mi mbareet ole ki kigartate ineendet; ak ki mi mbaranooto kererit ne leel ne kitom ketupchi chii. 
John19:42 Ki inde anyun Jeso olooto amu peetuutap chobetap Yahudik, amu ki neegit kererit." 
John20:1 Ki nyo `Maria Magdalene kererit, karon ko kairir emet, eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po wigiit. Kogeer koita ko kageisto eng' kererit." 
John20:2 Kolabat kot koit ole mi Simion Petero, ak nooto agenge eng' kasubik, ne ki chamei Jeso ineendet ak koleenji icheek, “Kageip Kiptaiyat eng' kererit, ama kingen ole kaginde.”" 
John20:3 Koba anyun Petero, ak nin agenge eng' kasubik, kotokyigei kererit." 
John20:4 Ki rwai tuwai kibagenge: ak kilabat nin agenge eng' kasubik kondoe Petero, ak kosip koit kererit;" 
John20:5 ak kingo ng'uruuk kogeer oriit, kogeer ngoroigap katanit ko itootin; ago ma wo oriit." 
John20:6 Konyo anyun Simion Petero agine, kosubu ineendet ak kwo kererit oriit; ak kogeer ngoroik che po katanit ko itootin;" 
John20:7 ago angeet ne ki miitei metinnyi ko ki ma komi, kobooto ngoroik che po katanit, ago ki mamanat ineegei eng' oldo age." 
John20:8 Ki wo oriit agine nooto agenge eng' kasubik ne kiga sip koit kererit, ak ki keer ak ki iyan." 
John20:9 Amu kitom konai siruutyet ne ki le, ng'eetei kogeny matiny eng' che ki pek." 
John20:10 Koba kaa anyun kogeny chooto po kasubik. 
John20:11 Ago ki tononi Maria eng' kererit saang', koriirei: ak ye kita koriirei, kong'uruuk koiit kererit;" 
John20:12 ak ki keer malaikaisyek aeng' che leelach ngoroik kotebyei ng'wony, age eng' ole po metit, ak age eng' ole po keelyek, eng' ole ki mi poortap Jeso." 
John20:13 Ak ki leenji, “Kobogoryondoni, kalya si iriir?” Koleenji, “Amu kageip Kiptaiyandennyu, amangen ole kaginde ineendet.”" 
John20:14 Ak ye kingo kagomwa ko uu nooto, kowelelgei, kogeer Jeso kotononi, ama konai kole Jeso nooto." 
John20:15 Koleenji Jeso, Kobogoryondoni, kalya si iriir? Icheeng'e ng'oo? Ki ibwaati koleen ineendet ko riibindetap mbareet, ak koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, ngo keip ineendet, imwaiwo ole kainde, si aip ineendet.”" 
John20:16 Kotwekyi `Jeso inee kole, “Maria!” Koguskong' ak koleenji eng' kutitap Yahudik, “Rabboni!” Ye kiweech ko, “Kaneetindoni.”" 
John20:17 Koleenji Jeso, “Ametiinyo; amu tomo atogosyi kap Kwanda; ago ui ole mi tupchosyekyuk, ak ki leenji, ‘Atogosyini kap Abba, ago Abba neng'wong', Kamuktaindennyu ak ko Kamuktaindeng'wong'.’ ”" 
John20:18 Konyo Maria Magdalene koleenji kasubik, “Kaageer Kiptaiyat”; ak kagomwachi tuguuchu ineendet." 
John20:19 Ak ki eng' koskoleng'utap peetuunooto po tai ne po wigiit, ye kiga keger kurgotik eng' ole kimi kasubik, amu ki iywei Yahudik, konyo Jeso kotonone kwenunnywa ak koleenji, “Ingotep kaalyeet eng' okweek.”" 
John20:20 Ak ye kingo kagomwa niito, koboorchi eunekyik ak karaastanyi. Koboiboitu anyun kasubik, ye kingo keer Kiptaiyat." 
John20:21 Koleenji Jeso anyun kogeny, “Ingotep kaalyeet eng' okweek: ko uu ye ki iyookwo Kwanda, ayooktook ak okweek ko uu nooto.”" 
John20:22 Ak ye kingo kagomwa niito, kobusyi, ak koleenji, “Otaach Kabuuset ne Tiliil:" 
John20:23 piik alak tugul che onyochini kaat tengekwogikwak, kenyochin kaat; ak alak tugul che oesyoi onyochi kaat, keesyoi kenyochi kaat.”" 
John20:24 Ago ki ma komi Thomas ne ki kiguure Didumo, ne ki age eng' taman ak aeng', kobooto icheek ye kinyonei Jeso." 
John20:25 Koleenji anyun chuun alage che po kasubik, Kagegeer Kiptaiyat. Ago ki leenji Thomas icheek, Ngot ko mageer eng' eunekyik perutik che po kipchumarisyek, ak ande mornennyu perutigap kipchumarisyek, ak ande eunnyu karaastanyi, ko mayani." 
John20:26 Ak kingo pata peetuusyek sisiitu ko ki mi ko kasubikyik kogeny, ak kimi Thomas kobooto icheek. Ki nyo anyun Jeso, ko kerotin kurgotik, ak kotonon eng' kwenunnywa, ak komwa kole, “Ingotep kaalyeet eng' okweek.”" 
John20:27 Koleenji Thomas, Iyogou morneng'ung', ak igeer eunekyuk; ak iyogou eung'ung' ak inde karaastanyu; si meegu ne ma tinyei kayaneet, ago iyan." 
John20:28 Kowolji Thomas koleenji, “Kiptaiyandennyu ak ko Kamuktaindet nenyu!”" 
John20:29 Koleenji `Jeso ineendet, “Kaiyan amu kaigeera: iberuurotin icheek che iyani ama keer.”" 
John20:30 Ki yai Jeso kaboorunoik alak che chaang' eng' taitap kasubik che ma siraatiin eng' bukuini: 
John20:31 ago ki kisir chu, si kobiit oyan ole Jeso ko Kristo, Weeriitap Kamuktaindet; ak si kobiit ye oyani onyooru saboondo eng' kainennyi." 
John21:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu koboorchigei Jeso kogeny kasubik eng' araraita ne po Tiberia; ki iboorchigei ko uu ni. 
John21:2 Ki mi tugul, Simion Petero ak Thomas ne kiguure Didumo, ak Nathanael ne po Kana ne po Galilaya, ak weeriigap Zebedayo, ak aeng' alak che po kasubikyik." 
John21:3 Koleenji Simion Petero, Kawe aram njireenik. Koleenji chuun alage, Kibendi agacheek kobooten. Koba anyun ak kolaany moingetap peek: ak ma nam kiy kemounooto." 
John21:4 Ago ye kimachei koeech, kotonon Jeso eng' ngeguut: ago ma nai kasubik kole Jeso." 
John21:5 Koleenji Jeso anyun, Lagochu, otinye kiy ne oame? Kowolji koleenji, Achicha." 
John21:6 Ak ki leenji icheek, Owiirchi regereiywot ne kiname njireenik komostap tai ne po moinget, si onyooru. Kowiirchi anyun, ak mata komuuch kochuut amu chaang'indap njireenik." 
John21:7 Komwachi agenge eng' kasubik, nooto ne chamei Jeso, Petero, koleenji, “Kiptaiyat niito!” Ye kingo kas anyun Simion Petero kole Kiptaiyat, kolaach kotit anyun (amu kimi aach ngor) ak kochoorchigei araraita." 
John21:8 Ago ki pwa chuun alage che po kasubik kobunu moinget ne ming'in (amu ki ma ko looen eng' ngeguut, ago ki olo po kakwautik che po euut pogol aeng'), kochuutu regereiywondonooto mi njireenik." 
John21:9 Nooto anyun, ye kingo it ngeguut, kogeer eng' yooto maat ne po nesek, ak kiwatanat njiryot eng' yooto, ak magatyat." 
John21:10 Koleenji Jeso, Oibu njireenik alak chu korame nguno." 
John21:11 Kolaany Simion Petero moinget, ak kochuut regereiywot konyo ngeguut, ak ki nyiitaat njireenik che eecheen, pogol agenge ak konom ak somok: ak nganda ki chaang' njireenik miising', ko ki ma kerer regereiywondonooto." 
John21:12 Koleenji `Jeso icheek, “Obwa oamisye.” Ma kany age tugul eng' kasubik koteebe kole, “Ii ng'oo?” Amu ki ingen kole ineendet ko Kiptaiyat." 
John21:13 Konyo anyun Jeso ak konam magatyat, ak kogoochi, kobooto njireenik ak icheek." 
John21:14 Niito ko ne po somok koboorchingei Jeso kasubik, ko kagong'eet ineendet komong' eng' che ki pek." 
John21:15 Ye kingo kagoamis anyun, koleenji `Jeso Simion Petero, “Simion, weeriitap Johana, tos ichama kosiir chu?” Koleenji ineendet, “Ee, Kiptaiyat, ingen ile achamin.” Koleenji, “Pai aarekyuk.”" 
John21:16 Koleenji kogeny ne po aeng', “Simion, weeriitap Johana, ichama?” Koleenji, “Ee, Kiptaiyat, ingen ile achamin.” Koleenji, “Iyage keechiirekyuk.”" 
John21:17 Koleenji ne po somok, “Simion, weeriitap Johana, ichama?” Koaragen Petero amu kamwachi ne po somok, koleenji, “Ichama?” Ak koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, ingen tuguuk tugul; ingen ile achamin.” Koleenji `Jeso ineendet, “Pai keechiirekyuk." 
John21:18 Amwaun, iman, iman, ale, ye kita ko ii ming'in, ko ki ilaaksechinigei, ak iwendi ole imache; ago ye tuun ioositu, iitoi euneguk, ak kolaakseun age, ak komutin ole memache.”" 
John21:19 Kimwa niito koboortoi ole teptoi meet ne itorooree Kamuktaindet. Ak ye kingo kagomwa niito, koleenji, “Isubwo.”" 
John21:20 Kowelelgei Petero, kogeer kasubindet ne ki chamei Jeso kosubi; ne kitiegei tegetap Jeso eng' amisyetap lagat, ak koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, ng'oo ineendet ne ng'wektoin?”" 
John21:21 Kingo keer Petero ineendet, koleenji Jeso, Kiptaiyat, lyon chiichi?" 
John21:22 Koleenji Jeso, Ngot amach kotebi agoi tuun anyo, image nee? Isubwo inyee." 
John21:23 Kiyom anyun ng'olyoondoni tupchosyek, kole ma meei chiichooto agenge eng' kasubik: ago ki ma mwachi Jeso ineendet, koleenji, “Ma meei” ago ki leenji, “Ngot amach kotebi agoi tuun anyo, image nee?”" 
John21:24 Ni anyun ko kasubindet ne paoryanjin tuguuchu, ak ne ki sirei tuguuchuuto ak kingen keele po iman paornatennyi." 
John21:25 Ak mi kogeny tuguuk alak che chaang' che ki yai Jeso, che, nda kisirei age tugul, aleen ta mayamei ng'wony bukuisyek che kata kisirchin." 
Acts1:1 Eng' kitabuut ne po tai, ee Theophilus, ko ki atet agobo tuguuk tugul che ki toi Jeso koyai ak koneet." 
Acts1:2 Ki atet anyun chooto tugul agoi peetuut ne ki kimuti kwo parak, ye kingo kagong'at `inee eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil che kiyooktoi, chooto kiga kolewen." 
Acts1:3 Ye kingo pata nyalildanyi, koboorchigei icheeget kole sabei eng' kaboorunoik che chaang', kong'aang'jingei `inee icheek eng' peetuusyek artam, ak kong'alaaljin icheek agobo tuguuk che po laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Acts1:4 Ak ye ki amisye tugul, kong'at icheek koleenji, “Amat obe eng' Jerusalem, ago ogen kayomiset ne po Kwanda, nooto ki ogasena." 
Acts1:5 Ki ibatisanis Johana iman eng' peek; ago kotom kogeskei peetuusyek che chaang' kibatisanook eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil.” 
Acts1:6 Nooto anyun, ye kingo kagoyumgei, koteebe ineendet koleenji, “Kiptaiyat, iweekyini Israel laitornatet eng' peetuusyechuuto?”" 
Acts1:7 Koleenji `Jeso icheek, “Mabootok onai peetuusyek anan kenyiisyek che ki konde Kwanda eng' pounatennyi ineegei." 
Acts1:8 Ago otaache kamuktaet ye tuun kanyonjok Kabuuset ne Tiliil; ak oegu paorinikyuk eng' Jerusalem, eng' Judea komugul ak Samaria, ak agoi tabandap ng'wony.”" 
Acts1:8 Ago otaache kamuktaet ye tuun kanyonjok Kabuuset ne Tiliil; ak oegu paorinikyuk eng' Jerusalem, eng' Judea komugul ak Samaria, ak agoi tabandap ng'wony.”" 
Acts1:9 Ye kingo kagomwa tuguuchuuto, kimut ineendet kwo parak kogeerei icheek, ak kitaach pooldet ineendet ak kobetito eng' tainnywa." 
Acts1:10 Ye kingo ta konyali kipsengwet kochiiljin kong' kowendi, ogeero, kitononso piik aeng'u eng' ye neegitee icheeget kolaachi ngoroik che leelachen," 
Acts1:11 ak ki mwa kole, “Okweek piigap Galilaya, kalya si otononse ak onyali kipsengwet? Jeso niito, ne kagimut kwo kipsengwet, ko tuun nyoonei ko uu yu kogeere kowendi kipsengwet.”" 
Acts1:12 Koweek anyun koba Jerusalem kobunu tulweet ne kiguure tulweetap Mseituni, ne neegitee Jerusalem, ne yamegei ak pandap peetuutap sabato." 
Acts1:13 Ye kingo kagoba ko, kolaany koot ne po parak, ole ki tebee agot Petero, Johana, Jakobo ak Andrea, Philipu ak Thomas, Bartolomayo ak Matayo; Jakobo ne po kap Alphayo ak Simion Selote, ak Judas ne po kap Jakobo." 
Acts1:14 Ki tebi chu tugul eng' kabwaatet agenge eng' kagiiletapkei ne po saaet, kobooto kobogorisyek ak Maria kametap Jeso, ak tupchosyegap Jeso." 
Acts1:15 Eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki tonon Petero eng' kwenutap che tupcho (piik che kigatuiyo, ki olo po pogol agenge ak tiptem), ak kole," 
Acts1:16 “Che kitupche, konyolu kosulda siruutik che ki kamwa Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' tai eng' kutitap Daudi agobo Judas, ne ki kandoindet ne ki indochin icheek che kinamei Jeso." 
Acts1:17 Amu ki kiititech, ak kinyoor kebebertanyi eng' poisyoni.”" 
Acts1:18 (Ak kinyoor chiichi mbareet eng' melektap tengektanyi; ak kingo put kosyep moo, kobetak moet, komong' agutanikyik tugul." 
Acts1:19 Kinaak ng'olyoondonooto eng' tugul che menyei Jerusalem, kot keguure mbaranooto Akeldama eng' kutinnywa, nooto ko, Mbareet ne po korotiik.)" 
Acts1:20 “Amu siraat eng' kitabuut ne po Tyenwogigap Kalasunet kole, ‘Ingoguber ole menyei, amat komeny chii olooto’; ak ‘Ingonam chiito age poisyennyi.’" 
Acts1:21 Ingobiit age eng' piik che ki cham kebendoti tugul eng' peetuusyek tugul ye ki cham komong'u Kiptaiyat Jeso ak komandoi eng' kwenunnyo," 
Acts1:22 kotaune kabatisanetap Johana agoi peetuut ne ki kimuti kwo parak. Kanyool koek age eng' pichuuto paoryat kobootech agobo ng'eetyeennyi.” 
Acts1:23 Ara ki lewen piik aeng', Joseph ne ki kiguure Barsaba, (ak ki kiguure kora Justo) ak Matia." 
Acts1:24 Ak ki sa kole, “Ee Kiptaiyat, inyee ne ingen mugulelwegap piik tugul, iboorwech eng' pichu aeng', ne kailewen," 
Acts1:25 si kobiit konam kebeberta eng' poisyoni ak kayooktaoni, ne ki ibute Judas, si kobiit kwo oldanyi.”" 
Acts1:26 Kiseer parbareek agobo icheek, ak ki ibutyi parbaryat Matia; ak ki kiitito che kiyooktoi taman ak agenge." 
Acts2:1 Kingo it peetuutap Pentekoste, ko ki mi tugul komosta agenge." 
Acts2:2 Ak ki mong' eng' sainooto cheet ne punu kipsengwet ko uu usoonet ne usei eng' kimnateet ne oo, ak ki nyi koot komugul ole ki tebee." 
Acts2:3 Ak ki mong'ji ng'elyebwek che pcheotin, che uu che po maat; ak ki tebee age tugul eng' icheek." 
Acts2:4 Ki nyi icheek tugul Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak ki toi kong'alaale kutusweek alak, ko uu ye ki igoochi Kabuuset ne Tiliil icheek kamuget kong'alaal." 
Acts2:5 Ki mi Yahudik che ki menyei Jerusalem, piik che ki konyiti Kamuktaindet, che ki punu pororyet age tugul ne mi kurereetap kipsengwet." 
Acts2:6 Kingo kas cheonooto, koyumgei tuiyet ak kokwong'yo, amu ki kas chii tugul pichooto kong'alaali eng' kutinnyi." 
Acts2:7 Ak ki tang'any tugul ak kokwong'yo komwaei koleen, “Ogeero, tos ma piigap Galilaya chu tugul ng'alaaldos?" 
Acts2:8 Ak katepto ano si kegas acheek chii tugul eng' kutinnyo, ne ki kisiktech?" 
Acts2:9 Echeek alak ko Partik, alak ko Medoik ak alak ko Elamik, alak kora ko che menyei Mesopotamia, Judea ak Kapadokia, Ponto ak Asia," 
Acts2:9 Echeek alak ko Partik, alak ko Medoik ak alak ko Elamik, alak kora ko che menyei Mesopotamia, Judea ak Kapadokia, Ponto ak Asia," 
Acts2:10 Phrygia ak Pamphylia, Misiri ak komoswek che po Libya che neegitee Kurene, ak toek che punu Rome, Yahudik kobooto che ki punji Yahudik eng' kayanennywa," 
Acts2:11 Kretik ak Arabuuk, kigase icheek kong'alaali eng' kutusweekyok poisyonik che eecheen che po Kamuktaindet.”" 
Acts2:12 Ki tang'any tugul ak kogereer met, koleenjingei icheegei, “Egu nee ng'olyoondoni?”" 
Acts2:13 Ago kichombil alak kole, “Kabogityo eng' divaik che leelach.”" 
Acts2:14 Ago ki tonon Petero kobooto taman ak aeng' ak koleenji eng' kutit ne oo: “Okweek piigap Judea ak okweek tugul che omenye Jerusalem, ingonaak ni eng' okweek, ak oepchi iit ng'aleekyuk." 
Acts2:14 Ago ki tonon Petero kobooto taman ak aeng' ak koleenji eng' kutit ne oo: “Okweek piigap Judea ak okweek tugul che omenye Jerusalem, ingonaak ni eng' okweek, ak oepchi iit ng'aleekyuk." 
Acts2:15 Ma pogityo pichu, ko uu ye obwaati; amu ta ko sait somok kityo." 
Acts2:16 Achicha, niito ne kimwaei maotyot Joel kole," 
Acts2:17 ‘Tuun eng' peetuusyek che po let, mwaei Kamuktaindet, aroong'jini piik tugul Kabuusennyu ne Tiliil, ak komaoten weeriikwok ak tiibiikwok, ak kogeer murenikwok ng'ang'utik, ak korwotyi poisyekwok karwotitaosyek." 
Acts2:18 Ee, agot otwogikyuk, che murenik ak tiibiik, eng' peetuusyechooto aroong'jini Kabuusennyu ne Tiliil; si komaoten." 
Acts2:19 Ak abarte kwang'utik eng' kipsengwet parak, ak kaboorunoik eng' oli po ng'wony, korotiik, maat ak koiyenetap iyeto." 
Acts2:20 Kiwolei asiista koek mesundeito, ak kewal arawet koek korotiik, kotom koit peetuutap Kiptaiyat, peetuut ne oo ak ko ne tagunoot." 
Acts2:21 Ak age tugul ne kuurei kaineetap Kiptaiyat ko tuun kisaru.’ 
Acts2:22 “Okweek piigap Israel, ogas ng'aleechu: Jeso ne po Nazareth, chiito ne ki ibarta Kamuktaindet eng' okweek eng' poisyonigap kimnateet ak kwang'utik ak kaboorunoik, che ki yai Kamuktaindet eng' ineendet eng' kwenung'wong', ko uu ye ongen okweek." 
Acts2:23 Ineendet ne ki igoito Kamuktaindet eng' pegechinetap ng'olyoondennyi ak naet ne kiga kechop eng' tai, ki ogartaat okweek ineendet ak obar eng' eunegap piik che pistoe ng'atuutik." 
Acts2:24 Ago ki ing'eet `Kamuktaindet ineendet, ko kagotyach eng' ng'wanindo ne po meet, amu ki ma komuuchi meet konam ineendet." 
Acts2:25 Amu ki mwa Daudi agobo ineendet kole, ‘Ki ageere Kiptaiyat kotugul komi tainnyu, amu mi ineendet eunnyu ne po tai si ma kitumduma." 
Acts2:26 Amu nooto anyun kogasegei muguleldanyu ak kibaibait ng'elyeptanyu; kobooto nooto komeng'iisyei poortanyu agine eng' kamang'unet. 
Acts2:27 Amu mebagakyini saboondanyu ye mi che ki kobek, Amegoitoi neng'ung' Ne Tiliil kogeer nunet." 
Acts2:28 Ki igoono anai ortinwegap saboondo; inyiitwa poiboiyet eng' taing'ung'.’ 
Acts2:29 “Che kitupche, amwaiwok komyee agobo poiyot ne oo Daudi, ale, kime ak ki kitup, ak miitei kererinnyi kwenunnyo agoi ra." 
Acts2:30 Ak amu kimaotyo, ak ki ingen kole kiga koyasyechi `Kamuktaindet ineendet kole, indoi Kamuktaindet ng'echerennyi chiito ne tuun punu iyotennyi." 
Acts2:31 Kingo keer niito anyun kong'alaal agobo ng'eetyeetap Kristo kole, ‘Ma kibagakyin ineendet ye mi che kibek, ama nunei poortanyi.’" 
Acts2:32 Ki ing'eet `Kamuktaindet Jeso niito, ne ki paorinikyik acheek tugul." 
Acts2:33 Amu itoroorot ineendet eng' eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet, ak ko kagetaach eng' Kwanda kayomiset ne po Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ko kagoroong' anyun niito ogeere ak ogase." 
Acts2:34 Amu ki ma togosta Daudi kipsengwet, ago ki mwa ineendet kole, ‘Ki leenji Kiptaiyat Kiptaiyandennyu, Tebee eunnyu ne po tai," 
Acts2:35 agoi ayai puuniguk koek ng'echereetap keelyeguk.’ 
Acts2:36 “Ingonai anyun komyee koot komugul ne po Israel kole, kigoyai `Kamuktaindet ineendet koek Kiptaiyat ak ko Kristo, Jeso niito ne ki ogartaat.”" 
Acts2:37 Kingo kas anyun niito, kotoor mugulelwekwak, ak koleenji `icheek Petero ak che kiyooktoi chuun alak, “Che kitupche, ki yai nee?”" 
Acts2:38 Koleenji `Petero icheek, “Osigu, si kibatisan age tugul eng' okweek eng' kaineetap Jeso Kristo agobo nyoetap kaat ne po tengekwogikwok; si otaach konunetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Acts2:39 Amu neng'wong' kayomisoni, ak lagokwok, ak tugul che mi ole loo, ak tugul che ta koguurei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet nenyo kobwonji ineendet.”" 
Acts2:40 Ak kibaoryan eng' ng'aleek alak che chaang' ak ko ki il koleenji, “Osaruge eng' ibini kunuur.”" 
Acts2:41 Ki kibatisan anyun icheeget che kitaach ng'olyoondennyi, ak ki kitesyi icheek peetuunooto piik olo po eliphuusyek somok." 
Acts2:42 Ki igiiljingei icheek tugul kaneetisyetap che kiyooktoi ak yamdaet, eng' putuletap magatyat ak saautik." 
Acts2:43 Ki nyoor chii tugul kaiyweisyet, ak kiyaak kwang'utik che chaang' ak kaboorunoik eng' che kiyooktoi." 
Acts2:44 Ki mi tugul kibagenge che kiga koyan ak ki yamdoi tuguuk tugul. 
Acts2:45 Ki alda mbareenikwak ak tuguuk alak che ki tinyei ak kopchechi icheek tugul che tee che kinyaliili chii age tugul. 
Acts2:46 Ki mi Hekaluut peetuut age tugul kotebyei eng' kabwaatet agenge, ak eng' putuletap magatyat eng' kaa ak ki amisyei eng' kaagaasetapkei, ak eng' muguleldo agenge," 
Acts2:47 kolasu Kamuktaindet ak ki poiboi piik tugul agobo icheek. Ak eng' peetuut age tugul ko ki tesyin `Kiptaiyat icheek piik chooto ki nyooru sorunet. 
Acts3:1 Ki togosta Petero ak Johana hekaluut eng' sait ne po saaet, sait sogol." 
Acts3:2 Ak ki kiganabi chiito ne ki salamwo kobooch komi moetap kamet, ne ki cham kindoi peetuut age tugul kurgetap hekaluut ne ki kiguure Karaaran, si kosoomei tuguuk piik che ki pendi hekaluut oriit;" 
Acts3:3 ko ye kingo keer `ineendet Petero ak Johana komachei koba hekaluut oriit, kosoom kole kogoochi kagoochinet." 
Acts3:4 Ak ki ichiilji kong' `Petero ineendet kobooto Johana, ak koleenji, “Keerech”." 
Acts3:5 Ak ki inyal `ineendet icheek, koleen nyoorune kiy." 
Acts3:6 Ago ki le Petero, “Ma tinye fedha ak thahabu; ago agoonin ne atinye. Ng'eet eng' kainetap Jeso Kristo ne po Nazareth, ak iwendote.”" 
Acts3:7 Konam anyun ineendet eut ne po tai, ak kong'eet: ak ki nyoor kimnateet ngunooto keelyekyik ak kawegap ng'woniot." 
Acts3:8 Ki ng'eet kochokyi, ak kotonon, ak kotoi kowendot; ak ki pa hekaluut oriit kobooto icheeget kowendoti, kotorombenoti, ak kolosu Kamuktaindet." 
Acts3:9 Ak ki keer piik tugul ineendet kowendoti ak kolosu Kamuktaindet: 
Acts3:10 ak ki nai icheeget kole, ineendet ne ki cham kotebyei kosoomei konunoik eng' kurget ne kiguure Karaaran ne po hekaluut: ak ki kwong'yo miising' ak kotang'any agobo nooto kagoyaak eng' ineendet." 
Acts3:11 Ak kingota konamoti chiichooto Petero ak Johana, korwai piik tugul ole mi icheek eng' keterut ne kiguure ne po Solomon, kokwong'dos miising'." 
Acts3:12 Ak ye kingo keer Petero, kowolji piik koleenji, “Okweek piigap Israel, kalya si okwong'ye agobo ni? Anan kalya si ochiiljech kong' ko uu ne oleen acheek che kagigoochi ineendet kowendot eng' kamugennyo anan eng' imandanyo?" 
Acts3:13 Kamuktaindet ne po Abraham, ak ne po Isak, ak ne po Jakobo, Kamuktaindet ne po kwanisyekyok, ko kagotoroor kiboitiondennyi Jeso, ne ki ogoite ak ki otiiye ineendet eng' taitap Pilato, ye kiga kobegechi kotyach ineendet." 
Acts3:14 Ago ki otiiye okweek Ineendet ne Tiliil ak ko po Imanda, ak osom ole kegonok rumiindet," 
Acts3:15 ak ki obar Ne Oo ne po saboondo; ne ki ing'eet Kamuktaindet eng' che ki pek; kibaorinigap nooto acheek. 
Acts3:16 Ak kagogoochi kainennyi chiichi kimnateet, amu kayanet eng' kainennyi, chiichi ogeere ak ongen okweek: ee, kayanet ne mi eng' Jeso ko kagogoochi chiichi sabeet ne igesunotkei eng' taing'wong' okweek tugul." 
Acts3:17 Ak nguno anyun, che kitupche, angen ale, ki oyai nooto amu kima ongen, ko uu ye ki yai pounikwok ak icheek." 
Acts3:18 Ago tuguuk che kiga koboor Kamuktaindet eng' tai eng' kutuswegap maotik tugul, kole tuun nyalili Kristo nenyi, ko kagoyai nooto kosulda." 
Acts3:19 Osigu anyun ak owalage, si kobiit kibukto tengekwogikwok, si kobwa anyun peetuusyek che po kamuung'et che punu taitap Kiptaiyat;" 
Acts3:20 si koyook Kristo ne ki kilewenwok, ineendet Jeso:" 
Acts3:21 ne kanyool kotaach kipsengwet agoi peetuusyek che kiwale tuguuk tugul komiagitu, che king'alaalee Kamuktaindet eng' kutuswegap maotikyik che tiliileen che ki mi kobooch taunetap ng'wony." 
Acts3:22 Ki mwa Musa iman, kole, ‘Ing'eetwok Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet maotyot ne punu che otupche, ne uu anee’; ogas iit ineendet eng' tuguuk tugul che te che mwaiwok." 
Acts3:23 Ak tuun king'emei kiwong'u eng' kwenutap piik, chiito age tugul ne magase it maotiondonooto." 
Acts3:24 Ee, ak maotik tugul kobooch Samuel, ak icheek che ki pwanei let eng' ineendet, tugul che te che ki ng'alaal, ko ki mwa ak icheek agobo peetuusyechu." 
Acts3:25 O weeriigap maotik, ak che po kayomiset ne ki iyomiskei Kamuktaindet ak kwanisyekwok. Ki leenji Abraham, Kiberuuri pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony eng' keswondeng'ung'." 
Acts3:26 Ak ye kingo kagong'eet Kamuktaindet kiboityondennyi, koyokwok okweek korook si koberuurok, ak koistoe chii age tugul eng' okweek tengekwogikyik.”" 
Acts4:1 Kingo ta kong'alaaljin `Petero ak Johana piik, kobwonji icheeget `tisiik ak kiptaiyatap Hekaluut ak Sadukaik," 
Acts4:2 kotinyei nereegek amu ki ineet piik ak koamda eng' Jeso ng'eetyeetap che ki pek. 
Acts4:3 Ak ki nam icheeget ak kotoorchi korgoreet agoi mutai amu kiga koimen. 
Acts4:4 Ago ki iyan che chaang' eng' icheek che ki kas ng'olyoot; ak ki ek koitetap murenik olo po eliphuusyek muut. 
Acts4:5 Ak eng' peetuut ne ki isubi nooto koyumgei pounik ak poisyek ak siriik eng' Jerusalem; 
Acts4:6 ak Anas tisiindet ne oo, ak Caiaphas, ak Johana, ak Aleksanda, ak tugul che po ooreetap tisiindet ne oo." 
Acts4:7 Ak kingo kagonde icheek kwenunnywa, koteebe kole, “Nee kamuget ne koyae ni, anan eng' kainetap ng'oo?”" 
Acts4:8 Kingo nyi anyun Petero Kabuuset ne Tiliil, koleenji icheek, “Okweek pounigap piik ak poisyek," 
Acts4:9 ngemachei keginenech rani agobo poisyet ne myee ne ko ki yachi chiito ne nyalulat, ole ko kisaapto chiichito;" 
Acts4:10 ingonaak anyun eng' okweek tugul, ak eng' piik tugul che po Israel ole chiichi tononi eng' taing'wong', ko kagosap eng' kainetap Jeso Kristo ne po Nazareth, ne ki ogartaat okweek, ne ki ing'eet Kamuktaindet eng' che ki pek." 
Acts4:11 Jeso niito ko ‘koita ne ki osas okweek teegik, ne kiga kiyai koek metitap luuita.’" 
Acts4:12 Ama mi yetunet eng' chiito age, amu ma mi kainet age eng' kurereetap kipsengwet, ne ki kigoochi piik, ne kanyool kesaruunenech.”" 
Acts4:13 Kingo keer `icheek nyiganatetap Petero ak Johana, ak konai kole piich che ma ineetatin ama che taagunotiin, kokwong'yo ak konai kole ki cham komi kobooto Jeso." 
Acts4:14 Kingo keer chiito ne kogisoop kotononi kobooto icheek, ko mata komuuch komwa kiy agobo nooto." 
Acts4:15 Ago ye kingo kagong'at icheek komanda eng' kapkirwook, kong'alaal icheegei," 
Acts4:16 kole, “Ki itoi nee pichu? Amu naat eng' piik tugul che menyei Jerusalem keele koyaak iman eng' icheek kwang'utyet ne oo, ama kimuuchi ketiiye." 
Acts4:17 Ago si mata koiyestaat eng' kwenutap piik, konyolu keger kong' icheek, si mata kong'alaalji chii age tugul eng' kainaniito kogeny.”" 
Acts4:18 Ara ki kuur icheek ak kong'at koleenji amatata kong'alaal anan koneetis agot kitigin eng' kainetap Jeso. 
Acts4:19 Ago ki wolji `Petero ak `Johana icheek koleenji, “Orwooch okweek ngot ngo myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet kegasak iit kosiir Kamuktaindet." 
Acts4:20 Amu ma kimuuchi kesisye kobatee kemwa tuguuk che ki kegeer ak che kigegas.” 
Acts4:21 Kingo kagoger kong' icheek kogeny, kounda icheek koba, ko mata konyoor ng'olyoot ne irwookyine, amu piik; amu kiitoroor piik tugul Kamuktaindet agobo nooto koyaak." 
Acts4:22 Amu kisiirei artam kenyiisyegap chiichooto kiyaak eng' ineendet kwang'utyoniito po kasaabet. 
Acts4:23 Ak kingo kageunda, koba ole mi piikwak, ak komwaita tugul che kamwachi tisiik che eecheen ak poisyek." 
Acts4:24 Kingo kas icheek komwachi Kamuktaindet eng' kutit ne oo eng' kabwaatet agenge, koleenji, “Ee Kiptaiyat, inyee ne ki iyai kipsengwet ak ng'wony ak araraita, ak tugul che mi olooto," 
Acts4:25 ne ki imwa eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' kutitap kwandanyo Daudi kiboityondeng'ung', ile, ‘Kilya si kobolyo Pororyosyek, ak kobwaatoti piik tuguuk che ma namegei ak kiy?" 
Acts4:26 Kitetegei laitorinigap ng'wony, ak koyumgei pounik, agobo Kiptaiyat, ak Kristo nenyi.’" 
Acts4:27 Amu iman kituitos eng' nganasani Herod ak Pontio Pilato agine kobooto Pororyosyek ak piigap Israel, kole kogirinda Kiboityondeng'ung' ne Tiliil Jeso, ne ki iil," 
Acts4:28 si koyai kiit age tugul ne kisip kong'at eung'ung' ak ng'omnateng'ung' kole kosulda. 
Acts4:29 Ak nguno anyun, Kiptaiyat, keer kertaennywa po kong': ak igoochi otwogiguk komwa ng'olyoondeng'ung' eng' nyiganateet tugul," 
Acts4:30 ye iitoi inyee eung'ung' isoobi piik; si koyaak kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik eng' kainetap Kiboityondeng'ung' ne Tiliil, nooto ko Jeso.”"
