Acts4:31 Kingo kagosa, kotumdumgei ole kiga koyumjigei; ak ki nyi icheek tugul Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak ki mwa ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet eng' nyiganateet." 
Acts4:32 Ak ki po muguleldo agenge ak saboondo agenge tuiyet ne kiga koyan. Ma mwa chii agot agenge kole nenyi kiy age tugul ne ki tinyei, ago ki yamdoi tuguukwak tugul." 
Acts4:33 Ak kibaoryan che kiyooktoi eng' kimnateet ne oo agobo ng'eetyetap Kiptaiyat Jeso, ak ki tebee myeeindo ne oo icheek tugul." 
Acts4:34 Amu ki ma komi agot agenge eng' kwenunnywa ne kibanani kiy, amu tugul che ki tinyei korotinwek anan kooriik, ko ki alda ak koip tuguuk che kiga aldae kobwa" 
Acts4:35 konde keelyegap che kiyooktoi; ak ki kipchechi chii age tugul ne ki nyalili. 
Acts4:36 Ki mi Lawindet, chiito ne kisalu Cyprus, nooto Joseph, ne kitoochi che kiyooktoi kainet ne po aeng' koguure Barnaba (ne ye kiweech ko “Weeriitap kagaigaet”), ne ki alda mbareet ne ki tinyei," 
Acts4:37 ak ki ip silingisyek konde keelyegap che kiyooktoi. 
Acts5:1 Ago ki mi chiito age ne ki kiguure Anania, ak osotyonnyi Sapira, ne ki alda korennyi," 
Acts5:2 ak kiituuch kebebertap che ki kialdae, kongen agine osotyonnyi, ki ip kebeberta age yeityo konde keelyegap che kiyooktoi." 
Acts5:3 Ago ki le Petero, “Anania, kalya si konyi Setani muguleldang'ung' kot iberber Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak ituuch kebebertap che ki kialdae kooret?" 
Acts5:4 Kingo ta komi, ko ki ma ko neng'ung'? Ak kingo kagealda, ko ki ma ibou? Kalya si ichop kii eng' muguleldang'ung'? Ma iberber chii, ago Kamuktaindet.”" 
Acts5:5 Kingo kas Anania ng'aleechu, kobut ak kome. Ak ki nyoonji kaiyweisyet ne oo tugul che ki kas." 
Acts5:6 Ak king'eetyo `murenik ak kotaae muusto angeet, ak kosut kwo saang' ak kotup." 
Acts5:7 Ye ki neegit kogeskei saisyek somogu, koit osotyonnyi agine, ak ki ma kongen kiit ne kagoyaak." 
Acts5:8 Koleenji `Petero ineendet, “Mwaiwo ngo ki oaldae kooret tuguuk che tee chooto.” Kole ineendet, “Ee, tee chooto.”" 
Acts5:9 Ago ki leenji `Petero ineendet, “Katepto ano kot ochamyechi tuwai oyoom Kabuusetap Kiptaiyat? Keero, mi kurgat keelyegap icheeget che katubei manong'otyondeng'ung', ak sutin aginye imande.”" 
Acts5:10 Ak ki ibutyi keelyekyik sainooto ak kome. Ye kingo pwa ko anyun murenik konyoor ko kagome, ak kisut kwo saang' ak kotupchi ye neegitee manong'otyondennyi." 
Acts5:11 Konyonji anyun kaiyweisyet ne oo kaniset komugul kobooto tugul che ki kas tuguuchooto. 
Acts5:12 Kiyaogis eng' eunegap che kiyooktoi kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik che chaang' eng' kwenutap piik. Ak ki mi tugul eng' kabwaatet agenge eng' keterut ne po Solomon. 
Acts5:13 Ago eng' piik alak ko ki mata kobiit chii ne kita kogany konamgei ak icheeget, ago kiitoroor piik icheek." 
Acts5:14 Ak kitesak kayanik eng' Kiptaiyat kosiir, kichang'a murenik kobooto kobogorisyek;" 
Acts5:15 kot komut icheek che myandos kobwa ortinwek, ak komogonji itogusyek ak kiplusisyek, kole tamangap kokwer urwetap Petero alak eng' icheek, kosiirtoi." 
Acts5:16 Ki iyomogei tuiyet ne punu nganasook che neegitee Jerusalem, komutu che myandos kobooto che ki inyalili tamirmirik che murwonen, ak ki kisoop age tugul eng' icheek." 
Acts5:17 Ago ki tonon tisiindet ne oo, inee ak tugul che ki mi kobooto ineendet (kasubiigap Sadukaichooto), ak ki nyiitaat icheek ng'et konda," 
Acts5:18 konam che kiyooktoi ak kotoorchi korgoreet ne po piik tugul. 
Acts5:19 Ago ki yaat malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat kurgotigap korgoreet kemoi ak komut icheek komong' saang', ak koleenji," 
Acts5:20 “Oba, ak otonon eng' Hekaluut ak omwachi piik ng'aleek tugul che po Sabooni.”" 
Acts5:21 Kingo kas ko uu nooto, koba Hekaluut ko kaech ak koneetis. Ye kingo nyo tisiindet ne oo ak che ki mi kobooto ineendet, koguur kirwooget ak poisyek tugul che po piigap Israel, ak koyookto kimut icheek kobwa eng' ole ki kiratyi." 
Acts5:22 Ago kingo it kiplugotinik koma nyoor icheek; ak kiweektagei icheek ak komwaita," 
Acts5:23 kole, “Kaginyooru ko kerat komyee korgoreet ak kotonondos riibiik eng' kurgotik, ago ye kangeyat, koma kenyoorchi chii oriit.”" 
Acts5:24 Ak kingo kas ng'aleechu kiptaiyatap Hekaluut ak tisiik che eecheen, koiimgei miising' agobo icheek kole egu nee anyun ng'aleechu." 
Acts5:25 Ak ki nyo chii ak koleenji, “Ogeero, pichoo kogotoorchi korgoreet, kotonondos eng' Hekaluut ak koneeti piik!”" 
Acts5:26 Kwo anyun kiptaiyat kobooto kiplugotinik ak komut kobwa, ago ma eng' kimnateet, amu ki iywei kole imuuch kolach piik `icheek eng' koik." 
Acts5:27 Kingo kagomut icheek kobwa, konde taitap kapkirwook. koteebee tisiindet ne oo icheek," 
Acts5:28 kole, “Kigeetenak inne keele, amatata oneet piik eng' kainani, ak ogeero, ki onyiit Jerusalem kaneetisyeng'wong', ak omache oibwech korotiigap chiichito kobwanjech.”" 
Acts5:29 Ago ki wol Petero ak che kiyooktoi kole, “Kanyool kegas iit Kamuktaindet kosiir piik." 
Acts5:30 Ki ing'eet `Kamuktaindet ne po kwanisyekyok Jeso, ineendet ne ki obar ogartaat eng' keetit." 
Acts5:31 Ineendet ne kiitoroor Kamuktaindet eng' eunnyi ne po tai koek Ne Oo ago Yetindet, si kogoochi Israel siguunet ak nyoetap kaat ne po tengekwogik." 
Acts5:32 Ak ki paorinik acheek che po tuguuchu, ak Kabuuset ne Tiliil agine ne Ki kogoochi Kamuktaindet icheek che kase iit ineendet.”" 
Acts5:33 Kingo kas icheek niito, kong'wanit miising' eng' mugulelwekwak, kot komach kobar icheek." 
Acts5:34 Ago ki tonon Pharisain eng' kapkirwook ne ki kiguure Gamaliel, kaneetindetap Ng'atuutik, ne kigonyiti piik tugul, ak kong'at kole kimut pichooto koba saang' ne matya." 
Acts5:35 Ak ki leenji icheek, “Okweek piigap Israel, oriipkei eng' pichu, eng' kiit ne omache oyai." 
Acts5:36 Amu kingo tomo koit peetuusyechu, koit Theudas kochoigei kole aa chiito ne oo ak konamgei ineendet ak piik che itei olo po pogol ang'wan. Ago ki kibar ineendet ak kiyesta tugul che kigase iit ineendet ak kibetyo." 
Acts5:37 Kingo pata chiichooto kong'eet Judas ne po Galilaya eng' peetuusyek che po sirisyetap kainaigap piik, ak kochuut piik alak koosup ineendet; kime agine, ak kiyesta tugul che kigase iit ineendet." 
Acts5:38 Ara anyun, amwaiwok nguno ale, oistoegei pichu ak omete icheek; amu ngo po piik ng'aleechu anan poisyoni, kowong'ugei;" 
Acts5:39 ago ngot ko po Kamuktaindet, ko momuuchi owong'u; si ma kinyoorwok obortosi ak Kamuktaindet.” Kocham anyun ng'aleekyik," 
Acts5:40 ak kingo kagoguur che kiyooktoi kobwa ole mi icheek, kobir ak kong'at koleenji amatata kong'alaal eng' kainetap Jeso, yeityo kounda icheek koba." 
Acts5:41 Koba anyun eng' taitap kapkirwook koboiboi amu kagiit keele nyoljin konyoor kateweerisyet agobo Kainanooto. 
Acts5:42 Ak ki ma siisyo eng' peetuut age tugul koneetis ak koamdoi eng' Hekaluut ak eng' kooriik, kole Jeso ko Kristo." 
Acts6:1 Eng' peetuusyechooto anyun, ye kitesaksei koitetap kasubik, kong'eet kang'unyng'unyet eng' Yahudik che ki kutinnywa ko Yunanik, kong'unyng'ung'ji Yahudik, amu ki kinyasta mosoogikwak eng' tuguuk che ki cham kigoochin kotugul." 
Acts6:2 Koguur anyun tamanu ak aeng' tuiyet ne po kasubik ak koleenji, “Ma myee kebagaakte ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ak keboisye eng' mesosyek." 
Acts6:3 Ko uu nooto anyun, che kitupche, ocheeng' piik tisap eng' okweek che taagunotiin keele myachen, che nyiitootiin Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak utaatyet, che kimuuchi kinde poisyoni." 
Acts6:4 Ago si ki kiiljige acheek saaet, ak kaneetisyetap ng'olyoot.”" 
Acts6:5 Ki cham anyun tuiyet komugul ng'olyoondonooto; ak ki lewen Stepano, chiito ne nyiitaat kayaneet ak Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak Philipu, ak Prokoro, ak Nikanor, ak Timon, ak Parmena, ak Nikola ne po Antiok ne kiwalak koek Yahudyot." 
Acts6:6 Ki inde chooto anyun taitap che kiyooktoi, che ki imuuch kosachi ak kogonoor icheek eunekwak." 
Acts6:7 Kitesak anyun ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet; ak kotesak miising' koitetap kasubik eng' Jerusalem; ak kogas iit kayaneet tuiyet ne oo ne po tisiik. 
Acts6:8 Ak kinyiitat Stepano myeeindo ak kamuget, koyai anyun kwang'utik che eecheen ak kaboorunoik eng' kwenutap piik." 
Acts6:9 Ago king'eetyo alak che po sinagogit ne po Che Ityagotin (ko uu ye ki kiguuree), che ki punu Cyrene, che po Alexandria, ak alak chooto che po piigap Cilicia ak Asia, ak kobelgei ak Stepano." 
Acts6:10 Ago ki ma imuuch icheek kogirinda utaatyet ak Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne ki ng'alaale ineendet. 
Acts6:11 Kogaigai anyun eng' ung'at piik komwa kole, “Kigegas komwaei ineendet ng'aleek che po chubisyet agobo Musa ak Kamuktaindet.”" 
Acts6:12 Kong'eetng'eet anyun piik konereekso ak poisyek, ak siriik, kobwonji ineendet ak konam ak komut kwo kapkirwook," 
Acts6:13 ak konde paorinik che po lembech, che ki mwa kole, “Mabagaaktoi chiichi komwa ng'aleek che yaach agobo yu tiliil ak Ng'atuutyet;" 
Acts6:14 amu kigegas ineendet komwaei koleen, tatun kong'emei yuto Jeso niito po Nazareth, ak kowal pitonwek che ki koonech Musa.”" 
Acts6:15 Ki ichiilji kong' anyun ineendet `piik tugul che kitebyei eng' kapkirwook, kogeer togeennyi ko uu togeetap malaikaiyat." 
Acts7:1 koteebee anyun tisiindet ne oo kole, “Tos uu chooto tuguuchu?”" 
Acts7:2 Kowol Stepano kole, “Che kitupche ak kwanisyekyok, ogaso! Ki mong'ji Kamuktaindet ne po toroornatet kwandanyo Abraham, ye ki mi Mesopotamia, kotomo komeny Haran." 
Acts7:3 Ki leenji, ‘Mong'u eng' emeng'ung' ak eng' ole mi piiguk, ak inyoo emet neta aboorun.’" 
Acts7:4 Komong' anyun eng' emetap Kaldeik ak komeny Haran. Kingo kagome kwandanyi, ko uu `Kamuktaindet ineendet, konyo emoniito omenye rani." 
Acts7:5 Ki ma igoochi ineendet poroteet eng' olooto, acha, agot ole indoi keldanyi; ak ki iarorchi kole tuun igoochin ineendet ak iyotennyi eng' let, nganda kitom kosich lakwa." 
Acts7:6 Ak ki mwa Kamuktaindet ko uu ni, kole, Egu lagokyik punootik eng' emetap piik alak, che tuun yaei icheek koek otwogik ak koyachi ne ya eng' kenyiisyek pogol ang'wan." 
Acts7:7 Ago arwookyini pororyonooto ne ratei icheek. Ak ye ibata nooto komong' ak koboisyeiwo eng' olito. 
Acts7:8 Ki igoochi ineendet arorutyet ne po kamuratanet. Ki sich anyun `Abraham Isak ak komuratan ineendet eng' peetuut ne po sisiit. Kosich `Isak Jakobo, ak ki sich `Jakobo kwanisyekyok taman ak aeng'." 
Acts7:9 “Ye kingo am ng'et kong' poisyechooto agobo Joseph, koalda ineendet kwo Misiri. Ago ki mi Kamuktaindet kobooto ineendet," 
Acts7:10 ak ki sar ineendet eng' nyalilwogikyik tugul, ak kogoochi chameet ak utaatyet eng' taitap Pharaoh laitoryatap Misiri; ne ki inde ineendet koek pounindet eng' Misiri ak koonnyi tugul." 
Acts7:11 Ki nyo anyun rubeet Misiri komugul ak Kanaan, ak ki piit nyalilda ne oo, ak ma nyoor kwanisyekyok amitwogik." 
Acts7:12 Ago ye kingo kas Jakobo kole miitei peek Misiri, koyookto kwanisyekyok eng' panda ne po tai." 
Acts7:13 Ak eng' panda ne po aeng' koboorchigei `Joseph tupchosyekyik; ak kinaak eng' Pharaoh piigap Joseph. 
Acts7:14 Ak ki iyookto Joseph kole keguur kwandanyi Jakobo ak piikyik tugul, piik tamanwogik tisap ak muut." 
Acts7:15 Kochoortagei anyun Jakobo kwo Misiri. Ki me ineendet eng' olooto ko uu kwanisyekyok. 
Acts7:16 Ki kila icheek koba Shekem ak ki kitupchi kererit ne kiga al Abraham eng' kamanuutyetap fedha eng' weeriigap Hamor eng' Shekem. 
Acts7:17 “Ye kingo riik peetuut ne po arorutyet, ne ki iyasyechi `Kamuktaindet Abraham, koyabak piik ak kotesagis eng' Misiri," 
Acts7:18 agoi kobiit laitoryat age eng' Misiri, ne ki ma kongen Joseph." 
Acts7:19 Ki ng'oomenji ineendet pororyennyo, ak koyachi ne ya kwanisyekyok, si kolakta manyurunikwak si ma sapcho." 
Acts7:20 Eng' peetuusyechooto ko ki kisich Musa ak ki karaaran ineendet miising'; ak ki kigu eng' kootap kwandanyi arawek somok; 
Acts7:21 ak kingo kagemeto, konyo che po Pharaoh, konyo komut ak kogu koek weeriinnyi." 
Acts7:22 Ak ki kineet Musa utaatyet tugul ne po Misiriik ak ki kiim eng' ng'aleekyik ak poisyonikyik. 
Acts7:23 “Ye kingo it olo po kenyiisyek artam, kobwaat eng' muguleldanyi korutoochi tupchosyekyik, piigap Israel." 
Acts7:24 Ye kingo keer kinyaliili age eng' icheek, kotoret ineendet ak koyaaktoochi mugetuut ineendet ne kaginyalili, kokwer Misirindet kobar." 
Acts7:25 Ki leen ineendet naei tupchosyekyik kole igoochin Kamuktaindet icheek saruunet eng' eunnyi, ago ma nai." 
Acts7:26 Ak eng' peetuut ne isubi nooto kochunji icheek koboortos, ak kimachei ko oiyo icheek, koleenji, Murenju, otupche okweek; kalya si oyachigei ne ya?" 
Acts7:27 Ago ki toorta ineendet ne ki yachi nin age ne ya, ak kole, Ng'oo ne koindein iegu pounindet ak kirwoogindet kot irwokwech?" 
Acts7:28 Imache ibara ko uu ye koibar Misirindet amut? 
Acts7:29 Ki mwee Musa anyun ng'olyoondonooto, kwo komwei ak koek punootyo eng' emetap Midian, ole ki sikyi weeriik aeng'." 
Acts7:30 “Kingo pata kenyiisyek artamu, komong'ji ineendet `malaikaiyat eng' surkwen ne po tulweetap Sinai, eng' maat ne lalei eng' keetit ne samum." 
Acts7:31 Ak kingo keer Musa, kokwong' eng' kioto kageer; ak kingo riikta kole kogeer, kotwek kutitap Kiptaiyat kole:" 
Acts7:32 ‘Aa Kamuktaindet ne po kwanisyeguk, Kamuktaindet ne po Abraham, ak ne po Isak, ak ne po Jakobo.’ Kobotan Musa ak ko mata kogany kogeer." 
Acts7:33 Koleenji Kiptaiyat anyun ineendet, ‘Icheru kweoniguk eng' keelyeguk, amu tiliil ng'wonyut yooto itonone." 
Acts7:34 Ki ageer iman nyalildap piikyuk che miitei Misiri, ak ki agas tigenennywa, ak kaachooruge si kobiit asar icheek: nyoo anyun nguno, ayookten iwe Misiri.’" 
Acts7:35 “Musa niito ne ki eesyo icheek, koleen, ‘Ng'oo ne koindein iegu pounindet ak kirwoogindet?’ Ineendet ne ki iyookto Kamuktaindet eng' eutap malaikaiyat ne ki mong'ji ineendet eng' keetit si kobiit koek pounindet, ak katyagindet." 
Acts7:36 Ki imut chiichi anyun icheek komanda, ye kingo kagoyai kwang'utik ak kaboorunoik eng' Misiri, ak eng' araraita ne piriir, ak eng' kenyiisyek artam eng' surkwen." 
Acts7:37 Musa niito ko nooto ne ki leenji piigap Israel, ‘Ing'eetwok Kamuktaindet ne Toroor maotyot ne tuun punu che otupche, ne uu anee.’" 
Acts7:38 Ye kimi tuiyet eng' surkwen, ko Musa niito ne ki ng'alaalji `malaikaiyat eng' tulweet ne po Sinai ak kobooto kwanisyekyok. Ineendet ne ki taach ng'aleek che saptos si kogoonech." 
Acts7:39 Ki ma kas iit kwanisyekyok ineendet, ago ki eesyo ineendet, ak kiweektagei mugulelwekwak Misiri," 
Acts7:40 koleenji Aron: ‘Yaiywech kanamonik kondoenech; amu ma kingen ole katepto Musa niito, ne ki imutwech kemang'une emetap Misiri.’" 
Acts7:41 Ki yai anyun moita eng' peetuusyechooto, ak koipchi tiseiywot kanamwonooto, ak koboiboitu eng' poisyonigap eunekwak." 
Acts7:42 Ago ki ituktoochi patai Kamuktaindet icheek, ak kogoito icheek koot lugeetap kipsengwet; ko uu ye siraat eng' bukuitap maotik, keele: ‘Tos ki ogoono che kiyagi che kageeny ak tiseiywek eng' kenyiisyek artam eng' surkwen, Ee kootap Israel?" 
Acts7:43 Ki oip okweek emait ne po Molok, ak kecheiyat ne po kanamwet Repan, kanamonik che ki oyai si osaa. Ara amu nooto autok obe Babilon pitoniin.’" 
Acts7:44 “Ki tinyei kwanisyekyok Emait ne po Paornateet eng' surkwen, ko uu ye kiga koaror ineendet ne ki mwachi Musa, koleenji, koyai ko uu kergeindo ne kiga kogeer." 
Acts7:45 Ne ki ip kwanisyekyok ak icheek eng' peetuusyekwak, kobooto Joshua, ye kinamei Pororyosyek, che ki oon Kamuktaindet eng' taitap kwanisyekyok. Ki mi yooto agoi peetuusyegap Daudi," 
Acts7:46 ne kinyoor chameet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, ak kosoom konyoor meng'ootetap Kamuktaindet ne po Jakobo." 
Acts7:47 Ago ki Solomon ne kiteekyi ineendet koot. 
Acts7:48 “Ago ma menyei Ineendet Ne Toroor Miising' kooriik che kiyae eunek; ko uu ye mwaei maotyot, kole," 
Acts7:49 ‘Ng'echerennyu ne po laitornatet kipsengwet, ak ng'wony ko ng'echereetap keelyekyuk. Tos oteekwo koot ne uu nee? Mwaei Kiptaiyat, anan ano ole amuung'e?" 
Acts7:50 Tos ma eunnyu ne kiyaei tuguuchu tugul?’ 
Acts7:51 “Okweek che uui kaat che ma kimuratan mugulelwek ak iitiik, ogirindoi Kabuuset ne Tiliil kotugul, oyae ak okweek ko uu ye kiyaei kwanisyekwok." 
Acts7:52 Ng'oo eng' maotik ne ma us kwanisyekwok? Ak ki par che kisip koboor nyonunetap Chiito ne po Imanda; ne kaoegu okweek nguno ng'wektoik ak rumiik. 
Acts7:53 Okweek che ki otaach Ng'atuutyet ko uu ye ki king'at eng' malaikaisyek, ak ma oriip.”" 
Acts7:54 Ye kingo kas ng'aleechuuto kong'woneegitu miising' eng' mugulelwekwak, ak konyei kelek agobo ineendet." 
Acts7:55 Ago ki inyal kipsengwet kochiilji kong' ko nyiitaat ineendet Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak ki keer liilindap Kamuktaindet ak Jeso kotononi eng' eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet." 
Acts7:56 Ak ki le, “Ogeero, ageere kipsengwet ko kagoyatagis, ak kotononi Weeriitap chii eng' eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet.”" 
Acts7:57 Ago ki polyo eng' kutit ne oo, ak koger iitiikwak, ak kotorombenji kibagenge;" 
Acts7:58 ak ki toorta ineendet komanda eng' nganaseet, ak kolage koik. Ki inde paorinik ngoroikwak keelyegap muren age ne ki kiguure Saulo." 
Acts7:59 Kolach anyun Stepano, koguurei Kiptaiyat, koleen, “Kiptaiyat Jeso, taach saboondanyu.”" 
Acts7:60 Ak kigutuny ak komwa eng' kutit ne oo kole, “Kiptaiyat, ameiityi icheek tengegi.” Ak kingo kagomwa niito, konuuch." 
Acts8:1 Ak ki iyan Saulo agine agobo pareetap Stepano. Ki ng'eet peetuunooto usiisyet ne oo agobo kaniset ne ki mi Jerusalem, ak kiyesta icheek tugul koyom emotinwegap Judea ak Samaria, kobatee che kiyooktoi." 
Acts8:1 Ak ki iyan Saulo agine agobo pareetap Stepano. Ki ng'eet peetuunooto usiisyet ne oo agobo kaniset ne ki mi Jerusalem, ak kiyesta icheek tugul koyom emotinwegap Judea ak Samaria, kobatee che kiyooktoi." 
Acts8:2 Kotup anyun Stepano `piik che ki konyiti Kamuktaindet, ak koteiyo miising' agobo ineendet." 
Acts8:3 Ago ki inyaliil miising' `Saulo kaniset, kowendi koot age tugul ak kochuutu murenik ak kobogorisyek ak kotoorchin korgoreet." 
Acts8:4 Ki pa anyun icheek che kiga koyesta, koamdaat ng'olyoot." 
Acts8:5 Ak kichoortagei Philipu nganaseet ne po Samaria, ak koamji icheek Kristo." 
Acts8:6 Ak ki epchi iit tuiyosyek eng' yamdaet agenge ng'aleek che kimwaei Philipu, ye kingo kas ak kogeer kaboorunoik che ki yai." 
Acts8:7 Amu kimanda tamirmirik che murwonen eng' che chaang' che ki tinyei, kowaaktos eng' kutit ne oo; ak ki kisoop che chaang' che meiyotiin poorwek, ak che ki ing'waldos." 
Acts8:8 Ara ki piit poiboiyet ne oo eng' nganasanooto. 
Acts8:9 Ki mi chiito age ne ki kiguure Simion, ne ki cham kong'orsei eng' peetuusyek alak eng' nganasanooto, ak ki igoochi pororyetap Samaria kokwong'yo, komwaei ineendet kole chiito ne oo." 
Acts8:10 Ki epchin iit `icheek tugul ineendet, kobooch ne ming'in agoi ne oo, koleen, “Kimnateetap Kamuktaindet chiichi ne kiguure Ne Oo.”" 
Acts8:11 Ak ki epchin iit ineendet, amu ki cham kogoochin kokwong'yo eng' peetuusyek che chaang' eng' ng'oorsosyekyik." 
Acts8:12 Ago ye kingo yan ng'aleegap Philipu ye ki amdoi logoiywek che myach agobo laitornatetap Kamuktaindet ak kainetap Jeso Kristo, kibatisan anyun murenik kobooto kobogorisyek." 
Acts8:13 Ki iyan Simion agine ak kingo kagibatisan kotebi kobooto Philipu. Ak kingo keer koyaogis kaboorunoik ak poisyonigap kimnateet kokwong'. 
Acts8:14 Kingo kas anyun che kiyooktoi che ki mi Jerusalem kole kogotaach Samaria ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet, koyookyi Petero ak Johana." 
Acts8:15 Ye kingo kagochoorgei icheek, kosa agobo icheek kole si kotaach Kabuuset ne Tiliil;" 
Acts8:16 amu kitom kochoorchigei agot agenge eng' pichooto. Kiga kibatisan icheek eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat Jeso kityo. 
Acts8:17 Yeityo kogonoor icheek eunekwak, ak kitaach Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Acts8:18 Ye kingo keer anyun Simion kole kaga kigoochin chii Kabuuset ne Tiliil ngo konoor `che kiyooktoi eunekwak, kogoochi `silingisyek che kiyooktoi" 
Acts8:19 ak kole, “Ogoono agane kimnatoni si ngagonoor chii age tugul eunekyuk, kotaach Kabuuset ne Tiliil.”" 
Acts8:20 Ago ki leenji Petero ineendet, “Ingobetyo siling'isyeguk kobooten, amu keleen inyooru konunetap Kamuktaindet eng' silingisyek." 
Acts8:21 Metinye kebeberta anan motwet eng' ng'olyoondoni, amu ma myee muguleldang'ung' eng' taitap Kamuktaindet." 
Acts8:22 Sigu anyun eng' tengeging'ung'et ak isaa Kiptaiyat, tamangap kenyoun kaat amu kabwaatetap muguleldang'ung'." 
Acts8:23 Amu ageere ale imi eng' ng'wanindo ak eng' ratuutyetap tengekto.” 
Acts8:24 Ak ki wol Simion kole, “Osaiywa Kiptaiyat, si ma pwanjo agot agenge tuguuk che kaomwaiwo.”" 
Acts8:25 Ye kingo kagobaoryan anyun Petero ak Johana ak komwa ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat, koweektagei Jerusalem, ak koamji logoiywek che myach nganasook che chaang' che po Samarik." 
Acts8:26 Ki mwachi malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat anyun Philipu koleenji, “Ng'eet ak iwe murot tai agoi ooreet ne choortogei kong'etee Jerusalem ne wendi agoi Gaza” (punei oranooto ole melewet)." 
Acts8:27 Ara king'eet anyun ineendet ak kwo. Ak keero ki mi chiitap Ethiopia ne ki kimooch, ne ki tinyei pounateet ne oo eng' eutap Kandake, laitoryat kwondo ne po Ethiopik, ne kiriibei tuguukyik tugul che po kamanuutyet ne oo. Kiga nyo Jerusalem kosa;" 
Acts8:28 ak ki weeksei kaa anyun, kotebee chepkichutinnyi, ak kosomani bukuitap maotyot Isaiah." 
Acts8:29 Ak ki leenji `Kabuuset ne Tiliil Philipu anyun, “Ui riikte, onamgei ak chepkichutina.”" 
Acts8:30 Ak ki labat Philipu ak kogas ineendet kosomani bukuitap maotyot Isaiah, ak ki leenji, “Iguitosi kiit ne isomani?”" 
Acts8:31 Ak ki le, “Amuktoi ano, ngo ma iboorwo chii?” Ak ki igaigai Philipu `ineendet kole kolaany chepkichutit ak kotebi tuwai." 
Acts8:32 Ak chu siruutik che kisomanoti, “Ki kimut ko uu keechiiryet ne ki kweryei kwo eng'seet; ak ko uu aarwetap keechiiryet ne siisei eng' taitap chiito ne tilei koroorikyik, uu nooto agine mang'aany kutinnyi." 
Acts8:33 Ki kiisto kirwoogennyi eng' kaming'inennyi pogei. Ng'oo ne tuun mwaitoi ibindanyi? Amu kinemu saboondanyi eng' ng'wony.” 
Acts8:34 ki teebee `chiichooto ki kimooch Philipu koleenji, “Asoomin ale, mwaei maotyot ng'olyoondoni agobo ng'oo? Agobo ineendet anan agobo chiito age?”" 
Acts8:35 Kong'aany anyun Philipu kutinnyi, ak kotoi eng' siruutyoni koamji ineendet agobo Jeso." 
Acts8:36 Ye kingo ta kobendi eng' ooreet, koit ye mi peek, kole chiichooto, “Keer peek o; nee ne kera si ma kibatisana?”" 
Acts8:37 Ak ki le Philipu, “Ngiyan eng' muguleldang'ung' tugul, kimuuchi kibatisanin.” Ak ki wol kole, “Ayani ale Jeso Kristo ko Weeriitap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Acts8:38 Kong'at anyun kotonon chepkichutit, ak kichoortagei tuwai koba peek, Philipu ak chiichooto; ak ki ibatisan `Philipu ineendet." 
Acts8:39 Ye kingo long' eng' peek, komut `Kabuusetap Kiptaiyat Philipu. Ak mata kogeer anyun kogeny `chiichooto ki kimooch Philipu, ago ki wo kotestai chiichooto eng' poiboiyet." 
Acts8:40 Ak ki took Philipu eng' Azoto. Ye kisiirtoi kobune emonooto, ko ki amjinoti logoiywek che myach nganasook tugul agoi koit Caesarea." 
Acts9:1 Ye kita konereechi Saulo koboisyee kamuiset ak parisyet agobo kasubigap Kiptaiyat. Ki wo kaptisiindet ne oo," 
Acts9:2 ak kosoom ineendet paronok che ibei koba Damasko agobo sinagogisyek, kole ngo nyoor alak tugul che po Oranooto, ngo murenik anan kobogorisyek, komuuchi komut kobwa Jerusalem ko ratotiin." 
Acts9:3 Ye kita kowendi ak ko kariikta Damasko, kooluu sainooto lapkeiyet ne ki punu kipsengwet koluuchi ineendet komoswek tugul." 
Acts9:4 Ki ibutyi, ak kogas kutit koleenji ineendet, “Saulo, Saulo, amu nee si iusa?”" 
Acts9:5 Ak ki le, “Ii ng'oo, Kiptaiyat?” Ak ki le, “Aa Jeso ne iuse." 
Acts9:6 Ago ng'eet, ui nganaseet, si kemwaun kiit ne kanyool iyai.”" 
Acts9:7 Ak kitononso konam kuut piik che kibendi kobooto ineendet, kogasei tweguunet, ama keerei chii." 
Acts9:8 Ki ng'eet anyun Saulo, ak kingo kagoyatagis konyekyik, koma kogeerei kiy; komut anyun `icheek ineendet konamoti euut agoi Damasko." 
Acts9:9 Ki tar ineendet peetuusyek somok ama keerei kiy, ama amisyei anan koeeiso." 
Acts9:10 Ki mi kasubindet age Damasko ne ki kiguure Anania. Ki leenji `Kiptaiyat ineendet eng' ng'ang'utyet, “Anania.” Kowol Anania kole, “Ami yu, Kiptaiyat.”" 
Acts9:11 Koleenji Kiptaiyat, “Ng'eet, ui ooreet ne kiguure Ne Litit, ak iteep eng' kootap Judas chiito ne kiguure Saulo, chiitap Tarsis. Keero, saaei;" 
Acts9:12 ak kagogeer ineendet eng' ng'ang'utyet chiito ne kiguure Anania, konyonei agoi ko, ak kogonoor ineendet eunekyik si kogeerto.”" 
Acts9:13 Ago ki wol Anania kole, “Kiptaiyat, ki agas eng' piik che chaang' agobo chiichito, ole tee yaityet ne ki koyachi piiguk che tiliileen eng' Jerusalem;" 
Acts9:14 ak tinyei eng' yuto kimnateet ne punu tisiik che eecheen si korat tugul che kuurei kaineng'ung'.” 
Acts9:15 Ago ki leenji Kiptaiyat, “Ui inyee, amu kinnyu ineendet ne aboisyee ne ki alewen, si koip kainennyu taitap Pororyosyek ak laitorinik, ak piigap Israel:" 
Acts9:16 amu aboorchini ineendet ole tee chaang'indap tuguuk che kanyool konyoorunee nyalilda agobo kainennyu.” 
Acts9:17 Ki wo anyun Anania, ak ki wo agoi ko, yeityo kogonoor eunekyik Saulo ak koleenji, “Tupchennyu Saulo, kagiyokwo Kiptaiyat, ineendet Jeso, ne kichunjin eng' ooreet ne ki ibunu, kole igeerte, ak kinyiitun Kabuuset ne Tiliil.”" 
Acts9:18 Ak eng' sainooto kobutyo eng' konyekyik tuguuk che uu peerik, ak kigeerto. Ki ng'eet anyun ak ki kibatisan;" 
Acts9:19 ak ki amis ak ki nyoor kimnateet. Ki tebi ineendet peetuusyo alak kobooto kasubik che ki mi Damasko. 
Acts9:20 Ak ne matyanit koamda agobo Jeso eng' sinagogisyek kole, “Ineendet ko Weeriitap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Acts9:21 Ki kwong'yo tugul che ki kas ineendet ak kole, “Tos ma chiichi ne kotar piik eng' Jerusalem, icheeget che cham koguurei kainani? Ak kogonyo oli agobo ng'olyoondoniito si kobiit komut icheek ko ratotiin koba taitap tisiik che eecheen.”" 
Acts9:22 Ago kitesak Saulo kogimit, ak ki igoochi kokwong'yo Yahudik che ki menyei Damasko, koboorchin icheek komyee kole Jeso niito ko Kristo." 
Acts9:23 Ak ye kingo keskei peetuusyek che chaang', kotuiyo Yahudik korwooch kole kobar ineendet," 
Acts9:24 ago kinaak eng' Saulo chobennywa ne po ung'oot. Ki riip icheek ormariichok peet ak kemoi kole si kobar ineendet; 
Acts9:25 ago ki imut `kasubikyik ineendet kemoi, ak kochoorta kosiir irimeet, komiitei mesendet oriit." 
Acts9:26 Ye kingo nyo `Saulo Jerusalem kotyem kole koyomogei ak kasubik; ago ki iywei `icheek tugul ineendet, ama iyan kole kasubindet ineendet." 
Acts9:27 Ago ki imut Barnaba ineendet kwo ole mi che kiyooktoi, ak kotetyi anyun ole kigeerto `ineendet Kiptaiyat eng' ooreet, ak kole kiga kong'alaalji ineendet, ak ko uu ye kigoamda eng' nyiganateet eng' Damasko eng' kainetap Jeso." 
Acts9:28 Ara ki mi kobooto icheek ak komong'u eng' Jerusalem, komandoi eng' nyiganateet eng' Kainetap Kiptaiyat." 
Acts9:29 Ki ng'alaali ak kobeligei kobooto Yahudik che ki kutinnywa ko Yunanik; ago ki cheeng'ei kotugul kole kobar ineendet. 
Acts9:30 Ye kingo nai tupchosyek, komut ineendet kochoortagei kwo Caesarea ak koyookto kwo Tarsis." 
Acts9:31 Konyoor anyun kamuung'et kaniset eng' emet komugul ne po Judea, Galilaya ak Samaria ak koteegak. Ak ye kibendoti eng' kayweetap Kiptaiyat ak eng' kagaigaet ne po Kabuuset ne Tiliil, kotesak." 
Acts9:31 Konyoor anyun kamuung'et kaniset eng' emet komugul ne po Judea, Galilaya ak Samaria ak koteegak. Ak ye kibendoti eng' kayweetap Kiptaiyat ak eng' kagaigaet ne po Kabuuset ne Tiliil, kotesak." 
Acts9:32 Ye kiwendote Petero komoswek tugul, kochoortagei ole ki mi che tiliileen che ki menyei Lydda." 
Acts9:33 Ak kinyoorchi olooto chiito age ne ki kiguure Ainea, ne kiga korue itogunnyi kenyiisyek sisiit, amu ki meat poorto." 
Acts9:34 Koleenji anyun `Petero ineendet, “Ainea, isaabin Jeso Kristo; ng'eet ak iite itogung'ung'.” Kong'eet anyun sainooto." 
Acts9:35 Ak kigeer ineendet tugul che ki menyei Lydda ak Sharon, ak koyan Kiptaiyat." 
Acts9:36 Ki mi agenge eng' kasubik Joppa ne ki kiguure Tabita, ne ye kiweech eng' kutitap Yunanik ko Dorkas. Ki tinyei kobogoryondoni poisyonik che chaang' che myach ak kagoochinoik che ki igoitoi." 
Acts9:37 Ak kimyan eng' peetuusyechooto, ak kime. Kingo kagoun, konde koot age ne mi parak." 
Acts9:38 Ak amu kineegityin Lydda ak Joppa, ko ye kingo kas kasubik kole mi Petero olooto, koyookyi piik aeng' ineendet, kosoom kole, “Nyonjech, amegagei.”" 
Acts9:39 Kong'eet anyun Petero ak koba ak icheek. Ak kingo kagoit, komut ineendet kwo koot ne po parak. Ak kitonondos mosoogik tugul koriirtos eng' ye neegit ineendet ak koboorchi sumotik ak ngoroik che kinabei Dorkas ye kita komi kobooto icheek." 
Acts9:40 Komaanda Petero tugul koba saang', yeityo kogutuny ak kosa. Ki weleljigei muusto ak koleenji, “Ng'eet, Tabita.” Ak ki yaat konyekyik, ak kingo keer `ineendet Petero, kong'eet kotep ng'wony." 
Acts9:41 Ki igoochi ineendet eunnyi ak konam kotoret ineendet kong'eet. Ye kingo kagoguur che tiliileen ak mosoogik, konde ineendet tainnywa ko kagosap." 
Acts9:42 Kinaak niito eng' Joppa komugul, ak ki iyan che chaang' Kiptaiyat." 
Acts9:43 Ak ki tebi eng' Joppa peetuusyek che chaang' kobooto chiito age ne ki kiguure Simion ne teiteindetap muiywek. 
Acts10:1 Ki mi chiito age Caesarea ne ki kiguure Korneli, ki kiptaiyatap kiplugotinik pogol chooto ki kiguure asigarigap Italy." 
Acts10:2 Ki chiito ne kigonyiti ak koywei Kamuktaindet kobooto koonnyi tugul; ki igoochin piik kagoochinoik che chaang' ak kosaaei Kamuktaindet kotugul. 
Acts10:3 Eng' koskoleng'ut age olo po sait sogool ne po peet ko ki keer eng' ng'ang'utyet kimni, ne eng' ng'ang'utyonooto ko ki keer malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet konyonjin ineendet ak koleenji, “Korneli.”" 
Acts10:4 Keer `Korneli ineendet miising' eng' kaiyweisyet ak kole, “Tos nee, Kiptaiyat?” Koleenji, “Kigoit parak saautiguk ak kagoochinoiguk koek kabwaatet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet." 
Acts10:5 Iyookte nguno anyun piik koba Joppa, koguur chii ne kiguure Simion ne kainennyi ne po aeng' ko Petero;" 
Acts10:6 ineendet ko toondetap Simion ne teiteindetap muiywek, ne mi koonnyi ngeguutap araraita.”" 
Acts10:7 Ye kingo kakwa malaikaiyat ne ki ng'alaalji ineendet, koguur otwogik aeng' che po koonnyi, ak asigarindet ne kigonyiti Kamuktaindet ne ki age eng' che kiboisyechin ineendet kotugul;" 
Acts10:8 ak kingo kagomwachi icheek ng'aleek tugul, koyookto koba Joppa." 
Acts10:9 Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi ye kita kobendi, ko kariikta nganaseet, kotogosta Petero koot parak, eng' olo po sait lo, kwo kosa." 
Acts10:10 Ak ki am rubeet ak kimach koamis; ak ye ki kichobei amitwogik, kobutyi kiy ne uu rwon." 
Acts10:11 Ki keer kipsengwet koyaatak, ak kochoorugei kiit ne uu angeet ne oo kot, kechooru eng' kuinoik ang'wan agoi ng'wony." 
Acts10:12 Ki mi oriit tyong'ik alak tugul che po keelyek ang'wan ak tuguuk che ichuutegei che po ng'wony ak toriitik che po parak. 
Acts10:13 Ki nyoonji anyun tweguunet koleenji, “Ng'eet, Petero; eeny ak iam.”" 
Acts10:14 Ago ki le Petero, “Ma uu nooto, Kiptaiyat; amu tomo aam kiy ne ma tiliil anan ne ng'waan kobooch atkinye kora.”" 
Acts10:15 Ki nyoonji anyun tweguunet kogeny ne po aeng' koleenji, “Kiit ne kagotiliil Kamuktaindet, ko mata ile ng'waan.”" 
Acts10:16 Ki yaak kiito konyil somok, ak eng' yooto ketaach kioto eng' kipsengwet." 
Acts10:17 Ak ye kita koiimegei Petero miising' eng' muguleldanyi kole ibooru nee ng'ang'utyoni kagogeer, ogeero, kotononso eng' kurgat piik che kiga koyook Korneli, ko kagoteep ole mi kootap Simion," 
Acts10:18 ak koguurso ak koteep ngo mi Simion olooto, ne kainennyi ne po aeng' ko Petero." 
Acts10:19 Ye kita kobwaati Petero agobo ng'ang'utyonooto, koleenji `Kabuuset ne Tiliil ineendet, “Keero, cheeng'in piik somogu." 
Acts10:20 Ng'eet anyun nguno, ak ichoortegei, ak obe tugul, amesage kiy; amu kaayogu icheek.”" 
Acts10:21 Ara kichoortagei anyun Petero kwo ole mi pichooto ak kole, “Aa ineendet ne ocheeng'e. Nee ne kagoonok obwa?”" 
Acts10:22 Ak ki le, “Ki iboorchi komyee Kamuktaindet Korneli, eng' malaikaiyat ne tiliil, koyook piik kobwa koguurin iwe koonnyi ne ineendet ko kiptaiyatap pogol, chiito ne po imanda ak koywei Kamuktaindet, ak paoryanjin pororyet tugul ne po Yahudik kole myee ineendet, kole si kogasenen ng'aleek.”" 
Acts10:23 Koguur anyun kobwa ko ak kochopchi icheek ole ruitos. Ak king'eet karon koba kobooto pichooto ak tupchosyek alak che ki punu Joppa. 
Acts10:24 Ak peetuut ne ki isubi peetuunooto koit Caesarea. Ki igeni icheek `Korneli, ko kagoguur tupchosyekyik ak choronokyik che ki ingengei komyee." 
Acts10:25 Ye kingwo ko Petero, kotorooch `Korneli ineendet ak kobutyi keelyekyik, kogutung'ji." 
Acts10:26 Ago ki ing'eet `Petero ineendet koleenji, “Tonon; aneendet ko aa chiito agane.”" 
Acts10:27 Ak kingo ta kong'alaaljindos tuwai, kwo ko ak konyoor piik che chaang' che kagoyumgei:" 
Acts10:28 koleenji anyun icheek, “Ongen okweek ole kiy ne eesyoot eng' ng'atuutik eng' chii ne Yahudyo konamgei ak chii ne po poror age anan konyo ole mi; ago kagoboorwo anee Kamuktaindet kole si mata aguure chii age ne ma tiliil anan ne ng'waan." 
Acts10:29 Amu nooto anyun, ye kingo kageguura ko kaanyo amata asich kiy ne amwae. Nooto anyun ateebee ale nee ne koguurcho.”" 
Acts10:30 Kole anyun Korneli, “Peetuusyek ang'wan rani kobooch yooto agoi saini, ye ki asaae eng' sait sogool eng' koonnyu; ak keero, ki tonon eng' tainnyu mureno ne ilaachi ngoroik che liilei piich," 
Acts10:31 ak kole, ‘Korneli, kigegas saaeng'ung', ak ki koek kabwaatet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet kagoochinoiguk." 
Acts10:32 Iyookte anyun piik koba Joppa si koguurun Simion ne kainet ne po aeng' ko Petero; miitei ineendet ko toondet eng' kootap Simion teiteindetap muiywek, ye neegitee ngeguutap araraita.’" 
Acts10:33 Ki ayoogu anyun piik eng' sainooto kobwa ole imi; ak kaiyai ne myee amu kainyo. Ki mi anyun yu nguno acheek tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, si kegas tuguuk tugul che king'atin Kiptaiyat.”" 
Acts10:34 Ki ng'aany anyun Petero kutinnyi, kole, “Iman ageere ale ma chamei `Kamuktaindet piik alak kosiir alak:" 
Acts10:35 ago taachaksei eng' ineendet chiito ne iywei ineendet ak koyaei iman eng' pororyet age tugul. 
Acts10:36 Ng'olyoot ne ki iyookyi ineendet piigap Israel, ko koamda ng'aleek che myach che po kaalyeet eng' Jeso Kristo, ineendet ko Kiptaiyat ne po tugul." 
Acts10:37 Ongen okweek ng'olyoondonooto, ne ki kiamda eng' Judea komugul ketaune Galilaya, kingo pata kabatisanet ne ki amdoi Johana;" 
Acts10:37 Ongen okweek ng'olyoondonooto, ne ki kiamda eng' Judea komugul ketaune Galilaya, kingo pata kabatisanet ne ki amdoi Johana;" 
Acts10:38 ongen ole ki iil `Kamuktaindet Jeso ne po Nazareth eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak eng' kamuktaet; kiwendot ineendet ak koyaei ne myee, ak kosoobi tugul che ki inyaliili chesawilyet, amu ki mi Kamuktaindet kobooto ineendet." 
Acts10:39 Ki paorinik acheek che po tuguuk tugul che ki yai eng' emetap Yahudik ak eng' Jerusalem. Ki par `icheek ineendet kogartaat eng' keetit; 
Acts10:40 ago ki ing'eet `Kamuktaindet ineendet eng' peetuutap somok ak kogoito kotook," 
Acts10:41 ma eng' piik tugul ago eng' paorinik che kiga sip kolewen Kamuktaindet, acheeget chooto che ki kiamisyei ak keeisei kobooto ineendet ko kagong'eet komong' eng' che ki pek." 
Acts10:42 King'atech keamji piik ak kebaoryan keele niito ko ineendet ne ki inde Kamuktaindet koek Kirwoogindet ne po che saptos ak che ki kobek. 
Acts10:43 Paoryani maotik tugul agobo ineendet kole nyooru nyoetap kaat amu tengekwogikyik eng' kainennyi age tugul ne iyani ineendet.” 
Acts10:44 Ye kita komwaei Petero ng'aleechu, kochoorchigei Kabuuset ne Tiliil tugul che kigasei ng'olyoot." 
Acts10:45 Icheek che po kamuratanet che ki iyani che kibwanei kobooto Petero ko ki kwong'yo amu kageroong'ji Pororyosyek ak icheek konunetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil; 
Acts10:46 amu kigasei icheek kong'alaali eng' kutusweek che teerchiin ak kotoroori Kamuktaindet. Koteep anyun Petero kole," 
Acts10:47 “Imuuchi chii koete peek, si ma kibatisan pichu, che kagotaach Kabuuset ne Tiliil ko uu acheek?”" 
Acts10:48 Ki ng'at anyun kole kibatisan icheek eng' kainetap Jeso Kristo. Kosoom anyun `icheek ineendet kole kota kobeni peetuusyek alak. 
Acts11:1 Ki kas anyun che kiyooktoi ak tupchosyek che ki mi Judea kole kogotaach ak icheek Pororyosyek ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet. 
Acts11:1 Ki kas anyun che kiyooktoi ak tupchosyek che ki mi Judea kole kogotaach ak icheek Pororyosyek ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet. 
Acts11:2 Kingo kagonyo `Petero Jerusalem, kobelgei ak ineendet icheek che po kamuratanet," 
Acts11:3 koleen, “Ki iwe ye mi piik che ma kimuratan ak iamisye kobooto icheek.”" 
Acts11:4 Ago ki toi Petero kotetyi icheek komyee ng'aleechooto, koleenji," 
Acts11:5 “Ki ami nganaseetap Joppa asaae, ak kingo putya kiy ne uu rwon ageer ng'ang'utyet. Ki mi kiy ne kichoorugei ne uu angeet ne oo kot kobunu kipsengwet, ki kichoor eng' kuinoik ang'wan; ak ki nyo agoi ole ami." 
Acts11:6 Ye kinga keer miising' ko ki ageer tyong'igap ng'wony che po keelyek ang'wan ak tyong'ik che po timiin ak tuguuk che ichuutegei ak toriitik che po parak. 
Acts11:7 Ago ki agas kutit koleenjo, ‘Ng'eet, Petero; eeny ak iam.’" 
Acts11:8 Ak ki amwa ale, ‘Ma uu nooto, Kiptaiyat; amu tomo kochut kutinnyu kiy ne ma tiliil anan ne ng'waan.’" 
Acts11:9 Ago ki wol kutinooto ne po aeng' kobunu kipsengwet kole, ‘Amata ing'wanit kiit ne kagotiliil Kamuktaindet.’" 
Acts11:10 Ki yaak kioto konyil somok, ak ki kichuut kogeny tugul koba kipsengwet." 
Acts11:11 Ak eng' sainooto ko kitonondos piik somogu eng' taitap koot ole ki kimi, che ki kiyok eng' Caesarea kobwa ole ami." 
Acts11:12 Kong'ata anyun Kabuuset ne Tiliil kole keebe tugul, amat isage. Ak ki kibe tugul ak tupchosyechu lo ak icheek; keebe agoi kootap chiichooto." 
Acts11:13 Kimwaiwech ko uu ye kiga keer malaikaiyat kotononi eng' koonnyi, kole, ‘Iyookte piik koba Joppa koguur Simion, ne kiguure kainennyi ne po aeng' Petero;" 
Acts11:14 konyo komwaun ng'aleek che kisaruunenen, inyee ak koong'ung' tugul.’" 
Acts11:15 Ak ye kinga tau ang'alaal, kochoorchigei `Kabuuset ne Tiliil icheek ko uu ye kichorchechkei agacheek eng' taunet." 
Acts11:16 Abwaat anyun ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat, ko uu ye ki mwa kole, ‘Ki ibatisanis Johana eng' peek; ago kibatisanook okweek eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil.’" 
Acts11:17 Ngo ki igoochi anyun Kamuktaindet icheek konunet ne kergei ak ne ki koonech ye kingi yan Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo, ko tos ki aa ng'oo anyun kot amuuch agirinda Kamuktaindet?”" 
Acts11:18 Kingo kas ng'aleechuuto, kosiisyo. Ak ki iloos Kamuktaindet, koleen, “Kaagaa kagogoochi `Kamuktaindet Pororyosyek ak icheek siguunet ne ibu saboondo.”" 
Acts11:19 Ki pa anyun icheek che kiga yesta amu usiisyet ne king'eet agobo Stepano agoi koit Phoenisia, Cyprus, ak Antiok, koma ng'alaaljin chii age ng'olyoot kobatee Yahudik." 
Acts11:20 Ago ki mi alak eng' icheek, piigap Cyprus ak Kurene, che kingo pwa Antiok kong'alaalji Yunanik ak icheek, koamdoi Kiptaiyat Jeso." 
Acts11:21 Ki mi eutap Kiptaiyat kobooto icheek, ak ki iyan piik che chaang' konam ng'aleegap Kiptaiyat." 
Acts11:22 Ki kas ng'aleek agobo icheek kaniset ne ki mi Jerusalem, ak ki iyookto Barnaba kwo kot koit Antiok." 
Acts11:23 Kingo it ineendet ak kogeer myeeindap Kamuktaindet, kobaibait, ak kogiil icheek tugul konamgei ak Kiptaiyat eng' mugulelwek che pekyinotin." 
Acts11:24 Barnaba ko ki chii ne myee ak ki nyiitaat Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak kayaneet. Ki tesak anyun piik ko chang'a che ki pwanji Kiptaiyat. 
Acts11:25 Ki wo agoi Tarsis kocheeng' Saulo," 
Acts11:26 ak kingo kagonyoor, komut konyo Antiok. Ara ki iyumgei eng' kenyiit agenge kobooto kaniset, ak koneet piik che chaang'. Ki kitoi keguure kasubik Kristyanik eng' Antiok." 
Acts11:27 Ki choorgei anyun maotik eng' peetuusyechooto eng' Jerusalem kobwa Antiok. 
Acts11:28 Ak ki tonon age eng' icheek ne ki kiguure Agabo ak koboor eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil kole tuun ityin rubeet ne oo ng'wony komugul; ak ki isulda niito eng' peetuusyegap Klaudio. 
Acts11:29 Kichopkei komyee kasubik koyookyi toreteet tupchosyek che ki menyei Judea, chii tugul ko uu ye ki imuuchi." 
Acts11:29 Kichopkei komyee kasubik koyookyi toreteet tupchosyek che ki menyei Judea, chii tugul ko uu ye ki imuuchi." 
Acts11:30 Ki yai anyun ko uu nooto, ki iyookyi poisyek eng' eunegap Barnaba ak Saulo." 
Acts12:1 Ye ki neegit peetuusyechooto kotoi laitoryat Herod kous alak che po kaniset. 
Acts12:2 Ki par Jakobo ng'eetap kametap Johana eng' rotwetap chok. 
Acts12:3 Ak ye kingo keer kole ki ibaibai nooto Yahudik, kotoi konam Petero agine. Ak kibetusyegap magatyat ne ma kinde mermereek, peetuusyechooto." 
Acts12:4 Kingo kagonam ineendet, konde korgoreet, ak kogoochi kiplugotinik ang'wan konyil ang'wan koriip ineendet, koleen ye ibata Paska komutyi piik." 
Acts12:5 Ye ki kiriipe Petero anyun eng' korgoreet, ko ki saaei kaniset Kamuktaindet miising' agobo ineendet." 
Acts12:6 Eng' kemounooto ki machei `Herod komoong' ineendet, ko ki rue `Petero kwenutap asigarik aeng', koratatee nyororosyek aeng'. Ak ki riip korgoreet riibiik eng' taitap kurgeet." 
Acts12:7 Ak ogeero, ki tonon malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat eng' ye neegitee ineendet ak ki ikweny lapkeiyet koot. Ki irabaach karaastap Petero ak kong'eet koleenji, “Ng'eet chokyi.” Ak ki ibutyo nyororosyek che ki mi eunekyik." 
Acts12:8 Ak koleenji malaikaiyat ineendet, “Ratkei, indegei kweoniguk ak irat.” Ak ki yai ko uu nooto. Ak ki leenji, “Ilaach ngoryeeng'ung' ak isubwo.”" 
Acts12:9 Ak ki wo Petero saang' ak koosup ineendet; ak ki ma nai kole iman kiit ne kayai malaikaiyat, ago kileen kageer ng'ang'utyet." 
Acts12:10 Kingo kagosiir riipseet ne po tai ak ne po aeng', kobwa agoi ormariichet ne po karnet ne kibunei kebendi nganaseet, koyaatak ineegei. Ak kimanda saang' ak koba kobun ooreet agenge; ak eng' sainooto kobagaakta ineendet `malaikaiyat kwo." 
Acts12:11 Ye kingo pwaat Petero, komwa kole, “Kaanai nguno iman, ale, kagoyok `Kiptaiyat malaikaiyandennyi ak kasarwo eng' eutap Herod, ak eng' kagenisyet tugul ne po piigap Yahudik.”" 
Acts12:12 Ara ye kingo kagobwaat komyee, konyo kootap Maria kametap Johana ne kiguure kainennyi ne po aeng' Mariko, ole kiga koyumjigei che chaang' ak kosaaei." 
Acts12:13 Ak ye kingo kongony kurgeetap ormariichet, konyo chepto ne ki kiguure Roda kogas." 
Acts12:14 Ak kingo nai chebooto kutitap Petero, koma koyaat ormariichet amu poiboiyet ago kilabat ko, ak komwaita kole tononi Petero eng' ormariichet." 
Acts12:15 Ki leenji `icheek ineendet, “Amin iywek!” Ago ki mwa eng' kimnateet kole, uu nooto. Ak ki mwa icheek kole, “Malaikaiyandennyi.”" 
Acts12:16 Ago kites Petero kogongony; ak kingo kagoyat, kogeer ineendet ak kokwong'yo." 
Acts12:17 Ago ki iboorchine `ineendet icheek euut kosiisyo, ak kotetyi ole kagomutunda `Kiptaiyat ineendet komong' eng' korgoreet. Ak ki mwa kole, “Omwachi ng'aleechu Jakobo ak tupchosyek.” Ak ki wo agoi komosta age." 
Acts12:18 Ak kingo kagoeech, kotoptobenso kiplugotinik miising', kole katepto ano Petero." 
Acts12:19 Ye kingo kagocheeng' `Herod ineendet, ama konyoor, kogin riibiik ak kong'at kole kanyool kebar. Ak kichoortagei eng' Judea kwo Caesarea ak kotebee olooto." 
Acts12:19 Ye kingo kagocheeng' `Herod ineendet, ama konyoor, kogin riibiik ak kong'at kole kanyool kebar. Ak kichoortagei eng' Judea kwo Caesarea ak kotebee olooto." 
Acts12:20 Ki nereekyi miising' `Herod piigap Tyro ak Sidon. Ara ki pwanji `icheek ineendet eng' kabwaatet agenge, ak kingo nam chorwandi ak Blasto ne ki riibei ole kirue laitoryat, kosoom kaalyeet amu kibaei `emetap laitoryat emennywa." 
Acts12:21 Ak eng' peetuut ne ki king'at, kolaach Herod ngoroigap laitornatet, ak kotebee ng'echereetap kirwooget, ak kong'alaalji pichooto." 
Acts12:22 Ak ki polyo piik kole, “Kutitap kamuktain niito, ma po chii.”" 
Acts12:23 Eng' sainooto anyun kobir ineendet `malaikaiyatap Kiptaiyat, amu ma konyit Kamuktaindet. Ara ki am ineendet kuutik ak kime." 
Acts12:24 Ago ki testai ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet, ak koityi che chaang'." 
Acts12:25 Ye kingo kagogees poisyennywa Barnaba ak Saulo, koweektagei Jerusalem, komuti Johana ne ki kainennyi ne po aeng' ko Mariko." 
Acts13:1 Eng' kaniset ne ki mi Antiok ko ki mi maotik ak kaneetik: Barnaba, Simion ne ki kiguure Niger, Lukio ne po Kurene, Manaen ne ki kigui kobooto kirwoogindet Herod, ak Saulo." 
Acts13:2 Ye kiboisyechin Kiptaiyat ak korugutegei, kole Kabuuset ne Tiliil, “Otabaannywa Barnaba ak Saulo agobo poisyet ne ki aguurchi.”" 
Acts13:3 Ak ye kingo kagorugutkei ak kosaaei, kogonoor icheek eunekwak ak koyookto koba." 
Acts13:4 Kingo kagoyookto icheek `Kabuuset ne Tiliil, kochoorchigei Seleusia; ak ki pa eng' olooto kobun moinget agoi Cyprus." 
Acts13:5 Ye ki miitei Salamis, koamda ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet eng' sinagogisyegap Yahudik. Ak ki mi kobooto Johana ne kiboisyechinoti." 
Acts13:6 Ak kingo kagobun emet komugul ne ki ikween peek agoi koit Paphos, konyoorchi olooto poonin, maotyo ne po lembech, ne Yahudyot, ne ki kiguure Bar-Jesu." 
Acts13:7 Ki mi `ineendet kobooto pounindet, Sergio Paulas, chiito ne ng'oom. Ki kuur chiichito Barnaba ak Saulo koba ole mi ineendet ak kimachei kogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet." 
Acts13:8 Ago ki kirinda icheek `Eluma ng'oorindet (amu uu nooto kainennyi ye kiweech), ki kirinda pounindonooto, kocheeng'ei komaas kole si ma nyoor kayaneet." 
Acts13:9 Ago ki nyi `Kabuuset ne Tiliil Saulo, ne kiguure Paulo, ak ki ichiilji kong' ineendet" 
Acts13:10 ak kole, “Ee inyee ne nyiitaat ng'aalseet tugul ak ng'omnateet tugul ne po kabeetet, inyee weeriitap chesawilyet, inyee puunyootap imanda tugul, mebagaaktoi imaas ortinwek che lititen che po Kiptaiyat?" 
Acts13:11 Ak keer nguno anyuno, mi eutap Kiptaiyat paragung'ung', ak eng' peetuusyo iegu kipkoratya si mata igeer asiista.” Ak ki ibutyi sainooto mirmirindo ak mesundeito, ak kiwendot kocheeng'at piik che namoti ineendet euut." 
Acts13:12 Kingo keer anyun pounindet kiit ne kayaak, koyan, kokwong' agobo kaneetisyetap Kiptaiyat." 
Acts13:13 Ki pa anyun Paulo ak che ki mi kobooto ineendet kobun moinget eng' Paphos, ak koit Perga eng' Pamphylia. Ak ki wo Johana koweektagei Jerusalem kobagaakta icheek." 
Acts13:14 Ak kingo pun icheek Perga, koit Antiok ne po Pisidia. Ki pa sinagogit eng' peetuutap sabato ak kotep ng'wony." 
Acts13:15 Kingo pata somaneetap ng'atuutyet ak siruutigap maotik koyookto pounigap sinagogit piik koba ole mi icheek, koleenji, “Che kitupche, ngo tinye ng'olyoo age tugul ne imuuchi kotoret pichu, omwa.”" 
Acts13:16 Kotonon anyun Paulo ak koboorchine euut, kole, “Ogaso okweek piigap Israel, ak okweek che oiywei Kamuktaindet." 
Acts13:17 Ki lewen Kamuktaindet ne po pichu Israel kwanisyekyok ak kotoroor pichooto ye ki punootik eng' emetap Misiri, ak ki imut icheek komong' eng' euut ne kiim." 
Acts13:18 Ak kimuitoochi icheek eng' atebosyekwak eng' olo po kenyiisyek artam eng' surkwen. 
Acts13:19 Kingo kagong'em pororyosyek tisap eng' emetap Kanaan, kogoochi icheek emennywa koek poroteet, eng' olo po kenyiisyek pogol ang'wan ak konom" 
Acts13:20 ak kingo pata tuguuchu kogoochi icheek kirwoogik agoi Samuel maotyot. 
Acts13:21 Ak kingo pata kosoom laitoryat; ak ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet icheek Saulo weeriitap Kish eng' kenyiisyek artam, chiito ne po ooreetap Benjamin." 
Acts13:22 Kingo kagoisto ineendet, kong'eetyi Daudi koek laitoryannywa; ne kibaoryanji agine kole, ‘Kaanyooru Daudi weeriitap Jesse, chiito ne iboiboi muguleldanyu, ne tuun yaei maguutikyuk tugul.’" 
Acts13:23 Ki imutyi `Kamuktaindet Israel Yetindet, Jeso, eng' kesweegap chiichito, ko uu ye kiga koaror;" 
Acts13:24 ye kiga sip koamji `Johana piik tugul che po Israel, kabatisanet ne po siguunet, ye ki tomo konyo ineendet." 
Acts13:25 Ak ye ki neegit kogees Johana pandanyi, komwa kole, ‘Oleen aa ng'oo? Ma aa ineendet. Ago ogeero, isubwo age, ne ma nyoljino atyakyi kweonigap keelyekyik.’" 
Acts13:26 “Che kitupche, lagogap kesweek che po Abraham, ak alak che mi kwenung'wong' che iywei Kamuktaindet, kagiyokwech acheek ng'olyoondoni po yetunet." 
Acts13:27 Amu ki ma nai ineendet `meng'iigap Jerusalem kobooto pounikwak, anan koguiyo kutusweegap maotik che kisomani eng' sabato age tugul, ki isuldae icheek ng'aleechooto ye ki irwookyi ineendet." 
Acts13:28 Nganda ki ma nyoor eng' ineendet ng'olyoot ne igoochin kome, ko ki soom `icheek Pilato kole kebar ineendet." 
Acts13:29 Ye kingo kagogees tuguuk tugul che kiga kisir agobo ineendet, kochoor ineendet eng' keetit ak konde kererit." 
Acts13:30 Ago ki ing'eet `Kamuktaindet ineendet komong' eng' che ki pek. 
Acts13:31 Ak ki keer ineendet eng' peetuusyek che chaang' icheek che kitogosu kobooto ineendet kobunu Galilaya kobwanei Jerusalem, che nguno ko paorinik eng' piik." 
Acts13:32 Ak ki ibwook logoiywek che myach che po arorutyet, ne ki kigoochi kwanisyekyok," 
Acts13:33 ko uu ye kigosuldochi `Kamuktaindet lagokyok nooto, amu ki ing'eet Jeso; ko uu ye siraat eng' Tyendap Kalasunet ne po aeng', kole, ‘Ii weeriinnyu, kaasichin rani.’" 
Acts13:34 Ak ko uu ye ki ing'eet ineendet komong' eng' che ki pek, ma koweekyingei ineendet kogeny nunet, ki mwa ko uu ni kole, ‘Tuun agoonin kaberuroik che tiliileen, ak ko po iman, che po Daudi.’" 
Acts13:35 Amu ki mwa agine eng' Tyendo age kole, ‘Matun igoochini neng'ung' Ne Tiliil kogeer nunet.’" 
Acts13:36 Amu ye kingo kagoboisyechi Daudi kirwoogutigap Kamuktaindet ne Toroor eng' ibindanyi, konuuch, ak ki kitup kobooto kwanisyekyik, ak kogeer nunet." 
Acts13:37 Ago ma keer nunet ineendet ne ki ing'eet Kamuktaindet. 
Acts13:38 Ingonaak anyun eng' okweek, che kitupche, keele, kimwaiwok eng' chiichi nyoetap kaat ne po tengekwogik;" 
Acts13:39 ak kiityin imanda eng' ineendet age tugul ne iyani, eng' tuguuk tugul, che koma komuuchi koiityok imanda ng'atuutyetap Musa." 
Acts13:40 Oriipkei anyun, si ma nyonjok ne ki kimwa eng' maotik keele," 
Acts13:41 ‘Ogeero, okweek saasiik, okwong'ye ak olusye; Amu ayae poisyet eng' peetuusyekwok, poisyet ne ma koi oyan matiny, agot ngo mwaiwok chii.’ ”" 
Acts13:42 Ak kingo ta komandoi icheek, kosoom kole tuun kota koamji icheek ng'aleechooto eng' sabato ne nyoonei." 
Acts13:43 Kingo kagomanda tuiyet eng' sinagogit, koosup Paulo ak Barnaba `che chaang' che po Yahudik ak `che konyiti Kamuktaindet che kiwalak kobunji Yahudik. Ye kingo ng'alaaljin icheek, kogiil kole koba tai eng' myeeindap Kamuktaindet." 
Acts13:44 Ak eng' sabato ne isubi nooto, koyumgei nganaseet che neegit tugul kole kogas ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet." 
Acts13:45 Ago ye kingo keer `Yahudik tuiyosyek, koam ng'et kong' ak koeesyo eng' kimnateet ng'aleek che kimwaei Paulo, ak komwa ng'aleek che yaacheen kochubis." 
Acts13:46 Kong'alaal anyun Paulo ak Barnaba eng' nyiganateet koleen, “Konyolu kemwaiwok korook ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet. Amu ki ogirinde ak orwookyinige okweegei ole ma nyolu onyooru saboondap koigeny, ogeero, kagibe ye mi Pororyosyek." 
Acts13:47 Amu king'atech Kiptaiyat ko uu nooto kole, ‘Kaandein iegu lapkeiyet ne po Pororyosyek, si kobiit iegu yetunet agoi tabandap ng'wony.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Kingo kas Pororyosyek ng'olyoondoniito, koboiboitu ak kogonyit ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet; ak koyan tugul che kiga kelewenji saboondap koigeny." 
Acts13:49 Ak ki yom ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat koronooto tugul. 
Acts13:50 Ago ki inde `Yahudik ng'aleegap chaamset kobogorisyek che konyiti Kamuktaindet ak ko taagunotiin, ak piik che eecheen che po nganaseet, ak ki ing'eet usiisyet kous Paulo ak Barnaba, ak koon komanda eng' kiwotosyekwak." 
Acts13:51 Ago kilelekyi icheek temburyek che mi keelyekwak, ak kiit Ikonio." 
Acts13:52 Ak ki nyi kasubik poiboiyet ak Kabuuset ne Tiliil. 
Acts14:1 Ye kingo mi Paulo ak Barnaba Ikonio, ko ki pa sinagogitap Yahudik ak kong'alaal kot koyan tuiyet ne oo ne po Yahudik ak Yunanik." 
Acts14:2 Ago kiim Yahudik che kibistoik saboonwegap Pororyosyek kot kogoochi kowech tupchosyek. 
Acts14:3 Ki tebee olooto anyun peetuusyek che chaang' ak kong'alaali eng' nyiganateet agobo Kiptaiyat, ne kibaoryanji ng'olyootap myeeindonyi ak kogoochin koyaak kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik eng' eunekwak." 
Acts14:4 Ago kipcheigei tuiyet ne po nganaseet; ak ki namgei alage ak Yahudik, konamgei alage ak che kiyooktoi." 
Acts14:5 Ak ye kimachei Pororyosyek ak Yahudik kobooto pounikwak kobookyi icheek, kole koyachi ne ya, ak kolach eng' koik," 
Acts14:6 kosip konai, ak kimwechi Lystra ak Derbe, nganasook che po Lukaonia, ak korotinwek che neegitee olooto," 
Acts14:7 ak ki amda logoiywek che myach eng' olooto. 
Acts14:8 Ki mi chii age eng' Lystra ne ki ma ko kiimeen keelyekyik ak ki tomo kowendot, amu ki salamwo kobooch komi moetap kamet." 
Acts14:9 Ki kas chiichooto Paulo kong'alaali. Ak kingo ochiilji kong' `Paulo chiichooto, ak kogeer kole tinyei kayaneet ne kimuuchi kisoop," 
Acts14:10 komwa eng' kutit ne oo kole, “Tonon komyee eng' keelyeguk.” Ak kitoromben ak kowendot." 
Acts14:11 Ak kingo keer tuiyosyek kiit ne kayai Paulo, kobolyo eng' ng'aleegap Lukaonia, kole, “Kachorchechkei kamuktaik eng' kergeindap piik.”" 
Acts14:12 Ak kiguure Barnaba, Seu; koguure Paulo, Herme, amu ki ng'alaalindet ne oo ineendet." 
Acts14:13 Ak tisiindetap Seu ne ki mi hekalunnyi taitap nganaseet ko kiget tuuga ak sinendoik kobwa kurgotik, ak kimachei ineendet kobooto tuiyosyek kogoito tiseiywot." 
Acts14:14 Ago ye kingo kas agobo nooto che kiyooktoi Barnaba ak Paulo kogereer ngoroikwak ak korwai koba kwenutap tuiyet, koboldos koleen," 
Acts14:15 “Choronochu, kalya si oyai tuguuchu? Ki piik agacheek che kergei ak okweek, ak kagiibwok logoiywek che myach, si kobiit oweeige omete tuguuchu ma tilei kiy ak obwonji Kamuktaindet ne sabei, ne kiyaei kipsengwet ak ng'wony ak araraita ak tugul che mi olooto." 
Acts14:16 Ki pagaakyi `ineendet pororyosyek tugul eng' ibinwek che ki kosiirto kobendat eng' ortinwekwak. 
Acts14:17 Ago ki ma tebi puch ineendet ama tinyei paorya, amu ki yai ne myee, ak kogoonok ropta ne punu kipsengwet ak peetuusyegap rurateet, kogoochin kobiyong'so mugulelwekwok eng' amitwogik ak kaagaasetapkei.”" 
Acts14:18 Agot eng' ng'aleechu ki mwa, ko ki neegit kotemenee kogirinda icheeget si mata kogoochi icheek tiseiywot." 
Acts14:19 Ago ki pwa Yahudik che ki punu Antiok ak Ikonia ak kolom tuiyosyek. Kilach `icheek Paulo eng' koik, ak kochuut komanda eng' nganaseet, koleen kagome." 
Acts14:20 Ago ye kitonondos kasubik ko kayiem ineendet, kong'eet ak kwo nganaseet. Eng' peetuut ne ki isubi nooto koba Derbe ak Barnaba." 
Acts14:21 Ye kingo kagoamji logoiywek che myach nganasanooto, ak ko kagoyai che chaang' koek kasubik, koweektagei koba Lystra, ak Ikonia, agoi Antiok." 
Acts14:22 Ki igimitoti saboonwegap kasubik, ko ki ili koba tai eng' kayaneet ak koleenji, “Kanyool keit laitornatetap Kamuktaindet eng' nyalilwogik che chaang'.”" 
Acts14:23 Ak kingo kagolewenji icheek `poisyek eng' kaniset age tugul, kosa eng' karugutetapkei, konde icheek eutap Kiptaiyat ne kiga koyan." 
Acts14:24 Ki pa kobun Pisidia ak koit Pamphylia. 
Acts14:25 Kingo kagoamda ng'olyoot eng' Perga, kochoortagei Attalia." 
Acts14:26 Kotaune olooto ko ki pun moinget agoi Antiok, ole ki kindae icheek myeeindap Kamuktaindet agobo poisyet ne kiga koyai kosulda." 
Acts14:27 Kingo kagobwa, koyum kaniset komugul ak komwachi tuguuk tugul che kiga koyai Kamuktaindet eng' icheek, ak ole kiga koyatyindo Pororyosyek kurgeet ne po kayaneet." 
Acts14:28 Ak ki tebi peetuusyek che chaang' olooto kobooto kasubik. 
Acts15:1 Ki choorgei anyun piik alak che ki punu Judea ak koneet tupchosyek kole, “Ngot koma kimuratanak ko uu piteetap Musa, ko momuuchi onyooru saruunet.”" 
Acts15:1 Ki choorgei anyun piik alak che ki punu Judea ak koneet tupchosyek kole, “Ngot koma kimuratanak ko uu piteetap Musa, ko momuuchi onyooru saruunet.”" 
Acts15:2 Ak ye kingo kagotiiyo Paulo ak Barnaba miising' ak koteebegei miising' kobooto icheek, kolewen `tupchosyek Paulo ak Barnaba ak alak eng' icheek kotogosta koba Jerusalem ole mi che kiyooktoi ak poisyek agobo ng'olyoondoniito." 
Acts15:3 Kingo kagoyomis anyun icheek kaniset eng' pandanywa, kobun Phoenisia ak Samaria, komwaitaati agobo che ki kowalogis koyan Kamuktaindet eng' Pororyosyek, ak ki igoochi ng'olyoondonooto tupchosyek tugul poiboiyet ne oo." 
Acts15:4 Kingo kagoit Jerusalem, kotaach icheek `kaniset ak che kiyooktoi ak poisyek, ak komwachi icheek tuguuk tugul che kiga koyai Kamuktaindet kobooto icheeget." 
Acts15:5 Ago kitononso alak eng' kasubiigap Pharisaik che iyanotin kole, “Kanyool kimuratan icheek, ak keng'at icheek koriip Ng'atuutyetap Musa.”" 
Acts15:6 Ki iyumgei che kiyooktoi ak poisyek si kobiit kogeer ole teptoi ng'olyoondoniito. 
Acts15:7 Ak kingo kagoteebegei miising', kotonon Petero ak komwachi icheek kole, “Che kitupche, ongen okweek ole ki kolewen Kamuktaindet eng' kwenung'wong' kobooch ye po ui kole kogas Pororyosyek ng'olyoot ne po logoiywek che myach eng' kutinnyu ak koyan." 
Acts15:8 Ak kibaoryanji icheek `Kamuktaindet ne ingen mugulelwegap piik, kogoochi icheek `Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ko uu ye ki koonech;" 
Acts15:9 ak ki ma ibesyech ak icheeget, ye ki itiliili mugulelwekwak eng' kayaneet." 
Acts15:10 Kalya nguno anyun si otyem Kamuktaindet kot onde chogit kaatitap kasubik, ne ki ma imuuch koip kwanisyekyok anan acheek?" 
Acts15:11 Ago kiyani keele kisarwech eng' myeeindap Kiptaiyat Jeso, ko uu ye kisaru ak icheek.”" 
Acts15:12 Kosiisyo anyun tuiyet komugul; ak koepchi iit Barnaba ak Paulo kotetyin icheek kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik che kiga koyai Kamuktaindet eng' icheek eng' kwenutap Pororyosyek. 
Acts15:13 Ak kingo kagosiisyo, kowol Jakobo kole, “Che kitupche, ogaso." 
Acts15:14 Kagomwa Simion ko uu ye ki rutoochi `Kamuktaindet Pororyosyek eng' tai, si kobiit kolewenji kainennyi piik eng' icheek." 
Acts15:15 Kanamgei niito ak ng'aleegap maotik, ko uu ye siraat kole," 
Acts15:16 ‘Ye ibata tuguuchu aweege, ak ateech kogeny kootap Daudi ne ki koluul; ak ateech kogeny komoswek che ki koluulyo, ak alum kotonon," 
Acts15:17 si kocheeng' piik che ng'etunotiin Kiptaiyat, ak Pororyosyek tugul che kiguurtoe kainennyu." 
Acts15:18 Mwaei Kiptaiyat, ne yaei tuguuchu si konaak kobooch taunetap ng'wony.’" 
Acts15:19 “Nooto anyun, atile kirwooget ko uu ni ale, amata kinyalil `acheek icheek che po Pororyosyek che pwaanjin Kamuktaindet;" 
Acts15:20 ago ongesirchi icheek keleenji kotabaanegei murwoonindap kanamonik, ak sokseet, ak ne po tuguuk che kagiget, ak korotiik." 
Acts15:21 Amu ki tinyei Musa kobooch ibinwek che po keny eng' nganasook tugul, icheeget che amdoi agobo ineendet, che kisomani eng' sinagogisyek eng' sabato age tugul.”" 
Acts15:22 Kogeer anyun che kiyooktoi ak poisyek, kobooto kaniset komugul kole myee kolewen piik alak eng' icheek, ak koyookto koba Antiok kobooto Paulo ak Barnaba. Ki iyookto Judas ne ki kiguure Barsaba, ak Sila, piik che eecheen eng' tupchosyek," 
Acts15:23 kobooto parweet: “Kisirchini `acheek che kiyooktoi ak tupchosyek che poisyek, tupchosyek che po Pororyosyek che mi Antiok ak Syria ak Cilicia, kigatok." 
Acts15:24 Ko uu ye ko kegas keele, inyalilok eng' ng'aleek piik alak che kibunei kwenunnyo, kong'emei saboonwekwok; piik che ki ma king'at ko uu nooto;" 
Acts15:25 kagigeer keele myee eng' acheek, che kagechamyechi, kelewen piik ak kiyakwok kobooto chamanikyok Barnaba ak Paulo," 
Acts15:26 piik che ki kogoito saboonwekwak amu kainetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo. 
Acts15:27 Kagiyogu anyun Judah ak Sila, si komwaiwok icheeget ak icheek tuguuchuuto eng' kutusweekwak." 
Acts15:28 Amu kigeere keele kagomyeeit eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak eng' acheek, keele, ma kigesenjok mileet ne nyigiis ne siire tuguuchu nyolu:" 
Acts15:29 keele otabaanegei tuguuk che kieng'jin kanamonik, ak korotiik, ak panyeegap che kagiget, ak sokseet; ngo tabaanegei chooto, komyeeitu eng' okweek. Saisere.”" 
Acts15:30 Ye kingo kagiyookto koba anyun, kochoortagei koba Antiok; ak kingo kagoyum tuiyet, kogoochi parweet." 
Acts15:31 Kingo kagosoman koboiboitu agobo kagaigaet. 
Acts15:32 Ki igiil `Judah ak `Sila tupchosyek eng' ng'aleek che chaang', ak kogimit amu ki maotik ak icheek." 
Acts15:33 Ak kingo kagotebee olooto peetuusyek alak, kounda tupchosyek icheek eng' kaalyeet koba ole mi icheek che ki iyoogu." 
Acts15:34 Ago ki cham Sila kota kotebee olooto. 
Acts15:35 Ago ki tebee Paulo ak Barnaba Antiok, koneeti ak koamdoi ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat, kobooto piik alak che chaang' ak icheek." 
Acts15:36 Kingo pata peetuusyek alak koleenji `Paulo Barnaba, “Ingeweege nguno kerutoochi tupchosyek eng' nganaseet age tugul ole kigeamdaate ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat, ak kegeer ole teptoi.”" 
Acts15:37 Ki machei Barnaba miising' komut Johana ne ki kiguure Mariko, koba tugul." 
Acts15:38 Ago ki ibwaat Paulo kole ma myee kimut ineendet ne kiga kobagaakta icheek eng' Pamphylia, ama cham koba poisyet kobooto icheek." 
Acts15:39 Ak king'eetyo ng'aleek che koroomen kot kopcheigei icheegei. Ki imut `Barnaba Mariko ak kobun moinget agoi Cyprus. 
Acts15:40 Ago ki lewen `Paulo Sila ak koba, ko kagonde tupchosyek icheek myeeindap Kiptaiyat." 
Acts15:41 Ak kobun Syria ak Cilicia, kogimitoti kanisosyek." 
Acts16:1 Ki wo kora Paulo agoi Derbe ak Lystra. Ki mi olooto agenge eng' kasubik ne ki kiguure Timoteo, weeriitap chepyahudyot ne ki kayanindet; ago kwandanyi ko ki Yunanindet." 
Acts16:2 Kibaoryanjin ineendet `tupchosyek che ki mi Lystra ak Ikonio kole myee. 
Acts16:3 Ki machei Paulo chiichito koba tuwai; ak ki imut ineendet ak komuratan amu Yahudik che ki mi komoswechooto, amu ki ingen tugul kole Yunanindet kwandanyi." 
Acts16:4 Ak ye kibendi pandanywa kobunoti nganasook kogoochi icheek ng'atuutik, che kiga ng'at che kiyooktoi ak poisyek che ki mi Jerusalem, si koriip." 
Acts16:5 Ki kigimit anyun kanisosyek eng' kayaneet, ak kotesak koiitennywa peetuut age tugul." 
Acts16:6 Ki pa anyun kobun kooret ne po Phrygia ak Galatia, ko kagoete icheek `Kabuuset ne Tiliil komwaita ng'olyoot eng' Asia." 
Acts16:7 Ye kingo toorchigei Mysia, kotyem koba Bithynia, ago ma chamji icheek `Kabuusetap Jeso;" 
Acts16:8 ak kingo siir Mysia, kochoortagei Traos." 
Acts16:9 Ki nyoonji anyun ng'ang'utyet Paulo kemoi; ki mi chiitap Makedonia ne kitononi, kogoigoi ineendet koleen, “Long'u Makedonia, nyoo toretech.”" 
Acts16:10 Ye kingo kagogeer ng'ang'utyet, eng' sainooto kemach keebe Makedonia, ko kagenai keele kogoguurech Kamuktaindet si kobiit keamji icheek logoiywek che myach." 
Acts16:11 Ki kibun anyun moinget kebunu Traos, kitoorchigei Samothrase, ak peetuut ne ki isubi nooto keit Neapoli." 
Acts16:12 Ak keng'eetyo eng' olooto keebe Philippi, ne nganaseetap Makedonia, ne ki tagunoot eng' emonooto, ne ki uuchi Romanik. Ki kitebee nganasanooto eng' peetuusyo." 
Acts16:13 Ak eng' peetuutap sabato kemandae ormariichet keebe ole neegitee aineet, ole ki kileen ole kisaae; ak ki kitep ng'wony ak keng'alaalji kobogorisyek che kiga tuiyo." 
Acts16:14 Ki mi kobogoryot age ne ki kiguure Lydia, ne ki ilasu Kamuktaindet. Ki po nganaseet ne kiguure Thyatira, ak ki aldaindetap ngoroik che arusen ne piriir. Ye kigaseech, koyaat Kiptaiyat muguleldanyi koepchi iit ak kotaach tuguuk che ki mwaei Paulo." 
Acts16:15 Ye kiga kibatisan ineendet ak piigap koonnyi, kogaigaech kole, “Ngo kaogeer ole ayani Kiptaiyat, obwa koonnyu ak otebi.” Ak kibirchech keebe." 
Acts16:16 Peetuut age ye ki kibendi ole kisaae, kotuiyenech chepto ne ki tinyei tamirmiryet ne ng'oorsei ne ki ipchi kiptainikyik tuguuk che chaang' amu ng'oorset." 
Acts16:17 Ki isubot Paulo kebendi tugul, ak komwaei eng' kutit ne oo koleen, “Pichu ko otwogigap Kamuktaindet Ne Toroor Miising', che mwaiwok ooreetap yetunet.”" 
Acts16:18 Ak ki yai ineendet ko uu nooto eng' peetuusyek che chaang'. Ago ki aragen Paulo miising', ak kowelelgei ak koleenji oindonooto murwon, “Kang'atiin eng' kainetap Jeso Kristo ale, mong'u eng' ineendet.” Ak ki mong' eng' sainooto." 
Acts16:19 Ago kingo keer kiptainikyik kole kagobet kamang'unetap keljinennywa, konam Paulo ak Sila, ak kochuut koba taitap pounik eng' ye kiyae mung'aaret." 
Acts16:20 Kingo kagomut icheek kobwa taitap kirwoogik, komwa kole, “Inyaliili pichu nganasennyo miising', ago icheeget ko Yahudik," 
Acts16:21 ak ineeti pitonwek che ma chamdaat eng' ng'atuutik ketaach anan kisup, amu acheek ko ki Romanik.”" 
Acts16:22 Ak ki ng'eet tuiyet kibagenge kobookyi icheek, ak kogereer kirwoogik ngoroigap pichooto ak kong'at kebir eng' kirokweek." 
Acts16:23 Ak kingo kagobir icheek miising', kotoorchi korgoreet ak kong'at riibindetap korgoreet koriip komyee." 
Acts16:24 Kingo kagonyoor ng'atuutyet ne uu nooto, kotoorchi icheek koot ne po oriit ak koratyi keelyekwak temeleiywek." 
Acts16:25 Eng' olo po kemoi kween ko ki saaei Paulo ak Sila ak kotyenjin Kamuktaindet tyenwogik ak ki epchin iit tyenwagikwak kimonjororinik alak. 
Acts16:26 Ak ki potan emet miising' eng' sainooto kot kotumdumgei lumeiywegap korgoreet; ak eng' sainooto koyatagis kurgotik tugul ak kotyagogis tuguuk che ki kirate chii tugul. 
Acts16:27 Kingo siir eng' rwondo riibindetap korgoreet ak kogeer kurgotigap korgoreet ko yaatatin, kong'us rotwennyi po chok ak ki neegit kobargei, koleen kagochiliilyo kimonjororinik." 
Acts16:28 Ago ki mwa Paulo eng' kutit ne oo kole, “Ameyachigei kiy ne ya, amu kimi yu acheek tugul.”" 
Acts16:29 Ak kiguur keip taisyek, ak kotorombenji ko oriit, ak ki ibutyi keelyegap Paulo ak Sila kobotananu eng' kaiyweisyet." 
Acts16:30 Ak ki imut komong' saang' ak kole, “Kiptainichu, ayai nee si kesarwo?”" 
Acts16:31 Koleenji, “Iyan Kiptaiyat Jeso, si kesaruun, inyee ak koong'ung'.”" 
Acts16:32 Ak ki amdechi ineendet ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat, kobooto tugul che ki mi koonnyi." 
Acts16:33 Ki imut icheek sainooto po kemoi ak kounji pirutikwak; ak ki kibatisan ineendet ak piikyik eng' sainooto. 
Acts16:34 Ara ki imut koba koonnyi ak kogoochi amitwogik, ak kiboiboitu miising' ineendet kobooto koonnyi tugul amu kagoyan Kamuktaindet." 
Acts16:35 Ak ye kingo kagoeech, koyookto kirwoogik kiptainigap kiplugotinik, kole, “Ounde pichoo koba.”" 
Acts16:36 Ak ki mwachi riibindetap korgoreet Paulo ng'aleechooto kole, “Kagoyok kirwoogik kole keundak obe; omong'u anyun ak obe eng' kaalyeet.”" 
Acts16:37 Ago ki leenji Paulo icheek, “Kagobirech eng' taitap piik, ama kirwookwech, acheek piik che ki Romanik, ak kogotoorchech korgoreet; ak nguno komachei koonech eng' ung'oot? Achicha, ma uu nooto; ago ingobwa icheeget komutech kemande.”" 
Acts16:38 Ki mwachi kiptainigap kiplugotinik ng'aleechuuto kirwoogik ak ki iywei kingo kas kole icheeget ko Romanik. 
Acts16:39 Ki pwa anyun kogaigai icheek. Kingo kagomut icheek kobwa saang' kosoom kole koba eng' nganaseet. 
Acts16:40 Ki manda anyun eng' korgoreet ak ki pa agoi kootap Lydia; ak kingo kagogeer tupchosyek kogaigai icheek ak koba. 
Acts17:1 Kingo kagobun icheek Amphipoli ak Apolonia, koit Thessalonike, ole ki mi sinagogitap Yahudik." 
Acts17:2 Ak ki wo Paulo ole mi icheek, ko uu ye ki cham koyaei, ak kong'alaal kobooto pichooto eng' sabatoisyek somok agobo siruutik," 
Acts17:3 kong'aang'jin ak koboorchin komyee kole kiga nyoljin Kristo konyalil ak kong'eet kogeny eng' che ki pek; ak kole “Jeso niito aamwok, ko Kristo.”" 
Acts17:4 Ki iyan anyun alage eng' icheek ak konamgei ak Paulo ak Sila. Ki yai ko uu nooto tuiyet ne oo ne po Yunanik che ki konyiti Kamuktaindet ak che chaang' eng' kobogorisyek che taagunotiin. 
Acts17:5 Ago ki am ng'etkonda Yahudik, ak ki namgei ak piik che yaacheen che ma tilei kiy ak koiyum tuiyet kole kong'eetyi chemargeet nganaseet. Ye ki cheeng'ei `icheek Paulo ak Silas komachei kole si komut icheek saang' koba ole mi piik, kobookyi kootap Jason." 
Acts17:6 Ye ki mata konyoor, kochuut Jason ak tupchosyek alak koba taitap kirwoogigap nganaseet, koboldos koleen, “Pichu ko kowas emet ko kagobwa oli kogeny," 
Acts17:7 ak kagotaach `Jason icheek. Yaei pichuuto tugul tuguuk che etei ng'atuutigap Caesarea, komwaei koleen miitei laitoryat age ne ineendet ko Jeso.”" 
Acts17:8 Ye kingo kas tuguuchuuto, ko ki iim tuiyet ak kirwoogigap nganaseet." 
Acts17:9 Ak kingo kagonam `icheek tuguugap katyaget kobun Jason ak piik alak, kounda koba." 
Acts17:10 Ak ne matyanit koyookto tupchosyek Paulo ak Sila kemoi koba Berea; ak kingo it olooto, koba sinagogitap Yahudik." 
Acts17:11 Ak ki myachen pichu kosiir chooto po Thessalonike, amu kitaach ng'olyoot ak kocham miising' ak kosyachi siruutik peetuut age tugul, si kobiit konai ngo iman tuguuchu." 
Acts17:12 Ki iyan anyun che chaang' eng' icheeget ak kobogorisyek che po Yunanik, ak murenik che taagunotiin." 
Acts17:13 Ago kingo nai Yahudik che po Thessalonike kole amdoi Paulo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet eng' Berea agine, koba olooto agine, ak kowas ak konyalil tuiyosyek." 
Acts17:14 Ki iyookto anyun koma tyanit `tupchosyek Paulo kot koit araraita, ak kita kotebi eng' olooto Sila ak Timoteo." 
Acts17:15 Ago icheeget che ki imuti Paulo ko ki imut agoi Athens; ak kingo taach ng'atuutyet koipchi Sila ak Timoteo kole koba ole mi ineendet kochook, koba anyun." 
Acts17:16 Kingo ta koogeni `Paulo icheek eng' Athens, ko ki iimak eng' oriitinnyi, ye kingo keer nganaseet ko nyiitaat kanamonik." 
Acts17:17 Kong'alaal anyun eng' sinagogit kobooto Yahudik ak piik che konyiti Kamuktaindet, ak eng' ye mi ole keyae mung'aaret eng' peetuut age tugul kobooto che kituitos ak ineendet." 
Acts17:18 Ak ki tuiyo kobooto ineendet alak che po ng'amotigap Epikurio ak Stoiko. Ak kole alak, “Mwaei nee kipchang'alaini?” Kole alak, “Uu kabartaindet ne po kamuktaik che teer.” Ki mwa ng'aleechu amu ki amdoi agobo Jeso ak ng'eetyeet." 
Acts17:19 Ara ki nam `icheek ineendet ak komut kwo agoi Areopago ak kole, “Tos kimuuchi kenai keele nee kaneetisyoni leel, imwae?" 
Acts17:20 Amu keipchi iitiikyok tuguuk alak che leelach: nooto anyun kimache kenai kiit ne ibooru tuguuchuuto.” 
Acts17:21 Ki ma kotinyei piik tugul che po Athens ak toek che ki mi olooto, poroindo ne po kiy age kobatee komwa anan kogas ng'al che too." 
Acts17:22 Ki tonon anyun Paulo eng' kwenutap Areopago ak kole, “Okweek piigap Athens, kaageer ale eng' tuguuk tugul ogiiligei miising' eng' saautik." 
Acts17:23 Amu ye ki asiirtoi ak ageer tuguuk che osaae, anyooru agine kapkorosuut ne tinyei siruutichu, ‘Po kamuktain ne ma naei chii.’ Nooto anyun ne osaae amongen, aboorwok anyun niito." 
Acts17:24 Kamuktaindet ne ki yai ng'wony ak tuguuk tugul che miitei olooto, ineendet ko Kiptaiyatap kipsengwet ak ng'wony, koma menyei hekalusyek che ki kiyae eunek." 
Acts17:25 Ama kiboisyechin eng' eunegap piik, ko uu ne panani kiy, amu ineendet ne igoochin tugul saboondo ak kabuuset, ak tuguuk tugul." 
Acts17:26 Ki yai eng' `chiito agenge pororyet age tugul ne po piik si komeny ng'wony komugul, ko kagoboorchi kenyiisyek che ki king'at, ak kiwotosyegap meng'ootennywa;" 
Acts17:27 si kobiit kocheeng' Kamuktaindet, komang'u kole tamangap kotamdamat, ak konyoor ineendet, nganda ma loo eng' age tugul eng' acheek." 
Acts17:28 Amu ‘Eng' ineendet kesaptosi ak kebendoti ak kemi’; ko uu ye ki komwa alage eng' siriikwok che po tyenwogigap kalasunet kole, ‘Amu ki lagokyik ak acheek.’" 
Acts17:29 Ngo ki lagogap Kamuktaindet anyun, ko manyoljech kibwaat keele kergei Kamuktaindet ak thahabu, anan fedha, anan koita, che ki kiyai eng' musoknateet ak eng' ng'omnatetap piik." 
Acts17:30 Ki ma mage kiy anyun Kamuktaindet peetuusyek che ki ma komi naet; ago kang'at anyun nguno kole kosik piik tugul eng' komosta age tugul. 
Acts17:31 Amu Ki kochop peetuut ne tuun irwookyine ng'wony eng' imanda eng' chiichooto ki kolewen; ak agobo niito ko ki koboorchi komyee piik tugul ye ki ing'eet ineendet komong' eng' che ki pek.” 
Acts17:32 Ye kingo kas anyun agobo ng'eetyeetap che ki pek, kochombil alage; ago ki le alak, “Ta kegasun niito peetuut age.”" 
Acts17:33 Eng' yooto ko kimanda anyun Paulo eng' kwenunnywa. 
Acts17:34 Ago ki namgei piik alak ak ineendet ak koyan; ki age eng' icheeget ko Dionusio Areopagindet, ak kobogoryot ne kiguure Damaris, ak alak che ki mi kobooto icheeget." 
Acts18:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu kwo Paulo eng' Athens, ak koit Korinto." 
Acts18:2 Ki nyoorchi yooto Yahudyot age ne kiguure Aquila, chiito ne po Ponto, ne kita kobunu Italy kobooto osotyonnyi Prisila, amu kiga ng'at Klaudio kole koba Yahudik tugul eng' Rome. Ki nyo Paulo ole mi icheek;" 
Acts18:3 amu ki kergei poisyennyi ak nenywa, kotebi anyun kobooto icheek, ak kobois tugul; amu ki nabiik che po emaisyek icheeget." 
Acts18:4 Ak eng' sabato age tugul ko ki ng'alaali eng' sinagogit, kole tamangap kotoret Yahudik ak Yunanik." 
Acts18:5 Ago ye kingo choorgei Sila ak Timoteo kobunu Makedonia, konyonji Paulo kachirchiret ne po ng'olyoot, kobaoryanjin Yahudik kole Jeso ko Kristo." 
Acts18:6 Ye kingo kirinda ak komwa icheek ng'aleek kochup ineendet, koleglekta ineendet ngoryennyi ak koleenji, “Ingotebi korotiikwok eng' metowekwok; aa tiliil anee. Kobooch nguno ko kawe ye mi Pororyosyek.”" 
Acts18:7 Ki wo anyun eng' olooto ak kwo kootap chiito age ne kiguure Tito Justo, chiito ne ki ilasu Kamuktaindet, ne kinamegei koonnyi ak sinagogit." 
Acts18:8 Ak Krispo, ne ki pounindetap sinagogit, ko ki iyan Kiptaiyat kobooto koonnyi tugul; ak kingo kas che chaang' che po Korintoek, koyan, ak ki kibatisan." 
Acts18:9 Ak kemout age ko ki leenji `Kiptaiyat Paulo eng' ng'ang'utyet, “Meiywei, ago ng'alaal inyee amat isiis;" 
Acts18:10 amu ami kobooten, ama mi chii ne twain koyaun ne ya, amu atinye piik che chaang' eng' nganasani.”" 
Acts18:11 Ki tebee olooto kenyiit agenge ak arawek lo, koneeti ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet eng' kwenunnywa." 
Acts18:12 Ago ye kingo kirwoogindetap Akayo Galio, kong'eetyi `Yahudik Paulo eng' mageet agenge, ak komut ineendet kwo taitap ng'echereetap kirwooget." 
Acts18:13 Kole icheek, “Ichuuti chiichi piik kole kolas Kamuktaindet eng' ooreet ne etei Ng'atuutyet.”" 
Acts18:14 Ago ye kimachei Paulo kotwek, koleenji `Galio Yahudik, “Okweek Yahudichu, nda po yaityo ng'aleechu iman, anan ko po chalwok ne ya, ta nyolu agaswok;" 
Acts18:15 ago ngo teebutik agobo ng'aleek ak kainaik ak ng'atuutyeng'wong' okweeget, oyai okweegei; ma mache aek kirwoogindetap ng'aleechuuto.”" 
Acts18:16 Ak ki oon icheek koba eng' ye mi ng'echereetap kirwooget. 
Acts18:17 Ak ki nam tugul Sosten, pounindetap sinagogit, ak kobir ineendet eng' taitap ng'echeranooto po kirwooget. Ak ki ma mage kiy Galio ng'aleechooto tugul." 
Acts18:18 Ak kingo kagotebi Paulo peetuusyek che chaang', kobagaakta `ineendet tupchosyek ak kobun moinget kwo Syria, kobooto Prisila ak Aquila. Eng' Kenkrea ko ki kicherchi metit, amu kiga koarorta kiy eng' kayasyoet." 
Acts18:19 Kingo it Epheso, kobagaakta icheek eng' olooto, ago ki wo ineendet sinagogit ak kong'alaal ak Yahudik." 
Acts18:20 Ak kingo mwachi kole, kota kotebi ak icheek, koma kocham;" 
Acts18:21 ago kingo pagaktoi icheek, komwa kole, “Aweekyinoge kogeny, ngo cham Kamuktaindet.” Ak ki wo eng' Epheso kobune moinget." 
Acts18:22 Ye kingo kagolanda Caesarea, kotogosta kwo kogat kaniset, ak kochoortagei kwo Antiok." 
Acts18:23 Ak kingo kagotebi olooto eng' peetuusyo, kwo kobunoot kooret ne po Galatia ak ne po Phrygia, ko uu ye rubegei, kogimitoti kasubik tugul." 
Acts18:24 Ki nyo Epheso Yahudyot age ne keguure Apolo, ne po Alexandria. Ki chiito ne ng'oom, ak ki kiim eng' siruutik." 
Acts18:25 Kiga kineet chiichito ooreetap Kiptaiyat; ak amu ki tinyei kagiiletapkei eng' muguleldanyi, kong'alaal ak koneet komyee ng'aleek agobo Jeso, kongen kabatisanetap Johana kityo." 
Acts18:26 Ki toi kong'alaal eng' nyiganateet eng' sinagogit. Ago ye kingo kas Prisila ak Aquila, komut ineendet kwo taban, ak koboorchi ineendet ooreetap Kamuktaindet komyee kosiir." 
Acts18:27 Ak ye ki machei Apolo kolanda kwo Akaia, ko ki igimit `tupchosyek ineendet ak kosirchi kasubik kole kotaach ineendet. Ye kingo kagoit, kotoret `ineendet icheek miising' che kiga koyan eng' myeeindo," 
Acts18:28 amu ki iguiyechi Yahudik komyee eng' kimnateet eng' taitap piik, koboorchin eng' siruutik kole Jeso ko Kristo." 
Acts19:1 Ak ye kita komi Apolo Korinto, ko kagobun Paulo emet kween, koit Epheso ak konyoor kasubik." 
Acts19:2 Ki leenji icheek, “Tos ki otaach Kabuuset ne Tiliil ye kingo yan?” Koleenji, “Achicha, tomo agot kegas ngo miitei Kabuuset ne Tiliil.”" 
Acts19:3 Ak ki leenji, “Ki kibatisanjok nee anyun?” Ak ki le, “Ki kibatisanjech kabatisanetap Johana.”" 
Acts19:4 Kole Paulo, “Ki ibatisanis Johana eng' kabatisanetap siguunet, koleenjin piik kanyool koyan ineendet ne isubu ineendet, nooto ko Jeso.”" 
Acts19:5 Ye kingo kas niito, kibatisan icheek eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat Jeso." 
Acts19:6 Ak ye kingo kagogonoor `Paulo eunekyik icheeget, konyonji anyun `Kabuuset ne Tiliil icheek, ak ki ng'alaal eng' kutusweek che teerchiin, ak koamda." 
Acts19:7 Ak ki olo po taman ak aeng' pichooto tugul. 
Acts19:8 Ki wo sinagogit oriit ak kong'alaal eng' nyiganateet eng' arawek somok, kong'alaali ak kolomei agobo tuguuk che po laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Acts19:9 Ago ye kingo uegitu mugulelwegap alak ak kobistoe, ak komwaei ne ya agobo Oranooto eng' taitap tuiyet, kwo eng' ole mi icheek, ak kotabaan kasubik, kong'alaaljin peetuut age tugul eng' sukulitap Turano." 
Acts19:10 Ki yaak ko uu nooto eng' kenyiisyek aeng'; kot kogas ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat tugul che ki menyei Asia, Yahudik kobooto Yunanik." 
Acts19:11 Ak ki yai Kamuktaindet poisyonigap kimnateet che teer eng' eunegap Paulo: 
Acts19:12 kot keipchi che myandos kitambaok ak angook che kiga kotiiny poortanyi, ak ki istogei myanwogik eng' pichooto, ak ki manda tamirmirik che yaacheen eng' icheek." 
Acts19:13 Ak ki toi Yahudik alage che ki ombenoti, che kileen koon oik, komwa kainetap Kiptaiyat Jeso eng' icheeget che ki tinyei tamirmirik che yaacheen, koleen, “Ayosyewok eng' Jeso ne amdoi Paulo.”" 
Acts19:14 Ak ki mi weeriik tisabu che po Skeba, ineendet Yahudyot, tisiindet ne oo, che ki yai ng'olyoondoniito." 
Acts19:15 Ak ki wolji tamirmiryet ne ya icheek, koleenji, “Angen Jeso, ak angen Paulo; ago okweek ko oo ng'oo?”" 
Acts19:16 Ak kitorombenji chiichooto ki tinyei tamirmiryet ne ya icheek, ak konenet icheek, ak koterteer, kot komwei komanda eng' koyooto aach ngor ko kagiguoten." 
Acts19:17 Ak kinaak niito eng' tugul, Yahudik kobooto Yunanik, che ki menyei Epheso; ak kinyoor kaiyweisyet icheek tugul, ak kinyoor teegisto kainetap Kiptaiyat Jeso." 
Acts19:18 Ki pwa ak icheek che chaang' che ki iyan, kong'aanyei ak koboortoi poisyonikwak." 
Acts19:19 Ki ip anyun bukuisyekwak `piik che chaang' eng' icheek che kiyaei ng'oorset, ak kobeel eng' taitap pichooto tugul; ak kiit kamanuutyennywa, konyoor kole ki itei fedhaisyek eliphuusyek konom." 
Acts19:20 Kotesak ko uu nooto anyun ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat eng' kimnateet ak koterteer. 
Acts19:21 Kingo pata anyun tuguuchuuto, komach Paulo eng' muguleldonyi kwo Jerusalem, ko kagobun Makedonia ak Akaia, koleen, “Ye kaawe olooto, ko kanyool ageer Rome agine.”" 
Acts19:22 Ye kingo kagoyookto aeng' eng' icheek che kiboisyechin ineendet koba Makedonia, Timoteo ak Erasto, kota kotebi ineendet eng' Asia ne matya." 
Acts19:23 Ak king'eet polateet ne oo eng' peetuusyechooto agobo Oranooto; 
Acts19:24 Chiito age ne kiguure Demetrios ko ki kitang'indet ne po fedha, ne ki itanyi kanamonik che po fedha che po Artemi, ne ki ipchin tuguuk che chaang' kitang'ik." 
Acts19:25 Ki iyum chuuto kibagenge, kobooto piik che ki tinyei poisyet ne uu nooto, ak koleenji, “Murenju, ongen okweek ole, punu mogornatennyo poisyoni." 
Acts19:26 Ogeere ak ogase ole, ma eng' Epheso kityo ago neegit Asia tugul, kagochuut piik che chaang' Paulo-iniito, ak koweechi, koleenjin chooto ki kiyae eunek koma kamuktaik." 
Acts19:27 Ma keele kityo piitu pichiindap sasisyet ne kisasei poisyennyo; ago kiiti keele ma kiy hekaluutap kamuktain ne oo ne kobogoryot Artemi, ak keistoe ineendet teegistanyi ne koilasu Asia tugul kobooto ng'wony.”" 
Acts19:28 Ye kingo kas niito, konereekso inne ak kobolyo kole, “Oo Artemi ne po Ephesoek!”" 
Acts19:29 Ak konyi anyun nganaseet polateet; ak korwai kibagenge ye mi ureryet, ko kagonam Gaio ak Aristarko, piigap Makedonia che kibendoti ak Paulo." 
Acts19:30 Ak ye kimachei kwo Paulo oriit ole mi piik, koma kochamji kasubik." 
Acts19:31 Ak ki iyookto ng'olyoot piik alage che eecheen che po Asia, amu ki choronokyik, si mat kogoitogei kwo ye mi ureryet oriit." 
Acts19:32 Kiboldos anyun alage, komwaei ni, komwaei alage kiit age; amu ki piit polateet eng' tuiyet, ak ki ma kongen che chaang' kiit ne ki igoochi kotuiyo." 
Acts19:33 Ak ki imut Aleksanda komong' eng' tuiyet, kogoito `Yahudik ineendet. Ak ki iboorchi `Aleksanda pichooto eng' euut, ak kimachei kosargei eng' pichooto." 
Acts19:34 Ago ye kingo nai kole ineendet ko Yahudyot, kobolyo tugul eng' kutit agenge, eng' olo po saisyek aeng', koleen, “Oo Artemi ne po Ephesoek!”" 
Acts19:35 Kingo kagomwachi siriindetap nganaseet tuiyet kosiisyo, kole, “Okweek piigap Epheso, tos mi ng'oo ne ma ingen kole nganaseetap Ephesoek ko riibindetap hekaluutap Artemi ne oo, ak kanamwet ne ki ibut kobunu parak?" 
Acts19:36 Ak ngo ma kimuuchi ketiiyo agobo tuguuchu, ko kanyool osisye, matosartae ng'olyoo."
