Acts19:37 Amu kaomutu pichu, che ma reenyei hekalutap kamuktaindet ama chubei kamuktaindennyo ne kobogoryo." 
Acts19:38 Ngo tinyei anyun Demetrios ak musogik che mi kobooto ineendet, ng'olyoo agobo chii, ko yaatatin kapkirwoogutik, ak miitei pounik: ingorwookyin anyun icheegei." 
Acts19:39 Ago ngo cheeng' okweek ng'olyoo agobo tuguuk alak, ko tuun kilititi eng' tuiyet ne cham komi." 
Acts19:40 Amu mi pichiindo ne tos kirwookwech agobo polateet ne po rani, amu ma mi kito ne po: ak ma kimuuchi ketetu kiy agobo tuiyoni.”" 
Acts19:41 Ak kingo kagomwa ko uu nooto, kotyakta tuiyet." 
Acts20:1 Ak kingo pata polateet, ko kagoyookto Paulo kasubik kobwa ak kogimit icheek, koyomiskei, si kwo Makedonia." 
Acts20:2 Ak kingo kagobun komoswechooto, ko kagogimiit icheek eng' ng'aleek che chaang', koit Greece." 
Acts20:3 Ak kingo kagotebee olooto arawek somok, kochop Yahudik ng'aleek eng' ung'oot agobo ineendet, ye kimachei kobun moinget kwo Syria, komachei kole koweegegei ooreetap Makedonia." 
Acts20:4 Ak ki pa kobooto ineendet agoi Asia Sopatro ne po Berea, ne po kap Puro; ak che po Thessalonikek Aristarko ak Sekundo; ak Gaio ne po Derbe, ak Timoteo; ak Tukiko ak Tropimo che po Asia." 
Acts20:5 Ago kiga kondo chuuto, ak ki igenech eng' Traos." 
Acts20:6 Ak ki kibun moinget eng' Philippi ko kagobata peetuusyegap magatyat ne ma kinde mermereek, ak keit ole mi icheek eng' Traos eng' peetuusyek muut; ole ki kitebee eng' peetuusyek tisap." 
Acts20:7 Ak eng' peetuutap tai ne po wigiit ye kiga kiyumge si kebuutul magatyat, koamji Paulo icheek, ye kimachei kwo eng' peetuut ne po aeng'; kong'alaal koek keny agoi kemoi kween." 
Acts20:8 Ak ki mi taisyek che chaang' eng' koot ne po parak, ole kiga kiyumjige." 
Acts20:9 Ak kitebee tirisyet neraneet age ne ki kiguure Eutuko ak kibirto met; ak kita koamji Paulo koek keny, ak kingo pirto met, kotururtogei kong'etee koot ne po somok, ak ki kisut ko kagome." 
Acts20:10 Ak kichoortagei Paulo, ak koitaegei ineendet ak kosuube eunekyik, komwa kole, “Moiimge; amu ta kosabei.”" 
Acts20:11 Ak kingo togosta, ak kobuutul magatyat, ak koam, ak kong'alaal keny kobooto icheek, agoi koeech, kwo anyun." 
Acts20:12 Ak ki imut nerananooto ko kagosap, ak kinyoor kagaigaet ne oo." 
Acts20:13 Ago ki kindoi acheek keebe meeliit, keebe Assos, amu ki kimache kimut Paulo eng' olooto: amu kiga kong'at ineendet ko uu nooto, komach ineendet kole kobun keeldo." 
Acts20:14 Ak ye ki ngetuiye ak ineendet eng' Assos, kimut ineendet konyo moinget, ak keit Mitulene." 
Acts20:15 Ak ki kibe eng' olooto kebun moinget, keit Ki o eng' peetuut ne po tai; ak peetuut ne po aeng' keit Samo; ak peetuut ne po somok keit Mileto." 
Acts20:16 Amu kiga kobegechi Paulo kwo kosiirtoe Epheso eng' moinget, si ma igagei eng' Asia; amu ki igirgiri, kole tamangap koit Jerusalem eng' peetuutap Pentekoste." 
Acts20:17 Ak ki iyookto eng' Mileto keguur poisyegap kaniset eng' Epheso. 
Acts20:18 Ak ye kingo pwa ole mi ineendet, koleenji, “Ongen okweeget kobooch peetuut ne po tai ye kinga tau atyech Asia, ole ki ateptoi kobootok tugul," 
Acts20:19 aboisyechini Kiptaiyat eng' kaming'inetapkei tugul, ak eng' peegap kong', ak eng' tyemuutik che kibwanjo eng' chobutik che po ung'oot che po Yahudik;" 
Acts20:20 ko uu ye ki ma ariiny amwaiwok kiy age tugul ne imuuchi kotoretook, ak aneetaak eng' taitap piik, ak ang'eete koot age agoi koot age," 
Acts20:21 abaoryanjini Yahudik kobooto Yunanik siguunet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ak kayaneet eng' Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo. 
Acts20:22 Ak ogeer anyun nguno, awendi Jerusalem ko aa mutworiin ne po Kabuuset ne Tiliil, amangen tuguuk che pwonjino eng' olooto:" 
Acts20:23 kobatee kityo paoryanjino Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' nganaseet age tugul, koleen, igeno ratisyosyek ak nyalilwogik." 
Acts20:24 Ago ma iiti saboondanyu ale kiy ne achame kot, si kobiit agees pandanyu, ak poisyet ne ki ataach eng' Kiptaiyat Jeso, abaoryanji logoiywek che myach che po myeeindap Kamuktaindet." 
Acts20:25 “Ak nguno anyun, ogeero, angen ale okweek tugul che ki aamdaate logoiywegap laitornatetap Kamuktaindet, koma ogeere togeennyu kogeny." 
Acts20:26 Abaoryani anyun eng' taing'wong' peetuuni, ale, aa tiliil eng' korotiigap piik tugul." 
Acts20:27 Amu ma ariiny amwaiwok maguutik tugul che po Kamuktaindet. 
Acts20:28 Oriipkei anyun okweeget, kobooto akweet tugul, ne ki koonok Kabuuset ne Tiliil oegu riibiik, obai kanisetap Kamuktaindet, ne ki ale korotiikyik." 
Acts20:29 Angen ale ye kaawe komong'jok suik che koroomen, ama riiree akweet." 
Acts20:30 Ak tuun ng'eetos alage eng' kwenung'wong' komwaei ng'aleek che imaasi piich, si kochuut kasubik koosup icheek." 
Acts20:31 Oriipse anyun, ak obwaat ole ma abagaakte atigoon chii age tugul eng' peegap kong' eng' kenyiisyek somok kemoi ak peet." 
Acts20:32 “Ara anyun, kabagakyok nguno eutap Kamuktaindet, ak ng'olyootap myeeindonyi, ne imuuchi koteechak, ak kogoonok poroteet kobooto icheek tugul che kitiliili." 
Acts20:33 Ma agase myat fedha che po chii age tugul, anan thahabu, anan ngoroik." 
Acts20:34 Ongen okweek ole kibois eunechu agobo tuguuk che ki anyalili, ak agobo icheek che ki mi kobooto." 
Acts20:35 Ki agoonok kaboorunet eng' tuguuk tugul, ale ye oboisyei ko nyolu otoret che ma tinyei kimnateet, ak obwaati ng'aleegap Kiptaiyat Jeso, ko uu ye ki mwa ineendet kole ‘Tinyei poiboiyet kagoitoet kosiir taaget.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Ak kingo kagomwa ko uu nooto, kogutuny, kosa kobooto icheek tugul." 
Acts20:37 Ak ki riiryo icheek tugul miising', ak kosuup kaatitap Paulo, ak kong'utut ineendet," 
Acts20:38 koaragendos kosiir agobo ng'olyoot ne kiga komwa, kole ma tuun kogeerei togeennyi kogeny. Ak ki iyomis ineendet kowendi kolaanyei meeliit." 
Acts21:1 Ye kingo kagebesye ak icheeget, ak ketau keebe eng' moinget, kilitit panda, kitoorchigei Kos, ak peetuut ne ki isubi nooto keit Rhodes, ak keebe eng' olooto agoi keit Patara." 
Acts21:2 Ye ki ngenyooru meeliit ne landoi kowendi Phoenisia, kelaany, ak keebe." 
Acts21:3 Ak ye kiga kegeer Cyprus, kesiirtoe komi euut ne po kaataam, keebe agoi Syria, ak kechooruge eng' meeliit eng' Tyro, amu yooto ye kinemune tuguugap meeliit." 
Acts21:4 Ak ye kiga kenyooru kasubik, ketebi eng' olooto peetuusyek tisap. Ki mwachi `icheek Paulo eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil koleenji amat kotyech Jerusalem." 
Acts21:5 Ak kingo kagigesu peetuusyechooto, keebe pandanyo; ak ki iyomiseech icheek tugul kobooto osotik ak lagok, agoi kemande eng' nganaseet, ak kegutung'se eng' ngeguut, kesaa" 
Acts21:6 ak kigoochigei saisere. Kelaany anyun meeliit koweek icheek koba kaa. 
Acts21:7 Ak ye kiga kigeesu panda ne po moinget kebunu Tyro, keit Ptolemais; ak kigat tupchosyek, ak ketebi kobooto icheek peetuut agenge." 
Acts21:8 Ak eng' peetuut ne po aeng' keebe, agoi keit Caesarea: ak keebe kootap Philipu amdoindet ne po logoiywek che myach, ineendet ko agenge eng' piik tisap, ak ki kitebi ak ineendet." 
Acts21:9 Ki tinyei chiichito tiibiik ang'wan, pergeinik, che ki maoteni." 
Acts21:10 Ak ye kita ketebye eng' peetuusyek che chaang' eng' olooto, konyo kochoorgei maotyot age ne punu Judea ne ki kiguure Agabo." 
Acts21:10 Ak ye kita ketebye eng' peetuusyek che chaang' eng' olooto, konyo kochoorgei maotyot age ne punu Judea ne ki kiguure Agabo." 
Acts21:11 Ak kingo kagoit ole kimi, konam pireneetap Paulo, ak korate keelyekyik ak eunekyik, ak kole, “Mwaei Kabuuset ne Tiliil ko uu ni kole, ‘Ratei ko uu niito Yahudik che mi Jerusalem chiitap ko po pirenoni, ak tuun indoi ineendet eunegap Pororyosyek.’ ”" 
Acts21:12 Ak ki ngegas ng'aleechuuto, kigaigai ineendet, acheek ak piigap olooto, si ma togosta Jerusalem." 
Acts21:13 Kowol Paulo kole, “Oyae nee, orirtosi ak obare muguleldanyu? Amu aa choboot, ma kerata kityo, ago ame eng' Jerusalem agobo kainetap Kiptaiyat Jeso.”" 
Acts21:14 Ak ye ki mata kocham ko uu nooto, kesisye, kemwa keele, “Ingoyaak mageetap Kiptaiyat.”" 
Acts21:15 Ak kingo pata peetuusyechooto kenam tuguukyok ketogoste Jerusalem. 
Acts21:16 Ak ki kibe kobooto kasubik che ki punu Caesarea, komutu Mnason ne po Cyprus, ne kiga koek kasubin koek keny, ne ki kibendi ketebee koonnyi." 
Acts21:17 Kingeit Jerusalem, kotaachech tupchosyek eng' poiboiyet." 
Acts21:18 Ak peetuut ne ki isubi peetuunooto keebe acheek ak Paulo kap Jakobo; ak ki mi poisyek tugul. 
Acts21:19 Ak kingo kagogat icheek, kotetyi tuguuk tugul agenge agenge che kiga koyai Kamuktaindet eng' poisyennyi eng' Pororyosyek." 
Acts21:20 Kingo kas icheek ng'olyoondonooto, kogonyit Kamuktaindet. Koleenji `icheek ineendet, “Igeere anyun, ne kitupche, ole tee eliphuusyek ng'iisyat eng' kwenutap Yahudik che ki koyan; ak tinyei tugul kagiiletapkei agobo Ng'atuutyet." 
Acts21:21 Ak ki kiboorchi icheek agobo inyee, keele, ineeti Yahudik tugul che mi ye mi Pororyosyek kobagaakta Musa, ak ileenjini icheek amat komuratan lagokwak, anan koosup pitonwek." 
Acts21:22 Nee anyun nguno? Ma kogas icheek iman kole kaiitu. 
Acts21:23 Yai anyun ni kimwaun: Ki tinyei piik ang'wan che ki koarorta kiy eng' kayasyoet; 
Acts21:24 imut anyun pichu, ak ianyinyge kobooto icheek, ak igamanji fedha, si kobiit kicherchi metowekwak: si konai tugul kole ma mi imanit eng' tuguuchooto ki kiboorchi agobo inyee; ago inyee iwendoti komyee, iriibe Ng'atuutyet." 
Acts21:25 Ago eng' Pororyosyek che ki koyan, kogigesir ketil kirwooget keele, kotabaanegei tuguuk che kieng'jin kanamonik, ak korotiik, ak panyeek che po che kagiget, ak sokseet.”" 
Acts21:26 Komut anyun Paulo murenjoto, ak eng' peetuut ne po aeng' koanyinygei kobooto icheeget ak kwo Hekaluut oriit, koboortoi kasuldaetap peetuusyek che po kaanyinyet, agoi kigoito kagoochinet ne po age tugul eng' icheek." 
Acts21:27 Ye kimachei kogeskei peetuusyek tisabu, kowas tuiyet Yahudik che ki punu Asia, ye kingo keer ineendet komi Hekaluut. Ak konam ineendet," 
Acts21:28 koboldos koleen, “Okweek piigap Israel, otoretech! Chiichito ne ineeti piik tugul eng' komosta age tugul kowech piik, ak Ng'atuutyet, ak yuto: ak kobooto nooto koimut Yunanik ak icheek kobwa Hekaluut, ak kagong'wanit yuto tiliil.”" 
Acts21:29 Amu kiga kogeer Tropimo Ephesoindet komi kobooto ineendet eng' nganaseet, ne kileen ki imutu Paulo konyo Hekaluut." 
Acts21:30 Kowaskei anyun nganaseet komugul, ak ki rwai piik kibagenge: ak konam Paulo, ak kochuut komong' eng' Hekaluut: ak ki kiger kurgotik eng' sainooto." 
Acts21:31 Ak ye ki cheeng'ei kobar ineendet, koityi ng'aleek kiptaiyat ne oo ne po murenigap lugeet kole, miitei chemargeet Jerusalem komugul." 
Acts21:32 Komut sainooto kiplugotinik ak kiptainigap pogolwogik, korwai kochoortagei ole mi icheek: ak kingo keer icheek kiptaiyat ne oo ak kiplugotinik, kobagaakta pireet ne kibirei Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Konyo anyun kiptaiyat ne oo koriik, ak konam ineendet ak kong'at kole, kerat ineendet eng' nyororosyek aeng'; ak koteebe kole, ng'oo niito? Ak kayai nee?" 
Acts21:34 Ak kobolyo alak eng' tuiyet komwaei kiit age komwaei alage kiit age: ak ye ki ma imuuch konai komyee kiit ne po polateet, kong'at kole kimut ineendet kwo irimeet." 
Acts21:35 Ak kingo it lang'eiywot, koganap kiplugotinik ineendet amu koroomnatetap tuiyet;" 
Acts21:36 amu ki isubi tuiyet ne po piik, koboldos, koleen, Oiste ineendet." 
Acts21:37 Ak ye ki kimachei kimut Paulo kwo irimeet, koleenji kiptaiyat ne oo, “Ichamwo amwaun ng'olyoo?” Koleenji, “Tos ingen kutitap Yunanik?" 
Acts21:38 Tos ma ii Misirindet ne ki ing'eet lomset yaginye ak komut piik eliphuusyek ang'wan koba surkwen, piik che kiguure Rumiik?”" 
Acts21:39 Ago ki le Paulo, “Aa Yahudyot ne po Tarsis eng' Cilicia, aa po nganaseet ne ma nyeraat; ak asoomin ale, chamwo ang'alaalji piik.”" 
Acts21:40 Ye kingo kagochamji, kotonone Paulo lang'eiywot, ak koboorchi piik eng' euut kosiisyo; ak ye kingo kagosiisyo inne, kong'alaalji icheek eng' kutitap Yahudik, kole," 
Acts22:1 “Che kitupche ak kwanisyekyok, ogas ng'aleek che amwae nguno eng' taing'wong' che asaruunegei.”" 
Acts22:2 Ak kingo kas kole ng'alaaljin icheek eng' kutitap Yahudik, kosiisyo miising': ak ki le" 
Acts22:3 aa Yahudyot, ki kisikyo Tarsis ne po Cilicia, ago ki anerchi nganasani, ak ki ineeta Gamaliel, ak ki kineta komyee ko uu ole teptoi Ng'atuutyetap kwanisyekyok, ak ki atinye kagiiletapkei eng' Kamuktaindet, ko uu ole oteptoi okweek tugul rani:" 
Acts22:4 ak ki ausausi Orani agoi meet, arate ak atoorchini korgoreet murenik ak kobogorisyek." 
Acts22:5 Ko uu ye paoryanjino tisiindet ne oo, ak kapkirwooget tugul ne po poisyek: che ki anyoorunee paronok, che ki aibe koba kaptupchosyek, ak ki awe Damasko, ale amut icheek che ki mi olooto kobwa Jerusalem ko ratotiin, si kobiit kebir." 
Acts22:6 “Ak ye ki awendi, ko kariikyi Damasko, ko katonon asiis, kooluu eng' sainooto lapkeiyet ne oo ne ki punu kipsengwet koluucha komoswek tugul." 
Acts22:7 Ak ki abutyi ng'wony, ak agas kutit koleenjo, ‘Saulo, Saulo, amu nee si iusa?’" 
Acts22:8 Ak ki awolu ale, ‘Ii ng'oo inyee, Kiptaiyat?’ Ak ki leenjo, ‘Aa Jeso ne po Nazareth, ne iuse.’" 
Acts22:9 Ak ki keer lapkeiyet iman che ki mi kobooto, ago ki ma kas kutitap ineendet ne ki ng'alaalwo." 
Acts22:10 Ale, Ayai nee anyun, Kiptaiyat? Koleenjo Kiptaiyat, Ng'eet, ui Damasko; si kemwaun eng' olooto tuguuk tugul che kigeng'at iyai." 
Acts22:11 Ak ye ki ma kota amuuchi ageer kiy amu liletap lapkeiyonooto, ait Damasko, konamota euut icheek che ki mi kobooto." 
Acts22:12 “Ak ki nyo ole ami, chiito age ne keguure Anania, chiito ne po iman eng' riibetap Ng'atuutyet, ne kibaoryanjin Yahudik tugul che ki menyei olooto kole myee." 
Acts22:13 Ak ye kitononi eng' ye neegiteena, koleenjo, Ne kitupche Saulo, keerte. Ak eng' sainooto ageer ineendet." 
Acts22:14 Ak ki le, ‘Ki kolewenin Kamuktaindet ne po kwanisyekyok si kobiit inai magennyi, ak igeer Ineendet ne po Imanda, ak igas ng'olyoot ne punu kutinnyi." 
Acts22:15 Amu iegu paoryandennyi eng' piik tugul agobo tugul che koigeer ak che koigas. 
Acts22:16 Ta igeni nee anyun nguno? Ng'eet kibatisanin, ak kiuundo tengekwogiguk iguure kainennyi.’" 
Acts22:17 “Ak kingo kaaweektegei Jerusalem, ak kingo ta asaae eng' Hekaluut, kobutya kiit ne uu rwon," 
Acts22:18 ageer ineendet koleenjino, ‘Igirgir, chaakte, mande eng' Jerusalem, amu mataachei paornateet eng' inyee agobo anee.’" 
Acts22:19 Ak ki ale, ‘Kiptaiyat, ingen icheeget kole ki arate ak abire eng' sinagogit age tugul eng' icheek che ki iyanin." 
Acts22:20 Ak ye ki ngetumdoi korotiigap Stepano paoryandeng'ung', ko ki atononi agane eng' yooto, ayanjini ak ariibe ngoroigap icheeget che ki parei ineendet.’" 
Acts22:21 Ak ki leenjo ineendet, ‘Ui, amu ayooktoin iwe ole loo agoi ye mi Pororyosyek.’ ”" 
Acts22:22 Koepchi iit anyun icheek ineendet agoi ng'olyoondoniito; yeityo komwa eng' kutit ne oo, kole, “Oiste chiito ne uu niito kwo eng' ng'wony; amu ma nyolu kosap.”" 
Acts22:23 Ak ye kita koboldos, ak kowiirtoi ngoroikwak, ak kowastoi temburyek koba parak," 
Acts22:24 kong'at kiptaiyat ne oo kole kimut ineendet kwo irimeet, kong'at kole, ogine eng' pireet ne po kipcharitisyek, si konai ineendet kiit ne kabolji icheek ko uu nooto agobo ineendet." 
Acts22:25 Ak ye kingo kagorate ineendet anook, koleenji Paulo kiptaiyatap pogol ne kitononi eng' yooto, Tos chamdoi ng'atuutik eng' okweek obir chii ne Romanindet, ama kirwookyi?" 
Acts22:26 Ak kingo kas chemogonooto po kiplugotinik pogol, kwo ole mi kiptaiyat ne oo, ak komwachi ineendet koleenji, “Imache iyai nee nguno? Amu Romanindet chiichi.”" 
Acts22:27 Konyo anyun kiptaiyat ne oo, ak koleenji ineendet, Mwaiwo, tos ii Romanin? Ak ki le, Ee." 
Acts22:28 Kowol kiptaiyat ne oo kole, “Ki aegu chiitap pororyoni eng' alyet ne oo.” Ak ki le Paulo, Ki kisikyo pororyoniito." 
Acts22:29 Koba anyun eng' sainooto icheek che kimachei kogine ineendet: ak ki iywei agine kiptaiyat ne oo, ye kingo nai kole kaagaa Romanindet ineendet, ak amu kiga korat ineendet." 
Acts22:30 Ago ye kimachei konai komyee eng' peetuut ne po aeng', kiit ne koitaame Yahudik, kotyach ineendet ak kong'at tisiik che eecheen ak kapkirwooget tugul kotuiyo, ak komut Paulo kochoorgei, ak konde ineendet tainnywa." 
Acts23:1 Ak kingo keer Paulo kapkirwoogonooto komyee, komwa kole, “Che kitupche, ki atebee kotugul kabwaatet ne myee eng' taitap Kamuktaindet agoi rani.”" 
Acts23:2 Kong'at Anania, tisiindet ne oo, icheek che kitonondos eng' yooto kole, korabach kutinnyi." 
Acts23:3 Koleenji anyun Paulo ineendet, “Tuun pirin Kamuktaindet, inyee inaatut ne ki kisal koleelit. Itebye ak irwokwo ko uu ye mwaei Ng'atuutyet, ak ing'ate kebira ama chamdoi Ng'atuutyet?”" 
Acts23:4 Komwa icheek che kitonondos eng' yooto kole, “Ichube tisiindet ne oo ne po Kamuktaindet?”" 
Acts23:5 Kole anyun Paulo, Kama anai, che kitupche, ale ineendet ko tisiindet ne oo: amu ki kisir keele, Amemwa ne ya agobo pounindetap piiguk." 
Acts23:6 Ago ye kingo nai Paulo kole, Sadukaik alage, ko Pharisaik alage, komwa eng' kutit ne oo eng' kapkirwook kole, “Che kitupche, aa Pharisaindet, weeriitap Pharisaik. Kagirwokwo agobo kamang'unet ak ng'eetyeet ne po che ki kobek.”" 
Acts23:7 Ak kingo kagomwa ko uu nooto, kong'eet anyun toiyet eng' Pharisaik ak Sadukaik: ak kipcheak tuiyet." 
Acts23:8 Amu mwaei Sadukaik kole, ma mi ng'eetyeet eng' che ki pek, anan malaika, anan saboon: ago iyani tugul Pharisaik." 
Acts23:9 Kong'eet anyun polateet ne oo: ak kitononso siriik alak che po Pharisaik, ak koboryo koleen, Ma kinyooru yaityo eng' chiichi: ak tos nee eng' okweek ngot ko kang'alaal ak ineendet kabuuso, anan malaika?" 
Acts23:10 Ak ye kingo ng'eet toiyet ne oo, koywei kiptaiyat ne oo kole tos tonaton pichu Paulo, kong'at anyun kiplugotinik kochoortagei ak komut ineendet eng' kimnateet eng' kwenunnywa, ak komut konyo irimeet." 
Acts23:11 Ak eng' kemout ne ki isubi nooto kotonon Kiptaiyat eng' ye neegitee ineendet ak koleenji, “Nyiganitu: amu ko uu ye ki ibaoryanjo eng' Jerusalem, ko uu nooto kanyool ibaoryan eng' Rome agine.”" 
Acts23:12 Ak kingo eech koyumgei Yahudik, ak korategei kayasyoet, kole ma kiame kiy ama kiee agoi kebar Paulo." 
Acts23:13 Ak ki siirei artam icheeget che ki yosyo. 
Acts23:14 Ak ki pwa ole mi tisiik che eecheen ak poisyek, ak koleenji, “Kageratkei eng' kayasyoet ne oo keele, ma ki chamchami kiy agoi kebar Paulo." 
Acts23:15 Oboorchi anyun okweek ak poisyek kiptaiyat ne oo komut ineendet kochoorgei konyo ole omi, ko uu ne omache ogin komyee ng'aleekyik. Ak kichobootiin acheek kebar ineendet agot kotom koriikyech.”" 
Acts23:16 Ago ki kas weeriitap chepkametap Paulo agobo setyinennywa, ak ki nyo kwo irimeet ak komwachi Paulo." 
Acts23:17 Koguur anyun Paulo age eng' kiptainigap pogolwogik, ak koleenji, “Imut murenoni kwo ole mi kiptaiyat ne oo: amu tinyei ng'olyoo ne machei komwachi ineendet.”" 
Acts23:18 Komut anyun ineendet kwo ole mi kiptaiyat ne oo, ak koleenji, “Kaguura Paulo, kimonjororyot, awo ole mi ineendet ak komwaiwo amutun murenoni konyo ole imi, tinyei ng'olyoo ne machei komwaun.”" 
Acts23:19 Konam anyun kiptaiyat ne oo eutap weerooto, ak komut taban, ak koteebe eng' ung'oot kole, “Nee nooto imache imwaiwo?”" 
Acts23:20 Kole, “Kagochamyechi Yahudik kole kosoomin imutu Paulo kochoorgei mutai konyo kapkirwook, ko uu ne imache iteepse ineendet komyee." 
Acts23:21 Ameyanji anyun amu miitei eng' icheek che siirei artam che setyin ineendet, che kagoratkei eng' kayasyoet, kole ma amei kiy anan koe agoi kobar ineendet. Chobootiin icheek nguno kogeni ng'atuutyet ne punun.”" 
Acts23:22 Kounda anyun kiptaiyat ne oo murenonooto kwo, ak kong'at ineendet koleenji, “Amemwachi chii agot agenge ileenji kaimwa tuguuchu.”" 
Acts23:23 Ak kiguur kiptainik aeng' che po pogolwogik koba ole mi ineendet ak koleenji, “Ochop kiplugotinik pogol aeng' koba agoi Caesarea, ak kiplugotinik tamanwogik tisap che ketei paraisisyek, ak murenigap ng'otwek pogol aeng', eng' sait somok ne po kemoi." 
Acts23:24 Ki mwachi kochop paraisisyek, si kobiit komute icheek Paulo, ak komut kot koit ole mi Felix pounindet kochamegei.”" 
Acts23:25 Ak kisir parweet ko uu ni: 
Acts23:26 Anee Klaudio Lusia, agatin inyee pounindet Felix, ne ii tagunoot." 
Acts23:27 Konam Yahudik chiichi, ak ki neegit kobar icheek ineendet, awe anyun ak kiplugotinik ole mi icheek, ak asaru ineendet, ko kaanai ale kaagaa Romanin ineendet." 
Acts23:28 Ak ye ki amache anai kiit ne ki itaame icheek ineendet, amutu anyun kochoorgei kapkirwoogennywa:" 
Acts23:29 ageer ale, ki kitaam ineendet agobo ng'aleegap ng'atuutikwak, ago ma mi ng'olyoo ne ki kiityi ineendet ne nyoljin meet anan ratuutik." 
Acts23:30 Ak ye kongiboorwo keele kogechop ng'aleek eng' ung'oot agobo ineendet, ayoogu ineendet konyo olong'ung' achogune, ak ang'at che kataamikyik si komwa ng'aleek eng' taing'ung', che itaame ineendet." 
Acts23:31 Komut anyun kiplugotinik Paulo, ko uu ye kagaging'at, ak komut kemoi kwo Antipatris." 
Acts23:32 Ago mutai kobagaakta murenik che ki laanyei paraisisyek koba kobooto ineendet ak koweektagei koba irimeet: 
Acts23:33 ak kingo kagoit Caesarea, ak kogoochi pounindet parweet, konde Paulo agine tainnyi." 
Acts23:34 Ak ye kiga kosoman parweet, koteebe icheek koleenji, ano emetap chiichi? Ak kingo kas keele, po ineendet Cilicia," 
Acts23:35 kole, “Tuun agasun ng'aleeguk ko kait piik che ki itaamin.” Ki ng'at keriip ineendet eng' kootap kirwooget ne po Herod." 
Acts24:1 Ak kingo pata peetuusyek muutu, kochoorgei Anania tisiindet ne oo ak poisyek alak, ak ng'alaalindet age, ne kiguure Tertulo; ak koboorchi pounindet ng'aleek che ko kitaame Paulo." 
Acts24:2 Ak kingo kageguur, kotoi Tertulo kotaam ineendet kole, “Amu kiboiboitune kaalyeet ne oo eng' inyee, ak ki istoi yaitwogik eng' pororyoni amu ng'omnateng'ung'," 
Acts24:3 kitaach anyun eng' ortinwek tugul ak eng' komoswek tugul, kobooto kongoi tugul, ee inyee ne ii tagunoot, Felix." 
Acts24:4 Ago si mata again miising', asoomin ale igaseech eng' ng'aleek che ng'ering' eng' myeeindong'ung'," 
Acts24:5 amu ki kegeer chiichi keele ineendet ko chii ne itoitos piich, ne ing'eeti chemerereet eng' Yahudik tugul eng' ng'wony komugul, ak kandoindet ne po kasubiigap Nazaretik." 
Acts24:6 Ki tyem kogeny kole kong'wanit Hekaluut, ak ki kinam ineendet. [Ak ki kimache kirwookyi ineendet ko uu ng'atuutikyok." 
Acts24:7 Ago ki nyo ole ki mi Lusia kiptaiyat ne oo ne po kiplugotinik, ak korebenech ineendet eng' eunekyok eng' kimnateet ne oo.]" 
Acts24:8 Imuuchi inai tuguuchu tugul eng' ineendet ye igine inyeendet, agobo tuguuchooto ko kitaame.”" 
Acts24:9 Ak ki iyomechigei Yahudik kataamsonooto, kogiimit kole uu nooto ng'aleechuuto." 
Acts24:10 Ak kingo kagoboorchine pounindet Paulo euut, kole kong'alaal, kowol Paulo kole, “Asaruge eng' poiboiyet, angen ale, ii kirwoogindet ne po pororyoni eng' kenyiisyek che chaang'." 
Acts24:11 Imuuchi inai ile tomo kosiir peetuusyek taman ak aeng' kobooch ngap atogoste Jerusalem awe asaa. 
Acts24:12 Ama nyoorwo icheek eng' Hekaluut kibeligei ak chii age tugul, anan awase tuiyet, anan eng' sinagogisyek, anan eng' nganaseet." 
Acts24:13 Amaimuuchi icheek koboorun komyee tuguuk che itaamena. 
Acts24:14 Ago kang'ang'un niito, eng' Oranooto kuure icheek piteet age, aoote Kamuktaindet ne po kwanisyekyok, ak ayani tuguuk tugul ko uu ye mwaei Ng'atuutyet, ak che ki kisir eng' maotik:" 
Acts24:15 atinye kamang'unet eng' Kamuktaindet, ne cheeng'ei pichu ak icheek, ale, tatun komi ng'eetyeetap che po imanda ak che ma po imanda." 
Acts24:16 Ak achobegei anyun agane eng' ng'olyoondoni atebee kotugul kabwaatet ne ma tinyei kanagut eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ak piik. 
Acts24:17 “Ak kingo pata kenyiisyek che chaang' anyoo aipchi piigap pororyennyu kagoochinoik ak tuguuk che kigoitoi. 
Acts24:18 Ye ki ayae niito, ko ki nyoortaa kitiliilo eng' Hekaluut, ak ki ma komi tuiyet anan polateet." 
Acts24:19 Ago ki mi Yahudik alak che ki punu Asia; myee nda kami yu icheek eng' taing'ung' si komwaitaa ngo ting'ena icheek ng'olyoo. 
Acts24:20 Anan ingomwa pichu icheeget poisyet ne ya ne kinyoor, ye kinga tonon eng' taitap kapkirwooget," 
Acts24:21 kobatee tweguunet agenge ne ki ariirchi atononi eng' kwenunnywa, ale, ‘Kagirwokwo rani eng' taing'wong' agobo ng'eetyeetap che ki kobek.’ ”" 
Acts24:22 Amu ki ingen Felix komyee agobo Oranooto, koleenji, “Ogen, ye tuun kachoorgei kiptaiyat ne oo Lusia, atil anyun ng'aleekwok.”" 
Acts24:23 Ak kong'at chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol kole keriip ineendet, ak kigoochin poroindo; amat koete age tugul eng' choronokyik koboisyechi ineendet." 
Acts24:24 Ago kingo pata peetuusyek alage, koit Felix, kobooto Drusila osotyonnyi, ne ki Chebyahudio, ak koyookto Paulo konyo, ak ki kas eng' ineendet agobo kayaneet eng' Kristo Jeso." 
Acts24:25 Ak ye kita kong'alaali agobo imanda, ak riibetapkei, ak kirwooget ne nyoonei, koiyweis Felix, ak kowol kole, “Ui korook; ak ye tuun anyooru poroindo ne myee, aguurin.”" 
Acts24:26 Ki imang'u kole togot kogoochi Paulo silingisyek: kiguur anyun ineendet konyil che chaang', ak kong'alaal kobooto ineendet." 
Acts24:27 Ago kingo keskei kenyiisyek aeng'u, konam Porkio Pesto poisyetap Felix; ak amu kimachei Felix kobaibai Yahudik, kobagaakta Paulo ko rataat." 
Acts25:1 Kingo kagoit Pesto koronooto, kotogosta Jerusalem kobunei Caesarea, ko kagobata peetuusyek somogu." 
Acts25:2 Ak ki mwachi tisiik che eecheen ak piik che taagunotiin che po Yahudik ng'aleek che kiting'e Paulo; ak kogaigai icheek ineendet," 
Acts25:3 kosoom chamdaet agobo ineendet, kole koyookto ineendet kimut konyo Jerusalem; si kobiit korat ooreet kobar ineendet." 
Acts25:4 Ago ki wol Pesto kole keriip Paulo eng' Caesarea, ak kole, Neegit si awo aneendet olooto." 
Acts25:5 Ak kole ineendet, “Ongechoortegei ak che eecheen eng' okweek, si ngo mi ng'olyoo age tugul ne ya eng' chiichito, komwa icheek.”" 
Acts25:6 Ak kingo kagotebi eng' kwenunnywa kobooto icheek eng' peetuusyek che ma siirei sisiit anan ko taman, kochoortagei Caesarea; ak mutai kotebee ng'echereetap kirwooget, ak kong'at kole kimut Paulo." 
Acts25:7 Ak kingo kagoit, koyiem ineendet Yahudik che ki punu Jerusalem, koibu ng'aleek che chaang' che koroomen che ki itaame ineendet, che ki ma imuuch koboor komyee kiit ne ineet;" 
Acts25:8 ago ki mwa Paulo eng' ng'aleek che kisaruunegei, kole, “Tom ayai tengek agot kitigin agobo Ng'atuutyetap Yahudik, anan agobo Hekaluut, anan agobo Caesarea.”" 
Acts25:9 Ago ye kimachei Pesto kobaibai Yahudik, kowolji Paulo, koleenji, “Tos imache itogoste Jerusalem, si kirwoogun eng' olooto agobo tuguuchu eng' tainnyu?" 
Acts25:10 Ago ki le Paulo, Atononi eng' taitap ng'echereetap kirwooget ne po Caesarea, ole kanyool kirwoogunena: tomo ayachi kiy ne ya Yahudik, ko uu ye ingen inyee komyee." 
Acts25:11 Ngo aa kiptengekyo, ak ngot ko koayai kiy ne nyoljin meet, koma eesyoi ame: ago ngot koma po iman tuguuchooto, che itaamjino pichu, koma mi chii ne imuuchi kondea eunekwak. Ariirchini Caesarea.”" 
Acts25:12 Ak kingo kagong'alaal anyun Pesto ak piigap kapkirwook, kowol kole, “Kairiirchi Caesarea; ara anyun, iwendi kap Caesarea.”" 
Acts25:13 Ak kingo kagosiirto peetuusyek alage, koit laitoryat Agripa ak Bernike Caesarea, si kogat Pesto." 
Acts25:14 Ak ye kita kobeniei peetuusyek che chaang', koboorchi Pesto laitoryat ng'aleegap Paulo, koleenji, “Miitei chii age ne ki pagaakta Felix ko rataat." 
Acts25:15 Ne kimwaiwo ng'aleekyik tisiik che eecheen ak poisyegap Yahudik ye ki ami Jerusalem, ki soomei ng'aleek che kigikyine ineendet." 
Acts25:16 Ak ki awolji icheek aleenji, ma piteetap Romanik kigoito chii kotomo kogeergei kimni chiito ne kitaami ak che itaamsei, ak konyoor poroindo ne saruunegei eng' ng'aleek che ki kitaamjin." 
Acts25:17 Ye kingo yumgei anyun eng' yu, ko mata agagei, ago eng' peetuut ne po aeng' atebee ng'echereetap kirwooget, ak ang'at kimut chiichooto." 
Acts25:18 Ak kingo tononso icheeget che ki itaami ineendet, koma koip ng'olyoo ne ya ne po kagikyino agobo ineendet ko uu ye ki abwaati;" 
Acts25:19 ago kiting'e ineendet teebutik agobo kayanennywa, ak agobo chii ne kileen Jeso, ne ki kome, ne igiiljingei Paulo kole, sabei." 
Acts25:20 Ago ki aleen agin ole teptoi ng'aleechu kotemena, ateebee ngo machei kwo Jerusalem, si kirwookyi eng' oliindo agobo ng'aleechuuto." 
Acts25:21 Ago kingo riirchi Paulo kotebi kole si kotil kirwooget pounindet ne oo, ang'at ale keriip agoi tuun ayookte kwo kap Caesarea.”" 
Acts25:22 Ak ki leenji Agripa Pesto, “Amache agas agane ng'aleegap chiichito.” Koleenji, “Igase mutai.”" 
Acts25:23 Ak mutai ko kagoit Agripa, kobooto Bernike, eng' etunateet ne oo, ak ko kagoba koot ne kigase ng'aleek, kobooto kiptainik che eecheen, ak piik che taagunotiin che po nganaseet, kimut Paulo eng' ng'atuutyetap Pesto." 
Acts25:24 Komwa Pesto anyun, kole, “Laitoryat Agripa, ak piik tugul che kimi yu tugul, ogeere chiichi, ki koriircho tuiyet tugul ne po Yahudik agobo ineendet, eng' Jerusalem ak eng' olito, koboldos, koleen, manyol kota kosap." 
Acts25:25 Ago ki ageer ale ma yai kiy ne nyoljin meet: ak ko uu ye ki riirchi ineendet pounindet ne oo, acham anyun ayookto ineendet." 
Acts25:26 Ma tinyei ng'olyoo ne po iman ne asirchini kiptaiyandennyu agobo ineendet. Nooto anyun kamutu ineendet konyo taing'wong', ak ne siirei ko konyo taing'ung', inyee, laitoryat Agripa, si ye kageteebse, asich ng'olyoot ne asire." 
Acts25:27 Amu ageere ale, ma nyolu kiyookto kimonjororyo, ama kibor tuguuk che ki kitaamjin.”" 
Acts26:1 Koleenji anyun Agripa Paulo, Kagichamun iwolu ng'aleeguk. Kochuul anyun Paulo eunnyi, ak komwa ng'aleek che saruunegei, kole:" 
Acts26:2 Abwaati ale abaibai, ee laitoryat Agripa, amu amuuchi asarge rani eng' taing'ung' agobo tuguuk tugul che koitaamja Yahudik:" 
Acts26:3 ne siirei ko amu ingen komyee pitonwek tugul ak teebutik tugul che tinyei Yahudik; nooto anyun, kasoomin ale igasa eng' muitaet." 
Acts26:4 Ingen Yahudik tugul ateptap sabeennyu, kobooch ko aa ming'in, ne ki atinye kobooch ko ka piitu eng' pororyennyu, ak eng' Jerusalem;" 
Acts26:5 ak kongeno icheek kobooch eng' tai, nda chamei icheek kobaoryan, ko uu ye ki aa Pharisaindet ne isubi piteet ne koroom ne po kayanennyo." 
Acts26:6 Ak katonon nguno eng' yu si kirwookwo agobo kamang'unet ne po arorutyet ne kichopchi Kamuktaindet kwanisyekyok; 
Acts26:7 nooto ne imang'u ortinwekyok tamanu ak aeng' kole nyooru, koboisyechin Kamuktaindet eng' kagiiletapkei peet ak kemoi. Kagogikyo Yahudik agobo kamang'unoniito, ee, laitoryandani!" 
Acts26:8 Amu nee si kibwaat keele ma iyanaksei eng' okweek keele, ing'eeti Kamuktaindet che ki kobek?" 
Acts26:9 Ki abwaati aneendet iman ale kanyool ayai tuguuk che chaang' che kirindoi kainetap Jeso ne po Nazareth. 
Acts26:10 Ak ki ayai niito agine eng' Jerusalem: ak atoorchi korgorosyek piik che chaang' eng' che tiliileen, ko kagogoono kimnateet tisiik che eecheen, ak ki achame ye ki kibarei icheek." 
Acts26:11 Ak ki abirote konyil che chaang' eng' sinagogisyek tugul, abirchini kochubis; ak ye kiga konyita icheek miising', ausote agoi nganasook che po toek." 
Acts26:12 Ak ye kinga wendi Damasko atinye kimnateet ak kayooktoet ne po tisiik che eecheen," 
Acts26:13 ageer lapkeiyet ne ki punu kipsengwet, ne siirei kaluunetap asiista, koluucha komoswek tugul kobooto che ki kibendi tugul, eng' ooreet peet kween, ee, laitoryandani." 
Acts26:14 Ak kingo kagibutyi ng'wony tugul, agas kutit ne leenjino eng' kutitap Yahudik, Saulo, Saulo, amu ne si iusoo? Pichiy eng' inyee ityar kiplitwet." 
Acts26:15 Ak ki ale, ii ng'oo inyee, Kiptaiyat? Kole Kiptaiyat, Aa Jeso ne iuse." 
Acts26:16 Ago ng'eet, tonon eng' keelyeguk: kang'ang'unge amu ni, ale andein iegu kiboityot ak paoryatap tuguuchu kaigeer agobo anee, ak tuguuk che tuun ang'ang'unenegei;" 
Acts26:17 asaruun eng' piik, ak eng' Pororyosyek, ole tuun ayooktoin iwe," 
Acts26:18 si kobiit ing'aany konyekwak, ak koweek eng' mesundeito kobwonji lapkeiyet, ak eng' kimnateetap Setani kobwonji Kamuktaindet, si konyoor icheek nyoetap kaat ne po tengekwogik ak poroteet eng' icheek che ki kitiliil amu kayaneet ne mi eng' anee." 
Acts26:19 Nooto anyun, ee, laitoryandani Agripa, ma abistoe kaboorunet ne po kipsengwet:" 
Acts26:20 ago ki aboorchi che mi Damasko korook, ak eng' Jerusalem, ak eng' emet komugul ne po Judea, ak eng' Pororyosyek ak icheek, si kosik ak koyan Kamuktaindet, koyaei poisyonik che nyoljin siguunet." 
Acts26:20 ago ki aboorchi che mi Damasko korook, ak eng' Jerusalem, ak eng' emet komugul ne po Judea, ak eng' Pororyosyek ak icheek, si kosik ak koyan Kamuktaindet, koyaei poisyonik che nyoljin siguunet." 
Acts26:21 Ki nama anyun Yahudik eng' Hekaluut amu niito, ak kotyem kobara." 
Acts26:22 Ye kinga nyooru toreteet ne punu Kamuktaindet, atonon agoi rani abaoryanjini che mengech ak che eecheen, amamwae kiy age kobatee che ki mwa maotik ak Musa, kole tuun pwoonei;" 
Acts26:23 kole kanyool konyalil Kristo, ak kole komwaita korook eng' ng'eetyeetap che ki pek, lapkeiyet, komwachi piik ak Pororyosyek." 
Acts26:24 Ak ye kita kosarugei ko uu nooto, komwa Pesto eng' kutit ne oo, kole, “Paulo, ii kibiywa; kagogoonin iywek `kaneetetapkei ne oo.”" 
Acts26:25 Ago ki le Paulo, “Ma aa kibiywa, ee Pesto ne ii tagunoot: ago amwae ng'aleek che po iman ak che po ng'omnateet." 
Acts26:26 Amu ingen laitoryat ng'aleechuuto, ineendet ne ang'alaaljini eng' nyiganateet: amu angen komyee, ale ma ung'ootiin ng'aleechu eng' ineendet, agot agenge; amu mayaak ng'olyoondoniito eng' taban." 
Acts26:27 Laitoryat Agripa, tos iyani inyee maotik? Angen ale iyani.”" 
Acts26:28 Ak ki leenji Agripa Paulo, Ka neegit igaigaa eng' ng'aleek che ng'ering' aek Kristyanindet." 
Acts26:29 Kole Paulo, “Achame ko uu nooto eng' Kamuktaindet, ale ngo eng' che ng'ering' anan eng' che chaang', ma inyee kityo, ago tugul ak icheek che kasa rani, ale kotebi ko uu anee, ago ama eng' ratuutichu.”" 
Acts26:30 Kong'eet anyun laitoryat, ak pounindet ak Bernike, kobooto icheek che ki mi tugul:" 
Acts26:31 ak kingo kagoba, kong'alaaljigei icheegei, kole, “Ma yai chiichi kiy ne nyoljin meet anan ratisyosyek.”" 
Acts26:32 Koleenji anyun `Agripa Pesto, “Kota kityaachi chiichi, nda ki ma riirchi Caesarea.”" 
Acts27:1 Ak kingo kagetil ng'aleek keele kebun moinget keebe Italy, ki kigoochi Julio chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol, ne po lugeetap Augusto, Paulo ak kimonjororinik alak." 
Acts27:2 Kelaany anyun meeliit ne po Adramutio, ne kimachei kwo komoswek alak che mi ngeguutap Asia, keebe ak Aristarko Makedonianindet ne po Thessalonike." 
Acts27:3 Ak eng' peetuut ne po aeng' keit Sidon: ak ki riiree `Julio Paulo, ak kochamji kwo ole mi choronokyik si konyoor toreteet." 
Acts27:4 Ak ki kibun moinget eng' olooto ak ki kiteektaegei Cyprus, amu ki kirindaech usoonet." 
Acts27:5 Ak ye kiga kebun moinget kelande eng' nyanjet ne po Cilicia ak Pamphylia, keit Myra, nganaseet ne po Lycia." 
Acts27:6 Ak ki nyoorchi olooto chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol meeliit ne po Alexandria, ne wendi Italy; kondeech meeliit anyun." 
Acts27:7 Ak ye kiga keebe mutyo eng' meeliit eng' peetuusyek che chaang', agoi keit Cnido eng' pichiindo, koraanyech usoonet, keebe keteektaegei Krete, ne itoorchingei Salmone." 
Acts27:8 Ki kibun ngeguut eng' pichiindo agoi keit komosta age ne kiguure Luukwek che Myach; ole neegitee nganaseetap Lasea. 
Acts27:9 Ak kingo kagosiirto peetuusyek che chaang', ak kobichiit pandap nyanjet, amu kiga kosiirto peetuusyegap Karugutetapkei, koteechi Paulo icheek," 
Acts27:10 koleenji, “Murenju, kaageer ale miitei ng'oiyondit ak luseet eng' paniito po nyanjet, ma ne po meeliit kityo ak tuguuk che mi oriit, ago ne po saboonwekyok ak icheek.”" 
Acts27:11 Ago ki kas chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol ng'aleegap pounindet ak chiitap ko po meeliit, kosiir ng'aleek che kamwaei Paulo." 
Acts27:12 Ak amu ki ma ko luuita ne yamei ketebee eng' peetuusyegap kaitityet, komwa che chaang' kole, myee kota kinaakte eng' olito, tamangap keit Phoenisia, si ketebee olooto eng' peetuusyegap kaitityet; nooto ko ki luuitap Krete, ne kitokyingei murot kaataam kitigin ak murot tai kitigin." 
Acts27:13 Ak ye kingo us mutyo usoonet ne punu komostap tai, koleen icheek kagonyoor kiit ne kamachei, konem nanget ak kobun tabandap Krete, ye neegit ngeguut." 
Acts27:14 Ak ne matenit kous kipchurchuryet ne oo, ne kiguure Eurakulo:" 
Acts27:15 ak ye ki ngenam meeliit, ak mata komuuch kootap usoonet, keistochigei, ak koonech." 
Acts27:16 Ak ki ngerwai keteektaategei emet ne ki ikween peek ne kiguure Kauda, kimuuch eng' pichiindo keganap moinget ne ming'in." 
Acts27:17 Kingo kagotogosune moingonooto, koboisyee tuguuk che kitorete, koratune moinget oriit; ak kingo iywei icheek kole si ma kiwiirchi Surti, kochoor angook, ak ki oon usoonet koba." 
Acts27:18 Ak ye kita keboisyei miising' eng' kagiiletapkei, ketabe usoonooto oo, ketau eng' peetuut ne po aeng' kewiirte tuguuk che mi meeliit," 
Acts27:19 ak eng' peetuutap somok kowiirta icheeget eng' eunekwak tuguuk che kiboisyee eng' meeliit. 
Acts27:20 Ak ye ki mata koluuchech asiista anan kecheik eng' peetuusyek che chaang', ak kogiichech usoonet ne oo, kogeskei anyun kamang'unet ne ki kileen, tos kisarwech." 
Acts27:21 Ak ye kiga kotar peetuusyek che chaang' ama amis, kotonon Paulo eng' kwenunnywa, ak kole, “Murenju, kita myee nda ki kogasa, ak kita myee nda ki ma obwa eng' Krete, ak onyooru nyalili ak lusoni." 
Acts27:22 Amwaiwok nguno ale onyiganitu: amu ma mi chii ne meei eng' okweek, kobatee meeliit." 
Acts27:23 Amu kotonon malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet eng' ye neegiteena kemouni, ne aa nenyi, ak ne aoote," 
Acts27:24 kole, ‘Ameiyweisye, Paulo; kanyool itonon eng' taitap Caesarea: ak keero, kagogoonin Kamuktaindet tugul che obendi tugul eng' moinget.’" 
Acts27:25 Ara anyun, murenju, onyiganitu, amu ayani Kamuktaindet, ale yaaksei ko uu ye kogomwaiwo." 
Acts27:26 Ago kanyool kewiirchech emet ne ki ikween peek.” 
Acts27:27 Ago ye kingo it kemoutap taman ak ang'wan, ye kita kowiirchinech usoonet komosi ak komosi eng' nyanjet ne kiguure Adria, ko ki ibwaati piigap moinget olo po kemoi kween koleen kagoriikta emet age." 
Acts27:28 Ara ki irooch peek kiit ne kikwaise, ak konyoor kakwautik artam; ak kita koba kitigin korooch peek kogeny kioto, konyoor kakwautik sosom." 
Acts27:29 Ak kingo iywei icheek kole abeere togot kewiirchech pitet ne mi rwandosyek, kounda nangaisyek ang'wan eng' moinget olo po let, kosoom kole nda kaech." 
Acts27:30 Ak ye kimachei piigap moinget komwaei kobagaakta moinget, ko kagochoorta moinget kwo araraita, koleen si kobwaat piik kole wiirtoi icheek nangaisyek eng' olo po moinget tai," 
Acts27:31 koleenji Paulo chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol ak kiplugotinik, “Ngot koma tebi pichu eng' moinget, ko momuuchi osapche.”" 
Acts27:32 Kotil anyun kiplugotinik rogoosyek che po moinget, ak kobagaakta kobut." 
Acts27:33 Ak ye kimachei koeech, kogaigai Paulo icheek tugul koamis, koleenjin, Rani ko peetuutap taman ak ang'wan ogeni ak kota orugutige, ak tomo oam kiy." 
Acts27:34 Nooto anyun asoomok ale oamisye: amu niito sabeeng'wong'; amu ma petei sumeiyot agot agenge eng' metitap chii age tugul eng' okweek. 
Acts27:35 Ak ye kingo kagomwa ko uu nooto, ak konam magatyat, kogoochi Kamuktaindet kongoi eng' taitap tugul: ak kiton, ak kotoi koamis." 
Acts27:36 Konyiganitu anyun icheek tugul, ak koamis." 
Acts27:37 Ak acheek tugul ko ki piik pogol aeng' ak tamanwogik tisap ak lo eng' meeliit. 
Acts27:38 Ak kingo kagobiyong'so, kowiirchi araraita nganuuk si kowisisiit meeliit." 
Acts27:39 Ak kingo kagoeech, koma konai emonooto: ki keer luuita age ne tinyei ng'aniek, ne ki ibwaati kole, ngo mugak kokweri meeliit kwo olooto." 
Acts27:40 Kotyach anyun nangaisyek, ak kobagaakta eng' araraita, ak kotyach rogoosyek che ki kirate pagoinik che kindochine moinget; ak ye kingo kagonamji parak angeet ne mi oliin po tai kotokyi usoonet, koba ngeguut." 
Acts27:41 Ago kingo it ye tuiyechin nyanjosyek aeng'u, kochunda icheek meeliit koryep ng'aniek; ak kinamak moinget ole po tai kot koma kotwau, ago ki toi moinget kong'asur eng' ole po let eng' kimnateetap mildaetapkei ne po peek." 
Acts27:42 Ak ng'olyoot ne ki tinyei kiplugotinik ko kobar kimonjororinik, kole si ma pir peek alage eng' icheek, kochililyo." 
Acts27:43 Ago amu kimachei chemogetap kiplugotinik pogol kosar Paulo, koeete icheek si ma yai kiit ne kamachei; ak kong'at icheek che ki imuuchi kobirot peek kole, kowiirchigei nyanjet, si kosip koit ngeguut:" 
Acts27:44 ak ki pun alage pagoinik, kobun alage tuguuk alak che po meeliit. Kolong'ji anyun tugul emet kochamegei." 
Acts28:1 Ak ye kingo kagesapche, kenai anyun keele ki kiguure emonooto ki ikween peek Melita." 
Acts28:2 Ak kiyaiywech ne myee miising' piigap emonooto: amu ki ilaal maat, ak kotaachech acheek tugul, amu ki mi ropta ak kaitityet." 
Acts28:3 Ago ye kingo kagoyum Paulo ratuutyet ne po kweenik, ak konde ma, komong' anyun ereneet amu maat, ak kotaachigei eunnyi." 
Acts28:4 Ak kingo keer piigap emonooto ereneet kosonginini eng' euut, koleenjigei, “Rumin chiichi iman, agot nga kagosargei eng' nyanjet, koma chamjin ineendet Imanda kosap.”" 
Acts28:5 Ago kilelekta tyonyooto kwo ma, ama am kiy Paulo." 
Acts28:6 Ago kileen icheek abeere tos ibwo, anan kobut ak kome sainooto: ak ye kiga koogenis keny, ama kogeer kiy ne ya konyonji ineendet, kowal kabwaatutikwak ak komwa kole ineendet ko kamuktain." 
Acts28:7 Ki mi anyun eng' ole neegitee yooto, korotinwegap chiito ne oo ne po emonooto ki ikween peek, ne ki kiguure Publio; ne kitaachech eng' chamyet, ak koyaech keegu toekyik eng' peetuusyek somok." 
Acts28:8 Ak ki myani kwandap Publio koamei eseet ak myandap moet ne pendi korotiik: ak ki wo Paulo kootap chiichooto, ak kosa, ak kogonoor eunekyik ineendet ak kosoop." 
Acts28:9 Ak kingo kagoyaak niito kobwa ak icheek che ki myandos eng' kakwembeiyondonooto, ak ki kisoop:" 
Acts28:10 ak kigonyitech eng' teegisto ne oo; ak ye ki ngebe eng' moinget, kondewech moinget tuguuk che tee che ki kimakyinige." 
Acts28:11 Ak kingo pata arawek somogu ketau panda eng' meeliit ne po Alexandria, ne kiga tebee kakwembeiyondonooto eng' peetuusyegap kaitityet, ne kaboorunennyi ko ki Saramek che Muren." 
Acts28:12 Ak ki ngeit Syriakus, ketebee yooto peetuusyek somok." 
Acts28:13 Ak keng'eetye eng' olooto keebe keyiemategei, kot keit Reghio: ak kingo pata peetuut agenge kous usoonetap murot tai, ak eng' peetuut ne po aeng' keit Puteoli:" 
Acts28:14 ole ki kinyoorchi tupchosyek, ak ki igaigaech ketebi ak icheeget peetuusyek tisap: keit anyun Rome." 
Acts28:15 Ak kingo kas tupchosyek agobo acheek eng' olooto, kobwa kotorookwech kot koit Siireet ne po Apio ak Kooriik Somok che po Toek. Kingo keer Paulo icheek, komwachi Kamuktaindet kongoi ak konyiganit." 
Acts28:16 Ak ki ngeit Rome, kechamji Paulo kotebi ineegei kobooto asigarindet ne kiriibei ineendet." 
Acts28:17 Ak kingo kagosiirto peetuusyek somogu koguur piik che eecheen che po Yahudik kotuiyo: ak kingo kagoyumgei, koleenji icheek, Che kitupche, agot ngo ma yai anee kiy ne ya eng' piik, anan eng' pitonwegap kwanisyekyok, ko ki kindea eunegap Romanik eng' Jerusalem, ko aa kimonjororyo:" 
Acts28:18 ak kimachei kotyacha icheek, ko kagogin ng'aleekyuk, amu ki ma komi kiy eng' anee ne nyoljin meet." 
Acts28:19 Ago ye kingo kirinda Yahudik ng'olyoondonooto, ageer ale kanyool ariirchi Caesarea; ma keele ki atinye kiy ne ang'andoe pororyennyu." 
Acts28:20 Amu niito anyun kasoomok obwa kegeerge ak keng'alaal tugul: amu aa rataat eng' sirimi agobo kamang'unetap Israel. 
Acts28:21 Ak ki leenji ineendet, Tomo kenyooru paronok che punu Judea agobo inyee, anan konyo oli age eng' tupchosyek ak koboorwech anan komwa kiy ne ya agobo inyee." 
Acts28:21 Ak ki leenji ineendet, Tomo kenyooru paronok che punu Judea agobo inyee, anan konyo oli age eng' tupchosyek ak koboorwech anan komwa kiy ne ya agobo inyee." 
Acts28:22 Ago kimache kegasenen kiy ne ibwaati: amu ki konaak eng' acheek keele kimwaoti ne ya agobo pitoniito eng' komosta age tugul. 
Acts28:23 Ak ye kingo kagochop peetuut, kobwonji ineendet che chaang' eng' koot ne ki menyei; ak ki iborsechi komyee, kobaoryani agobo laitornatetap Kamuktaindet, ak kogiiljingei koneeti icheek agobo Jeso eng' ng'atuutyet ne po Musa ak eng' maotik, kobooch karon agoi koimen." 
Acts28:24 Ak ki iyan alak tuguuk che ki kimwaei, koma iyan alak." 
Acts28:25 Ak ye ki mata kogasyin icheegei, koba, ko kagomwa Paulo ng'olyoot agenge, kole, “Ki mwachi komyee Kabuuset ne Tiliil kwanisyekwok eng' maotyot Isaiah, kole," 
Acts28:26 ‘Ui ye mi pichu ak imwa ile, Eng' kaseet ogase, ago moguitosi agot kitigin; ak eng' keeret ogeere, ago mobestosi agot kitigin." 
Acts28:27 Amu kwolilenotin mugulelwegap pichu, ak ma kastoi komyee iitiikwak, ak kiger icheeget konyekwak; si ma keer eng' konyekwak, anan kogas eng' iitiikwak, anan koguiyo eng' mugulelwekwak, si koweek kogeny, ak asoop icheek.’" 
Acts28:28 Ingonaak anyun eng' okweek, ole, kiyookyin yetunoni po Kamuktaindet pororyosyek; kasei ak icheek.”" 
Acts28:29 Ak ye kingo kagomwa ng'aleechu, koba Yahudik, koteebategei icheegei miising'." 
Acts28:30 Ak ki meny eng' kenyiisyek aeng' koonnyi ne ki alei meng'et, ak kitaach tugul che ki pwonjin ineendet," 
Acts28:31 koamdoi agobo laitornatetap Kamuktaindet, ak koneeti tuguuk agobo Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo eng' nyiganateet tugul, ama etee chii." 
Romans1:1 Paulo, otwogindetap Jeso Kristo, ne ki kiguur koek kayooktoindet, ne ki kitabaanji logoiywek che myach che po Kamuktaindet," 
Romans1:2 che kisip koaror eng' maotikyik eng' siruutik che tiliileen," 
Romans1:3 logoiywek che myach agobo Weeriinnyi, ne ki kisich eng' kesweegap Daudi eng' poorto," 
Romans1:4 ne ki kimwaita keele Weeriitap Kamuktaindet eng' kimnateet, ko uu Kabuuset ne po tiliilindo, eng' ng'eetyeetap che ki pek; Jeso Kristo Kiptaiyandennyo," 
Romans1:5 ki kitaach eng' ineendet myeeindo ak kayooktoet, agoi kasetap iit ne po kayaneet eng' pororyosyek tugul amu kainennyi:" 
Romans1:6 ki kiguurok ak okweek eng' icheeget obunji Jeso Kristo: 
Romans1:7 eng' okweek tugul che omite Rome, chamanigap Kamuktaindet, che ki kiguur koek che tiliileen: Ingotep kobootok myeeindo ak kaalyeet ne punu Kamuktaindet Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo." 
Romans1:8 Ne po tai, amwachini Kamuktaindet nenyu kongoi eng' Jeso Kristo agobo okweek tugul, amu kimwaitoi kayaneng'wong' eng' ng'wony komugul." 
Romans1:9 Amu Kamuktaindet paoryandennyu, ne aoote eng' saboondanyu eng' logoiywek che myach che po Weeriinnyi, ale masise amwa agobo okweek kotugul eng' saautikyuk," 
Romans1:10 asoome ale, tamangap kobiitwa poroindo nguno ko neegit, Anyoonjok eng' mageetap Kamuktaindet." 
Romans1:11 Amu atinye emosto ageerok, si agoonok konunet age ne po saboon, si kobiit kigimitok;" 
Romans1:12 nooto ko si kobiit kigaigaige anee ak okweek eng' kwenung'wong', chii tugul eng' kayaneet ne po age, neng'wong' ak nenyu." 
Romans1:13 Ak ma mache oegu che mongen, che kitupche, ale, ki amach konyil che chaang' Anyoonjok (ak kigeraanya agoi kora), si kobiit anyoor logoek alak agot eng' okweek, agot ko uu eng' Pororyosyechuun alak ak icheek." 
Romans1:14 Aa ne kiyaachei eng' Yunanik ak che ma Yunanik, eng' che utaatiin ak che perber." 
Romans1:15 Nooto anyun, ko uu ye amuuchi, ko aa choboot aamwok logoiywek che myach ak okweek che omite Rome." 
Romans1:16 Ma lilanjini anyun logoiywek che myach; amu niito ko kimnateetap Kamuktaindet ne koonu yetunet eng' age tugul ne iyani; eng' Yahudyot korook ak eng' Yunanindet agine. 
Romans1:17 King'aanyei eng' niito imandap Kamuktaindet kobun kayaneet agoi kayaneet; ko uu ye siraat kole, “Ineendet ne po imanda ko sabei eng' kayaneet.”" 
Romans1:18 Ki keng'aany nereegegap Kamuktaindet kobun kipsengwet agobo pistoet tugul ak yaityet tugul ne po piik, che kirindoi imanit eng' yaityet;" 
Romans1:19 amu tuguugap Kamuktaindet che naotin ko taagunotiin eng' icheek; ki kong'aang'ji Kamuktaindet icheek. 
Romans1:20 Amu ki keerei komyee tuguukyik che ma taagu kobooch yaetap ng'wony che naoksei eng' tuguuk che yaotin, agot kimnateennyi ne po koigeny ak ineendet iman ko Kamuktaindet; si ma ek icheek che tinyei lotania; Kiguitos ak kotaagu komyee kimnateet ne po koigeny ak piteetap Kamuktaindet che nga ma taagu kobooch yaetap ng'wony, kiguitos ak kotaagu eng' tuguuk che ki yai Ineendet; si ma ek icheek che tinyei lotania;" 
Romans1:21 amu kingo kagonai Kamuktaindet, koma kolas ko uu Kamuktaindet, anan koweekyi kongoi; ago ki perberitu eng' kabwaatutikwak, ak ki imenitu mugulelwekwak che ma tinyei naet." 
Romans1:22 Kingo leen kondegei kole utaatiin, koberberitu," 
Romans1:23 ak kowal toroornatetap Kamuktaindet ne ma ng'emaksei kogergeit ak itoondap chiito ne ng'emaksei, ak ne po toriitik, ak tyong'ik che po keelyek ang'wan, ak tuguuk che ichuutegei." 
Romans1:24 Nooto anyun ki pagaakyi Kamuktaindet icheek magutigap mugulelwekwak koosup murwoonindo, si koteweer poorwekwak icheegei eng' icheegei:" 
Romans1:25 amu ki wal imanitap Kamuktaindet kowale lembeita, ak kolas ak koot kiit ne ki kiyai kosiir Yaindet, ne iberuurot koigeny. Amen." 
Romans1:26 Amu niito ki pagaakyi Kamuktaindet icheek maguutik che po teweernateet. Ki wal kobogorisyekwak piteet ne nyolu koek ne ma nyolu. 
Romans1:27 Ak ko uu nooto ak icheek murenik, ki pagaakta piteet ne nyolu ne po kobogorisyek, ak kogasegei icheegei mageet ne lalei, koyachingei murenik eng' murenik nooto ne ma nyolu, ak taachei icheegei melekto ne yamegei ak yaityennywa." 
Romans1:28 Ak ko uu ye ki eesyo kotebee Kamuktaindet naennywa, kobagakyi Kamuktaindet icheek kabwaatutik che ki kong'emogis, si koyai tuguuchooto che ma nyolu;" 
Romans1:29 ko nyiitaat tuguuk tugul che ma po iman, sogornateet, kasetap myat, yaityet; nyiitaat ng'etkonda, rumisyet, pooryeet, keniisyet, suryet; chaamik," 
Romans1:30 che po chemererosyek, che wechei Kamuktaindet, che kolgoleen, che menotik, che ichougei, taunigap tuguuk che yaacheen, che ma kase iit sigiik," 
Romans1:31 che ma tinyei kaguiyet, putigap kayomisutik, che ma tinyei chamyet, che ma tinyei rireenetapkei:" 
Romans1:32 che nganda ingen ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne leen, nyoljin meet icheeget che yaei tuguuk che uu chuuto, koma yaei kityo che uu chuuto, ago chamyechin kobooto icheeget che yaei tuguuchuuto." 
Romans2:1 Nooto anyun, metinye lotania, ee, inyee chii age tugul ne irwoochi: amu nooto irwookyine age, irwookyinegei inyeendet; amu inyee ne irwoochi, iyae aginye tuguuchooto." 
Romans2:2 Ak kingen keele namegei kirwoogetap Kamuktaindet ak imanit agobo icheek che yaei tuguuk che uu chooto. 
Romans2:3 Ee, inyee chii, tos iiti inyee, ile ichilile kirwoogetap Kamuktaindet, inyee ne irwookyini icheek che yaei tuguuk che uu chooto, ak iyae aginye chooto?" 
Romans2:4 Anan isase mogornatosyek che po myeeindonyi ak muitaennyi ak talasyennyi ama inai ile imutyinin siguunet myeeindap Kamuktaindet? 
Romans2:5 Ago eng' uindang'ung' ak muguleldang'ung' ne ma tinyei siguunet, igonorchinigei nereeknateet kobunji peetuutap nereeknateet ak ng'ang'utyetap kirwooget ne po imanda ne po Kamuktaindet;" 
Romans2:6 ne tuun igoochin chii tugul ko uu poisyonikyik: 
Romans2:7 igoochin saboondap koigeny icheek che cheeng'ei eng' muitaet ak eng' poisyonik che myach, toroornatet ak teegisto ak che ma ng'emaksei;" 
Romans2:8 ago eng' icheek che ngelelik, ama kase iit imanit, ago che kase iit ne ma po imanda, koegu nyitatet ak nereeknateet," 
Romans2:9 nyalilda ak pichiindo, eng' saboondap chii age tugul ne yaei yaityo, ne po Yahudyot korook, ak ne po Yunanindet agine;" 
Romans2:10 ago toroornatet ak teegisto ak kaalyeet eng' chii age tugul ne yaei ne myee, po Yahudyot korook ak Yunanindet agine:" 
Romans2:11 amu ma tiytiy `Kamuktaindet piik. 
Romans2:12 Amu tugul che ki yai tengek koma mi Ng'atuutyet, ko tuun lustos ama eng' Ng'atuutyet: ak tugul che ki yai tengek komi eng' Ng'atuutyet, ko tuun kirwookyin eng' Ng'atuutyet;" 
Romans2:13 amu ma icheek che kasei Ng'atuutyet ko che po imanda eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, ago icheek che yaei Ng'atuutyet, kiityin imanda." 
Romans2:14 Amu ye yaei Pororyosyek, che ma tinyei Ng'atuutyet, eng' piteennywa, tuguuk che po Ng'atuutyet, chuuto, pichooto ma tinyei Ng'atuutyet, kobougei icheegei;" 
Romans2:15 iboortoi eng' nooto poisyetap Ng'atuutyet ne siraat eng' mugulelwekwak, kobaoryanjin ak icheek nautikwak, ak komwaitogei icheegei eng' icheegei eng' kabwaatutikwak, anan kosarugei;" 
Romans2:16 eng' peetuut ne tuun irwookyin Kamuktaindet ung'ootigap piik, ko uu logoiywekyuk che myach, eng' Jeso Kristo." 
Romans2:17 Ago ngeguurenen Yahudyot, ak itiegei Ng'atuutyet, ak ichouge eng' Kamuktaindet," 
Romans2:18 ak ingen magennyi, ak ichame komyee tuguuk che korooron kosiir, amu ki kineetin Ng'atuutyet," 
Romans2:19 ak iiti ile ii kandoindet ne po che koryotiin, lapkeiyetap icheeget che mi mesundeito," 
Romans2:20 kotigonindet ne po che perber, kaneetindet ne po manyurunik, ne itinye eng' Ng'atuutyet kergeindap naet ak imanit;" 
Romans2:21 inyeendet anyun ne ineeti age, ko meneetige? Inyee ne iamdoi ile amat kochoorse chii, ko tos ichoorsei inyee?" 
Romans2:22 Inyee ne imwae ile amat oipkei, ko tos iyae inyee? Inyee ne iweche kanamonik, ko tos irebe che mi kooriigap kanamonik?" 
Romans2:23 Inyee ne ichouge eng' Ng'atuutyet, ko tos iteweeri Kamuktaindet eng' pistoeng'ung' ne ibistoe Ng'atuutyet?" 
Romans2:24 Amu kichubei kainetap Kamuktaindet eng' kwenutap Pororyosyek, amu okweek, ko uu ye ki kisir." 
Romans2:25 Amu toreti iman kamuratanet, ngo ii yaindetap Ng'atuutyet: ago ngot ko ii putindetap Ng'atuutyet, ko kagoek kamurataneng'ung' ne ma kamuratano." 
Romans2:26 Ngot koriibei anyun tetuutigap Ng'atuutik ineendet ne ma kimuratan, ko tos ma kiiti ne ma kimuratan keele imuratanat?" 
Romans2:27 Ak tos ma tuun irwogun ineendet ne ma kimuratan eng' atebeennyi, ngot koyai Ng'atuutyet kosulda, inyeendet ne ii putindetap Ng'atuutyet ak itinye ng'atuutik che siraatiin ak kamuratanet?" 
Romans2:28 Amu ma Yahudyot ineendet ne Yahudyot eng' poorto parak, ama kamuratanet nooto po poorto parak;" 
Romans2:29 ago Yahudyot ineendet ne Yahudyot eng' oriit; ak kamuratanet ko nooto po muguleldo, eng' saboondo, ma eng' sireet; ne kalasunennyi koma po piik, ago po Kamuktaindet." 
Romans3:1 Tinyei porot nee anyun Yahudyot? Anan nee toreteet ne po kamuratanet? 
Romans3:2 Oo eng' ooreet age tugul: ne po tai, ko amu ki kigoochi Yahudik kotononji ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet." 
Romans3:3 Amu egu nee ngot koma tinyei alage kayaneet? Kayanennywa ne ma mi, ko tos walei imandap Kamuktaindet koek puch?" 
Romans3:4 Achicha: ma uu nooto: ingoek ne po iman Kamuktaindet, ago kiplembechwa chii age tugul; ko uu ye siraat kole, Si kobiit kindein imanda eng' ng'aleeguk, Ak imuuch ibelisye ye kirwoogun." 
Romans3:5 Ago ngot kogonyiti atebeennyo ne ma po imanda, imandap Kamuktaindet, kota kemwae nee anyun? Tos ma po imanda Kamuktaindet ne nyoonei eng' nereegek? (Ang'alaali ko uu piik.)" 
Romans3:6 Achicha! Ma uu nooto; amu nda uu nooto korwookyindoi ano `Kamuktaindet ng'wony? 
Romans3:7 Ago ngo tesak imanitap Kamuktaindet eng' lembeitanyu agoi toroornatennyi, ko amu nee si kota kirwookwo ko uu kiptengekyo?" 
Romans3:8 Ak amu nee si ma ki mwa (ko uu ye kimwaitaenech ne ya, ak ko uu ye iyani alage kole kimwae acheek) keele, Ongeyai che yaach si kobiit kobwa che myach? Po iman kirwoogennywa." 
Romans3:9 Nee anyun? Tos ki myachen kesiir icheek? Achicha, agot kitigin: amu kiga kisip kiityi Yahudik ak Yunanik keele mi icheek tugul eng' pounatetap tengekto;" 
Romans3:10 ko uu ye siraat kole, Ma mi ne po imanda, achicha, ma mi agot agenge:" 
Romans3:11 Ma mi ne iguitos, Ma mi ne cheeng'ei Kamuktaindet;" 
Romans3:12 Ki komasta tugul, ki koek tugul che ma tilei kiy; Ma mi ne yaei ne myee, achicha, ma mi agot agenge:" 
Romans3:13 Mookwekwak ko kererit ne yaataat; Kiboisyee keniisyet eng' ng'elyebwekwak: Mi ng'wonetap erenook kutusweekwak oriit: 
Romans3:14 Che nyiitaat kutusweekwak chubisyet ak ng'wanindo: 
Romans3:15 Chepchep keelyekwak kotumda korotiik; 
Romans3:16 Mi ortinwekwak ng'emisyet ak nyalilda; 
Romans3:17 Ama nai ooreetap kaalyeet: 
Romans3:18 Ma mi kaiyweisyet ne iywei Kamuktaindet taitap konyekwak. 
Romans3:19 Ak kingen keele tuguuk alak tugul che mwaei Ng'atuutyet, komwachin icheek che miitei eng' pounatetap Ng'atuutyet; si kobiit keger kutit age tugul, ak si ki mutyi ng'wony komugul kirwoogetap Kamuktaindet:" 
Romans3:20 amu ma mi chii ne kiityin imanda eng' tainnyi eng' poisyonigap Ng'atuutyet: amu punu naetap tengekto Ng'atuutyet. 
Romans3:21 Ago nguno ko kagong'ang'ak imandap Kamuktaindet ama eng' ng'atuutik, ne paoryani Ng'atuutyet ak maotik;" 
Romans3:22 agot imandap Kamuktaindet ne mi eng' kayaneet eng' Jeso Kristo eng' icheeget tugul che iyani; amu ma mi kabesyet; 
Romans3:23 amu ki koyai tugul tengek, ama ityin toroornatetap Kamuktaindet;" 
Romans3:24 che kiityin imanda puch eng' myeeindonyi eng' katyaget ne mi eng' Kristo Jeso: 
Romans3:25 ne ki inde Kamuktaindet koek kaptisiisyo eng' kayaneet, eng' korotiikyik, si kobarta imandanyi, amu kachundaetap tengekwogik che ki kisip keyai, eng' muitaetap Kamuktaindet;" 
Romans3:26 amu kabartaetap imandanyi eng' peetuusyechuuto, si kobiit koek ineendet ne po imanda, ak koek ne iityin imanda ineendet ne tinyei kayaneet eng' Jeso." 
Romans3:27 Mi ano anyun kachaunetapkei? Kigegerchi saang'. Eng' ng'atuutyet ne uu nee? Ne po poisyonik? Achicha: ago eng' ng'atuutyetap kayaneet. 
Romans3:28 Ki iti anyun keele kiityin chii imanda eng' kayaneet ama poisyonigap ng'atuutik. 
Romans3:29 Anan Kamuktaindet ko Kamuktaindet ne po Yahudik kityo? Ama Kamuktaindet ne po Pororyosyek ak icheek? Ee, po Pororyosyek ak icheek:" 
Romans3:30 ko uu ye agenge Kamuktaindet, ak koiityin imanda eng' kayaneet che ki kimuratan, ak koiityin imanda eng' kayaneet che ma kimuratan." 
Romans3:31 Tos ki yai anyun Ng'atuutyet koek ne ma tilei kiy amu kayaneet? Achicha, ma uu nooto: ki kimiti Ng'atuutyet." 
Romans4:1 Kimwae nee anyun agobo Abraham, kwandanyo, kinyoor nee eng' atebeetap poorto?" 
Romans4:2 Amu nda kiga kiityi Abraham imanda eng' poisyonik, kotinyei ineendet ne ilasunegei; ago ma eng' taitap Kamuktaindet." 
Romans4:3 Mwaei nee anyun siruutik? Ki iyan `Abraham Kamuktaindet, ak ki kiityi ineendet imanda." 
Romans4:4 Ago ineendet ne poisyei, koma kiityin melekto keele po myeeindo, ago po pesendo." 
Romans4:5 Ago eng' ineendet ne ma poisyei, ago iyani ineendet ne iityin imanda chii ne ya, kiiti kayanennyi keele po imanda." 
Romans4:6 Agot ko uu ye ki mwa Daudi agine agobo kaberuretap chiito ne iityin Kamuktaindet imanda ama eng' poisyonik," 
Romans4:7 kole, Poiboen icheek che kigenyochi kaat tengekwogikwak, Ak che kigetuch tengekwogikwak." 
Romans4:8 Paibai chiito ne ma tuun iityin kiptaiyat tengekto. 
Romans4:9 Tos kimwae kaberuroni agobo che ki kimuratan, anan che ma kimuratan ak icheek? Amu kimwae keele, Ki kiityi Abraham kayanennyi kobunji imanda." 
Romans4:10 Ki kiityindo ano anyun? Ye kiga kimuratan anan ye kitom kimuratan? Ma eng' kamuratanet, ago ye kitom kimuratan:" 
Romans4:11 kitaach kaboorunetap kamuratanet, ng'ookset ne po imandap kayaneet ne ki tinyei ye kitom kimuratan: si kobiit koek kwandap icheek tugul che kiyani, agot ye kitom kimuratan, si kobiit kiityi icheek imanda;" 
Romans4:12 ak koek kwandap che imuratanotiin eng' icheek che ma po kamuratanet kityo, ago che pendi ak icheek eng' tyegutigap kayanonooto po kwandanyo Abraham ne ki tinyei ye kitom kimuratan." 
Romans4:13 Amu ki ma kigoochi Abraham ak kesweekyik arorutyet eng' ooreet ne po Ng'atuutyet keele kobunji ng'wony, ago eng' imanda ne po kayaneet." 
Romans4:14 Amu ngot koek che namei tuguuk, icheek che po Ng'atuutyet, ko kagoek puch kayaneet, ak kageyai arorutyet koek ne ma tilei kiy:" 
Romans4:15 amu ibu Ng'atuutyet nereegek; ago ole ma mi ng'atuutyet, koma mi pistoet." 
Romans4:16 Punu kayaneet amu niito, si kobiit koek ne po myeeindo; si ma walak arorutyet eng' iyoteet tugul; ma chooto po Ng'atuutyet kityo, ago chooto ak icheek che po kayaneetap Abraham, ne kwandanyo acheek tugul" 
Romans4:17 (ko uu ye siraat kole, “Kaayain iegu kwandap pororyosyek che chaang' ”) eng' taitap ne ki koyan ineendet, nooto ko Kamuktaindet, ne isoobi che ki kobek, ak koguurei tuguuk che ma mi, ko uu che mi." 
Romans4:18 Ki iyan eng' kamang'unet ye ki ma komi kiy ne kimang'u, si kobiit koek kwandap pororyosyek che chaang', kiga kemwa ko uu nooto keele, “Tenitu chooto iyoteng'ung'.”" 
Romans4:19 Ak ki ma nyalul eng' kayaneet ye ki ibwaati poortanyi ne uu ne ki kome, (ye kiga kotar olo po kenyiisyek pogol) ak Sara ne kiga kosiirto peetuusyegap iyoteet:" 
Romans4:20 ee, ki ma sage kobistoe ye ki ibwaati arorutyetap Kamuktaindet, ago kitesak kogimit eng' kayaneet, kotoroori Kamuktaindet," 
Romans4:21 ak ki ingen komyee kole kiit ne kiga koaror ineendet, komuuchi koyai kosulda." 
Romans4:22 Eng' nooto anyun, ko ki kiityi ineendet imanda." 
Romans4:23 Ago ki ma kisir agobo ineendet ineegei, keele ki kiityi ineendet;" 
Romans4:24 ago amu acheek agacheek, che tuun kiityin, che iyani ineendet ne ki ing'eet Jeso Kiptaiyandennyo komong' eng' che ki pek," 
Romans4:25 ne ki kigoito amu pistautikyok, ak ki king'eet si kobiit kiityech imanda." 
Romans5:1 Ki tinyei kaalyeet ak Kamuktaindet eng' Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo amu ki kiityech imanda eng' kayaneet; 
Romans5:2 ak ki kenyooru eng' ineendet agine kemong'ji eng' kayaneet myeinooto kitonone; ak ongeboiboitu eng' kamang'unetap toroornatetap Kamuktaindet. 
Romans5:3 Ak ma uu nooto kityo, ago ongeboiboitu eng' nyalilwogikyok: kingen keele ibu nyalilda muitaet;" 
Romans5:4 ak ibu muitaet tyemisyet; ak ibu tyemisyet kamang'unet: 
Romans5:5 ma koonu kamang'unet kililan; amu kigerong'ji chamyetap Kamuktaindet mugulelwekyok eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne kigegoonech. 
Romans5:6 Amu ye kita ko kinyalulyotin, kome Kristo agobo che yaacheen eng' peetuut ne kiga kelewen." 
Romans5:7 Amu pichiy kome chii agobo chii ne po imanda: ago abeere kanyei chiito age kome agobo chii ne myee. 
Romans5:8 Ago iboorwech acheek Kamuktaindet chamyennyi, amu ye kita ko ki kiptengeginik, kome Kristo agobo acheek." 
Romans5:9 Ak ne siirei miising' anyun, ko kagiityech imanda eng' korotiikyik, kesarwech eng' nereegegap Kamuktaindet eng' ineendet." 
Romans5:10 Amu ye kita ko ki puunik, ko ki kituiyech ak Kamuktaindet eng' meetap Weeriinnyi, ne siirei miising' anyun, koga kituiyech, kesarwech eng' saboondanyi." 
Romans5:11 Ak ma uu nooto kityo, ago kiboiboi agacheek eng' Kamuktaindet eng' Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, amu ki kenyooru eng' ineendet katuiyet." 
Romans5:12 Nooto anyun, ko uu ye ki mong'ji ng'wony tengek eng' chiito agenge, ak meet amu tengek; koityi anyun meet piik tugul, amu ki yai tugul tengek" 
Romans5:13 amu ki mi ng'wony tengek agoi koit Ng'atuutik, ago ma kiiti tengek ye ma mi ng'atuutik." 
Romans5:14 Ago kiboi meet kobooch Adam agoi Musa, agot eng' icheek che ki ma yai tengekto ne kergei ak pistoetap Adam, ne ki itoondap ineendet ne kitun konyo." 
Romans5:15 Ago ma uu pistoet, konunetap chamyet. Amu ngo ki pek che chaang' eng' pistoetap agenge, ko kitesak miising' kosiir eng' che chaang', myeeindap Kamuktaindet, ak konunet eng' myeeindap chiito agenge, Jeso Kristo." 
Romans5:16 Ak ma kergei kiit ne pitunee konunet ak kiit ne pitunee tengektap chiito agenge: amu ki nyo kirwooget eng' agenge agoi kagikyinet, ago ki nyo konunetap chamyet eng' pistautik che chaang' agoi kaiityinetap imanda." 
Romans5:17 Amu ngo kiboi meet eng' pistoetap agenge; ne siirei miising' anyun, kobou eng' saboondo icheek che taachei chaang'indap myeeindo ak konunet ne po imanda eng' agenge, nooto Jeso Kristo." 
Romans5:18 Nooto anyun, ko uu ye ki nyoonji piik tugul kirwooget agoi kagikyinet eng' pistoetap agenge; ko uu nooto ki nyoonji piik tugul konunet ne kigoitoi puch, agoi kaiityinetap imanda ne po saboondo eng' pistoet agenge ne po imanda." 
Romans5:19 Amu ko uu ye ki ek che chaang' kiptengeginik eng' pistoetap chiito agenge, ko uu nooto kiyaei che chaang' kobunji imanda eng' kasetap iit ne po agenge." 
Romans5:20 Ak ki nyo Ng'atuutyet, si kobiit kotesak pistoet; ago ye kitesak tengekto, ko kitesak myeeindo miising' kosiir:" 
Romans5:21 si, ko uu ye kiboi tengekto eng' meet, ko uu nooto pou myeeindo eng' imanda agoi saboondap koigeny eng' Jeso Kristo Kiptaiyandennyo." 
Romans6:1 Kimwae nee anyun? Ki testai ketebi eng' tengek, si kobiit kotesak myeeindo?" 
Romans6:2 Achicha, ma uu nooto. Acheek che kigebekyi tengek, kota kesoptoi ano eng' tengek?" 
Romans6:3 Anan ma onai ole acheek tugul che ki kibatisanjech Jeso Kristo ko ki kibatisanjech meennyi? 
Romans6:4 Nooto anyun kigetubech kobooto ineendet eng' kabatisanet agoi meet: si ko uu ye ki king'eet Kristo eng' che ki pek eng' toroornatetap Kwanda, ko uu nooto, kibendoti agacheek eng' saboondo ne leel." 
Romans6:5 Amu ngo ki kituiyech ak ineendet eng' kergeindap meennyi, ke uu nooto agacheek eng' kergeindap ng'eetyeennyi;" 
Romans6:6 kingen ni, keele ki kigartaat chiinyo ne po keny kobooto ineendet, si kong'emak poortap tengek, si mata koratech tengekto kogeny." 
Romans6:7 Amu ineendet ne ki kome kotyagat eng' tengek. 
Romans6:8 Ago ngo kigebegu kobooto Kristo, kiyani kora keele kisoptosi kobooto ineendet;" 
Romans6:9 kingen keele ki king'eet Kristo komong' eng' che ki kobek: ma komeei kogeny; ma kotinyei meet pounateet eng' ineendet kogeny. 
Romans6:10 Amu meet ne kime, kogimechi tengek konyil agenge ak koyam; ago sabeet ne sabei ineendet kosabei eng' Kamuktaindet." 
Romans6:11 Ko uu nooto oiityige ak okweek ole ki obekyi tengek, ago osaptosi eng' Kamuktaindet eng' Kristo Jeso." 
Romans6:12 Nooto anyun amochamji tengek koboi poorwekwok che pegu, si ogas iit maguutikwak:" 
Romans6:13 anan ogoochi tengek kebeberwegap poorwekwok koek kariik che ma po iman; ago ogoochigei Kamuktaindet, ko uu che saptos che kamang'une che ki pek, ak ogoochi Kamuktaindet kebeberwegap poorwekwok koek kariigap imanda." 
Romans6:14 Amu ma tinyei tengek pounateet eng' okweek: amu ma omi eng' Ng'atuutik, ago eng' myeeindo." 
Romans6:15 Nee anyun, ki yai tengek, amu ma kemi eng' Ng'atuutik, ago eng' myeeindo? Achicha, ma uu nooto." 
Romans6:16 Mongen ole, ineendet ne ogoochinigei oegu otwogik agoi kasetap iit, ko oo otwogigap ineendet ne ogase iit; ngo po tengekto agoi meet, anan ngo po kasetap iit agoi imanda?" 
Romans6:17 Ago kimwachini Kamuktaindet kongoi, amu, okweek che ki oo otwogigap tengekto, ko ki ogas iit eng' muguleldo kaneetisyet ne uu ne kigegoonok okweek;" 
Romans6:18 ak ye kingi tyachak eng' tengek, oegu otwogigap imanda." 
Romans6:19 Ang'alaali ko uu piteetap piik amu nyalulet ne po poorwekwok: amu ko uu ye ki ogoite kebeberwegap poorwekwok koek otwogigap murwoonindo ak tengek agoi tengek, ko uu nooto anyun ogoite kebeberwegap poorwekwok koek otwogigap imanda agoi tiliilindo." 
Romans6:20 Amu ye kita ko oo otwogigap tengekto, ko ki otyagotin eng' imanda." 
Romans6:21 Ki otinye logoek nee eng' peetuusyechooto eng' tuguuk che olilane nguno? Amu kagesunetap tuguuchooto ko meet. 
Romans6:22 Ago nguno ko kagityaachak eng' tengekto, ak kaoegu otwogigap Kamuktaindet, otinye logoekwok agoi tiliilindo, ak kagesunet ko saboondap koigeny." 
Romans6:23 Amu melektap tengek ko meet; ago konunetap chamyet ne po Kamuktaindet ko saboondap koigeny eng' Kristo Jeso Kiptaiyandennyo. 
Romans7:1 Anan mongen okweek, che kitupche (amu ang'alaaljini piik che ingen Ng'atuutyet), ole tinyei ng'atuutyet pounateet eng' chiito eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi?" 
Romans7:2 Amu kobogoryot ne tinyei manong'otyot koratei ng'atuutik eng' manong'otyot eng' peetuusyek tugul che po sabeennyi; ago ngo me manong'otyot, kotyagak anyun eng' ng'atuutyetap manong'otyot." 
Romans7:3 Nooto anyun, ye ta kosabei manong'otyot, ak konamgei ak chiito age, keguure ineendet chebaigeiyat: ago ngo kagome manong'otyot, kotyagak eng' ng'atuutyet, eng' nooto anyun, koma keguure chebaigeiyat, agot ngo tuun chiito age ineendet." 
Romans7:4 Nooto anyun, che kitupche, kigeyaak obegu eng' Ng'atuutyet eng' poortap Kristo; si kobiit obunji chiito age, ineendet ne ki king'eet komang'une che ki pek, si keiichi Kamuktaindet logoek." 
Romans7:5 Amu ye kingota kemi eng' poorto ko ki poisyei maguutik che po tengek eng' kebeberwegap poorwekyok, che kimi amu Ng'atuutyet, si koiiyo logoek che ityin meet." 
Romans7:6 Ago nguno, ko ki kityaachech eng' Ng'atuutyet, ko kagebekyi nooto ne kiga ratech; si kobiit keotisye eng' leelindap Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ma eng' osindap ng'atuutik che siraatiin." 
Romans7:7 Kimwae nee anyun? Tos tengek Ng'atuutyet? Achicha, ma uu nooto. Ago ki ma kota anae tengek nda ki ma ko eng' Ng'atuutyet: amu ki ma kota anai kasetap myat nda ki ma mwa Ng'atuutyet kole, “Amegase myat.”" 
Romans7:8 Ago kinyoor tengek poroindo eng' ng'atuutyet koyai eng' anee kasetap myat age tugul: amu ye ma mi Ng'atuutyet ko meat tengekto. 
Romans7:9 Ak ki asabe eng' tai ye ki ma komi Ng'atuutyet: ago ye kingo nyo ng'atuutyet, kosap kogeny tengekto, amee anyun;" 
Romans7:10 ak ki ageer ale ki punji meet ng'atuutyet ne ki po saboondo: 
Romans7:11 amu kinyoor tengek poroindo eng' ng'atuutyet kong'ala, ak kobara eng' nooto." 
Romans7:12 Nooto anyun tiliil Ng'atuutyet, ak ko tiliil kayomiset, ak ko po imanda, ak ko myee." 
Romans7:13 Tos ki ek anyun nooto myee meet eng' anee? Achicha, ma uu nooto. Ago si koboorgei tengekto keele tengekto, kogiyai meet eng' anee eng' nooto myee; si kobiit koek `tengekto tengekto inne eng' ng'atuutyet." 
Romans7:14 Amu kingen keele po Ng'atuutyet saboondo; ago aa chiitap poorto, ne kigealdochi tengek." 
Romans7:15 Amu mangen ne ayae: amu ma ne amache, ne ayae; ago ne aweche, ko nooto ne ayae." 
Romans7:16 Ago ngayai nooto ma mache, ayan anyun ale myee Ng'atuutyet." 
Romans7:17 Nguno anyun koma ko anee ne ayae, ago tengekto ne menya." 
Romans7:18 Amu angen ale eng' anee, nooto ko eng' poortanyu, koma menyei kiy ne myee: amu mi chameet kobooto, ago ale ayai nooto myee, koma yae." 
Romans7:19 Amu nooto myee ne kata ayae, koma yae: ago yaityet ne ma mache, ko nooto ne cham ayae." 
Romans7:20 Ago ngot ayae ne ma mache, koma ko anee ne yaei, ago tengekto ne menya." 
Romans7:21 Ageere anyun ng'atuutyet, ale, eng' anee, ne kata ayae ne myee, komiitei yaityet kobooto." 
Romans7:22 Amu abaibai eng' Ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet eng' chiito ne po oriit: 
Romans7:23 ago ageere ng'atuutyet ne teer eng' kebeberwegap poortanyu, kobortos ak ng'atuutyetap ng'omnatennyu, koyaa aek luulenetap ng'atuutyet ne po tengekto ne miitei kebeberwegap poortanyu." 
Romans7:24 Ee, anee ne nyalili! Ng'oo ne ityaacha eng' poortap meoni?" 
Romans7:25 Amwachini Kamuktaindet kongoi eng' Jeso Kristo Kiptaiyandennyo. Nooto anyun, aoote eng' ng'omnatennyu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet, ago eng' poorto aoote ng'atuutigap tengekto." 
Romans8:1 Nooto anyun ma komi kirwooget eng' icheek che miitei eng' Kristo Jeso. 
Romans8:2 Amu kagotyacha ng'atuutyetap Kabuusetap saboon eng' Kristo Jeso amang'une ng'atuutyetap tengek ak meet. 
Romans8:3 Amu kiit ne ki ma imuuch Ng'atuutyet koyai, amu nyaluletap poorto, koyook Kamuktaindet Weeriinnyi eng' kergeindap poortap tengek si koek kagoochinet ne po tengekto, kogikyi tengekto eng' poorto:" 
Romans8:4 si kobiit kosulda kayomisetap Ng'atuutyet eng' acheek, che ma kisubi poorto, ago Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Romans8:5 Amu icheek che isubi poorto kogereeri met agobo tuguugap poorto; ago icheek che isubi Kabuuset ne Tiliil kogereeri met agobo tuguugap Kabuuset ne Tiliil. 
Romans8:6 Amu kererwegap met che po poorto ko meet; ago kererwegap met che po Kabuuset ne Tiliil ko saboondo ak kaalyeet: 
Romans8:7 amu kererwegap met che po poorto ko puunyoondit eng' Kamuktaindet; amu ma kase iit Ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet, amaimuuchi:" 
Romans8:8 ak icheeget che mi poorto kotemenee kobaibai Kamuktaindet. 
Romans8:9 Ago ma omi eng' poorto ago eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ngo menyok Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet. Ago ngo ma tinyei chii Kabuusetap Kristo koma nenyi." 
Romans8:10 Ak ko ngo mi Kristo eng' okweek, ko nga ki kome poorto amu tengekto; ko sabei saboondo amu imanda." 
Romans8:11 Ago ngo menyok Kabuusetap ineendet ne ki ing'eet Jeso komang'une che ki pek, kosoobi poorwekwok che pegu ineendet ne ki ing'eet Kristo Jeso komang'une che ki pek, eng' Kabuusennyi ne menyei eng' okweek." 
Romans8:12 Nooto anyun, che kitupche, ki che kiyaachei, ma eng' poorto, si kisubi poorto:" 
Romans8:13 amu ngo subi poorto, obegu matiny; ago ngo par eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil poisyonigap poorto, osaptosi." 
Romans8:14 Amu tugul che indochin Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet, ko weeriigap Kamuktaindet chooto." 
Romans8:15 Amu ki ma otaach kogeny muguleldap otwoknot ne koonok oiyweisye; ago ki otaach Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne ki kiyaenak oegu lagogap Kamuktaindet. Eng' nooto anyun ye kiriire keele, Abba, Kwanda" 
Romans8:16 ko paoryani Kabuuset ne Tiliil ineendet ak mugulelwekyok kole ki lagogap Kamuktaindet; 
Romans8:17 ak ngo ki lagok, ko ki che punjinech tuguuk; che punjinech tuguugap Kamuktaindet, ak che punjinech tuguuk kobooto Kristo; ngot kenyalildosi kobooto ineendet, si kitoroorech kobooto ineendet." 
Romans8:18 Amu aiiti ale nyalilwogik che po peetuusyechu koma nyolu kiroge toroornatet ne tuun king'ang'wech. 
Romans8:19 Amu igeni miising' ak koganyei yaeet komugul ng'ang'et ne po weeriigap Kamuktaindet. 
Romans8:20 Amu ki kigoochi yaeet tugul kogas iit kiit ne ma tilei kiy, ma ko uu ye machei, ago amu ineendet ne ki igoochi kogas iit ko uu nooto eng' kamang'unet," 
Romans8:21 si kobiit kityaach yaeet komugul agine eng' otwoknateetap ng'emisyet agoi katyaget ne po toroornatetap lagogap Kamuktaindet. 
Romans8:22 Amu kingen keele tigeni ak kogasei ng'wanindo yaeet komugul kobootech agoi nguno. 
Romans8:23 Ak ma uu nooto kityo, ago agot acheek, che ki tinyei tongoanigap Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ketigendosi agacheek eng' oriit, kigeni keyaech keegu lagok, nooto ko katyagetap poorwekyok." 
Romans8:24 Amu kigesarwech eng' kamang'unet: ago kamang'unet ne kigeerei koma kamang'unet; amu ng'oo ne imang'u nooto keerei? 
Romans8:25 Ago ngimang'u nooto ma kigeere, kigeni nooto anyun eng' muitaet." 
Romans8:26 Ak toreti ko uu nooto agine Kabuuset ne Tiliil nyalulennyo: amu ma kingen kesaa ko ye nyolu; ago saiywech Kabuuset ne Tiliil ineendet eng' tigenoik che ma kimuuchi kemwa; 
Romans8:27 ak ineendet ne isyachi mugulelwek kongen kiit ne ibwaati Kabuuset ne Tiliil, amu saaei agobo piik che tiliileen ko uu mageetap Kamuktaindet." 
Romans8:28 Ak kingen keele, eng' icheek che chamei Kamuktaindet, kotuitos tuguuk tugul si kobois koreu che myach eng' icheek che kigeguur ko uu magennyi." 
Romans8:29 Amu Kamuktaindet ne kisip konai icheek, ko ineendet ne kisip kolewen icheek si kogergeit ak itoondap Weeriinnyi, si koek ne po tai eng' che tupcho che chaang':" 
Romans8:30 ak icheeget che kisip kolewen, koguur chooto; ak chooto che kiguur, ko ki ityi imanda: ak chooto che kiityi imanda, ko ki itoroor." 
Romans8:31 Kimwae nee anyun eng' tuguuchuuto? Ngo mi Kamuktaindet komostanyo, ko ng'oo ne kirindaech?" 
Romans8:32 Ineendet ne ki ma riiree Weeriinnyi, ago kigon ineendet agobo acheek tugul, tos ma koonech tuguuk tugul eng' aiyebindo kobooto ineendet?" 
Romans8:33 Ng'oo ne itaami che ki lewen Kamuktaindet? Kamuktaindet ne iityin imanda; 
Romans8:34 ng'oo ineendet ne igikyin? Kristo Jeso ne kime, ee, ineendet ne ki king'eet komang'une che ki pek, ne mi eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet, ne saiywech agine." 
Romans8:35 Ibestoseech ng'oo eng' chamyetap Kristo? Nyalilda, anan pichiindo, anan usiisyet anan rubeet anan aach ngor, anan ng'oiyondit, anan rotwetap chok?" 
Romans8:36 Ko uu ye ki kisir, keele, “Kibarech peetuut komugul agobo inyee; ki kiitech ko uu keechiirek che po eng'seet.”" 
Romans8:37 Ago, ki katerterik kot kosiir eng' tuguuchu tugul eng' ineendet ne ki chamech." 
Romans8:38 Amu angen komyee ale ma imuuchi kobesyech meet, anan saboondo, anan malaikaisyek, anan pounatosyek, anan tuguuk che miitei, anan tuguuk che pwoonei, anan kimnatosyek," 
Romans8:39 anan toroorindo, anan asurto, anan kiy age tugul ne ki kiyai, eng' chamyetap Kamuktaindet, ne mi eng' Kristo Jeso Kiptaiyandennyo." 
Romans9:1 Amwae iman eng' Kristo, ma mwaei lembech, paoryani kabwaatutikyuk kobooto eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil," 
Romans9:2 ale atinye arageneet ne oo ak ng'wanindo ne ma igeesugei eng' muguleldanyu. 
Romans9:3 Amu kata amache ale king'wanita aneendet eng' Kristo agobo tupchosyekyuk, che piikyuk eng' poorto;" 
Romans9:4 che Yahudik; che ki kiyai koek lagok, che neny wo toroornatet, ak kayomisutik, ak kagoitoetap Ng'atuutyet, ak otetap Kamuktaindet, ak arorutik;" 
Romans9:5 ne chechwaak kwanisyek, ak nenywa Kristo eng' atebeetap poorto. Iberuurot koigeny Kamuktaindet, ne pou tugul. Amen." 
Romans9:6 Ago ma keele kogoek puch ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet. Amu ma Yahudik icheek tugul, che po Israel:" 
Romans9:7 ama keele lagok icheek tugul, amu kesweegap Abraham: ago, Kiguurtoe Isak keswondeng'ung'." 
Romans9:8 Nooto anyun, icheek koma lagogap poorto che lagogap Kamuktaindet; ago lagogap arorutyet che kiiti koek keswoot." 
Romans9:9 Niito anyun ko ng'olyootap arorutyet, Anyoone tuun kapkora eng' kenyiit ne nyoonei, ak kosich Sara weeriit." 
Romans9:10 Ak ma uu nooto kityo; ago ye kingo kagomanach Rebeka agine eng' agenge, nooto kwandanyo Isak -" 
Romans9:11 amu ye ki tomo kesich lagok, koyai kiy age tugul ne myee anan ne ya, si kobiit kotonon mageetap Kamuktaindet ko uu lewenet, ama po poisyonik, ago po ineendet ne kuursei," 
Romans9:12 ki kileenji ineendet, Otei ne oo ne ming'in." 
Romans9:13 Agot ko uu ye siraat, keele, Ki acham Jakobo, ago ki awech Esau." 
Romans9:14 Kimwae nee anyun? Mi ne ma po imanda eng' Kamuktaindet? Achicha, ma uu nooto." 
Romans9:15 Amu mwachin ineendet Musa koleenjin, Ariiree ineendet ne amache ariiree, ak atinye rireenetapkei eng' ineendet ne amache ariireegei." 
Romans9:16 Nooto anyun ma po ineendet ne machei, anan ineendet ne labati, ago po Kamuktaindet ne tinyei rireenetapkei." 
Romans9:17 Amu mwachin sireet Pharaoh koleenjin, “Kang'eetin amu ng'olyoondoniito ale, abartaenen kamuktaennyu, si keamdaat kainennyu eng' ng'wony komugul.”" 
Romans9:18 Nooto anyun ineendet ne machei koriiree, koriiregei, ak ne machei kouiit, kouiiti." 
Romans9:19 Ileenjino anyun, Amu nee si kota kocheeng'ei lelutyet? Amu ng'oo ne kirindoi magennyi?" 
Romans9:20 Chiichi! Ii ng'oo ne tos iwolji Kamuktaindet kiy? Tos mwachin `kiit ne ki kimimii mimiindet koleenjin, “Amu nee si iyaa ko uu ni?”" 
Romans9:21 Anan ma tinyei cheptereniot kimnateet eng' meneet, koyai eng' kebebertap menonooto tereet ne po teegisto, ak age ne ma po teegisto?" 
Romans9:22 Tos nee anyun, ngo machei Kamuktaindet kobarta nereeknatennyi, ak kong'aany kimnateennyi, komuita eng' talasyet ne oo agobo tereenik che po nereegek che nyoljin ng'emisyet:" 
Romans9:23 ak si kobiit kobarta mogornatosyegap toroornatennyi eng' tereenik che po rireenetapkei che kiga sip kochopchi telunateet," 
Romans9:24 agot acheek che ki kuurech, ma eng' Yahudik kityo, ago eng' Pororyosyek ak icheek?" 
Romans9:25 Ko uu ye mwaei agine eng' Hosea kole, “Aguure icheek piikyuk, che ki ma ko ‘piikyuk’; ak aguure ineendet chamaneet, ne ki ma ko ‘chamaneet.’ ”" 
Romans9:26 “Ak eng' olooto ole ki kimwachine, keleenji, ‘Ma oo piikyuk,’ keguure eng' olooto weeriigap Kamuktaindet ne sabei.”" 
Romans9:27 Ak ki mwa Isaiah eng' kutit ne oo agobo Israel, kole, “Agot ngo koitetap piigap Israel ko tee ng'aniegap nyanjet, kesaru che ki ng'et;" 
Romans9:28 amu yaei Kiptaiyat ng'olyoondennyi eng' ng'wony, kogees ak kotil konwagit.”" 
Romans9:29 Ak, ko uu ye kiga sip komwa Isaiah kole, “Nda ki ma pagaakwech Kiptaiyatap Lugoosyek keswoot, ta kiga kegergeitu ak Sodom, ak ta kiga keyaech keige Gomorah.”" 
Romans9:30 Kimwae nee anyun? Kimwae keele kigonor Pororyosyek imanda che ki ma kosubi imanda, nooto ko imanda ne po kayaneet:" 
Romans9:31 ago Israel, ye kingo sup ng'atuutyetap imanda, koma ityi Ng'atuutyonooto." 
Romans9:32 Amu nee? Amu ki ma cheeng' eng' kayaneet, ago ko uu eng' poisyonik. Ki riich icheek koita ne riichei piich;" 
Romans9:33 ko uu ye siraat kole, Ogeero, andoi Zion koita ne riichei piich ak rwandet ne inachi piich: Ak ne iyani ineendet koma kigoochin kolilaan." 
Romans10:1 Che kitupche, mageetap muguleldanyu ak soomennyu eng' Kamuktaindet agobo icheek ko ale kesar icheek." 
Romans10:2 Amu abaoryani agobo icheek ale tinyei kagiiletapkei agobo Kamuktaindet, ago ma eng' naet." 
Romans10:3 Amu ye ki ma nai icheek imandap Kamuktaindet, ak ye ki cheeng' kogimit nenywa, koma kogas iit imandap Kamuktaindet." 
Romans10:4 Amu Kristo kagesunetap Ng'atuutyet agoi imanda eng' age tugul ne iyani. 
Romans10:5 Amu sirei Musa kole chii ne yaei imanda, ne punu Ng'atuutyet, kosabei eng' nooto."
