Romans10:6 Ago mwaei imanda nooto po kayaneet ko uu ni, “Amemwa eng' muguleldang'ung' ile, ‘Ng'oo ne togostoi kipsengwet?’ (Nooto ko komut Kristo kochoorgei)" 
Romans10:7 anan, ‘Ng'oo ne wendi kochoortogei kebeberwegap ng'wony che looen?’ ” (Nooto ko komut Kristo kotogos eng' che ki pek.)" 
Romans10:8 Ago mwaei nee? “Neegitenen ng'olyoot, mi kuting'ung' ak mi muguleldang'ung'” nooto ko ng'olyootap kayaneet, ne ki amdoi;" 
Romans10:9 amu nging'aany eng' kuting'ung' ile Jeso ko Kiptaiyat, ak iyani eng' muguleldang'ung' ile ki ing'eet `Kamuktaindet ineendet komang'une che ki pek, kesaruun." 
Romans10:10 Amu iyani chii eng' muguleldo agoi imanda; ak ng'aanyei eng' kutit agoi saruunet. 
Romans10:11 Amu mwaei sireet kole, “Age tugul ne iyani ineendet koma kigoochin kolilaan.”" 
Romans10:12 Amu ma mi kabesyet eng' Yahudyot ak Yunanindet; amu Kiptaiyandanooto ko Kiptaiyatap tugul ak aiyeep eng' icheek tugul che kuurei ineendet. 
Romans10:13 Amu age tugul ne kuurei kainetap Kiptaiyat, kesaru." 
Romans10:14 Kuurtoi ano anyun ineendet `icheek che tomo koyan? Ak iyandoi ano ineendet `icheek che tomo kogas agobo ineendet? Ak kastoi ano ama amdoindet? 
Romans10:15 Ak amdoitoi ano, ngo ma kiyookto? Agot ko uu ye siraat kole, “Korooron ne tya keelyegap icheeget che ibu logoiywek che po poiboiyet, che po tuguuk che myach!”" 
Romans10:16 Ago ki ma kas iit tugul logoiywek che myach. Amu mwaei Isaiah kole, “Kiptaiyat, ki koyan ng'oo ng'aleekyok?”" 
Romans10:17 Nyoonei anyun kayaneet eng' kaseet, ak nyoonei kaseet eng' ng'olyootap Kristo." 
Romans10:18 Ago ateebee ale, tos ki ma kas? Ee, iman, “Ki wo tweguunennywa koyom emet komugul, ak ki pa ng'aleekwak agoi ole poochin ng'wony.”" 
Romans10:19 Ago amwae ale, tos ki ma nai Israel? Ki sip komwa Musa kole, “Andeok ng'etkonda eng' nooto ne ma pororyet; atachok eng' pororyet ne ma tinyei naet.”" 
Romans10:20 Ak nyigan miising' Isaiah, ak mwaei kole, “Ki nyoorwo icheek che ki ma cheeng'a; ki ataagu eng' icheek che ma teeba.”" 
Romans10:21 Ago mwaei agobo Israel kole, “Ki aitoochi eunekyuk eng' peetuut komugul piik che ma kase iit ak che ngelelik.”" 
Romans11:1 Amwae anyun ale, Tos ki toorta `Kamuktaindet piikyik? Achicha, ma uu nooto. Amu aa Yahudyot agane, ne po kesweegap Abraham, ne po ooreetap Benjamin." 
Romans11:2 Ki ma toorta `Kamuktaindet piikyik che kisip konai. Anan ma onai ne mwaei sireet agobo Elijah? Ko uu ye king'andoi `ineendet Yahudik eng' taitap Kamuktaindet kole," 
Romans11:3 “Kiptaiyat, ki kobar maotiguk, ak ki koluul ole ki tisiisye; ak kaang'etu aneege, ak cheeng'ei icheek saboondanyu.”" 
Romans11:4 Ago leenjin nee waluunetap Kamuktaindet? Kaatukyigei murenik eliphuusyek tisap, che ma kutung'ji Baal." 
Romans11:5 Agot ko uu nooto anyun agine eng' peetuusyechu, miitei che ng'etunotiin ko uu lewenet ne po myeeindo." 
Romans11:6 Ago ngot ko po myeeindo, koma ko po poisyonik: ngo ma uu nooto, ko mata koek `myeeindo myeeindo." 
Romans11:7 Nee anyun? Ki ma nyoor Israel nooto ki cheeng'ei; ago kinyoor lewenik, ak ki kiuuiit chuun alak:" 
Romans11:8 ko uu ye siraat kole, “Ki kogoochi `Kamuktaindet ne Toroor icheek rwondo ne nyigiis, ak koonyek che ma keerei kiy, ak iitiik che ma kasei kiy, agoi peetuuniito.”" 
Romans11:9 Mwaei Daudi kole, Ingoek meesennywa meset ak rigeito, Ak kanagutyet, ak yaaktaet eng' icheek:" 
Romans11:10 Ingoimenitu konyekwak, si ma keer kiy, Ak iyai patoikwak kogumbu kotugul." 
Romans11:11 Amwae anyun ale, Tos, kiterteryot kot kobutyo? Achicha, ma uu nooto: ago ki nyoonji yetunet Pororyosy ek eng' kabutennywa, si kobiit kogoochi icheek ng'etkonda." 
Romans11:12 Ngot koegu kabutennywa mogornatosyegap ng'wony, ak koek luseennywa mogornatosyegap Pororyosyek; kosiirei ne tya anyun nyiennywa?" 
Romans11:13 Ago ang'alaalwok okweek che oo po Pororyosyek. Ko uu ye aa kayooktoindet ne po Pororyosyek, atoroori poisyennyu:" 
Romans11:14 si agoochi ng'etkonda eng' oor age tugul icheeget che kiborto agenge, ak asaru alak eng' icheek." 
Romans11:15 Amu ngo toortaennywa ko katuiyetap, ko tos nee anyun taagetap icheek, kobatee saboondo ne mang'une che ki pek?" 
Romans11:16 Ak ngo tiliil tongoaniat, ko tiliil kiit komugul agine: ak ngo tiliil tigityot, ko tiliileen ak icheek mooriik." 
Romans11:17 Ago ngot ko ki kiiri mooriik alak, ak inyee ne ii mseitunitap timiin, ko ki kinamnyenen icheek eng' kwenunnywa, ak ki oyamde kobooto icheeget ne po tigityot ak akwaiyetap mseituni;" 
Romans11:18 mechauge ile isiire mooriik: ago, ngot ichauge, koma inyee ne igeseni tigityot, ago tigityot ne kesenin." 
Romans11:19 Imwae anyun ile, Ki kiiri mooriik, si kinamnyena." 
Romans11:20 Myee; ki kiiri icheek amu pistoennywa, ak itononi eng' kayaneng'ung'. Amelaske, ago iyweisye:" 
Romans11:21 amu ngo ki ma riiree Kamuktaindet mooriik che ki po keetoto ye kinye, koma rireenen ak inyee." 
Romans11:22 Keer anyuno myeeindo ak koroomnatetap Kamuktaindet: eng' icheek che kibutyo, ko koroomnateet; ago eng' inyee, ko myeeindap Kamuktaindet, ngitebi eng' myeeindonyi: ngo ma uu nooto ketilin aginye." 
Romans11:23 Ak ngo ma tebi icheek eng' pistoennywa, kinamdos: amu imuuchi Kamuktaindet konamnyo icheek kogeny." 
Romans11:24 Amu ngo kigetilin eng' mseituni ne po timiin eng' piteennyi, ak ki kinamnyenen mseituni ne myee ne ki ma ko po timiin eng' piteennyi: ko siirei anyun ne tya kinamnye mooriik che ki po ye kinye emdinnywa!" 
Romans11:25 Amu ma mache oegu che mongen ung'ootyoni, che kitupche, si moiityige ole oo ng'oomen eng' loseng'wong' pogei, ale kanyonji Israel uuindo eng' kebeber, agoi konyo nyiyet ne po Pororyosyek;" 
Romans11:26 ak uu nooto tuun kisaru Israel tugul: ko uu ye siraat kole, Tuun mang'une Zion Katyagindet; Ak koistoe Jakobo pistoet:" 
Romans11:27 Ak ni arorutyennyu eng' icheek, Ye tuun aiste tengekwogikwak." 
Romans11:28 Ago puunik icheek eng' okweek, amu logoiywek che myach: ago eng' ng'olyootap lewenet, ko chamanik icheek amu kwanisyek." 
Romans11:29 Amu ma tinyei ndara konunoigap Kamuktaindet ak kuursennyi. 
Romans11:30 Amu ko uu ye ki ongelelji Kamuktaindet eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto, ago nguno ko kaonyooru rireenetapkei eng' pistoennywa," 
Romans11:31 ko uu nooto ak icheek chu, ki kobistoe, si konyoor ak icheek rireenetapkei eng' rireenetapkei ne ki kiboorwok." 
Romans11:32 Amu ki koratyi Kamuktaindet tugul eng' pistoet, si kobiit koriiree tugul." 
Romans11:33 Ee tyanitu anyun ooindo ne po mogornatosyegap utaatyet ak naetap Kamuktaindet! Ak kirwoogutikyik che ma isiagaksei, ak ortinwekyik che ma cheeng'oksei!" 
Romans11:34 “Amu ng'oo ne ki konai kabwaatutigap Kiptaiyat? Anan ng'oo ne ki koek kaneetindennyi? 
Romans11:35 Anan ng'oo ne kisip kogoochi kiy, si kobiit koyaakyi ineendet kogeny?”" 
Romans11:36 Amu pou ineendet, ak kobunu ineendet ak koweekyingei ineendet, tuguuk tugul. Punjin ineendet toroornatet koigeny. Amen." 
Romans12:1 Nooto anyun che kitupche, asoomok miising', eng' rireenosyegap Kamuktaindet ale, ogoite poorwekwok koek tiseiywot ne sabei, ne tiliil, ne taachaksei eng' Kamuktaindet, nooto ko poisyeng'wong' ne nyolu." 
Romans12:2 Amoyaniegei ateptap peetuusyechu: ago ingewalak eng' kaleelitetap kabwaatutikwok, si kobiit onai komyee mageet ne myee ne po Kamuktaindet, ne tachaksei ak kogesunotkei." 
Romans12:3 Amu amwachini chii age tugul ne mi kwenung'wong', eng' myeeindo ne kigegoono, amat kobwaatkei chii kole toroor kosiir ne tee ne nyolu kobwaat; ago kobwaat ne yamei, ko uu ye ki igoochi Kamuktaindet chii age tugul karagutyetap kayaneet." 
Romans12:4 Amu agot ko uu ye ki tinyei kebeberwek che chaang' eng' poorto agenge, ama tinyei kebeberwek tugul poisyet agenge:" 
Romans12:5 ko uu nooto eng' acheek che ki chaang', kiborto agenge eng' Kristo, ak ki kebeberta age tugul ne po age." 
Romans12:6 Ak ketinye konunoik che teerchiin ko uu myeeindo ne kigegoonech, ngo maonateet, ko ongeamde ko uu ole tee kayanennyo;" 
Romans12:7 anan poisyet, ongigoochigei poisyennyo; anan ineendet ne ineetisyei, kochuljigei kaneetisyennyi;" 
Romans12:8 anan ineendet ne iteitoi, kochuljige kateitaennyi: ineendet ne igoitoi, kogoito eng' aiyebindo; ineendet ne pou, koboi kochuljigei; ineendet ne rireegei, koriiregei eng' poiboiyet." 
Romans12:9 Ingoek chamyet ne ma tinyei ng'aalseet. Wech miising' nooto ya; onamge ak ne myee. 
Romans12:10 Ochamyee eng' chamyet ne uu ne po tupchosyek; ingoiit chiito age chiito age kosiir ineendet eng' teegisto; 
Romans12:11 eng' kagiiletapkei amochoriren; ogiilgei miising' eng' mugulelwekwok, oote Kiptaiyat;" 
Romans12:12 oboiboitu eng' kamang'unet; omuitoi eng' nyalilda; ogiiljigei saaet kotugul; 
Romans12:13 otoret che tiliileen eng' tuguuk che pononi; oaiyebitu eng' toek. 
Romans12:14 Oberuur che usook; oberuur, amochup." 
Romans12:15 Oboiboitu kobooto che poiboi; oriirye kobooto che riirtos. 
Romans12:16 Oegu che tinyei kabwaatet agenge okweegei eng' okweegei. Among'asyige tuguuk che torooreen, ago onamge ak che iming'inegei. Moiityige ole oo ng'oomen eng' loseng'wong' pogei." 
Romans12:17 Amoyaakyi chii yaityo eng' yaityo. Ibwaat tuguuk che po teegisto eng' taitap piik tugul. 
Romans12:18 Ngo mugaksei eng' okweek, otebi ak piik tugul eng' kaalyeet." 
Romans12:19 Chamanichu, amoyaakte mugetuut, ago ogoochi poroindo nereegek: amu siraat kole, “Nenyu yaaktaetap mugetuut; ayaaktoi, mwaei Kiptaiyat.”" 
Romans12:20 “Ngo am rubeet punyondeng'ung', ibai; ngo am melel, inage koe; amu ye iyae ko uu nooto ko kerurukyi ng'etetyot metinnyi.”" 
Romans12:21 Ameng' koterteerin yaityet, ago iterteer yaityet eng' ne myee." 
Romans13:1 Ingogas iit chii tugul pounatosyek che eecheen: amu ma mi pounooto, kobatee ne punu Kamuktaindet; ak ki indoi Kamuktaindet chooto miitei." 
Romans13:2 Nooto anyun ineendet ne kirindoi pounateet, kobistoe ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet: ak icheek che pistoe kocheeng'jingei kirwooget." 
Romans13:3 Amu ma po pounik kamuiset eng' poisyonik che myach, ago eng' che yaach. Ak tos meiywei pounateet? Yai ne myee, si inyooru kalasunet eng' nooto;" 
Romans13:4 amu ineendet ko kiboityotap Kamuktaindet eng' inyee, ne yaei ne myee. Ago ngiyai ne ya, iywei; amu ma ibooti rotwetap chok puch: amu ineendet ko kiboityotap Kamuktaindet, yaaktaindetap mugetuut agobo nereegek eng' ineendet ne yaei yaityo." 
Romans13:5 Nooto anyun kanyool ogas iit, ma amu nereegek kityo, ago amu kabwaatet agine." 
Romans13:6 Amu ng'olyoondoniito anyun ogoitoi aisuruut agine; amu icheeget ko kiboitinigap poisyetap Kamuktaindet, che igiiljingei kotugul kioto." 
Romans13:7 Ogoochi tugul tuguuk che nyoljin: kodi eng' ineendet ne nyoljin kodi; aisuruut eng' ineendet ne nyoljin aisuruut; kaiyweisyet eng' ineendet ne nyoljin kaiyweisyet; teegisto eng' ineendet ne nyoljin teegisto. 
Romans13:8 Amobesen chii kiy age tugul, ago ochamye: amu ineendet ne chamei chiitap kokwennyi ko kagoyai kosulda Ng'atuutyet." 
Romans13:9 Amu eng' mwaonooto kimwaei keele: Amoipkei; Amerumisye; Amechoorse; Amegase myat kiy ne po chii, ago ngo mi ng'atuutyet age, kiyumi tugul eng' ng'olyoondoni, keele, Cham chiitap kokweng'ung' ko uu ole ichamdoige." 
Romans13:10 Ma yachin chamyet kiy ne ya chiitap kokwennyi: nooto anyun chamyet ko kasuldaetap Ng'atuutyet. 
Romans13:11 Ak anyun, ongen peetuusyek, ole kagoit sait ne kanyool ogosu eng' rwondo: amu kagorikyech nguno yetunet kosiir ye kingi yan eng' tai." 
Romans13:12 Neegit kosiirto kemout, kariik peetuut; nooto anyun ongireegu poisyonigap mesundeito, ak ongilaach kariigap lapkeiyet." 
Romans13:13 Ongebendoti ko uu ye nyolu, ko uu peet; ma eng' waseetapkei anan pogitet, ma eng' sokseet anan mageet ne ya, ma eng' polateet ak ng'etkong'." 
Romans13:14 Ago olach Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo, amochopchi poorto poroindo, si oyai maguutikyik." 
Romans14:1 Ago otaach ineendet ne nyalulat eng' kayaneet, ago ma si orwookyi kabwaatutikyik." 
Romans14:2 Tinyei chiito age kayaneet koam tuguuk tugul: ago ineendet ne nyalulat koamei ingweek. 
Romans14:3 Amat kosas ne amei ne ma amei; ak amat korwookyi ineendet ne ma amei, ineendet ne amei: amu kagotaach `Kamuktaindet ineendet." 
Romans14:4 Ii ng'oo inyee ne irwookyini otwogindetap chiito age? Tononi anan kobuti eng' kiptaiyandennyi. Ee, kinamei kotonon; amu imuuchi Kiptaiyat konam ineendet kotonon." 
Romans14:5 Iiti chiito age peetuut age kosiir peetuut age: iiti chiito age peetuut age tugul kogergeit. Ingonai komyee chii age tugul eng' ng'omnatennyi. 
Romans14:6 Ineendet ne riibei peetuut, koriipchin Kiptaiyat: ak ineendet ne amisyei, koamisyei eng' Kiptaiyat, amu mwachin Kamuktaindet kongoi; ak ineendet ne ma amisyei, koma amisyei eng' Kiptaiyat, ak mwachin Kamuktaindet kongoi." 
Romans14:7 Amu ma mi age eng' acheek ne sabei agobo kei, ama mi ne meei agobo kei." 
Romans14:8 Amu ngesaptosi, kesaptosi eng' Kiptaiyat, ak ngebegu, kebegu eng' Kiptaiyat: nooto anyun, ngesaptosi anan ngebegu, kebo Kiptaiyat." 
Romans14:9 Amu kime Kristo agobo niito, ak kisop, si koek Kiptaiyat ne po che ki kobek ak che saptos." 
Romans14:10 Ago inyee, ko amu nee si kirwookyi ne otupche? Anan kogeny, ko amu nee si iit ne otupche koek puch? Amu tuun kitonondosi acheek tugul eng' taitap ng'echereetap kirwooget ne po Kamuktaindet." 
Romans14:11 Amu ki kisir keele, “Ko uu ye asabe, Mwaei Kiptaiyat, ko tuun kutung'jino kutundo age tugul, ak kolas ng'elyepta age tugul Kamuktaindet.”" 
Romans14:12 Nooto anyun, tuun tetyin chii age tugul Kamuktaindet atebeennyi." 
Romans14:13 Nooto anyun, amat kota kirwookyigei kogeny: ago kaigai orwooch ko uu ni keele amat konde chii kanagut ooreetap ne tupcho, anan kiy ne igoochin kobut." 
Romans14:14 Angen, ak koanai komyee eng' Kiptaiyat Jeso, ale ma miitei kiy ne ng'wanitu ineegei: kobatee eng' ineendet ne iiti kiy kole ng'waan, kong'wanitu eng' ineendet." 
Romans14:15 Amu ngo aragen ne otupche amu amitwogik, koma iwendoti eng' chamyet. Amebar ineendet eng' amitwogiguk ne ki mechi Kristo." 
Romans14:16 Amat kemwaitae myeeindong'wong' yaityo: 
Romans14:17 amu laitornatetap Kamuktaindet koma amisyet ak eeiset, ago imanda ak kaalyeet ak poiboiyet eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Romans14:18 Amu ineendet ne otei Kristo eng' tuguuchuuto koboiboi Kamuktaindet, ak koyanjin piik." 
Romans14:19 Nooto anyun, ongisup tuguuk che yaei kaalyeet, ak tuguuk che kiteegegei acheegei eng' acheegei." 
Romans14:20 Amowechawech poisyetap Kamuktaindet eng' amitwogik. Tiliileen tuguuk tugul iman; ago ya eng' chiichooto amei eng' kanagut. 
Romans14:21 Myee ngot koma ki am panyeek, anan kee maiyek, anan keyai kiy age tugul ne inachi ne otupche." 
Romans14:22 Kayaneet ne itinye, itepte inyegei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet. Paibai ineendet ne ma tinyei ne irwookyinegei eng' kioto kagoyanjigei ineegei." 
Romans14:23 Ago ineendet ne tinyei saget, ki kikyin ngot koam, amu ma amei eng' kayaneet; ak kiit age tugul ne ma po kayaneet ko tengek." 
Romans15:1 Nooto anyun kanyoljech acheek che ki kiimeen kegesen nyalulnatetap che ma kiimeen, ama kibaibaigei acheegei." 
Romans15:2 Ingobaibai age tugul eng' acheek chiitap kokwennyi eng' nooto myee, si koteegak." 
Romans15:3 Amu ki ma ibaibaigei Kristo ineegei; ago ko uu ye ki kisir keele, kogoityo agane churisyetap icheeget che kichurin." 
Romans15:4 Amu tuguuk alak tugul che ki kisir keny ko ki kisir si kinetkei, si kenyooru kamang'unet eng' muitaet ak eng' kagaigaet ne po siruutik." 
Romans15:5 Ingogoonok anyun Kamuktaindet ne po muitaet ak kagaigaet oegu che otinye kabwaatet agenge okweegei eng' okweegei ko uu ye machei Kristo Jeso: 
Romans15:6 si kobiit otoroor Kamuktaindet ineendet Kwandap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo eng' mageet agenge ak kutit agenge. 
Romans15:7 Nooto anyun otaachkei, ko uu ye ki taachok Kristo agine, eng' toroornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Romans15:8 Amu amwae anyun ale ki keyai Kristo koek kiboityotap kamuratanet agobo imanitap Kamuktaindet, si kobiit kogimit arorutik che ki kigoochi kwanisyek," 
Romans15:9 ak si kotoroor Pororyosyek Kamuktaindet amu rireenennyi; ko uu ye ki kisir keele, Nooto anyun alasun eng' kwenutap Pororyosyek, Ak atyenji kaineng'ung'." 
Romans15:10 Ak ki mwa kogeny kole, Oboiboitu okweek Pororyosyek, kobooto piikyik." 
Romans15:11 Ak kogeny, Olasu Kiptaiyat, okweek Pororyosyek tugul; Ak ingolas piik tugul ineendet." 
Romans15:12 Ak kogeny mwaei Isaiah kole, Tuun piitu tigityotap Jesse, Ak ineendet ne tuun ng'eetei koboi Pororyosyek; Kotun imang'u ineendet Pororyosyek." 
Romans15:13 Nooto anyun, ingonyiitak Kamuktaindet ne po kamang'unet poiboiyet tugul ak kaalyeet eng' kayaneet, si kobiit otesage eng' kamang'unet, eng' kamuktaetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Romans15:14 Ak kaanai aneendet agine agobo okweek, che kitupche, ale oo nyiitootiin eng' myeeindo, oo nyiitootiin eng' naet tugul, ak kogeny, omuuchi otigongei." 
Romans15:15 Ago, asirwok agobo ng'aleek alak eng' nyiganateet ne siirei, ko uu ye abwaatwok kogeny, amu myeeindo ne ki koono Kamuktaindet," 
Romans15:16 ale aek kiboityotap Kristo Jeso eng' Pororyosyek, aboisyei eng' logoiywek che myach che po Kamuktaindet, si kobiit koek kagoitoetap Pororyosyek ne taagaksei, ko kagitabaan eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Romans15:17 Nooto anyun atinye kalasunennyu pogei eng' Kristo Jeso eng' tuguuk che tokyingei Kamuktaindet. 
Romans15:18 Amu ma kanye ang'alaal agobo tugun alak tugul kobatee chooto che ki koyai Kristo eng' anee, agobo kasetap iit ne po Pororyosyek, eng' ng'olyoot ak yaeet," 
Romans15:19 eng' kamuget ne po kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik, eng' kamuktaetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil; nooto anyun, kong'etee Jerusalem, ak komoswekyik agoi Iluriko, ko ki aamdaate komyee logoiywek che myach che po Kristo;" 
Romans15:20 ee, ayae nooto koek kiit ne atoorchinigei ale aamda logoiywek che myach, ma eng' ole kigemwae kainetap Kristo, si ma teech eng' lumeiywotap chiito age;" 
Romans15:21 ago, ko uu ye ki kisir keele, Keerei icheek, che ki ma pwanji logoiywekyik, Ak tuun naei icheek che tomo kogas." 
Romans15:22 Kigeraanya anyun konyil che chaang' si ma nyonjok: 
Romans15:23 ago ko uu ye ma atinye oldo age eng' komoswechu, ak ko uu ye atinye eng' kenyisyechu chaang' emosto ale Anyoonjok," 
Romans15:24 eng' ui tugul ye tuun awendi Spania (amu amang'u ageerok eng' pandanyu, si oyomisa eng' pandanyu, si ye tuun ngo kagoyama atebeet ne kagitebi tugul ak okweek) -" 
Romans15:25 ago nguno, awendi Jerusalem, awo aboisyechi piik che tiliileen." 
Romans15:26 Amu ki cham miising' Makedonia ak Akaia kobasyi tugun piik che ponondos eng' kwenutap che tiliileen che mi Jerusalem. 
Romans15:27 Ee, kigocham icheek miising' ng'olyoondoniito; ak icheek ko pesenikwak. Amu ngo ki keyai Pororyosyek koek yamdoik che po tuguuk che po saboon, ko kanyool ak icheek koyaakta eng' poisyet ne poisyechin eng' tuguuk che po poorto." 
Romans15:28 Ye kaagesu anyun niito, ak ang'okyi icheek logoechu, anyo abun oldang'wong' awendi Spania." 
Romans15:29 Ak angen ale, ye Anyoonjok, anyoone eng' nyiietap kaberuretap Kristo." 
Romans15:30 Asoomok miising' anyun che kitupche, eng' Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, ak eng' chamyetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ale ogiilgei kobooto eng' saautikwok che osaae Kamuktaindet agobo anee;" 
Romans15:31 si kobiit kityaacha eng' icheek che ma kase iit eng' Judea, si koek poisyennyu ne atinye agobo Jerusalem ne taagaksei eng' che tiliileen;" 
Romans15:31 si kobiit kityaacha eng' icheek che ma kase iit eng' Judea, si koek poisyennyu ne atinye agobo Jerusalem ne taagaksei eng' che tiliileen;" 
Romans15:32 si amuuch Anyoonjok eng' poiboiyet eng' mageetap Kamuktaindet, ak anyooru kamuung'et kobootok." 
Romans15:33 Ingotep Kamuktaindet ne po kaalyeet kobootok okweek tugul. Amen. 
Romans16:1 Kande eunekwok Poibe ne kitupche ne cheboityotap kaniset ne mi Kenkrea: 
Romans16:2 ale otaach ineendet eng' Kiptaiyat, ko uu ye nyoljin che tiliileen, ak otoret ineendet eng' kiit age tugul ne magenok; amu ineendet agine ko kitoretindet ne po che chaang', ak kitoreta agane." 
Romans16:3 Ogat Priska ak Aquila che ki kiboitiinik tugul eng' Kristo Jeso," 
Romans16:4 che ki chobootiin kogoito saboonwekwak agobo saboondanyu; che ma mwachini kongoi aneege, ago kobooto kanisosyek tugul che po Pororyosyek ak icheek:" 
Romans16:5 ak ogat kaniset ne mi koonnywa. Ogat Epeneto ne achame miising', ne tongoaniat ne po Kristo eng' emetap Asia." 
Romans16:6 Ogat Maria, ne kiboisyewok eng' poisyet ne oo." 
Romans16:7 Ogat Androniko ak Junia, che po ornyo, ak che kimonjororinik kobooto, che taagunotiin eng' che kiyooktoi, che ki mi eng' Kristo kotom ayan." 
Romans16:8 Ogat Ampliato ne achame miising' eng' Kiptaiyat. 
Romans16:9 Ogat Urbano kiboityondennyu ne kiboisyei tugul eng' Kristo, ak Stako ne achame." 
Romans16:10 Ogat Apele ne chamat eng' Kristo. Ogat icheek che po kootap Aristobulo. 
Romans16:11 Ogat Herodion ne po ornyo. Ogat icheek che po kootap Narkiso, che mi eng' Kiptaiyat." 
Romans16:12 Ogat Truphena ak Truphosa, che poisyei eng' Kiptaiyat. Ogat Persis chamaneet, ne kibois miising' eng' Kiptaiyat." 
Romans16:13 Ogat Rupo ne lewenot eng' Kiptaiyat, ak kamet ne kamennyu agane." 
Romans16:14 Ogat Asunkrito, ak Plegon, ak Herme ak Patroba, ak Herma, ak tupchosyek che mi kobooto icheek." 
Romans16:15 Ogat Pilologo ak Julia, ak Nereo ak chepkamet, ak Olumpa, ak che tiliileen tugul che mi kobooto icheek." 
Romans16:16 Ogatkei eng' ng'ututet ne tiliil. Igatok kanisosyek tugul che po Kristo. 
Romans16:17 Kasoomok anyun che kitupche, ale ogeer icheek che ing'eeti kabesyosyek ak kanagutik, che ma namegei ak kaneetisyet ne ki oneetkei: ak koistoegei icheek." 
Romans16:18 Amu icheeget che uu chooto, ko maotei Kiptaiyandennyo Kristo, ago otei mootinwekwak; ak kong'alei mugulelwegap che libwoben eng' ng'aleekwak che tangusen ak che po chemwaigutnateet." 
Romans16:19 Amu ki kogasak eng' piik tugul kaseng'wong' po iit. Nooto anyun abaibai eng' okweek: ago amache oeguche utaatiin eng' nooto myee, ak oegu che perber eng' nooto po yaityet." 
Romans16:20 Ak tuun tuei Kamuktaindet ne po kaalyeet Setani eng' keelyekwok ko neegit. Ingotep kobootok myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo. 
Romans16:21 Igatok Timoteo ne kiboityot kobooto; ak Lukio ak Jason ak Sosipatros, che po ornyo." 
Romans16:22 Anee Tertio ne kasirei parwaani, agatok eng' Kiptaiyat." 
Romans16:23 Igatok Gaio ne ami koonnyi, ak kaniset komugul. Igatook Erasto riibindetap tuguugap nganaseet, ak Kuarto ne tupcho." 
Romans16:24 Ingotep kobootok tugul myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo. Amen. 
Romans16:25 Nguno eng' ineendet ne imuuchi kogimitok ko uu logoiywekyuk che myach ak amdaetap Jeso Kristo, ko uu ng'ang'utyet ne po ung'oot ne ki kagiuny kosiis kobooch peetuusyek che po koigeny," 
Romans16:26 ago kagong'ang'ak nguno, ak eng' siruutik che po maotik, ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet ne po koigeny, ko kagiboorchi pororyosyek tugul agoi kasetap iit ne po kayaneet;" 
Romans16:27 po Kamuktaindet ne utaat ineegei toroornatet koigeny, eng' Jeso Kristo. Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Paulo, ne ki kiguur koek kayooktoindet ne po Kristo Jeso eng' mageetap Kamuktaindet, ak Sosten tupchennyo," 
1Corinthians1:2 kisirchini kanisetap Kamuktaindet ne miitei Korinto, icheek che ki kitabaan eng' Kristo Jeso, che ki kiguur koek che tiliileen, kobooto tugul che kuurei kainetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo eng' komosta age tugul, Kiptaiyannyo ak ko nenywa." 
1Corinthians1:3 Ingotep kobootok myeeindo ak kaalyeet ne punu Kamuktaindet Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo. 
1Corinthians1:4 Amwachini Kamuktaindet nenyu kongoi kotugul agobo okweek, amu myeeindap Kamuktaindet ne ki kigoonok eng' Kristo Jeso;" 
1Corinthians1:5 amu kigeyaak oegu mogoreek miising' eng' ineendet eng' kiy age tugul, eng' ng'aleek tugul, ak naet tugul;" 
1Corinthians1:6 ko uu ye ki kigimit paornateetap Kristo eng' okweek: 
1Corinthians1:7 si moletu eng' konunotyot age tugul; ogeni ng'ang'utyetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo. 
1Corinthians1:8 Ne igimitok agine agoi let, ko motinye kiy ne kirwoogunenok eng' peetuutap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo;" 
1Corinthians1:9 Kamuktaindet ko ne kiyani, kigeguurok eng' ineendet obwonji yamdaetap Weeriinnyi Jeso Kristo Kiptaiyandennyo." 
1Corinthians1:10 Asoomok miising' anyun, che kitupche, eng' kainetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, ale, omwa tugul kiit agenge, si ma piit pesyosyek eng' kwenung'wong'; ago si oegu che ititaatiin kibagenge eng' kabwaatet agenge ak eng' kirwooget agenge." 
1Corinthians1:11 Amu ki komwoiwo icheek che mi kootap Kloe agobo okweek, tupchosyekyuk, kole mi toiyasyek kwenung'wong'." 
1Corinthians1:12 Ki it anyun ne amwae ko ni, ale, mwaei age tugul eng' okweek, kole, “Aa po Paulo,” kole age “Aa po Apolo,” kole age “Aa po Kepha,” ak kole age “Aa po Kristo.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Tos pcheat Kristo? Tos ki kigartatwok Paulo? Anan ki kibatisanjok kainetap Paulo? 
1Corinthians1:14 Amwachini Kamuktaindet kongoi amu ma abatisan chii eng' okweek, kobatee Krispo ak Gaio," 
1Corinthians1:15 si ma mwa chii age tugul kole ki kibatisanjok kainennyu. 
1Corinthians1:16 Nga ki abatisan che po kootap Stephana ak icheek: mangen kogeny, ngo kita abatisan chii age." 
1Corinthians1:17 Amu ma iyookwo Kristo abatisanis, ago aamda logoiywek che myach: ma eng' utaatyet ne po ng'aleek, si ma ki yai kimurtoiyotap Kristo koek puch." 
1Corinthians1:18 Amu perberyo ng'olyootap kimurtoiyot eng' icheeget che lustos; ago eng' acheek che kisaru ko kimnateetap Kamuktaindet. 
1Corinthians1:19 Amu ki kisir keele, Ang'eme utaatyet che utaatiin, Ak aeesyoi kaguiyetap icheeget che iguitos." 
1Corinthians1:20 Mi ano ne utaat? Mi ano siriindet? Mi ano kiptiyotyot ne po kenyisyechu? Tos ma yai Kamuktaindet ng'omnatetap ng'wonyuni koberberit? 
1Corinthians1:21 Amu eng' utaatyet ne po Kamuktaindet koma nai ng'wony Kamuktaindet eng' utotyennyi, ki cham Kamuktaindet kosar icheeget che iyani, eng' perberyo ne po ng'olyoot ne ki amdoi." 
1Corinthians1:22 Amu soomei Yahudik kaboorunoik, ak cheeng'ei Yunanik utaatyet:" 
1Corinthians1:23 ago ki amdoi acheek Kristo ne ki kigartaat, ne kanagutyet eng' Yahudik, ak ko perberyo eng' Pororyosyek;" 
1Corinthians1:24 ago eng' icheek che ki kiguur, Yahudik kobooto Yunanik, Kristo ko kamuktaetap Kamuktaindet, ak utaatyetap Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians1:25 Amu perberyo ne po Kamuktaindet ko utaat kosiir utaatyetap piik; ak nyalulnatetap Kamuktaindet ko kiim kosiir ne po piik. 
1Corinthians1:26 Amu, ogeer kuurseng'wong', tupchosyechu, ole ma kiguur che chaang' che utaatiin eng' atebeetap poorto, anan che chaang' che kiimeen, ama che chaang' che taagunotiin:" 
1Corinthians1:27 ago ki lewen Kamuktaindet tuguuk che perber che po ng'wony, si kogoochi kalilanet che utaatiin; ak ki lewen Kamuktaindet tuguuk che nyalulyotin che po ng'wony, si kogoochi kalilanet tuguuk che kiimeen;" 
1Corinthians1:28 ak ki lewen Kamuktaindet tuguuk che ma taagunotiin che po ng'wony, ak tuguuk che kisasei, ak tuguuk che ma miitei, si kowal koek puch tuguuk che miitei:" 
1Corinthians1:29 si mat koloskei chii age tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet. 
1Corinthians1:30 Ago oo po ineendet okweek eng' Kristo Jeso, ne ki kiyai eng' Kristo Jeso, ne ki kiyai eng' acheek koek utaatyet ne punu Kamuktaindet, ak imanda, ak tiliilindo, ak katyaget:" 
1Corinthians1:31 si koek, ko uu ye ki kisir keele, “Ineendet ne ilasugei, ko ingoloskei eng' Kiptaiyat.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Ak ye ki Anyoonjok tupchosyechu, ko ki ma anyoo eng' anyinyindap ng'alaalet anan ne po utaatyet, anyoo aboorwok ung'ootyetap Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians2:2 Amu ki abegechi ale ma mache anai kiy age tugul eng' kwenung'wong' kobatee Jeso Kristo, ineendet ne ki kigartaat." 
1Corinthians2:3 Ki ami kobootok eng' nyalulet, ak eng' kaiyweisyet, ak eng' potanet ne oo." 
1Corinthians2:4 Ak ng'alaalennyu ak ng'olyoondennyu ne ki aamdoi ko ki ma ko ng'aleegap kagaigaet che po utaatyet, ago eng' kaboorunetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak ne po kamuktaet:" 
1Corinthians2:5 si ma tonone kayaneng'wong' utaatyetap piik, ago eng' kamuktaetap Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians2:6 Ago kimwae utaatyet eng' kwenutap che ititaatiin: ago utaatyet ne ma po peetuusyechu, anan ne po pounigap peetuusyechu, che machei koek puch:" 
1Corinthians2:7 ago kimwae utaatyetap Kamuktaindet eng' ung'ootyet, nooto ne kigeuny, ne kiga sip kong'at Kamuktaindet agobo toroornatennyo ye kitom kobiit ng'wony:" 
1Corinthians2:8 ne manaei agot agenge eng' pounik che po peetuusyechu: amu nda kiga nai, ta ki ma kogartati Kiptaiyatap toroornatet:" 
1Corinthians2:9 ago ko uu ye ki kisir keele, “Ma mi kong' ne ki kogeer, anan it ne ki kogas, anan muguleldap chii ne kigoguiyo, tuguuk tugul che kichopchi `Kamuktaindet icheeget che chamei ineendet.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Ago king'ang'wech Kamuktaindet eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil: amu isyachi Kabuuset ne Tiliil tuguuk tugul, agot tuguuk che po oriit che po Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians2:11 Amu tos ng'oo chii ne ingen tuguugap chii kobatee muguleldap chiichooto ne miitei ineendet? Ko uu nooto ma mi chii ne ingen tuguugap Kamuktaindet, kobatee Kabuuset ne po Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians2:12 Ago ki ma kitaach kabuuset ne po ng'wony, ago Kabuuset ne po Kamuktaindet, si kenai tuguuk che ki kogoonech Kamuktaindet puch." 
1Corinthians2:13 Tuguuchooto ak icheek che kimwae, ko ma kimwae eng' ng'aleek che ineeti utaatyetap chii, ago che ineeti Kabuuset ne Tiliil; ki poisyee Kabuuset ne Tiliil asi kiguiyo tuguugap saboon." 
1Corinthians2:14 Ma taachei chiito ne mi eng' atebeetap poorto tuguuk che po Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet: amu perberyo eng' ineendet; ak temenee koobeesyo tuguuchooto, amu naoksei eng' toretetap Kabuuset." 
1Corinthians2:15 Ago ineendet ne mi eng' atebeetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil kobestos tuguuk tugul, ago ma mi chii ne ibestos ole teptoi chiichooto." 
1Corinthians2:16 Amu ng'oo ne ki konai kabwaatutigap Kiptaiyat, si kobiit koneet ineendet? Ago ki tinyei acheek kabwaatutigap Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:1 Ki temena anyun, che kitupche, ang'alaalwok ko uu piik che mi eng' atebeetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ago ko uu piik che mi eng' atebeetap poorto, ko uu che manyurunik eng' Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:2 Ki aguenak cheego, ma abaenak amitwogik che uueen; amu kitom omuuch; achicha, agot nguno kotom omuuch;" 
1Corinthians3:3 amu ta omi eng' atebeetap poorto: amu ko uu ye mi kwenung'wong' ng'etkonda ak pooryeet, tos ma mi eng' atebeetap poorto, ak obendoti ko uu piteetap piik?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Amu ye mwaei age kole, “Aa po Paulo” ak koleen age, “Aa po Apolo,” tos ma oo piik?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Nee anyun Apolo? Ko nee Paulo? Kiboitiinik che ki koonok oyan; ak ko uu ye ki igoochi Kiptaiyat age tugul. 
1Corinthians3:6 Ki agoole, kobisi Apolo; ago ki ibit Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians3:7 Nooto anyun ma tilei kiy ne koolei, anan ne ibisi; ago Kamuktaindet ne ibiiti." 
1Corinthians3:8 Nooto anyun, ineendet ne koolei ak ineendet ne ibisi ko agenge: ago tuun nyooru age tugul melektanyi ineegei ko uu poisyennyi." 
1Corinthians3:9 Amu ki kiboitinigap Kamuktaindet che kiboisyei kobooto ineendet: okweek ko oo mbareetap Kamuktaindet, kootap Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians3:10 Ki alumde lumeiywot ko uu teegindet ne oo ne ng'oom, ko uu myeeindap Kamuktaindet ne ki kigoono; ak teechei chiito age paragunnyi. Ago ingoriip chii age tugul ole teektoi eng' paragunnyi." 
1Corinthians3:11 Amu ma mi lumeiywot age ne imuuchi chii kolumda kobatee nooto kigelum, nooto Jeso Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:12 Ago ngo teech chii paragutap lumeiywondonooto eng' thahabu, fedha, koik che po kamanuutyet ne oo, keetiik, susweek, mobeek;" 
1Corinthians3:13 tuun king'aanyei poisyetap chii age tugul: amu tuun ng'aanyei peetuut, amu king'aanyei eng' maat; ak kotyem matole teptoi poisyetap chii age tugul." 
1Corinthians3:14 Ngo tebi poisyetap chii age tugul ne ki teech paragunnyi, kotaachei ineendet melekto." 
1Corinthians3:15 Ngo lal poisyetap chii age tugul, kobetos tuguukyik: ago kisaru ineendet; ago ko uu ye kisaru eng' maat." 
1Corinthians3:16 Mongen okweek ole oo Hekaluut ne po Kamuktaindet, ak menyok Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Ak ngo ng'em chii age tugul Hekaluut ne po Kamuktaindet, kotun ng'emei `Kamuktaindet ineendet; amu tiliil Hekaluut ne po Kamuktaindet, okweek hekaluunooto." 
1Corinthians3:18 Amat koberbergei chii. Ngo pwaati chii age tugul eng' kwenung'wong' kole utaat eng' peetuusyechu, ko ingoek ne perber, si kobiit koek ne utaat." 
1Corinthians3:19 Amu ng'omnateet ne po ng'wonyuni ko perberyo eng' Kamuktaindet. Amu ki kisir keele, “Ineendet ne namei che utaatiin eng' ng'aalseennywa;”" 
1Corinthians3:20 ak kogeny, “Ingen Kiptaiyat kabwaatutigap che utaatiin, kole puch.”" 
1Corinthians3:21 Nooto anyun amat koloskei chii eng' piik. Amu tuguuk tugul ko chekwok; 
1Corinthians3:22 ngo Paulo, anan Apolo, anan Kepha, anan meet, anan tuguuk che miitei, anan tuguuk che pwoonei; tugul ko chekwok;" 
1Corinthians3:23 ak oo po Kristo; ak Kristo ko po Kamuktaindet. 
1Corinthians4:1 Ingoitech anyun chii kole ki kiboitinigap Kristo, ak riibiik che po ung'ootigap Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians4:2 Eng' yuto anyun kogeny, kemage riibiik keele koek chii age tugul ne kiyani." 
1Corinthians4:3 Ago kiit ne ming'in miising' eng' anee ale ogina okweek, anan eng' kirwoogetap chii: ee, ma kinegei aneege." 
1Corinthians4:4 Amu mangenjigei kiy: ago ma kiityina imanda eng' nooto: ago ineendet ne kina ko Kiptaiyat. 
1Corinthians4:5 Nooto anyun amat orwookyi kiy kotom koit peetuut, agoi konyo Kiptaiyat. Inee ne tuun ng'aanyei tuguuk che ung'ootiin che po mesundeito ak kobarta kabwaatutik che po mugulelwek; si konyoor chii age tugul anyun kalasunennyi eng' Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians4:6 Nguno anyun che kitupche, kaayai tuguuchu koek kayaniet eng' anee ak Apolo agobo okweek; si kobiit oneetenechkei acheek si mosiir tuguuk che sirootin; si ma menegei chii agobo chii age, kotil let chiito age." 
1Corinthians4:7 Amu tos ng'oo ne kayain iegu ne teer? Ak nee ne itinye inyee ne ki ma itaach? Ago ngo kiitaache, ko amu nee si ilasugei, ko uu ye ki ma itaache?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Oo nyiitootiin, kooegu mogore, koobou ama kimi: ee, achame ale obou, si kobiit kebou agacheek kobootok." 
1Corinthians4:9 Amu, aleen, ki kondaech Kamuktaindet acheek che kiyooktoi keegu che po let eng' tugul, ko uu piik che ki kirwookyi kobek, amu kigeyaech keegu che kigeerei eng' ng'wony, ak eng' malaikaisyek, ak eng' piik." 
1Corinthians4:10 Ki che perberen acheek amu Kristo, ago oo utaatiin eng' Kristo; kinyalulyotin acheek, ago oo kiimeen; otinye teegisto okweek, ago ma teechech chii." 
1Corinthians4:11 Agot sainiito ketinye rubeet ak melelda ak kimi aach ngor ak kiluiluchech, ama ki tinyei ole ki menye;" 
1Corinthians4:12 ak kibirtoigei, keboisyee eunekyok: ye king'emwech kuut, kiberuur; ye kiuseech, kemuitoi;" 
1Corinthians4:13 ye kimwaitaenech yaityo, kigoigoi: kiyaech kegergeitu ak pusagaryegap ng'wony, tuguuk che kibuktoi che kilaktoi, agoi nguno." 
1Corinthians4:14 Ma sire tuguuchu ale si olilanse, ago si atigoonok ko uu lagokyuk che achame." 
1Corinthians4:15 Nga ndotinye riibiik eliphuusyek taman eng' Kristo, ko motinye kwanisyek che chaang': amu ki asichok eng' Kristo Jeso eng' logoiywek che myach." 
1Corinthians4:16 Nooto anyun asoomok ale oegu kasupiikyuk. 
1Corinthians4:17 Kaayokwok anyun Timoteo amu ng'olyoondoniito, ne ineendet ko lakweennyu ne achame ak iyani, eng' Kiptaiyat, ne nyoonei kabwaatwok ortinwekyuk che mi eng' Kristo, ko uu ye aneetoti komosta age tugul eng' kaniset age tugul." 
1Corinthians4:18 Mendos alak anyun, koleen abeere manyonjinok." 
1Corinthians4:19 Ago neegit Anyoonjok, ngo cham Kiptaiyat; ak aguiye, ma ng'olyootap icheek che meniotin, ago kamugennywa." 
1Corinthians4:20 Amu laitornatetap Kamuktaindet koma eng' ng'olyoot, ago eng' kamuget." 
1Corinthians4:21 Nee ne omache anyun? Anyoonjok ak kirokto, anan eng' chamyet ak muguleldap talasyet?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Mwaat komyee keele miitei ibeetapkei kwenung'wong', ibeetapkei ne ma mi agot eng' Pororyosyek, keele ibegei chii ak osotyotap kwandanyi." 
1Corinthians5:2 Ak omendosi, ama agot oaragense, si kobiit keisto eng' kwenung'wong' ineendet ne ki yai kioto." 
1Corinthians5:3 Amu anee iman, ko mamite eng' poorto, ago amite eng' saboon, kaarwookyi anyun ineendet ne ki yai kiito ko uu nooto, ko uu ye amite," 
1Corinthians5:4 ye koyumge eng' kainetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso, kobooto saboondanyu, ak kamuktaetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso," 
1Corinthians5:5 ogoochi Setani chiito ne uu nooto si keng'em poorto, si tuun kesar saboondanyi eng' peetuutap Kiptaiyat Jeso." 
1Corinthians5:6 Ma karaaran kalasuneng'wong' pogei. Tos mongen ole igutu mermereek tutigin kererutyet komugul? 
1Corinthians5:7 Ounde mermereek che po keny, si kobiit oegu kererutyet ne leel, ko uu ye ma mi mermereek eng' okweek. Amu kigeeny agine arwennyo ne po Paska, nooto ko Kristo:" 
1Corinthians5:8 nooto anyun ongeriip igoorto, ma eng' mermereek che po keny, anan eng' mermeregap yaityet ak tengekto, ago eng' magatyat ne ma kinde mermereek che ma tinyei keniisyet ak po iman." 
1Corinthians5:9 Ki asirwak eng' parweennyu ale amonamge ak piik che soksei; 
1Corinthians5:10 ma mwaei ale otabaanegei miising' che soksei che po ng'wonyuni, anan kipkeinik anan rebiik, anan che saaei kanamonik; amu nda uu nooto ta kanyooljok omande eng' ng'wony:" 
1Corinthians5:11 ago nguno asirwok, ale amonamge ak chii age tugul ne kiguure tupchet, ne soksei, anan kipkeiyat, anan ne saaei kanamonik, anan ne chubisyei, anan kibogityot, anan rebindet; amat oamjine ak chiito ne uu nooto, achicha." 
1Corinthians5:12 Amu amage nee arwookyi icheek che miitei saang'? Tos morwookyini okweek icheek che miitei ko? 
1Corinthians5:13 Ago icheek che miitei saang' korwookyin Kamuktaindet chooto. Oiste anyun chiichooto sogoran eng' kwenung'wong'. 
1Corinthians6:1 Tos kanyei age tugul eng' okweek ne ting'ee ng'olyoo chiitap kokwennyi kwo kapkirwook eng' taitap che ma po iman, ama eng' taitap che tiliileen?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Anan mongen ole tuun irwookyin piik che tiliileen ng'wony? Ak ngot kotun orwookyini ng'wony, ko tos ma nyoljinok orwooch agobo tuguuk che mengeechen?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Tos mongen ole tuun kirwookyin malaikaisyek? Siirei anyun ne tya, tuguuk che po sabooni!" 
1Corinthians6:4 Ngot otinye ole kirwookyine tuguuk che po sabooni, ko tos ondoi koek kirwoogik icheek che ma kiiti keele kiy eng' kaniset?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Amwae ni si agoonok olilanse. Tos iman, ma mi chii ne utaat eng' kwenung'wong' ne imuuchi kotil ng'aleek eng' kwenutap tupchosyekyik," 
1Corinthians6:6 ago imuti tupchet age tupchennyi kwo kapkirwook, ak ne siirei ko, eng' taitap che ma iyanotin?" 
1Corinthians6:7 Achicha, kagoek nguno leluut eng' okweek, amu orwookyinige okweegei. Amu nee si mochamdegei kinyalilaak? Kalya si mochamdegei kerebenak tuguuk?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Achicha, ago, okweeget che oyae ne ya, ak orebisyei, agot eng' tupchosyek." 
1Corinthians6:9 Anan mongen ole ma tuun nyooru icheeget che ma po iman laitornatetap Kamuktaindet? Amat kiberberak: ma mi eng' che soksei, anan che saaei kanamonik, anan che ibegei, anan chemuulkwonyiik, anan chemogorgoinik," 
1Corinthians6:10 anan chooriik, anan kipkeinik, anan kibogitinik, anan che chubisyei, anan rebiik, che nyooru laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians6:11 Ak ki uu chooto alak eng' okweek; ago ki kiuunok, ago ki kitabaanak, ago ki kiityok imanda eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo, ak eng' Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet nenyo." 
1Corinthians6:12 Chamdaat tuguuk tugul eng' anee; ago ma tuguuk tugul che nyolu. Chamdaat tuguuk tugul eng' anee; ago ma mache koboiywa age tugul eng' chooto. 
1Corinthians6:13 Po amitwogik moet, ak po moet amitwogik; ago tuun yaei Kamuktaindet tuwai koek puch, moet ak amitwogik. Ago poorto, koma po sokseet, ago po Kiptaiyat; ak Kiptaiyat, ko po poorto;" 
1Corinthians6:14 ak ki ing'eet `Kamuktaindet Kiptaiyat, ak tuun ing'eetech ak acheek eng' kamuktaennyi." 
1Corinthians6:15 Tos mongen ole poorwekwok ko kebeberwegap Kristo? Ara anyun aiste kebeberwegap Kristo, ak ayai koek kebeberwegap chepkugoniot? Achicha, ma uu nooto." 
1Corinthians6:16 Anan, tos mongen ole ineendet ne ituitoskei ak chepkugoniot ko poorto agenge? Amu, mwaei ineendet kole, “Egu tuwai poorto agenge.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 Ago ineendet ne ituitoskei ak Kiptaiyat ko kabuuset agenge. 
1Corinthians6:18 Omwee ibeetapkei. Tengek age tugul ne yaei chii komiitei saang'utap poorto; ago ineendet ne yaei ibeetapkei koyachin poortanyi tengekto. 
1Corinthians6:19 Anan, tos mongen ole poorwekwok ko Hekaluut ne po Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne miitei eng' okweek, ne otinye eng' Kamuktaindet? Ama oo pogei okweegei;" 
1Corinthians6:20 amu ki kialenak kamanuutyet: otoroor Kamuktaindet anyun eng' poorwekwok. 
1Corinthians7:1 Nguno anyun agobo tuguuk che ki osirwa: ko myee eng' muren ama twa kobogoryo. 
1Corinthians7:2 Ago, amu ng'olyootap soksosyek, ko ingotebi chii age tugul ak osotyonnyi, ak ingotebi osotyot age tugul ak manong'otyondennyi." 
1Corinthians7:3 Ingogoochi manong'otyot osotyonnyi ko uu ye nyoljin: ak ko uu nooto agine osotyot eng' manong'otyot. 
1Corinthians7:4 Ma tinyei osotyot ineegei kamugo eng' poortanyi, ago manong'otyot: ak ko uu nooto agine manong'otyot, ma tinyei kamugo eng' poortanyi, ago osotyot." 
1Corinthians7:5 Amoetegei okweegei, kobatee ye kochamyechi eng' peetuusyek alak, si onyooru poroindo ne po saaet, si otuiyegei kogeny, si ma yoomaak Setani amu motinye riibetapkei." 
1Corinthians7:6 Ago amwae ni amu chamjinet, ma ng'atuutyet." 
1Corinthians7:7 Ago kata achame koigei piik tugul anee. Ago tinyei chii age tugul konunennyi ne punu Kamuktaindet, age ko uu ni, ak age ko uu no." 
1Corinthians7:8 Ago amwachini che tomo kotunis ak mosoogik, aleenjini, myee eng' icheek ngo tebi ko uu anee." 
1Corinthians7:9 Ago ngo ma tinyei riibetapkei, ko ingotunis icheek: amu kaigai kotunis kosiir mageet ne lalei." 
1Corinthians7:10 Ago ang'ate che ki kotungei ago ma anee, ago Kiptaiyat ale, Amat kobagaakta osotyot manong'otyondennyi" 
1Corinthians7:11 (ago ngot kometo, komat kitun, anan kogasyin ak manong'otyondennyi); ak amat kometo manong'otyot osotyonnyi." 
1Corinthians7:12 Ago amwachini piik alak, ago ma Kiptaiyat, ale, ngo tinyei ne ketupche age tugul osotyot ne ma iyanaat, ak kochamei kotebi ak ineendet, komat kometo." 
1Corinthians7:13 Ak kobogoryot ne tinyei manong'otyot ne ma iyanaat, ak kochamei kotebi ak ineendet, ko mat kometo manong'otyondennyi." 
1Corinthians7:14 Amu kitiliili manong'otyot ne ma iyanaat eng' osotyot, ak kitiliili osotyot ne ma iyanaat eng' manong'otyot: nda ma uu nooto ta ma tiliileen lagokwok; ago tiliileen icheek nguno." 
1Corinthians7:15 Ago ngwo ne ma iyanaat, ko ingwo: ma rataat ne ketupche mureno anan kwony eng' ng'aleek che uu chu: ago ki kuurech Kamuktaindet eng' kaalyeet." 
1Corinthians7:16 Amu inaitoi ano inyee, ee, osotyondoni, ngo tos mesuru manong'otyondeng'ung'? Anan inaitoi ano inyee, ee manong'otyondoni, ngo tos mesaru osotyondeng'ung'?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Ago, ko uu ye kigopchechi Kiptaiyat chii age tugul, ko uu ye kigoguur Kamuktaindet age tugul, ingotebi ko uu nooto. Ak ang'ate anyun ko uu nooto eng' kanisosyek tugul." 
1Corinthians7:18 Tos ki kiguur chii age tugul ko kagimuratan? Ko mat koigei ne tomo kimuratan. Tos ki kiguur chii age tugul kotom kimuratan? Ko mat kota kimuratan. 
1Corinthians7:19 Ma kiy kamuratanet, ak ngo ma kimuratan koma kiy; ago keriip ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians7:20 Ingotep chii age tugul ko uu ole kiteptoi ye ki ngeguurei. 
1Corinthians7:21 Tos ki kiguurin ko ii otwogin? Ko mat iimgei, ago ngimuuchi ityagage, ko myee iboisye." 
1Corinthians7:22 Amu ineendet ne ki kiguur eng' Kiptaiyat, ko otwogin, ko chiito ne ityagat ne po Kiptaiyat: ko uu nooto, ineendet ne ki kiguur kotyagat, ko otwogetap Kristo." 
1Corinthians7:23 Ki kialaak eng' kamanuutyet; amat oegu otwogigap piik. 
1Corinthians7:24 Tupchosyechu, ingotep chii age tugul ak Kamuktaindet ko uu ole kiteptoi ye ki ngeguurei." 
1Corinthians7:25 Ma tinyei anyun ng'atuut eng' Kiptaiyat agobo pergeinik: ago amwae ko uu ole ageertoi, ko uu chii ne kigonyoor rireenetap Kiptaiyat aek ne kiyani." 
1Corinthians7:26 Abwaati anyun ale myee niito, amu pichiindo ne miitei nguno, ale myee kotep chii ko uu ole teptoi nguno." 
1Corinthians7:27 Tos kigeratyin osotyot? Mecheeng' kityaachin. Tos ityagat eng' osotyot? Mecheeng' anyun osotyot. 
1Corinthians7:28 Ago ngot itunisye, koma iyai leeluut; ak ngitun pergeiya, koma yai ineendet leeluut. Ago nyooru che uu chooto nyalilda eng' poorwek: ak amache ale si moiimge." 
1Corinthians7:29 Ago amwae ni, anyun, che kitupche, ale, kagonwagitu peetuusyek; si kotebi, kobooch nguno, che tinyei osotik ko uu che ma tinyei;" 
1Corinthians7:30 ak icheeget che riirtos, koigei che marirtos; ak icheeget che poiboen, koigei che ma poiboen; ak icheeget che alisyei, koigei che ma tinyei kiy;" 
1Corinthians7:31 ak icheeget che poisyee ng'wony, koigei che ma poisye miising': amu siirtoi itoondap ng'wonyuni." 
1Corinthians7:32 Amu amache ale otyagage eng' kaimutik. Ineendet ne ma itunis kochirchirenjin tuguuk che po Kiptaiyat, ole imuuchi kobaibaita Kiptaiyat:" 
1Corinthians7:33 ago ineendet ne ki kotunis kochirchirenjin tuguuk che po ng'wony, ole imuuchi kobaibaita osotyonnyi." 
1Corinthians7:34 Ak mi teerchinet agine eng' osotyot ak pergeiyat. Ineendet ne ma kitun kochirchirenjin tuguugap Kiptaiyat, si koek ne tiliil eng' poorto ak eng' saboondo; ago ineendet ne ki kitun kochirchirenjin tuguugap ng'wony, ole imuuchi kobaibaita manong'otyondennyi." 
1Corinthians7:35 Amwae niito anyun agobo keluneng'wong'; ma si atoorchok mesteet, ago agobo nooto ne nyolu, si kobiit ochuuljige Kiptaiyat ko motinye kiy ne iimok." 
1Corinthians7:36 Ago ngo pwaati chii age tugul kole ma yachin pergeiyandennyi ne nyolu, ak ngo kagosiirto karaaranindap ming'inatennyi, ak ngo mi kiy ne nyoljin, koyai ko uu ye machei; ma yai tengek; ingotungei." 
1Corinthians7:37 Ago ineendet ne lumdaatkei eng' muguleldanyi, koma tinyei pirchino, ago imuuchi koboi maguutikyik, ak kagotil ko uu niito eng' muguleldanyi, koriip pergeiyandennyi, ko kayai ne myee." 
1Corinthians7:38 Nooto anyun, ineendet ne igoitoi pergeiyandennyi kitun koyaei ne myee; ak ineendet ne ma igoito kitun koyaei ne myee kosiir." 
1Corinthians7:39 Ratat osotyot kota kosabei manong'otyondennyi: ago ngo me manong'otyot, kotyagat ineendet kotun chiito ne kacham mosoganooto: eng' Kiptaiyat kityo." 
1Corinthians7:40 Ago paibai kosiir ngo tep ko uu ye konye, ko uu ye abwaati: ak aleen atinye agane Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians8:1 Nguno anyun agobo tuguuk che kieng'jin kanamonik: kingen keele ki tinyei acheek tugul naet. Menei naet, ago teeksei chamyet." 
1Corinthians8:2 Ngo leen chii age tugul ingen kiy age tugul, ko tomo konai ko uu ye kanyool konai;" 
1Corinthians8:3 ago ngo chamei chii age tugul Kamuktaindet, konaat chiichooto eng' ineendet." 
1Corinthians8:4 Nooto anyun eng' ameet ne po tuguuk che kieng'jin kanamonik, kingen keele ma mi kanamwet ne kiy eng' ng'wony, ama mi Kamuktaindet age kobatee agenge." 
1Corinthians8:5 Amu agot nganda miitei che keguure kamuktaik, ngo eng' kipsengwet, anan eng' ng'wony; ko uu ye miitei kamuktaik che chaang', ak kiptainik che chaang';" 
1Corinthians8:6 ago eng' acheek komiitei Kamuktaindet agenge, ineendet Kwanda, ne punu tuguuk tugul ak acheek eng' ineendet; ak Kiptaiyat agenge, Jeso Kristo, ne mi tuguuk tugul amu ineendet, ak acheek eng' ineendet." 
1Corinthians8:7 Ago ma mi naonooto eng' piik tugul: ago ko uu ye ki konerta alak kanamonik agoi nguno, koamei ko uu kiit ne kagieng'ji kanamwet; ak murwoniitu kabwaatennywa ne nyalulat." 
1Corinthians8:8 Ago amitwogik koma kiit ne imutech keriikyi Kamuktaindet: anan ngo ma ki amisye, ko mararwech kiy; anan, ngeamisye, ko matesak kiy." 
1Corinthians8:9 Ago oriipkei si ma ek kanagutyet kimnatoning'wong' eng' che nyalulyotin. 
1Corinthians8:10 Amu ngo keerin chii inyee ne itinye naet, iamisyei eng' Hekaluut ne po kanamwet, ko tos manyiganitu kabwaatennyi, ngot ko nyalulat, kot koam tuguuk che kieng'jin kanamonik?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Ak lusei ineendet ne nyalulat amu naeng'ung', ineendet tupchet ne ki mechi Kristo." 
1Corinthians8:12 Ak uu nooto anyun, ye koyachini tengek tupchosyek, ak oguoteni kabwaatennywa ne nyalulat, ko koyachi tengek Kristo." 
1Corinthians8:13 Nooto anyun, ngot konachi amitwogik ne kitupche, koma aame panyeek agoi, si ma nach ne kitupche." 
1Corinthians9:1 Tos ma atyagat? Ma aa kayooktoindet? Tos ki ma ageer Jeso Kiptaiyandennyo? Tos ma oo poisyennyu okweek eng' Kiptaiyat? 
1Corinthians9:2 Ak ngot koma aa kayooktoindet eng' alak, ko aa kayooktoindet eng' okweek: amu ng'ooksetap kayooktoinatennyu ko okweek eng' Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians9:3 Niito anyun ne asaruunegei eng' icheeget che kina. 
1Corinthians9:4 Tos ma ki tinyei kimnateet keam ak kee? 
1Corinthians9:5 Tos ma ki tinyei kimnateet kimutate osotyot ne iyanaat, ko uu alak che kiyooktoi, ak tupchosyek che po Kiptaiyat, ak Kepha?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Anan aneege kityo ak Barnaba, che ma ki tinyei kimnateet kebagaakte poisyet?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Tos ng'oo asigarindet ne poisyee tuguukyik? Ng'oo ne minei logoek, ne ma amei logoekyik? Anan ng'oo ne iyagi akweet, ama luei cheego che po akweet?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Tos amwae tuguuchu ko uu piteetap piik? Anan ma mwaei agine Ng'atuutyet chooto? 
1Corinthians9:9 Amu ki kisir eng' Ng'atuutyetap Musa keele, Amerat kutitap eito ye tyechei peek koborye. Tos ibwaati Kamuktaindet miising' agobo eiik," 
1Corinthians9:10 anan mwaei kityo amu acheek? Ee, ki kisir amu acheek: amu ineendet ne ibatisyei, ko nyolu kobatis eng' kamang'unet, ak ineendet ne porei koboorei komang'u kole sige kiy." 
1Corinthians9:11 Ngo ki kigooljok tuguugap saboondo, ko tos kiy ne oo ngeges tuguukwok che po poorto?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Ngot kotinyei piik alak yamdaet eng' kamugoniito koboiywok, ko tos ma kisiirtoot? Ago ma kiboisyee acheek kamugoniito; ago kimuitoi eng' tuguuk tugul, si ma ki kirinde logoiywek che myach che po Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:13 Tos mongen ole icheeget che poisyei agobo tuguuk che tiliileen koamei tuguuk che po Hekaluut, ak icheeget che riibei kaptisisyet kotinyei kebebertanywa kobooto kaptisisyet?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Ki ng'at ko uu nooto Kiptaiyat kole icheeget che amdaati logoiywek che myach kosaptos eng' logoiywek che myach. 
1Corinthians9:15 Ago tomo aboisyee tuguuchooto agot agenge: ama sire tuguuchu ale keyaiywo ko uu nooto: amu kata kaigai ame kosiir kowal chii toroornatennyu koek puch. 
1Corinthians9:16 Amu ngaamde logoiywek che myach, koma tinye kiy ne alasunegei; amu kanyool ayai ko uu nooto; Pwo eng' anee ngot koma amde logoiywek che myach." 
1Corinthians9:17 Amu ye ayai ni eng' magennyu aneege, atinye melekto: ago ngo ma po magennyu aneege, atinye riipseet ne ki kiyanwa." 
1Corinthians9:18 Nee anyun melektanyu? Nooto ko ni, ye aamdoi logoiywek che myach, ayae logoiywechooto myach koek ne ma pooto melekto, si ma poisyee kamugennyu miising' eng' logoiywek che myach." 
1Corinthians9:19 Agot ngo ki atyagat eng' piik tugul, ko ki ayaige aek ne rataat agobo tugul, si kobiit anyoor che siirtoot." 
1Corinthians9:20 Ak eng' Yahudik, ko ki aige Yahudyot, si kobiit anyoor Yahudik; eng' icheeget che mi eng' Ng'atuutyet, ko ki aige agane ne mi eng' Ng'atuutyet, ama keele ami aneendet eng' Ng'atuutyet, ago si kobiit anyoor icheeget che mi eng' Ng'atuutyet;" 
1Corinthians9:21 eng' icheeget che ma mi eng' Ng'atuutik, ko ki aige agane chii ne ma mi Ng'atuutik, ma keele ma mi eng' Ng'atuutik eng' Kamuktaindet, ago ami eng' Ng'atuutik eng' Kristo, si anyoor icheek che ma mi eng' Ng'atuutik." 
1Corinthians9:22 Eng' che nyalulyotin ki aegu anee ne nyalulat, si tamangap anyooru che nyalulyotin: ki aegu tuguuk tugul eng' piik tugul, tamangap amuuch asar alak eng' ooreet age tugul." 
1Corinthians9:23 Ak ayae tuguuk tugul amu logoiywek che myach, si kobiit anyoor yamdaet eng' chooto." 
1Corinthians9:24 Mongen ole icheeget che ibelegei eng' labatet korwaei tugul, ago agenge ne nyooru konunet? Orwai anyun, si onyooru." 
1Corinthians9:25 Ak chii age tugul ne igiilegei eng' ureryosyek, koriibegei eng' tuguuk tugul. Yaei anyun icheek nooto si konyoor kuutweet ne ng'emaksei; ago acheek ko ne ma ng'emaksei." 
1Corinthians9:26 Alabati anyun ko uu nooto, ma ko uu ne tinyei saget, ayae anyun kabeletapkei ko uu nooto, ma ko uu chii ne pirei ola puch:" 
1Corinthians9:27 ago abire poortanyu, ak abou ineendet: si ma ye kaamji piik alak, kotun keesia." 
1Corinthians10:1 Ma mache anyun, che kitupche, ale oegu che mongen, ole ki miitei kwanisyekyok tugul ng'wonyutap pooldet, ak ki pun tugul nyanjet:" 
1Corinthians10:2 ak ki kibatisanji tugul Musa eng' pooldet ak eng' nyanjet; 
1Corinthians10:3 ak ki am tugul amdit agenge ne po saboon; 
1Corinthians10:4 ak kiee tugul eet agenge ne po saboon: amu kiee tugul eng' rwandet ne po saboon ne ki isubi icheek: ak rwandanooto ko ki Kristo. 
1Corinthians10:5 Ago ki ma paibaitune miising' Kamuktaindet che chaang' eng' icheek: amu ki kiserta eng' surkwen. 
1Corinthians10:6 Ki ek tuguuchu anyun kaboorunoikyok, si ma kimakyigei tuguuk che yaacheen, ko uu ye kimakyigei icheek miising'." 
1Corinthians10:7 Amoegu che saaei kanamonik, ko uu alak eng' icheek; ko uu ye ki kisir keele, Ki tep ng'wony piik koamis ak koe, ak kong'eetyo kourerenso." 
1Corinthians10:8 Amongesokse, ko uu ye ki yai alak eng' icheek, ak ki ibutyo eng' peetuut agenge eliphuusyek tiptemu ak somok." 
1Corinthians10:9 Anan ketyem Kiptaiyat, ko uu ye kityem alak eng' icheek, ak ki par erenook." 
1Corinthians10:10 Amat ong'unyng'ung'se, ko uu ye ki ing'unyng'ung'so alak eng' icheek, ak ki pek eng' ng'emindet." 
1Corinthians10:11 Ki yaak anyun tuguuchuuto eng' icheek si koek kaboorunet; ak ki kisir agobo kateunennyo, acheek che kagonyonjech kagesunetap kenyiisyek." 
1Corinthians10:12 Nooto anyun ingoriipkei si ma ibut, ineendet ne ibwaati kole tononi." 
1Corinthians10:13 Ki ma namak yoomseet kobatee nooto ne imuuchi komuitae chii tugul; ago po iman Kamuktaindet ne ma chamdook keyomak kosiir ne tee ne omuuchi; ago kobooto yoomsonooto koyaei agine ooreet ne ochilile, si kobiit omuuch omuite." 
1Corinthians10:14 Nooto anyun, chamanikyuk, omwee piteetap kanamonik." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ang'alaali ko uu ye ang'alaaljini piik che ng'oomen; obesye kiit ne amwae. 
1Corinthians10:16 Kigombetap kaberuret ne kiberuuri, ko tos ma yamdaet ne po korotiigap Kristo? Magatyat ne kibuutuli, ko tos ma yamdaet ne po poortap Kristo?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Amu acheek che ki piik che chaang', ko ki magatyat agenge, poorto agenge: amu ki ame acheek tugul magatyat agenge." 
1Corinthians10:18 Ogeer Israel o eng' atebeetap poorto: tos ma tinyei yamdaet ak kaptisisyet icheek che amei tiseiywek? 
1Corinthians10:19 Amwae nee anyun? Amwa ale kiy kiit ne kieng'jin kanamonik, anan tos kiy kanamwet?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Ago tuguuk che igoitoi Pororyosyek koeng'jin oik, ago ma Kamuktaindet: ama mache koyai yamdaet ak oik." 
1Corinthians10:21 Momuuchi oee kigombetap Kiptaiyat, ak kigombetap oik: momuuchi oam eng' meesetap Kiptaiyat, ak meesetap oik." 
1Corinthians10:22 Anan kitache Kiptaiyat konyoor ng'etkong'? Tos ki kiimeen kosiir ineendet? 
1Corinthians10:23 Chamdaat tuguuk tugul; ago ma tuguuk tugul che nyolu. Chamdaat tuguuk tugul; ago ma tuguuk tugul che teeksei. 
1Corinthians10:24 Amat kocheeng'jigei chii chechiik ineegei, ago che po chiitap kokwennyi." 
1Corinthians10:25 Kiy age tugul ne ki aldoi eng' kabany, oam, amoteep kiy amu kabwaatet;" 
1Corinthians10:26 amu po Kiptaiyat ng'wony, ak che nyiitaat ng'wony." 
1Corinthians10:27 Ngo kuurok age eng' icheek che ma iyani kole kobaak, ak omache obe; ko kiy age tugul anyun ne kaginde taing'wong', oam, amat oteep amu kabwaatet:" 
1Corinthians10:28 ago ngo leenjok chii age tugul, Kagigoitoi kii koek tiseiywot, ko moam, amu ineendet ne kagoboorun, ak amu kabwaatet:" 
1Corinthians10:29 kabwaatet ne amwae koma neng'ung', ago po age; amu kalya si korwookyi katyagennyu kabwaatet age?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Ngot ataache eng' kongoi, ko amu nee si kemwaitaena yaityo eng' kiit ne koagoite kongoi?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Nooto anyun ngo ame, anan ngo ee, anan agot eng' kiy age tugul ne oyae, oyai tugul otoroori Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians10:32 Amonach Yahudik anan Yunanik, anan kanisetap Kamuktaindet:" 
1Corinthians10:33 agot ko uu ye aboiboi piik tugul eng' tuguuk tugul, ma cheeng'e kelunennyu aneege, ago kelunet ne po che chaang', si kobiit kesar." 
1Corinthians11:1 Oegu kasupiikyuk, ko uu ye aa kasubindetap Kristo." 
1Corinthians11:2 Aloswok anyun nguno amu obwaata eng' tuguuk tugul, ak oriibe kaneetisyosyek ko uu ye ki arorwok." 
1Corinthians11:3 Ago amache onai, ole metitap muren age tugul ko Kristo; ak metitap kobogoryot ko muren; ak metitap Kristo ko Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians11:4 Muren age tugul ne saaei anan koamdoi logoiywek ko kerat metit, ko kagoteweer metinnyi." 
1Corinthians11:5 Ago kobogoryot age tugul ne saaei anan koamdoi logoiywek ko yaataat metit, ko kagoteweer metinnyi: amu kagergeit ak chii ne inemunoot met." 
1Corinthians11:6 Amu ngo ma tugoot metitap kobogoryot, ko ingetilji agine suumeek: ago ngo kalilano eng' kobogoryot ketilji suumeek anan kinem, ko ingotuch metinnyi." 
1Corinthians11:7 Ma nyooljin iman muren koger metit, amu ineendet ko kergeindo ak toroornatetap Kamuktaindet: ago kobogoryot ko toroornatetap muren." 
1Corinthians11:8 Amu ki ma pun mureno kobogoryo; ago ki punu kobogoryot muren: 
1Corinthians11:9 ak kogeny, ki ma kitoi keyai muren agobo kobogoryo; ago ki kiyai kobogoryo agobo muren:" 
1Corinthians11:10 amu niito anyun konyaaljin kobogoryo kotinyei kaboorunet ne po pounateet eng' metinnyi, amu malaikaisyek." 
1Corinthians11:11 Ago ma mi kobogoryondo ngo ma mi mureno, ak ma mi mureno ngo ma mi kobogoryot, eng' Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians11:12 Amu ko uu ye ki punu kobogoryot muren, ko uu nooto agine mureno kisichei kobogoryot; ago punu tuguuk tugul Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians11:13 Orwooch okweegei: tos nyolu eng' kobogoryot kosa Kamuktaindet koma tugoot metit? 
1Corinthians11:14 Tos ma ineetook agine piteetap poorto, kole, ngo tinyei mureno suumeek che kooen, ko kalilanet eng' ineendet?" 
1Corinthians11:15 Ago ngo tinyei kobogoryot suumeek che kooen, ko toroornatet eng' ineendet; amu ki kigoochi suumeekyik kotugegei." 
1Corinthians11:16 Ago ngo machei chii tiyet, koma ki tinyei piteet ne uu nooto, anan eng' kanisosyegap Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians11:17 Ago, ye ang'atook eng' ng'olyoondoni, ko maloswok amu oyumige koma agobo che myach ago agobo che yaach." 
1Corinthians11:18 Amu ne po tai eng' tugul, ye oyumige eng' kaniset, agase keele miitei pesyosyek eng' kwenung'wong'; ak ayani kitigin ale uu nooto." 
1Corinthians11:19 Amu mi ne matiny pesyosyek eng' kwenung'wong', si kobiit kotook icheek che po iman eng' kwenung'wong'." 
1Corinthians11:20 Ye oyumige anyun koma imugaksei keam igoortap Kiptaiyat: 
1Corinthians11:21 amu eng' amisyeng'wong' kosip konemu age amitwogikyik kotomo age; ak amei age rubeet, kobogiti age." 
1Corinthians11:22 Nee? Motinye kooriik che oamisye ak oeeise? Anan osase kanisetap Kamuktaindet, ak oteweer icheeget che ma tinyei? Amwaiwok nee anyun? Tos aloswok eng' ng'olyoondoni? Maloswok." 
1Corinthians11:23 Amu ki ataach eng' Kiptaiyat nooto ki agoonok agane, ko uu ye ki nam magatyat Kiptaiyat Jeso eng' kemounooto ki king'wektoe ineendet;" 
1Corinthians11:24 ak kingo kagomwa kongoi, kobuutul, ak kole, “Niito ko poortanyu, ne mi agobo okweek; oyae ni obwaatena.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Ko uu nooto agine kigombet, kingo kagoamis, kole, “Kigombani ko arorutyet ne leel ne po korotiikyuk; oyae niito kotugul ye oee obwaatena.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Amu kotugul ye oame magatyandani, ak oee kigombet, oboortoi meetap Kiptaiyat agoi koit." 
1Corinthians11:27 Nooto anyun chii age tugul ne amei magatyat, anan ne eei kigombet ne po Kiptaiyat ama nyoljin, koipchingei kirwooget ne po poorto ak korotiigap Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians11:28 Ago ingosyachkei chii, si koamei magatyat, ak koeei kigombet." 
1Corinthians11:29 Amu ineendet ne amei ak koeei, koamei ak koeei kirwooget ngo ma ibesyo poorto." 
1Corinthians11:30 Amu niito anyun nyaluldos che chaang' eng' kwenung'wong', ak komyandos, ak koruitos che chaang'." 
1Corinthians11:31 Amu ngot kitigonigei, koma tuun kirwookwech." 
1Corinthians11:32 Ago ye kirwookwech, kotigoonech Kiptaiyat, si ma tuun ki kikyech kobooto ng'wony." 
1Corinthians11:33 Nooto anyun, tupchosyekyuk, ye oyumgei oamisye, oganygei." 
1Corinthians11:34 Ngo amei chii age tugul rubeet, koamis eng' kaa; si ma punji kayumeng'wong' pogei kirwooget. Ak ng'aleek che kang'et ko ye kaitu, anyoo achop." 
1Corinthians12:1 Nguno anyun agobo konunoik che po Kabuuset ne Tiliil, che kitupche, koma mache oegu che mongen." 
1Corinthians12:2 Ongen ole kingo ta ko oo Pororyosyek, ko ki kiretook obe ye mi kanamonichooto che ma twegu, ko uu ye ki kindoiywok." 
1Corinthians12:3 Nooto anyun agoonok oguiye ole, ma mi chii ne ng'alaali eng' Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet ne mwaei kole, “Jeso ko chuboot!” ama mi chii ne imuuchi komwa kole, “Jeso ko Kiptaiyat,” kobatee eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
1Corinthians12:4 Nguno anyun, komiitei konunoik che pesyotin, ago agenge Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
1Corinthians12:5 Ak miitei riipsosyek che pesyotin, ago agenge Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians12:6 Ak miitei poisyonik che pesyotin, ago agenge Kamuktaindet, ne yaei tuguuk tugul eng' tugul." 
1Corinthians12:7 Ago kigoochin chii tugul kaboorunetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil si kobiit kotoretegei. 
1Corinthians12:8 Amu kigoochin chiito age ng'olyootap utaatyet eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil; ak kigoochin age ng'olyootap naet, eng' Kabuusonooto:" 
1Corinthians12:9 kigoochin age kayaneet, eng' Kabuusonooto; ak kigoochin age konunoigap kasaabet, eng' Kabuusonooto agenge;" 
1Corinthians12:10 ak kigoochin age poisyonigap kamuget; ak age maonateet; ak age kabesyetap konunoigap Kabuuset: ak age kutusweek che teerchiin; ak age weeksetap kutusweek: 
1Corinthians12:11 ago poisyee chuuto tugul Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne nooto agenge, kopchechin age tugul ko uu ye makyin." 
1Corinthians12:12 Amu ko uu ye agenge poorto, ak kotinyei kebeberwek che chaang', ak kebeberwek tugul che po poorto, agot ngo chaang', ko poorto agenge; ko uu nooto agine Kristo." 
1Corinthians12:13 Amu eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil agenge ko ki kibatisanech acheek tugul keegu poorto agenge, ngo Yahudik anan Yunanik, ngo ratotiin, anan kotyagotin, ak ki kigoonech acheek tugul kee eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil agenge." 
1Corinthians12:14 Amu poorto, koma kebeberta agenge, ago chaang'." 
1Corinthians12:15 Ngot komwa keeldo kole, “Amu ma aa euut, koma po poorto,” tos ma po poorto amu nooto?" 
1Corinthians12:16 Ak ngot komwa itit kole, “Amu ma aa konda, koma po anyun poorto,” ko tos ma po poorto amu nooto?" 
1Corinthians12:17 Nda poorto komugul ko konda, kota mi ano kastaet? Nda poorto komugul ko itit, ko tos mi ano kang'utoet?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Ago nguno ko ki konde Kamuktaindet kebeberwek, age tugul eng' icheek, eng' poorto, ko uu ye ki cham ineendet." 
1Corinthians12:19 Ak nda tugul ko kebeberta agenge, ta mi ano poorto?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Ago nguno ko kebeberwek icheek che chaang', ago agenge poorto." 
1Corinthians12:21 Amaimuuchi konda koleenji euut, Ma magenen kiy: anan kogeny, ma imuuchi metit koleenji keelyek, Ma magenok kiy." 
1Corinthians12:22 Ago ne siirei miising' ko, kebeberwechooto po poorto che uu keele nyalulyotin, ko chooto che nyolu:" 
1Corinthians12:23 ak kebeberwechooto po poorto, che kiiti keele matya teegistanywa, ko chooto che kilaakyin teegisto ne oo kosiir; ak kebeberwekyok che ma tinyei korooronindo ko chooto che tinyei korooronindo ne oo kosiir;" 
1Corinthians12:24 amu kebeberwekyok che tinyei korooronindo, koma machei kiy: ago kiituiyo Kamuktaindet poorto, kogoochin teegisto ne oo kosiir kebeberta kirarchi;" 
1Corinthians12:25 si ma piit kabesyet eng' poorto; ago si koriipkei eng' riipseet agenge, kebeberwechooto, koriip age age." 
1Corinthians12:26 Ak ngo nyalili kebeberta agenge, konyalildos kebeberwek tugul kobooto nooto; anan ngegonyiti kebeberta agenge, koboiboitu kebeberwek tugul kobooto nooto." 
1Corinthians12:27 Nguno anyun, okweek ko oo poortap Kristo, ak oo kebeberwegap poroto, age tugul eng' okweek." 
1Corinthians12:28 Ak kigonde Kamuktaindet alak eng' kaniset, che po tai ko che kiyooktoi, che po aeng' ko maotik, che po somok ko kaneetik, yeityo ko kwang'utik, yeityo ko konunoigap kasaabet, toretosyek, kandoinatosyek, ak kutusweek che teerchiin." 
1Corinthians12:29 Tos tugul ko che kiyooktoi? Tos tugul ko maotik? Tos tugul ko kaneetik? Tos tugul ko yaigap kwang'utik? 
1Corinthians12:30 Tos tinyei tugul konunoigap kasaabet? Tos ng'alaali tugul kutusweek che teerchiin? Tos iweechi tugul kutusweek? 
1Corinthians12:31 Ago ocheeng' miising' konunoik che eecheen. Ak aboorwok ooreet ne myee miising' ne siirei tugul. 
1Corinthians13:1 Agot ndang'alaale kutusweegap piik ak che po malaikaisyek, ama tinye chamyet, ko kaegu sugunwet ne cheei, anan sanitap sugunwet ne polei." 
1Corinthians13:2 Ak ngot atinye konunetap maonateet, ak angen ung'ootik tugul ak naet tugul, ak ngatinye kayaneet tugul, kot amuuch autoe tuloonook, ago ma tinye chamyet, ko aa puch." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ak ngot agoite tuguukyuk tugul abae kibananook, ak ndagoite poortanyu kebeel, ago ma tinye chamyet, ko magelwo kiy." 
1Corinthians13:4 Muitoi chamyet, ak ko tala; ama tinyei chamyet ng'etkong', malosegei chamyet, ama meenei," 
1Corinthians13:5 ama yaei ne ma nyolu, ama cheeng'jingei chechiik ineegei, ama iiti tagisyet, ama iiti yaityo;" 
1Corinthians13:6 ma paibai eng' ne ma po imanda, ago paibai eng' imanit;" 
1Corinthians13:7 siisei eng' tuguuk tugul, iyani tuguuk tugul, imang'u tuguuk tugul, muitoi eng' tuguuk tugul." 
1Corinthians13:8 Mararu chamyet agoi: ago ngo miitei maonatosyek, kotun igeesugei; ngo mi kutusweek che teerchiin, kotun siistos; ngo mi naet, kotun igeesugei." 
1Corinthians13:9 Amu kingen eng' kebeberta, ak keamdoi eng' kebeberta:" 
1Corinthians13:10 ago ye tuun nyo ne ititaat, kogeskei anyun kebeberta." 
1Corinthians13:11 Ye kingo aa lakwa, kogiang'alaali ko uu lakwa, ki aguitosi ko uu lakwa, ki abwaati ko uu lakwa: nguno, ko kaaegu chiito ne oo, ko kaamete tuguugap lakwandit." 
1Corinthians13:12 Amu nguno kegeere eng' kioit, eng' tamirmiron; ago tuun ko togoch eng' togoch: nguno angen eng' kebeberta; ago tuun anae ko uu ye kigenaa." 
1Corinthians13:13 Ago tebyei nguno kayaneet, kamang'unet, chamyet, chuuto somok; ago ne oo eng' chuuto ko chamyet." 
1Corinthians14:1 Osup chamyet; ak ocheeng' miising' konunoik che po Kabuuset, ago ne siirei ko oamde logoiywek." 
1Corinthians14:2 Amu ineendet ne ng'alaali eng' kutit ne ma kigasei koma ng'alaaljin piik, ago Kamuktaindet; amu ma kasei chii; ago mwaei ung'ootik eng' Kabuuset." 
1Corinthians14:3 Ago ineendet ne amdoi kong'alaaljin piik ng'aleegap teekseet, ak kagimiitet, ak kagaigaet." 
1Corinthians14:4 Ineendet ne ng'alaali eng' kutit koteechegei ineegei; ago ineendet ne amdoi koteechei kaniset. 
1Corinthians14:5 Amakwok anyun okweek tugul ong'alaal eng' kutusweek, ago ne siirei ko oamde: ak oo ineendet ne amdoi kosiir ineendet ne ng'alaali eng' kutusweek, kobatee koweech, si kobiit koteegak kaniset." 
1Corinthians14:6 Ago nguno anyun, che kitupche, ngot Anyoonjok ang'alaalee kutusweek, atoretenok nee, ngot koma ng'alaalwok eng' ng'ang'et, anan eng' naet, anan eng' amdaet, anan ko eng' kaneetisyet?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Agot tuguuk che masaptos, che cheitos, anan ndurerut anan ketubet, ngo ma ibesyo cheosyekwak, kenaitoi ano ne kiguutei anan ne kibutei?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Amu ngo chei iryageet cheet ne ma kiguitos, ko ng'oo ne chobegei agobo lugeet?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Ou nooto ak okweek, ngot ko motwegu eng' ng'aleek che nyumnyum kegas, kenaitoi ano kiit ne kagemwa? Amu ong'alaaljini ola puch." 
1Corinthians14:10 Uu keele, miitei kutusweek che chaang' che teerchiin eng' ng'wony, ama mi ne ma tinyei kiit ne ibooru." 
1Corinthians14:11 Ngot ko mangen anyun kiit ne mwaei tuguuchooto, aegu punootyot eng' ineendet ne ng'alaali, ak ineendet ne ng'alaali, koegu punootyot eng' anee." 
1Corinthians14:12 Ou nooto ak okweek, ko uu ye omache miising' konunoigap Kabuuset, ocheeng' eng' kagiiletapkei tuguuk che igoochin kaniset koteegak." 
1Corinthians14:13 Nooto anyun, ineendet ne ng'alaali eng' kutit, ingosa si koweech ng'aleek." 
1Corinthians14:14 Amu ngasa eng' kutit ne ma kigasei, kosaaei saboondanyu, ago ma tinyei logoek ng'omnatennyu." 
1Corinthians14:15 Nee anyun? Asaae eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak asaae eng' ng'omnateet agine; atyeni eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak atyeni eng' ng'omnateet agine." 
1Corinthians14:16 Amu ngo ma uu nooto, ko ngiberuuri eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil, komwaitoi ano “Amen” ye igoitoi kongoi, ineendet ne tebee ole mi che ma ineetkei amu ma naei kiit ne kimwae?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Amu iman, igoitoi inyee kongoi komyee, ago ma nyoor nin age kiit ne imuuchi koteech ineendet." 
1Corinthians14:18 Amwachini Kamuktaindet kongoi, ale ang'alaalee kutusweek kosiirok okweek tugul:" 
1Corinthians14:19 ago achame amwa ng'aleek muut eng' ng'omnatennyu eng' kanisa, si aneet piik alak ak icheek, kosiir amwa ng'aleek eliphuusyek taman eng' kutit ne ma kigasei." 
1Corinthians14:20 Che kitupche, amoegu lagok eng' ng'omnateet: ago oegu lagok che nyerootiin eng' yaityo, ago oegu che kaoeegitu eng' ng'omnateet." 
1Corinthians14:21 Ki kisir eng' Ng'atuutyet keele, “Eng' piik che po kutusweek alak, ak eng' kutusweegap toek, ang'alaaljini pichu, agot ngo uu nooto koma kasa icheek, mwaei Kiptaiyat.”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Nooto anyun kutusweek ko po kaboorunet, ma eng' icheek che iyanotin, ago eng' icheeget che ma iyanotin: ago amdaet ko po kaboorunet, ma eng' che ma iyanotin, ago eng' icheek che iyani." 
1Corinthians14:23 Nooto anyun ngo yumgei kaniset komugul, ak kong'alaal tugul eng' kutusweek che ma kigasei, ak ngo pwo ko piik che ma ineetkei, anan ko che ma iyanotin, ko tos ma mwaei kole oo kibion?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Ago ngo amda tugul, ak konyo ko chii agenge ne ma iyanaat, anan ko ne ma ineetkei, koger kong' tugul ineendet, ak korwookyin tugul ineendet:" 
1Corinthians14:25 ak king'aanyei ung'ootigap muguleldanyi; ak kobutyi ng'wony anyun kong'uruuk kolas Kamuktaindet, komwaei koleen mi Kamuktaindet kwenung'wong' iman." 
1Corinthians14:26 Nee anyun, che kitupche? Ye oyumgei, kotinyei age tugul tyendap kalasunet, ak kaneetisyet, ak ng'ang'utyet, ak kutit ne ma kigasei, ak kaweegetap ng'aleek. Ingoyaogis tuguuk tugul koteegogis." 
1Corinthians14:27 Ngo ng'alaal chii age tugul eng' kutit ne ma kigasei, kong'alaal aeng'u, anan ko che ma siirei somok, ak ingorupkei; ak ingoweech chiito age:" 
1Corinthians14:28 ago ngo ma mi weegindetap ng'aleek, ko ingosiis eng' kanisa; ak ingong'alaaljigei ineegei ak Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians14:29 Ak ingong'alaalso maotik aeng'u anan ko somok; ingoguiyo alage. 
1Corinthians14:30 Ago ngeng'aang'ji ng'olyoo age ne tebyei eng' yooto, ko ingosiis ni kabo tai." 
1Corinthians14:31 Amu omuuchi okweek tugul oamde agenge agenge, si kobiit koneetkei tugul, ak konyoor kagaigaet tugul;" 
1Corinthians14:32 ak kase iit mugulelwegap `maotik maotik; 
1Corinthians14:33 amu Kamuktaindet koma Kamuktaindet ne po polateet, ago po kaalyeet. Ko uu eng' kanisosyek tugul che po che tiliileen," 
1Corinthians14:34 ingosiisyo kobogorisyek eng' kanisosyek: amu ma ki chamjin icheeget kong'alaal; ago ingogas iit, ko uu ye mwaei ng'atuutik." 
1Corinthians14:35 Ak ngo machei icheek koneetkei kiy, ko ingoteebe manong'otaikwak eng' kaa: amu kalilano ngo ng'alaal kobogoryondo eng' kaniset." 
1Corinthians14:36 Nee anyun? Tos okweek che ki mong'unenok ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet? Anan kibwanjok okweegei? 
1Corinthians14:37 Ngo pwaati chii age tugul kole maotyot, anan ko chii ne mi eng' atebeetap Kabuuset, ko ingonai tuguuk che asirwok, kole chooto ko ng'atuutyetap Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians14:38 Ago ngo ma ingen chii age tugul kiy, ko ingoek kimanaiyat." 
1Corinthians14:39 Nooto anyun, che kitupche, ocheeng' miising' oamde, amat oet keng'alaal eng' kutusweek che ma kigasei." 
1Corinthians14:40 Ago ingoyaogis tuguuk tugul ko uu ye nyolu ak eng' chobeet ne myee. 
1Corinthians15:1 Aboorwok anyun, che kitupche, nguno, logoiywek che myach che ki aamwok, chooto ki otaach, chooto ak icheek che otonone," 
1Corinthians15:2 kisaruunenok chooto ak icheek; eng' ng'aleek che ki aamwok, ngot onam komyee, ngot ko ki ma oyan puch." 
1Corinthians15:3 Amu ki agoonok eng' tai nooto ki ataach agane, ale kime Kristo agobo tengekwogikyok, ko uu ye mwaei siruutik," 
1Corinthians15:4 ak ki kitup; ak ki king'eet eng' peetuutap somok ko uu ye mwaei siruutik; 
1Corinthians15:5 ak ki mong'ji Kepha; ye ibata, komong'ji taman ak aeng';" 
1Corinthians15:6 yeityo komong'ji tupchosyek che siirei pogol muut komi tugul, che ta komi agoi kora che chaang' eng' icheek, ago ki koruiyo alak;" 
1Corinthians15:7 yeityo komong'ji Jakobo; ye ibata, komong'ji che kiyooktoi tugul;" 
1Corinthians15:8 ak let eng' tugul, komong'ja agane, ko uu ne ki kios." 
1Corinthians15:9 Amu aa ne ming'in eng' kiyooktoik, ne ma nyolu keguureno kayooktoin, amu ki aus kanisetap Kamuktaindet." 
1Corinthians15:10 Ago eng' myeeindap Kamuktaindet auu kiit ne auu: ak myeeindonyi ne ki kigoono koma ek puch; ago ki aboisyee miising' asiir icheek tugul: ago ma anee, ago myeeindap Kamuktaindet ne ki mi kobooto." 
1Corinthians15:11 Ngo anee anyun, anan ngo icheek, keamdoi ui tugul, ak uu nooto ki oyan ak okweek." 
1Corinthians15:12 Ara anyun, ngeamdoi Kristo keele ki king'eet komong' eng' che ki pek, ko teptoi ano si komwaei alak eng' kwenung'wong' kole ma mi ng'eetyeet ne po che pegu?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Ago ngot koma mi ng'eetyeet ne po che pegu, ko kaagaa ma king'eet Kristo agine:" 
1Corinthians15:14 ak ngo ki ma king'eet Kristo, ko puch anyun amdaennyo, ko puch agine kayaneng'wong'." 
1Corinthians15:15 Ee, ak kagenyoorwech keele kibaorinik che po lembech che po Kamuktaindet; amu kigebaoryan agobo Kamuktaindet keele ki ing'eet Kristo: ne kaagaa ma ing'eet Kamuktaindet, ngot koma king'eeti che pegu." 
1Corinthians15:16 Amu ngot koma king'eeti che pegu, kogimaging'eet Kristo agine:" 
1Corinthians15:17 ak ngo ki ma king'eet Kristo, ko puch kayaneng'wong'; kota omi eng' tengekwogikwok." 
1Corinthians15:18 Nooto anyun, icheeget che ki koruiyo eng' Kristo ko ki kolusyo." 
1Corinthians15:19 Ngot ko kogimang'u Kristo eng' sabooni kityo, ko kaagaa ki piik che tinyei riirek kosiir tugul." 
1Corinthians15:20 Ago ki king'eet anyun Kristo komong' eng' che ki pek, tongoaniat ne po icheeget che ruitos." 
1Corinthians15:21 Amu ko uu ye ki punu meet chii, ko ki punu chii agine ng'eetyeet ne po che pegu." 
1Corinthians15:22 Amu ko uu ye pegu tugul eng' Adam, ko uu nooto tuun kisoobi tugul eng' Kristo." 
1Corinthians15:23 Ago chii tugul eng' komostanyi: Kristo ko tongoaniat; ye ibata ko icheek che po Kristo, eng' nyonunennyi." 
1Corinthians15:24 Ye ibata koit anyun let, ye tuun igoito ineendet pounateet kogoochi Kamuktaindet, ineendet Kwanda; ye tuun kagowong' pounateet tugul ak kimnateet tugul ak kamuktaet." 
1Corinthians15:25 Amu kanyool kolaitoran ineendet matiny, agoi konde puunikyik tugul keldebesaigap keelyekyik." 
1Corinthians15:26 Puunyoot ne po let ne tuun king'emei ko meet. 
1Corinthians15:27 Amu, kigonde tuguuk tugul keldebesaigap keelyekyik kogas iit ineendet. Ago ye mwaei kole kindoi tuguuk tugul kogas iit ineendet, kotaagu keele mabooto ineendet ne ki inde tuguuk tugul kogas iit." 
1Corinthians15:28 Ak ye tuun kaginde tuguuk tugul kogas iit ineendet, eng' peetuunooto anyun kinde Weeriit agine kogas iit ineendet, si koek Kamuktaindet tugul eng' tugul." 
1Corinthians15:29 Anan yaei nee anyun che ki kibatisanji che ki kobek? Ngot ko kaagaa ma king'eeti iman che pegu, ko kalya anyun si kibatisan chooto agobo icheek?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Ko amu nee anyun si kemi ng'oiyondit sait age tugul? 
1Corinthians15:31 Abaoryani eng' kalasunonooto mi eng' okweek, che kitupche, ne atinye eng' Kristo Jeso Kiptaiyandennyo ale, amee peetuut age tugul." 
1Corinthians15:32 Ngo ki kibarge ak tyong'ik eng' Epheso ko uu piteetap piik, atinye porot nee anyun? Ngo kaagaa ma king'eeti che pegu, ongeamisye ak kee, amu kibegu mutai." 
1Corinthians15:33 Among' kiberberak: Ng'emei choronok che yaach atepto ne myee. 
1Corinthians15:34 Ogosu eng' imanda, amat oyai tengek; amu ma ingen alak Kamuktaindet: amwae ni si agoonok olilan." 
1Corinthians15:35 Ago mwaei chii age, koleen, King'eetitoi ano che ki kobek? Ak pwoonei eng' poorto ne uu nee?" 
1Corinthians15:36 Inyee ne ii perber, nooto ne igoole inyeendet, koma sabei, ngot koma me:" 
1Corinthians15:37 ak nooto ne igoole, ko megoole poorto ne tuun piitu, ago keswoot puch, abeere pitunee nganuuk, anan tuguuk alak;" 
1Corinthians15:38 ago igoochin Kamuktaindet poorto ko uu ye iboiboi ineendet, ak kogoochin keswoot age tugul poortanyi ineegei." 
1Corinthians15:39 Panyeek tugul koma agenge: ago mi alak che po piik, ak alak che po tyong'ik, ak alak che po toriitik, ak alak che po njireenik." 
1Corinthians15:40 Miitei poorwek che po kipsengwet, ak miitei poorwek che po ng'wony: ago teerchiin telunateet ne po chooto po kipsengwet ak telunateet ne po chooto po ng'wony." 
1Corinthians15:41 Miitei liilindo ne po asiista, ak liilindo age ne po arawet, ak liilindo age ne po kecheik; amu teerchiin kecheiyat age ak kecheiyat age eng' liilindo." 
1Corinthians15:42 Ko uu nooto agine ng'eetyeetap che pegu. Ki kolei eng' ng'emisyet; king'eeti koma komi ng'emisyet: 
1Corinthians15:43 ki koolei koma mi teegisto; ak tuun king'eeti eng' telunateet: ki koolei eng' nyalulet; ak tuun king'eeti eng' kamuktaet: 
1Corinthians15:44 ki koolei poorto ne ki kisiktoi; king'eeti poorto ne po Kabuuset ne Tiliil. Ngo mi poorto ne ki kisiktoi, komi agine ne po Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
1Corinthians15:45 Ko uu nooto agine, ki kisir keele, Ki ek chiito ne po tai, Adam, chiito ne sabei. Ki ek Adam ne po let Kabuuset ne igoitoi saboondo." 
1Corinthians15:46 Ago ma indoi nooto po Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ago nooto po poorto; ye ibata ko nooto po Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
1Corinthians15:47 Chiito ne po tai ko po ng'wony, po ng'ung'unyek; chiito ne po aeng' ko po kipsengwet." 
1Corinthians15:48 Ko uu ole teptoi ne po ng'ung'unyek, uu chooto ak icheek che po ng'ung'unyek: ak ko uu ole teptoi ne po kipsengwet, uu chooto ak icheek che po kipsengwet." 
1Corinthians15:49 Ak ko uu ye ki kiip itoondap chiitap ng'ung'unyek, ko tuun ki ibe itoondap chiitap kipsengwet agine." 
1Corinthians15:50 Amwae ni anyun, tupchosyechu, ale ma imuuchi panyeek ak korotiik konyoor laitornatetap Kamuktaindet; amaimuuchi ne nunei konyoor ne manunei." 
1Corinthians15:51 Ogeero, amwaiwok ung'ootyet: Ma kiruitosi acheek tugul, ago kiwalech acheek tugul," 
1Corinthians15:52 eng' ne matya, eng' kamismisetap konda, eng' iryageet ne po let: amu cheei iryageet, si king'eet che ki kobek koma kotinyei nunet, ak kewalech." 
1Corinthians15:53 Amu kanyool kolaach ne nunei, ne manunei, ak kanyool kolaach niito meei ne ma meei." 
1Corinthians15:54 Ago ye tuun kagolaach niito nunei, ne manunei, ak ko kagolaach niito meei ne ma meei, kosulda anyun mwaet ne ki kisir keele, Kagelugui meet eng' kabelisyet." 
1Corinthians15:55 Ee, meet, mi ano kabelisyeng'ung'? Ee, meet, mi ano ng'wanindang'ung'?" 
1Corinthians15:56 Ng'wanindap meet ko tengek; ak kimnateetap tengek ko ng'atuutik: 
1Corinthians15:57 ago kigoochini Kamuktaindet kongoi, ne koonech kabelisyet eng' Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo." 
1Corinthians15:58 Nooto anyun, che kitupche che achame, ogimegitu, among' king'eak, oyae otese kotugul poisyetap Kiptaiyat, amu ongen ole ma po puch poisyeng'wong' ne uui eng' Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians16:1 Nguno anyun agobo kayumanik agobo piik che tiliileen, ko uu ye ki ang'at kanisosyek che po Galatia, oyai ak okweek ko uu nooto." 
1Corinthians16:2 Ingogonor chii age tugul eng' okweek eng' peetuut ne po tai ne po wigiit, ko uu che tee che kanyoor, si ma piit kayumisyet ye tuun anyoo." 
1Corinthians16:3 Ak ye tuun aitu, ayookte alak tugul che ki olewen kobooto paronok, koip tuguuk che po aiyebindong'wong' koba Jerusalem." 
1Corinthians16:4 Ak ngot ko nyolu awo agane, keebe tugul." 
1Corinthians16:5 Ago anyonjinok, ye kaabunote Makedonia; amu abunoti Makedonia;" 
1Corinthians16:6 ago abeere anyoone ketebi ak okweek eng' peetuusyek alak anan agot eng' peetuusyegap kaitityet, si kobiit omonorseiwo okweek eng' pandanyu eng' komosta age tugul ole awendi."
