1Corinthians16:7 Amu ma mache ageerok nguno asiirtoi eng' ooreet; amu amang'u ale atebi kobootok ne matya, ngo cham Kiptaiyat." 
1Corinthians16:8 Ago ta atebee Epheso agoi peetuutap Pentekoste; 
1Corinthians16:9 amu kogiyatwa kurgeet ne oo ne nyoljin poisyonik, ak mi puunik che chaang'." 
1Corinthians16:10 Ngot anyun konyo Timoteo, ko ingotep kobootok ama eng' kaiyweisyet; amu poisyei ineendet eng' poisyetap Kiptaiyat, ko uu ye ayae agane:" 
1Corinthians16:11 amat kosas chii ineendet anyun. Ago omonorsechi ineendet eng' pandanyi eng' kaalyeet si konyo ole ami: amu ageni ineendet kobooto che kitupche. 
1Corinthians16:12 Ago eng' ng'aleegap Apolo ne kitupche, ki asoom ineendet miising' ale konyonjok kobooto tupchosyek: ak ki ma ko magennyi agot kitigin konyo nguno; ago ta konyonei ye tuun nyoor poroindo." 
1Corinthians16:13 Oriipse, olumdegei miising' eng' kayaneet, otebi ko uu murenik, ogimegitu." 
1Corinthians16:14 Ingoyaak eng' chamyet tugul che oyae. 
1Corinthians16:15 Asoomok anyun miising', che kitupche (ongen che po kootap Stephana, ole icheeget tongoanik che po Akaia, ak kichuljigei koboisyechi che tiliileen)," 
1Corinthians16:16 ale ogas iit okweek che uu chu, ak chii age tugul ne toreti eng' poisyet ak ne pirtoegei poisyet." 
1Corinthians16:17 Ak abaibai eng' nyonunetap Stephana ak Poortunooto ak Akaiko: amu ki inyiitwa icheek nooto ne rarunoot eng' komostang'wong'. 
1Corinthians16:18 Amu ki ileelit saboondanyu ak neng'wong': onai anyun komyee icheek che uu chooto. 
1Corinthians16:19 Igatok kanisosyegap Asia. Igatok Aquila ak Priska miising' eng' Kiptaiyat, kobooto kaniset ne mi koonnywa." 
1Corinthians16:20 Igatok tupchosyek tugul. Ogatkei eng' ng'ututet ne tiliil. 
1Corinthians16:21 Kagatennyu niito anee Paulo eng' eunnyu. 
1Corinthians16:22 Ngot koma chamei chii age tugul Kiptaiyat, ko ingoek ne chuboot. Maran-atha." 
1Corinthians16:23 Ingotebi kobootok myeeindap Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo. 
1Corinthians16:24 Ingotep chamyennyi kobootok tugul eng' Kristo Jeso. Amen. 
2Corinthians1:1 Paulo, kayooktoindet ne po Kristo Jeso eng' mageetap Kamuktaindet, ak Timoteo tupchennyo, kisirchini kanisetap Kamuktaindet ne miitei Korinto, kobooto che tiliileen tugul che miitei Akaia komugul:" 
2Corinthians1:2 Ingotep kobootok myeeindo ak kaalyeet ne punu Kamuktaindet Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo. 
2Corinthians1:3 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet ne Kwandap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, Kwanda ne po rireenosyek ak Kamuktaindet ne po kagaigaet tugul;" 
2Corinthians1:4 ne igoigoech eng' pichiindanyo tugul, si kimuuch kigaigai icheeget che mi pichiin age tugul, eng' kagaigaet ne igoigoenech Kamuktaindet." 
2Corinthians1:5 Ko uu ye katesak eng' acheek nyalilwogik che po Kristo, ko uu nooto katesak kagaigaennyo eng' Kristo." 
2Corinthians1:6 Ago nginyalilech, ko agobo kagaigaeng'wong' ak yetuneng'wong'; anan ngigoigoech, ko agobo kagaigaeng'wong', ne poisyei eng' muitaet ye omuitoi eng' nyalilwogichooto kinyaliili agacheek:" 
2Corinthians1:7 ak lumdaat kamang'unennyo agobo okweek; kingen keele, ko uu ye oo yamdoik che po nyalilwogik, ko uu nooto oo yamdoik che po kagaigaet." 
2Corinthians1:8 Amu ma kimache oegu che mongen, che kitupche, agobo pichiindo ne kinyoorwech eng' Asia, ale kisyebech miising', kosiir kamugennyo, kot koma ketinyei kamang'unetap sabeet." 
2Corinthians1:9 Ee, ki kitinyei acheeget kirwoogetap meet eng' oriitinnyo, si mata kimang'uge, ago Kamuktaindet ne ing'eeti che pegu:" 
2Corinthians1:10 ne kisarwech eng' meet ne oo ne tee ni, ak ta kosarwech: ne kimang'u keele ta ko sarwech kogeny;" 
2Corinthians1:11 otoretech ak okweek kibagenge eng' soomeng'wong'; si kobiit kogoito kongoi piik che chaang' agobo acheek, amu konunet ne ki kigoonech eng' toretetap che chaang'." 
2Corinthians1:12 Amu kalasunennyo ko ni, paornateetap kabwaatennyo, keele ki kiteptoi tiliilindo ak atepto ne ma tinyei keniisyet, ne po Kamuktaindet, eng' ng'wony, ma eng' utaatyetap poorto ago eng' myeeindap Kamuktaindet, ak ne siirei miising' ko eng' komostang'wong'." 
2Corinthians1:13 Amu ma kisirwok tuguuk alak tugul, kobatee chooto che osomani anan onai, ak amang'u ale onai agoi let:" 
2Corinthians1:14 Agot ko uu ye ki onaech kitigin, ole acheek ko ki kalasuneng'wong', agot ko uu ye oo kalasunennyo ak okweek, eng' peetuutap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso." 
2Corinthians1:15 Ak eng' kayanoniito ko ki abwaati isip Anyoonjok si kobiit onyooru myeeindo ne po aeng'; 
2Corinthians1:16 ak abune olong'wong' awendi Makedonia, ak kogeny abunu Makedonia anyoone olong'wong', si omonorseiwo eng' pandanyu awendi Judea." 
2Corinthians1:16 ak abune olong'wong' awendi Makedonia, ak kogeny abunu Makedonia anyoone olong'wong', si omonorseiwo eng' pandanyu awendi Judea." 
2Corinthians1:17 Ye kinga pwaat ko uu nooto, ko tos ki aurereni? Anan tuguuk che aa pegechini ale ayae, ko tos abegechini ko uu atebeetap poorto, si kobiit koek eng' anee ee, ee, ak achicha, achicha?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Ago ko uu ye po iman Kamuktaindet, ng'olyoondennyo eng' okweek koma ee ak achicha." 
2Corinthians1:19 Amu Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, Jeso Kristo, ne ki kiamde eng' kwenung'wong', anee ak Silvano ak Timoteo, ne ki ma ko “ee” ak “achicha”, ago eng' ineendet ko “wei” kipchulyo." 
2Corinthians1:20 Amu agot ngo tya arorutigap Kamuktaindet, eng' ineendet ko wei: ak kogeny eng' ineendet ko Amen, agoi toroornatetap Kamuktaindet eng' acheek." 
2Corinthians1:21 Nguno anyun, ineendet ne igimitech kobootok eng' Kristo, ak ne ki ilech, ko Kamuktaindet;" 
2Corinthians1:22 ak king'oochech, ak kogoonech Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' mugulelwekyok koek tongoaniatap tuguuk che pwoonei." 
2Corinthians1:23 Ago aguure Kamuktaindet koek paoryat eng' saboondanyu, ale, si koma nyo Korinto, ko ki ariirenak." 
2Corinthians1:24 Ma keele ki tinyei pounateet eng' kayaneng'wong', ago kitoretik che po poiboiyeng'wong': amu otonondosi eng' kayaneng'wong'." 
2Corinthians2:1 Ago ki atil ni ale ma anyonjinok kogeny eng' arageneet. 
2Corinthians2:2 Amu ngot agoonok oaragense, ko ng'oo anyun ne iboiboa, kobatee ineendet ne kaagoochi koaragen?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Ak ki asirwak ng'olyoondoniito, si ma ye anyoo, koma tinye arageneet eng' icheek che kanyoolja agasegei; atinye kamang'unet eng' okweek tugul, ale poiboiyennyu ko neng'wong' okweek tugul." 
2Corinthians2:4 Amu ki asirwak eng' pichiindo ne oo ak ng'wanindap muguleldo kobooto peegap kong' che chaang'; ma si oaragense, ago si kobiit onai chamyet ne ating'enok miising' kosiir." 
2Corinthians2:5 Ago ngot ko koing'eet chii arageneet, ko koing'eet arageneet, ma eng' anee, ago eng' kebeber, (si ma koonok anee nyigiisindo ne siirei) eng' acheek tugul." 
2Corinthians2:6 Yamei chiito ne uu niito kagikyinoni kitilji piik che chaang'; 
2Corinthians2:7 ago kaigai onyochi kaat ineendet ak ogaigai, si ma lugui, eng' ooreet age tugul, chiito ne uu nooto aragenennyi ne siirtoot." 
2Corinthians2:8 Nooto anyun asoomok ale ogimiit chamyeng'wong' eng' ineendet. 
2Corinthians2:9 Amu ki asir agobo ng'olyoondoniito, ale anaak komyee ngo kase iit eng' tuguuk tugul." 
2Corinthians2:10 Ago ineendet ne onyochini kaat kiy age tugul, anyochini kaat agane. Ne ki anyochi kaat agane, ngo ki anyochi kaat eng' kiy age tugul, ko ki anyochi kaat agobo okweek eng' taitap Kristo," 
2Corinthians2:11 si ma nyoor Setani kiit ne iterteerenech; amu ma kiberberen, ago kingen chobutikyik." 
2Corinthians2:12 Ak ye kinga nyo Traos amu logoiywek che myach che po Kristo, ak ye ki ngeyatwa kurgeet eng' Kiptaiyat," 
2Corinthians2:13 ki ma nyooru kamuung'et eng' saboondanyu, amu ki ma anyooru Tito ne kitupche. Ara ki amwachi icheek saisere ak atestai awe Makedonia." 
2Corinthians2:14 Ago kongoi eng' Kamuktaindet, ne imutatech kotugul kibelisye eng' Kristo, ak koboortoi nyamdutyetap naennyi eng' acheek eng' komosta age tugul." 
2Corinthians2:15 Amu kinyamdutyet ne anyiny ne po Kristo eng' Kamuktaindet, eng' icheek che kisaru, ak eng' icheek che lustos;" 
2Corinthians2:16 eng' alak ko ki nyamdutyet ne po meet agoi meet; eng' alak ko ki nyamdutyet ne po saboondo agoi saboondo. Ak tos ng'oo ne yamegei ak tuguuchu? 
2Corinthians2:17 Amu acheek koma ki uu che chaang', che poisyee ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet eng' ng'aalseet: ago ki che poisyei eng' ooreet ne ma tinyei ng'aalseet, ago ki po Kamuktaindet, ak eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, keng'alaali eng' Kristo." 
2Corinthians3:1 Ara anyun, kagitau kogeny kemwauge acheeget? Anan kimache, ko uu ye machei piik alak, paronok che po mwaitaetapkei che pwonjinok ak che punwok?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Oo parweennyo ne siraat eng' mugulelwekyok, ne naat ak kosomani piik tugul;" 
2Corinthians3:3 oboortoige ole oo parweet ne po Kristo, ne ki kiyai, ne ki kisir ama eng' wino, ago eng' Kabuuset ne po Kamuktaindet ne sabei; ma eng' koik che lebeleen, ago eng' koik che lebeleen che mugulelwek che po poorwek." 
2Corinthians3:4 Ak ketinye kamang'unet ne uu nooto eng' Kristo, ne tokyingei Kamuktaindet:" 
2Corinthians3:5 ma keele ki tinyei kiy acheegei ne yamegei ak kiy, kiit kiy age tugul keele punwech acheeget; ago punu Kamuktaindet che yamech;" 
2Corinthians3:6 ne kiyaech keegu che yamei, kiboitiinik che po arorutyet ne leel; ma che po ng'atuutyet, ago po Kabuuset ne Tiliil; amu parisyei ng'atuutyet, ago Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne igoitoi saboondo." 
2Corinthians3:7 Ago ngo ki pwa kobooto toroornatet poisyetap meet, ne ki kisir, ak kewachi koik parak, kot kogimata komuuch piigap Israel kogeer togeet ne po Musa komyee amu liilindap togeennyi; liilindo ne ki igeesugei:" 
2Corinthians3:8 tos ma tesat kosiir poisyetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' toroornatet? 
2Corinthians3:9 Amu ngo poisyetap kirwooget ko toroornatet, ko siirtoot miising' poisyetap imanda eng' toroornatet." 
2Corinthians3:10 Amu iman, nooto ne ki kitoroor, ko ki ma kigoochi toroornatet agobo niito, amu toroornatet ne siirtoot." 
2Corinthians3:11 Amu ngo ki mi nooto siirtoi kobooto toroornatet, komiitei anyun eng' toroornatet ne tya, nooto ne ng'etunot." 
2Corinthians3:12 Nooto anyun, amu ki tinyei kamang'unet ne uu ni, keboisyee anyun nyiganateet ne po keny eng' ng'alaalet," 
2Corinthians3:13 ama ki uu Musa, ne kituge togeennyi angeet, si ma keer piigap Israel komyee kagesunet ne po nooto ki igeesugei:" 
2Corinthians3:14 ago kiuegitu kabwaatutikwak: amu agoi peetuuni, eng' somaneetap kayomiset ne po keny, kota komi anganooto po togeet, tomo keisto; nooto ne kigeisto eng' Kristo." 
2Corinthians3:15 Ago agoi peetuuni, ko eng' peetuut age tugul ye kisomani Musa, kota komiitei anganooto mugulelwekwak." 
2Corinthians3:16 Ago ye kaweekyinegei Kiptaiyat, keisto anganooto." 
2Corinthians3:17 Kiptaiyat ko Kabuuset ne Tiliil anyun: ak ole mi Kabuusetap Kiptaiyat komi katyaget. 
2Corinthians3:18 Ago acheek tugul koboortoi toroornatetap Kiptaiyat ko uu ki oit eng' togoochikyok che ma tugootiin, kewalech eng' itoonooto kobunu toroornatet agoi toroornatet, ko uu ye punu Kiptaiyat ne Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
2Corinthians4:1 Nooto anyun, amu ki tinyei poisyoni, ko uu ye ki kenyooru rireenetapkei, ko mameech mugulel:" 
2Corinthians4:2 ago kigeeesye tuguuk che ung'ootiin che po kalilanet, ama kibendoti eng' ng'aalseet, anan keboisyee ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet eng' kaberberisyet; ago eng' kabartaetap imanit, kiboorchinigei kabwaatetap chii age tugul eng' taitap Kamuktaindet." 
2Corinthians4:3 Ago ngo tugootiin logoiywekyok che myach, ko tugootiin eng' icheek che lustos:" 
2Corinthians4:4 eng' icheek che katuch kamuktaindetap ng'wonyuni kabwaatutigap che ma iyani, si ma iluuchi icheek lapkeiyetap logoiywek che myach che po toroornatetap Kristo, ne ineendet ko itoondap Kamuktaindet." 
2Corinthians4:5 Amu ma ki amdoti agobo kei, ago Kristo Jeso ne Kiptaiyat, ak acheeget ko ki otwogikwok amu Jeso." 
2Corinthians4:6 Amu Kamuktaindet ne ki mwa kole, “Tuun iluu lapkeiyet eng' mesundeito,” ineendet ne ki iluuchi mugulelwekyok, si kogoon lapkeiyet ne po naetap toroornatetap Kamuktaindet eng' togeetap Jeso Kristo." 
2Corinthians4:7 Ago ki tinyei konorwani eng' tereenik che po kimindeet, si kobiit kobunji Kamuktaindet ooindo ne siirtoot miising' ne po kamuktaet, ago ma acheek;" 
2Corinthians4:8 kinyalilech eng' komosta age tugul, ago ma kigichech; kitoptobeni, ago ma petwech kamang'unet;" 
2Corinthians4:9 Ki onwech, ago ma kibagaaktaech; ki wiirtaech ago ma ki parech;" 
2Corinthians4:10 ki ibooti kotugul eng' poorto meetap Jeso, si kobiit kong'ang'ak agine saboondap Jeso eng' poorwekyok." 
2Corinthians4:11 Amu acheeget che kisoptosi kimutyinech meet kotugul amu Jeso, si kobiit kong'ang'ak agine saboondap Jeso eng' poorwekyok che pegu." 
2Corinthians4:12 Nooto anyun poisyei meet eng' acheek, ago saboondo eng' okweek." 
2Corinthians4:13 Ago amu ki tinyei Kabuuset ne Tiliil nooto po kayaneet, ko uu ye ki kisir keele ki ayan, nooto anyun ki ang'alaali; kiyani agacheek, ak keng'alaali amu nooto;" 
2Corinthians4:14 kingen keele ineendet ne ki ing'eet Kiptaiyat Jeso ko tuun ing'eetech agacheek kobooto Jeso, ak kobartech kobootok." 
2Corinthians4:15 Amu tuguuk tugul ko agobo okweek, si ye tesak myeeindo eng' che chaang', koyai kagoitoetap kongoi kotesak eng' katorooretap Kamuktaindet." 
2Corinthians4:16 Nooto anyun, mameech mugulel; ago agot ngo ng'emak chiinyo ne po parak, kewalei chiinyo ne po oriit kileeliti peetuut age tugul." 
2Corinthians4:17 Amu pichiindanyo ne nyumnyum, ne ma tebyei, koyaiywech toroornatet ne oo ne po koigeny, ne tesoksei miising' kosiir;" 
2Corinthians4:18 ye ma kigeere tuguuk che taagu, ago tuguuk che ma taagu, amu tuguuk che taagu kosiirtoi; ago tuguuk che ma taagu ko po koigeny." 
2Corinthians5:1 Amu kingen keele ngo putok koot ne po ng'wonyuni ne poorwekyok, ketinye teekseet ne punu Kamuktaindet, koot ne ki ma kiteech eng' eunek, po koigeny, eng' kipsengwet." 
2Corinthians5:2 Amu iman kitigendosi eng' ni, kimache miising' kilaakwech meng'ootennyo ne punu kipsengwet:" 
2Corinthians5:3 ye tuun kagilaakwech koma kemi aach ngor. 
2Corinthians5:4 Iman, acheek che ki mi eng' porito, ketigendosi, ketinye laiset; ma keele kimache keregunenech, ago kimache kilaakwech, si kobiit kolugui saboondo nooto meei." 
2Corinthians5:5 Ara anyun, ne kiyaech agobo niito, ko Kamuktaindet, ne ki koonech Kabuuset ne Tiliil, koek tongoaniatap tuguuk che pwoonei." 
2Corinthians5:6 Eng' nooto anyun kinyigoonen kotugul, ak kingen keele, ye ta kemi eng' poorto, ko kagimi kobooto Kiptaiyat" 
2Corinthians5:7 (amu kibendoti eng' kayaneet, ma eng' keeret);" 
2Corinthians5:8 amwae ale, kinyigoonen, ak kemache keele, kaigai kemande eng' poorto, ak ketebi kobooto Kiptaiyat." 
2Corinthians5:9 Nooto anyun ko ki it ne kitokyinige, ngemi eng' poori, anan ngo ma kimi, keegu che iboiboi ineendet." 
2Corinthians5:10 Amu kanyool kibartech acheek tugul eng' taitap ng'echereetap kirwooget ne po Kristo; si kobiit kotaach chii age tugul tuguuk che tee che ki yai eng' poorto, ngo myach anan ngo yaach." 
2Corinthians5:11 Amu kingen anyun kayweetap Kiptaiyat, kichuutu piik, ago kibortaech eng' taitap Kamuktaindet; ak amang'u ale kibortoech eng' taitap kabwaateng'wong'." 
2Corinthians5:12 Ma kimwauge kogeny eng' taing'wong', ago ki koonok poroindo si kobiit olasuge amu acheek, si kobiit onyooru kiit ne kowoljini icheeget che ilasugei eng' tuguuk che taagu, ama eng' muguleldo." 
2Corinthians5:13 Agot ngo kogobetech met, ko eng' Kamuktaindet; anan ngo litit ng'omnatennyo, ko amu okweek." 
2Corinthians5:14 Amu ichiichech chamyetap Kristo; amu kingen ko uu ni, keele kime chiito agenge agobo tugul, nooto anyun ki pek tugul;" 
2Corinthians5:15 ak ki mechi ineendet tugul, si ma kosaptos agobo kei icheeget che saptos, ago agobo ineendet ne ki mechi ak kong'eet kogeny." 
2Corinthians5:16 Nooto anyun kobooch nguno koma kingen chii age tugul eng' poorto: ago ngot ki kingen Kristo eng' poorto, koma kingen ineendet nguno ko uu nooto kogeny." 
2Corinthians5:17 Nooto anyun, ngo mi chii age tugul eng' Kristo, kogigeyai ineendet koek chiito ne leel: kagosiirto tuguuk che po keny; ogeero, kagoek che leelach." 
2Corinthians5:18 Ago po tuguuk tugul Kamuktaindet ne kiituiyenechkei eng' Kristo, ak ki koonech acheek poisyet ne po katuiyet;" 
2Corinthians5:19 keele ki mi Kamuktaindet eng' Kristo kotuitos ng'wony ak ineendet, koma iityin icheek yaitwogikwak, ko kagogoonech ng'olyootap katuiyet." 
2Corinthians5:20 Nooto anyun kitononjinik agobo Kristo, ko uu ye igoigook Kamuktaindet eng' acheek; kigoigook agobo Kristo, keele otuiyegei ak Kamuktaindet." 
2Corinthians5:21 Ineendet ne ki ma kongen tengek, kogiyai ineendet koek tengek amu acheek; si kobiit keegu imanda ne po Kamuktaindet eng' ineendet." 
2Corinthians6:1 Kisoome acheek che keboisyei ak Kamuktaindet keele amotaach myeeindap Kamuktaindet puch 
2Corinthians6:2 (amu mwaei keele, Ki agasin eng' peetuut ne po chamjinet, Ak ki atoretiin eng' peetuut ne po saruunet: Ogeero, nguno ko peetuut ne po chamjinet; ogeero, nguno ko peetuut ne po yetunet):" 
2Corinthians6:3 ama ki yai kiy age tugul ne po kanagut, si ma kimwaitae poisyennyo yaityo;" 
2Corinthians6:4 ago eng' tuguuk tugul kiboortoige, ko uu kiboitinigap Kamuktaindet, eng' muitaet ne oo, eng' pichiinwek, eng' kagiigosyek, eng' tiritinwek," 
2Corinthians6:5 eng' pirutik, eng' ratisyosyek, eng' polatosyek, eng' poisyonik che uueen, eng' riipsosyek, eng' rugutosyek;" 
2Corinthians6:6 eng' tiliilindo, eng' naet, eng' mutyonet, eng' talasyet, eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil, eng' chamyet ne ma tinyei keniisyet," 
2Corinthians6:7 eng' ng'olyootap imanit, eng' kamuktaetap Kamuktaindet; eng' kariigap imanda eng' eutap tai ak eng' murot kaataam," 
2Corinthians6:8 eng' toroornatet ak teweernateet, eng' ng'aleek che yaach che kimwaitaenech, ak eng' ng'aleek che myachen; ko uu kaberberik, ago ki po iman;" 
2Corinthians6:9 ko uu che ma naotin, ago kingenech komyee; ko uu che machei kobek, ak ogeero, kisoptosi; ko uu che kitigoni, ago ma ki parech;" 
2Corinthians6:10 ko uu che aragendos, ago che poiboi kotugul; ko uu che ponondos, ago imogornoni che chaang'; ko uu che ma tinyei kiy, ago tinyei tuguuk tugul." 
2Corinthians6:11 Kagiyatwok kutusweekyok, ee Korintoechu, kabaraitu mugulelwekyok." 
2Corinthians6:12 Ma ogiigotin eng' acheek, ago ogiigotin eng' chamyeng'wong'." 
2Corinthians6:13 Ak eng' kageeret ne tee ne ki kigoonok (ang'alaali ko uu ye ang'alaaljini lagokyuk), ingobartaitu mugulelwekwok." 
2Corinthians6:14 Amat oratkei ak che ma iyanotin: tinyei imanda yamdao nee ak tengekto? Anan tinyei yamdao nee lapkeiyet ak mesundeito? 
2Corinthians6:15 Anan kasyindos eng' nee Kristo ak Belial? Anan ting'egei nee ne iyanaat ak ne ma iyanaat? 
2Corinthians6:16 Ak ting'egei nee Hekaluut ne po Kamuktaindet ak kanamonik? Amu ki Hekaluut ne po Kamuktaindet ne sabei; ago ko uu ye ki mwa Kamuktaindet kole, Amenye icheek, ak awendotee icheek; Ak aegu Kamuktaindet nenywa, Ak koek icheek piikyuk." 
2Corinthians6:17 Nooto anyun omong'u eng' kwenunnywa, Ak otabaange, mwaei Kiptaiyat, Amotwaa kiy ne po simdo; Si ataachak," 
2Corinthians6:18 Ak aegu Kwanda eng' okweek, Ak oegu weeriik ak tiibiik eng' anee, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Ne po Kamuktaet." 
2Corinthians7:1 Amu ki tinyei arorutichu anyun, chamanichu, ongitiliilgei, keiste simdo tugul ne po poorto ak ne po saboondo si keityi tiliilindo eng' kaiyweisyetap Kamuktaindet." 
2Corinthians7:2 Oyatwech mugulelwekwok: ma ki yachi chii age tugul kiy ne ya, ma king'em chii age tugul, ma ki ibe chii age tugul kiy." 
2Corinthians7:3 Ma mwaei niito ale arwookwok: amu kisip amwa, ale omi eng' mugulelwekyok kebegu tugul ak kesapche tugul." 
2Corinthians7:4 Oo nyiganateet ne ang'alaalunenok, oo katoroorennyu pogei agobo okweek: kanyiia kagaigaet, kanyiia poiboiyet kot kong'irtagei eng' pichiinwekyok tugul." 
2Corinthians7:5 Amu agot ye ki ngeitu Makedonia, koma nyoor poorwekyok kamuung'et, ago ki kinyalilech eng' komosta age tugul; kimi saang' pooryosyek, ak ki mi oriit kaiyweisyosyek." 
2Corinthians7:6 Ago Kamuktaindet ne igoigoi che nyerootiin, ko ki igaigaech eng' nyonunetap Tito;" 
2Corinthians7:7 ak, ma eng' nyonunennyi kityo, ago eng' kagaigaet ne ki ogaigai ineendet, ye kingo mwaiwech emostong'wong', ak riirekwok, ak kagiileng'wong' pogei agobo anee; kot abaibaitu miising' kosiir." 
2Corinthians7:8 Amu agot ngo ki agoonok oaragense eng' parweennyu, koma ageer ko ya, nganda kita ageer ko ya; amu ageere ale ki koonok parwaanooto oaragense, nganda ki po peetuusyek che matya." 
2Corinthians7:9 Abaibai nguno, ma amu ki kigoonok oaragense, ago abaibai amu ki kigoonok oaragense agoi siguunet: amu ki kigoonok oaragense eng' arageneet ne tokyingei Kamuktaindet, si ma petwok kiy age tugul amu acheek." 
2Corinthians7:10 Amu arageneet ne tokyingei Kamuktaindet koyaei siguunet agoi yetunet, ne ma tinyei ndara, ago arageneet ne po ng'wonyuni koibu meet." 
2Corinthians7:11 Amu ogeero, ng'olyoondoniito ne ki koonok arageneet ne tokyingei Kamuktaindet, kogiyai kagiilet ne uu nee eng' okweek; ee, saruunetapkei, ee, nereeknateet; ee, kaiyweisyet; ee, emosto; ee, kagiiletapkei; ee, yaaktaetap mugetuut! Eng' kiy age tugul ko ki obartegei ole oo tiliileen eng' ng'olyoondoniito." 
2Corinthians7:12 Ko anyun, nganda ki asirwak, ko ki ma asirwak agobo ng'olyoondetap ineendet ne ki yai ne ya, anan amu ng'olyoondetap ineendet ne ki kiyachi ne ya, ago si kong'ang'ak eng' okweek kagiileng'wong' pogei agobo acheek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet." 
2Corinthians7:13 Nooto anyun ki kigaigaech: ak eng' kagaigaennyo ko ki kiboiboitu miising' ne siirei amu poiboiyetap Tito, amu ki ogoochi okweek tugul muguleldannyi komuuny." 
2Corinthians7:14 Ak ngo ki amwachi ineendet kiy age tugul eng' lasetapkei agobo okweek, ko ki ma kikoono alilan; ago ko uu ye kigemwaiwok tuguuk tugul eng' iman, ko uu nooto kalasunennyo agine, ne ki amwa eng' taitap Tito, ko ki ek iman." 
2Corinthians7:15 Ak oo miising' ne siirtoot chamyennyi ne po oriit agobo okweek, kobwaati kasetap iit neng'wong' tugul, ko uu ye ki otaach ineendet eng' kaiyweisyet ak potanet." 
2Corinthians7:16 Abaibai anyun amu ating'enok kamang'unet eng' kiy age tugul. 
2Corinthians8:1 Kiboorwok anyun, che kitupche, myeeindap Kamuktaindet ne ki kigoochi kanisosyegap Makedonia;" 
2Corinthians8:2 ale ye ki ngetyem icheek eng' nyalilda ne oo, ko kitesak poiboindanywa ne siirtoot ak panandanywa ne oo kot kotesyi icheek mogornateetap aiyebindonywa." 
2Corinthians8:3 Amu abaoryani ale ki igoito eng' chamyennywa ko uu kamugennywa, ak ne siirei kamugennywa," 
2Corinthians8:4 kosoomech eng' kagaigaet ne oo agobo myeini ak yamdaet eng' poisyet ne kiboisyechin che tiliileen: 
2Corinthians8:5 ak ma ko uu ye ki kimang'u, ago kisip kogoochigei icheeget Kiptaiyat, ak ki konechkei eng' mageetap Kamuktaindet;" 
2Corinthians8:6 agoi ki kiil Tito, keele ko uu ye kisip kotoi, komachei kosulda eng' okweek myeiniito agine." 
2Corinthians8:7 Ago ko uu ye otinye aiyebindo eng' kiy age tugul, eng' kayaneet, ak tweguunet, ak naet, ak eng' kagiiletapkei tugul, ak eng' chamyeng'wong' ne oting'enech, ingonyiiak anyun myeiniito agine." 
2Corinthians8:8 Ma ng'alaali eng' ng'atuutyet, ago atyeme eng' kagiiletapkei ne po alak, ngo po iman chamyeng'wong'." 
2Corinthians8:9 Amu ongen myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo ole, agot nganda ki mogoryo, ko ki ek kibanania agobo okweek, si kobiit oegu mogoreek eng' panandanyi." 
2Corinthians8:10 Ak eng' niito aboorwok kabwaatutikyuk: amu nyolu niito eng' okweek, che ki kosip otau eng' kenyiit agenge ne kogosiirto, ma kityo oyai, ago ochame agine." 
2Corinthians8:11 Ago ogesu anyun nguno poisyet; amu ko uu ye kio chobootiin ochame oyai ko uu nooto, komiitei ko uu nooto kasuldaet ne po kamugeng'wong'." 
2Corinthians8:12 Amu ngo choboot kabwaatetap chii, ko taachaksei ko uu ye tinyei chii, ma ko uu ye ma tinyei." 
2Corinthians8:13 Amu ma ale si kinyamnyumji alak, kinyalilaak okweek;" 
2Corinthians8:14 ago koaechin; toreti nguno anyun chaang'indang'wong' terterindanywa, si kotoret chaang'indonywa terterindang'wong'; si kobiit kogergeit:" 
2Corinthians8:15 ko uu ye ki kisir keele, Ineendet ne ki iyum che chaang' koma siirto kiy; ak ineendet ne ki iyum che ng'ering' ko mararchi kiy." 
2Corinthians8:16 Ago kongoi eng' Kamuktaindet, ne indoi muguleldap Tito ko uu nooto kagiiletapkei agobo okweek." 
2Corinthians8:17 Amu kitaach iman kagiilennyo, ago amu igiilegei kot, kogonyo anyun ole omi eng' chamyennyi." 
2Corinthians8:18 Ak kogiyookte tupchet age kobooto ineendet ne tagunoot kalasunennyi agobo logoiywek che myach eng' kanisosyek tugul; 
2Corinthians8:19 ak ma nooto kityo, ago ki lewen kanisosyek ineendet kebendatee tugul agobo myeini, ne kiyae acheek keyachini toroornatetap Kiptaiyat, ak kibooru chobennyo pogei ne kitinye." 
2Corinthians8:20 Kimachei keistoegei ng'olyoondoniito keele, si kobiit ma mwaitaenech chii age tugul kiy ne ya agobo aiyebini kiyaati," 
2Corinthians8:21 amu kibwaati tuguuk che po teegisto, ma eng' taitap Kiptaiyat kityo, ago eng' taitap piik ak icheek." 
2Corinthians8:22 Ak kogiyookte kobooto icheek tupchennyo, ne kogegeer konyil che chaang' keele igiilegei eng' tuguuk che chaang', ago nguno ko ki ilegei miising' kosiir, amu kamang'unet ne ting'enok miising'." 
2Corinthians8:23 Ngo teebenak chii agobo Tito, ineendet ko kiboityot ne ki mi tuwai, ak kiboisyei tuwai agobo okweek; anan agobo tupchosyekyok, icheeget ko che kiyooktoi che po kanisosyek, chooto ko toroornatetap Kristo." 
2Corinthians8:24 Nooto anyun oboorchi icheeget eng' taitap kanisosyek kiit ne ibooru chamyeng'wong', ak kalasunennyo pogei agobo okweek." 
2Corinthians9:1 Ago eng' ng'aleegap poisyet ne kiboisyechin che tiliileen koma tilei kiy kota asirwak. 
2Corinthians9:2 Amu angen chobeng'wong' pogei ne alasunegei agobo okweek eng' icheek che po Makedonia, ale Ki kochopkei Akaia kobooch kenyiit agenge ne kogosiirto; ak kigong'eet kagiileng'wong' pogei che chaang' miising' eng' icheek." 
2Corinthians9:3 Ago koayogu che kitupche, si ma ek puch kalasunennyo pogei agobo okweek eng' ng'olyoondoniito; si kobiit ochopkei, ko uu ye ki amwa:" 
2Corinthians9:4 si ngot kebwa ak age ne po Makedonia, ak kenyoorwok kotom ochoboge, kiteweerech eng' kamang'unoni (si ma ki mwa keele okweek)." 
2Corinthians9:5 Ki abwaat anyun ale kanyool agaigai che kitupche, si kobiit kondoi kobwa olo omi, si kosip kochop tuguuk che po aiyebindong'wong' che ki kosip oaror, si kobiit kochobok tuguuchooto, koek tuguuk che po aiyebindo, ama po torchinet." 
2Corinthians9:6 Ago amwae ni anyun ale, Ineendet ne koolei che ng'ering' kogesei agine che ng'ering'; ak ineendet ne koolei eng' aiyebindo kogesei agine che po aiyebindo." 
2Corinthians9:7 Ingogoito chii age tugul ko uu ye Ki kochop eng' muguleldanyi; ma eng' ng'ooknateet, anan torchinet: amu chamei Kamuktaindet ne igoitoi eng' poiboiyet." 
2Corinthians9:8 Ak komuuchi Kamuktaindet kogoonok myeeindo tugul kotesak miising'; si otinye okweek kotugul tuguuk tugul che yamok eng' kiit age tugul, si otunen eng' poisyet age tugul ne myee:" 
2Corinthians9:9 ko uu ye ki kisir keele, Kigoserser, Ki kogoochi kibananook; Tebyei imandanyi koigeny." 
2Corinthians9:10 Ak ineendet ne igoochin kesweek kolindet ak amitwogik che amei, kogoonok ak kotesei kesweekwok che ogoole, ak kotes logoegap imandang'wong':" 
2Corinthians9:11 ki koonok mogornateet eng' kiy age tugul eng' aiyebindo tugul, ne igoochin Kamuktaindet kongoi eng' acheek." 
2Corinthians9:12 Amu yaetap poisyoni koma inyiityin kityo piik che tiliileen tuguuk che tee che kobononi, ago tesoksei agine eng' kaweekyinoik che chaang' che po kongoi che kiweekyin Kamuktaindet;" 
2Corinthians9:13 amu tyemet ne po poisyoni kotoroori icheek Kamuktaindet amu kasetap iit ne po ng'ang'eng'wong' eng' logoiywek che myach che po Kristo, ak aiyebindap kagoitoeng'wong' eng' icheek, ak eng' tugul;" 
2Corinthians9:14 ak eng' saaennywa agobo okweek, koting'enok emosto amu myeeindap Kamuktaindet ne tesat miising' eng' okweek." 
2Corinthians9:15 Kongoi eng' Kamuktaindet amu konunennyi ne ma mwaoksei. 
2Corinthians10:1 Asoomok anyun anee Paulo eng' talasyet ak mutyonetap Kristo, anee ne ming'in ye ami kobootok eng' kwenung'wong', ago ye ma mi kobootok atinye nyiganateet:" 
2Corinthians10:2 ee, asoomok, ale si ma nyiganitu ye ami kobootok eng' kamang'unet ne koono aiit ale aa nyigan eng' alak, che iitech kole kibendoti eng' atebeetap poorto." 
2Corinthians10:3 Amu agot ngebendoti eng' poorto, koma kiyae lugeet eng' atebeetap poorto;" 
2Corinthians10:4 (amu kariigap lugeennyo koma po poorto, ago tinyei kamuget eng' taitap Kamuktaindet koluul irimosyek);" 
2Corinthians10:5 kiluuli kabwaatutik, ak kiy age tugul ne toroor ne ieetegei kole kogirinda naetap Kamuktaindet, ak koluulei kabwaatet age tugul si kobiit kogas iit Kristo;" 
2Corinthians10:6 ko ki chobootiin keyaakyi mugetuut pistoet tugul, ye tuun isulda kaseng'wong' po iit." 
2Corinthians10:7 Ogeere tuguuk che miitei taitap konyekwok. Ngot komang'ugei chii age tugul kole po Kristo, ko ingoruchi niito kogeny ineegei, kole, ko uu ye po Kristo ineendet, ke uu nooto agacheek." 
2Corinthians10:8 Amu agot ngo nyolu kota aloskei kitigin agobo kimnateennyo (ne kigon Kiptaiyat si kobiit koteechak, ama si koluulok), koma lilani;" 
2Corinthians10:9 si ma egu ne amutenok paronokyuk. 
2Corinthians10:10 Amu mwaei icheek kole, “Paronokyik ko nyigiisen ak ko kiimeen; ago nyalulat ineendet ye miitei tainnywa, ama tilei kiy ng'aleekyik.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Ingobwaat ne uu nooto, ni, kole, kiit ne ki uu eng' ng'olyoot eng' paronok ye ma kimi, ke uu nooto agine eng' poisyet ye ki miitei." 
2Corinthians10:12 Magoi kityem kiitkei anan kirogenegei icheek che ilasugei: ngo rogegeigei ak koyaniege kei icheegei, ko kaiboor naet ne ma ititaat." 
2Corinthians10:13 Ma kitoroorigei acheek kot kosiirto, ago kirogendoegei kaaroret ne kiitwech Kamuktaindet kot keitu ola omi." 
2Corinthians10:14 Amu ma kiyogoitoige kosiir, ko uu ne ma kiitu olong'wong': amu kigebwa agoi olong'wong' eng' logoiywek che myach che po Kristo:" 
2Corinthians10:15 ama kilasuge kosiir ne tee ne yamei, eng' poisyonigap piik alak; ago kimang'u keele, ko uu ye tesoksei kayaneng'wong', kitoroorech eng' okweek ko uu ole tee kakwaennyo, kot kosiir," 
2Corinthians10:16 si kobiit keamde logoiywek che myach agot eng' komoswek che mi komosin eng' olong'wong', ama kilasuge eng' kakwaetap chii age eng' tuguuk che kigechop." 
2Corinthians10:17 Ago ineendet ne ilasugei, ingoloskei eng' Kiptaiyat." 
2Corinthians10:18 Amu ma ineendet ne ilasugei ne kiyani, ago ineendet ne ilasu Kiptaiyat." 
2Corinthians11:1 Ee, kata kaigai ndomuuchi omuitaiwa eng' perberyo kitigin: ee omuitaiwa iman." 
2Corinthians11:2 Amu ama ng'etkong' agobo okweek, eng' ng'etkonda ne po Kamuktaindet: amu ki achamwok obunji manong'otyot agenge, si kobiit amutyok Kristo ko uu pergeiyat ne tiliil." 
2Corinthians11:3 Ago aiywei ale, si ma ng'emogis eng' oor age tugul kabwaatutikwok eng' lititindo ak tiliilindo ne tokyingei Kristo ko uu ye ki iberber ereneet Hawa eng' ng'aalseennyi." 
2Corinthians11:4 Amu ineendet ne nyoonei, ngo amda Jeso age, ne ki ma kiamde acheek, anan ngo taach Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne teer, ne ki ma otaach okweek, anan logoiywek che myach che teer, che ki ma oyan, ko kaagaa anyun omuitochini ineendet komyee." 
2Corinthians11:5 Amu aiitige ale ma mi let eng' kiy age tugul eng' che eecheen miising' eng' che kiyooktoi. 
2Corinthians11:6 Agot ngo uu ng'alaalennyu ne po chii ne ma ineetkei, koma uu nooto eng' naet; achicha, ki kibartech acheek eng' okweek eng' kiy age tugul eng' kwenutap piik tugul." 
2Corinthians11:7 Anan ki ayai tengek ye kinga ming'inge si kobiit kitoroorok okweek, amu ki aamwok logoiywek che myach che po Kamuktaindet ama melekto?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Ki arebee kanisosyek alak, aibe melekto eng' icheek si kobiit aboisyeunenok;" 
2Corinthians11:9 ak ye kinga mi kobootok ak abanani, ko ki ma agoochi chii age tugul nyigiisin; amu kingo it tupchosyek kobunu Makedonia, kogoono che tee che ki abanani; ak ki ariipkei eng' kiy age tugul ale si ma egu nyigiisin eng' okweek, ak ta ariibegei." 
2Corinthians11:10 Ko uu ye mi imanitap Kristo eng' anee, ma mi chii ne kirindoa eng' kalasunoni eng' korotinwegap Akaia." 
2Corinthians11:11 Amu nee anyun? Amu ma chamok? Ingen Kamuktaindet. 
2Corinthians11:12 Ago kiit ne ayae, ayae nooto, si kobiit atile poroindo icheeget che machei poroindo; si kobiit kogergeit ak icheek eng' kioto ilasunegei." 
2Corinthians11:13 Amu piik che uu chooto ko che kiyooktoi che po lembech, kiboitinigap keniisyet, che walegei koek che kiyooktoi che po Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:14 Ama mi kwong'eet; amu agot Setani kowalegei koek malaikaiyatap lapkeiyet. 
2Corinthians11:15 Ma kiy ne oo anyun ngo walegei otwogikyik koigei kiboitinigap imanda; ne kagesunennywa konamegei ak poisyonikwak. 
2Corinthians11:16 Amwae kogeny ale, Amat kobwaat chii kole aa perber; ago ngo uu nooto, otaacha okweek ngo aa perber, si kobiit aloske agane kitigin." 
2Corinthians11:17 Nooto amwae, koma mwaei eng' Kiptaiyat, ago ko uu eng' perberyo, eng' nyiganataniito po kalasunetapkei." 
2Corinthians11:18 Amu ngo lasugei che chaang' eng' poorto, alasuge agane." 
2Corinthians11:19 Amu omuitochini che perberen eng' poiboiyet, amu oo utaatiin." 
2Corinthians11:20 Amu omuitochini chiito, ngo yaak oegu otwogik, ngo amok, ngo namak, ngo toroorgei, ngo rabachok." 
2Corinthians11:21 Ang'alaali eng' sasetapkei, ko uu ye kinyalulyotin. Ago ngot ko nyigan chii eng' kiy age tugul (ang'alaali eng' perberyo), aa nyigan agane." 
2Corinthians11:22 Tos Yahudik icheek? Aa uu nooto agane. Tos Israelik icheek? Aa uu nooto agane. Tos kesweegap Abraham icheek? Auu nooto agine. 
2Corinthians11:23 Tos kiboitinigap Kristo icheek? (Ang'alaali ko uu chii ne amei iywek) aa siirtoot; eng' pirtaosyegapkei che siirtoot, eng' korgorosyek miising', eng' pirutik che ma kirarei, eng' meosyek konyil che chaang'." 
2Corinthians11:24 Ki anyooru eng' Yahudik konyil muut pirutik artam, ki pet agenge." 
2Corinthians11:25 Ki kibirena kirokweek konyil somok, ki kilagena koik konyil agenge, king'emak moinget ne ki ami konyil somok, ki atebee nyanjet peetuut agenge ak kemout agenge." 
2Corinthians11:26 Eng' panwek konyil che chaang', ng'oiyonditap ainoosyek, ng'oiyondit ne punu rebiik, ng'oiyondit ne punu piigap pororyennyu, ng'oiyondit ne punu Pororyosyek, ng'oiyondit eng' nganaseet, ng'oiyondit eng' surkwen, ng'oiyondit eng' nyanjet, ng'oiyondit eng' kwenutap tupchosyek che po lembech;" 
2Corinthians11:27 eng' pirtoetapkei ak nyalilda, eng' riipsosyek konyil che chaang', eng' rubeet ak melelda, eng' rugutosyek konyil che chaang', eng' kaititindo ak aach ngorit." 
2Corinthians11:28 Kobooto tuguuchooto po saang', komi agine nooto ne igiicha peetuut age tugul, tononjinetap kanisosyek tugul." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ng'oo ne nyalulat, ama aa nyalulat anee? Ng'oo ne koginach, ama agas agane ng'wanindo?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Ngot ko nyolu aloske, alasuge agobo tuguuk che po nyalulennyu." 
2Corinthians11:31 Ingen Kamuktaindet Kwandap Kiptaiyat Jeso, ne iberuurot koigeny, kole magenu." 
2Corinthians11:32 Ki riip eng' Damasko pounindetap laitoryat Areta, nganaseetap Damaskik, kole konama:" 
2Corinthians11:33 ak ki kichoortaena mesendet eng' tirisyet ne po irimeet, ak ki achilil eng' eunnyi." 
2Corinthians12:1 Kanyool aloske, agot ngo ma nyolu; ago aityini keersosyek ak ng'ang'utik che po Kiptaiyat." 
2Corinthians12:2 Angen chiito eng' Kristo, kobooch nguno ko kenyiisyek taman ak ang'wan (ngo ki mi eng' poorto, ko mangen; anan ngo kiga komanda eng' poorto, ko mangen; ingen Kamuktaindet), ale ki kimut ineendet kotogosta agoi kipsengwet ne po somok." 
2Corinthians12:3 Ak angen chiichooto (ngo ki mi eng' poorto, anan ki ma kota komi eng' poorto, ko mangen; ingen Kamuktaindet)," 
2Corinthians12:4 ale ki kimut kotogosta agoi Paradiso, ak ki kas ng'aleek che ma mwaoksei, che ma chamdaat kogetyigei komwa chii." 
2Corinthians12:5 Alasuge agobo chiichooto: ago malasuge agobo aneege, kobatee eng' nyalulnatosyekyuk." 
2Corinthians12:6 Amu ngot amache aloske, koma perberitu; amu amwae ne po iman: ago asise, si mat koiita chii age tugul kosiir ne tee ne keerchino, anan ye kasena." 
2Corinthians12:7 Ak eng' ooindo ne siirtoot ne po ng'ang'utik - si ma kitoroora miising', ko ki kigoono kateet eng' poorto, ne otwoget ne po Setani kobira si ma toroorgei miising'." 
2Corinthians12:8 Ki asoom Kiptaiyat miising' konyil somok agobo kiito, ale koistoenogei." 
2Corinthians12:9 Ak ki leenjo, Yamin myeeindonyu: amu kiyaei kamugennyu koek ne ititaat eng' nyalulet. Alasuge anyun eng' poiboiyet miising' kosiir amu nyalulnatosyekyuk, si kobiit kotebena kamugetap Kristo." 
2Corinthians12:10 Nooto anyun, abaibai eng' nyalulnatosyek, eng' ng'waninwek, eng' kagiigosyek, eng' usiisyosyek, eng' tiritinwek agobo Kristo; amu ye aa nyalulat, ko yooto anyun ye aa kiim." 
2Corinthians12:11 Kaaberberitu: ki obircha; amu kota nyolu oloswa okweek: amu ki ma aa po let eng' kiy age tugul eng' che koiyooktoi che eecheen kosiir, agot ngo ma aa kiy." 
2Corinthians12:12 Iman ki kiyae kwenung'wong' kaboorunoik che po kayooktoindet eng' muitaet tugul, eng' kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik ak poisyonik che po kamuktaet." 
2Corinthians12:13 Amu tos mi nee ne kiyaak oegu che nyerootiin eng' kanisosyek alak, kobatee ki ma aegu nyigiisin eng' okweek? Onyoiywa kaat lelutyoniito." 
2Corinthians12:14 Ogeero, niito ko ne po somok achoboksei ale Anyoonjok; ak manyone aegu nyigiisindo eng' okweek: amu ma cheeng'e tuguukwok, ago okweeget: amu ma nyooljin lagok kogonorchi tuguuk sigiik, ago konorchin sigiik lagok." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ak abaibai miising' aboisyee chechuuk ak keboisena agobo saboonwekwok. Ngot achamok miising' kosiir, ko tos ki chama kitigin?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Ago ngo uu nooto, ko ki ma agoonok nyigiisindo; ago atinye ng'omnateet, ak ki anamak eng' mesteet." 
2Corinthians12:17 Tos ki aibenok kiy eng' chii age tugul eng' icheeget che ki ayookwok? 
2Corinthians12:18 Ki atechi Tito, ak ki ayookte ne kitupche koba tuwai. Tos ki ibenok Tito kiy? Ki ma kebendoti eng' Kabuusonooto agenge? Tos ma eng' tyegutik che kergei?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Obwaati agoi nguno oleen kisaruge eng' taing'wong'. Eng' taitap Kamuktaindet keng'alaali eng' Kristo. Ago tuguuk tugul, ko si keteechak, chamanichu." 
2Corinthians12:20 Amu aiywei, ale si ye anyoo, koma nyoorwok eng' oor age tugul ko uu ye ma mache, ak onyoorwo ko uu ye momache; si ma piit eng' oor age tugul, pooryosyek, ng'etkonda, nereegek, suryosyek, ng'ooksosyek, chaamsosyek, menootosyek, polatosyek;" 
2Corinthians12:21 si ye tuun anyoo kogeny, koma iming'ina Kamuktaindet nenyu eng' taing'wong', ak ariir agobo che chaang' eng' icheek che ki yai tengekwogik kobooch yooto, ama sik eng' simdo ak sokseet ak mageet ne ya agobo tuguuk che yaach che ki yai icheek." 
2Corinthians13:1 Ni ko ne po somok anyonjinok. Ki kimiiti ng'olyoot age tugul eng' kutusweegap paorinik aeng' anan ko somok. 
2Corinthians13:2 Ki asip amwa, ak asip amwae kogeny, ko uu ye ki ami eng' panda ne po aeng', ko uu nooto nguno ye ma mi kobootok, eng' icheeget che ki yai tengekto, kobooch yooto, ak eng' chuun alak tugul, ale, si ma ye anyoo kogeny, koma rireegei;" 
2Corinthians13:3 amu ocheeng'e kaboorunetap Kristo ne ng'alaali eng' anee; ne ma nyalulat eng' okweek, ago tinyei kimnateet eng' okweek:" 
2Corinthians13:4 amu ki kigartaat eng' nyalulet, ago sabei eng' kamuktaetap Kamuktaindet. Amu kinyalulyotin ak acheek eng' ineendet, ago kisoptosi kobooto ineendet eng' kamuktaetap Kamuktaindet agobo okweek." 
2Corinthians13:5 Osiaige okweegei, ngo mi eng' kayaneet; otyemge okweegei. Anan mongen okweegei ole miitei Jeso Kristo eng' okweek? Iyois ko oo eesyootin iman." 
2Corinthians13:6 Ago amang'u ale ongen ole ma ki eesyootin. 
2Corinthians13:7 Kisaae Kamuktaindet anyun si moyai yaityo age tugul; ma si ketaagu keele ki kiyanech, ago si kobiit oyai nooto myee, agot nganda ko uu che kiesyoi." 
2Corinthians13:8 Amu ma kimuuchi keyai kiy ne kirindoi imanit, ago ne toreti imanit." 
2Corinthians13:9 Amu kiboiboen ye kinyalulyotin, ago oo kiimeen: kisaae agobo niito agine, keele oegu che ititaatiin." 
2Corinthians13:10 Amu nooto anyun, asire tuguuchu koma ami, si ma ye tuun ami koma poisyee koroomnateet, ko uu ole tee pounateet ne ki koono Kiptaiyat agobo teekseet, ma agobo putet." 
2Corinthians13:11 Ne po let anyun, che kitupche, ko saisere. Oegu che chobootiin; oegu che po kagaigaet; oegu che po kabwaatet agenge; otebi eng' kaalyeet: ak mi Kamuktaindet ne po chamyet ak kaalyeet kobootok." 
2Corinthians13:12 Ogatkei eng' ng'ututet ne tiliil. 
2Corinthians13:13 Igatok piik tugul che tiliileen. 
2Corinthians13:14 Ingotebi ak okweek tugul myeeindap Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo, ak chamyetap Kamuktaindet, ak yamdaetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Galatians1:1 Paulo, kayooktoindet, ama ne po piik, ama kiyok eng' chii, ago eng' Jeso Kristo, ak Kamuktaindet Kwanda, ne ki ing'eet ineendet komong' eng' che ki pek," 
Galatians1:2 ak tupchosyek tugul che mi kobooto, kisirchini kanisosyek che po Galatia." 
Galatians1:3 Ingotep kobootok myeeindo ak kaalyeet ne punu Kamuktaindet Kwanda, ak Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo," 
Galatians1:4 ne ki igoitogei agobo tengekwogikyok, si kobiit kosarwech eng' peetuusyechu yaacheen, ko uu mageetap Kamuktaindet nenyo ak ko Kwandanyo:" 
Galatians1:5 nenyi toroornatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Akwong'e amu oistoige ochoktoi eng' ineendet ne kiguurok eng' myeeindap Kristo, obe ye mi logoiywek che myach che teer;" 
Galatians1:7 che ma teer: kobatee mi alage che iimok, ak machei kowal logoiywek che myach che po Kristo." 
Galatians1:8 Agot ngo acheek, anan malaikaiyat ne punu kipsengwet, ne tos amwok logoiywek alak tugul che myach che teer eng' chooto che kigeamwok, ko ingoek ne chuboot ineendet." 
Galatians1:9 Ko uu ye kiga kemwa eng' tai, amwae nguno kogeny ko uu nooto ale, ngot koamwok chii age tugul logoiywek alak tugul che myach che teer eng' chooto ki otaach, ko ingoek ne chuboot ineendet." 
Galatians1:10 Tos agoigoi nguno piik anan Kamuktaindet? Anan acheeng'e abaibai piik? Ngot kota aboiboi piik, koma aa otwogetap Kristo." 
Galatians1:11 Amu aboorwok anyun, che kitupche, agobo logoiywek che myach che ki aamdoi, ale ma punu chii." 
Galatians1:12 Amu ki ma ataach eng' chii, ama kineta, ago eng' ng'ang'utyetap Jeso Kristo." 
Galatians1:13 Amu ki ogas agobo atebeennyu eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto eng' kayaneetap Yahudik, ko uu ye ki ausausi kanisetap Kamuktaindet kot kosiir, ak ki ang'emang'emi:" 
Galatians1:14 ak ki atese tai eng' kayaneetap Yahudik kosiir siritoikyuk che chaang' eng' piigap emennyu agiiligei miising' kosiir agobo pitonwegap kwanisyekyuk. 
Galatians1:15 Ago ye kingo cham Kamuktaindet, ne kiitabaana, kobooch moetap kamennyu, ak koguura eng' myeeindonyi," 
Galatians1:16 si kong'aany Weeriinnyi eng' anee, si kobiit aamda ineendet eng' Pororyosyek; ki ma king'alaal anyun ak chii eng' sainooto:" 
Galatians1:17 ama atogoste Jerusalem ole mi icheek che kisip koek che kiyooktoi eng' anee: ago ki awe Arabia; ak ki aweege agoi Damasko. 
Galatians1:18 Kingo keskei anyun kenyiisyek somogu atogoste awe Jerusalem si aboorchigei Kepas, ak abeni oldanyi peetuusyek taman ak muut." 
Galatians1:19 Ago ma ageer alak eng' che kiyooktoi, kobatee Jakobo ne tupcho ak Kiptaiyat." 
Galatians1:20 Ara anyun, eng' tuguuk che asirwok, ogeero, eng' taitap Kamuktaindet koma mwaei lembech." 
Galatians1:21 Yeityo anyoo korotinwegap Syria ak Cilicia. 
Galatians1:22 Ak kitom kogeero togoch kanisosyegap Judea che ki mi eng' Kristo: 
Galatians1:22 Ak kitom kogeero togoch kanisosyegap Judea che ki mi eng' Kristo: 
Galatians1:23 ago ki kas kemwaei kityo keele, Ineendet ne kiuseech eng' peetuusyek alak koamdoi nguno kayanonooto king'emang'emi;" 
Galatians1:24 ak kiitoroor icheek Kamuktaindet eng' anee. 
Galatians2:1 Kingo pata anyun kenyiisyek tamanu ak ang'wan atogoste kogeny awe Jerusalem kobooto Barnaba, amuti Tito agine." 
Galatians2:2 Ak ki atogoste eng' ng'ang'utyet; ak ki atetyi icheek logoiywek che myach che aamdooti eng' kwenutap Pororyosyek, ago eng' ung'oot eng' icheeget che taagunotiin, si ma egu, eng' oor age tugul, ne alabati puch, anan ne kialabat puch." 
Galatians2:3 Ago ma kibirchi Tito, ne Yunanindet, ne ki mi kobooto, keele kimuratan:" 
Galatians2:4 amu tupchosyek che po lembech che ki kimut kobwa oriit eng' ung'oot, che ki mong' eng' ung'oot kosegei katyagennyo ne ki tinyei eng' Kristo Jeso, si kobiit kondeech otwoknateet:" 
Galatians2:5 eng' icheeget che ki ma ki kas iit, agot eng' sait agenge; si kobiit kotebi imanitap logoiywek che myach kobootok." 
Galatians2:6 Ago icheeget che ki kiiti keele taagunotiin (ngo uu ole teptoi icheek, koma kiy eng' anee: ma tiytiy Kamuktaindet chii) - amwae ale, ma teswa kiy icheeget cho taagunotiin." 
Galatians2:7 Ago ye kingo keer icheek kole ki kigoono ariip logoiywek che myach agobo icheeget che ma kimuratani, ko uu Petero agine eng' che kimuratani" 
Galatians2:8 (amu ineendet ne ki imuktoochi Petero koek kayooktoindet eng' che kimuratani, ko ki imuktaiwa agane ko uu nooto agobo Pororyosyek);" 
Galatians2:9 ak ye kingo nai Jakobo ak Kepa ak Johana, icheeget che ki kiit keele tolochik, myeeindo ne ki kigoono, kogoono ak Barnaba eutap tai ne po yamdaet, si kobiit keebe ye mi Pororyosyek, koba icheek ye mi che kimuratani;" 
Galatians2:10 kobatee kimakwech icheek kibwaat kibananook; kioto ne ki ating'ee kagiiletapkei agane ale ayai. 
Galatians2:11 Ago ye kingo nyo Kepa Antiok, agirinde ineendet kimni, amu ki nyoljin ineendet kirwooget." 
Galatians2:12 Amu ye kitom kobwa alage che ki punu kap Jakobo, kogiamisyei ak Pororyosyek: ago ye kingo pwa, koweektagei let kotabaangei, koywei icheeget che po kamuratanet." 
Galatians2:13 Ak ki iberberisyei Yahudik alage ak icheek kobooto ineendet; kot kotito Barnaba agine eng' kaberberisyennywa. 
Galatians2:14 Ago ye kinga keer ale ma pendoti eng' lititindo ko uu imanitap logoiywek che myach, amwachi Kepa eng' tainnywa tugul aleenji, Ngot ko inyee, ne ii Yahudyot, itebye ko uu Pororyosyek, ak ma ko uu Yahudik, ibirchindoi ano Pororyosyek koigei Yahudik?" 
Galatians2:15 Acheek che ki Yahudik eng' sigeet, ama ki kiptengeginik che po Pororyosyek," 
Galatians2:16 ago kingen keele ma kiityin chii imanda eng' poisyonigap ng'atuutik, ago eng' kayaneet eng' Jeso Kristo, ki kiyan agacheek eng' Kristo Jeso, si kobiit kiityech imanda eng' kayaneet eng' Kristo, ama eng' poisyonigap Ng'atuutyet: amu ma kiityin chii imanda eng' poisyonigap Ng'atuutyet." 
Galatians2:17 Ago, ye kita kecheeng'e kiityech imanda eng' Kristo, kenyoorwech ak acheek keele ki kiptengeginik, tos Kristo kogiboityotap tengek? Achicha, ma uu nooto." 
Galatians2:18 Amu ngot ateech kogeny tuguuchooto che kiga abut, ko kabartegei ale aa pistoindet." 
Galatians2:19 Amu anee, ko ki amechi Ng'atuutyet eng' Ng'atuutyet, si kobiit asap eng' Kamuktaindet." 
Galatians2:20 Ki kigartata kobooto Kristo; ago asabe; ago ma ko anee, ago sabei Kristo eng' anee: ak saboondo ne asabe nguno eng' poorto asabe eng' kayaneet ne miitei eng' Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, ne ki chama, ak ki igoitogei agobo anee." 
Galatians2:21 Ma wale myeeindap Kamuktaindet koek puch; amu nda punu imanda Ng'atuutyet, kogime Kristo puch." 
Galatians3:1 Ee Galatiechu perberen, ng'oo ne kibanak, okweek che ki kinde Jeso Kristo taitap konyekwok kotook keele ki kigartaat?" 
Galatians3:2 Ni kityo ne amache aneetenagei, Ki otaach Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' poisyonigap Ng'atuutyet, anan eng' kaseet ne po kayaneet?" 
Galatians3:3 Tos kaagaa oo perberen ko uu nooto? Ngo ki otau eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil, omache nguno oegu che ogesunotingei eng' poorto?" 
Galatians3:4 Tos ki onyalilse eng' tuguuk che chaang' puch? Ngot ko puch iman. 
Galatians3:5 Tos ineendet anyun ne koonok Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak koyaei kwang'utik eng' kwenung'wong', ko tos yaei eng' poisyonigap Ng'atuutyet, anan eng' kaseet ne po kayaneet?" 
Galatians3:6 Agot ko uu ye ki iyan `Abraham Kamuktaindet, ak ki kiityi ineendet kobunji imanda." 
Galatians3:7 Ongen anyun ole icheeget che po kayaneet, ko weeriitap Abraham chooto." 
Galatians3:8 Ak kisip kogeer siruutyet kole iityin Kamuktaindet imanda Pororyosyek eng' kayaneet, kogisip koamji logoiywek che myach Abraham, koleenji, Kiberuuri pororyosyek tugul eng' inyee." 
Galatians3:9 Nooto anyun, kiberuuri icheeget che po kayaneet kobooto Abraham ne iyanaat." 
Galatians3:10 Amu tugul che mi eng' poisyonigap Ng'atuutyet, komiitei eng' chubeet: amu ki kisir keele, Chuboot chii age tugul ne ma tebyei eng' tuguuk tugul che ki kisir eng' bukuitap Ng'atuutyet, keele koyai chooto." 
Galatians3:11 Taagu anyun keele, ma mi chii ne kiityin imanda eng' Ng'atuutyet eng' taitap Kamuktaindet: amu, Sabei ne po imanda eng' kayaneet;" 
Galatians3:12 ak ma po Ng'atuutyet kayaneet; ago, Ineendet ne yaei chooto kosabei eng' chooto." 
Galatians3:13 Ki ityaachech Kristo eng' chubisyetap Ng'atuutyet ye ki ek ineendet chubeet agobo acheek: amu ki kisir keele, Chuboot chii age tugul ne kisonginini eng' keetit:" 
Galatians3:14 si kobiit konyonji Pororyosyek kaberuretap Abraham eng' Kristo Jeso; si kobiit ketaach arorutyetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' kayaneet. 
Galatians3:15 Che kitupche, amwae ko uu piteetap chii: Agot ngo arorutyetap chii nooto, ko ye kagigimit, koma mi chii ne walei koek puch, anan kotesyi." 
Galatians3:16 Ki kimwachi anyun Abraham arorutichooto, ak keswondennyi. Ma mwaei kole, “Igoochin kesweekyik,” ko uu ye kachang'a; ago ko uu agenge, kole, “Ak eng' keswondeng'ung',” nooto ko Kristo." 
Galatians3:17 Amwae ni anyun ale; Kayomiset ne kisip kogimit Kamuktaindet, nooto Ng'atuutyet ne kinyonei ko kagobata kenyiisyek pogol ang'wan ak sosom, ko mawalei koek puch, keele, si koyai arorutyet koek ne ma tilei kiy." 
Galatians3:18 Amu ngo punu poroteet Ng'atuutyet, koma ko po arorutyet anyun: ago ki igoochi `Kamuktaindet Abraham eng' arorutyet." 
Galatians3:19 Nee anyun Ng'atuutyet? Ki kites amu pistautik, agoi koit keswoot ye mi ineendet ne kiga kichopchi arorutyonooto; ak ki king'at eng' malakaisyek eng' eutap katuiyoindet." 
Galatians3:20 Katuiyoindet anyun koma po agenge; ago Kamuktaindet ko agenge. 
Galatians3:21 Tos kirindoi Ng'atuutyet arorutigap Kamuktaindet? Achicha, ma uu nooto: amu nda kiga kigon Ng'atuutyet ne imuuchi kosoop, ta kibunjin imanda Ng'atuutyet." 
Galatians3:22 Ago ki koratyi siruutyet tuguuk tugul kimnateetap tengekto, si kobiit kigoochi che iyani, arorutyet eng' kayaneet eng' Jeso Kristo." 
Galatians3:23 Ago ye ki tomo konyo kayaneet, ko ki kiriibech eng' Ng'atuutyet. Kiga kiratech agoi koit kayaneet ne kitun keng'aany eng' let." 
Galatians3:24 Ki ek anyun Ng'atuutyet kaneetindennyo ne imutyinech Kristo, si kobiit kiityech imanda eng' kayaneet." 
Galatians3:25 Ago nguno anyun, ko kagonyo kayaneet, koma koboiywech kaneetindet." 
Galatians3:26 Amu okweek tugul ko oo weeriigap Kamuktaindet, eng' kayaneet, eng' Kristo Jeso." 
Galatians3:27 Amu che tee eng' okweek che ki kibatisanjok Kristo ko ki olaach Kristo. 
Galatians3:28 Ma imugaksei keele mi Yahudyot anan Yunanindet, ama mi otwogindet anan ne ityagat, ama mi ne muren anan ne tye: amu okweek tugul ko oo agenge eng' Kristo Jeso." 
Galatians3:29 Ak ngot oo po Kristo, ko oo kesweegap Abraham anyun che namei tuguuk ko uu eng' arorutyet." 
Galatians4:1 Ago amwae ale ye ta ko lakwa ineendet ne tuun namei tuguuk, ko materchin ineendet ak otwogin, agot nganda ineendet ko kiptaiyatap tugul;" 
Galatians4:2 ago mi eng' eutap ng'atik ak riibiik agoi koit peetuut ne king'atyi kwanda. 
Galatians4:3 Ki uu nooto ak acheek, kingo ta ko ki lagok, ko kigiratotiin eng' kaneetisyosyek che po tai che po ng'wony:" 
Galatians4:4 ago ye kingo it peetuut ne kiyamgei, koyook Kamuktaindet Weeriinnyi, ne ki sich kobogoryot, kosich eng' Ng'atuutyet," 
Galatians4:5 si kobiit kotyach icheek che kimi eng' Ng'atuutyet, si kobiit keyaech keegu weeriik." 
Galatians4:6 Ak amu oo weeriik, ko ki iyookyi Kamuktaindet Kabuusetap weeriinnyi mugulelwekyok, ne riirei, kole, “Abba, Kwanda!”" 
Galatians4:7 Eng' nooto anyun ma ko ii otwogindet kogeny, ago ii weeriit; ak ngo ii weeriit ko ii namindet ne po tuguuk eng' Kamuktaindet." 
Galatians4:8 Ago eng' peetuunooto, ki ma ongen Kamuktaindet, ko ki oo otwogigap icheeget che ki ma ko kamuktaik che ma po iman:" 
Galatians4:9 ago nguno ko kaonai Kamuktaindet, anan ko kagonaak okweek Kamuktaindet, amu nee anyun si oweektegei let kogeny oweekyigei kaneetisyosyek che po tai che nyalulyotin ak che po pananda, eng' chooto omache oweekyigei otwogindennywa kogeny?" 
Galatians4:10 Oriibe peetuusyek, ak arawek, ak ole teptoi peetuusyegap kenyiit, ak kenyiisyek." 
Galatians4:11 Aiyweisyei agobo okweek, si ma egu ne ki abirtegei puch eng' oor age tugul agobo okweek." 
Galatians4:12 Asoomok miising', che kitupche, ale otebi ko uu anee, amu anee auu okweek. Ki ma oyaiywo ne ya:" 
Galatians4:13 ago ongen ole ki aamwok logoiywek che myach eng' tai, amu nyalulnatetap poorto:" 
Galatians4:14 ak ki ma osas yoomseet ne ki otinye agobo poortanyu, ama oeesye; ago ki otaacha ko uu malaikaiyatap Kamuktaindet, ko uu Kristo Jeso." 
Galatians4:15 Mi ano anyun poiboiyonootong'wong'? Amu abaoryanjinok, ale, nda ki imugaksei, ta ki obalu konyekwok ak ogoono." 
Galatians4:16 Ara anyun tos kaaegu punyondeng'wong', amu kamwaiwok ne po iman?" 
Galatians4:17 Igiiljinogei kocheeng'ok eng' ooreet ne ma myee: ee, machei kole kogerchok saang', si kobiit ocheeng' icheek." 
Galatians4:18 Ago myee oegu che kicheeng'ok eng' kagiiletapkei peetuusyek tugul agobo kiit ne myee, ak ma ye ami kobootok kityo." 
Galatians4:19 Lagokyuk che mengech, che anyoorunenok ng'wanindo ne po sigeet kogeny agoi koyaak Kristo eng' okweek," 
Galatians4:20 ee, katamache ale nda kami kobootok nguno, ak awal kutinnyu; amu aiimigei agobo okweek." 
Galatians4:21 Omwaiwo, okweek che omache otebee pounatetap ng'atuutik, tos mogase Ng'atuutyet?" 
Galatians4:22 Amu ki kisir keele, Ki tinyei Abraham weeriik aeng', age eng' chepto ne otwogin, ak age eng' kobogoryot ne ityagat." 
Galatians4:23 Ago ki kisich eng' poorto ineendet ne po chepto ne otwogin; ago ki kisich eng' arorutyet ineendet ne po kobogoryot ne ityagat. 
Galatians4:24 Tuguuchuuto ko kalewenet: amu chuuto ko arorutik aeng'; ki punu age tulweetap Sinai, ne sichei lagok eng' otwoknateet, nooto ko Hagar." 
Galatians4:25 Ak Hagar niito ko tulweetap Sinai eng' Arabia, ak ibooru Jerusalem ne po nguno: amu mi eng' otwoknateet kobooto lagokyik." 
Galatians4:26 Ago Jerusalem ne mi parak kotyagat, ne nooto ko kamennyo." 
Galatians4:27 Amu ki kisir keele, Paibaitu, inyee ne ii soon ne meyie; Yaas ak iwaach, inyee ne megase ng'wanindap sigisyet: Amu chaang' lagogap ineendet ne mi ineegei kosiir che po ineendet ne tinyei manong'otyot." 
Galatians4:28 Acheek anyun, che kitupche, ko ki lagogap arorutyet, ko uu Isak." 
Galatians4:29 Ago anyun, ko uu ineendet ne ki kisich eng' poorto, kogius ineendet ne ki kisich eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ko uu nooto anyun agot nguno." 
Galatians4:30 Ago mwaei nee siruutik? Oon kobogoryondoni otwogin ak weeriinnyi: amu ma namei tuguuk weeriitap kobogoryot ne otwogin kobooto weeriitap kobogoryot ne ityagat. 
Galatians4:31 Nooto anyun, che kitupche, ma ki lagogap kobogoryot ne otwogin, ago ki po kobogoryot ne ityagat." 
Galatians5:1 Ki ityaachech Kristo eng' katyaget; otononse komyee anyun, amatata keratak kogeny eng' chogitap otwoknateet." 
Galatians5:2 Ogeero, amwaiwok anee Paulo, ale, ngimuratanak, ko motinye keluno eng' Kristo." 
Galatians5:3 Ee, abaoryanjini kogeny chii age tugul ne kimuratani, ale, kiyaachei ineendet koyai Ng'atuutyet komugul." 
Galatians5:4 Kaotoiye ak Kristo, okweek che omache kiityok imanda eng' Ng'atuutyet; kaobutye eng' myeeindo." 
Galatians5:5 Amu kigeni kamang'unet ne po imanda eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' kayaneet. 
Galatians5:6 Amu eng' Kristo Jeso koma tilei kiy kamuratanet, anan ngo ma kimuratan; ago kayaneet ne poisyei eng' chamyet." 
Galatians5:7 Ki orwae komyee; ng'oo ne koraanyak si mogas iit imanit? 
Galatians5:8 Ma punu kagaigaoni ineendet ne kiguurok. 
Galatians5:9 Igutu mermereek tutigin kererutyet komugul. 
Galatians5:10 Atinye kamang'unet eng' okweek eng' Kiptaiyat, ale amoegu che tinyei kabwaatutik che teer: ago ineendet ne inyalilok konyooru kirwoogennyi, agot ngo ng'oo." 
Galatians5:11 Ago anee anyun, che kitupche, ngot kota aamdooti kamuratanet, ko kalya si kota keusausa? Ko kaagaa kigeisto anyun kanagutyetap kimurtoiyot." 
Galatians5:12 Katamache anyun ale koistogei icheeget che iluiluchok. 
Galatians5:13 Amu okweek che kitupche, ko ki kiguurchok katyaget; ago moboisyee katyageng'wong' koek poroindo ne po poorto, ago oboisyechigei okweegei eng' okweegei eng' chamyet." 
Galatians5:14 Amu isuldoi Ng'atuutik tugul eng' ng'olyoot agenge, nooto ko ni; Cham chiitap kokweng'ung' ko uu ole ichamdoige." 
Galatians5:15 Ago ngot osusegei ak oamegei okweegei, oriipkei si morumge." 
Galatians5:16 Amu amwae anyun ale, Obendoti eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil, si moyai mageetap poorto." 
Galatians5:17 Amu machei poorto miising' kogirinda Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ak machei Kabuuset ne Tiliil kogirinda poorto; amu kirindogei chuuto tuwai; si moyai tuguuk che omache." 
Galatians5:18 Ago ngo ndoiywok Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ko momite pounatetap Ng'atuutyet." 
Galatians5:19 Taagunotiin anyun poisyonik che po poorto, chooto ko chu: sokseet, simdo, mageet ne ya agobo tuguuk che yaach," 
Galatians5:20 saaetap kanamonik, ponisyet, punyondisyek, suryosyek, ng'etkonda, nereegek, taiyasyek, kabesyosyek, pcheutik," 
Galatians5:21 kong' ne ya, pogitatosyek, keiyandisyek, ak alak che uu chooto: kasip ateiywok agobo chu, ko uu ye kisip ateiywok, ale icheeget che yaei tuguuk che uu chuuto koma nyooru laitornatetap Kamuktaindet." 
Galatians5:22 Ago logoiyatap Kabuuset ne Tiliil ko chamyet, poiboiyet, kaalyeet, muitaet, talasyet, myeeindo, atepto ne kiyani," 
Galatians5:23 kaming'inetapkei, riibetapkei: ma mi ng'atuutyet ne eesyoi chuuto." 
Galatians5:24 Ak icheeget che po Kristo Jeso ko ki kogartaat poorto kobooto maguutikyik ak kasetap myat che po chooto. 
Galatians5:25 Ngot kesaptosi eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ko ongebendoti anyun eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Galatians5:26 Among' kilasuge puch, among' ketachatachge, among' koamjechge ng'etkong'." 
Galatians6:1 Che kitupche, agot ngenyoorchi chii lelutyet, ko okweek che otinye Kabuuset ne Tiliil, oweegu chiito ne uu nooto eng' muguleldo ne po mutyonet; ak iriipkei, si ma kiyomin aginye." 
Galatians6:2 Otoretkei eng' nyalilwogik, oyae kosulda ng'atuutigap Kristo." 
Galatians6:3 Amu ngot kobwaategei chii kole aa kiy, ago kaagaa ma kiy, koberberegei ineegei." 
Galatians6:4 Ago ingotyem chii age tugul poisyennyi, si konyoor anyun kiit ne ilasunegei ineegei, ak ma eng' chiito age." 
Galatians6:5 Amu laei chii tugul milennyi ineegei. 
Galatians6:6 Ago ingoyamda tuguuk tugul che myachen ineendet ne kineeti ng'olyoot, ak ineendet ne ineetisyei." 
Galatians6:7 Amat kegenaak; ma kigengenie Kamuktaindet; amu kiit age tugul ne koolei chii, kotun kesei nooto agine." 
Galatians6:8 Amu ineendet ne koljin poortanyi kotun kesei eng' poorto ng'emisyet; ago ineendet ne koljin Kabuuset ne Tiliil kotun kesei eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil saboondo ne po koigeny. 
Galatians6:9 Among' keng'etye ye kiyae poisyonik che myach: amu tuun kigese ko kait peetuunnyi ngo ma kitanuise. 
Galatians6:10 Nooto anyun, ko uu ye ki tinyei poroindo, ko ongeyachi piik tugul ne myee, ago ne siirei ko icheeget che po kootap kayaneet." 
Galatians6:11 Ogeer anyun siruutik che eecheen che kaasirunenak eng' eunnyu aneege. 
Galatians6:12 Tugul che tee che machei telunateet eng' poorto, kobirchinok kole kimuratanak; ago si ma kiusaus icheek agobo kimurtoiyotap Kristo." 
Galatians6:13 Agot icheeget che kimuratani, ko ma riibei Ng'atuutyet; ago machei kole kimuratanak, si kolasunegei poorwekwok." 
Galatians6:14 Ago ingolooit eng' anee aloskei, kobatee eng' kimurtoiyot ne po Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, ne eng' nooto ko ki kigartaat ng'wony agobo anee, ak anee agobo ng'wony." 
Galatians6:15 Amu ma kiy kamuratanet, anan ngo ma kimuratan, ago yautyet ne leel." 
Galatians6:16 Ak ingotebee kaalyeet icheek tugul che pendoti eng' ng'atuutyoni, ak rireenetapkei, ak eng' Israel ne po Kamuktaindet." 
Galatians6:17 Kobooch nguno ko matata konyalila chii: amu aiboti eng' poortanyu perutigap Jeso. 
Galatians6:18 Che kitupche, ingotep kobooto saboonwekwok myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Paulo, kayooktoindet ne po Kristo Jeso eng' mageetap Kamuktaindet, asirchini piik che tiliileen che mi Epheso, kobooto che po kayaneet eng' Kristo Jeso:" 
Ephesians1:2 Ingotep myeeindo kobootok ak kaalyeet che punu Kamuktaindet Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo. 
Ephesians1:3 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet Kwandap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, ineendet ne ki koberuurech eng' konunotyot age tugul ne po Kabuuset eng' kipsengwet eng' Kristo:" 
Ephesians1:4 ko uu ye kilewenech eng' ineendet ye kitom kelumda, si keegu che tiliileen che ma tinyei leluut eng' tainnyi eng' chamyet:" 
Ephesians1:5 ko uu ye kiga sip kolewenech kenamech keegu weeriik eng' Jeso Kristo eng' ineendet, ko uu chameet ne myee ne po magennyi," 
Ephesians1:6 agoi kalasunetap toroornatetap myeeindonyi, ne ki koonech eng' aiyebindo eng' Chamaneet:" 
Ephesians1:7 ne ki tinyei eng' ineendet katyagennyo eng' korotiikyik, nyoetap kaat ne po chalwogikyok, ko uu mogornatosyegap myeeindonyi," 
Ephesians1:8 che ki yai kotesak eng' acheek eng' utaatyet tugul ak naet," 
Ephesians1:9 ko kagoboorwech ung'ootyet ne po magennyi, ko uu chamennyi ne myee ne ki chop eng' ineendet" 
Ephesians1:10 agoi tononjinet ne po riipseetap peetuusyek che yamegei, si koyum tuguuk tugul eng' Kristo, tuguuk che mi kipsengwet, ak tuguuk che mi ng'wony eng' ineendet," 
Ephesians1:11 ne kiyaech eng' ineendet keegu porotennyi, ko kasip kolewenech, ko uu mageetap ineendet ne yaei tuguuk tugul ko uu kabwaatetap magennyi;" 
Ephesians1:12 si kobiit keegu kalasunetap toroornatennyi, acheek che kiga kisip kimang'u Kristo." 
Ephesians1:13 Ki ogas ak okweek eng' ineendet ng'olyootap imanit, logoiywek che myach che po yetuneng'wong' - eng' ineendet, ne kingo kaoyan, ko ki king'oochak eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne po arorutyet," 
Ephesians1:14 ne tongoaniatap porotennyo, agoi katyagetap porotennyi, eng' kalasunetap toroornatennyi." 
Ephesians1:15 Amu niito anyun, kingo kaagas agobo kayaneet ne mi kwenung'wong', eng' Kiptaiyat Jeso, ak chamyet eng' tugul che tiliileen," 
Ephesians1:16 ko mata asiis agoito kongoi agobo okweek, ak amwaok eng' saautikyuk;" 
Ephesians1:17 ale ingogoonok Kamuktaindet ne po Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, Kwanda ne po toroornatet, Kabuuset ne po utaatyet ak ng'ang'utyet eng' naetap ineendet;" 
Ephesians1:18 ko kagokweng'ogis konyegap mugulelwekwok, si kobiit onai kiit ne uu kamang'unetap kuursennyi, ak mogornatosyegap toroornatet ne po porotennyi eng' che tiliileen," 
Ephesians1:19 ak kiit ne uu ooindo ne siirtoot ne po kamuktaennyi eng' acheek che kiyani, ko uu poisyonooto po kimnateetap kamuktaennyi" 
Ephesians1:20 ne ki yai eng' Kristo, ye kingo ng'eet ineendet komong' eng' che ki pek, ak konde ineendet kotebee eunnyi ne po tai eng' komoswegap kipsengwet;" 
Ephesians1:21 ne toroor kosiir laitornatet tugul, ak pounateet, ak kamuktaet, ak kiptainateet, ak kainet age tugul ne mwaat, ma kityo eng' kenyisyechu, ago eng' chooto pwoonei:" 
Ephesians1:22 ak ki inde tuguuk tugul kogas iit eng' keldebesaigap keelyekyik, ak kogoochi ineendet koek metit eng' tuguuk tugul eng' kaniset," 
Ephesians1:23 nooto ko poortanyi, nyiietap ineendet ne inyiiti tugul eng' tugul." 
Ephesians2:1 Ak kigosabok okweek, ye ki oo pegunotin eng' yaitwogikwok ak tengekwogikwok," 
Ephesians2:2 che ki obendote ye kinye ko uu piteetap ng'wonyuni, osubi ne oo ne po kimnateet ne po soet, ne po kimnateet ne poisyei nguno eng' weeriitap ngelelnateet;" 
Ephesians2:3 che ki kimenye agot acheek tugul kwenunnywa eng' maguutik che yaach che po poorto, keyae maguutik che po poorto ak che po kabwaatutik, ak ki kilagogap nereeknateet, eng' sigeet, ko uu alak:" 
Ephesians2:4 ago Kamuktaindet, ne mogoryot eng' rireenetapkei, eng' chamyennyi ne oo ne ki chamenech," 
Ephesians2:5 agot ye ki kibegunotin eng' yaitwogikyok, ko ki isaabech kobooto Kristo (kigesorwok eng' myeeindo)," 
Ephesians2:6 ak ki ing'eetech kobooto ineendet, ak ki koonech ketebi kobooto ineendet eng' komoswegap kipsengwet, eng' Kristo Jeso:" 
Ephesians2:7 si kobiit kobarta eng' kenyiisyek che pwoonei mogornatosyek che siirtoot che po myeeindonyi eng' talasyet ne tokyineigei eng' Kristo Jeso: 
Ephesians2:8 amu kigesorwok eng' myeeindo eng' kayaneet; ago ma punwok niito: konunetap Kamuktaindet; 
Ephesians2:9 ama po poisyonik, si ma iloskei chii." 
Ephesians2:10 Amu kiboisyennyi acheek, ne ki kiyaech eng' Kristo Jeso agobo poisyonik che myachen, che kisip kochop Kamuktaindet si kebendatee chooto." 
Ephesians2:11 Nooto anyun obwaat, ole okweek, che ki oo Pororyosyek eng' poorto atkinye, che kigurenok “che Ma Kimuratan” eng' icheek che kiguure “kamuratanet”, nooto kamuratanet eng' poorto ne ki kiyae eunek;" 
Ephesians2:12 ole ki omi taban eng' Kristo eng' peetuusyechooto, che ki oo kipsagarek eng' pororyetap Israel, ak ki oo toek eng' kayomisutik che po arorutyet, ki ma otinye kamang'unet ak ki ma otinye Kamuktaindet eng' ng'wonyuni." 
Ephesians2:13 Ago nguno eng' Kristo Jeso okweek che ki oo looen eng' peetuusyek alak, ko kagegoonok ooriigu eng' korotiigap Kristo." 
Ephesians2:14 Amu ineendet ko kalyennyo, ne ki yai tuwai koek agenge, ne kibut tooteetap kween ne po kaoiyet," 
Ephesians2:15 ko kagowong' eng' poortanyi puunyoondit, ng'atuutyetap ng'atuutik ne miitei eng' kayomisutik; si kobiit kotoi koyai eng' ineendet chooto aeng' koek chiito agenge ne leel koyai kaalyeet;" 
Ephesians2:16 ak kotuiyo icheek tuwai eng' poorto agenge ak Kamuktaindet eng' kimurtoiyot, ko kagobar puunyoondit eng' nooto." 
Ephesians2:17 Ak ki nyo koamwok kaalyeet okweek che ki oo looen, ak kaalyeet eng' icheek che kineegiten:" 
Ephesians2:18 amu kinyooru acheek tuwai eng' ineendet ooreennyo eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil agenge, ne ki itee ole mi Kwanda." 
Ephesians2:19 Nooto anyun ma ko oo toek ak punootik ago oo piigap nganaseet agenge ak che tiliileen, ak che po kootap Kamuktaindet." 
Ephesians2:20 Kigeteechak eng' lumdaetap che kiyooktoi ak maotik, Kristo Jeso ineendet ko koita ne oo ne po luuita;" 
Ephesians2:21 ne kituiyechin teekseet age tugul ne ki kinamnyo koek agenge, koeet koek Hekaluut ne tiliil eng' Kiptaiyat;" 
Ephesians2:22 ki kiteechak ak okweek oegu agenge eng' ineendet, ole menyei Kamuktaindet eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Ephesians3:1 Amu niito anee Paulo, kimonjororyotap Kristo Jeso agobo okweek Pororyosyek," 
Ephesians3:2 ngo ki ogas agobo tononjinetap myeeindap Kamuktaindet ne ki kigoono agobo okweek; 
Ephesians3:3 ko uu ye ki kiboorwo eng' ng'ang'utyet ung'ootyet, ko uu ye ki asip asir eng' tai eng' ng'aleek che ng'ering'," 
Ephesians3:4 si, ye osomani, omuuchi oguiye ng'omnatennyu eng' ung'ootyetap Kristo;" 
Ephesians3:5 ne ki ma kiboorchi weeriigap piik eng' ibinwek alak ko uu ye kageng'aang'ji nguno che kiyooktoi chechiik che tiliileen ak maotik eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil; 
Ephesians3:6 keele, Pororyosyek ko yamdoigap nametap tuguuk, ak yamdoigap kebeberwegap poorto, ak yamdoigap arorutyet eng' Kristo Jeso eng' logoiywek che myach," 
Ephesians3:7 che ki kiyaena aek kiboityot, ko uu konunetap myeinooto po Kamuktaindet ne ki kigoono ko uu ye poisyei kamuktaennyi." 
Ephesians3:8 Ki kigoono myeini, anee, ne aa ming'in kosiir ineendet ne ming'in eng' che tiliileen tugul: aamji Pororyosyek mogornatosyegap Kristo che ma isiagaksei;" 
Ephesians3:9 ak kiguiyechi piik tugul kiit ne uu tononjinetap ung'ootyet ne kiga kiuny kobooch kenyiisyek che ki kosiirto, eng' Kamuktaindet, ne ki toi koyai tuguuk tugul;" 
Ephesians3:10 si kobiit konaak eng' kaniset nguno utaatyet ne oo ne po Kamuktaindet eng' laitornatosyek ak pounatosyek eng' komoswegap kipsengwet," 
Ephesians3:11 ko uu mageetap koigeny ne kisip kolewen eng' Kristo Jeso Kiptaiyandennyo: 
Ephesians3:12 ki tinyei eng' ineendet nyiganateet ak kamang'unet ne kiriikyine ineendet amu kiyani ineendet. 
Ephesians3:13 Eng' nooto anyun asoomok ale amat komeak mugulel amu nyalilwogikyuk agobo okweek, chooto ko toroornateng'wong'." 
Ephesians3:14 Amu niito anyun agutung'jini Kwanda," 
Ephesians3:15 ne nyoorunee ineendet kainennywa ooreet age tugul ne po kapchii, eng' kipsengwet ak ng'wony," 
Ephesians3:16 si kobiit kogoonok, ko uu mogornatosyegap toroornatennyi, ogimegitu eng' kamuktaet eng' Kabuusennyi eng' chiito ne po oriit;" 
Ephesians3:17 si kobiit komeny Kristo mugulelwekwok eng' kayaneet; si kobiit, ye otinye tigitik ak lumdaet eng' chamyet," 
Ephesians3:18 onyooru kimnateet oguiye kobooto tugul che tiliileen ole tee tebeesindo ak koindo ak toroorindo ak loindo ne wendi ng'wony," 
Ephesians3:19 ak onai chamyetap Kristo ne siirei naet, si kobiit kinyiitak nyiyet tugul ne po Kamuktaindet." 
Ephesians3:20 Ingobunji anyun ineendet ne imuuchi koyai miising' inne kosiir tugul che kisoome anan che kibwaati ko uu kamuktaet ne poisyei eng' acheek," 
Ephesians3:21 toroornatet eng' kaniset ak eng' Kristo Jeso agoi ibinwek tugul che po koigeny ak koigeny. Amen. 
Ephesians4:1 Nooto anyun, anee ne aa kimonjororyot eng' Kiptaiyat, asoomok miising' ale obendate ko uu ye nyoljin kuurseet ne kigeguurok," 
Ephesians4:2 eng' kaming'inetapkei tugul ak mutyonet, kobooto muitaet, omuitochinigei eng' chamyet;" 
Ephesians4:3 ogiiligei oriibe yamdaet ne po Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' ratuutyetap kaalyeet. 
Ephesians4:4 Agenge poorto, ak agenge Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ko uu ye kigeguurok eng' kamang'unet agenge ne po kuurseng'wong';" 
Ephesians4:5 Kiptaiyat agenge, kayaneet agenge, kabatisanet agenge," 
Ephesians4:6 Kamuktaindet agenge ne Kwandap tugul, ne pou tugul, ak koyamu tugul, ak komi eng' tugul." 
Ephesians4:7 Ago ki kigoochi age tugul eng' acheek myeeindo ko uu kakwaet ne po konunetap Kristo. 
Ephesians4:8 Mwaei eng' nooto anyun kole, Kingo togosta parak, komut luulenik che ki koluul, Ak kogoochi piik kagoochinoik." 
Ephesians4:9 (Nooto anyun, ng'olyoondoniito mwaei kole, “Ki togosta,” ko nee anyun kobatee keele ki choortagei agine kwo komoswegap ng'wony oriit miising'?" 
Ephesians4:10 Ineendet ne ki choortagei ko ineendet ne ki togosta parak miising' kosiir kipsengwet tugul, si kobiit konyiit tuguuk tugul.)" 
Ephesians4:11 Ak ki igoochi alak koek che kiyooktoi: ak alak, maotik; ak alak, che mwaitooti logoiywek che myach; ak alak, mestoweek ak ko kaneetik;" 
Ephesians4:12 si koyai che tiliileen koek che ititaatiin, agobo poisyetap otisyet, agobo teekseetap poortap Kristo," 
Ephesians4:13 agoi keit acheek tugul yamdaetap kayaneet, ak naetap Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, agoi keegu chiito ne pekyinot, agoi kakwaet ne po etunatetap nyiietap Kristo:" 
Ephesians4:14 si mata keegu lagok, che kitoortai koba komosi ak komosi ak keibooti eng' usoonet age tugul ne po kaneetisyet, eng' ng'aalsetap piik, ak eng' kaberberisyosyegap kiplembechoonik;" 
Ephesians4:15 ago ki ng'alaali che po iman eng' chamyet, si keegitu eng' tuguuk tugul eng' ineendet, ineendet ne metit, nooto ko Kristo;" 
Ephesians4:16 eng' ineendet keropchindos ak kituitos poorto tugul, eng' nooto ne koonu kebeberta age tugul, ko uu kakwautyetap poisyet ne po kebeberta age tugul, si kotes poorto eng' teekseet ne teechegei ineegei eng' chamyet." 
Ephesians4:17 Amwae anyun ni, ak abaoryani eng' Kiptaiyat, ale si mata obendate ko uu ye pendoti Pororyosyek ak icheek, eng' kabwaatutikwak che po puch," 
Ephesians4:18 che imenen eng' nautikwak, che ki kiyai koek kipsagarek eng' saboondap Kamuktaindet, amu perberyo ne mi eng' icheek, amu uuindap mugulelwekwak;" 
Ephesians4:19 che ki igoochigei mageet ne ya agobo tuguuk che yaacheen, amu ki kobek kosaptos, si koyai simdo tugul eng' keiyandit." 
Ephesians4:20 Ago ki ma oneetkei Kristo ko uu nooto; 
Ephesians4:21 ngo ki ogas ineendet, ak ki kinetak eng' ineendet, ko uu ye mi imanit eng' Jeso:" 
Ephesians4:22 ale oregu chiito ne po keny, nooto atebeeng'wong' ne po atkinye, ne ng'emaksei ko uu maguutik che yaach che po keniisyet;" 
Ephesians4:23 asi owalage oleelagitu eng' nautigap saboonwekwok," 
Ephesians4:24 ak olaach chiito ne leel, ne ki kiyai eng' Kamuktaindet eng' imanda ak tiliilindo ne po iman." 
Ephesians4:25 Nooto anyun oiste lembeita, ong'alaaljinigei ne po iman chii tugul ak chiitap kokwennyi: amu ki kebeberwek age tugul ne po age." 
Ephesians4:26 Onereech, amoyai tengek: amat kororokto asiis kota onereektosi:" 
Ephesians4:27 amat ogoochi poroindo chesawilyet. 
Ephesians4:28 Ineendet ne kigochoorso ko matata kochoorso: ago kaigai kobois, koyai eng' eunekyik nooto myee, si kobiit kosich kiit ne igoochin ineendet ne panani." 
Ephesians4:29 Amat komang'une ng'olyoo age tugul ne ya kutusweekwok, ago nooto ne myee ne imuuchi koteekso, ko uu ye nyolu, si kobiit kogoochi myeeindo icheeget che kasei." 
Ephesians4:30 Ak amogoochi arageneet Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne po Kamuktaindet ne ki kindaenak ng'ookset agoi peetuutap katyaget. 
Ephesians4:31 Ingoistogei eng' okweek ng'wanindo tugul, ak nyitatet, ak nereegek, ak polateet, ak chubisyet, kobooto yaityet tugul:" 
Ephesians4:32 ilak otebi eng' talasyet okweegei eng' okweegei, orireegei, ak onyochinigei kaat, ko uu ye kinyoiywok kaat Kamuktaindet agine eng' Kristo." 
Ephesians5:1 Oegu anyun kasubiigap Kamuktaindet, ko uu lagok che ki chamei;" 
Ephesians5:2 ak obendate chamyet, ko uu ye ki chamaak Kristo agine, ak kogoitogei agobo acheek, koek kagoochinet ak tiseiywot eng' Kamuktaindet ne ng'uu ne nyamdut." 
Ephesians5:3 Ago ko uu ye nyoljin piik che tiliileen ko matong'alaale eng' kwenung'wong' sokseet, ak simdo tugul, anan kasetap myat;" 
Ephesians5:4 anan teweernat, anan ng'alaaletap abusnateet, anan roryot ne po ng'aleek che yaach, ma nyolu chooto: ago kaigai kagoitoetap kongoi." 
Ephesians5:5 Amu ongen niito iman ole, ma mi chii ne soksei, anan chiitap simdo, anan ne kasei myat, nooto ne saaei kanamonik, ma mi eng' chu ne nyooru poroteet eng' laitornatetap Kristo ak Kamuktaindet." 
Ephesians5:6 Amat koberberak chii eng' ng'aleek che ma namegei ak kiy, amu nyoonjin nereeknateet ne po Kamuktaindet weeriitap ngelelnateet amu tuguuchuuto." 
Ephesians5:7 Nooto anyun, amoyai yamdaet agenge ak icheek;" 
Ephesians5:8 amu ki oo mesundeito eng' peetuusyek alak, ago oo lapkeiyet nguno eng' Kiptaiyat: obendate ko uu lagogap lapkeiyet" 
Ephesians5:9 (amu logoiyatap lapkeiyet ko eng' myeeindo tugul ak imanda ak imanit)," 
Ephesians5:10 si onai nooto taachaksei eng' Kiptaiyat; 
Ephesians5:11 amoyai yamdaet ak poisyonigap mesundeito, che ma tinyei logoek, ago kaigai oger kong';" 
Ephesians5:12 amu tuguuk che yaei icheek eng' ung'oot ko teweernat ngeleen kemwa. 
Ephesians5:13 Ago tuguuk tugul che kigerei kong' ko ng'ang'aksei eng' lapkeiyet: amu kiy age tugul ne kiboortoi ko lapkeiyet. 
Ephesians5:14 Nooto anyun, mwaei ineendet kole, “Kosu, inyee ne irue, ak ing'eet eng' che ki kobek, ak kokwenyin Kristo.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Oriipkei anyun miising' eng' ole oteptoi eng' panwekwok, ma ko uu che ma utaatiin, ago ko uu che utaatiin;" 
Ephesians5:16 oboisyee saisyek komyee, amu yaacheen peetuusyek." 
Ephesians5:17 Nooto anyun amoberberitu, ago oguiye kiit ne uu mageetap Kiptaiyat." 
Ephesians5:18 Amat obogitye eng' maiyek, che ibu mageet ne ya, ago ingonyiiak Kabuuset ne Tiliil;" 
Ephesians5:19 ong'alaaljinigei eng' tyenwogigap kalasunet ak tyenwogik che ki kisir ak tyenwogigap saboon, otyeni tyendo ne rurei eng' mugulelwekwok eng' Kiptaiyat;" 
Ephesians5:20 ogoitoi kongoi kotugul agobo tuguuk tugul eng' kainetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, ogoochini Kamuktaindet, ineendet Kwanda;" 
Ephesians5:21 Oming'injigei kei eng' kaiyweisyetap Kristo. 
Ephesians5:22 Osotichu, ogas iit manong'otaikwok, ko uu ye ogase iit Kiptaiyat." 
Ephesians5:23 Amu manong'otyot ko metitap osotyot, ko uu Kristo agine ne metitap kaniset, ineendet yetindetap poorto." 
Ephesians5:24 Ago ko uu ye kase iit kaniset Kristo, ko uu nooto ak icheek osotik eng' manong'otaikwak eng' kiy age tugul." 
Ephesians5:25 Manong'otaichu, ocham osotikwok, ko uu Kristo agine ne ki cham kaniset, ak kogoitogei agobo ineendet;" 
Ephesians5:26 si kobiit kotabaan, ko kagotiliil eng' kaunetap peek eng' ng'olyoot," 
Ephesians5:27 si kobiit komutyigei kaniset, nooto ne po toroornatet, ne ma tinyei kunenden anan siring'ut anan kiy age tugul ne uu nooto; ago koek ne tiliil ne ma tinyei tisya." 
Ephesians5:28 Ko uu nooto kanyolji manong'otaik ak icheek kocham osotikwak ko uu ye chamei poorwekwak icheegei. Ineendet ne chamei osotyonnyi kochamegei ineegei: 
Ephesians5:29 amu ma mi chii ne wechei poortanyi; ago paei ak koriibei, ko uu kiit ne yachin Kristo agine kaniset;" 
Ephesians5:30 amu ki kebeberwek che po poortanyi. 
Ephesians5:31 Amu ng'olyoondoni, kobagaaktoi chii kwandanyi ak kamet, ak konamgei ak osotyonnyi; ak koek icheeget tuwai poorto agenge." 
Ephesians5:32 Oo ung'ootyoni: ago ang'alaali agobo Kristo ak kaniset. 
Ephesians5:33 Ago ingocham chii age tugul osotyonnyi, ko uu ole chamdogei; ak ingogonyit osotyot manong'otyondennyi." 
Ephesians6:1 Lagochu, ogas iit sigiikwok eng' Kiptaiyat: amu myee niito." 
Ephesians6:2 Teech kwandang'ung' ak kamenng'ung' (niito ng'atuutyet ne po tai ne pooto kayomiset)," 
Ephesians6:3 si kobiit komyeeit eng' inyee, si kota iwe keny eng' ng'wony." 
Ephesians6:4 Ak okweek, kwanisyechu, amotachatachi lagokwok, si konereekso: ago obai icheek eng' atep ne myee ak katigonetap Kiptaiyat." 
Ephesians6:5 Otwogichu, ogas iit icheek che kiptainikwok eng' poorto, eng' kaiyweisyet ak potanet, eng' muguleldo tugul, ko uu ye ogase iit Kristo;" 
Ephesians6:6 ama eng' otwoknateet ne kigeerei, ko uu che iboiboi piik; ago ko uu otwogigap Kristo, oyae mageetap Kamuktaindet eng' muguleldo;" 
Ephesians6:7 oyae poisyet eng' chamyet, ko uu eng' Kiptaiyat, ama eng' piik:" 
Ephesians6:8 ongen ole kiy age tugul ne myee ne yaei chii age tugul, kotun taachei nooto kogeny eng' Kiptaiyat, ngo rataat anan kotyagat." 
Ephesians6:9 Ak okweek kiptainichu, oyachi icheek ak okweek ko uu nooto, amorasyini: ongen ole mi kipsengwet Kiptaiyannywa ak ko neng'wong', ama mi eng' ineendet tiytiyet ne po piik." 
Ephesians6:10 Ne po let anyun, oegu che kiimeen eng' Kiptaiyat, ak eng' kimnateetap kamugennyi." 
Ephesians6:11 Olaach kariigap lugeet komugul che po Kamuktaindet, si kobiit omuuch ogirinde kaberberisyosyegap chesawilyet." 
Ephesians6:12 Amu ma po kabelennyo pogei poorto ak korotiik, ago po laitornatosyek, ak kimnatosyek, eng' pounigap ng'wonyuni che po mesundeito, eng' lugosyegap tamirmirik che po yaityet eng' komoswegap kipsengwet." 
Ephesians6:13 Nooto anyun onam kariigap lugeet komugul che po Kamuktaindet, si kobiit omuuch ogirinde eng' peetuut ne ya, ak ye kaoyai tugul, otononse." 
Ephesians6:14 Otononse anyun, ko kaogermen suenutikwok eng' imanit, ak ko kaolaach karnetap tegeet ne po imanda," 
Ephesians6:15 ak ko kaoratyi keelyekwok pekyinet ne po logoiywek che myach che po kaalyeet; 
Ephesians6:16 ak onam kobooto chuun tugul long'eetap kayaneet, ne omuuchi omis kipchabonik tugul che po maat che po ineendet ne ya." 
Ephesians6:17 Ak onam kuutweetap yetunet, ak rotwetap chok ne po Kabuuset ne Tiliil, nooto ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet:" 
Ephesians6:18 Osaa peetuusyek tugul eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil kobooto saaet tugul ak kagaigaet, ak oriipsei eng' nooto eng' kagiiletapkei tugul ak kagaigaet, agobo tugul che tiliileen." 
Ephesians6:19 Ak agobo anee, si kobiit kegoono tweguunet, ayaat kutinnyu, abarta eng' nyiganateet ung'ootyet ne po logoiywek che myach," 
Ephesians6:20 amu aa tononjinindet ne po nooto eng' nyororosyek; si kobiit ang'alaal eng' chooto eng' nyiganateet, ko uu ye nyolu amwa." 
Ephesians6:21 Ago si kobiit onai ak okweek ng'aleekyuk, ole ateptoi, komwaiwok tuguuk tugul Tukiko, chamaneet ne ketupche ne kiboityot ne kiyani eng' Kiptaiyat:" 
Ephesians6:22 ne koayokwok agobo ng'olyoondoniito, si kobiit onai ng'aleekyok, ak kogaigai ineendet mugulelwekwok." 
Ephesians6:23 Ingotebi kaalyeet kobooto tupchosyek, ak chamyet ak kayaneet, che po Kamuktaindet Kwanda ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo." 
Ephesians6:24 Ingotep myeeindo kobooto icheek tugul che chamei Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo eng' atepto ne ma ng'emaksei.
