Philippians1:1 Paulo ak Timoteo, otwogigap Kristo Jeso, kisirchini tugul che tiliileen eng' Kristo Jeso che miitei Philippi kobooto riibiigap kaniset ak kiboitiinik:" 
Philippians1:2 Ingotep myeeindo kobootok ak kaalyeet che punu Kamuktaindet Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo. 
Philippians1:3 Amwachini Kamuktaindet nenyu kongoi agobo kabwaatennyu tugul ne abwaatok," 
Philippians1:4 eng' soomennyu age tugul agobo okweek tugul, asoome eng' soomennyu eng' poiboiyet kotugul," 
Philippians1:5 amu yamdaeng'wong', eng' logoiywek che myach kobooch peetuut ne po tai agoi peetuuni;" 
Philippians1:6 angen komyee ng'olyoondoniito, ale ineendet ne ki toi poisyet ne myee eng' okweek koyaei kosulda agoi peetuutap Jeso Kristo:" 
Philippians1:7 ko uu ye myee eng' anee abwaat ko uu niito agobo okweek tugul, amu omi muguleldanyu, amu eng' monjorornatennyu, ak eng' riipseet ak kagimitetap logoiywek che myach, okweek tugul ko oo yamdoik kobooto eng' myeeindo." 
Philippians1:8 Amu Kamuktaindet paoryandennyu, ko uu ye ating'enok okweek tugul emosto eng' rireenosyegap Kristo Jeso." 
Philippians1:9 Ak ni ko saaennyu ale kotesak chamyeng'wong' miising' inne eng' naet ak kaguiyet tugul; 
Philippians1:10 si kobiit onai komyee tuguuk che po telunateet; si kobiit oegu che ma tinyei keniisyet, che ma tinyei kanagut agoi peetuutap Kristo;" 
Philippians1:11 ko oo nyiitootiin eng' logoegap imanda, che punu Jeso Kristo, agoi toroornatet ak kalasunetap Kamuktaindet." 
Philippians1:12 Ago amache, che kitupche, ale, onai ole tuguuk che kibwanjo, ko ki kotoret logoiywek che myach koba tai;" 
Philippians1:13 kot kotook monjorornatennyu agobo Kristo eng' kiplugotinik tugul che po kaplaitoryat, ak eng' piik alak tugul;" 
Philippians1:14 ak tinyei che chaang' eng' che kitupche eng' Kiptaiyat nyiganateet ne oo kosiir, komwaita ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ama eng' kaiyweisyet, amu tinyei kamang'unet agobo monjorornatennyu." 
Philippians1:15 Amdoi alage Kristo eng' ng'etkonda, ak suryet; koamdoi alage ak icheek eng' kabwaatutik che myach;" 
Philippians1:16 amdoi alage eng' chamyet, kongen kole ki kindea ariip logoiywek che myach:" 
Philippians1:17 ago amdoi alage Kristo eng' toiyet, ma eng' mugulelwek che leelach, koleen teswa nyalilda eng' monjorornatennyu." 
Philippians1:18 Nee anyun? Kobatee kityo eng' ooreet age tugul, ngo eng' keniisyet anan ngo eng' imanit, keamdoi Kristo; ak abaibai eng' nooto, ee, ak ta abaibaitu." 
Philippians1:19 Amu angen ale walaksei niito koegu yetunennyu, eng' soomeng'wong', ak ne koonu Kabuusetap Jeso Kristo." 
Philippians1:20 Ko uu eng' kagenisyennyu ne ageni miising' ak kamang'unennyu, ale ma kigoono alilan eng' kiy age tugul ago eng' nyiganateet tugul, ko uu kotugul, ko uu nooto agine nguno kitoroori Kristo eng' poortanyu, ngo eng' saboondo, anan eng' meet." 
Philippians1:21 Amu eng' anee ngasabe ko Kristo, ak ngamee ko poroteet." 
Philippians1:22 Ago ngasabe eng' poorto, ngo niito logoegap poisyennyu, ko mangen anyun ne aleweni." 
Philippians1:23 Amu kagigikyo kwenutap tuguuk aeng', atinye mageet awo ketebi ak Kristo; amu myee nooto miising' kosiir:" 
Philippians1:24 ago ngatebi eng' poorto konyolu kosiir agobo okweek. 
Philippians1:25 Ak atinye kamang'unoni, ak angen ale atebye, ee, ak ta atebye kobootok okweek tugul, agobo teseng'wong' po tai ak poiboiyet eng' kayaneet;" 
Philippians1:26 si kobiit kotesak kalasuneng'wong' eng' Kristo Jeso eng' anee, amu ami kobootok kogeny." 
Philippians1:27 Ago ingoek atebeeng'wong' ne nyoljin logoiywek che myach che po Kristo: si ngot anyoo ageerok anan ngo ma mi anee, amuuchi agas agobo atebeeng'wong', keele otonondosi komyee eng' sabeet agenge, eng' muguleldo agenge ogiiligei agobo kayaneetap logoiywek che myach;" 
Philippians1:28 amat komuok puunik eng' kiy age tugul: nooto kaboorunet ne tagunoot ne po luseet eng' icheek, ago po yetuneng'wong', ak punu nooto Kamuktaindet;" 
Philippians1:29 amu ki kigoonok agobo Kristo, ma oyan ineendet kityo, ago onyalilye agobo ineendet:" 
Philippians1:30 otinye lugonooto ki ogeerena, ak ogase nguno keele mi eng' anee." 
Philippians2:1 Ngo miitei anyun kagaigaet age tugul eng' Kristo, ngo mi saisaet age tugul ne po chamyet, ngo mi yamdaet age tugul ne po Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ngo mi rireenosyek ak riirge," 
Philippians2:2 osulde anyun poiboiyennyu, si oegu che po kabwaatet agenge, otinye chamyet agenge, oo po yamdaet agenge, ak che po mageet agenge." 
Philippians2:3 Amoyai kiy age tugul eng' toiyet, anan eng' kalasunetapkei, ago eng' kaming'inetapkei ne po naet, koiti chii age tugul chiito age kole kaigai kosiir ineendet;" 
Philippians2:4 amat kogeer chii age tugul eng' okweek tuguukyik kityo, ago chii age tugul eng' okweek kogeer tuguugap piik alak ak icheek." 
Philippians2:5 Ingotebenok ateboni, ne ki mi agine eng' Kristo Jeso:" 
Philippians2:6 ne, nganda ki tinyei itoondap Kamuktaindet, koma iit kole kiit ne po kamanuut ne oo kole kogergeit ak Kamuktaindet," 
Philippians2:7 ago kiyaigei ineendet koek puch ak konam itoondap otwogindet, kogergeit ak piik;" 
Philippians2:8 ak kingo took eng' itoondap chii, koming'ingei, kogas iit agoi meet, ee, meet ne po kimurtoiyot." 
Philippians2:9 Nooto anyun, kiitoroor `Kamuktaindet ineendet miising', ak kogoochi ineendet kainet ne siirei kainet age tugul;" 
Philippians2:10 si kobiit kogutuny kutundo age tugul eng' kainetap Jeso, age tugul ne mi kipsengwet, ak ne mi ng'wony ak ne mi ng'wony oriit," 
Philippians2:11 si kong'aany ng'elyepta age tugul kole Jeso Kristo ko Kiptaiyat, agoi toroornatetap Kamuktaindet Kwanda." 
Philippians2:12 Nooto anyun, chamanikyuk, ko uu ye koogase iit kotugul, ma ye ami kityo, ago nguno ye ma mi ogase iit kosiir, oboisyee yetuneng'wong' kosulda eng' kaiyweisyet ak potanet;" 
Philippians2:13 amu Kamuktaindet ne poisyei eng' okweek si omach, ak oboisyee agine, agobo magennyi ne myee." 
Philippians2:14 Oyai tuguuk tugul ama eng' kang'unyng'unyosyek ak tiiyasyek; 
Philippians2:15 si kobiit oegu che ma tinyei leluut ak ko libwoben, lagogap Kamuktaindet che ma tinyei kunenden eng' kwenutap ibinda ne kunuur ak ko mastaat, che kooluu eng' kwenunnywa ko uu lapkeiyosyek eng' ng'wony," 
Philippians2:16 oboortoi ng'olyootap saboondo; si kobiit anyoor ne alasunegei eng' peetuutap Kristo, ale ki ma alabat puch anan aboisye puch." 
Philippians2:17 Ee, agot ngerong'ja paragutap kaptisisyet ak otisyetap kayaneng'wong', ko abaibai, ak agasigei kobootok okweek tugul:" 
Philippians2:18 ak ko uu nooto oboiboitu ak okweek, ak ogaaskei kobooto." 
Philippians2:19 Ago amang'u eng' Kiptaiyat Jeso ale ayookwok Timoteo ko neegit, si anyoor agane kagaigaet ne myee, ye kaanai atebeeng'wong'." 
Philippians2:20 Amu ma tinye chii age ne kergei kabwaatennyi ak nenyu, ne riibei iman atebeeng'wong'." 
Philippians2:21 Amu cheeng'ei icheek tugul chechwaak, ma tuguuk che po Jeso Kristo." 
Philippians2:22 Amu ongen atebeennyi komyee, ole, ko uu lakweet ak kwanda, ko kibois kobooto eng' logoiywek che myach." 
Philippians2:23 Amang'u anyun ale, ayookwok ineendet nguno, eng' sait ye kaageer ole ateptoi:" 
Philippians2:24 ago amang'u eng' Kiptaiyat ale anyoone aneendet agane ko neegit. 
Philippians2:25 Ago ki abwaat ale nyolu ayookwok Epaphroditus, tupchennyu ne kiboityot ne kiboisyei tuwai ne asigarindet kobooto, ak ko neng'wong' kayooktoindet ak toretindet agobo tuguuk che amakyinige;" 
Philippians2:26 amu kiting'enok emosto okweek tugul, ak ki tinyei nyalilda ne oo, amu ki ogas keele kimyani ineendet:" 
Philippians2:27 amu kimyan iman, kot ko neegit kome: ago ki riiree `Kamuktaindet ineendet; ago ma eng' ineendet kityo, ago eng' anee agane, si ma nyooru arageneet eng' arageneet." 
Philippians2:28 Kayogu ineendet anyun eng' kagiiletapkei ne oo, si, ye ogeer ineendet kogeny, omuuchi oboiboitu, si kowisisiit aragenennyu." 
Philippians2:29 Otaach ineendet anyun eng' Kiptaiyat eng' poiboiyet tugul; ak ogonyit che uu nooto: 
Philippians2:30 amu ki neegit kome agobo poisyetap Kristo, koma riiree saboondanyi si konyiitwa kiit ne ki rartaat eng' poisyeng'wong' ne ki oboisyeiwo." 
Philippians3:1 Ne po let anyun, che kitupche, oboiboitu eng' Kiptaiyat. Ma kaimet iman eng' anee asirwak tuguuchuuto, ago toretook okweek." 
Philippians3:2 Oriibegei sesenik, oriibegei yaigap yaityo, oriibegei icheek che tilegei:" 
Philippians3:3 amu ki kamuratanet acheek, che saaei eng' Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet, ak kilasuge eng' Kristo Jeso, ama ki tinyei kamang'unet eng' poorto:" 
Philippians3:4 agot ngamuuchi amang'kei agot eng' poorto. Ngo pwaati chii age tugul koleen tinyei kamang'unet eng' poorto, ko aa siirtoot." 
Philippians3:5 Ki kimuratana eng' peetuut ne po sisiit, aa po kesweegap Israel, aa po ooreetap Benjamin, Hebranindet ne po Yahudik; eng' ng'aleegap Ng'atuutyet, ko aa Pharisaindet;" 
Philippians3:6 eng' kagiiletapkei, ko ki ausaus kaniset; eng' imanda ne mi eng' Ng'atuutyet, koma tinye leluut." 
Philippians3:7 Ago tuguuk che ki poroteet eng' anee, ko kiaiit chuuto koek tugun che ki kobetyo amu Kristo." 
Philippians3:8 Ee iman, ak aiiti tuguuk tugul koek tugun che ki kobetyo amu telunateet ne po naetap Kristo Jeso, Kiptaiyandennyu: ki kobetwo tuguuk tugul amu ineendet ak aiiti ale pusagaryek, si kobiit anyoor Kristo," 
Philippians3:9 ak kenyoorwo eng' ineendet, koma tinye imandanyu, nooto ne po Ng'atuutyet, ago nooto ne punu kayaneet eng' Kristo, imanda ne po Kamuktaindet eng' kayaneet:" 
Philippians3:10 si kobiit anai ineendet ak kamuktaet ne po ng'eetyeennyi, ak yamdaet ne po nyalilwogikyik, kirogendoena meennyi;" 
Philippians3:11 si kobiit anyoor eng' oor age tugul aiityi ng'eetyeetap che ki pek. 
Philippians3:12 Ma keele ki anyooru, ama keele ki aegu ne ititaat: ago agiiljinigei tai, si kobiit anam nooto ne ki igoochi Kristo Jeso konamena." 
Philippians3:13 Che kitupche, ma iiti anee ale kaanam: ago ayae kiit agenge, autye tuguuk che mi let eng' anee, ayogoochinigei tuguuk che mi tai." 
Philippians3:14 Agiiljinigei tai, ait ole pooch melekto ne po kuuretap parak ne po Kamuktaindet eng' Kristo Jeso." 
Philippians3:15 Nooto anyun, ongibwaat acheek che kigeesunotingei ko uu nooto: ak ngo pwaat kiy ne teer eng' ng'olyoo age tugul, kota kong'ang'wok Kamuktaindet niito agine:" 
Philippians3:16 ago, yooto kogeit, ko ongebendate ng'atuutyonooto." 
Philippians3:17 Che kitupche, oegu che yaei tuguuk che ayae, ak ogeer icheek che pendoti ko uu kaboorunet ne ogeerenech." 
Philippians3:18 Amu pendoti che chaang' che ki amwaiwok kotugul agobo icheek, ak nguno amwaiwok eng' riirek, ale icheeget ko puunigap kimurtoiyotap Kristo:" 
Philippians3:19 ne kagesunennywa ko luseet, ne kamuktaindennywa ko moet, ne kalasunennywa ko teweernatennywa, che ibwaati tuguugap ng'wony." 
Philippians3:20 Amu ki piigap kipsengwet: che kigeni Yetindet kobun olooto, Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo:" 
Philippians3:21 ne tuun walei kileelit poortanyo ne po nyeraatyet, si kobiit kogergeit ak poortanyi ne po liilindo, eng' kamugonooto imuuchi koyai tuguuk tugul kogas iit ineendet." 
Philippians4:1 Nooto anyun, tupchosyekyuk chamanik, che ating'ee emosto, poiboiyennyu ak kuutweennyu, olumdegei anyun eng' Kiptaiyat, chamanikyuk." 
Philippians4:2 Asoome miising' Euodia, ak asoome miising' Suntuke, koek che po kabwaatet agenge eng' Kiptaiyat." 
Philippians4:3 Ee, asoomin aginye, kiboityot ne po iman kobooto, ale toret kobogoryosyechu, amu ki kiboisyei tugul eng' logoiywek che myach, kobooto Klement agine, ak chuun alak che ki kiboitiinik tugul, che mi kainaikwak bukuitap saboondo." 
Philippians4:4 Oboiboitu eng' Kiptaiyat kotugul: ak amwae kogeny ale, Oboiboitu." 
Philippians4:5 Ingonaak mutyoneng'wong' eng' piik tugul. Kagoriik Kiptaiyat. 
Philippians4:6 Amogereeri met eng' kiy age tugul; ago eng' kiy age tugul ko eng' saaet ak soomet kobooto kongoi, ingonaak soomutikwok eng' Kamuktaindet." 
Philippians4:7 Ak riibei kaalyeetap Kamuktaindet, ne siirei kaguiyet tugul, mugulelwekwok ak kabwaatutikwok eng' Kristo Jeso." 
Philippians4:8 Ne po let anyun, che kitupche, tuguuk alak tugul che po imanda, alak tugul che po teegisto, alak tugul che po imanda, alak tugul che tiliileen, alak tugul che chamaatiin, alak tugul che kimwaitoe ne myee; ngo mi myeein age tugul, ak ngo mi kalasunet age tugul, obwaat tuguuchuuto." 
Philippians4:9 Tuguuk che ki oneetkei ak che ki otaach ak che ki ogas ak che ki ogeer eng' anee, oyai tuguuchooto: ak kotep kobootok Kamuktaindet ne po kaalyeet." 
Philippians4:10 Ago koabaibaitu miising' eng' Kiptaiyat, ale koobwaata kogeny nguno, ko kagobata peetuusyek che chaang'; ko uu ye kootinye kabwaatonooto iman, ago ki ma otinye poroindo." 
Philippians4:11 Ma ng'alaali amu ma tinye kiy: amu ki aneetkei, eng' atebeet age tugul ne atinye ale, yama ko uu nooto." 
Philippians4:12 Angen ole ateptoi eng' terterindo, ak angen ole ateptoi ye katesak tuguuk: eng' kiy age tugul ak eng' tuguuk tugul, ko ki aneetkei ung'ootyetap piyendo ak rugutet, anyoor che chaang' ak abanan." 
Philippians4:13 Amuuchi ayai tuguuk tugul eng' ineendet ne igimita. 
Philippians4:14 Ago ki oyai ne myee, amu ki otinye yamdaet eng' nyalildanyu." 
Philippians4:15 Ak ongen okweeget okweek Philippik, ole eng' taunetap logoiywek che myach, ye kinga we eng' Makedonia, koma piit kaniset ne ki tinyei yamdaet kobooto eng' ng'olyootap kagoitoet ak taaget, kobatee okweegei kityo;" 
Philippians4:16 amu agot eng' Thessalonika ko ki oyookwo atkai tugul tuguuk che ki ma atinye. 
Philippians4:17 Ma keele acheeng'e konunet; ago acheeng'e logoek che tesoksei eng' koiiteng'wong'. 
Philippians4:18 Ago atinye tuguuk tugul, ak che siirtoot: aa piyong'ot, amu ki ataach eng' Epaphroditus tuguuk che kibunwok, che po ng'uunet ne nyamdut, korosyot ne taagaksei, ne iboiboi Kamuktaindet." 
Philippians4:19 Ago inyiitwok Kamuktaindet nenyu kiit age tugul ne obononi ko uu mogornatosyekyik eng' toroornatet eng' Kristo Jeso. 
Philippians4:20 Nguno anyun ingobunji Kamuktaindet nenyo, ineendet Kwandanyo, toroornatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen." 
Philippians4:21 Ogat age tugul ne tiliil eng' Kristo Jeso. Igatok tupchosyek che mi kobooto. 
Philippians4:22 Igatok tugul che tiliileen, miising' ko icheeget che mi kootap laitoryat." 
Philippians4:23 Ingotep myeeindap Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo kobooto saboonwekwok. 
Colossians1:1 Paulo, kayooktoindet ne po Kristo Jeso eng' mageetap Kamuktaindet, ak Timoteo tupchennyo," 
Colossians1:2 kisirchini che tiliileen che kitupche che iyanotin eng' Kristo, che mi Kolosae: Ingotebi kobootok myeeindo ak kaalyeet che punu Kamuktaindet Kwandanyo." 
Colossians1:3 Kigoochini kongoi Kamuktaindet Kwandap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, kesaiywok kotugul," 
Colossians1:4 ye ki ngegas agobo kayaneng'wong' eng' Kristo Jeso, ak chamyet ne oting'e tugul che tiliileen" 
Colossians1:5 amu kamang'unet ne kigegonorwok eng' kipsengwet, ne ki osip ogas eng' ng'olyootap imanit ne po logoiywek che myach," 
Colossians1:6 ne kigoityok; ko uu ole teptoi agine eng' ng'wony komugul koiyiei logoek ak ko tesoksei, ko uu eng' okweek, kobooch peetuut ne ki ogas ak onai myeeindap Kamuktaindet eng' iman;" 
Colossians1:7 ko uu ye ki oneetkei eng' Epapra chamanennyo ne kiboisyei tugul, ne kiboityot ne iyanaat ne po Kristo agobo acheek," 
Colossians1:8 ne ki iboorwech chamyeng'wong' ne mi eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil. 
Colossians1:9 Amu niito anyun, koma kimete kesaa ak kesoom agobo okweek kobooch peetuut ne ki ngegas, keele konyiiak naetap magennyi eng' utaatyet tugul ak kaguiyet ne punu Kabuuset ne Tiliil," 
Colossians1:10 si obendate ko uu ye nyolu eng' Kiptaiyat, oboiboi ineendet, oitosi logoek eng' poisyet age tugul ne myee, ak otesage eng' naetap Kamuktaindet;" 
Colossians1:11 kigimitok eng' kamuktaet tugul, ko uu kamugetap toroornatennyi, agoi muitaet tugul ak talasyet eng' poiboiyet," 
Colossians1:12 ogoochini kongoi Kwanda, ne kiyaech keegu che nyoljin keyamde poroteetap che tiliileen eng' lapkeiyet;" 
Colossians1:13 ne kisarwech kemang'une kimnateetap mesundeito, ak kouutech keebe laitornatetap Weeriit ne po chamyennyi;" 
Colossians1:14 ne ki tinyei eng' ineendet katyagennyo, nyoetap kaat ne po tengekwogikyok." 
Colossians1:15 Ineendet itoondap Kamuktaindet ne ma taagu, ineendet ne kisip kesich eng' kiit age tugul ne ki kitoi keyai;" 
Colossians1:16 amu ki kitoi keyai tuguuk tugul eng' ineendet, che mi kipsengwet ak che mi ng'wony, tuguuk che taagu ak tuguuk che ma taagu, anan laitornatosyek, anan kiptainatosyek, anan pounatosyek anan kimnatosyek; ki kitoi keyai tuguuk tugul eng' ineendet ak ko po ineendet;" 
Colossians1:17 ak po tai ineendet eng' tuguuk tugul, ak namegei tuguuk tugul eng' ineendet." 
Colossians1:18 Ak ineendet metitap poorto, nooto kaniset: ineendet taunet, taunindetap che ki mong' eng' che ki pek; si kobiit koek ne oo eng' tuguuk tugul." 
Colossians1:19 Amu ki chamak komyee keele komeny nyiyet tugul eng' ineendet; 
Colossians1:20 si kotuiyechigei tuguuk tugul ineendet, ye kingo kagoyai kaalyeet eng' korotiigap kimurtoiyondennyi; eng' ineendet, ngo tuguuk che mi ng'wony anan tuguuk che mi kipsengwet." 
Colossians1:21 Ak nganda ki oo kipsagarek eng' peetuusyek che ki kosiirto, ak ki oo puunik eng' kabwaatutikwok eng' poisyonikwok che yaacheen, ko kagotuiyok ineendet nguno," 
Colossians1:22 eng' poortanyi ne po panyeek, eng' meet, si kobiit komutak ko oo tiliileen ko motinye tisya, amotinyei kiy ne kirwoogunenok eng' tainnyi:" 
Colossians1:23 ngo tebi iman eng' kayaneet, ko oo lumdootin ak ko oo tononiotiin komyee, ama ki istok eng' kamang'unetap logoiywek che myach che ki ogas, che ki kiamda eng' yautyet tugul eng' kurereetap kipsengwet; ki kiyaa anee Paulo amu nooto aek kiboityot." 
Colossians1:24 Abaibai anyun nguno eng' nyalilwogikyuk agobo okweek, ak anyiiti eng' komostanyu nooto ne rarunoot agobo nyalilwogigap Kristo eng' poortanyu agobo poortanyi, nooto kaniset;" 
Colossians1:25 ak, ki kiyaa agobo nooto aek kiboityot, eng' tononjinetap Kamuktaindet ne ki kigoono amu okweek, si ayai ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet kosulda," 
Colossians1:26 ung'ootyet ne ki kiuny kobooch kenyiisyek tugul che ki kosiirto ak ibinwek: ago nguno, ko kagiboorchi chechiik che tiliileen," 
Colossians1:27 che ki cham Kamuktaindet kong'aang'ji kiit ne uu mogornatosyegap toroornatet ne po ung'ootyoniito eng' Pororyosyek, nooto Kristo eng' okweek, kamang'unetap toroornatet:" 
Colossians1:28 ineendet ne kimwaitoi, ak kiteechini chii age tugul ak kineeti chii age tugul eng' utaatyet tugul, si kobiit kimut chii age tugul kogesunotkei eng' Kristo;" 
Colossians1:29 abirtochinigei agine nooto, agiiligei ko uu poisyennyi, ne poisyei eng' anee eng' kamuktaet." 
Colossians2:1 Amu amache onai ole agiiligei miising' agobo okweek, ak icheek che mi Laodikia, ak alak tugul che tomo kogeero togoch eng' poorto;" 
Colossians2:2 si kobiit kigaigai mugulelwekwak, ak keropchin eng' chamyet, ak eng' mogornatosyek tugul che po nyiietap kaguiyet, si kobiit konai icheek ung'ootyetap Kamuktaindet, ineendet Kristo," 
Colossians2:3 ki kiuny eng' ineendet konoraik tugul che po utaatyet ak naet. 
Colossians2:4 Amwae niito ale, si ma kenaak chii age tugul eng' ng'aleegap lomset." 
Colossians2:5 Amu agot ngo ma mi anee eng' poorto, ami kobootok eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ko abaibai eng' atebeeng'wong', ne ageere, ak kimnateetap kayaneng'wong' eng' Kristo." 
Colossians2:6 Ko uu ye ki otaach anyun Kristo Jeso Kiptaiyat, obendate eng' ineendet," 
Colossians2:7 ko oo lumdootin ak ko oo teegotin eng' ineendet, ak kigimitok eng' kayaneng'wong', ko uu ye ki kinetak, otese omwae kongoi." 
Colossians2:8 Oriipkei si ma iluulok chii age eng' ng'omnatennyi ak kaberberisyet ne po puch, eng' pitonwegap piik, eng' kaneetisyosyek che po tai che po ng'wony, ak ma eng' Kristo:" 
Colossians2:9 amu menyei eng' ineendet eng' poorto nyiyet tugul ne po Kamuktaindet," 
Colossians2:10 ak keyaok oegu che nyiitootiin eng' ineendet, ne metitap pounateet tugul ak kimnateet:" 
Colossians2:11 ki kimuratanak eng' ineendet eng' kamuratanet ne ki ma kiyae eunek, eng' istoetap poortap panyeek, eng' kamuratanetap Kristo;" 
Colossians2:12 ko kagetubok kobooto ineendet eng' kabatisanet, ak ki king'eetak eng' nooto kobooto ineendet amu kayaneet eng' yaeet ne yaei Kamuktaindet, ne ki ing'eet ineendet komong' eng' che ki pek." 
Colossians2:13 Ak okweek, che ki oo pegunotin eng' yaitwogikwok ak poorwekwok che ma kimuratan, ki isaabok okweek, kobooto ineendet, ko kagonyoiywech kaat yaitwogikyok tugul;" 
Colossians2:14 ko kagobuch sireet ne po arorutik ne kiga kogikyech, ne kiraanyech: ak kigoisto, kobirchi kimurtoiyot;" 
Colossians2:15 ko kagorek pounatosyek ak kimnatosyek, koboor kotook, koterteeri icheek eng' kimurtoiyot." 
Colossians2:16 Nooto anyun amat korwokwok chii age tugul agobo amitwogik, anan agobo che kieei, anan agobo peetuutap igoorto anan agobo arawet ne kaleel anan peetuutap sabato:" 
Colossians2:17 che urwetap tuguuk che pwoonei; ago poorto ko po Kristo. 
Colossians2:18 Amat korebenak chii melektang'wong' eng' ooreet ne machei ineendet, ne po kaming'inetapkei ak kalasunetap malaikaisyek, ak kogimitegei tuguuk che ki kogeer, ak komenee kabwaatutikyik che po poorto," 
Colossians2:19 ama namei komyee Metit, ne nyoorunee poorto tugul teset eng' teset ne punu Kamuktaindet, ko kagonyoor tugul, ak konamatkei eng' kebeberwek ak tigitik." 
Colossians2:20 Ko uu ye ki obegu kobooto Kristo omang'une kaneetisyosyek che po tai che po ng'wony, amu nee anyun si ogas iit arorutik, ko uu ye osaptosi eng' ng'wony," 
Colossians2:21 amonam, anan ochamcham, anan otwaa" 
Colossians2:22 (petos tuguuchuuto tugul ye kiboisye), ko uu ng'atuutik ak kaneetisyosyegap piik?" 
Colossians2:23 Tinyei tuguuchooto kaboorunet ne po utaatyet eng' chameet ne po kalasunet, ak eng' kaming'inetapkei, ak nyalilda ne kinyaliili poorto; matoreti kiy age tugul eng' katerteretap magutigap poorto." 
Colossians3:1 Ko uu ye king'eetyee anyun kobooto Kristo, ocheeng' tuguuk che mi parak, ole mi Kristo kotebyei eng' eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet." 
Colossians3:2 Obwaat tuguuk che mi parak, ma tuguuk che miitei ng'wony." 
Colossians3:3 Amu ki obegu, ak ki kiuny saboonwekwok kobooto Kristo eng' Kamuktaindet." 
Colossians3:4 Ye tuun took Kristo, ne ineendet saboondanyo, otaagu anyun ak okweek kobooto ineendet eng' toroornatet." 
Colossians3:5 Obar anyun kebeberwekwok che miitei ng'wony; sokseet, simdo, maguutik che samisen, mageet ne ya, ak kasetap myat, nooto saaetap kanamonik;" 
Colossians3:6 nyoonjin nereeknatetap Kamuktaindet weeriitap ngelelnateet amu tuguuchooto; 
Colossians3:7 eng' tuguuchooto che ki obendote ak okweek eng' tai, ye kita omenye eng' tuguuchuuto." 
Colossians3:8 Ago nguno olakte ak okweek tuguuchuuto tugul; nereegek, nyitatet, yaityet, chubisyet, ak ng'alaalet ne po teweernateet eng' kutusweekwok:" 
Colossians3:9 amomwachigei lembech, amu ki oregu chiito ne po keny kobooto poisyonikyik," 
Colossians3:10 ak koolaach chiito ne leel, ne kiwalei koleelit agoi naet kogergeit ak itoondap ineendet ne ki yai ineendet:" 
Colossians3:11 ole ma ting'e poroindo Yunanindet ak Yahudyot, ne imuratanat ak ne ma imuratanat, punootyo, Sitiaindet, ne otwogin, ne ityagat: ago Kristo ko tugul ak eng' tugul." 
Colossians3:12 Nooto anyun, amu oo lewenaigap Kamuktaindet che tiliileen ak ko oo chamanik, olaach muguleldo ne po rireenetapkei, talasyet, kaming'inetapkei, mutyonet, ak muitaet;" 
Colossians3:13 omuitochinigei, ak onyochinigei kaat okweegei, ngo tinyei chii age tugul ng'olyoo eng' age: agot ko uu ye kinyoiywok kaat Kiptaiyat, oyai ko uu nooto ak okweek:" 
Colossians3:14 ak otes eng' tuguuchuuto tugul chamyet, nooto ratuutyet ne po kagesunetapkei." 
Colossians3:15 Ak ingoboi kaalyeetap Kristo mugulelwekwok, nooto ne ki kiguurchok eng' poorto agenge; ak oegu che tinyei kongoi." 
Colossians3:16 Ingomenyok ng'olyootap Kristo eng' mogornateet, eng' utaatyet tugul oneetige ak oteechinigei eng' tyenwogigap kalasunet ak tyenwogik che ki kisir ak tyenwogigap saboon otyenjini Kamuktaindet eng' myeeindo eng' mugulelwekwok." 
Colossians3:17 Ak kiit age tugul ne oyae, eng' ng'olyoot anan eng' poisyet, oyai tugul eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat Jeso, omwachini Kamuktaindet Kwanda kongoi eng' ineendet." 
Colossians3:18 Osotichu, ogas iit manong'otaikwok, ko uu ye nyolu eng' Kiptaiyat." 
Colossians3:19 Manong'otaichu, ocham osotikwok, amogoochi ng'wanindo." 
Colossians3:20 Lagochu, ogas iit sigiikwok eng' tuguuk tugul, amu iboiboi niito miising' Kiptaiyat." 
Colossians3:21 Kwanisyechu, amotachatachi lagokwok, si ma iluuk mugulelwekwak." 
Colossians3:22 Otwogichu, ogas iit eng' tuguuk tugul icheek che kiptainikwok eng' poorwek; ama eng' otwoknateet ne kigeerei, ko uu che iboiboi piik, ago eng' muguleldo tugul, oiywei Kiptaiyat:" 
Colossians3:23 kiit age tugul ne oyae, oyai kobunu muguleldo, ko uu eng' Kiptaiyat, ama ko uu eng' piik;" 
Colossians3:24 ongen ole otaache eng' Kiptaiyat melekto ne po poroteet; oote Kiptaiyat Kristo. 
Colossians3:25 Amu ineendet ne yaei ne ya, ko tuun taachei agine ne po yaityonooto ki yai: ama mi tiytiyet." 
Colossians4:1 Kiptainichu, ogoochini otwogikwok nooto ne po imanda ak ne nyolu; ongen ole otinye ak okweek Kiptaiyat eng' kipsengwet." 
Colossians4:2 Ogiiligei kotugul eng' saaet, oriipsei eng' nooto kobooto kongoi;" 
Colossians4:3 osaiywech ak acheek, si koyatwech Kamuktaindet kurgeet ne po ng'olyoot, kemwa ung'ootyetap Kristo; ki kirata agobo nooto;" 
Colossians4:4 si aboortoi, ko uu ye nyolu amwa." 
Colossians4:5 Obendoti eng' ng'omnateet eng' taitap icheeget che mi saang', ingoek saisyek kamanuut eng' okweek." 
Colossians4:6 Ingotep ng'aleekwok eng' myeeindo kotugul, koanyinyogis eng' muunyuk, si kobiit onai ole kanyool owoljinde chii age tugul." 
Colossians4:7 Mwaiwok ng'aleekyuk tugul Tukiko, tupchet ne chamat, ak ko kiboityot ne iyanaat, ineendet otwogindet ne kiboisyei tuwai eng' Kiptaiyat:" 
Colossians4:8 ne koayokwok amu ng'olyoondoniito, si kobiit onai atebeennyo, si kogaigai mugulelwekwok;" 
Colossians4:9 kobooto Onesmus, tupchet ne kiyani ak kochamaat, ne age eng' okweek. Mwaiwok icheek tuguuk tugul che po olito." 
Colossians4:10 Igatok Aristarko ne ki kimonjororinik tuwai, ak Mariko ne tupchetap Barnaba (ki onyooru ng'aleek agobo ineendet; ngo nyonjok, otaach)," 
Colossians4:11 ak Jeso, ne kiguure Justo, icheeget che po che imuratonotin: chuuto kityo che keboisyei tugul agobo laitornatetap Kamuktaindet, icheeget che ki koek kagaigaet eng' anee." 
Colossians4:12 Igatok Epapra, ne age eng' okweek, otwogindetap Kristo Jeso, igiilegei kotugul agobo okweek eng' saautikyik, si kobiit otononse ko ogesunotingei, ak ongen komyee mageet tugul ne po Kamuktaindet." 
Colossians4:13 Amu abaoryani agobo ineendet, ale tinyei kagiiletapkei ne oo agobo okweek, ak agobo icheek che miitei Laodikia, ak icheek che miitei Hierapoli." 
Colossians4:14 Igatok Luka, chepkerichot ne chamaneet, ak Dema." 
Colossians4:15 Ogat tupchosyek che miitei Laodikia, ak Numpa, ak kaniset ne miitei koonnyi." 
Colossians4:16 Ak ye kagesoman parwaani eng' kwenung'wong', ogoite kesoman agine eng' kanisetap Laodikia; ak osoman ak okweek parwaanin po Laodikia." 
Colossians4:17 Ak omwachi Arkipo oleenji, Riip poisyet ne kiitaach eng' Kiptaiyat, si kobiit iyai kosulda." 
Colossians4:18 Kagatennyu anee Paulo eng' eunnyu. Obwaat monjorornatennyu. Ingotep myeeindo kobootok. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paulo, Silvano ak Timoteo, kisirchini kanisetap Thessalonikek eng' Kamuktaindet Kwanda ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo. Ingotep kobootok myeeindo ak kaalyeet." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Kimwachini Kamuktaindet kongoi kotugul agobo okweek tugul, kemwaok eng' saautikyok;" 
1Thessalonians1:3 kibwaati ne ma kisise, poisyeng'wong' ne po kayaneet ak poisyet ne uui ne po chamyet ak muitaetap kamang'unet eng' Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, eng' taitap Kamuktaindet nenyo ak ko Kwanda." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Amu kingen, che kitupche, che chamanik eng' Kamuktaindet, keele ki kolewenok ineendet," 
1Thessalonians1:5 keele ki ma pwonjok logoiywekyok che myach eng' ng'olyoot kityo, ago eng' kimnateet agine, ak eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak eng' naet ne ongen inne; ko uu ye ongen ole ki kipiik che uu nee eng' taing'wong' agobo okweek." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Ak ki oegu kasubikyok, ak che po Kiptaiyat, ko kaotaach ng'olyoot eng' usiisyet ne oo, kobooto poiboiyet ne po Kabuuset ne Tiliil;" 
1Thessalonians1:7 kot oegu kaboorunoik eng' tugul che iyani eng' Makedonia ak eng' Akaia. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Amu ki kogasak ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat kobun olong'wong', ma eng' Makedonia ak Akaia kityo, ago ki koyom komosta age tugul kayaneng'wong' ne otinye eng' Kamuktaindet; kot koma kemage kiy kota kemwa kiy age tugul." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Amu icheeget che iboortoi agobo acheek ole ki kibwanunde oldang'wong'; ak ko uu ye ki oweekyigei Kamuktaindet olakte kanamonik, si kobiit oot Kamuktaindet ne sabei ak ko ne po iman," 
1Thessalonians1:10 ak ogeni Weeriinnyi ne punu kipsengwet, ne ki ing'eet komong' eng' che ki pek, ineendet Jeso, ne sarwech eng' nereeknateet ne nyoonei." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Amu ongen okweek, tupchosyechu, itunennyo ne ki kiitu olong'wong', ole ki ma ek puch:" 
1Thessalonians2:2 ago kingo kaginyalilech eng' tai ak kiteweerech eng' Philippi, ko uu ye ongen, ko ki kinyiganitu eng' Kamuktaindet nenyo kemwaiwok logoiywek che myach che po Kamuktaindet eng' pooryeet ne oo." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Amu ma po kateunennyo leluut, anan simdo, anan eng' ng'aalseet:" 
1Thessalonians2:4 ago ko uu ye ki koyanwech Kamuktaindet keegu che tononjin logoiywek che myach, keng'alaali ko uu nooto; ma ko uu che iboiboiti piik, ago Kamuktaindet ne tyemei mugulelwekyok." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Amu ki ma kinyoorwech eng' sait age tugul keboisyee ng'aleegap kachaunetapkei, ko uu ye ongen, anan ng'aleegap ung'oot che po keiyandit, paoryat Kamuktaindet;" 
1Thessalonians2:6 ama kicheeng'e teegisto eng' piik, anan eng' okweek, anan eng' alak, ye kita ki egu nyigiisin eng' okweek ko uu che kiyooktoi che po Kristo." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Ago ki kitalaen eng' kwenung'wong', ko uu paindet ne paei lagokyik:" 
1Thessalonians2:8 ko uu nooto, ki kiting'enok emosto ne po chamyet ne oo, ki kimache miising' keele kegoonok, ma logoiywek che myach che po Kamuktaindet kityo, ago saboonwekyok ak icheek, amu ki oegu che chamaatiin miising' eng' acheek." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Amu obwaati, tupchosyechu, poisyennyo ne uui ak pichiindo, keboisye kemoi ak peet, si ma kigoochi mileet chii age tugul eng' okweek. Ki kiamwok logoiywek che myach che po Kamuktaindet." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Oo paorinik okweek, kobooto Kamuktaindet, agobo ole ki kitepte acheeget eng' kwenung'wong' okweek che oyani, eng' tiliilindo ak eng' imanda koma ki tinyei kiy ne kirwoogunenech:" 
1Thessalonians2:11 ko uu ye ongen ole ki kiteechindoite chii age tugul eng' okweek, ko uu kwanda ak lagokyik, kiteeiywok ak ki kiilok, ak kebaoryani," 
1Thessalonians2:12 si kobiit obendate ko uu ye nyolu eng' Kamuktaindet, ne kuurchinok laitornatet ak toroornatennyi." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Kimwachini anyun Kamuktaindet kongoi, amu ng'olyoondoniito, ama kisistosi keele, ye kingo taach ng'olyoot ne ki ogasenech, nooto ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet, ki otaach, ma ko uu ng'olyootap piik, ago ko uu ye mi eng' imanit, ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet, nooto agine ne poisyei eng' okweek che oyani." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Amu okweek anyun, tupchosyechu, ko ki oegu yaigap tuguuk che yaei kanisosyegap Kamuktaindet che miitei Judea eng' Kristo Jeso: amu ki onyooru ak okweek, nyalilwogik che uu chooto eng' piigap emeng'wong', agot ko uu ye kinyoor icheek eng' Yahudik;" 
1Thessalonians2:14 Amu okweek anyun, tupchosyechu, ko ki oegu yaigap tuguuk che yaei kanisosyegap Kamuktaindet che miitei Judea eng' Kristo Jeso: amu ki onyooru ak okweek, nyalilwogik che uu chooto eng' piigap emeng'wong', agot ko uu ye kinyoor icheek eng' Yahudik;" 
1Thessalonians2:15 che ki par Kiptaiyat Jeso ak maotik, ak ki oonech, ama ibaibai Kamuktaindet, ama namegei ak piik tugul;" 
1Thessalonians2:16 etenech keng'alaalji Pororyosyek si kobiit kesar; inyiiti kotugul tengekwogikwak: ago nyoonjin icheek nereeknateet agoi let. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Ago, acheek anyun, tupchosyechu, nga mata kegeerge ak okweek togoch eng' peetuusyek che ng'ering', ma eng' muguleldo, ko ki kityem miising' inne keele kegeerok togoch amu emosto ne oo:" 
1Thessalonians2:18 amu ki kimache kebwa olong'wong', agot anee Paulo, ko ki amache ak kota amache; ago kiraanyech Setani." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Amu tos nee kamang'unennyo, anan poiboiyennyo, anan kuutweet ne po toroornatet? Tos ma okweek, eng' taitap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso eng' nyonunennyi?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Amu okweek toroornatennyo ak poiboiyennyo. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Nooto anyun ye kingo mata kimuuch kemuite, kibwaat keele myee kebagaaktech acheegei eng' Athens;" 
1Thessalonians3:2 ak kiyogu Timoteo, tupchennyo ak ko kiboityotap Kamuktaindet eng' logoiywek che myach che po Kristo, kogimitok, ak kogaigaak agobo kayaneng'wong';" 
1Thessalonians3:3 si ma ing'eak chii age tugul eng' nyalilwogichuuto; amu ongen okweeget ole ki kilewenwech chooto. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Amu iman, ki ngemi kobootok, kogisip kemwaiwok keele kinyooru usiisyet; ko uu ye ki kobiit, ak ongen ak okweek." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Amu ng'olyoondoniito ye ki mata amuuch amuita, ayoogu kuut si kobiit anai kayaneng'wong', ale tama kogoyomak yoomindet, ak koek puch poisyennyo ne uui." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Ago, ye kingo nyo Timoteo kobunu olong'wong', ak koibwech logoiywek che po poiboiyet che po kayaneng'wong' ak chamyet, ak otinye kabwaatet ne myee ne obwaatech kotugul, oting'enech emosto omache ogeerech, ko uu ye kimache agacheek kegeerok;" 
1Thessalonians3:7 amu ng'olyoondoniito anyun, tupchosyechu, ki kigaigaech eng' okweek eng' pichiindanyo tugul ak nyalildanyo amu kayaneng'wong':" 
1Thessalonians3:8 amu kisoptosi nguno, ngot olumdegei eng' Kiptaiyat." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Amu kongoi nee ne kimuuchi kigoochi Kamuktaindet kogeny agobo okweek, amu poiboiyet tugul ne kiboiboitune ko amu okweek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet nenyo;" 
1Thessalonians3:10 kisaae miising' kemoi ak peet si kobiit kegeer togoochikwok, ak kigeesu nooto ne rartaat eng' kayaneng'wong'?" 
1Thessalonians3:11 Ingondochi anyun pandanyo kebwa oldang'wong', Kamuktaindet nenyo ak ko Kwanda ineendet ak Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso;" 
1Thessalonians3:12 ingogoonok Kiptaiyat otesage ak obaraitu eng' chamyet okweegei eng' okweegei, ak eng' piik tugul, agot ko uu acheek eng' okweek;" 
1Thessalonians3:13 si kobiit kogimit mugulelwekwok ko motinye kiy ne kimuuchi kirwoogunenok eng' tiliilindo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet nenyo ak ko Kwandanyo, eng' nyonunetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso kobooto chechiik che tiliileen tugul." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Ne po let anyun, tupchosyechu, kesoomok miising' ak kiteeiywok eng' Kiptaiyat Jeso, ko uu ye ki otaach eng' acheek, ole kanyool obetite ak obaibaite Kamuktaindet, agot ko uu ye obendoti, si kobiit obaraitu miising' inne." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Amu ongen ng'atuutik che ki kigoonok acheek eng' Kiptaiyat Jeso. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Amu niito mageetap Kamuktaindet, nooto katabaaneng'wong', si kobiit oistoegei sokseet." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Si kobiit konai chii tugul eng' okweek komuuchkei, koriip poortanyi eng' tiliilindo ak teegisto," 
1Thessalonians4:5 ma eng' mageet ne po kasetap myat, agot ko uu Pororyosyek che ma ingen Kamuktaindet;" 
1Thessalonians4:6 amat koyai chii kachiliilut anan koyachi ne ya tupchennyi eng' ng'olyoondoniito: amu Kiptaiyat yaaktaindetap mugetuut eng' tuguuchuuto tugul, ko uu ye kisip kiteeiywok ak kebaoryan." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Amu ki ma kuurchech Kamuktaindet simdo, ago eng' tiliilindo." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Ineendet ne eesyoi, ko maesyo chii, ago Kamuktaindet, ne koonok Kabuusennyi ne Tiliil." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Ago ma nyolu kesirwak agobo chamyetap tupchosyek; amu oneetotin okweeget eng' Kamuktaindet si ochamye; 
1Thessalonians4:10 amu oyae ko uu nooto iman eng' tupchosyek tugul che miitei Makedonia komugul. Ago kiteeiywok, tupchosyechu, keele obaraitu kosiir;" 
1Thessalonians4:11 ak oneetkei otebi eng' mutyonet, ak oyai poisyonikwok, ak oboisyee eunekwok, ko uu ye ki king'atak;" 
1Thessalonians4:12 si obendate ko uu ye nyolu eng' taitap icheek che mi saang', si mobanan kiy age tugul." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Ago ma kimache anyun, che kitupche, oegu che mongen agobo icheeget che ruitos; keele amoaragense, ko uu piik alak che ma tinyei kamang'unet." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Amu ngiyani keele kime Jeso ak kong'eet kogeny, ko uu nooto anyun eng' icheeget che ruitos eng' Jeso, imutu Kamuktaindet kobooto ineendet." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Amu kimwaiwok ni eng' ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat, keele acheek che kisoptosi, che king'etunotiin agoi nyonunetap Kiptaiyat, koma koi kindoe icheek che ki koruiyo." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Amu choorugei Kiptaiyat ineendet eng' kipsengwet, kobooto tweguunet ne oo, ak kutitap malaikaiyat ne oo, ak iryageetap Kamuktaindet: ak isip kong'eetos che ki pek eng' Kristo:" 
1Thessalonians4:17 ak acheek anyun che kisoptosi, che king'etunotiin, keganabech kobooto icheek eng' poolik, ketuiye ak Kiptaiyat eng' soet: ak ketebi anyun kobooto Kiptaiyat koigeny." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Nooto anyun ogaigaigei okweegei eng' ng'aleechuuto. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Ma nyolu anyun kesirwak, che kitupche, agobo peetuusyek ak kenyiisyek." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Amu ongen okweeget komyee ole nyoonei peetuutap Kiptaiyat ko uu choriin ne nyoonei kemoi. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Ye mwaei icheek koleen, Kaalyeet ak chametapkei, koche anyun icheek ng'emisyet, ko uu ye ityin ng'wanindo kobogoryot ne machei kosigiis; ago ma koi chililso." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Ago okweek, tupchosyechu, koma mi eng' mesundeito, kot konyonjok peetuunooto ko uu choriin:" 
1Thessalonians5:5 amu okweek tugul ko oo weeriitap lapkeiyet, ak weeriitap peet: ma ki po kemoi, anan mesundeito;" 
1Thessalonians5:6 nooto anyun among' keruiye ko uu piik alak, ago ongeriipse ak keegu che riibegei." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Amu icheeget che ruitos koruitos kemoi; ak icheeget che pogitos kobogitos kemoi. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Ago ongeegu che kiriibegei, acheek che ke po peet, kilaachi karnetap tegeet ne po kayaneet ak chamyet; ak kuutweet, nooto ko kamang'unet ne po yetunet." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Amu ki ma lewenjech Kamuktaindet nereeknateet, ago nyoorunetap yetunet eng' Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo," 
1Thessalonians5:10 ne kimechech, si ngegosu anan ngeruitosi, kesaptosi kobooto ineendet." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Nooto anyun ogaigaige okweegei eng' okweegei, oteechkei okweegei eng' okweegei, agot ko uu ye oyae ak okweek." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Ago kisoomok, che kitupche, keele onai icheek che tinyei poisyet ne oo eng' kwenung'wong', ak che poiywok eng' Kiptaiyat, ak kotigoonok;" 
1Thessalonians5:13 ak ogonyit icheek miising' inne eng' chamyet agobo poisyennywa. Otebi eng' kaalyeet okweegei eng' okweegei. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Ak kitigoonok, che kitupche, keele oteechi che ma riibei che ki king'at, ocher che nyogooren, otoret che nyalulyotin, omuite ak piik tugul." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Ogeer si ma yaakyi chii age tugul chiito age yaityo eng' yaityo; ago osup nooto myee kotugul, chii age eng' age, ak eng' piik tugul." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Oboiboitu peetuusyek tugul; 
1Thessalonians5:17 osaae kotugul; 
1Thessalonians5:18 omwae kongoi eng' tuguuk tugul: amu niito mageetap Kamuktaindet eng' Kristo Jeso eng' okweek. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Amogirinde Kabuuset ne Tiliil; 
1Thessalonians5:20 amosas maonatosyek; 
1Thessalonians5:21 otyem tuguuk tugul; onam miising' nooto myee; 
1Thessalonians5:22 oistoegei kiy age tugul ne ya. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Ak ingotabaanak eng' katabaanet ne nyiitaat Kamuktaindet ne po kaalyeet; ak ingoriiboogis komyee mugulelwekwok ak saboonwekwok ak poorwekwok, ko motinye kiy ne kimuuchi kirwoogunenok eng' nyonunetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Ineendet ne kuurok ko ineendet ne kiyani, ne yaei nooto agine kosulda." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Tupchosyechu, osaiywech." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Ogat tupchosyek tugul eng' ng'ututet ne tiliil. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ayosyewok eng' Kiptaiyat ale kesomanji parwaani che kitupche tugul. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Ingotebi myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo kobootok. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulo, ak Silvano, ak Timoteo, kisirchini kanisetap Thessalonikek eng' Kamuktaindet Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 Ingotep kobootok myeeindo ak kaalyeet che punu Kamuktaindet Kwanda ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Kanyool kemwachi Kamuktaindet kongoi peetuusyek tugul agobo okweek, che kitupche, ko uu ye nyolu, amu nerei kayaneng'wong' miising', ak ko tesoksei chamyet ne oting'egei okweek tugul;" 
2Thessalonians1:4 kot kichounenok kei okweek eng' kanisosyegap Kamuktaindet amu muitaeng'wong' ak kayaneet eng' usiisyosyekwok tugul ak nyalilwogik che omuitoi; 
2Thessalonians1:5 niito kaboorunet ne tagunoot ne po kirwoogetap imanda ne po Kamuktaindet; si kobiit kiitok keele onyolu eng' laitornatetap Kamuktaindet, ne onyoorunee agine nyalilda:" 
2Thessalonians1:6 si ngo kiy ne po imanda eng' Kamuktaindet koyaakyi mugetuut ne po nyalilda icheeget che inyalilok," 
2Thessalonians1:7 ak kogoonok kamuung'et kobootech, okweek che kiusei, eng' ng'ang'eetap Kiptaiyat Jeso kobunu kipsengwet kobooto malaikaisyek che po kamuktaennyi" 
2Thessalonians1:8 eng' maat ne lalei, koyaakyi mugetuut icheeget che ma nai Kamuktaindet, ak icheek che ma kase iit logoiywek che myach che po Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso:" 
2Thessalonians1:9 che tuun nyooru pireet, nooto ng'emisyet ne po koigeny ko kageisto eng' taitap Kiptaiyat ak eng' toroornatetap kimnateennyi," 
2Thessalonians1:10 ye tuun nyo si kobiit kitoroor eng' chechiik che tiliileen; ak kekwong'ee icheek tugul che iyani (amu ki kiyan paornatennyo eng' okweek), eng' peetuunooto." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Nooto anyun kisaiywok kotugul, si kobiit koiitok Kamuktaindet nenyo kole onyolu eng' kuurseng'wong', ak kosulda mageet age tugul ne po myeeindo ak poisyet age tugul ne po kayaneet, eng' kamuktaet;" 
2Thessalonians1:12 si kobiit kitoroor kainetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso eng' okweek, ak okweek eng' ineendet, ko uu myeeindap Kamuktaindet nenyo ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Kisoomok anyun, che kitupche, agobo nyonunetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, ak kayumennyo pogei ne kiyumjinigei ineendet;" 
2Thessalonians2:2 si motoptobense ochokyi eng' kabwaatutikwok anan oaragense, ngot ko eng' kabwaatut anan eng' ng'olyoo, anan eng' parweet ne oleen punwech, oleen kagoit peetuutap Kiptaiyat;" 
2Thessalonians2:3 amat kong'alak chii eng' kiy age tugul; amu ma itu peetuunooto, kobatee indou katuituet ak keng'aany chiito ne po tengekto, weeriitap luseet," 
2Thessalonians2:4 ineendet ne kirindoi ak kotorooregei kogirindoi tugul che kiguure Kamuktaindet anan che kilasu; si kotep anyun eng' hekaluutap Kamuktaindet, koboorugei ineendet ko uu ne Kamuktaindet." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Tos mobwaati, yu ki ami kobootok, ole ki amwaiwok tuguuchu?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Ak nguno ongen nooto ne raanyei, si kobiit keng'aany eng' peetuusyekyik." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Amu poisyei nguno ung'ootyetap ngelelnateet; kobatee mi agenge ne raanyei nguno, agoi keisto." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Ak yeityo keng'aany ngelelyot, ne tuun parei Kiptaiyat Jeso eng' kabuusetap kutinnyi, ak kong'em koek puch eng' ng'ang'eetap nyonunennyi;" 
2Thessalonians2:9 nyonunennyi konamegei ak poisyetap Setani kobooto kamuget tugul ak kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik che po lembech," 
2Thessalonians2:10 kobooto keniisyet tugul che ma po imanda agobo icheek che lustos; amu ma taach chamyetap imanit, si kobiit kesar." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Amu niito anyun, iyookyin Kamuktaindet icheek kamaaset ne poisye si kobiit koyan lembeita:" 
2Thessalonians2:12 si kobiit kirwookyi icheek tugul che ma iyan imanit, ago che kiboiboitune che ma po imanda." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Ago kanyool kemwachi Kamuktaindet kongoi kotugul agobo okweek, che kitupche che chamanigap Kiptaiyat, amu ki lewenjok Kamuktaindet yetunet kobooch taunet eng' katabaanetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak kayaneetap imanit:" 
2Thessalonians2:14 kiguurok anyun eng' chooto eng' logoiywekyok che myach, si kobiit onyooru toroornatetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Nooto anyun, che kitupche, olumdegei, ak onam pitonwek che ki kinetak, ngot ko eng' ng'olyoot, anan eng' parweennyo." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Nguno anyun, ingogaigai Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, ak Kamuktaindet Kwandanyo ne ki chamech ak kogoonech kagaigaet ne po koigeny ak kamang'unet ne myee eng' myeeindo," 
2Thessalonians2:17 kogaigai mugulelwekwok ak kogimit icheek eng' poisyet age tugul ne myee ak ng'olyoot. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Ne po let anyun, che kitupche, osaiywech si kobiit kochaakta ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat ak kitoroor, ko uu ole teptoi eng' okweek;" 
2Thessalonians3:2 ak si kobiit kesarwech eng' piik che ngelelik ak che yaacheen; amu ma tinyei tugul kayaneet. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Ago po iman Kiptaiyat, ak igimitok ak koriibok eng' nooto ya." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Ak ki tinyei kamang'unet eng' Kiptaiyat agobo okweek, keele oyae ak kota oyae tuguuk che king'ate." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Ingondochi Kiptaiyat mugulelwekwok agoi chamyetap Kamuktaindet ak muitaetap Kristo. 
2Thessalonians3:6 King'atok anyun, che kitupche, eng' kainetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, keele oistoegei tupchet age tugul ne wendoti eng' pistoet, ama ko uu pitonwek che ki onyoorunenech." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Amu ongen okweeget ko uu ye kanyool oyai ko uu ye kiyae: amu ki ma kitebi acheek eng' kwenung'wong' ko uu piik che ma riibegei; 
2Thessalonians3:8 ama ki am amitwogigap chii age tugul puch, ago eng' poisyet ne uui ak pichiindo, keboisyei kemoi ak peet, si ma kiim chii age tugul eng' okweek:" 
2Thessalonians3:9 ma amu keele ma ki tinyei kimnateet, ago si kobiit keyaige keegu kaboorunet eng' okweek, si kobiit oyai osubenech." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Amu agot ye ki kimi kobootok, ko ki king'atak ko uu ni, keele ngo ma cham chii age tugul kobois, ko matongoamis." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Amu kigase agobo alak eng' kwenung'wong' che pendoti eng' pistoet, che ma poisyei agot kitigin, ago kibieminik." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Ago king'ate ak kiteechini che uu chooto eng' Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo, keele kobois eng' mutyonet, ak koam amitwogikwak." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Ago okweek, che kitupche, among'etye eng' yaeet ne oyae ne myee." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Ak ngo ma kase iit chii age tugul ng'olyoondennyo eng' parwaani, obwaat chiichooto, amat oyomegei ak ineendet, si kobiit kolilaan." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Amoiit ineendet ole puunyoot, ago otigon ko uu tupchet." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Nguno anyun ingogoonok kaalyeet Kiptaiyat ineendet, ne Kiptaiyat ne po kaalyeet, kotugul eng' ui tugul. Ingotep Kiptaiyat kobootok okweek tugul." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Kagatennyu anee Paulo eng' eunnyu, nooto kaboorunet eng' parweet age tugul: asire anyun ko uu nooto." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Ingotep myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo kobootok okweek tugul. 
1Timothy1:1 Paulo, kayooktoindet ne po Kristo Jeso ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet Yetindennyo, ak Kristo Jeso ne kamang'unennyo;" 
1Timothy1:2 asirchini Timoteo lakweennyu, ne po iman eng' kayaneet: Ingotep kobooten myeeindo, ak rireenetapkei, ak kaalyeet, che punu Kamuktaindet Kwanda ak Kristo Jeso Kiptaiyandennyo." 
1Timothy1:3 Ko uu ye ki asoomin ale itebee Epheso, ye ki awendi Makedonia, si kobiit ing'at piik alak amat koneet kaneetisyet ne teer," 
1Timothy1:4 anan koepchi iit atindonik ak tetuutigap ibinwek che ki kosiirto, che ma tinyei ole igeesunegei, che ing'eeti teebutik, kosiir riipseetap poisyetap Kamuktaindet ne mi eng' kayaneet; kasoomin nguno anyun ko uu nooto." 
1Timothy1:5 Ago kasuldaetap ng'atuutyoni ko chamyet ne punu muguleldo ne tiliil ak kabwaatet ne myee ak kayaneet ne ma tinyei keniisyet: 
1Timothy1:6 ye kingo kagochiliil piik alak eng' tuguuchuuto, koyiemjigei ng'alaalet ne po puch," 
1Timothy1:7 chamei koek kaneetigap Ng'atuutyet, nganda ma iguitos che mwaei, anan ng'aleechooto mwaei eng' kimnateet." 
1Timothy1:8 Ago kingen keele myee Ng'atuutyet, ngo poisyee chii ko uu ye nyolu," 
1Timothy1:9 kongen kole ki ma kiyai Ng'atuutyet agobo chii ne po imanda, ago agobo pistoik ak ng'emiik, agobo che yaacheen ak kiptengeginik, agobo che ma tiliileen ak che ma iywei Kamuktaindet, agobo che parei kwanisyek ak che parei kametisyek agobo rumiik," 
1Timothy1:10 agobo che soksei, ak murenik che ibegei ak murenik, ak che chorei piik, ak kiplembechonik, ak che iyastos lembech, ak ngo mi kiit age tugul ne ketei kaneetisyet ne po imanit;" 
1Timothy1:11 ko uu ye mwaei logoiywek che myach che po toroornatetap Kamuktaindet ne iberuurot, che ki kigoono atononji." 
1Timothy1:12 Amwachini kongoi ineendet, ne ki imuktaiwa, ineendet Kristo Jeso Kiptaiyandennyo, amu kiita kole aa chiito ne kiyani, kondea poisyet;" 
1Timothy1:13 nganda ki aa chii ne chubisyei eng' tai, ak ne usiisyei, ak ki aa kolgol: ago ki anyooru rireenetapkei, amu ki ayae ko mangen kotom ayan;" 
1Timothy1:14 ak kitesak myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo kobarait kobooto kayaneet ak chamyet ne mi eng' Kristo Jeso. 
1Timothy1:15 Po iman ng'olyoondoni, ak nyolu koyanak inne, ne mwaei kole ki nyo Kristo Jeso ng'wony kosar kiptengeginik; aa ne po tai eng' chooto;" 
1Timothy1:16 ago ki anyooru rireenetapkei amu ng'olyoondoni, si kobiit kobarta Jeso Kristo muitaennyi tugul eng' anee, ne aa ne po tai, koek kaboorunet eng' icheek che tuun iyani ineendet agoi saboondap koigeny." 
1Timothy1:17 Ingobunji anyun nguno Laitoryat ne po koigeny, ne ma ng'emaksei, ne ma taagu, Kamuktaindet ne ineegei, teegisto ak toroornatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Kagoonin kayomisoni inyee lakweennyu Timoteo, ko uu amdaosyek che kisip kemwa agobo inyee si kobiit imuuch iyai lugeet ne myee eng' chooto;" 
1Timothy1:19 iname kayaneet ak kabwaatet ne myee; che, kingo kagometo alage, kong'emogis eng' kayaneet;" 
1Timothy1:20 eng' chooto ko Humenayo ak Aleksanda; che ki agoochi Setani, si kobiit kineet si machubis." 
1Timothy2:1 Ne po tai anyun abooru ale ingoyaak soomutik, ak saautik, ak saisaet, ak mwaet ne po kongoi agobo piik tugul;" 
1Timothy2:2 agobo laitorinik ak tugul che tinyei pounateet; si kobiit ketebee kaalyeet ak mutyonet eng' kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ak teegisto. 
1Timothy2:3 Myee niito ak ko taagaksei eng' taitap Kamuktaindet Yetindennyo; 
1Timothy2:4 ne machei kole kesar piik tugul, ak konyoor naet ne po imanit." 
1Timothy2:5 Amu miitei Kamuktaindet agenge, katuiyoindet agenge agine kwenutap Kamuktaindet ak piik, nooto chiito, Kristo Jeso," 
1Timothy2:6 ne ki igoitogei koek ne kityage tugul; ne tuun kibaoryanjin eng' peetuusyekyik; 
1Timothy2:7 ki kindea anyun agobo nooto aek amdoindet ak kayooktoindet (amwae imanit, ma mwaei lembech), kaneetindetap Pororyosyek eng' kayaneet ak imanit." 
1Timothy2:8 Amache anyun ale kosaaei murenik eng' komosta age tugul, konamjin parak eunekwak che tiliileen, koma mi nereegek ak tiyet." 
1Timothy2:9 Ko uu nooto kobogorisyek ingolaachkei eng' kalaakset ne nyolu, eng' teegisto ak riibetapkei; ma eng' laetap suumeek, ak thahabu anan sonoek che korooron anan ngoroik che po kamanuutyet ne oo;" 
1Timothy2:10 ago (ko uu ye nyoljin kobogorisyek che ibortogei kole piigap Kamuktaindet icheeget) eng' poisyonik che myach. 
1Timothy2:11 Ingoneetkei kobogoryot eng' mutyonet kobooto kasetap iit. 
1Timothy2:12 Ago ma chamjini kobogoryot koneetis, anan koboi muren, ago kotebi eng' mutyonet." 
1Timothy2:13 Amu ki kiyai Adam korook, si keyae Hawa;" 
1Timothy2:14 ak ki ma king'al Adam, ago kingo kageng'al kobogoryot kobutyi pistoet;" 
1Timothy2:15 ago kisaru eng' sigisyet, ngo tebyei icheek eng' kayaneet ak chamyet ak katabaanet kobooto riibetapkei." 
1Timothy3:1 Po iman ng'olyoondoni, Ngo machei chii koek riibindetap kaniset, ko kamach poisyet ne myee." 
1Timothy3:2 Kanyolji anyun riibindet koek ne ma kigeerchin ng'olyoo ne ma litit, manong'otyotap osotyot agenge, ne riibegei, ne litit ng'omnateet, ne tebyei komyee, ne taachei toek, ne chepchep koneetis;" 
1Timothy3:3 ne ma kimaiya, ne ma pirisyei; ago ne tala, ne ma chii ne po pooryot, ne ma chamei silingisyek;" 
1Timothy3:4 ne pou koonnyi komyee, ne igoochin eng' teegisto tugul lagokyik kogas iit;" 
1Timothy3:5 (ago ngo ma nai chii ole poundoi koonnyi, koriiptoi ano kanisetap Kamuktaindet?)" 
1Timothy3:6 Ama chii ne kota koyani, si ye men kobutyi kirwoogetap chesawilyet." 
1Timothy3:7 Ak kogeny konyaaljin kotinyei paornateet ne myee eng' icheeget che mi saang'; si ma ibutyi teweernateet ak mesteetap chesawilyet. 
1Timothy3:8 Ko uu nooto kiboitinigap kaniset kanyool kotebi eng' teegisto, ma che po ng'elyebwek aeng', ama che pogitos, ama che kasei myat agobo silingisyek;" 
1Timothy3:9 che namei ung'ootyetap kayaneet eng' kabwaatet ne tiliil. 
1Timothy3:10 Ak nyolu ketyem chuuto ak icheek korook; ingoyai anyun icheek poisyetap kiboitiinik ngo ma kigeerchin ng'olyoo ne ma litit. 
1Timothy3:11 Ko uu nooto kobogorisyek, kanyool kotebi eng' teegisto, ma kataamik, che riibegei, che kiyani eng' tuguuk tugul." 
1Timothy3:12 Ingoek kiboitinigap kaniset manong'otaigap osotyot agenge, kobou lagokwak ak kooriikwak komyee." 
1Timothy3:13 Amu icheeget che ki kobois komyee eng' poisyonooto po kiboitiinik, konyooru teegisto ne myee, ak nyiganateet ne oo eng' kayaneet ne miitei eng' Kristo Jeso." 
1Timothy3:14 Kasirun tuguuchu, amang'u ale anyoonjinin ko neegit;" 
1Timothy3:15 ago ngot agagei, imuuchi inai ole kanyool kotepto piik eng' kootap Kamuktaindet, nooto kanisetap Kamuktaindet ne sabei, toloita ak irimeetap imanit." 
1Timothy3:16 Ak ne matiny, ko oo ung'ootyot ne po kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet: Ineendet ne king'ang'ak eng' poorto, ki kiityi imanda eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ne ki keer malaikaisyek, ne ki kiamda eng' Pororyosyek, ne ki iyan che po ng'wony, ne ki kimut kwo parak eng' toroornatet." 
1Timothy4:1 Ago mwaei Kabuuset ne Tiliil kotook, kole tuun eng' peetuusyek che pwoonei koistoegei alak kayaneet, koepchin iit tamirmirik che ibeeti piich ak kaneetisyosyek che po oik," 
1Timothy4:2 eng' chombilisyetap piik che ng'alaali lembech, che ki koigei kabwaatutikwak che ki kibeelee karnet ne peelei piich;" 
1Timothy4:3 che etei kitunis, ak koistoegei amitwogik alak, che ki yai Kamuktaindet kole kotaach eng' kongoi icheek che iyani ak kongen imanit." 
1Timothy4:4 Amu myee yautyet age tugul ne po Kamuktaindet, ama mi kiy ne nyolu keesyo, ngetaach eng' kongoi:" 
1Timothy4:5 amu kitiliili eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ak saaet. 
1Timothy4:6 Ngot ibwaatyi che kitupche tuguuchu, iegu anyun kiboityot ne myee ne po Kristo Jeso, ne paat komyee eng' ng'aleek che po kayaneet, ak eng' kaneetisyet ne myee ne ki isup inyee:" 
1Timothy4:7 ago eesye atindonik che po tangoita che ma namegei ak ooreetap Kamuktaindet, che mwaei chebyosok. Ak igiilgei eng' kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet:" 
1Timothy4:8 amu porot ne matya kagiiletapkei ne po poorto; ago poroteet eng' tuguuk tugul kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet, amu tinyei arorutyet ne po saboondo ne mi nguno, ak ne nyoonei." 
1Timothy4:9 Po iman ng'olyoondoni, ak konyolu koyanak inne." 
1Timothy4:10 Kiyae anyun poisyet ne oo amu niito ak ki kiiligei, amu miitei kamang'unennyo Kamuktaindet ne sabei, ineendet Yetindetap piik tugul, ago ne siirei ko po piik che iyani." 
1Timothy4:11 Ng'at tuguuchu ak ineet. 
1Timothy4:12 Amat kosas chii ming'inateng'ung'; ago egu kaboorunet eng' icheek che iyani, eng' ng'olyoot, eng' atepto, eng' chamyet, eng' kayaneet, eng' tiliilindo." 
1Timothy4:13 Agoi anyo, chuuljige somaneet, ak kateitaet, ak kaneetisyet." 
1Timothy4:14 Amebagaakte iboisyee konunet ne itinye, ne ki kigoonin eng' ooreet ne po amdaet, kobooto kagonooretap eunek che po poisyegap kaniset." 
1Timothy4:15 Igiiljige tuguuchuuto; igoochigei miising'; si kotook eng' piik tugul pandang'ung' ne po tai. 
1Timothy4:16 Riipkei, ak iriip kaneetisyeng'ung'. Teptee tuguuchuuto; amu ngiyae niito isaruge kobooto icheeget che kasin." 
1Timothy5:1 Amerasyi poiyo, ago ng'alaalji ko uu kwanda; murenik ko uu che otupche," 
1Timothy5:2 chebyosok ko uu kametisyek, kwonyiik che mengeechen ko uu tiibiik che otupche, eng' tiliilindo tugul." 
1Timothy5:3 Teech mosoogik che mosoogik iman. 
1Timothy5:4 Ago ngo tinyei mosoget age tugul lagok anan mochogoronik, koneetkei korook kobarta kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet eng' piigap koonnywa, ak koyaakyi sigiikwak toreteet: amu taagaksei niito eng' taitap Kamuktaindet." 
1Timothy5:5 Ak ineendet ne mosoget iman, ne tebyei ineegei, kotinyei kamang'unennyi eng' Kamuktaindet, ak kotepto soomutik ak saautik kemoi ak peet." 
1Timothy5:6 Ago ineendet ne suegei ko kagome agot ngo sabei. 
1Timothy5:7 Ng'at tuguuchuuto, si kotebi icheek koma tinyei teweernat." 
1Timothy5:8 Ago ngo ma riibei chii piikyik, ak che siirei ko che po koonnyi, ko kagoesyo kayaneet, ak ko ya kosiir chiito ne ma iyan." 
1Timothy5:9 Amat kesirchi ole kisirchin mosoogik kotom koit kenyiisyek tamanwogik lo, ne ki osotyotap chiito agenge," 
1Timothy5:10 ne kimwaitae ineendet poisyonik che myach; ngo kigo pai lagok, ngo ki kotaach toek, ngo kigoun keelyegap che tiliileen, ngo ki kotoret che nyalildos, ngo kigogiilgei eng' poisyet age tugul ne myee." 
1Timothy5:11 Ago eesye mosoogik che mengeechen; amu ye kagongelelji Kristo, komach kitun;" 
1Timothy5:12 tinyei kirwooget anyun, amu kagometo kayanennywa ne po tai." 
1Timothy5:13 Kobooto nooto anyun koneetkei koek chorirenik, ak koiitoti kooriik; ago ma chorirenik kityo, ago chaamik ak che ibooti chemererosyek, kong'alaalote tuguuk che ma nyooljin." 
1Timothy5:14 Nooto anyun achame ale kitun mosoogik che ta ko mengeechen, si kosich lagok, ak koriip koot, amat kogoochi poroindo puunyoot kochuris eng' ui tugul;" 
1Timothy5:15 amu agot nguno ko kagomasta alak koosup Setani. 
1Timothy5:16 Ngo tinyei kobogoryot ne iyanaat mosoogik, ingotoret anyun icheek, si ma nyoor nyigiisindo kaniset; si kotoret che mosoogik iman." 
1Timothy5:17 Ingiityi poisyek che pou komyee, teegisto konyil aeng', ne siirei ko icheek che yaei poisyet ne nyigiis ne po ng'olyoot ak kaneetisyet." 
1Timothy5:18 Amu mwaei siruutyet kole, “Amerat kutitap eito ne tyechei peek koboorei.” Ak, “Nyoljin kiboityot melektanyi.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Ametaach kataamset agobo poiyo, kobatee eng' kutusweegap paorinik aeng' anan ko somok." 
1Timothy5:20 Kergong' eng' taitap piik tugul icheeget che yaei tengekwogik, si kobiit koywei chuun alage ak icheek." 
1Timothy5:21 Kang'atiin anyun eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, ak Kristo Jeso, ak malaikaisyek che lewenotin, ale iriip tuguuchuuto amesip itil kirwooget, ameyae kiy age tugul eng' tiytiyet." 
1Timothy5:22 Amegonoor chii age tugul eunek eng' sartaet, anan iyai yamdaet ak tengekwogigap piik alak: riipkei eng' tiliilindo." 
1Timothy5:23 Kobooch nguno ko mata iee peek kityo, ago poisyee divaik tutigin amu moeng'ung', ak amu myanweguk che po atkai tugul." 
1Timothy5:24 Taagunotiin tengekwogigap piik alak, indoe kobendi kirwooget; ak che po piik alak ak icheek kosubi icheek." 
1Timothy5:25 Ko uu nooto agine miitei poisyonik che myach che taagunotiin; ak che ma uu chooto koma imugaksei koung'ogis. 
1Timothy6:1 Ingoiityi otwogik alak tugul che ratotiin kole nyoljin kiptainikwak teegisto tugul, si ma kichup kainetap Kamuktaindet ak kaneetisyet." 
1Timothy6:2 Ak icheek che tinyei kiptainik che iyanotin, ko mat kosas icheek, amu tupchosyek; ago kaigai koot icheek, amu icheeget che nyooru toreteet ko che iyani ak ko chamanik. Ineet ng'aleechu ak iteechi." 
1Timothy6:3 Ngo neeti chii age tugul kaneetisyet ne teer, ama chamei ng'aleek che po iman, ng'aleegap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, ak kaneetisyet ne namegei ak atebeet ne po kaiyweisyetap Kamuktaindet;" 
1Timothy6:4 komeenei, ama naei kiy, ago tinyei myando agobo teebutik ak tiiyasyegap ng'aleek che punu ng'etkonda, suryet, chemerereet, kabwaatutik che yaacheen," 
1Timothy6:5 pooryosyegap piik che ki kong'emogis kabwaatutikwak, ak che ki kirebe imanit, koleen kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet ko ooreet ne kibore." 
1Timothy6:6 Ago kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet kobooto yametapkei eng' tuguuk che ki tinyei, ko poroteet ne oo:" 
1Timothy6:7 amu ki ma kiibu kiy konyo ng'wony, ama kimuuchi keip kiy komanda eng' ng'wony;" 
1Timothy6:8 ago ki tinyei amitwogik ak ngoroik; yamech chooto. 
1Timothy6:9 Ago icheek che machei koek mogoreek kobutyin yoomseet ak mesteet ak maguutik che chaang' che perberen, che ibu ng'wanindo, che lugui piik koba ng'emisyet ak luseet." 
1Timothy6:10 Amu chametap silingisyek ko tigityot agenge ne po yaitwogik alak tugul. Kigong'asyigei piik alage kot kometo kayaneet ak ki kotorgei eng' aragenosyek che chaang'. 
1Timothy6:11 Ago inyee, ee, chiitap Kamuktaindet, mwee tuguuchuuto; ak isup imanda, ak kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet, kayaneet, chamyet, muitaet, mutyonet." 
1Timothy6:12 Yai lugeet ne myee ne po kayaneet, nam saboondo ne po koigeny, nooto ne ki kiguurchin, ak ki ing'aany ng'ang'et ne myee eng' taitap paorinik che chaang'." 
1Timothy6:13 Kang'atiin anyun eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, ne riibei tuguuk tugul kosapcho, ak eng' taitap Kristo Jeso, ne kibaoryan ng'ang'et ne myee eng' taitap Pontio Pilato;" 
1Timothy6:14 ale iriip ng'atuutyet amanyoor peruut, ne ma kimuuchi keger kong', agoi tagunetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo:" 
1Timothy6:15 ne tuun iboortoi eng' peetuusyekyik, ne ineendet ne iberuurot ak ko Kamuktaindet ineegei, Laitoryat ne po laitorinik, ak Kiptaiyat ne po kiptainik;" 
1Timothy6:16 ne tinyei ineegei saboondap koigeny, ne menyei eng' lapkeiyet ne ma kimuuchi keriikyi; ne tomo kogeer chii, amaimuuchi kogeer: ingobunji ineendet teegisto ak kamuktaet koigeny. Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 Ng'at mogoreek che po peetuusyechu, si ma menio, anan konde kamang'unennywa mogornatosyek che ma tonondos, ago eng' Kamuktaindet ineendet ne koonech tuguuk tugul eng' aiyebindo si kobiit keboiboitune;" 
1Timothy6:18 ile koyai ne myee, si kobiit koek mogoreek eng' poisyonik che myach, si kochobogis kogoito, koyomogei ak alak;" 
1Timothy6:19 kogonorchigei lumdaet ne myee, agobo peetuusyek che pwoonei, si kobiit konam saboondo nooto ne po iman." 
1Timothy6:20 Ee, Timoteo, riip anyun nooto kigegoonin, istoegei ng'aleek che ma namegei ak ooreetap Kamuktaindet, ak kabeletapkei ne po naet, nooto kiguure eng' lembech naet;" 
1Timothy6:21 ne kigosup alage ak ki kochiliil eng' kayaneet. Ingotep myeeindo kobooten. 
2Timothy1:1 Paulo, kayooktoindet ne po Kristo Jeso eng' mageetap Kamuktaindet, ko uu arorutyet ne po saboondo ne miitei eng' Kristo Jeso," 
2Timothy1:2 asirchini Timoteo, lakweennyu ne achame miising': Ingotep kobooten myeeindo, rireenetapkei, kaalyeet, che punu Kamuktaindet Kwanda ak Kristo Jeso Kiptaiyandennyo." 
2Timothy1:3 Amwachini Kamuktaindet kongoi, ne aoote ko uu ye kiyaei kwanisyekyuk che po tai eng' kabwaatet ne tiliil, ale masisei kabwaatet ne abwaatin eng' soomutikyuk, kemoi ak peet," 
2Timothy1:4 atinye emosto ageerin, abwaati peeguk po kong', si konyiia poiboiyet;" 
2Timothy1:5 ye kingi pwatwa kayaneet ne ma tinyei keniisyet ne mi eng' inyee; ne ki menyei korook eng' ingogo Lois, ak kamenng'ung' Eunike; ak, ayani ale menyin aginye." 
2Timothy1:6 Abwaatun anyun amu niito ale iywokyi konunet ne po Kamuktaindet, ne mi eng' inyee amu kagonooretap eunekyuk." 
2Timothy1:7 Amu ki ma koonech Kamuktaindet muguleldap nyogoryet, ago ne po kamuget ak chamyet ak riibetapkei." 
2Timothy1:8 Amelilanji anyun paornateetap Kiptaiyandennyo, anan anee kimonjororyondennyi: ago nam yamdaetap nyalilwogik amu logoiywek che myach ko uu ye tee kamuktaetap Kamuktaindet;" 
2Timothy1:9 ne kisarwech ak koguurech eng' kuurseet ne tiliil, ma ko uu poisyonikyok, ago ko uu magennyi ak myeeindonyi, ne ki kigoonech eng' Kristo Jeso kobooch kenyiisyegap koigeny," 
2Timothy1:10 ago kagotook nguno eng' tagunetap Yetindennyo Kristo Jeso, ne ki kobar meet, ak kong'aany saboondo ak ng'emisyet ne ma komi, eng' logoiywek che myach," 
2Timothy1:11 ki kindea agobo nooto aek amdoindet, ak kayooktoindet, ak kaneetindet." 
2Timothy1:12 Anyooru anyun nyalilwogichu ak icheek agobo nooto: ago ma lilani; amu angen ineendet ne ki ayan, ak ayani komyee ale imuuchi koriip nooto ne ki agoochi ineendet agoi peetuunooto." 
2Timothy1:13 Nam itoondap ng'aleek che po iman che ki igasena, eng' kayaneet ak chamyet ne miitei eng' Kristo Jeso." 
2Timothy1:14 Riip eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne menyei eng' acheek, nooto myee ne ki kigoonin." 
2Timothy1:15 Ingen ni ile, kigoistoenagei tugul che mi Asia; eng' icheek ko Pugelo ak Hermogene." 
2Timothy1:16 Ingogoochi Kiptaiyat rireenet kootap Onesiporo: amu kitoreta konyil che chaang', ama ililan amu monjororitinnyu;" 
2Timothy1:17 ago, ye kingo mi Rome, kocheeng'a eng' kagiiletapkei, ak kinyoorwo," 
2Timothy1:18 ingogoochi Kiptaiyat ineendet konyoor rireenet ne po Kiptaiyat eng' peetuunooto! Ak ingen komyee ole tee poisyet ne ki yai eng' Epheso. 
2Timothy2:1 Kimitu anyun, lakweennyu, eng' myeeindo ne miitei eng' Kristo Jeso." 
2Timothy2:2 Ak tuguuk che ki igasena eng' kwenutap paorinik che chaang', igoochi chooto piik che kiyani, che imuuchi koneet alak ak icheek." 
2Timothy2:3 Nam yamdaet ne po nyalilda, ko uu asigarindet ne myee ne po Kristo Jeso." 
2Timothy2:4 Ma mi asigarindet, ne ngo mi poisyet, koratyingei tuguuk che po ng'wony; si kobiit kobaibai ne kisirei ineendet koek asigarindet." 
2Timothy2:5 Ak ngot koyai chii agine kabeletapkei eng' ureryosyek, koma kigoochin kuutweet, ngo ma ibelis ko uu ye mwaei ng'atuutik." 
2Timothy2:6 Nyoljin kabatindet ne yaei poisyet ne uui, kosip kotongoi logoek." 
2Timothy2:7 Ruchi komyee kiit ne amwae; amu koonin Kiptaiyat kaguiyet eng' tuguuk tugul. 
2Timothy2:8 Ibwaat Jeso Kristo, ne king'eet eng' che ki kobek, ne po kesweegap Daudi, ko uu logoiywekyuk che myach:" 
2Timothy2:9 ne anyoorunee nyalilda, agoi monjorornatosyek; ko uu chiito ne yaei yaityo; ago ma rataat ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet." 
2Timothy2:10 Nooto anyun amuitoi eng' tuguuk tugul amu che ki kilewen, si kobiit konyoor ak icheek yetunet ne miitei eng' Kristo Jeso kobooto toroornatetap koigeny." 
2Timothy2:11 Po iman ng'olyoondoni: Amu ngo kigebegu kobooto ineendet, kesaptosi kobooto ineendet:" 
2Timothy2:12 ngemuite, ko tuun ki pou kobooto ineendet: ngot keeesye ineendet, ko tuun eesyoech agine:" 
2Timothy2:13 ngo ma ki po iman, kotebyei ineendet eng' iman; amu ma imuuchi koeesyogei." 
2Timothy2:14 Ibwaatyi icheek tuguuchuuto, ng'at icheek eng' taitap Kiptaiyat, si ma ibelgei agobo ng'aleek che ma kisige kiy, che ng'emei icheek che kasei." 
2Timothy2:15 Igiilgei ibartegei ile ki koyanun Kamuktaindet iegu kiboityot ne manyol kolilaan, ne poisyee komyee ng'olyootap imanit." 
2Timothy2:16 Istoegei ng'aleek che ma namegei ak ooreetap Kamuktaindet: amu tesoksei koyaagitu kosiir eng' yaityet," 
2Timothy2:17 ak amei ng'olyoonnywa ko uu chepsergechet: eng' icheek ko Humenayo ak Pileto; 
2Timothy2:18 piik che ki kochiliil eng' imanit, mwaei kole ki kosiirto ng'eetyeet, ak koweleli kayaneetap piik alak." 
2Timothy2:19 Ago tononi lumeiywot ne kiim ne po Kamuktaindet, kotinyei ng'ooksoni keele, Ingen Kiptaiyat icheek che chechiik; ak, Ingoistoegei yaityet age tugul ne mwaei kainetap Kiptaiyat." 
2Timothy2:20 Ago eng' koot ne oo koma mi tereenigap thahabu ak fedha kityo, ago che po keetiik ak ng'ung'unyek ak icheek; ak po alage teegisto, koma po alage teegisto." 
2Timothy2:21 Ngo tiliilgei anyun chii eng' tuguuchuuto, koegu tereet ne po teegisto, ne itabaanat, ne nyoljin koboisyee kiptaiyat, ne ki kichopchi poisyet age tugul ne myee." 
2Timothy2:22 Ago mwee maguutik che po neranik, ak isup imanda, chamyet, kayaneet, kaalyeet, kobooto icheeget che kuurei Kiptaiyat eng' mugulelwek che tiliileen." 
2Timothy2:23 Ago eesye teebutik che perberen che ma punu kaneetisyet, ingen ile yiei pooryosyek." 
2Timothy2:24 Ama nyoljin otwogindetap Kiptaiyat koyai pooryeet, ago koek ne tala eng' tugul, ne chepchep koneetis, ago muitoi," 
2Timothy2:25 ne kere kong' eng' mutyonet icheek che kirindoi; tamangap kogoochi Kamuktaindet icheek siguunet ne po naetap imanit," 
2Timothy2:26 ak kosargei icheek komang'une mesteetap chesawilyet, ko kagoluul icheek si koyai magennyi." 
2Timothy3:1 Ago nai ni ile pwoonei eng' peetuusyek che po let egosyek che pichiien. 
2Timothy3:2 Amu egu piik che chamegei icheegei, che chamei silingisyek, che ichaugei, che mendos, che poisyee chemerereet, che ingeleljin sigiikwak, che ma tinyei kongoi, che ma tiliileen," 
2Timothy3:3 che ma tinyei chamyet, che ma tinyei nyoetap kaat, che itaamsei, che ma riibegei, che kolgoleen, che ma chamei che myach," 
2Timothy3:4 ng'wektoik, ngelelik, che ilasugei, che chamei ureryet kosiir koek che chamei Kamuktaindet;" 
2Timothy3:5 che tinyei kergeindap kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet, ago eesyoi kimnateet ne po kaiyweonooto: istoegei chuuto ak icheek." 
2Timothy3:6 Amu pitunee chuuto che itoti kooriik, ak koluul kobogorisyek che perber che tinyei chalwogik che chaang', che indochin maguutik che teerchiin." 
2Timothy3:7 Che ineetegei kotugul, ago ma koi imuuch koityi naetap imanit." 
2Timothy3:8 Ak ko uu Janne ak Jambre, che ki kirinda Musa, koyaei chu ak icheek ko uu nooto, kirindoi imanit; piik che ki kong'emogis ng'omnatosyekwak, che petyotiin eng' ooreetap kayaneet." 
2Timothy3:9 Ago matesei tai: amu taagu perberindanywa eng' piik tugul, ko uu ne po chugai ak icheek." 
2Timothy3:10 Ago ki isup inyee kaneetisyennyu, atebeet, kiit ne atokyinige, kayaneet, mutyonet, chamyet, muitaet," 
2Timothy3:11 usiisyosyek, nyalilwogik; tuguuchooto che kibwanjo eng' Antiok, ak Ikonia, ak Lystra; ki amuite eng' usiisyosyechooto tugul: ak kisarwo Kiptaiyat eng' chooto tugul." 
2Timothy3:12 Ee, tugul che machei kotebi eng' atebeet ne myee eng' Kristo Jeso, konyooru usiisyet." 
2Timothy3:13 Ago tesoksei kiptengeginik ak keniik eng' yaityet, koberberisyei ak kiberberi." 
2Timothy3:14 Ago tebi inyee eng' tuguuk che ki ineetkei, ak che ki kiguiyeun, ingen icheeget che ki ineetegei;" 
2Timothy3:15 ak kobooch ko ii lakwa ko ki ingen siruutik che tiliileen che imuuchi kong'omitin agoi yetunet eng' kayaneet ne miitei eng' Kristo Jeso. 
2Timothy3:16 Punu kabuusetap Kamuktaindet siruutyet age tugul, ak kotoreti eng' kaneetisyet, eng' kergong'yet, eng' kateechinet, eng' katigonet ne mi eng' imanda:" 
2Timothy3:17 si kobiit koek chiitap Kamuktaindet, ne ineetat, ne ki kichop koek ne ititaat eng' poisyet age tugul ne myee." 
2Timothy4:1 Kang'atiin anyun eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, ak Kristo Jeso, ne tuun irwookyin che saptos ak che ki kobek, ak eng' tagunennyi ak eng' laitornatennyi;" 
2Timothy4:2 amde ng'olyoot; choboge eng' peetuut ne nyolu, ak eng' peetuut ne ma nyolu; itigon, kergong', igiil, eng' muitaet tugul ak kaneetisyet." 
2Timothy4:3 Amu nyoonei peetuut ne ma tuun epchin iit agot kitigin kaneetisyet ne po imanit; ago, tinyei iitiik che iututos, iyumjigei kaneetik che isubi maguutikwak;" 
2Timothy4:4 ak koeesyo koepchi iit imanit, ak komasta koosup atindonik che po puch." 
2Timothy4:5 Ago riipkei inyee eng' tuguuk tugul, muite eng' nyalilda, yai poisyetap amdaetap logoiywek che myach, yai poisyeng'ung' kosulda." 
2Timothy4:6 Amu kigoitoa nguno, ak kagoit peetuusyek che awendi." 
2Timothy4:7 Ki ayai lugeet ne myee, kaagesu labatet, ki ariip kayaneet:" 
2Timothy4:8 kobooch nguno ko kagegonorwo kuutweet ne po imanda, ne tuun koono Kiptaiyat, kirwoogindet ne po imanda, eng' peetuunooto: ago ma aneege, ago icheeget tugul ak icheek che ki kocham tagunennyi." 
2Timothy4:9 Igiilgei ak inyonja ko neegit: 
2Timothy4:10 amu ki kobagakta Dema, ko kagocham ng'wonyuni po peetuusyechu, ak kwo Thessalonika; kwo Kreske Galatia, kwo Tito Dalmatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka ineegei ne mi kobooto. Imutu Mariko, ak obwa tuwai: amu toreto eng' poisyet." 
2Timothy4:12 Ago ki ayookte Tukiko kwo Epheso. 
2Timothy4:13 Ye inyoo iibu sumet ak bukuisyek, ago ne siirei ko magatok che kisirei che ki abagakyi Karpo eng' Traos." 
2Timothy4:14 Ki yaiywo ne ya miising' Aleksanda, kitong'oindet ne po sugunoik: tuun yaakyin Kiptaiyat ko uu poisyonikyik:" 
2Timothy4:15 riibegei ineendet; amu ki kirinda ng'aleekyok miising' kot. 
2Timothy4:16 Ma piit chii ne kitoreta eng' waluunennyu ne po tai; ki pagaakta tugul: amat kiityi icheek ng'olyoondoniito. 
2Timothy4:17 Ago ki tonon Kiptaiyat kobooto, ak kogimita; si kobiit keamda eng' anee ng'aleek komyee, ak si kogas Pororyosyek tugul: ak ki kisarwo eng' kutitap ng'etundo." 
2Timothy4:18 Sarwo Kiptaiyat eng' poisyet age tugul ne ya, ak kosarwo agoi ait laitornatet ne po kipsengwet: nenyi toroornatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Igat Priska ak Aquila, ak piigap Onesiporo." 
2Timothy4:20 Ki tebi Erasto eng' Korinto: ago ki abagaach Tropimo eng' Mileto komyani. 
2Timothy4:21 Igiilgei nyoo kotom koit peetuusyek che po kaitityet. Igatin Eubulo, ak Pude, ak Lino, ak Klaudia, ak tupchosyek tugul." 
2Timothy4:22 Ingotep Kiptaiyat kobooto saboondang'ung'. Ingotep myeeindo kobootok. 
Titus1:1 Paulo, otwogindetap Kamuktaindet, ak kayooktoindet ne po Jeso Kristo, ko uu kayaneetap che ki kilewen che po Kamuktaindet, ak naetap imanit ne namegei ak kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet," 
Titus1:2 eng' kamang'unet ne po saboondap koigeny, ne ki iyomis Kamuktaindet, ne ma imuuchi kolembechaan, kobooch kenyiisyek che po koigeny;" 
Titus1:3 ago ki ng'aany ng'olyoondennyi eng' peetuusyekyik eng' amdaet, ne ki kiyanwa ko uu ng'atuutyetap Kamuktaindet Yetindennyo:" 
Titus1:4 asirchini Tito, lakweennyu ne po iman eng' kayaneet ne kiyamdoi: Ingotep kobooten myeeindo ak kaalyeet che punu Kamuktaindet Kwanda ak Kristo Jeso Yetindennyo." 
Titus1:5 Ki abagaakteen eng' Krete amu ng'olyoondoni, si kobiit ichop tuguuk che ki rartootin, ak inde poisyek nganaseet age tugul, ko uu ye ki ang'atiin;" 
Titus1:6 ngot komi chii age tugul ne ma tinyei leluut, ne manong'otyotap osotyot agenge, ne tinyei lagok che iyanotin, che ma kimwaitae yaityo, anan che ma kase iit." 
Titus1:7 Amu kanyolji riibindetap kaniset koek chii ne ma tinyei leluut, ineendet ne riibindetap poisyetap Kamuktaindet; ma ne isubi magennyi, ne ma sip konereechi, ne ma kimaiya, ne ma pirisyei, ne ma ting'ee keiyandit mogornateetap teweernateet;" 
Titus1:8 ago ne taachei toek, ne chamei che myachen, ne pou kabwaatutikyik, ne po imanda, ne tiliil, ne riibegei;" 
Titus1:9 ne namei ng'olyoot ne kiyani ko uu ole teptoi kaneetisyet, si komuuch koteechi eng' kaneetisyet ne po iman, ak koterteer kiptiyotinik." 
Titus1:10 Amu mi piik che chaang' che ma kase iit, ng'alaaligap ng'aleek che po puch ak keniik, miising' ko icheek che po kamuratanet," 
Titus1:11 che kanyool keger kutusweekwak; che itarng'aanyi ko komugul, koneeti tuguuk che kama konyolu amu mogornateetap teweernateet." 
Titus1:12 Ki le age eng' icheek, ne maotyonnywa, Kiplembechonik Kretik kotugul, tyong'ik che yaacheen, kipkeinik che choriren." 
Titus1:13 Po iman paornataniito. Kergong' anyun eng' kimnateet amu nooto, si kobiit koek che po iman eng' kayaneet," 
Titus1:14 ama epchin iit atindonigap Yahudik, ak ng'atuutigap piik che istoegei imanit." 
Titus1:15 Tiliileen tuguuk tugul eng' icheek che tiliileen: ago ma mi kiy ne tiliil eng' icheeget che murwonen che ma iyanotin; ago murwonen nautikwak ak kabwaatutikwak. 
Titus1:16 Mwaei kole ingen Kamuktaindet; ago eesyoi ineendet eng' poisyonikwak, ki koek che kiwechei, ak che ma kase iit, ama tilei kiy eng' poisyet age tugul ne myee." 
Titus2:1 Ago ng'alaal inyee agobo ng'aleek che nyoljin kaneetisyet ne po iman: 
Titus2:2 si koriipkei poisyek che kagoeegitu, koek che po teegisto, che pou kabwaatutikwak, che po iman eng' kayaneet, eng' chamyet, eng' muitaet:" 
Titus2:3 ko uu nooto chebyosok che kagoeegitu, ingoek che teegot eng' atebosyekwak, che ma kataamik, anan che rategei eng' divaik che chaang', kaneetik che po tuguuk che myach;" 
Titus2:4 si kobiit koneet osotik che mengeechen kocham manong'otaikwak, kocham lagokwak," 
Titus2:5 koek che pou kabwaatutikwak, che tiliileen, che poisyei eng' kooriikwak, che talaen, che kase iit manong'otaikwak, si ma kimwaitae ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet kiy ne ya:" 
Titus2:6 iteechi neranik ak icheek koek che pou kabwaatutikwak; 
Titus2:7 ibartegei inyeendet eng' tuguuk tugul iegu kaboorunet ne po poisyonik che myachen; eng' kaneetisyeng'ung' ibarte atebeet ne ma ng'emaksei," 
Titus2:8 ng'aleek che po iman, teegisto, che ma kimuuchi kirwookyi; si kobiit kolilaan ineendet ne kirindoech, koma tinyei kiy ne ya ne mwaitaenech." 
Titus2:9 Ingogas iit otwogik kiptainikwak, ak kobaibai icheek komyee eng' tuguuk tugul; amaek che wolu kiy;" 
Titus2:10 amaek che kooen eun, ago kobarta kayaneet tugul ne myee; si kobiit kogoochi icheek telunateet kaneetisyetap Kamuktaindet ne Yetindennyo eng' tuguuk tugul." 
Titus2:11 Amu ki kotook myeeindap Kamuktaindet, ne ipchin piik tugul yetunet." 
Titus2:12 Ineetech kole keeesye ooreet ne ma tokyingei Kamuktaindet, ak maguutik che po ng'wony, ak ketebi eng' ng'omnateet ne litit, ak eng' imanda, ak eng' ooreet ne tokyingei Kamuktaindet eng' kenyisyechu;" 
Titus2:13 kigeni kamang'unet ne iberuurot, nooto ko tagunetap toroornatetap Kamuktaindet nenyo ne oo ne Yetindennyo Jeso Kristo;" 
Titus2:14 ne ki igoitogei agobo acheek, si kobiit kotyachech eng' tengekto tugul, ak kotiliiljigei piik koek chechiik, che lewenotin, che igiilegei eng' poisyonik che myach." 
Titus2:15 Mwaa tuguuchuuto ak iteechi ak iger kong' kobooto pounateet tugul. Amat kosasin chii age tugul. 
Titus3:1 Ibwaatyi icheek koming'injigei pounik, ak pounatosyek, kogas iit, kochobogis eng' poisyet age tugul ne myee," 
Titus3:2 amat komwa kiy ne ya agobo chii age tugul, amat koek piich che po pooryot, ingoek che talaen, koboorchin piik tugul mutyonet tugul." 
Titus3:3 Amu ki kiberberen agacheek keny, ki ma kegase iit, ki kiberberech, keote maguutik che teerchiin ak ureryosyek, ketebye eng' yaityet ak ng'etkong', ki kiche kiwechei ak kewechegei." 
Titus3:4 Ago ye kingo took talasyetap Kamuktaindet Yetindennyo, ak chamyennyi ne chamei piik," 
Titus3:5 kosarwech, ma eng' poisyonigap imanda che ki kiyai acheeget, ago ko uu ole teptoi rireenennyi pogei, eng' kaunetap sigeet ne leel ak kaleelitetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil," 
Titus3:6 ne kiroong'wech eng' aiyebindo eng' Jeso Kristo Yetindennyo; 
Titus3:7 si, ye kagiityech imanda eng' myeeindonyi, keyaech keegu che namei tuguuk ko uu kamang'unetap saboondap koigeny." 
Titus3:8 Po iman ng'olyoondoni, ak amache imwa tuguuchuuto eng' kimnateet, si kobwaat icheek che ki koyan Kamuktaindet, koyai kotugul poisyonik che myach. Myachen tuguuchuuto ak kotoreti piik:" 
Titus3:9 ago istoegei teebutik che perber, ak tetuutigap ibinwek che ki kosiirto, ak suryosyek, ak pooryosyek agobo Ng'atuutyet; amu ma tinyei porot ak ko puch." 
Titus3:10 Eesye chiito ne ibu toiyet ye kagitigon ne po tai ak ne po aeng'; 
Titus3:11 ingen ile chiito ne uu nooto ko ki komaasta, ak koyaei tengekto, ko kagorwookyigei." 
Titus3:12 Ye tuun kayogu Artema, anan Tukiko, igiilgei inyoo eng' Nikopoli ole ami; amu koabegechi atebee olooto eng' peetuusyegap kaitityet." 
Titus3:13 Igiilgei imonorsechi eng' pandanywa Sena ng'amotyotap ng'atuutik ak Apolo, si ma rarta kiy eng' icheek." 
Titus3:14 Ak ingoneetkei piikyok ak icheek koyai poisyonik che myachen kotugul, agobo tuguuk che makyingei, si ma ek che mayiei logoek." 
Titus3:15 Igatin tugul che kemi tugul. Igat icheek che chamech eng' kayaneet. Ingotep myeeindo kobootok okweek tugul. 
Philemon1:1 Paulo, kimonjororyotap Kristo Jeso, ak Timoteo tupchennyo, kisirchini Philemon chamanennyo ne kiboityot ne kiboisyei tugul," 
Philemon1:2 ak Apia chepkamennyo, ak Arkipa asigarindet ne kiboisyei tugul, ak kaniset ne mi koong'ung':" 
Philemon1:3 Ingotep myeeindo kobootok ak kaalyeet, che punu Kamuktaindet Kwandanyo ak Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo." 
Philemon1:4 Amwachini Kamuktaindet nenyu kongoi kotugul, amwain eng' saautikyuk," 
Philemon1:5 agase agobo chamyeng'ung', ak kayaneet ne itinye eng' Kiptaiyat Jeso, ak eng' che tiliileen tugul." 
Philemon1:6 Asaae ale si koek yamdaetap kayaneng'ung' ne poisye komyee, ye inai kiy age tugul ne myee si keyai agobo Kristo." 
Philemon1:7 Amu ki atinye poiboiyet ne oo ak kagaigaet eng' chamyeng'ung', amu kigonyoor kamuung'et mugulelwegap piik che tiliileen agobo inyee, ne kitupche." 
Philemon1:8 Nooto anyun, agot nga ndatinye nyiganateet eng' Kristo si ang'atiin agobo nooto ne nyolu," 
Philemon1:9 ago, amu chamyet asoomin miising', anee Paulo ne koaositu, ak nguno kogeny ko aa kimonjororyot ne po Kristo Jeso." 
Philemon1:10 Asoomin miising' agobo lakweennyu Onesmus, ne ki asich eng' monjorornatosyekyuk,"
