Philemon1:11 Eng' tai ko ki ma kotoretin ineendet eng' kiy, ago nguno kotoretin ak kotoreta." 
Philemon1:12 Kaaweegun ineendet ne muguleldanyu. 
Philemon1:13 Ki tamache ale araany ketebi tuwai, si kotoreta kogeerenengei eng' monjorornatosyegap logoiywek che myach;" 
Philemon1:14 ago ma amach ayai kiy kotom agas kiit ne ibwaati; si ma pun myeeindong'ung' torchinet, ago chamdaeng'ung'." 
Philemon1:15 Amu abeere ki ibesyenengei eng' peetuusyek che matya, si kobiit otebi tuwai kogeny agoi;" 
Philemon1:16 ma ko uu otwogin kogeny ago kogosiir otwogin, tupchet ne chamat, miising' ko eng' anee ago siirei ne tya anyun eng' inyee, eng' poorto ak eng' Kiptaiyat." 
Philemon1:17 Nooto anyun ngiita ile ki agenge eng' poisyet, itaach anyun ko uu ye imuuchi itaacha aneendet." 
Philemon1:18 Ago ngo ki koyaun kiy ne ya, anan ngo ki kobesenin kiy, iitya nooto;" 
Philemon1:19 aneendet Paulo ne kasir eng' eunnyu, ale ayaagun; ago ma mwaun ale itinye pesendanyu, uu keele, inyeendet nooto." 
Philemon1:20 Ee, tupchennyu, inganyoorunenen poiboiyet eng' Kiptaiyat. Imuung'ji muguleldanyu eng' Kristo." 
Philemon1:21 Kasirun amu amang'u kaseng'ung' po iit, angen ale iyae agot che siirei che amwae." 
Philemon1:22 Ago kobooto chooto ichobwa ole anyoo arue: amu amang'u ale eng' saautikwok amuuchi keeweekwo Anyoonjok. 
Philemon1:23 Igatin Epapra ne ki kimonjororinik tuwai, eng' Kristo Jeso;" 
Philemon1:24 ko uu nooto Mariko, Aristarko, Dema, ak Luka, che ki kiboitiinik tugul." 
Philemon1:25 Ingotep myeeindap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo kobooto saboonwekwok. Amen. 
Hebrews1:1 Kamuktaindet, ne ki ng'alaalji kwanisyekyok keny eng' maotik, eng' kebeberwek che chaang' ak eng' ortinwek che chaang'," 
Hebrews1:2 ko ne kagong'alaalwech eng' peetuusyechu po let eng' Weeriinnyi, ne kigonde koek ne namei tuguuk tugul, ak ki yai ineendet ng'wony agine eng' ineendet;" 
Hebrews1:3 ineendet ko kakweng'eetap liilindanyi, ak itoondo ne po indennyi, ak kotononi tuguuk tugul eng' ng'olyootap kamuktaennyi, kingo kagoyai kaundoetap tengekwogik, kwo kotebee eutap tai ne po etunateet eng' parak;" 
Hebrews1:4 Ko kagoek ne karaaran kosiir malaikaisyek, ko uu ye konyitot kainet ne ki konam ineendet, kosiir kainennywa." 
Hebrews1:5 Amu ki mwachi malaikaisyek ngorcho koleenji, “Ii Weeriinnyu, kaasichin rani”? Ak kogeny, “Aegu Kwanda eng' ineendet ak koek ineendet Weeriit eng' anee”?" 
Hebrews1:6 Ak ye imut kogeny taita konyo ng'wony komwa kole, “Ingolas ineendet malaikaisyek tugul che po Kamuktaindet.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Ak ki mwa agobo malaikaisyek kole, “Ineendet ne yaei malaikaisyekyik koek usoonaik, ak koek kiboitiinikyik liplibenetap maat.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Ago ki mwa agobo Weeriit kole, “Ee Kamuktaindet, tebyei koigeny ak koigeny ng'echereeng'ung' ne po laitornatet. Kirokto ne po pounateng'ung' ko kirokto ne po imanda." 
Hebrews1:9 Ichame imanda ak iweche tengekto; eng' nooto anyun, ki koiilin Kamuktaindet, ineendet Kamuktaindeng'ung' eng' mwaitap poiboiyet kosiir siritoiguk.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Ak kogeny, “Eng' taunet, ee Kiptaiyat, ko ki ilum ole tonone ng'wony, ak kipsengwet ko poisyonigap euneguk;" 
Hebrews1:11 petos chooto, ago itebye inyee agoi; ak osegitu tugul ko uu ngoryeet;" 
Hebrews1:12 ak imamani ko uu ngoryeet ne tabanu parak, ak kiwalei ko uu ngoryeet. Ago iuu nooto inyee agoi, ama tinyei kenyisyeguk ole igeesunegei.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Tos ki mwachi malaikaisyek ngorcho eng' peetuut age, koleenji, “Tebee eunnyu ne po tai, agoi ayai puuniguk koek ng'echereetap keelyeguk.”" 
Hebrews1:14 Tos malakaisyek tugul koma saboonwek che mi poisyet, che kiyooktoi kobois agobo icheek che tuun nyooru yetunet?" 
Hebrews2:1 Eng' nooto anyun kanyool kenam miising' kosiir tuguuchooto ki kegas, si ma kichuchuige." 
Hebrews2:2 Amu ngo tononot ng'olyoot ne ki kimwau eng' malaikaisyek ak kigonyoor pistoet age tugul ak ngelelnateet melekto ne kageerchinet ne po imanda; 
Hebrews2:3 kechilildoi ano anyun, ngemete yetunet ne oo ne tee ni? Ne kiga kisip kemwa eng' Kiptaiyat, ak ki igimitwech icheek che ki kas;" 
Hebrews2:4 ak kibaoryani agine Kamuktaindet kobooto icheeget, eng' kaboorunoik ak kwang'utik, ak eng' kamugosyek che teerchiin, ak eng' kagoitaosyegap Kabuuset ne Tiliil, ko uu magennyi." 
Hebrews2:5 Amu ma igoochi malaikaisyek koboi ng'wonyut ne nyoonei, nooto kimwae." 
Hebrews2:6 Ago paoryani chiito age eng' komosta age, kole, Nee chii, ne tos ibwaat? Anan weeriitap chii, ne tos irutoochi?" 
Hebrews2:7 Ki iyai ineendet koming'init kitigin eng' malaikaisyek; Ilaakyini ineendet kuutweetap toroornatet ak teegisto, Ak ki inde koboi poisyonigap euneguk:" 
Hebrews2:8 Ki inde tuguuk tugul kogas iit eng' keldebesaigap keelyekyik. Eng' nooto anyun ko uu ye ki inde tuguuk tugul kogas iit ineendet, ko ki ma ituch kiy ne ma kas iit ineendet. Ago nguno ko tomo kegeer kogas iit tuguuk tugul ineendet." 
Hebrews2:9 Ago kigeere ineendet ne ki kiyai koming'init kitigin eng' malaikaisyek, ineendet Jeso, ne ki kilaakyi kuutweet ne po toroornatet ak teegisto amu nyalilda ne po meet, si kobiit kochamcham meet eng' myeeindap Kamuktaindet agobo chii age tugul." 
Hebrews2:10 Amu kinyolji ineendet, ne mi tuguuk tugul amu ineendet ak kobunu ineendet tuguuk tugul, ye imutyin weeriik che chaang' toroornatet, si koyai taunindetap yetunennywa koek ne ititaat eng' nyalilwogik." 
Hebrews2:11 Amu ineendet ne itiliilisyei ak icheek che kitiliili kobunu agenge: eng' nooto anyun koma keerei ineendet kalilanet koguure icheek che kitupche," 
Hebrews2:12 kole, Amwachini kaineng'ung' tupchosyekyuk, Atyeni kalasuneng'ung' eng' kwenutap tuiyet." 
Hebrews2:13 Ak kogeny, Amang'u ineendet. Ak kogeny, Keero, anee ak lagok che ki kogoono Kamuktaindet." 
Hebrews2:14 Amu yamdoi anyun lagok korotiik ak poorto, ki nam chooto ineendet agine ko uu nooto; si kobiit kong'em eng' ooreetap meet ineendet ne tinyei kimnateetap meet, nooto ko chesawilyet;" 
Hebrews2:15 si kobiit kotyach icheek tugul che ki ratotiin peetuusyekwak tugul eng' kaiyweisyetap meet. 
Hebrews2:16 Amu iman ma namei itoondap malaikaisyek, ago ki nam kesweegap Abraham." 
Hebrews2:17 Eng' nooto anyun kinyolji keyai ineendet eng' tuguuk tugul kogergeit ak tupchosyekyik, si kobiit koek tisiindet ne oo ne po rireenetapkei ak ko po iman eng' tuguuk che tokyingei Kamuktaindet, si kobiit koyai tisiisyet agobo tengekwogigap piik." 
Hebrews2:18 Amu ko uu ye kinyalil ineendet ye ki kiyomei, komuuchi ineendet kotoret icheek che kiyomei." 
Hebrews3:1 Nooto anyun, che kitupche che tiliileen, yamdoigap kuurseetap kipsengwet, obwaat miising' Kayooktoindet ak Tisiindet ne oo ne po ng'ang'ennyo, ineendet Jeso;" 
Hebrews3:2 ne ki ek ne kiyani eng' ineendet ne ki lewen, ko uu Musa agine eng' kootap Kamuktaindet tugul." 
Hebrews3:3 Amu ki kiit keele nyoljin toroornatet ne oo kosiir Musa, ko uu ye tinyei ineendet ne kiteechei koot teegisto kosiir koot." 
Hebrews3:4 Amu teechei chiito koot age tugul; ago ineendet ne kiteechei tuguuk tugul ko Kamuktaindet. 
Hebrews3:5 Ak ki ek Musa iman ne kiyani eng' kootap Kamuktaindet tugul ko uu kiboityot, agobo paornateet ne po tuguuchooto che kitun kemwa eng' let;" 
Hebrews3:6 ago Kristo ko uu weeriit, ne pou koonnyi; acheek koonnyi, ngenam miising' nyiganatennyo ak toroornatetap kamang'unennyo agoi kagesunet." 
Hebrews3:7 Nooto anyun, ko uu ye mwaei Kabuuset ne Tiliil kole, Ngot ogas kutinnyi rani," 
Hebrews3:8 Ko matouiit mugulelwekwok, ko uu eng' kaiimset, Ko uu eng' peetuutap yoomseet eng' surkwen," 
Hebrews3:9 Ye kiyoma kwanisyekwok kotyema, Ak ki keer poisyonikyuk kenyiisyek artam." 
Hebrews3:10 Eng' nooto anyun ki anereekyi ibini, Ak ki ale, ichiliili kotugul eng' mugulelwekwak: Ago ki ma kongen ortinwekyuk;" 
Hebrews3:11 Ko uu ye ki ayosye eng' nereegekyuk ale, Ma itei icheek kamuung'ennyu." 
Hebrews3:12 Oriipkei anyun che kitupche, si ma piit chii age tugul eng' okweek ne tinyei muguleldo ne ya ne po pistoet, koistoegei Kamuktaindet ne sabei:" 
Hebrews3:13 ago oteechigei peetuut age tugul, eng' ye ta kemwaei keele rani; si ma kiuit chii age tugul eng' okweek amu kenisyetap tengekto:" 
Hebrews3:14 amu kigeegu yamdoigap Kristo, ngenam miising' taunetap kamang'unennyo agoi kagesunet:" 
Hebrews3:15 ye ta kemwaei keele, Ngot ogas kutinnyi rani, Ko matouiit mugulelwekwok, ko uu eng' kaiimset." 
Hebrews3:16 Amu ng'oo che kitagis ye kingo kas? Tos ma icheek tugul che ki mang'une Misiri eng' Musa? 
Hebrews3:17 Ak ng'oo che ki nereekyi ineendet kenyiisyek artam? Tos ma icheeget che kichalwogenso, che ki ibutyi muuswekwak surkwen?" 
Hebrews3:18 Ak ng'oo che ki iyasyechi ineendet kole ma koi iit kamuung'ennyi, tos ma icheek che ki ingelelso?" 
Hebrews3:19 Kigeere anyun keele ki ma imuuch icheek koit amu ma iyan. 
Hebrews4:1 Ongiywei anyun yo ta komi arorutyet ne keite kamuung'ennyi, si ma leen chii age tugul eng' okweek, mata anyooru." 
Hebrews4:2 Amu ki kiamwech iman logoiywek che myach, ko uu icheeget: ago ma toret icheek ng'olyootap kaseet, amu ki ma namgei ak kayanetap icheeget che kigasei." 
Hebrews4:3 Amu acheek che ki kiyan keite kamuung'onooto; ko uu ye ki komwa ineendet kole, Ko uu ye ki ayosye eng' nereegekyuk ale, Maitei icheek kamuung'ennyu: agot nganda kiga kogeskei poisyonichooto kobooch ngap kelumda ng'wony." 
Hebrews4:4 Amu ki komwa ko uu ni eng' komosta age agobo peetuutap tisap kole, Ak ki imuuny Kamuktaindet eng' peetuutap tisap eng' poisyonikyik tugul;" 
Hebrews4:5 ak eng' yu agine komwa kole, “Ma itei icheek kamuung'ennyu.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Eng' nooto anyun amu miitei poroindo ne po alak koit olooto, ak icheek che kiga keamji logoiywek che myach, ko ki mata koit amu ngelelnateet," 
Hebrews4:7 kamwa kogeny agobo peetuut age, komwaei eng' Daudi, ko kagobata peetuusyek alak, kole, “Rani,” ko uu ye kisip kemwa keele, “Ngot ogas kutinnyi rani ko mat ouiit mugulelwekwok.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Amu nda kiga kogoochi Joshua icheek kamuung'et, ta ki ma kota komwaei let agobo peetuut age." 
Hebrews4:9 Ng'etunoot anyun kamuung'eetap sabato agobo piigap Kamuktaindet. 
Hebrews4:10 Amu ineendet ne kagoit kamuung'eetap Kamuktaindet ko kagomuuny eng' poisyonikyik, ko uu ye ki imuuny Kamuktaindet eng' chechiik." 
Hebrews4:11 Ongigiilgei anyun si keit kamuung'onooto, si ma ibut chii age tugul eng' kergeinooto po ngelelnateet." 
Hebrews4:12 Amu sabei ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet, ak kogim, ak ko ng'atip kosiir rotwetap chok ne ng'atiben komoswek tuwai, ak kotoorei agoi koobeesyo saboondo ak sabeet, ak ole tuiyechin kawek ak amseet, ak chepchep koguiyo kabwaatutik ak magutigap muguleldo." 
Hebrews4:13 Ama mi kiy age tugul ne ki kiyai ne ma taagu eng' tainnyi: ago ng'ang'otin ak yaatatin tuguuk tugul eng' taitap koonyek che po ineendet ne tuun kitetyini atebosyekyok. 
Hebrews4:14 Amu ki tinyei tisiindet ne oo ne kigochut kipsengwet, Jeso Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, ongenam miising' ng'ang'ennyo." 
Hebrews4:15 Amu ma ki tinyei tisiindet ne oo ne ma imuuchi kogaswech nyalulnatosyekyok; ago ne ki kiyoom ko uu acheek eng' tuguuk tugul, ama yai tengek." 
Hebrews4:16 Ongeriikyi anyun ng'echereet ne po myeeindo eng' nyiganateet, si kenyooru rireenetapkei, ak kesich myeeindo ne toretech eng' peetuut ne kinyalili." 
Hebrews5:1 Amu tisiindet age tugul ne oo, ne ki kilewen eng' piik, kindoi agobo piik amu tuguuk che tokyingei Kamuktaindet, si kobiit kogoito kagoochinoik ak tiseiywek agobo tengekwogik:" 
Hebrews5:2 ineendet ne imuuchi koriiree kimanainik ak che mastoi, amu ineendet agine komi eng' nyalulet;" 
Hebrews5:3 ak amu nooto anyun, ko uu ye nyoljin kogoito che ki tisiisye agobo tengekwogigap piik, ko uu nooto konyaaljin kogoito agobo kei agine." 
Hebrews5:4 Ama mi chii ne igoochingei ineegei teegisi, kobatee ye kaguur `Kamuktaindet ineendet, ko uu Aron." 
Hebrews5:5 Ko uu nooto anyun, ki ma itoroorgei Kristo agine koek tisiindet ne oo, ago ineendet ne ki ng'alaalji, koleenji, Ii Weeriinnyu, Kasichin rani:" 
Hebrews5:6 Ko uu ye mwaei agine eng' komosta age kole, Ii tisiindet koigeny Ko uu kiit ne ki uu Melkisedek." 
Hebrews5:7 Ne ki eng' peetuusyek che kimi eng' poorto, ko kagogoito saautik ak soomutik eng' riirek che eecheen ak peegap kong', koriirchin ineendet ne ki imuuchi kosar eng' meet, ak kingo kagegasyi amu kaiyweisyennyi ne kiywei Kamuktaindet." 
Hebrews5:8 Agot nganda ki Weeriit ineendet, ko ki ineetkei kasetap iit eng' tuguuk che ki nyoorunee nyalilda;" 
Hebrews5:9 ak kingo kageyai koek ne ititaat, koek ineendet ne kitaunegei yetunet ne po koigeny eng' icheek tugul che kase iit ineendet;" 
Hebrews5:10 ne kiguure Kamuktaindet tisiindet ne oo ko uu kiit ne ki uu Melkisedek. 
Hebrews5:11 Ki tinyei ng'aleek che chaang' che kimwae agobo ineendet, ago uui ole kiboorundoi, amu kigouit eng' okweek ogas." 
Hebrews5:12 Amu eng' ye kita nyolu oegu kaneetik, konyaaljinok kogeny koneetak chii kaneetisyosyek che po tai che po ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet; ak ki oegu che machei cheego, ama amitwogik che uueen." 
Hebrews5:13 Amu age tugul ne luei cheego kotom konai koboisyee komyee ng'olyootap imanda; amu manyurut ineendet. 
Hebrews5:14 Ago po piik che eecheen amitwogik che uueen, icheeget che ki koboisyee ng'omnatosyekwak komuuchi koobeesyo che myach ak che yaach." 
Hebrews6:1 Nooto anyun ongebagaakte mata ongeng'alaale ng'aleek che po tai che po Kristo, ak ongigiilgei agoi keit ne ititaat; amata onginde lumeiywot ne po siguunet ne punu poisyonik che meiyotiin, ak ne po kayaneet eng' Kamuktaindet," 
Hebrews6:2 ne po kaneetisyetap kabatisanosyek, ak ne po kagonooretap eunek, ak ne po ng'eetyeetap che ki kobek, ak ne po kirwoogetap koigeny." 
Hebrews6:3 Ak kiyae niito, ngo cham Kamuktaindet." 
Hebrews6:4 Amu eng' icheek che kisip kigoochi lapkeiyet ak kochamcham konunet ne po kipsengwet, ak koek yamdoigap Kabuuset ne Tiliil," 
Hebrews6:5 ak kochamcham ng'olyoot ne myee ne po Kamuktaindet, ak kimnatosyegap kenyiisyek che pwoonei," 
Hebrews6:6 ak kochuchuigei anyun, koma imugaksei keeweekyi icheek siguunet kogeny; amu igartatyingei kogeny Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, ak kogoochi ineendet kalilanet ne taagu." 
Hebrews6:7 Amu emet ne ki koee ropta ne robonjin konyil che chaang' ak koii ingweek che nyoljin icheek che ki kibatyin, konyooru kaberuret eng' Kamuktaindet:" 
Hebrews6:8 ago ngo iiyo katook che toorei piich ak che rutei piich, keesyoi ak ko neegitee chubeet; ne kagesunennyi ko kebeel." 
Hebrews6:9 Ago chamanichu, kiyani eng' okweek tuguuk che myachen kosiir chooto, ak tuguuk che namegei ak yetunet, agot ngemwae ko uu nooto:" 
Hebrews6:10 amu Kamuktaindet, koma Kamuktaindet ne ma po iman, kot koutye poisyeng'wong' ak chamyet ne ki obarte agobo kainennyi, ye ki oboisyechini che tiliileen, ak kota oboisyechini." 
Hebrews6:11 Ak kimache miising' chii age tugul eng' okweek keele kobarta kagiilonooto pogei eng' nyiietap kamang'unet agoi kagesunet: 
Hebrews6:12 si mouuegitu, ago oyaniegei icheek che nyooru arorutik eng' kayaneet ak muitaet." 
Hebrews6:13 Amu ye kingo yachi `Kamuktaindet Abraham arorutyet, ko amu ki ma komi age ne oo kosiir ineendet ne ki imuuchi koyasyechi koyasyo agobo kei," 
Hebrews6:14 kole, “Eng' kaberuret aberuurin iman, ak eng' kayabet ayabin ibaraitu.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Ak uu nooto, kingo kagomuita, konyoor arorutyet." 
Hebrews6:16 Amu iyastos piik agobo ne oo: ak kayasyoet ko kagimiitet ne igeesu tiiyennywa age tugul. 
Hebrews6:17 Eng' ng'olyoondonooto ye kingo mach Kamuktaindet miising' koboorchi icheek che nyooru arorutyet ole uu rarennyi ne ma walaksei, konde kayasyoet kwenut:" 
Hebrews6:18 si eng' tuguuk aeng' che ma walaksei, che ma imugaksei eng' Kamuktaindet komwa lembech eng' chooto, kimuuch anyun kenyooru kagaigaet ne kiim, acheek che kigemwechi toreteet si kenam kamang'unet ne ki kinde tainnyo;" 
Hebrews6:19 ne ki tinyei ne uu nangetap saboondo, ne kingen ak ko lumdaat ne wendi oriit kot kosiir angeet ne ki kioiye;" 
Hebrews6:20 ole kichut Jeso agobo acheek, koek kandoindet, ko kagoek tisiindet ne oo koigeny, ko uu kiit ne ki uu Melkisedek." 
Hebrews7:1 Amu Melkisedeki-niito, laitoryatap Salem, Tisiindet ne po Kamuktaindet Ne Toroor Miising', ne ki tuiyo ak Abraham ye ki weeksei kobunu ole ki pare laitorinik, ak koberuur ineendet," 
Hebrews7:2 ne kipchechi agine Abraham kebebertap taman ne po tugul ne ye kiweech, ko Laitoryatap imanda korook, ak yeityo kogeny ko Laitoryatap Salem, nooto ko Laitoryatap kaalyeet;" 
Hebrews7:3 ne ma tinyei kwanda, ama tinyei kamet, ama tinyei ooreenywa, ama tinyei taunetap peetuusyek anan kagesunetap saboondo, ago ki kiyai kogergeit ak Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, tebyei ko tisiindet koigeny." 
Hebrews7:4 Obwaat anyun ole kite ooindap chiichi, ne ki igoochi Abraham, poiyot ne oo, kebeberta ne po taman ne po pareiywek." 
Hebrews7:5 Ak tinyei iman weeriitap Lawi che namei poisyetap tisiisyet, ng'atuutyet konam kebeberwegap taman eng' piik ko uu eng' Ng'atuutyet, eng' tupchosyekwak, agot nga ki punu poortap Abraham:" 
Hebrews7:6 ago ki nam kebeberwegap taman eng' Abraham ineendet ne ki ma ki itito icheek eng' ooreenywa, ak koberuur ineendet ne tinyei arorutik." 
Hebrews7:7 Ago ne ma mi tiyet age tugul, konyooru ne ming'in kaberuret eng' ne oo." 
Hebrews7:8 Ak eng' yu kotaachei piik che pegu kebeberwegap taman; ago eng' olooto, ko ineendet ne kibaoryani keele sabei." 
Hebrews7:9 Ak, kimuuchi kemwa keele, eng' Abraham agot Lawi, ne taachei kebeberwegap taman, ko ki igoito kebeberwegap taman;" 
Hebrews7:10 amu kita komi poortap kwandanyi, ye kituitos ak Melkisedek." 
Hebrews7:11 Ak nda ki mi kagesunatetapkei eng' tiseinatetap Lawiik (amu ki nyoorunee yooto piik Ng'atuutyet), ko kita kimage nee kobiit tisiindet age ne uu kiit ne ki uu Melkisedek, ama kiititoi kiit ne ki uu Aron?" 
Hebrews7:12 Amu ngot kowalak tiseinateet, ko kanyool kewal agine ng'atuutyet." 
Hebrews7:13 Amu ineendet ne kimwaitae tuguuchu ko po pororyet age, ne ma mi chii eng' pororyonooto ne ki kobois eng' kaptisiisyo." 
Hebrews7:14 Amu taagu keele ki punu Kiptaiyandennyo ooreetap Judah; pororyet ne ki ma mwaitae Musa ng'olyoo age tugul eng' ng'aleegap tisiik. 
Hebrews7:15 Ak taagu komyee kosiir, ngot kotun piitu tisiindet age eng' kergeindap Melkisedek," 
Hebrews7:16 ne ki kiyai, ago ma eng' ooreetap ng'atuututigap poorto, ago eng' kimnateetap saboondo ne ma igeesugei:" 
Hebrews7:17 amu kibaoryani keele, ii tisiindet koigeny Ko uu kiit ne ki uu Melkisedek." 
Hebrews7:18 Amu miitei metoet ne po ng'atuutyet ne kiga kindoune, amu nyalulennyi ama tilei kiy" 
Hebrews7:19 (amu ma yai Ng'atuutyet kiy koek ne ititaat), ak komiitei ibunetap kamang'unet ne kaigai, ne kiriikyine Kamuktaindet." 
Hebrews7:20 Ama yaaksei ama kiyasyo 
Hebrews7:21 (amu ki kiyai icheek koek tisiik ama mi kayasyoet eng' ineendet ne mwaei agobo ineendet kole, Ki iyasyo Kiptaiyat ama walei kole, Ii tisiindet koigeny)." 
Hebrews7:22 Ko uu nooto anyun ki ek Jeso tononjinindet ne po arorutyet ne myee kosiir. 
Hebrews7:23 Ago icheeget ko ki kiyai koek tisiik ko ki chaang' eng' koitet, amu ki eete icheek meet si ma testai eng' poisyennywa." 
Hebrews7:24 Ago amu tebyei ineendet koigeny, kotinyei anyun tiseinateet ne ma kiwalei." 
Hebrews7:25 Eng' nooto anyun komuuchi kogeny kosar agoi kasuldaet icheek che pwaanjin Kamuktaindet eng' ineendet, amu sabei ineendet koigeny si kobiit kosaaei agobo icheek." 
Hebrews7:26 Amu nyoljinech tisiindet ne oo ne uu ni, ne tiliil, ne ma tinyei keniisyet, ama tinyei murwoonindo, ne itabaanat eng' kiptengegiinik, ak ki kitoroor kosiir kipsengwet;" 
Hebrews7:27 ne ma nyoljin kogoito tiseiywek peetuut age tugul, ko uu tisiichu ki eecheen, che igoitoi korook agobo tengekwogikyik, ye ibata kogoito agobo piik: amu ki yai niito konyil agenge ak koyam, ye ki igoitogei." 
Hebrews7:28 Amu indoi Ng'atuutyet piik che nyalulyotin koek tisiik che eecheen; ago ng'olyootap kayasyoet, ne ki piitu let eng' Ng'atuutyet, kondoi Weeriit, ne ititaat koigeny." 
Hebrews8:1 Nguno anyun, eng' tuguuk che kimwae, kiit ne oo ko ni: ki tinyei tisiindet ne oo ne uu ni, ne kitebee komostap euut ne po tai ne po ng'echereetap Laitornatet ne po Etunateet eng' kipsengwet," 
Hebrews8:2 kiboityot ne poisye eng' ole-tiliil ne emait ne po iman, ne kilumei Kiptaiyat, ma piik." 
Hebrews8:3 Amu kindoi tisiindet age tugul ne oo si kogoitoi kagoochinoik ak tiseiywek: nooto anyun konyolu kotinyei agine tisiindoni kiit ne igoitoi. 
Hebrews8:4 Nda mi ng'wony, ta ma egu tisiindet, amu mi icheek che igoitoi kagoochinoik ko uu piteetap Ng'atuutyet;" 
Hebrews8:5 che poisyei eng' karogutyet ak urwetap tuguuk che po kipsengwet, ko uu ye ki kiteechi Musa ye kimachei kotonon emait: amu ki leenji, Riip, si iyai tuguuk tugul ko uu kergeindo ne ki kiboorun eng' tulweet." 
Hebrews8:6 Ago kagosich nguno poisyet ne myee kosiir, ko uu nooto agine, ineendet ko katuiyoindet ne po kayomiset ne myee kosiir, ne ki kiyai eng' arorutik che myach kosiir." 
Hebrews8:7 Amu nda ki ma ko rartaat arorutyet ne po tai, ko kimatata kecheeng'jin poroindo ne po aeng'." 
Hebrews8:8 Amu ye kingo nyoorchi lelutik icheek, komwa kole: “Ogeero, pwoonei peetuusyek, mwaei Kiptaiyat kole, che tuun kiyomisyinige kayomiset ne leel ak kootap Israel ak kootap Judah." 
Hebrews8:9 Ma ko uu kayomiset ne ki kiyomiske ak kwanisyekwak eng' peetuut ne ki anam eunekwak si amut komong' eng' emetap Misiri; amu ki ma koteptoi kayomisennyu, ak ki ma amage kiy icheek, mwaei Kiptaiyat." 
Hebrews8:10 Amu ni kayomiset ne tuun kiyomisyinige ak kootap Israel. Ye ibata peetuusyechooto, mwaei Kiptaiyat: Andoi ng'atuutikyuk kabwaatutikwak, ak asirchi kogeny mugulelwekwak, ak aegu Kamuktaindet eng' icheek, ak koek piikyuk." 
Hebrews8:11 Amu koneeti chii tugul chiitap kokwennyi, anan koneet chii age tugul ne tupcho, koleenji, ‘Ni Kiptaiyat,’ amu tuun naa tugul kobooch ne ming'in eng' icheek kot koit ne oo." 
Hebrews8:12 Amu tuun ariiree icheek amu tengekwogikwak, Ama tuun abwaati tengekwogikwak agoi.”" 
Hebrews8:13 Amu ki mwa kole, “Arorutyet ne leel,” ki koyai koosit ne po tai. Ago nooto ositu ko kagotebi keny, ko neegit kogeskei." 
Hebrews9:1 Nooto anyun, agot arorutyet ne po tai ko ki tinyei ng'atuutigap saaet, ak komostanyi ole-tiliil, ne po ng'wonyuni." 
Hebrews9:2 Amu kiga kichop emait; ne po tai ko ole ki mi keldap tait, ak meset, ak magatiinik che itabaanatiin; ne kiguure ole-tiliil." 
Hebrews9:3 Ak ki ngesiir angeet ne po aeng', ne ki kioiye koot, ko ki mi emait ne kiguure ole-tiliil Kosiir Tugul;" 
Hebrews9:4 ne tinyei kapkorosutap thahabu, ak moingetap arorutyet ne ki kiliige thahabu komoswek tugul, ole ki mi tereet ne po thahabu ne ki mi mana, ak kirokto ne po Aron ne ki ing'ati, ak koik che po arorutyet;" 
Hebrews9:5 ak ki mi paragunnyi kerubisyegap liilindo che ki iuuri kerwetap rireenet; tuguuk che ma kimuuchi keng'alaale nguno agenge agenge. 
Hebrews9:6 Ak kingo kagechop anyun tuguuchuuto ko uu nooto, koba tisiik kotugul emait ne po tai, koyaei poisyosyegap saaet;" 
Hebrews9:7 ago, kiwendi tisiindet ne oo ineegei emait ne po aeng' konyil agenge eng' kenyiit, ama wendi ama tinyei korotiik, che igoitoi agobo kei, ak agobo lelutigap piik." 
Hebrews9:8 Ibooru Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' ng'olyoondoni kole, ki tom keng'aany ooreet ne mong'jin ole-tiliil, ye kita ko tononot emait ne po tai;" 
Hebrews9:9 ne kalewenetap peetuusyechu; ki kigoitoi eng' kalewenonooto agine kagoochinoik ak tiseiywek, che ma imuuchi koyai chiito ne saaei koek ne ititaat eng' kabwaatennyi," 
Hebrews9:10 amu (kobooto amitwogik ak che kieei ak kaunsosyek che teerchiin) chooto ko ng'atuutik che po poorto kityo, che ki king'at agoi peetuusyek che po kalititet." 
Hebrews9:11 Ago Kristo, ye kingo kagonyo, ne ineendet tisiindet ne oo ne po tuguuk che myach che tuun pwoonei, eng' emait ne oo ak kogesunotkei kosiir, ne ma kiyae eunek, ye kiweech, koma po ng'wonyuni," 
Hebrews9:12 ama eng' korotiigap kwesik ak moek, ago eng' korotiikyik icheegei, kwo anyun ole-tiliil konyil agenge ak koyam, ye kingo kagonyoor katyaget ne po koigeny." 
Hebrews9:13 Amu ngot kotiliili agoi kaunetap poorto korotiigap kwesik ak kiruugik, ak oreegap rooryat che ki ise icheek che tinyei murwoonindo:" 
Hebrews9:14 kotiliili anyun ne tya korotiigap Kristo, ne ki igoochigei Kamuktaindet eng' Kabuuset ne po koigeny, koma tinyei peruut, kotiliil kabwaateng'wong' eng' poisyosyek che meiyotiin si oboisyechi Kamuktaindet ne sabei!" 
Hebrews9:15 Ak amu ng'olyoondoniito ineendet ko katuiyoindetap kayomiset ne leel, si kobiit konyoor che kigeguur, arorutyetap poroteet ne po koigeny, ye kingo kagobiit meet agobo katyagetap pistaosyek che ki miitei eng' kayomiset ne po tai." 
Hebrews9:16 Amu ole miitei arorutyet ne po nametap tuguuk ko kanyool komiitei meetap ineendet ne kiyaei. 
Hebrews9:17 Amu tinyei arorutyet kimnateet ye kabiit meet: tos kiim kota kosabei ineendet ne kiyaei? 
Hebrews9:18 Eng' nooto anyun agot arorutyet ne po tai, ko ki ma kigoito koma mi korotiik." 
Hebrews9:19 Amu ye kingo kagomwachi Musa piik tugul kayomiset age tugul ko uu eng' Ng'atuutyet, konam korotiigap moek ak che po kwesik, kobooto peek ak koroorik che piriireen ak husop, ak kois bukuit, ak piik tugul," 
Hebrews9:20 komwaei kole, “Chu ko korotiik che po arorutyet ne ki ng'at Kamuktaindet agobo okweek.”" 
Hebrews9:21 Ak koisee kogeny korotiik emait kobooto tuguuk che kiboisyee. 
Hebrews9:22 Ak eng' Ng'atuutyet ko uu keele, kitiliili tuguuk tugul eng' korotiik, ak ngo ma mi tumdaetap korotiik koma mi nyoetap kaat." 
Hebrews9:23 Kinyolu anyun kitiliil itoonwegap tuguuk che po kipsengwet eng' chooto; ago kitiliile tuguuk che po kipsengwet tiseiywek che myach kosiir chuuto. 
Hebrews9:24 Amu ki ma mong'ji Kristo ole-tiliil ole ki kiyae eunek, ne karogutyetap tuguugap iman; ago ki mong'ji kipsengwet ineendet, si kotaagu eng' taitap Kamuktaindet agoi acheek:" 
Hebrews9:25 ma si kogoitogei konyil che chaang': ko uu ye wendi tisiindet ne oo ole-tiliil eng' kenyiit age tugul koibei korotiik che ma chechiik; 
Hebrews9:26 amu nda ki uu nooto anyun ta kinyooljin konyalil konyil che chaang' kobooch ngelumda ng'wony; ago kagong'ang'ak nguno konyil agenge eng' kagesunetap kenyiisyek si kobiit koisto tengekto eng' tiseiywot ne ki ineendet. 
Hebrews9:27 Ak ko uu ye ki king'at agobo piik kobek konyil agenge, ak ye ibata niito koek kirwooget;" 
Hebrews9:28 ko uu nooto Kristo agine, kingo kagigoito konyil agenge si koip tengekwogigap che chaang', ko tuun taagu ne po aeng', ma agobo tengek, ago agobo icheek che igeni ineendet agoi yetunet." 
Hebrews10:1 Amu tinyei Ng'atuutyet urwetap tuguuk che myachen che pwoonei, ma itoondap tuguuchooto, ma imuuchi koyai icheek che riikyin koek che ititaatiin, eng' tiseiywechooto igoitoi icheek kotugul eng' kenyiit age tugul." 
Hebrews10:2 Nda ki uu nooto, ko tos, ki ma kebagaaktoi kigoito? Amu ye kingo kagitiliil saaik konyil agenge, ko kimatata kotinyei kabwaatetap tengekwogik kogeny." 
Hebrews10:3 Ago eng' tiseiywechooto komiitei kabwaatetap tengekwogik kenyiit age tugul. 
Hebrews10:4 Amu ma imugaksei eng' korotiigap kiruugik ak kwesik konem tengekwogik. 
Hebrews10:5 Eng' nooto anyun ye kingo nyo Kristo ng'wony, konyo komwa kole, Ki ma imach tiseiywek ak kagoochinoik, Ago ki ichobwa poorto;" 
Hebrews10:6 Ki ma ibaibaitu eng' kagoochinoik che kibeelei komugul ak che po tengekwogik: 
Hebrews10:7 Amwa anyun ale, Keero, kaanyo (Ki kisir agobo anee eng' bukuit ne ki kimaman) Ayai mageng'ung', ee Kamuktaindet." 
Hebrews10:8 Mwaei ng'aleechu mi meto yu kole, “Ma imach anan ibaibaitu eng' tiseiywek ak kagoochinoik ak kagoochinoik che kibeelei komugul ak che po tengekwogik,” (eng' chooto che kigoitoi ko uu ye mwaei Ng'atuutyet)," 
Hebrews10:9 yeityo komwa anyun ineendet kole, “Keero, kaanyo ayai mageng'ung'.” Istoi ne po tai, si kogimit ne po aeng'." 
Hebrews10:10 Ki kitiliilech anyun eng' ma ko nooto eng' kagoitoetap poortap Jeso Kristo konyil agenge ak koyam. 
Hebrews10:11 Ak tononi iman tisiindet age tugul eng' peetuut age tugul koboisyei ak kogoitoi konyil che chaang' tiseiywechooto, che ma koi imuuch koisto tengekwogik;" 
Hebrews10:12 ago tisiindoni, ko ye kingo kagogoito tiseiywot agenge agobo tengekwogik agoi koigeny, kotebee anyun eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet;" 
Hebrews10:13 koogeni kobooch yooto agoi keyai puunikyik koek ng'echereetap keelyekyik. 
Hebrews10:14 Amu ki koyai koek che ititaatiin agoi koigeny eng' kagoitoet agenge icheek che ki kitiliil. 
Hebrews10:15 Ak paoryanjinech agine Kabuuset ne Tiliil: amu kingo pata komwa kole," 
Hebrews10:16 Ni kayomiset ne tuun kiyomisyinige ak icheek Ye ibata peetuusyechooto, mwaei Kiptaiyat; Andoi ng'atuutikyuk mugulelwekwak, Ak asirchi kabwaatutikwak;" 
Hebrews10:17 Ama abwaati chalwogikwak ak tengekwogikwak kogeny. 
Hebrews10:18 Ye miitei anyun nyoetap kaat ne po chuuto, koma komiitei kogeny kagoitoet agobo tengekto." 
Hebrews10:19 Ko uu nooto anyun, ki tinyei nyiganateet che kitupche kemong'ji ole-tiliil eng' korotiigap Jeso," 
Hebrews10:20 eng' ooreet ne leel ak kosabei, ne ki yaatwech, ne chutei angeet ne ki kioiye, ne nooto ko poortanyi;" 
Hebrews10:21 ak amu ki tinyei tisiindet ne oo ne pou kootap Kamuktaindet; 
Hebrews10:22 ongeriikte anyun eng' muguleldo ne po iman eng' nyiietap kayaneet, ko kageis mugulelwekyok kemete kabwaatet ne ya, ak kiuun poorwekyok eng' peek che tiliileen:" 
Hebrews10:23 ongenam miising' ng'ang'eetap kamang'unennyo si mawalak; amu iman ineendet ne ki iaroru: 
Hebrews10:24 Ak ongibwaatkei acheegei eng' acheegei ki kimitkei eng' chamyet ak poisyosyek che myach; 
Hebrews10:25 ama kibagaaktoi kituiyegei acheegei eng' acheegei, ko uu piteetap piik alak, ago kiteechinigei; ak ko uu nooto kosiir, ko uu ye ogeere ole riigu peetuut." 
Hebrews10:26 Amu ngot kekwetyini keyae tengek ko kagetaach naetap imanit, koma kong'etu tiseiywot age kogeny, ne po tengekwogik," 
Hebrews10:27 ago kagenet ne po kirwooget eng' kaiyweisyet, ak koroomnatetap maat ne igeesu puunik." 
Hebrews10:28 Meei chiito ne kasas Ng'atuutyetap Musa koma mi rireenet, eng' paorinik aeng' anan ko somok:" 
Hebrews10:29 obwaatitoi ano okweek, ng'wanitu ne tya pireet ne tuun nyoljin kirwookyine ineendet ne ki kotyech Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, ak koiit korotiigap kayomiset, che ki kitiliile ineendet, koek tuguuk che ma tiliileen, ak kosas Kabuusetap myeeindo?" 
Hebrews10:30 Amu kingen ineendet ne ki komwa kole, “Nenyu yaaktaetap mugetuut, anee ne ayaaktoi.” Ak kogeny, “Tuun irwookyin `Kiptaiyat piikyik.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Kiit ne pichiy kot kibutyi eunegap Kamuktaindet ne sabei. 
Hebrews10:32 Ago obwaat peetuusyek che po keny, ye kingo kagegoonok lapkeiyet; ye kinga omuite eng' pooryeet ne oo ne po nyalilwogik," 
Hebrews10:33 ye ki oegu, eng' kebeber, che kitang'aang'jin eng' kateweerisyosyek ak kanyililosyek; ak eng' kebeber, ko ki otinye yamdaet kobooto icheek che ki cham keyachin ko uu nooto." 
Hebrews10:34 Amu ki oriree icheek che ki ratotiin, ak ocham eng' poiboiyet kerebenak tuguukwok, amu ki ongen ole otinye mogornateet ne myee kosiir chooto ago ne tebyei koigeny." 
Hebrews10:35 Amowiirte anyun nyiganateng'wong', ne tinyei melekto ne oo." 
Hebrews10:36 Amu nyolu otinye muitaet, si ye kaoyai mageetap Kamuktaindet, omuuch otaach arorutyet." 
Hebrews10:37 Amu ta komi kitigin miising', Si konyo ineendet ne nyoonei, ama igaigei." 
Hebrews10:38 Ago sabei nenyu ne po imanda eng' kayaneet, Ak ngot kochuchuigei koma paibaitu muguleldanyu eng' ineendet." 
Hebrews10:39 Ago acheek koma ki po icheek che ichuchuchegei kobendi luseet: ago ki po icheek che iyani kot koit saruunetap saboondo. 
Hebrews11:1 Nooto anyun kayaneet ko naetap tuguuk che kimang'u, ak kaboorunetap tuguuk che tomo kegeer." 
Hebrews11:2 Amu ki kibaoryanjine nooto poisyek. 
Hebrews11:3 Kinae eng' kayaneet keele ki kiyai ng'wonyusyek eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet, nooto anyun tuguuk che kigeerei ko ki ma kiyae tuguuk che taagu." 
Hebrews11:4 Ki igoochi Abel Kamuktaindet eng' kayaneet tiseiywot ne myee kosiir ne po Kain, ne ki kibaoryanjine ineendet keele ki po imanda, ak kibaoryan Kamuktaindet agobo kagoochinoikyik: ak eng' nooto, agot nganda ki kome kota kong'alaali." 
Hebrews11:5 Ki kimut Enok eng' kayaneet si ma keer meet; ak ki mata kogeer chii ineendet, amu ki imut Kamuktaindet: amu ye kitom kimut ko kiga kibaoryan agobo ineendet keele ki ibaibai Kamuktaindet;" 
Hebrews11:6 ak ngo ma mi kayaneet koma imugaksei kibaibai ineendet: amu ineendet ne riikyin Kamuktaindet konyaaljin koyan kole mi ineendet, ak kole igoochin melekto icheeget che cheeng'ei ineendet." 
Hebrews11:7 Ki yai Noah moinget eng' kayaneet, kot kosar koonnyi, ye kingo kagiteechi agobo tuguuk che ki tomo kegeer, amu ki iywei Kamuktaindet; ki irwookyine anyun ng'wony nooto, ak ki ek ne ki nam imanda ne piitu eng' kayaneet." 
Hebrews11:8 Ki kas iit Abraham eng' kayaneet ye ki ngeguur, ak kimanda kwo koma ingen ole wendi, kwo komosta ne tuun taachei koek poroteet." 
Hebrews11:9 Ki ek eng' kayaneet kiprutoiyot eng' emetap arorutyet, ko uu emet ne ma nenyi, komeng'ooti emaisyek, kobooto Isak ak Jakobo, che ki che namei arorutyonooto kobooto ineendet:" 
Hebrews11:10 amu ki igeni nganaseet ne tinyei lumeiywek, ne Kamuktaindet teegindet ak ko yaindet." 
Hebrews11:11 Ki sich agot Sara agine kimnateet eng' kayaneet komanach ko kagosiirto kenyiisyekyik, amu kiit kole po iman ineendet ne ki iarorchi ineendet:" 
Hebrews11:12 nooto anyun ki kisich eng' agenge, ne kiga koigei ne ki kome, piik che chaang', ko uu kecheigap kipsengwet ak ng'aniek che mi ngeguutap nyanjet, che ma iitoksei." 
Hebrews11:13 Ki pek chuuto tugul eng' kayaneet, ama taach arorutichooto, ago kiga kogeer ak koboiboitu kota komi ole loo, ko kagong'aany kole ki toek ak ko kiprutoinik eng' ng'wony." 
Hebrews11:14 Amu icheek che mwaei tuguuk che uu chooto kobooru kole cheeng'ei emet ne nenywa. 
Hebrews11:15 Ak nda kiga ibwaat iman emoni ki mang'une, ta kinyooru poroindo koweektagei." 
Hebrews11:16 Ago machei kot nguno emet ne karaaran kosiir nooto, nooto ko, ne po kipsengwet: nooto anyun ma keerei Kamuktaindet kalilanet agobo icheek keguure Kamuktaindet nenywa: amu Ki kochopchi icheek nganaseet." 
Hebrews11:17 Kingo kagetyem Abraham, kogoito Isak eng' kayaneet: ee, ki igoitoi nenyi ne ki kisich ineegei, ineendet ne kiga taach arorutik eng' poiboiyet;" 
Hebrews11:18 one kiga kemwachi keleenji, Tuun kimwaitae Isak iyoteng'ung':" 
Hebrews11:19 koiit kole imuuchi Kamuktaindet kong'eet agot eng' che ki kobek, ak kitaach ineendet koweek eng' yooto koek karogutyet." 
Hebrews11:20 Ki iberuur Isak eng' kayaneet Jakobo ak Esau, agot eng' tuguuk che pwoonei." 
Hebrews11:21 Ki iberuur Jakobo eng' kayaneet, weeriik tuwai che po Joseph, ye ki neegit kome; ak kosa kotiegei walitap kiroktonyi." 
Hebrews11:22 Ki mwa Joseph eng' kayaneet agobo mandaetap piigap Israel ye ki neegit kome; ak kogoon ng'atuutyet agobo kawekyik. 
Hebrews11:23 Ki uny sigiikyik Musa eng' kayaneet eng' arawek somok kingo kagesich, amu kiga keer kole ki lakweet ne karaaran; ak ki ma iywei ng'atuutyetap laitoryat." 
Hebrews11:24 Ki eesyo Musa eng' kayaneet, ye kingo kagoeet, keguure weeriitap che po Pharaoh;" 
Hebrews11:25 kolewen keyachi ne ya kobooto piigap Kamuktaindet, kosiir kobaibaegei poiboiosyegap tengekto che po peetuusyek che matya;" 
Hebrews11:26 koiit teweernateet ne kiteweeri Kristo kole mogornatosyek che eecheen kosiir konoraik che po Misiri: amu ki igeni melekto. 
Hebrews11:27 Ki pagaakta Misiri eng' kayaneet, amaiywei nereegegap laitoryat: amu kimuita, ko uu ye keerei ineendet ne ma taagu." 
Hebrews11:28 Ki yai paska eng' kayaneet, ak isisyetap korotiik, si matwa icheek ne kibarei weeriik che po tai." 
Hebrews11:29 Kilandae “Araraita ne piriir” eng' kayaneet ko uu ye punei emet ne yaamaat; ak ye kileen kotyem Misiriik koyai ko uu nooto kelugui. 
Hebrews11:30 Eng' kayaneet kogilulyo irimoigap Jeriko, kingo kageyiem peetuusyek tisap." 
Hebrews11:31 Eng' kayaneet koma me chepkugoniot Rahab kobooto icheek che kingelelik, amu kiga taach segeik eng' kaalyeet." 
Hebrews11:32 Ara nee anyun age neta amwae? Amu mayama poroindo ngot amwa agobo Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jephtha; ak agobo Daudi ak Samuel ak maotik:" 
Hebrews11:33 che ki iterteer laitornatosyek eng' kayaneet, koyai imanda, ki sich arorutik, kiger kutusweegap ng'etuunyik," 
Hebrews11:34 ki imis kimnateet ne po maat, kichililye rotwetap chok, ki kigimit komong' eng' nyalulet, ki kimegitu eng' lugeet, ki oon lugosyegap puunik koweekta." 
Hebrews11:35 Kitaach kwonyiik piikwak che kiga kobek, che ki king'eet: ak ki kibir alak kot kobek, koesyoi katyagennywa; si kobiit kosich ng'eetyeet ne myee kosiir:" 
Hebrews11:36 ak ki kityem alak eng' chombilet, ak eng' pirisyosyegap kipcharitisyek, ee, ak kogeny eng' ratisyosyek ak toorchinetap korgoreet:" 
Hebrews11:37 ki kilach eng' koik, ki kimurmure musumenosyek, ki kiyoom, ki kibare rotwetap chok: ki ilaagoti ngoroigap keechiirek, ak che po ng'oroorek, kobonondos, ki kinyalili, keyachin ne ya" 
Hebrews11:38 (che ki ma konyaaljin ng'wony icheek), koombenoti eng' ong'atosyek ak tuloonook ak kebenonik ak keriingonigap ng'wony." 
Hebrews11:39 Ak kingo kagosich chuuto tugul paornateet ne ki kibaoryanji amu kayanennywa, koma kotaach icheek arorutyet," 
Hebrews11:40 amu kisip kochobwech Kamuktaindet kiit ne myee kosiir, si ma ki yai koek che ititaatiin ama kimi." 
Hebrews12:1 Nooto anyun, amu kiyiemenech pooldet ne oo ne po paorinik eng' komoswek tugul, ongeiste nyigiisindo age tugul, ak tengekto ne isip konamech, ak ongerwai eng' muitaet eng' kabeletapkei ne ki kinde tainnyo," 
Hebrews12:2 kegeere Jeso ne kandoindet ak ko kawong'unindet ne po kayaneet, ne kimuita eng' kimurtoiyot amu poiboiyet ne ki kinde tainnyi, ak kosas kalilanet, ak ki kotebee eutap tai ne po ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Kamuktaindet." 
Hebrews12:3 Obwaat miising' ineendet ne kimuita eng' kirindaetapkei ne po kiptengeginik agobo ineendet, si mong'etye, otanuise eng' saboonwekwok." 
Hebrews12:4 Tom oyai lugeet kot kotumdagei korotiik, obaregei ak tengekto:" 
Hebrews12:5 ak ki outye kateunet, ne ng'alaalwok ko uu ye ki ng'alaaljin weeriik, kole, Weeriinnyu, amesas kergong'yetap Kiptaiyat, Anan itanui ye kerin kong' ineendet;" 
Hebrews12:6 Amu ineendet ne chamei Kiptaiyat, kotigoni, Ak kobirei weeriit age tugul ne taachei." 
Hebrews12:7 Omuite eng' kergong'yetne koonook yaiywok Kamuktaindet ko uu nooto ko uu ye yachin weeriikyik; ng'oo weeriit ne ma keregong' kwanda? 
Hebrews12:8 Ago ngot ko motinye katigonet, ne kigonyoorunee tugul yamdaet, oo po sarbuch anyun, ma oo weeriik." 
Hebrews12:9 Ak ki kitinyei kwanisyek che po poorwekyok che ki kereech kong', ago ki kigonyiti icheek: tos ma kaigai kiming'inityige Kwanda ne po saboon, ak kesapche?" 
Hebrews12:10 Amu ki kerisye kong' icheek peetuusyek che ng'ering' ko uu ye kigeerei kole myee; ago ineendet, kogerei kong' agobo toreteet, si keegu che yamdoi tiliilindanyi." 
Hebrews12:11 Ma taagu kereetap kong' tugul keele po poiboiyet eng' peetuunnyi; ago po arageneet: ago ye ibata koiichi icheeget che kinetegei nooto, logoegap kaalyeet, chooto ko logoegap imanda." 
Hebrews12:12 Eng' nooto anyun onamji parak eunek che nyalulyotin, ak kutung'oik che meiyotiin;" 
Hebrews12:13 ak oyachi keelyekwok ortinwek che lititen, si ma kimaas che king'waldos, ago si kisoop." 
Hebrews12:14 Ogiilgei otebi eng' kaalyeet kobooto piik tugul, ak tiliilinooto ne ngo ma tinyei chii koma imuuchi kogeer Kiptaiyat:" 
Hebrews12:15 ogeer si ma rartae chii myeeindap Kamuktaindet; si ma piit tigityotap ng'wanindo ak konyalilis, ak komurwon che chaang';" 
Hebrews12:16 si ma piit ne soksei, anan chiito ne ma iywei Kamuktaindet, ko uu Esau, ne ki alda etunatennyi ne po sigeet agobo amdit agenge." 
Hebrews12:17 Amu ongen ole kingo mach eng' let konam kaberuret, keesyo (amu ki ma sich poroindo ne po siguunet) nganda ki cheeng' miising' eng' peegap kong'." 
Hebrews12:18 Amu ma oit tulweet ne kimuuchi ketwa, ne kilalei, anan tuindo, ak mesundeito, ak kipchurchuryet," 
Hebrews12:19 ak cheetap iryageet, ak tweguunet ne po ng'aleek, ne ki soom icheek che kigasei kole si mata kemwachi icheek ng'olyoo age tugul:" 
Hebrews12:20 amu ki ma imuuch komuita eng' ng'olyoondonooto ki king'at keele, Agot ngo twa tyony tulweet, kelage koik;" 
Hebrews12:21 ak nooto ki took, ko ki uu kiy ne imuisei, kot kole Musa, Aiywei miising' ak abotani:" 
Hebrews12:22 ago kaoit okweek tulweetap Zion, ak nganaseet ne po Kamuktaindet ne sabei, Jerusalem ne po kipsengwet, ak tuiyosyek che po malaikaisyek che ma iitoksei," 
Hebrews12:23 ak tuiyetap piik tugul ak kaniset ne po che po tai eng' sigeet che kigesir eng' kipsengwet, ak Kamuktaindet kirwoogindetap tugul, ak saboonwek che po piigap imanda che ki kiyai koek che ititaatiin," 
Hebrews12:24 ak Jeso katuiyoindetap kayomiset ne leel, ak korotiigap iset, che ng'alaali ko myee kosiir che po Abel." 
Hebrews12:25 Ogeer, amoeesye ineendet ne ng'alaali. Amu ngot ko ki ma chililyo icheek ye kingo eesyo ineendet ne kiga koteeita eng' ng'wony, kesiire ne tya anyun acheek ngot keistoegei ineendet ne iteu eng' kipsengwet:" 
Hebrews12:26 ne ki itumdum ng'wony kutinnyi peetuunooto: ago kagoaror anyun nguno, kole, “Ta atumdumi kogeny konyil agenge, ma ng'wony kityo, ago kipsengwet agine.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Ago ng'olyoondoniito, kamwa kole, “Ta konyilei agenge,” kobooru istoetap tuguuk che kimuuchi kitumdum, ko uu eng' tuguuk che ki keyai, si kobiit kong'et tuguuchooto che ma kitumdumi." 
Hebrews12:28 Nooto anyun, amu kinyooru laitornatet ne ma kimuuchi kitumdum, ko ongeegu che tinyei myeeindo, ne kimuuchi keyae poisyet ne iboiboi Kamuktaindet miising', eng' teegisto ak kayweet:" 
Hebrews12:29 amu Kamuktaindet nenyo ko maat ne igeesu. 
Hebrews13:1 Ingotep ko uu nooto chamyetap che kitupche. 
Hebrews13:2 Amoutye oboorchi toek chamyet: amu ki kotaach alak malaikaisyek eng' nooto amaingen. 
Hebrews13:3 Obwaat icheek che mi eng' ratisyosyek, ko uu ne oo ratotiin tugul; icheeget che kinyaliili, ko uu ye omi ak okweek eng' poorto." 
Hebrews13:4 Ingogonyit tugul katunisyet, amat koek itoogut ne tinyei simdo: amu tuun irwookyin Kamuktaindet che soksei ak che ibegei." 
Hebrews13:5 Oegu che ityagatin eng' chametap silingisyek; ingoyamak tuguuk che otinye; amu ki komwa ineendet kole, “Ma koi abagaakteen, ma koi ameteen.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Nooto anyun kimwae eng' nyiganateet ne myee keele, Toretindennyu Kiptaiyat; maiyweisyei: Yaiywo nee chii?" 
Hebrews13:7 Obwaat icheek che ki indoiywok, che kimwaiwok ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet; ye obwaati ole kiteptoi atebosyekwak, oyai ko uu ye kiyaei icheek eng' kayanennywa." 
Hebrews13:8 Kergei Jeso Kristo eng' amut ak ra, ak agoi koigeny." 
Hebrews13:9 Amatata ongobeetook kaneetisyosyek che pesyotin che teer: amu myee kolumdaak muguleldo eng' myeeindo; ma eng' amitwogik, che ki ma keljine kiy icheek che kiga pendate chooto." 
Hebrews13:10 Ki tinyei kaptisisyet, ne ma tinyei kimnateet koamisye icheek che poisye emait." 
Hebrews13:11 Amu poorwegap tyong'ichooto ki ibu tisiindet ne oo korotiikwak kobwa ole-tiliil agobo tengekto, kebeelei eng' nganaseet saang'." 
Hebrews13:12 Nooto anyun, kinyalil Jeso agine eng' ormariich saang', si kobiit kotiliil piik eng' korotiikyik." 
Hebrews13:13 Ongebe anyun ole mi ineendet eng' saang'utap ormariich, keibe teweernateet ne kiteweeri ineendet." 
Hebrews13:14 Amu ma ki tinyei eng' yu nganaseet ne tebyei koigeny, ago kicheeng'e nin nyoonei." 
Hebrews13:15 Nooto anyun ongigoochi Kamuktaindet eng' ineendet korosyotap kalasunet kotugul, nooto ko logoiyatap kutusweek che ng'aanyei kainennyi." 
Hebrews13:16 Oyai che myachen, amoutye oyai yamdaet: amu paibai miising' Kamuktaindet eng' koroseek che uu chooto." 
Hebrews13:17 Ogas iit che indoiywok, ak oming'inityige icheek: amu riipsei agobo saboonwekwok, ko uu che tuun tetu agobo poisyennywa; si kobiit koyai poisyoniito eng' poiboiyet, ama eng' arageneet: amu magelwok kiy eng' nooto." 
Hebrews13:18 Osaa agobo acheek: amu kiyani keele ki tinyei kabwaatet ne myee, kimache ketebi eng' atebeet ne myee eng' tuguuk tugul." 
Hebrews13:19 Ak asoome miising' kot ale oyai ko uu nooto, si kobiit kesip keeweekyo oldang'wong'." 
Hebrews13:20 Ingoyaak Kamuktaindet ne po kaalyeet, ne ki imut mestowot ne oo ne po keechiirek komong' eng' che ki pek, eng' korotiik che po kayomiset ne po koigeny, ineendet Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso," 
Hebrews13:21 oegu che ochobootiin eng' poisyet age tugul ne myee si oyai magennyi, koyai eng' icheek che chamaksei miising' eng' tainnyi, eng' Jeso Kristo; ne nenyi toroornatet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Ago asoomok miising', tupchosyechu, ale omuite eng' ng'olyootap kagimiitet: amu kaasirwak eng' ng'aleek tutigin." 
Hebrews13:23 Onai ole ko kityaach tupchennyo Timoteo; ngot konyo ko neegit, ko tuun anyoo ageerok kobooto ineendet." 
Hebrews13:24 Ogat tugul che indoiywok, ak tugul che tiliileen. Igatok che po Italy." 
Hebrews13:25 Ingotep myeeindo kobootok okweek tugul. Amen. 
James1:1 Jakobo, otwogindetap Kamuktaindet ak ko po Kiptaiyat Jeso Kristo, asirchini ortinwek taman ak aeng' che po piik che ki koiyestat, agatok." 
James1:2 Tupchosyekyuk, oiit ole poiboiyet kityo ye konyooru yoomsosyek che teerchiin;" 
James1:3 ongen ole ibu muitaet tyemetap kayaneng'wong'. 
James1:4 Ak ingoek muitaet ne tinyei poisyet ne ititaat, si kobiit oegu che ititaatiin ak ko nyiitootiin, che ma rartaat eng' kiy." 
James1:5 Ago ngot kobetyi chii age tugul eng' okweek utaatyet, ko ingosoom Kamuktaindet, ne igoochin tugul eng' aiyebindo ama kere kong'; ak kigoochin ineendet." 
James1:6 Ago ingosoom eng' kayaneet, amat kosage: amu ineendet ne sage ko kergei ak mildaetapkei ne po nyanjet ne mildoi usoonet koba komosi ak komosi." 
James1:7 Amat kobwaat chiichooto kole sichei kiy eng' Kiptaiyat," 
James1:8 chiitap kabwaatutik aeng', ne ma tononot eng' ortinwekyik tugul." 
James1:9 Ago ingobaibait ne tupchet ne ko nyeraat, eng' katoroorennyi:" 
James1:10 ak ingobaibait mogoryot, amu kagiming'in: amu siirtoi ineendet ko uu taapteetap susweek." 
James1:11 Amu charu asiista kobooto usoonet ne peelei tuguuk, ak kobeel susweek koresyo; ak kobutyo taaptokwak, ak kobet karaaranindap itoondanywa. Petei ko uu nooto agine mogoryot eng' ortinwekyik." 
James1:12 Paibai chiito ne muitoi eng' yoomseet: amu ye kagoterteer, kotaachei kuutweet ne po saboondo, ne ki iarorchi Kiptaiyat icheek che chamei ineendet." 
James1:13 Amat komwa chii ye kagiyoom kole kayooma Kamuktaindet. Amu ma yoomei Kamuktaindet yaityet, ama yoomei `ineendet chii age tugul." 
James1:14 Ago kiyoomei chii tugul, ye imuti magennyi ne ya, ak kichuuti," 
James1:15 ak ye kagomanach mageet ne ya, koii tengekto; ak ye kagoeet tengekto, koii meet." 
James1:16 Amat ongegenaak, chamanikyuk che kitupche." 
James1:17 Kagoitoet age tugul ne myee ak konunotyot age tugul ne ititaat ko po parak, choorugei eng' Kwanda ne po lapkeiyosyek, ne ma mi eng' ineendet kiit ne walaksei, anan ko urwet ne punu waletapkei." 
James1:18 Ki isichech eng' magennyi eng' ng'olyootap imanit, si kobiit keegu che tongoanigap yautikyik." 
James1:19 Ongen ng'olyoondoni, chamanikyuk che kitupche. Ago ingochepchebit chii age tugul kogas, amaek ne sip kong'alaali, ama sip konereechi:" 
James1:20 amu ma yaei nereegegap chii imandap Kamuktaindet. 
James1:21 Eng' nooto anyun omete simdo tugul ak chaang'indap yaitwogik, otaach eng' mutyonet ng'olyoot ne ki kimin, ne imuuchi kosar saboonwekwok." 
James1:22 Ago oegu che yaei ng'olyoot, amat oegu che kasei kityo, ogenegei okweegei." 
James1:23 Amu ngot koek chii age tugul kasindetap ng'olyoot, ama ne yaei, ko uu chiito ne keerei togeennyi eng' kioit:" 
James1:24 amu keeregei, ak kwo, ak koutye eng' yooto kole ka chiito ne uu nee." 
James1:25 Ago ineendet ne isyachi ng'atuutyet ne ititaat, ne po katyaknateet, ak koteptoi, amaek kasindet ne utye, ago yaindet ne poisyei, kiberuuri chiichito eng' poisyennyi." 
James1:26 Ngo leen chii tinyei atebeet ne uu ne po kayanik, ama riibei ng'elyeptanyi ak koberberi muguleldanyi, ko puch kayaneetap chiichooto." 
James1:27 Kayaneet ne tiliil ne ma tinyei murwoonindo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet Kwanda, ko ni: kowendi kogeerei che ma tinyei sigiikwak ak mosoogik eng' nyalildanywa, ak koriipkei ineendet eng' ng'wony koek ne ma tinyei tisya." 
James2:1 Tupchosyekyuk, amonam kayaneetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, Kiptaiyatap toroornatet, eng' tiytiyetap piik." 
James2:2 Ngot konyo chii ole otuiyechini ne tinyei peteiyot ne po thahabu, ak ngoroik che korooron, ak konyo agine kibananiat ne tinyei ngoroik che yaacheen;" 
James2:3 ak ogonyit ineendet ne ilaachi ngoroik che korooron, oleenji, “Tebee yu myee,” ak oleenji kibananiat, “Tonon eng' yo,” anan “Itebee ng'wony yu po keelyekyuk,”" 
James2:4 koma obesyegei okweegei, ak oegu che irwoochi che tinyei kabwaatutik che yaacheen?" 
James2:5 Ogaso, tupchosyekyuk ak ko chamanikyuk; tos ki ma lewen Kamuktaindet che ponondos eng' ng'wony koek mogoreek eng' kayaneet, ak koek che nyooru laitornatet ne ki koarorchi icheek che chamei ineendet?" 
James2:6 Ago kaosas kibananiat. Tos ma inyalilok mogoreek, ak kochuutok obe kapkirwoogutik?" 
James2:7 Machubei icheek kainet ne po teegisto ne kimwaitaenok? 
James2:8 Ago ngot osulde Ng'atuutyetap kaplaitoryat, ko uu ye mwaei siruutik kole, “Cham chiitap kokweng'ung' ko uu ye ichamdoige,” oyae ne myee;" 
James2:9 ago ngot otiytiy piik, ko kaoyai tengekto ak korwokwok Ng'atuutyet kole oo pistoik." 
James2:10 Amu chiito age tugul ne riibei Ng'atuutyet komugul, ak kobut eng' ng'olyoot agenge, konamei kirwooget eng' tugul." 
James2:11 Amu ineendet ne ki mwa kole, “Amoipkei,” ko ki mwa agine kole, “Amerumisye.” Nooto anyun, ngot ko meyai ibeetapkei, ak irumisyei, ko kaiegu pistoindetap ng'atuutyet." 
James2:12 Omwa ak oyai ko uu piik che tuun kirwookyin eng' ng'atuutyetap katyaknateet. 
James2:13 Amu ma tinyei kirwooget rireenetapkei eng' ineendet ne ma iboor rireenetapkei: itorooregei rireenetapkei kogirindoi kirwooget. 
James2:14 Kelu nee, tupchosyekyuk, ngot kole chii tinyei kayaneet, ama tinyei poisyonik? Komuuchi kayanonooto kosar ineendet?" 
James2:15 Ngot komi aach ngor ng'eetap kamenng'ung', anan ko chepto ne otupche, ama tinyei amitwogik peetuut age tugul," 
James2:16 ak koleenji icheek age eng' okweek, Oba eng' kaalyeet, ocheeng' lalang'indo ak piyendo, ama ogoochi icheek tuguuk che machei poorto; kotoreti nee?" 
James2:17 Ko kiit ne uu agine kayaneet, ngot koma tinyei poisyonik, ko meat ineegei." 
James2:18 Ago imuuchi komwa chiito kole, “Itinye inyee kayaneet, atinye anee poisyonik.” Iboorwo kayaneng'ung' ne ma tinyei poisyonik, si aboorun poisyonikyuk eng' kayaneet." 
James2:19 Iyani ile agenge Kamuktaindet; iyae ne myee: iyani ak icheek oik, ak kobotandos." 
James2:20 Ago imache inai, ee, inyee chiito ne ma ii kiy, ile, kayaneet ne ma tinyei poisyonik ko soon?" 
James2:21 Ki ma kiityi imanda kwandanyo Abraham eng' poisyonik, ye kingo koito weeriinnyi Isak eng' kaptisisyet?" 
James2:22 Igeere ile kibois kayaneet kobooto poisyonikyik, ak ki ek kayaneet ne ititaat eng' poisyonik," 
James2:23 ak ki isulda siruutyet ne mwaei koleen, Ki iyan `Abraham Kamuktaindet, ak ki kiityi ineendet nooto koek imanda; ak ki kiguure ineendet chorweetap Kamuktaindet." 
James2:24 Ogeere ole kiityin chii imanda eng' poisyonik, ma kiityin eng' kayaneet ineegei." 
James2:25 Ak ko uu nooto, tos ki ma kiityi Rahab chepkugoniot imanda agine eng' poisyonik, amu kitaach che kiga kiyookto, ak koweekta icheek kobun ooreet age?" 
James2:26 Amu ko uu ye meat poorto ne ma tinyei kabuuset, ko uu nooto kayaneet ne ma tinyei poisyonik, meat agine." 
James3:1 Amat koek che chaang' eng' okweek kaneetik, tupchosyekyuk, ongen ole tuun kinyooru kirwooget ne oo miising'." 
James3:2 Amu kibutosi acheek tugul eng' tuguuk che chaang'. Ngot koma ibut chii age tugul eng' ng'olyoo, kogesunotkei chiichooto, ak komuuchi koriip poorto komugul agine." 
James3:3 Ngot kinde kariik kutusweegap paraisisyek, si kobiit kogaseech iit, keeweechi poorwekwak tugul ak icheek." 
James3:4 Ogeer melisyek ak icheek, nganda eecheen miising', ak koonati usoonaik che kiimeen, keeweege pagoiyot ne ming'in ne kindochine, kwo ole makyin ne kweryei." 
James3:5 Uu nooto agine ng'elyepta, kebeberta ne ming'in, ak kolosegei eng' tuguuk che eecheen. Ogeero, peelei maat ne ming'in kweenik che tya!" 
James3:6 Ak ng'elyepta ko maat. Ng'wonyut ne po tengekto eng' kebeberwekyok ko ng'elyepta, ne imurwoni poorto komugul, ak konaami maat eng' pandap chii kotee kosabei ak kinaami eng' maatap Gehenna." 
James3:7 Amu kibaei tyong'ik alak tugul, ak toriitik, ak tuguuk che ichuutegei ak tuguuk che miitei nyanjet, ko ki kobai piik;" 
James3:8 ago ma imuuchi chii koboi ng'elyepta: yaityet ne ma pounaksei, ne nyiitaat ng'wonetap meet." 
James3:9 Kilasune nooto Kiptaiyat ak ko Kwanda: ak kichube piik, che ki kiyai eng' kergeindap Kamuktaindet:" 
James3:10 punu kutit agenge kaberuret ak chubisyet. Che kitupche, ma nyolu kotep ko uu niito tuguuchuuto." 
James3:11 Tos kutune konda agenge peek che anyiny ak che ng'woneen? 
James3:12 Che kitupche, imuuchi `mogoywet koii mseituni? Anan koii keetitap `sabibuk logoegap mogoonik? Amaimuuchi peek che myach kobiitune che po muunyuk." 
James3:13 Ng'oo ne utaat eng' okweek ak koguitos? Ingobarta poisyonikyik eng' atebeet ne myee eng' kaming'inetapkei ne po ng'omnateet. 
James3:14 Ago ngot otinye ng'etkonda ne ng'waan ak toiyet eng' mugulelwekwok, ko matoloske, amat omwa lembech agobo imanit." 
James3:15 Ma punu parak utaatyoni po ng'wony, po poorwek, po oindet." 
James3:16 Amu ole miitei ng'etkonda ak toiyet, komiitei polateet ak yautyet age tugul ne ya." 
James3:17 Ago utaatyet ne punu parak ko ne tai ko tiliil, yeityo ko po kaalyeet, ak komuitoi, ak kasei kiy ne kimwachin, ak ko nyiitaat rireenet ak logoek che myach, ama walaksei, ama tinyei chombilet." 
James3:18 Ak kegolei logoegap imanda eng' kaalyeet agobo icheek che yaei kaalyeet. 
James4:1 Punu ano lugoosyek ak pooryosyek eng' kwenung'wong'? Ma punu maguutikwok che poortos eng' kebeberwekwok? 
James4:2 Ogase myat, amotinye kiy, obarisyei; amook ng'etkong', amomuuchi onyooru; obortosi ak oyae lugeet; amotinye kiy, amu mosoome." 
James4:3 Osoome, amosiche, amu ya soomeng'wong', si oyae maguutikwok." 
James4:4 Okweek che oibegei, mongen ole chorwanditap ng'wony ko puunyoondit eng' Kamuktaindet? Chiito age tugul anyun ne machei koek chorweetap ng'wony koyaegei koek puunyootap Kamuktaindet." 
James4:5 Anan obwaati ole ng'alaali puch siruutik, kole, “Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne menyei eng' acheek kotinyei ng'etkonda”?" 
James4:6 Ago koonu myeeindo ne tesat. Leen anyun, “Kirindoi Kamuktaindet che meniotin, ak kogoochin myeeindo che iming'inegei.”" 
James4:7 Nooto anyun, oming'inityige Kamuktaindet; ago ogirinde chesawilyet, si komweenok." 
James4:8 Oriikyi Kamuktaindet, si koriikyok. Oun eunekwok, okweek kiptengeginik; ak otiliil mugulelwekwok, okweek che oo po kabwaatutik aeng'." 
James4:9 Onginyaliilak, ak oaragense, ak oteeiye: ingowalak roryondeng'wong' koek arageneet, ak koek poiboiyeng'wong' nyigiisindo." 
James4:10 Oming'inge eng' taitap Kiptaiyat, si koeetok." 
James4:11 Amomwaitaegei ng'aleek che yaach okweegei, che kitupche. Ineendet ne mwaitae ng'olyoot ne ya ne tupcho, anan korwookyi tupchennyi, komwaitae ng'olyoot ne ya Ng'atuutyet, ak korwookyin Ng'atuutyet: ago ngot irwookyi Ng'atuutyet, koma ii chiito ne yaei Ng'atuutyet, ago ii ne irwookyin." 
James4:12 Ne koonu Ng'atuutyet ak korwoochi ko agenge, ineendet ne imuuchi kosar ak komuuchi kong'em: ago ii ng'oo inyee si irwookyi chiitap kokweng'ung'?" 
James4:13 Ogas anyun, okweek che omwae ole, Kibendi rani anan ko mutai nganasani, ak ketar kenyiit agenge eng' olooto, kealisyei, ak kealdoisyei, ak kesich kelunet:" 
James4:14 ago mongen kiit ne piitu karon. Nee sabeeng'wong'? Amu okweek ko oo kibungweret, ne taagu ne matya, yeityo kobet." 
James4:15 Amu kata nyoljinok ole, Ngo cham Kiptaiyat, kesaptosi, keyai ni anan ko nin." 
James4:16 Ago nguno otoroorige eng' kachaunosyekwok pogei: katorooretapkei age tugul ne uu nooto ko ya. 
James4:17 Eng' ineendet anyun, ne ingen koyai ne myee, ama yaei, ko tengekto eng' ineendet." 
James5:1 Ogas anyun, okweek mogoreek, oriirye ak oteeiye amu nyalwogikwok che pwonjinok." 
James5:2 Kagonunio mogornatosyekwok, ak kigoam kuutik ngoroikwok." 
James5:3 Kagong'emogis thahabusyekwok ak fedhaisyekwok; ak tuun egu ng'emisyennywa paornateet eng' okweek, ak tuun amei poorwekwok ko uu maat. Kaogonorchigei mogornateet eng' peetuusyek che po let." 
James5:4 Ogeero, poldos melekwegap kiboitiinik che kigesei mbareenikwok, che ki onamdegei: ak ki kochut iitiigap Kiptaiyatap Lugoosyek riiregap icheek che kigesei." 
James5:5 Ki omeng'iisye eng' ng'wony eng' kabaibaetapkei, ne ki obaibaegei maguutikwok; ki obai mugulelwekwok eng' peetuutap eng'seet." 
James5:6 Ki orwookyi, ak ki obar chiitap imanda; ama kirindook." 
James5:7 Omuite anyun, che kitupche, kot koit nyonunetap Kiptaiyat. Ogeero, igeni chiitap ko po mbareet logoek che myachen che po ng'wony, ak komuitoi agobo chooto, kot konyoor ropta ne po tai ak ne po let." 
James5:8 Omuite anyun ak okweek; ogimiit mugulelwekwok: amu kagoneegitit nyonunetap Kiptaiyat. 
James5:9 Among'unyng'ung'jige okweegei, che kitupche, si ma kirwookwok: ogeero, tononi kirwoogindet eng' taitap kurgotik." 
James5:10 Tupchosyechu, obwaat maotik che ki ng'alaal eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat, koek karogutyetap nyalilda ak muitaet." 
James5:11 Ogeero, kiguure che kimuita che poiboen: ki ogas agobo muitaetap Job, ak ki ogeer kiit ne ki yai Kiptaiyat eng' let, ole nyiitaat rireenet Kiptaiyat, ak koriiregei." 
James5:12 Ago ne siirei tuguuk tugul, tupchosyekyuk, ko matoyosye kipsengwet, anan ko ng'wony, anan ko eng' kayasyoet age tugul: ago ingoek ee neng'wong', ee, ak ingoek achicha neng'wong', achicha; si mobutyi kirwooget." 
James5:13 Mi chii eng' okweek ne nyalili? Ingosa. Mi ne paibai? Ingotyen kalasunet. 
James5:14 Miitei ne myani eng' kwenung'wong'? Ingoguur poisyegap kaniset; ak kosa icheek agobo ineendet, koiilee mwaita eng' kainetap Kiptaiyat:" 
James5:15 ak kosoop saaetap kayaneet ineendet ne myani, ak kong'eet `Kiptaiyat ineendet; ak ngot ko ki koyai tengekwogik, kenyochi kaat." 
James5:16 Ong'aang'jige anyun kachiliilutikwok okweegei, ak osachinigei okweegei, si kobiit kisaabok. Toretisyei miising' saaetap chiito ne po imanda ngo saa eng' kagiiletapkei." 
James5:17 Ki chiito Elijah ne uu acheek, ak ki sa ko ki ilgei kole si ma robon; ak ma robonji ng'wony eng' kenyiisyek somok ak arawek lo." 
James5:18 Ak ki sa kogeny; ak kigon kipsengwet ropta, ak ki ii ng'wony logoekyik." 
James5:19 Che kitupche, ngot komi chii eng' kwenung'wong' ne mastoi eng' imanda, ak kowal chii ineendet;" 
James5:20 ko ingonai kole ineendet ne walei kiptengekyot kobagaakta mastaetap ooreennyi kosaru saboondo eng' meet, ak kotuchei tengekwogik che chaang'." 
1Peter1:1 Petero, kayooktoindet ne po Jeso Kristo, asirchini che ki kilewen, punootik che po piik che ki koiyesta, eng' Ponto, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia, ak Bithynia," 
1Peter1:2 ko uu eng' naetap Kamuktaindet Kwanda ne kisip konai, eng' katabaanetap Kabuuset ne Tiliil, agoi kasetap iit ak isetap korotiik che po Jeso Kristo: Ingotesak myeeindo ak kaalyeet eng' okweek." 
1Peter1:3 Iberuurot Kamuktaindet Kwandap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, ne kisichech kogeny eng' rireenennyi ne oo kenyooru kamang'unet ne sabei eng' ng'eetyeetap Jeso Kristo ne ki mong' eng' che ki pek," 
1Peter1:4 ketaach poroteet ne ma ng'emaksei, ama tinyei murwoonindo, ama petei, ne ki kigonorwok eng' kipsengwet," 
1Peter1:5 okweek che ki riibei eng' kimnateetap Kamuktaindet eng' kayaneet si onyooru yetunet ne choboot keng'aany eng' peetuutap let. 
1Peter1:6 Ne oboiboi miising' eng' nooto, nganda nguno eng' peetuusyek che matya, ngo nyolu, ko kagigoonok oaragense eng' yoomsosyek che chaang'," 
1Peter1:7 si kenyoor eng' kalasunet ak toroornatet ak teegisto, tyemet ne chamaksei ne po kayaneng'wong', ne tinyei kamanuutyet ne oo kosiir ne po thahabu che petos nganda kityemei eng' maat, eng' ng'ang'et ne po Jeso Kristo:" 
1Peter1:8 ne ochame nganda tomo ogeer; ineendet ne nganda mogeere nguno, oyani, ko oboiboi miising' eng' poiboiyet ne ma mwaoksei ak ko nyiitaat toroornatet:" 
1Peter1:9 ye tuun onyooru kasuldaetap kayaneng'wong', yetunetap saboonwekwok." 
1Peter1:10 Ki cheeng' maotik ak kogilgilye miising' inne agobo yetunanooto, icheeget che ki maoten agobo myeeindo ne osiche:" 
1Peter1:11 ye ki cheeng'ei peetuut ne ineet anan ole uu peetuut ne ki iboorchin Kabuusetap Kristo ne ki miitei eng' icheek, ye kisip kobaoryan agobo nyalilwogigap Kristo, ak toroornatosyek che isubi chooto." 
1Peter1:12 Che ki king'aang'ji, ma agobo icheeget, ago kiyaiywok okweek tuguuchuuto, che kagemwaiwok nguno eng' icheek che ki amwok logoiywek che myach eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil ne ki kiyok eng' kipsengwet; tuguuk che machei malaikaisyek miising' kogeer." 
1Peter1:13 Eng' nooto anyun ogermen suenutigap kabwaatutikwok, oriipkei ak omang'u eng' kagesunetapkei myeeindo ne tuun ki ibwook eng' ng'ang'eetap Jeso Kristo;" 
1Peter1:14 ko uu lagok che kase iit, amoyaniegei maguutikwok che po tai eng' peetuusyek che ki po perberindang'wong':" 
1Peter1:15 ago ko uu ye tiliil ineendet ne kiguurok, oegu che tiliileen ak okweek eng' atebosyek tugul;" 
1Peter1:16 amu ki kisir keele, Oegu che tiliileen; amu aa tiliil anee." 
1Peter1:17 Ak ngot oguure ineendet oleen Kwanda, ne irwoochi ko uu ole teptoi poisyetap chii age tugul, ama eng' tiytiyet, obendoti eng' kaiyweisyet eng' peetuusyekwok che omi ko oo toek:" 
1Peter1:18 ongen ole ki kityaachak omang'une atebeeng'wong' ne po puch ne ki onyooru eng' kwanisyekwok, ma eng' tuguuk che ng'emaksei, ko uu fedha anan thahabu;" 
1Peter1:19 ago eng' korotiik che po kamanuutyet ne oo, ko uu che po aarwet ne ma tinyei peruut ak ne ma tinyei tisya, chooto ko korotiigap Kristo:" 
1Peter1:20 ne kisip konaam iman kotom kelumda ng'wony, ago ki king'aany eng' peetuusyek che po let agobo okweek," 
1Peter1:21 che oo kayanik eng' Kamuktaindet amu ineendet, ne ki ing'eet ineendet komong' eng' che ki pek, ak kogoochi toroornatet; si kotebi kayaneng'wong' ak kamang'uneng'wong' eng' Kamuktaindet." 
1Peter1:22 Amu ki otiliil saboonwekwok eng' kasetap iit ne ogase iit imanit kot koit chamyetap tupchosyek ne ma tinyei keniisyet, ochamye, okweegei eng' mugulelwekwok eng' kagiiletapkei:" 
1Peter1:23 amu kigesichok kogeny, ma eng' kesweek che ng'emaksei ago eng' che ma ng'emaksei, eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet, ne sabei ak kotebyei." 
1Peter1:24 Amu, Uu susweek poorwek tugul, ak uu taaptogap susweek toroornatennywa tugul. Restos susweek, ak kobutyo taaptook:" 
1Peter1:25 Ago tebyei koigeny ng'olyootap Kiptaiyat. Niito ko ng'olyootap logoiywek che myach che ki kiamwok. 
1Peter2:1 Oiste anyun yaityet tugul, ak ng'aalseet tugul, ak chombilisyosyek, ak ng'etkonda, ak ng'alaalet age tugul ne ya," 
1Peter2:2 omach miising' cheego che po ng'omnatetap saboon, che ma tinyei ng'aalseet, ko uu manyurunik, si kobiit onerye agoi yetunet;" 
1Peter2:3 ngo ki ochamcham ole Kiptaiyat ko po myeeindo: 
1Peter2:4 obwanjini ineendet koita ne sabei, ne ki eesyo piik iman, ago lewenot eng' Kamuktaindet, ne chamat miising'," 
1Peter2:5 ak okweek, che oo koik che saptos, kiteechok oegu koot ne sabei, oegu che poisyei eng' tiseinateet ne tiliil, si ogoite korosegap saboon, che taachaksei eng' Kamuktaindet eng' Jeso Kristo." 
1Peter2:6 Amu mi eng' sireet kole, Ogeero, kande Zion koita, koita ne po luuita ne lewenot ak ne chamat miising': Ak ineendet ne iyani, koma ililani." 
1Peter2:7 Eng' okweek anyun che oyani kochamaat miising' ineendet: ago eng' icheek che ma iyani, ko, Koita ne ki eesyo teegik, Ki kiyai koyata koek metitap luuita;" 
1Peter2:8 ak ko, koita ne inachi piich, ak ko rwandet ne riichei piich; amu kinachi icheek eng' ng'olyoot, amu ma kase iit: ki kinde icheek agobo nooto." 
1Peter2:9 Ago okweek ko oo pororyet ne kigelewen, oo che poisyei eng' tiseinateet ne po kaplaitoryat, pororyet ne tiliil, piik che punjin Kamuktaindet, si kobiit obarte telunatosyek che po ineendet ne kiguurok omang'une mesundeito omong'ji lapkeiyennyi ne kikweng'e." 
1Peter2:10 Okweek che ki ma ko oo pororyet eng' tai, ago nguno ko oo pororyetap Kamuktaindet; che ki ma osich rireenetapkei, ago nguno ko kaosich rireenetapkei." 
1Peter2:11 Chamanichu, asoomok ko uu ye oo toek ak ko oo kiprutoinik, ale oistoegei maguutik che po poorto, che poortos ak saboondo;" 
1Peter2:12 okweek che otinye atebeet ne nyolu eng' kwenutap Pororyosyek, si nganda itaamok ko uu yaigap yaityo, kotoroor Kamuktaindet eng' peetuutap rutochinet eng' poisyonikwok che myach che keerei." 
1Peter2:13 Ogas iit kiit age tugul ne ng'atei piik amu Kiptaiyat: agot ngo laitoryat, ne pou tugul;" 
1Peter2:14 anan ko pounik, che iyoogu ineendet agobo mugetuut ne yaakyin yaigap yaityo, ak agobo kalasunet eng' icheek che yaei ne myee." 
1Peter2:15 Amu uu nooto mageetap Kamuktaindet, ale oger eng' yautik che myach abusnatetap piik che perberen:" 
1Peter2:16 ko uu che ityagatin, amoboisyee katyaknateng'wong' ko uu kiit ne otektoe yaityet, ago oboisye ko uu otwogigap Kamuktaindet." 
1Peter2:17 Oteech piik tugul. Ocham che otupche. Oiywei Kamuktaindet. Oteech laitoryat. 
1Peter2:18 Okweek che oo otwogik, ogas iit kiptainikwok eng' kaiyweisyet tugul; ma che myachen ak che talaen kityo, ago ogas iit che kolgol ak icheek." 
1Peter2:19 Amu chamaksei niito, ngot komuita chii eng' aragenosyek kobwaati Kamuktaindet, ye kinyaliili ama yai kiy ne ya." 
1Peter2:20 Amu teegis nee, ngot oyai tengek ak kebirok, ak omuitoi? Ago ngot oyai ne myee, ak onyalil, ak omuitoi, ko chamaksei niito eng' Kamuktaindet." 
1Peter2:21 Amu ki kiguurchok niito: amu kinyalil Kristo agine agobo okweek, kobagakwok kaboorunet, si kobiit osup tyegutikyik:" 
1Peter2:22 ineendet ne ki ma yai tengek, ama ki nyoorchi kutinnyi ng'aalseet:" 
1Peter2:23 ne ye ki ngeng'emji kuut, koma ng'em kuut; ye kingo nyalil, koma imuiso; ago ki igoochigei ineendet ne irwoochi eng' imanda:" 
1Peter2:24 ineendet ne ki ip tengekwogikyok eng' poortanyi eng' keetit parak, si kesapchee eng' imanda; acheek che kiga kebekyi tengekwogik; ki kisaabenok pirutikyik." 
1Peter2:25 Amu ki obetooti ko uu keechiirek; ago kaoweekyigei Mestowot ak ko Riibindetap saboonwekwok. 
1Peter3:1 Uu nooto, osotichu, ogas iit manong'otaikwok; si nganda ma kase iit alak ng'olyoot, kimuuch kichuut icheek eng' atebeet ne myee ne po osotikwak ama eng' ng'olyoot," 
1Peter3:2 ye keerei atebeeng'wong' ne tiliil ne pooto kaiyweisyet. 
1Peter3:3 Amaek lelestanywa lelesta ne po saang', ne po laetap suumeek, ak kalaagetap kariigap thahabu, ak kalaagetap ngoroik;" 
1Peter3:4 ago ingoek chiito ne ung'aat ne tinyei muguleldo ne po sabeet, ne tinyei lelesta ne ma ng'emaksei, ne tala ak kosiisei, ne eng' taitap Kamuktaindet ko po kamanuutyet ne oo." 
1Peter3:5 Ki uu nooto kwonyiik che tiliileen chu ki po keny che ki imang'u Kamuktaindet, ki yaei lelesta icheeget ak kogase iit manong'otaikwak." 
1Peter3:6 Ko uu ye ki kase iit `Sara Abraham, koguuree ineendet kiptaiyat. Oo lagokyik ngot oyae ne myee, amoiywei kamuiset age tugul." 
1Peter3:7 Okweek manong'otaichu, otebi ko uu nooto kobooto osotikwok eng' ng'omnateet, ogoochini kwondo teegisto, amu ineendet ko nyalulat eng' muren, ko uu ye tuun onyooru tugul myeeindap saboondo; si ma kiger saautikwok." 
1Peter3:8 Ne po let anyun, ko oegu tugul che po kabwaatet agenge, che rireegei, che chamdos ko uu che tupcho, che ng'arng'ar mugulelwek, che iming'inegei:" 
1Peter3:9 che mayaaktoi yaityo eng' yaityo, anan ko ng'emetap kuut eng' ng'emetap kuut; ago oegu che iberuurisyei; amu ki kiguurchok niito, si onam kaberuret." 
1Peter3:10 Amus, “Ineendet ne chamei saboondo, ak kogeer peetuusyek che myachen, ko ingoriip ng'elyeptanyi si ma mwa yaityo, ak kutinnyi si ma mwa ng'aalseet." 
1Peter3:11 Ingoistoegei yaityo, ak koyai ne myee; Ingocheeng' kaalyeet ak koosup." 
1Peter3:12 Amu tokyingei konyegap Kiptaiyat che po imanda, ak kogasei iitiikyik soomennywa. Ago kirindoi togeetap Kiptaiyat che yaei yaityo.”" 
1Peter3:13 Ak ng'oo ne yaiywok ne ya, ngot omache miising' kiit ne myee?" 
1Peter3:14 Ago ngot onyalili agobo imanda, ko oo poiboen: amoiywei kamuisennywa, anan oiimge:" 
1Peter3:15 ago ogonyit Kristo koek Kiptaiyat ne tiliil eng' mugulelwekwok: ak oegu che chobootiin kotugul owolji chii tugul ne teebenok ng'olyoo agobo kamang'unet ne miitei eng' okweek, ago eng' talasyet ak kaiyweisyet:" 
1Peter3:16 otinye kabwaatet ne myee; si ye kitaamok, kigoochin kolilaan icheek che mwaitae ng'aleek che yaach atebeeng'wong' ne myee eng' Kristo." 
1Peter3:17 Amu kaigai ngot ko nooto mageetap Kamuktaindet, onyalilye amu oyae ne myee kosiir ye oyae ne ya." 
1Peter3:18 Amu kime Kristo agine konyil agenge agobo tengekwogik, ineendet ne po imanda agobo che ma po imanda, si kobiit komutyech Kamuktaindet; ne ki kibar eng' poorto, ago ki kisoop eng' saboondo;" 
1Peter3:19 ki wo eng' nooto agine koamji saboonwek che ki mi korgoreet," 
1Peter3:20 che ki ma kogase iit eng' tai, ye kiganyei muitaetap Kamuktaindet eng' peetuusyegap Noah, ye ki ngeyaei moinget, ne ki kisaruunee che ng'ering' eng' peek, chooto ko ki piik sisiit:" 
1Peter3:21 kergeindap tuguuchuuto ko kabatisanet, ne sarwok agine eng' peetuusyechu, ma keele istoetap simdap poorto, ago waluunetap kabwaatet ne myee ne tokyingei Kamuktaindet, eng' ng'eetyeetap Jeso Kristo;" 
1Peter3:22 ne kikwa kipsengwet ak komi eutap tai ne po Kamuktaindet; ak ki kiyai malaikaisyek ak pounatosyek ak kimnatosyek kogas iit ineendet. 
1Peter4:1 Nooto anyun ko uu ye kinyalil Kristo eng' poorto, ogermenge anyun eng' kabwaatonooto; amu ki kityaach eng' tengekto ineendet ne kinyalil eng' poorto;" 
1Peter4:2 si ko mata osapche eng' poorto eng' peetuusyekwok che ng'etunotiin eng' maguutik che yaach che po piik, ago si osapche eng' mageetap Kamuktaindet." 
1Peter4:3 Amu ki koyam peetuusyek che ki kosiirto kosulda mageetap Pororyosyek, ye ki obendoti eng' maguutik che yaacheen, ak kasetap myat, pogitatet, ak waseetapkei, eiseet ak saaetap kanamonik che etei ng'atuutik:" 
1Peter4:4 tuguuk che keerei icheek kole kwong'eet amu morwochini osubi kimargatinooto kobooto icheek, si komwaitaenak yaityo:" 
1Peter4:5 che tuun tetyin ng'aleek ineendet ne choboot korwookyi che saptos ak che ki kobek. 
1Peter4:6 Amu niito ko ki kiamji logoiywek che myach agot che ki kobek, si kobiit kirwookyi eng' poorto ko uu ye kirwookyin piik, ago si kosapcho eng' saboon ko uu ye sabei Kamuktaindet." 
1Peter4:7 Ago kagoriik kagesunetap tuguuk tugul; nooto anyun oegu che oriibegei, ak oriipse eng' saaet:" 
1Peter4:8 ne siirei tuguuk tugul ko ochamyee miising' okweegei; amu tuchei chamyet chaang'indap tengekwogik: 
1Peter4:9 otaachge okweegei eng' okweegei ama eng' kang'unyng'unyet: 
1Peter4:10 ko uu ye kigonyoor chii age tugul kagoochinet oboisyechinegei, ko uu riibiik che myachen che po chaang'indap myeeindap Kamuktaindet;" 
1Peter4:11 ngo ng'alaali chii, kong'alaal ko uu arorutigap Kamuktaindet; ngo poisyei chii, kobois eng' kimnateet ne igoochin Kamuktaindet: si kobiit kitoroor Kamuktaindet eng' tuguuk tugul eng' Jeso Kristo, ne nenyi toroornatet ak kimnateet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Chamanichu, amokwong' eng' tyemisyet ne po maat ne mi kwenung'wong', ne nyoonjinok si kobiit kotyemak ko uu ye kaityok kiy ne okwong'ee:" 
1Peter4:13 ago oboiboitu, ko uu ye oo yamdoigap nyalilwogigap Kristo; si tuun oboiboitu eng' poiboiyet ne oo eng' ng'ang'eetap liilindanyi agine." 
1Peter4:14 Ngechurok eng' kainetap Kristo, ko oboiboi; amu tebenok Kabuusetap liilindo ne Kabuusetap Kamuktaindet." 
1Peter4:15 Amat konyalil age eng' okweek amu rumin, anan ko choriin, anan ko ne yaei yaityo, anan ko chii ne indogei ng'aleegap piik alak;" 
1Peter4:16 ago nginyalil chii amu Kristyanindet, ko mat kolilaan; ingotoroor Kamuktaindet eng' kainaniito." 
1Peter4:17 Amu kagoit peetuut ne kitaune kirwooget kootap Kamuktaindet: ak ngot ketaunenech acheek, kotam nee kagesunetap icheek che ma kase iit logoiywek che myach che po Kamuktaindet?" 
1Peter4:18 Ak ngot ko pichiy kesar chii ne po imanda, ko tuun koegu nee eng' ne ma po imanda ak kiptengekyot?" 
1Peter4:19 Nooto anyun ingogoito saboonwekwak che nyalildos ko uu mageetap Kamuktaindet kogoochi eng' yaeet ne myee Yaindet ne kiyani, koriip." 
1Peter5:1 Ateechini miising' poisyek che mi kwenung'wong', aneendet ne aa poiyot ko uu icheek, ak aa paoryatap nyalilwogigap Kristo, ne kiyamdoi toroornatet ne tuun king'aanyei:" 
1Peter5:2 oyage akweetap Kamuktaindet ne miitei kwenung'wong', otononji, ama eng' pirchinet, ago oyage eng' chameet, eng' Kamuktaindet; ama eng' mageetap keljinet ne murwoon, ago oyage eng' chameet ne oo;" 
1Peter5:3 amoegu kiptainik eng' che otononjini, ago oegu kaboorunoik eng' akweet." 
1Peter5:4 Ak ye tuun took Mestowot ne oo, onyooru kuutweet ne po liilindo ne ma petei." 
1Peter5:5 Ko uu nooto ak okweek che oo mengeechen, ogas iit poisyek. Ee, ogermenge okweek tugul eng' kaming'inetapkei si kobiit oboisyechigei okweegei eng' okweegei: amu kirindoi Kamuktaindet menotik, ak kogoochin myeeindo che iming'inegei." 
1Peter5:6 Oming'inityige anyun euut ne kiim ne po Kamuktaindet, si kotoroorok ye kait peetuut;" 
1Peter5:7 otuuchi ineendet kaimutikwok tugul, amu ibwaatok miising'." 
1Peter5:8 Oriipkei, oriipse: amu wendoti punyondeng'wong' chesawilyet, ko uu ng'etundo ne pooriseni, kocheeng'ei ne amei:" 
1Peter5:9 ogirinde ineendet ko oo lumdootin eng' kayaneng'wong', ongen ole yaaksei nyalilwogik che uu chooto eng' tupchosyekwok che mi ng'wony." 
1Peter5:10 Ak ingochobok, ak kolumdak, ak kogimitok Kamuktaindet ne po myeeindo tugul, ne kiguurchok liilindanyi ne po koigeny eng' Kristo, ko kaonyalilse eng' peetuusyek che matya." 
1Peter5:11 Nenyi kimnateet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Kasirwak eng' ng'aleek tutigin, eng' eutap Silvano, tupchennyo ne kiyani, ko uu ye abwaati, amwaiwok inne, ak abaoryani ale myeeindap iman ni ne po Kamuktaindet: otononse olumdegei." 
1Peter5:13 Igatok ineendet ne miitei Babilon, ne ki kilewenok tugul; ak kogatok agine Mariko weeriinnyu." 
1Peter5:14 Ogatkei eng' ng'ututet ne po chamyet. Ingotep kaalyeet eng' okweek tugul che omite eng' Kristo. 
2Peter1:1 Simion Petero, otwogindet ak ko ne kiyooktoi ne po Jeso Kristo, asirchini icheek che ki kenyooru tugul kayaneet ne karaaran miising' eng' imandap Kamuktaindet nenyo ak ko Yetindennyo Jeso Kristo:" 
2Peter1:2 Ingotesak myeeindo ak kaalyeet eng' okweek eng' naet ne ongen Kamuktaindet ak Jeso Kiptaiyandennyo. 
2Peter1:3 Amu ki koonech `kamuktaetap Kamuktaindet tuguuk tugul che nyoljin saboondo ak kayweet ne kiywei Kamuktaindet, eng' naet ne kinae ineendet ne ki kuurech eng' toroornatennyi ak myeeindonyi." 
2Peter1:4 Ki kogoonech eng' chooto arorutik che myachen miising' ak ko eecheen inne; si kobiit oegu eng' chuuto yamdoigap atebeetap Kamuktaindet, ko kaochililye ng'emisyet ne mi ng'wony amu mageet ne ya." 
2Peter1:5 Ee, amu ng'olyoondoniito ye kaotes kagiiletapkei tugul eng' komostang'wong', otesyi `myeeindo kayaneng'wong'; ak otesyi `naet myeeindo;" 
2Peter1:6 ak otesyi `riibetapkei naet; ak otesyi `muitaet riibetapkei; ak otesyi `kayweetap Kamuktaindet muitaet; 
2Peter1:7 ak otesyi `chametap tupchosyek kayweetap Kamuktaindet; ak otesyi `chamyet chametap tupchosyek. 
2Peter1:8 Amu ngot ko miitei eng' okweek tuguuchuuto ak ko tesatin, koyaak si mochorirense anan ko che ma iyei logoek eng' naetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo." 
2Peter1:9 Amu ineendet ne ma tinyei tuguuchuuto, ko kipkoraatyat ak kogeerei kiit ne mi ole neegit kityo ak koutye katiliilet eng' tengekwogikyik che po keny." 
2Peter1:10 Eng' nooto anyun che kitupche, ogiilgei miising' inne, oyai kuurseng'wong' ak leweneng'wong' kogiimit, amu ngot oyai tuguuchuuto koma koi obutye matiny." 
2Peter1:11 Amu ki koonok ko uu nooto eng' chaang'indo ochut laitornatetap koigeny ne po Kiptaiyandennyo ak ko Yetindet Jeso Kristo. 
2Peter1:12 Nooto anyun achobegei kotugul abwaatwok tuguuchuuto, agot ngo ngen chooto, ak oo lumdootin eng' imanit ne otinye." 
2Peter1:13 Ak abwaati ale myee kota ami eng' poori, ang'eetak eng' kabwaatet ne abwaatwok;" 
2Peter1:14 angen ale nyoonei kochogu metoetap poortanyu, ko uu ye kiga mwaiwo Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo." 
2Peter1:15 Ee, agiiligei si ye tuun kaamei, omuuch obwaat tuguuchu tugul eng' poroindo age tugul." 
2Peter1:16 Ma kisup atindonik che ki kichobei eng' ng'omnateet ye ki ngemwaiwok kimnateet ak nyonunetap Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo, ago ki kibaorinigap etunatennyi ne ki kigeer," 
2Peter1:17 amu kitaach teegisto ak toroornatet eng' Kamuktaindet Kwanda, ye ki nyoonji ineendet kutit ne ki punu liilindo ne po etunateet kole, Ni ko Weeriinnyu chamanennyu, ineendet ne agasegei miising':" 
2Peter1:18 ak ki kigas kutiniito kobunu kipsengwet, ye ki kimi kobooto ineendet eng' tulweet ne tiliil." 
2Peter1:19 Ak ki tinyei ng'olyootap maonateet ne po iman inne; ne oyae ne myee ye oriip, ko uu tait ne ikweng'sei eng' ole imen, kot koeech, ak kochorchi mugulelwekwok taboiyatap karon:" 
2Peter1:20 ye kaonai ni korook, ole ma mi maonateetap siruutik ne ibooru chiito ineegei kaguiyennyi." 
2Peter1:21 Amu ma mi maonateet ne ki kobiit eng' mageetap chii: ago ki ng'alaaldos piik eng' Kamuktaindet, kondochin Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
2Peter2:1 Ago ki piit maotik che po lembech ak icheek eng' kwenutap piik, ko uu ye ta kobiitu agine eng' kwenung'wong' kaneetigap lembech, che ibu eng' ung'oot pcheutigap ng'emisyet, koesyoi agot Kiptaiyat ne ki al icheek, kochokyin koipchingei ng'emisyet." 
2Peter2:2 Ak isubi piik che chaang' maguutikwak che yaacheen; kimwaitoe ne ya ooreetap imanit agobo icheek. 
2Peter2:3 Ak kocheeng'jingei poroteet eng' okweek eng' ng'aleegap ng'aalseet amu kasennywa ne po myat: che ma igaegei kirwoogennywa kobooch keny, ama ruei ng'emisyennywa." 
2Peter2:4 Amu ngot ko ki ma riiree `Kamuktaindet malaikaisyek ye kingo yai tengekto, ago ki toorchi ole kanyee kirwooget, ak konde keriingonik che po mesundeito keriip kot koit kirwooget;" 
2Peter2:5 ak ngot ko ki ma riiree `inee ng'wonyut ne po keny, ago nganda ki riip Noah, amdoindet ne po imanda, ak piik alak tisap ye kingo ipchi maraneet ng'wonyutap piik che ma iywei Kamuktaindet;" 
2Peter2:6 ak ngot ko kigabui ak kowal nganasoogap Sodom ak Gomorah koek oreek si koek kaboorunet eng' icheek che ta kotebyei koma iywei Kamuktaindet; 
2Peter2:7 ak ngot ko ki sar Lot, chiitap imanda, ne kinyaliili miising' amu atebosyek che yaacheen che po kiptengeginik," 
2Peter2:8 (amu ye ki menyei chiichooto po imanda kwenunnywa, kogeerei ak kogasei, kous muguleldanyi ne po imanda peetuut age tugul poisyosyegap ngelelnateet)," 
2Peter2:9 ko ingen anyun Kiptaiyat kosar eng' yoomseet che iywei Kamuktaindet ak koriip che ma po imanda kot koit peetuutap kirwooget, si tuun kirwookyi." 
2Peter2:10 Ago eng' mageetap murwoonindo ak kosasei pounateet. Che koroomen, che isubi maguutikwak che ma potandos ye chubei che torooreen." 
2Peter2:11 Agot nganda siirtoot malaikaisyek, che siirei miising' eng' kimnateet ak kamuktaet, koma ipchin icheek kirwoogetap chubisyet konyo taitap Kiptaiyat." 
2Peter2:12 Ago pichuuto ma tinyei ng'omnateet, che ki kisich kityo ko uu tyong'ik si kenamei ak kebarei, che chubisyei eng' ng'aleek che ma ingen, ko tuun king'emei iman eng' ng'emisyennywa," 
2Peter2:13 che nyooru nyalilda, nooto ko melektap yaityet; che iiti kole poiboiyet ye pogitos peet, perutik ak tisonok, che iboiboigei eng' igoorwekwak che po chamyet, ye oamisye tugul;" 
2Peter2:14 piik che tinyei koonyek che nyiitootiin ibeetapkei, amaimuuchi kometo tengekto; che ichuuti saboonwek che ma tononiotiin; che tinyei mugulelwek che ki konetkei kasetap myat; lagogap chubeet;" 
2Peter2:15 kingo pagaakta ooreetap iman, koba komasta, koosup ooreetap Balaam ne po kap Beor ne ki cham melektap yaityet;" 
2Peter2:16 ago ki kigergong' amu pistoennyi; ki ng'alaal sigiryet ne namaat kuut eng' kutitap chii ak koraany iywegap maotyondonooto. 
2Peter2:17 Chuuto kondametusyek che ma tinyei peek, ak ko poolik che ibooti usoonet; che ki kigonorchi tuindap mesundeito." 
2Peter2:18 Amu, ye mwaei ng'aleek che koroomen che po lasetapkei, kochuutu eng' magutigap poorto, ak eng' mageet ne ya, piik che katoi kochililyo eng' icheek che mi eng' keniisyet:" 
2Peter2:19 koarorchin icheek katyaget, ago icheeget ko otwogigap ng'emisyet; amu ineendet ne iterteeri chiito age, koyaei chiichooto koek otwogindet."
