2Peter2:20 Amu ye kagochiliilye murwoonindap ng'wony eng' naet ne naei Kiptaiyat ak ko Yetindet Jeso Kristo, ko ngot kota koratkei kogeny ak tuguuchooto ak kiterteer, koyaitu atebeennywa ne po let kosiir ne po tai." 
2Peter2:21 Amu kita kaigai eng' icheek koma nai ooreetap imanda, kosiir, ye kingo nai, koweektagei let eng' ng'atuutyet ne tiliil ne kiga kigoochi." 
2Peter2:22 Ki koyaak eng' icheeget ko uu ye mwaei kalewenetap iman, kole, Weekyingei seset kang'undaikyik, ak kwo komildaegei ng'atateek kogeny toret ne kagagiun." 
2Peter3:1 Chamanichu, parwaani asirwok nguno ko ne po aeng', ak eng' tuwai ang'eeti kabwaatutikwok che ma tinyei keniisyet ye agoonok obwaat;" 
2Peter3:2 si obwaat ng'aleek che ki mwa maotik che tiliileen eng' tai, ak ng'atuutyetap Kiptaiyat ak ko Yetindet eng' piikwok che kiyooktoi:" 
2Peter3:3 korook, ongen ole tuun pwoonei chombilik ak chombilisyet eng' peetuusyek che po let, che isubi maguutikwak," 
2Peter3:4 ak komwaei koleen, Mi ano arorutyetap nyonunennyi? Amu, kobooch ye kingo ruiyo kwanisyekyok, komi tuguuk tugul ko uu kiit ne ki uu kobooch taunetap yaetap ng'wony." 
2Peter3:5 Amu kwetyin icheegei koutye kole ki mi kipsengwet kobooch keny, ak ng'wony ne ki kiyai eng' peek ak komi kwenutap peek, eng' ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet;" 
2Peter3:6 kimaranee peechooto ng'wonyut ne ki po peetuusyechooto, ak kilus:" 
2Peter3:7 ago kipsengwet ak ng'wonyut che po nguno, ko ki kigonorchi maat eng' ng'olyoondonooto, kogonor agoi peetuutap kirwooget ak ng'emisyetap piik che ma iywei Kamuktaindet." 
2Peter3:8 Ago amoutye ng'olyoondoni, chamanichu, ole peetuut agenge eng' Kiptaiyat ko kergei ak kenyiisyek eliphuut, ak ko kergei kenyiisyek eliphuut ak peetuut agenge." 
2Peter3:9 Ma igaegei Kiptaiyat eng' arorutyennyi, ko uu ye iiti alak kagaetapkei; ago muitoi agobo okweek, ma machei kolus chii age tugul, ago machei kobwonji tugul siguunet." 
2Peter3:10 Ago tuun nyoonei peetuutap Kiptaiyat ko uu choriin; ne siirtoe kipsengwet eng' cheet ne oo, ak kochootyo tuguuk tugul che ki kiyae ng'wony ak parak eng' maat ne koroom, ak kolal ng'wonyut ak poisyonik che mi." 
2Peter3:11 Amu tuun chotoos tuguuchuuto tugul ko uu niito, ko nyolu oegu piik che uu nee eng' atebeet ne tiliil ak kayweetap Kamuktaindet," 
2Peter3:12 ogeni nyonunetap peetuutap Kamuktaindet, ak ogiili, amu nooto anyun chotoos kipsengwet eng' maat, ak kochootyo tuguuk tugul che ki kiyae parak eng' maat ne koroom?" 
2Peter3:13 Ago, kigeni kipsengwet ne leel ak ng'wonyut ne leel ko uu arorutyennyi, ole menyei imanda." 
2Peter3:14 Nooto anyun, chamanichu, amu ogeni tuguuchooto, ogiilgei si tuun kenyoorwok omi eng' kaalyeet ko motinye tisya amotinye leluut eng' tainnyi." 
2Peter3:15 Ak oiit ole muitaetap Kiptaiyandennyo ko yetunet; ko uu ye kisirwak agine Paulo, tupchennyo ne kechame, ko uu utaatyet ne ki kigoochi;" 
2Peter3:16 ko uu eng' paronokyik tugul ak icheek, kong'alaal agobo tuguuchuuto eng' paronochooto; ole mi tuguuk alak che uueen kiguiyo, che igunuuri che ma ingen kiy, ak che ma tononiotiin, ko uu ye itoi siruutik chuun alak, kot koit ng'emisyennywa." 
2Peter3:17 Ko okweek anyun, chamanichu, amu kaosip onai tuguuchuuto, oriipkei, si ma ichuutok kachiliiletap pistoik, ak obutye eng' tononeng'wong'." 
2Peter3:18 Ago oneryee eng' myeeindo ak naet ne po Kiptaiyandennyo ak ko Yetindennyo Jeso Kristo. Nenyi toroornatet nguno agoi koigeny. Amen.

3John1:14 ago amang'u ageerin ko neegit, ak keng'alaal togoch eng' togoch." 
3John1:15 Ingotep kaalyeet kobooten. Igatin choronok. Igat choronok eng' kainaikwak. 
3John1:15 Ingotep kaalyeet kobooten. Igatin choronok. Igat choronok eng' kainaikwak. 
Jude1:1 Judah, otwogindetap Jeso Kristo, ak ko tupchetap Jakobo, asirchini che ki keguur, che chamaatiin eng' Kamuktaindet Kwanda, ak ko riibootin agobo Jeso Kristo:" 
Jude1:2 Ingotesak rireenet eng' okweek ak kaalyeet ak chamyet. 
Jude1:3 Chamanichu, ye ki agiiligei miising' asirwak agobo yetunet ne kiyamdoi, ageer ale nyoljino asirwak ateiywok ale ogiiljige miising' kayaneet ne ki kigoochi che tiliileen konyil agenge kityo." 
Jude1:4 Amu mi piik alak che ki chut oriit eng' ung'oot, icheek che ki kichopchi kirwoogoni kobooch keny, piik che ma iywei Kamuktaindet, che walei myeeindap Kamuktaindet nenyo koek mageet ne ya, ak koesyoi Laitoryandennyo, ne ineegei, ak ko Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo." 
Jude1:5 Amache anyun abwaatwok, agot nganda ki onai komyee tuguuchu tugul, ale kingo sar `Kiptaiyat piik komong' eng' emetap Misiri, eng' let kobar icheek che ki ma iyan." 
Jude1:6 Ak ki inde malaikaisyek che ki ma riip pounatennywa, ago ki pagaakta meng'ooteet ne ki nenywa, ki inde kotebee ratisyosyek che po koigeny eng' mesundeito kot koit kirwooget eng' Peetuut ne oo." 
Jude1:7 Ko uu nooto, agot Sodom ak Gomorah, ak nganasook che kiga yiem, kingo kagogoochigei sokseet, ko uu chuuto, koba koosup poorwek che ma kergei ak chechwaak, ko ki kinde koek kaboorunetap chooto nyalili konyooru kergong'yetap maat ne po koigeny." 
Jude1:8 Imurwoni ak icheek chuuto ko uu nooto poorwek eng' karwotitaosyekwak, ak kosasei kiptainateet, ak kochubei che torooreen." 
Jude1:9 Ago ye kingo paregei Mikael, malaikaiyat ne oo, ak chesawilyet, kotiitos agobo muustap Musa, koma kany koipchi ineendet kirwoogetap chubeet, ago ki le, Ingogerin kong' Kiptaiyat." 
Jude1:10 Ago chubei pichu tuguuk alak tugul agot che ma ingen; ak tuguuk che kiguitos icheegei ko uu piteennywa, ko uu tyong'ik che ma tinyei ng'omnateet, king'emei eng' tuguuchuuto." 
Jude1:11 Pwo eng' icheek! Amu ki isup ooreetap Kain, ak kogoochigei mastaetap Balaam komach melekto, ak kilusyo eng' ngelelnatetap Kora." 
Jude1:12 Pichuuto ko rwandosyek che ung'ootiin eng' igoorwekwok che po chamyet ye oamisyei tugul, mestoweek che amisyei icheegei ama iyweisyei. Icheek ko poolik che ma tinyei peek, che ibooti usoonaik; keetiik che ma tinyei logoek, che ki kobek konyil aeng', che ki kitut ak tigitik;" 
Jude1:13 mildaetapkei ne koroom ne po nyanjet; che igutu kalilanennywa; kecheik che ombenioti, che ki kigonorchi tuindap mesundeito ne po koigeny." 
Jude1:14 Ki maoten Enok agine, chiito ne po tisap kobooch Adam, koamdochi pichu kole, Ogeero, ki nyo Kiptaiyat kobooto piikyik che tiliileen eliphuusyek ng'iisyat," 
Jude1:15 konyo koyachi kirwooget tugul, ak korwookyi tugul che ma iywei Kamuktaindet eng' poisyonikwak tugul che yaacheen che ki koyai koma iywei Kamuktaindet, ak ng'aleekwak tugul che uueen che ki mwa kiptengeginik che ma iywei Kamuktaindet agobo ineendet." 
Jude1:16 Chuuto ko che ing'unyng'ung'dos, kiptiyotinik, che isubi maguutikwak che yaacheen (ak komwaei kutusweekwak ng'aleek che koroomen che po menoteet), che tiytiy piik si konyoor kelunet." 
Jude1:17 Ago okweek, chamanichu, obwaat ng'aleek che ki komwa eng' tai che kiyooktoi che po Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo;" 
Jude1:18 ko uu ye kimwaiwok kole, “Tuun piitu chombilik eng' peetuusyegap let, che isubi maguutikwak che yaacheen che ma po kayweetap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Jude1:19 Chuuto che ibu kabesyosyek, che isubi poorwek, che ma tinyei Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Jude1:20 Ago okweek, chamanichu, ogimiitkei eng' kayaneng'wong' ne tiliil miising', ak osaae eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil." 
Jude1:21 Oriipkei eng' chamyetap Kamuktaindet, ogeni rireenetapkei ne po Kiptaiyandennyo Jeso Kristo kot koit saboondap koigeny." 
Jude1:22 Oriree alak che tinyei saget; 
Jude1:23 osaru alak ye ong'usu komong' eng' maat; ak oriree alak eng' kaiyweisyet; ye oweche agot ngoryeet ne kagomurwoniit eng' poorto. 
Jude1:24 Ingobunji anyun nguno ineendet ne imuuchi koriibok si mobutye, ak kondeak taitap toroornatennyi eng' poiboiyet ne oo ko motinye tisya," 
Jude1:25 kobunji Kamuktaindet ne ineegei ne Yetindennyo, eng' Jeso Kristo Kiptaiyandennyo, toroornatet, etunateet, pounateet ak kimnateet, kobooch keny, nguno ak agoi koigeny. Amen." 
Revelation1:1 Ng'ang'utyet ne po Jeso Kristo, ne ki igoochi Kamuktaindet ineendet koboorchi otwogikyik tuguuk che piitu kochogu ne matiny. Ki iyook `ineendet malaikaiyandennyi kole koboorchi kiboityondennyi Johana," 
Revelation1:2 ne ki paoryan agobo tuguuk tugul che ki keer, nooto ko ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ak paornateetap Jeso Kristo." 
Revelation1:3 Paibai ineendet ne somani, ak icheek che kasei ng'aleegap maonatoni ak koriibei tuguuk che ki kisir eng' maonatoniito, amu kagoriik peetuut." 
Revelation1:4 Sirchin Johana kanisosyek tisap che mi Asia: Ingotep myeeindo ak kaalyeet kobootok che punu ineendet ne mi, ne ki mi ak ne tuun nyoonei; ak che punu saboonwek tisap che mi taitap ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet," 
Revelation1:5 ak che punu Jeso Kristo, paoryat ne po iman, taita ne po che ki kobek ak ko pounindetap laitorinigap ng'wony. Ingobunji ineendet ne chamech ak ne kiityaachech eng' tengekwogikyok eng' korotiikyik," 
Revelation1:6 ak koyaech keegu laitornatet, tisiik che poisyechin Kamuktaindet nenyi ak ko Kwanda; nenyi toroonatet ak kimnateet koigeny ak koigeny. Amen." 
Revelation1:7 Ogeero! Nyoonei kobooto poolik; ak tuun keerei ineendet konda age tugul, kobooto icheek che kiga toor ineendet; ak koteiyo pororyosyek tugul che po ng'wony amu ineendet. Ee, uu nooto! Amen." 
Revelation1:8 “Anee ko aa Alpha ak ko aa Omega,” mwaei Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet, Ne po Kamuktaet, ne mi ak ko ki mi ak ko tuun nyoonei." 
Revelation1:9 Aa Johana, tupcheng'wong' ak ko aa ne kiyamdoi tugul nyalilda ak laitornatet ak muitaet eng' Jeso, ki ami emet ne ki ikween peek ne kiguure Patmo amu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet ak paornateetap Jeso." 
Revelation1:10 Ki ami eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' peetuutap Kiptaiyat, ak ki agas kutit ne oo eng' patennyu ko uu ne po iryageet" 
Revelation1:11 koleen, “Sirchi bukuit tuguuk che igeere ak iyookyi kanisosyek tisap; iyookyi Epheso, ak Smyrna, ak Pergamo, ak Thyatira, ak Sardis, ak Philadephia, ak Laodikia.”" 
Revelation1:12 Ak ki awelelgei ale ageer kuutinooto ki ng'alaalwo. Ak kingo kaawelelgei ageer keelyek tisap che po taisyek che po thahabu; 
Revelation1:13 ak eng' kwenutap kelyechooto po taisyek ageer chiito ne kergei ak weeriitap chii, kolaachi ngoryeet ne itei keelyek ak koratategei pireneetap thahabu eng' tegeet." 
Revelation1:14 Ak ki leel metinnyi ak ki leelach suumeekyik ko uu koroorik che leelachen, ko uu teluji; ak ki uu konyekyik liplibenetap maat;" 
Revelation1:15 ak ki uu keelyekyik sugunwet ne sitaat miising', ko uu ne ki kitiliil eng' maat, ak ki uu tuugeennyi cheetap peek che chaang'." 
Revelation1:16 Ki tinyei kecheik tisap eng' eunnyi ne po tai, ak ki mang'une kutinnyi rotwetap chok ne ng'atiben komoswek tuwai. Ki uu togeennyi asiista ne iluu eng' kimnateennyi." 
Revelation1:17 Kinga keer ineendet, abutyi keelyekyik ko uu chiito ne kagome. Ago ki igonoora eunnyi ne po tai, ak kole, “Meiywei! Aneendet ko aa ne po tai ak ne po let." 
Revelation1:18 Aa ne Sabei; kiga amei, ago keero, asabe koigeny ak koigeny; ak atinye yaateiwegap meet ak che po ye mi che ki kobek." 
Revelation1:19 Sir anyun tuguuk che kaigeer, ak tuguuk che miitei, ak tuguuk che tuun piitu eng' let." 
Revelation1:20 Ung'ootyetap kecheik tisap che kegeer eng' eunnyu ne po tai, ak keelyek tisap che po taisyek che po thahabu ko uu ni: kecheichooto tisap ko malaikaisyegap kanisosyek tisap: ak kelyechooto tisap po taisyek ko kanisosyek tisap." 
Revelation2:1 “Sirchi malaikaiyat ne po kaniset ne mi Epheso, ileenji: “Mwaei tuguuchu ineendet ne namei kecheik tisap eng' eunnyi ne po tai, ineendet ne wendote kwenutap keelyek tisap che po taisyek che po thahabu:" 
Revelation2:2 Angen poisyoniguk, ak poisyeng'ung' ne nyigiis ak muitaeng'ung'. Angen ale memuuchi imuite agobo piik che yaacheen, ak kiityem icheek che kuuregei che kiyooktoi ago ma chooto, ak ki inai ile kiplembechonik." 
Revelation2:3 Angen kora ale itinye muitaet ak ki imuite agobo kainennyu, ak meng'ete." 
Revelation2:4 Ago ating'enen ng'olyoo: ale ki imete chamyeng'ung' ne po tai. 
Revelation2:5 Ibwaat anyun ole ki ibute, ak isigu, ak iyai poisyonik che po tai. Ngot ko mesigu, anyoonjin ak anemu keldap taing'ung' eng' komostanyi." 
Revelation2:6 Ago itinye ni: ale iweche poisyonigap Nikolaitik, che aweche agane." 
Revelation2:7 “Ineendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kiit ne mwachin Kabuuset ne Tiliil kanisosyek. Ineendet ne iterteeri, agoochini koam che po keetitap saboondo ne mi Paradiso ne po Kamuktaindet." 
Revelation2:8 “Ak isirchi malaikaiyatap kaniset ne mi Smyrna, ileenji: “Mwaei tuguuchu ineendet ne po tai ak ko ne po let, ne kime ak kosap kogeny:" 
Revelation2:9 “Angen nyalildang'ung' ak panandang'ung' nganda ii mogoryo. Angen chombilisyetap icheek che mwaei kole ki Yahudik, nga icheek ko sinagogitap Setani." 
Revelation2:10 Ameiywei nyalilwogik che neegit inyooru. Machei chesawilyet kotoorchi korgoreet alak eng' okweek si kobiit ketyemak; ak osich nyalilda eng' peetuusyek taman. Egu ne kiyani agoi meet, si agoonin kuutweet ne po saboondo." 
Revelation2:11 “Ineendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kiit ne mwachin Kabuuset ne Tiliil kanisosyek. Ineendet ne iterteeri koma nyooru ng'wanindo eng' meet ne po aeng'." 
Revelation2:12 “Ak isirchi malaikaiyatap kaniset ne mi Pergamo, ileenji: “Mwaei tuguuchu ineendet ne tinyei rotwetap chok ne ng'atiben komoswek tuwai:" 
Revelation2:13 “Angen ole imenye, ole mi ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Setani. Iname kainennyu miising', ama ieesye kayanennyu, agot eng' peetuusyegap Antipa paoryandennyu, nenyu ne po iman, ne ki kibar eng' kwenung'wong', ole menyei Setani." 
Revelation2:14 Ago ating'enen ng'aleek tutigin: itinye alak eng' olooto che isubi kaneetisyetap Balaam, ne ki ineet Balak konde kanagutyet taitap piigap Israel, si koam tuguuk che kigoochin kanamonik ak kosokso." 
Revelation2:15 Itinye aginye ko uu nooto alak che isubi kaneetisyetap Nikolaitik. 
Revelation2:16 Sigu anyun! Ngo ma uu nooto, anyoonjin achogu, ak anyoo aborye icheek eng' rotwetap chok ne po kutinnyu." 
Revelation2:17 “Ineendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kiit ne mwachin Kabuuset ne Tiliil kanisosyek. Ineendet ne iterteeri, agoochini che po mana che ung'ootiin, ak agoochi koita ne leel, ak ki kisirchi koyata kainet ne leel, ne ma ingen chii kobatee ineendet ne taachei." 
Revelation2:18 “Ak isirchi malaikaiyatap kaniset ne mi Thyatira, ileenji: “Mwaei tuguuchu Weeriitap Kamuktaindet, ne tinyei koonyek che uu liplibenetap maat, ak ko uu keelyekyik sugunwet ne sitaat." 
Revelation2:19 “Angen poisyoniguk, angen chamyeng'ung' ak kayaneng'ung', otisyeng'ung' ak muitaeng'ung', ak angen ale chaang' poisyoniguk che po let kosiir che po tai." 
Revelation2:20 Ago ating'enen ng'olyoo: ale ichamjini kobogoryot Jesebel, ne kuuregei maotyo; ak koneeti otwogikyuk ak kogoigoi kosokso, ak koam tuguuk che kigoochin kanamonik." 
Revelation2:21 Ki agoochi ineendet poroindo ale si kosik; ago ma chamei kosik eng' soksennyi. 
Revelation2:22 Ogeero, awirchini itoogut, ak icheek che ibegei kobooto ineendet koba nyalilda ne oo, ngot ko masik eng' poisyonikyik." 
Revelation2:23 Abare lagokyik meet; si konai kanisosyek tugul kole aneendet ne isyachi kabwaatutik ak mugulelwek, ak agoochini age tugul eng' okweek ko uu poisyonikwok." 
Revelation2:24 “Ago amwaiwok okweek che oo ng'etunotiin eng' Thyatira, tugul che ma tinyei kaneetisyoni, che ma ingen tuguuk che po oriit che po Setani, ko uu ye mwaei icheek; ale ma andook mileet age." 
Revelation2:25 Ago onam miising' nooto otinye kot aitu. 
Revelation2:26 “Ak ineendet ne iterteeri, ak koriibei poisyonikyuk agoi kagesunet, kotun agoochini kimnateet koboi pororyosyek:" 
Revelation2:27 ak koboi eng' koroktap karnet; ko uu ye kituei tereenigap cheptereniot komengegitu; 
Revelation2:28 ko uu ye ki ataach agane eng' Abba. Agoochini ineendet taboiyat ne po karon. 
Revelation2:29 “Ineendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kiit ne mwachin Kabuuset ne Tiliil kanisosyek." 
Revelation3:1 “Ak isirchi malaikaiyatap kaniset ne mi Sardis, ileenji: Mwaei tuguuchu ineendet ne tinyei saboonwek tisap che po Kamuktaindet ak kecheik tisap: Angen poisyoniguk, angen ale itinye kainet keele isabe, ago kaimei." 
Revelation3:2 Ng'eet! Igimiit tuguuk che ng'etunotiin, che machei kobek, amu tomo anyooru poisyoniguk che ki kosulda eng' taitap Kamuktaindet nenyu." 
Revelation3:3 Ibwaat anyun nooto kiitaach ak ki igas; iriip, ak isigu. Ngot ko meriipse anyun, anyoone ko uu choriindet, amenae sait ne anyoonjinenen." 
Revelation3:4 Ago itinye kainaik che ng'ering' eng' Sardis che ma imurwon ngoroikwak. Tuun pendoti icheek kobooto kolaagoti ngoroik che leelach; amu nyolu icheek. 
Revelation3:5 “Ineendet ne iterteeri kotun kilaakyin ko uu nooto ngoroik che leelach; ak ma koi abuch kainennyi eng' bukuitap saboondo, ago ang'aanye kainennyi eng' taitap Abba ak eng' taitap malaikaisyekyik." 
Revelation3:6 “Ineendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kiit ne mwachin Kabuuset ne Tiliil kanisosyek." 
Revelation3:7 “Ak isirchi malaikaiyatap kaniset ne mi eng' Philadephia, ileenji: Mwaei tuguuchu ineendet ne tiliil, ineendet ne po iman, ineendet ne tinyei yaateiwotap Daudi, ineendet ne yaatei, ama kerei chii, ak ne kerei, ama yaatei chii." 
Revelation3:8 Angen poisyoniguk. Keero, kaande taing'ung' kurgeet ne yaataat, ne ma imuuchi chii koger. Angen ale itinye kimnateet ne ming'in, ak ki iriip ng'olyoondennyu, ama ieesye kainennyu." 
Revelation3:9 Agoochini che po sinagogitap Setani, icheeget che mwaei kole ki Yahudik, ago ma icheek, kenu, keero, agoochini icheek kobwa kogutuny eng' keelyeguk, ak konai kole ki achamin." 
Revelation3:10 Amu ki iriip ng'olyootap muitaennyu, ariibin agane eng' saitap yoomseet ne nyoonjin ng'wony komugul, si kotyem icheek che menyei ng'wony." 
Revelation3:11 Anyoone achogu; nam miising' nooto itinye, si ma rebenen chii kuutweeng'ung'." 
Revelation3:12 “Ineendet ne iterteeri, ayae koek toloita eng' Hekaluut ne po Kamuktaindet nenyu, ama komandoi saang' kogeny. Asirchini ineendet kainetap Kamuktaindet nenyu, ak kainetap nganaseetap Kamuktaindet nenyu, nooto Jerusalem ne leel, ne choorugei eng' kipsengwet kobunu Kamuktaindet nenyu, ak kainennyu ne leel." 
Revelation3:13 “Ineendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kiit ne mwachin Kabuuset ne Tiliil kanisosyek." 
Revelation3:14 “Ak isirchi malaikaiyatap kaniset ne mi Laodikia, ileenji: “Mwaei tuguuchu ineendet ne Amen, paoryat ne kiyani ak ko po iman, taunetap yaetap Kamuktaindet:" 
Revelation3:15 “Angen poisyoniguk, ale ma ii kaitit ametinye maat; kata achame nda ka ii kaitit anan itinye maat." 
Revelation3:16 Nooto anyun amu ii lalang', ametinye maat anan kaititindo, ang'ung'doin eng' kutinnyu." 
Revelation3:17 Imwae ileen, ‘Aa mogoryo, ak ki asich mogornateet, ama abanani kiy.’ Mengen ile ii chiito ne ii kimnyalilyat ak itinye riirek ak ko ii kibananiat ak ko ii kipkoraatyat ak imi aach ngor." 
Revelation3:18 Atigoonin anyun ale ialena thahabu ne ki kitiliile maat, si iegu mogoryot; ak ngoroik che leelach, si ilaaige, si ma took kalilanetap aach ngoring'ung'; ak kerichegap koonyek che iilee konyeguk si igeerte." 
Revelation3:19 Agere kong' tugul che achame ak atigooni. Igiilgei anyun, ak isigu." 
Revelation3:20 Keero, atononi eng' kurgeet ak agongonyi; ngo kas chii kutinnyu ak koyaat kurgeet, awendi ole mi ineendet ak aamisye kobooto ineendet, ak koamis ineendet kobooto." 
Revelation3:21 “Ineendet ne iterteeri, kotun agoochini kotebi kobooto eng' ng'echerennyu ne po laitornatet, ko uu ye ki aterteer agane ak ketebi ak Abba eng' ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet." 
Revelation3:22 “Ineendet ne tinyei itit, kogas kiit ne mwachin Kabuuset ne Tiliil kanisosyek.”" 
Revelation4:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu, ageer, ak ki yaatak kurgeet eng' kipsengwet. Ak kutit ne po tai ne ki agas ko ki uu ne po iryageet, ne ki ng'alaalwo kole, “Togosu oli, si aboorun tuguuk che tuun piitu eng' let matiny.”" 
Revelation4:2 Ak ki ami anyun eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil eng' yooto, ak ogeero, ki mi kipsengwet ng'echereetap laitornatet, ak kitebee chiito ng'echeranooto." 
Revelation4:3 Ak ineendet ne kitebyei kogingegeerei ko uu koitap jasipi ak sardio. Ki mi chepkuinobor ne kiyiem ng'echereetap laitornatet, ne ki ngegeerei ko uu sumaragdo." 
Revelation4:4 Kiyiem ng'echeranooto po laitornatet, ng'echerok tiptemu ak ang'wan che po laitornatet ak kotebee poisyek tiptemu ak ang'wan ng'echerochooto. Ki ilaachi ngoroik che leelachen ak kotinyei eng' metowekwak kutonook che po thahabu." 
Revelation4:5 Ak mang'une ng'echeranooto kalyeleet ak kutusweek ak tuloosyek. Ak kilaldos taisyek tisabu che po mastinwek eng' taitap ng'echeranooto po laitornatet, chooto ko saboonwek tisap che po Kamuktaindet." 
Revelation4:6 Ak ki uu taitap ng'echeranooto po laitornatet, nyanjet ne po klasit, ne uu krustalo. Eng' kwenutap ng'echeranooto po laitornatet, ko kiyiem komuut komoswek tugul tuguuk ang'wanu che saptos che nyiitootiin koonyek tai ak let." 
Revelation4:7 Ak ki kergei tyondo ne po tai ak ng'etundo, ne po aeng' ko ki kergei ak moita, ne po somok ko ki tinyei togeet ne uu ne po chiito, ak ne po ang'wan ko ki uu kipsiichit ne tirireni." 
Revelation4:8 Ak nyiitootiin tyong'ichooto ang'wan saptos koonyek, komoswek tugul ak oriit, kotinyei age tugul kebebaik lo. Ama imuunyi icheek peet ak kemoi, komwaei koleen, “Tiliil, tiliil, tiliil, Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet, Ne po Kamuktaet, ne ki mi ak komi ak ko tuun nyoonei.”" 
Revelation4:9 Ak ye igoochi tuguuchooto saptos toroornatet ak teegisto ak kongoi ineendet ne tebee ng'echeranooto po laitornatet, ineendet ne sabei koigeny ak koigeny," 
Revelation4:10 kobutyi anyun poisyechooto tiptemu ak ang'wan taitap ineendet ne tebee ng'echeranooto po laitornatet, ak kogutung'ji ineendet ne sabei koigeny ak koigeny, ak kowiirchi ng'wony kutonokwak che po thahabu eng' taitap ng'echereet, koleen," 
Revelation4:11 “Nyoljinin, Kiptaiyandennyo ak ko Kamuktaindet nenyo, itaach toroornatet ak teegisto ak kamuktaet; amu kiitau iyae tuguuk tugul, ak ki piit amu mageng'ung' ak ki kiyai.”" 
Revelation5:1 Ki ageer eng' eutap tai ne po ineendet ne kitebee ng'echeranooto po laitornatet, bukuit ne ki kisir oriit ak patai, ne ki king'ooch kogerak eng' ng'ooksosyek tisap." 
Revelation5:2 Ak ki ageer malaikaiyat ne kiim komwaitoi eng' kutit ne oo, kole, “Ng'oo ne nyolu koyaat bukuit ak kotyach ng'ooksosyekyik?”" 
Revelation5:3 Ak ki ma komi chii kipsengwet, anan ng'wony, anan kurereet ne po ng'wony ne ki imuuchi koyaat bukuinooto, anan kogeer oriit." 
Revelation5:4 Ak ki ariir miising', amu ki ma piit chii ne nyolu koyaat bukuinooto, anan kogeer oriit." 
Revelation5:5 Ki leenjo age eng' poisyechugai, “Merire! Keero, ki koterter Ng'etundo ne po ooreetap Judah, Tigityot ne po Daudi, si kobiit koyaat bukuinooto ak ng'ooksosyechooto tisap.”" 
Revelation5:6 Ak ki ageer eng' kwenutap ng'echeranooto po laitornatet ak tyong'ichooto ang'wan saptos, ak eng' kwenutap poisyechooto, kotonone Aarwet ko uu ne kageeny, kotinyei kuinoik tisap, ak koonyek tisap, che saboonwek tisap che po Kamuktaindet, che ki kiyookto koba ng'wony komugul." 
Revelation5:7 Ki nyo ak koip bukuit eng' eutap tai ne po ineendet ne tebee ng'echeranooto po laitornatet. 
Revelation5:8 Ak ye kingo kagoip bukuinooto, kobutyi taitap Aarwet `tyong'ichooto ang'wanu saptos ak poisyechooto tiptem ak ang'wan, kotinyei age tugul ketubet, ak taabook che po thahabu che nyiitootiin nyamdutik che kebeelei, che chooto ko saautigap piik che tiliileen." 
Revelation5:9 Ak kotyeni tyendo ne leel, koleen: “Nyoljinin inam bukuit, ak iyat ng'ooksosyekyik, amu ki kibarin, ak eng' korotiguk ko ki ialji Kamuktaindet piik kobun pororyet age tugul, kutit age tugul, piik alak tugul ak emet age tugul." 
Revelation5:10 Ki iyai icheek koek pororyet ak tisiik eng' Kamuktaindet nenyo, ak tuun laitorani icheek eng' ng'wony.”" 
Revelation5:11 Ki ageer, ak agas kutitap malaikaisyek che chaang' che kaiitennywa ko ki eliphuusyek taman konyil eliphuusyek taman, ak eliphuusyek konyil eliphuusyek. Ki kayiem `icheek ng'echeranooto po laitornatet ak tyong'ichu kasaptos ak poisyechugai;" 
Revelation5:12 komwaei eng' kutit ne oo kole: “Nyoljin Aarwet ne ki kibar konyoor kimnateet, ak mogornatosyek ak utaatyet, ak kamuktaet, ak teegisto, ak toroornatet ak kaberuret.”" 
Revelation5:13 Ak ki agas kiit age tugul ne ki kiyai ne mi kipsengwet, ak ne mi ng'wony, ak ne mi kurereetap ng'wony, ak eng' nyanjet, ak tuguuk tugul che mi oriitinnywa koleen: “Ingobunji ineendet ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet ak Arwanooto, kalasunet, ak teegisto, ak toroornatet, ak pounateet, koigeny ak koigeny.”" 
Revelation5:14 Ak ki mwa tyong'ichooto ang'wanu saptos kole, “Amen!” Ak kobutyi ng'wony poisyechooto ak kolas." 
Revelation6:1 Ki ageer anyun Aarwet ye kiyaate agenge eng' ng'ooksosyechooto tisap. Ki agas age eng' tyong'ichooto ang'wan saptos komwaei eng' cheet ne uu tuleet, kole, “Nyoo!”" 
Revelation6:2 Ki ageer, ak ki mi paraisiit ne leel. Ki tinyei kwanget ineendet ne kitebee, ak ki kigoochi ineendet kuutweet, ak ki wo eng' katerteeret ak koterteeris." 
Revelation6:3 Ye kingo yaat ng'ookset ne po aeng', agas tyondo ne po aeng' ne sabei kole, “Nyoo!”" 
Revelation6:4 Ak ki mong' paraisiit age, ne piriir. Ki kigoochi ineendet ne ki tebee koisto kaalyeet kobet eng' ng'wony, si kobiit kobargei icheegei; ak ki kigoochi ineendet rotwetap chok ne oo." 
Revelation6:5 Ye kingo yaat ng'ookset ne po somok, agas tyondo ne sabei ne po somok kole, “Nyoo!” Ki ageer, ak ogeero paraisiit ne tuui! Ki tinyei ratilit eng' eunnyi ineendet ne tebee." 
Revelation6:6 Ak ki agas ne uu kutit eng' kwenutap tyong'ichooto ang'wan saptos kole, “Ki aldae kibabetap nganuuk dinarit agenge, ak ki aldae kibabok somok che po baale dinarit agenge; ameng'em mwaita ak divaik.”" 
Revelation6:7 Ye kingo yaat ng'ookset ne po ang'wan, agas kutitap tyondo ne sabei ne po ang'wan kole, “Nyoo!”" 
Revelation6:8 Ki ageer, ogeero, paraisiit ne talelyo! Ak kainetap ineendet ne ki tebee ko ki Meet, ak ki isup ineendet ye mi che ki kobek. Ak ki kigoochi icheek kimnateet koboi kebeberta agenge eng' ang'wan ne po ng'wony, kobaree rotwetap chok, ak rubeet, ak meet, ak tyong'igap timiin che po ng'wony." 
Revelation6:9 Ye kingo yaat ng'ookset ne po muut, ageer eng' kurereetap kaptisiisyo saboonwegap icheek che ki kibar amu ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet, ak paornateet ne ki tinyei." 
Revelation6:10 Ki mwa eng' kutit ne oo kole, “Tyanitu, ee Kiptaiyat, ne tiliil ak ko po iman, si irwookyi ak iyaaktoiywech mugetuut agobo korotiikyok eng' icheek che menyei ng'wony?”" 
Revelation6:11 Ki kigoochi age tugul eng' icheek ngoryeet ne leel; ak keleenji kota komuuny ne matya, kot kosulda koitetap che otwogik kobooto icheek, ak tupchosyekwak, che tuun kibarei ko uu icheeget." 
Revelation6:12 Ak ki ageer ye kingo yaat ng'ookset ne po lo, ak ki piit potanet ne oo ne po ng'wony; ak ki tuit asiista ko uu kuniet ne ki kiyae koroorik, ak ki igei arawet komugul korotiik;" 
Revelation6:13 ak kotururchigei ng'wony kecheigap parak, ko uu ye ibutos eng' mogoywet logoekyik, kotom koruryo, ye itumdumi usoonet ne oo." 
Revelation6:14 Ki kiisto kipsengwet ko uu kartasit ne kimamani, ak ki kiisto eng' komoswekwak tulweet age tugul ak emet age tugul ne ki ikween peek." 
Revelation6:15 Ak ki unygei eng' kebenonik ak eng' rwandosyek che po tuloonook, laitorinigap ng'wony, ak pounik, ak kiptainik che eecheen, ak mogoreek, ak che kiimeen, ak chii age tugul ne rataat ak chii age tugul ne ityagat." 
Revelation6:16 Ki leenji tuloonook ak rwandosyek, “Oluuljech ak ounyech eng' togeetap ineendet ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet, ak eng' nereegegap Aarwet;" 
Revelation6:17 amu kagoit peetuut ne po nereegekwak; ak ng'oo ne imuuchi kotonon?” 
Revelation7:1 Kingo pata niito ageer malaikaisyek ang'wan kotonondos eng' luukwek ang'wan che po ng'wony, konamei usoonaik ang'wan che po ng'wony, si mata kousyi usoonet ng'wony, anan nyanjet, anan keetit age tugul." 
Revelation7:2 Ak ki ageer malaikaiyat age kotogosta kobunei kong'asiis, kotinyei ng'ooksetap Kamuktaindet ne sabei. Ki mwachi ineendet eng' kutit ne oo malaikaisyek ang'wan che ki kigoochi kong'em ng'wony ak nyanjet" 
Revelation7:3 koleenji, “Among'em ng'wony, anan nyanjet, anan keetiik, kot kinde ng'ookset togoochigap otwogigap Kamuktaindet nenyo.”" 
Revelation7:4 Ak ki agas koitetap icheeget che ki king'ooch, ko ki ek eliphuusyek pogol ak artam ak ang'wan, che ki king'ooch eng' ooreet age tugul ne po piigap Israel." 
Revelation7:5 Ki king'ooch eliphuusyek taman ak aeng' che po ooreetap Judah, che po ooreetap Reuben ko eliphuusyek taman ak aeng', che po ooreetap Gad ko eliphuusyek taman ak aeng'," 
Revelation7:6 che po ooreetap Asher ko eliphuusyek taman ak aeng', che po ooreetap Naphtali ko eliphuusyek taman ak aeng', che po ooreetap Manasseh ko eliphuusyek taman ak aeng'," 
Revelation7:7 che po ooreetap Simion ko eliphuusyek taman ak aeng', che po ooreetap Lawi ko eliphuusyek taman ak aeng', che po ooreetap Issakar eliphuusyek taman ak aeng'," 
Revelation7:8 che po ooreetap Zebulun ko eliphuusyek taman ak aeng', che po ooreetap Joseph ko eliphuusyek taman ak aeng', ak che po ooreetap Benjamin ko eliphuusyek taman ak aeng'." 
Revelation7:9 Kingo pata tuguuchu, ageer tuiyet ne oo ne ki ma komuuchi chii koiit, che punu pororyet age tugul, ooreet age tugul, piik ak kutusweek, kotonondos eng' taitap ng'echereetap laitornatet ak eng' taitap Aarwet. Ki ilaachi ngoroik che leelach ak kotinyei mooriigap sosik eng' eunekwak." 
Revelation7:10 Kimwaei eng' kutit ne oo koleen, “Po Yetunet Kamuktaindet nenyo ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet, ak ko po Aarwet.”" 
Revelation7:11 Ak kitonondos malaikaisyek tugul ko kayiem ng'echereetap laitornatet ak ko kayiem poisyek ak tyong'ik ang'wan che saptos. Ki ibutyi ng'wony eng' taitap ng'echereetap laitornatet ak kolas Kamuktaindet," 
Revelation7:12 koleen, “Amen! Po Kamuktaindet nenyo kaberuret ak toroornatet, utaatyet ak kongoi ak teegisto, ak kamuktaet ak kimnateet, koigeny ak koigeny. Amen!”" 
Revelation7:13 Ak kimwaiwo age eng' poisyek, koleenjo, “Chu ilaachi ngoroik che leelachen ko ng'oo, ak kobunu ano?”" 
Revelation7:14 Ki aleenji ineendet, “Kiptaiyandennyu, ingen inyee.” Koleenjo anyun, “Chu ko icheek che punu nyalilda ne oo; ak ki komwet ngoroikwak koleelagitu eng' korotiigap Aarwet." 
Revelation7:15 Mi anyun icheek taitap ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Kamuktaindet, ak koboisyechin ineendet peet ak kemoi eng' hekalunnyi, ak koiito ineendet ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet emainnyi eng' paragunnywa." 
Revelation7:16 Ma kogasei rubeet kogeny, ama koamei melelda kogeny. Ma kobirei icheek asiista, ama kobeelei icheek maat age tugul;" 
Revelation7:17 amu egu Mestowonnywa Aarwet ne mi kwenutap ng'echereetap laitornatet, ak kondochin icheek koba kong'igap peek che saptos. Ak kouus Kamuktaindet peegap kong' alak tugul eng' konyekwak.”" 
Revelation8:1 Ye kingo yaat ng'ookset ne po tisap, kosiis kipsengwet olo po kebebertap sait." 
Revelation8:2 Ak ki ageer malaikaisyek tisap che kitonondos eng' taitap Kamuktaindet; ak ki kigoochi iryagook tisap. 
Revelation8:3 Ki nyo malaikaiyat age kotinyei tereet ne po thahabu ne kibeelee nyamdutik, konyo kotonone ole po kapkorosuut. Ki kigoochi nyamdutik che chaang' che kibeelei si kogoito kobooto saautigap che tiliileen tugul eng' kapkorosutap thahabu, ne ki mi taitap ng'echereetap laitornatet." 
Revelation8:4 Ki togosta iyetap nyamdutik che kibeelei kobooto saautigap piik che tiliileen, eng' taitap Kamuktaindet eng' eutap malaikaiyat." 
Revelation8:5 Ak ki ip malaikaiyat teronooto ak konde maatap kapkoros konyi, ak kowiirchi ng'wony; ak ki piit tuloosyek, ak kutusweek ak kalyelosyek, ak potaneetap ng'wony." 
Revelation8:6 Ak kochopkei malaikaisyek tisabu che ki tinyei iryagook tisap si koguut. 
Revelation8:7 Ki kuut malaikaiyat ne po tai, ak ki piit koigap ropta ak maat che purugotin ak korotiik, ak ki kiwiirchi ng'wony; ak ki lal kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po ng'wony, ak ki lal kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po keetiik, ak kilalyo susweek tugul che tuonen." 
Revelation8:8 Ki kuut malaikaiyatap aeng', ak ki kiwiirchi nyanjet kiit ne uu tulweet ne oo kolalei; ak ki ek korotiik kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po nyanjet." 
Revelation8:9 Kime kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po tyong'ik che kisaptos che ki mi nyanjet, ak ki king'em kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po melisyek." 
Revelation8:10 Ki kuut malaikaiyatap somok, ak kirorok kecheiyat ne oo eng' kipsengwet, kolalei ko uu tait, ak ki ibutyi kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po ainoosyek, ak kondametusyegap peek." 
Revelation8:11 Ki kiguure kainetap kecheiyandanooto Ng'wanindo. Ak king'wanit kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po peek, ak ki pek piik che chaang' eng' peechooto, amu kiga kiyai kong'woneegitu." 
Revelation8:12 Ki kuut malaikaiyatap ang'wan, ak ki kikwer kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po asiista, ak kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po arawet, ak kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po kecheik, si koimenit kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po tuguuchooto. Ak kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po peetuut koma iluu, ak koigei nooto agine kemout." 
Revelation8:13 Ak ki ageer kipsiichit kotirireni eng' kwenutap kipsengwet, ak agas koleen eng' kutit ne oo, “Pwo! Pwo! Pwo agobo icheek che menyei ng'wony, amu cheosyek alak che po iryagook che po malaikaisyek somok che ta koguutei!”" 
Revelation9:1 Ki kuut malaikaiyatap muut, ak ki ageer kecheiyat kobunu kipsengwet kobutyi ng'wony. Ak ki kigoochi ineendet yaateiwot ne po keriinget ne ma igoksei." 
Revelation9:2 Kingo yaat keriingonooto; kotogosta iyeto komang'une yooto, ne uu iyeto ne po maat ne oo miising'. Ak ki imenit asiista ak soet amu iyetap keriingonooto." 
Revelation9:3 Ak ki mang'une chereng'enyinik iyeto kobwa ng'wony; ak ki kigoochi icheek kimnateet, ko uu ye tinyei kimnateet melmelwegap ng'wony." 
Revelation9:4 Ki kimwachi icheek keleenji amat kong'em susweegap ng'wony, anan kiy age tugul ne tuon, anan ko keetit age tugul, ago pichooto icheegei che ma tinyei ng'ooksetap Kamuktaindet eng' togoochikwak." 
Revelation9:5 Ki king'at icheek ko mat kobar pichooto, ago si kobiit konyaliil icheek arawek muut. Ki uu kanyalilennywa kanyaliiletap melmeldo, ye kauut chiito." 
Revelation9:6 Ak tuun cheeng'ei piik meet eng' peetuusyechooto ago ma nyooru; ak machei kole kobek, ago mweei meet eng' icheek." 
Revelation9:7 Ki uu itoonwegap chereng'enyinichooto paraisisyek che chobootiin koba lugeet. Ak ki uu yo mi metowekwak kutonook che kergei ak thahabu, ak ki uu togoochikwak togoochigap piik." 
Revelation9:8 Ki tinyei suumeek che uu suumeegap kwonyiik ak ki uu kelekwak kelegap ng'etuunyik. 
Revelation9:9 Ak ki tinyei tuguuk che ki ilaakyi tegeet ko uu che po kariik; ak ki uu cheetap kebebaikwak cheetap chepkichutisyek, che po paraisisyek che chaang' che rwaei kobendi lugeet." 
Revelation9:10 Ak kotinyei katutaik ak katook che uu che po melmelwek, ak mi kimnateennywa katutaikwak ne inyaliile piik eng' arawek muut." 
Revelation9:11 Ki tinyei icheek laitoryat ne pou, nooto ko malaikaiyatap keriinget ne ma igoksei; ne kainennyi eng' kutitap Yahudik ko, ak eng' Yunanik ko Apollyon." 
Revelation9:12 Kagosiirto nyalilda ne po tai; ak pwanei nyalilwogik alage aeng'u. 
Revelation9:13 Ki kuut malaikaiyatap lo, ak ki agas kutit ne mang'une kuinoigap kapkorosutap thahabu ne mi taitap Kamuktaindet," 
Revelation9:14 komwachin age malaikaiyandanooto po lo, ne ki tinyei iryageet, koleenji, “Ityach malaikaisyek ang'wan che ratotiin eng' aineet ne po Yufrets.”" 
Revelation9:15 Ki kityaach anyun malaikaisyechooto ang'wan, che kiga kechop agobo sait ak peetuut ak arawet ak kenyiit, si kobar kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po piik." 
Revelation9:16 Ak ki ek koitetap lugoosyek che po piik che ketei paraisisyek million pogol aeng'; ki agas koiitennywa. 
Revelation9:17 Ki ageer eng' ng'ang'utyet paraisisyek ak icheeget che ketei, kotinyei tuguuk che kilaakyin tegetik che uu maat ak che uu huakinto ak che uu koik che laldos. Ak ki uu metowegap paraisisyek metowegap ng'etuunyik, ak komang'une kutusweekwak maat ak iyeto ak koik che laldos." 
Revelation9:18 Ak ki kibare `korotwechooto somok kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po piik, eng' maat, iyeto ak eng' koik che laldos che ki mang'une kutusweekwak." 
Revelation9:19 Amu mi kimnateetap paraisisyek kutusweekwak ak katutaikwak, amu kergei katutaikwak ak erenook, ak kotinyei metowek; ak konyalilsye tuguuchooto." 
Revelation9:20 Ak ma sik piik che kiga ng'et, che ki ma ki par eng' korotwechooto eng' poisyonigap eunekwak; ak ma meto kosa oik, ak kanamonigap thahabu, ak che po fedha, ak che po sugunonik, ak che po koik, ak che po keetiik; kanamonik che ma imuuchi kogeerto, anan kogasta anan kobendat." 
Revelation9:21 Ak ma sik eng' rumisyosyekwak, anan eng' panisyosyekwak, anan eng' soksennywa, anan eng' choorsosyekwak." 
Revelation10:1 Ak ki ageer malaikaiyat age ne kiim kochoorugei eng' kipsengwet, kolaachi pooldet; ak ki mi chepkuinobor paragutap metinnyi, ak ki uu togeennyi asiista, ak ki uu keelyekyik tolochigap maat;" 
Revelation10:2 ak ki tinyei eng' eunnyi bukuit ne ming'in ne yaataat: ak ki inde keldanyi ne po tai nyanjet, ak ki inde ne po kaataam emet;" 
Revelation10:3 ak kitwek eng' kutit ne oo, ko uu ye morori ng'etundo. Ak ye kingo kagotwek, kobolyo tuloosyek tisabu." 
Revelation10:4 Ak ye kingo kagobolyo tuloosyek tisabu, amach asir: ak ki agas kutit ne punu kipsengwet kole, “Ng'ooch tuguuk che kamwa tuloosyek tisabu, amesir.”" 
Revelation10:5 Ak ki namji parak eunnyi ne po tai kotokyi kipsengwet malaikaiyat ne ki ageer kotonone nyanjet ak emet," 
Revelation10:6 ak ki iyasyo eng' ineendet ne sabei koigeny ak koigeny, ne ki tau koyaei kipsengwet ak tuguuk che miitei olooto, ak ng'wony ak tuguuk che mi olooto, ak nyanjet ak tuguuk che mi oriit, kole ma komi kagaetapkei:" 
Revelation10:7 ago eng' peetuusyegap kutitap malaikaiyatap tisap, ye tuun machei koguut, kogeskei ung'ootyetap Kamuktaindet ko uu Logoiywek che Myachen che ki mwachi otwogikyik maotik." 
Revelation10:8 Ak tuugeet ne ki agas kobunu kipsengwet ko ki ng'alaalwo kogeny, koleen, “Ui nam bukuit ne yaataat eng' eutap malaikaiyat ne tononi eng' nyanjet ak eng' emet ne yamaat.”" 
Revelation10:9 Awe anyun ole mi malaikaiyat, ak aleenji kogoono bukuinooto ming'in. Ak koleenjo, “Nam ak iam, si kogoochi kong'wanit moeng'ung', ago anyinyitu eng' kuting'ung' ko uu kuumyaat.”" 
Revelation10:10 Ak ki anam bukuit ne ming'in eng' eutap malaikaiyat, ak aam; ak ki anyiny eng' kutinnyu ko uu kuumyaat, ak kingo kaam, kong'wanit moennyu." 
Revelation10:11 Ak komwaiwo, kole, “Kanyool imaoten agobo piik che chaang' ak pororyosyek ak kutusweek ak laitorinik.”" 
Revelation11:1 Ak ki kigoono tegat ne uu kirokto: ak ki leenjo age, Ng'eet, ak ikwa hekaluutap Kamuktaindet, ak kapkorosuut, kobooto icheeget che saaei eng' olooto." 
Revelation11:2 Ago pagakte, amat ikwa seremut ne miitei Hekaluut saang'; amu ki kigoochi Pororyosyek: ak kotyechei eng' keelyekwak nganaseet ne tiliil eng' arawek artam ak aeng'." 
Revelation11:3 Ak agoochini paorinikyuk aeng' komaoten peetuusyek eliphuut agenge pogol aeng' ak tamanwogik lo, kolaachi kuniok." 
Revelation11:4 Chooto ko keetiik aeng' che po mseituni, ak keelyek aeng' che po taisyek, kotonondos eng' taitap Kiptaiyat ne po ng'wony." 
Revelation11:5 Ak ngot komachei chii konyaliil icheek, komang'une maat kutusweekwak, ak kobar puunikwak: ak ngot komachei chii konyaliil icheek, kebarei ko uu niito matiny." 
Revelation11:6 Tinyei chuuto kimnateet koger kipsengwet, si ma robon eng' peetuusyegap maonatennywa: ak kotinyei kimnateet kowal peek koek korotiik, ak kobir ng'wony eng' koroita age tugul, kotugul ko uu ye machei." 
Revelation11:7 Ak ye tuun kagogees paornatennywa, koyai lugeet tyondo ne mang'une keriinget ne ma igoksei, ak koterteer icheek, ak kobar icheek." 
Revelation11:8 Ak tebyei muuswekwak eng' ooreetap nganaseet ne oo, ne kiguure eng' kalewenet Sodom ak Misiri, ole kiga kigartate Kiptaiyannywa agine." 
Revelation11:9 Ak keerei muuswekwak alak eng' piik ak ortinwek ak kutusweek ak pororyosyek eng' peetuusyek somok ak kebebertap peetuut, ama chamdoi ketup muuswekwak eng' kererit." 
Revelation11:10 Ak poiboitu icheek che menyei ng'wony agobo icheeget, ak kogasegei; ak koyookyingei konunoik, amu ki inyalili maotichuuto aeng' icheek che menyei ng'wony." 
Revelation11:11 Ak ye kingo pata peetuusyechooto somogu ak kebeberta kochut icheek kabuusetap saboondo ne punu Kamuktaindet, ak kotononio eng' keelyekwak; ak konam kaiyweisyet ne oo icheek che ki keer." 
Revelation11:12 Ak ki kas kutit ne oo ne punu kipsengwet koleenji icheek, Otogosu oli. Ak kitogosta koba kipsengwet eng' pooldet; ak kogeerot icheek puunikwak." 
Revelation11:13 Ak ki piit eng' sainooto potanet ne oo ne po emet, ak kiluul kebeberta agenge eng' taman ne po nganaseet; ak ki kibar eng' potanonooto piik eliphuusyek tisap; ak ki aragenso che kiga ng'et, ak ki igoochi toroornatet Kamuktaindet ne po kipsengwet." 
Revelation11:14 Kagosiirto Nyalilda ne po aeng': ogeero, nyoonei Nyalilda ne po somok kochogu." 
Revelation11:15 Ak ki kuut malaikaiyatap tisap; ak ki piit tweguunoik che eecheen eng' kipsengwet, ak ki mwa kole, “Kagoek laitornatetap ng'wony laitornatetap Kiptaiyandennyo, ak ne po Kristo; ak laitorani inee koigeny ak koigeny.”" 
Revelation11:16 Ak ki ibutyi ng'wony poisyek tiptemu ak ang'wan, che tebee taitap Kamuktaindet eng' ng'echerokwak che po toroornatet, ak kolas Kamuktaindet," 
Revelation11:17 kole, “Kimwaun kongoi, ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet, Ne po Kamuktaet, ne imi ak ki imi; amu ka inam kamuktaeng'ung' ne oo, ak ibou." 
Revelation11:18 Ki nereekso pororyosyek, ak kagonyo nereeknateng'ung'. Kagoit peetuut ne kirwookyinee piik che ki kobek, ak peetuut ne kigoochinee otwogiguk maotik melekwek, ak piik che tiliileen ak icheek che iywei kaineng'ung', che mengeechen ak che eecheen; ak keng'em icheek che ng'emei ng'wony.”" 
Revelation11:19 Ak ki kiyaat hekaluutap Kamuktaindet eng' kipsengwet; ak ki took eng' hekalunnyi moingetap arorutyennyi; ak ki piit kalyelosyek, ak kutusweek, ak tuloosyek, ak potaneetap ng'wony, ak koik che eecheen che po ropta." 
Revelation12:1 Ak ki took kaboorunet ne oo eng' kipsengwet; kwondo ne ki ilaachi asiista, ak komi arawet keluutap keldebesaikyik, ak ki mi metinnyi kuutweetap kecheik taman ak aeng'." 
Revelation12:2 Ak kitamono: ak kowaachei, kotinyei ng'wanindap sigisyet, ak eng' ng'wanindo komachei kosigiis." 
Revelation12:3 Ak ki took kaboorunet age eng' kipsengwet; ak ogeero, maswetit ne oo ne piriir, ne tinyei metowek tisap ak kuinoik taman, ak ki miitei metowekyik naryosyek tisabu." 
Revelation12:4 Ak ichuuti katutyennyi kebeberta agenge eng' somok ne po kecheigap kipsengwet, ak kowiirchi ng'wony. Ki tonon maswetit eng' taitap kwonyooto ne kimachei kosigiis, kole si ye sigis, koam lakweet." 
Revelation12:5 Ak ki sich lakweet ne weeriit, ne tuun pou pororyosyek tugul eng' koroktap karnet: ak ki kimut lakweennyi kwo ole mi Kamuktaindet, agoi ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet." 
Revelation12:6 Ak ki mwei kwonyooto kwo surkwen, ole kiting'e komosta ne kiga kochopchi Kamuktaindet, si kobiit kobai ineendet eng' olooto peetuusyek eliphuut agenge pogol aeng' ak tamanwogik lo." 
Revelation12:7 Ak ki piit lugeet eng' kipsengwet: ki wo Mikael kobooto malaikaisyekyik kobargei ak maswetit; ak ki yai lugeet maswetinooto ak malaikaisyekyik; 
Revelation12:8 ago ma iterteeris, amata kosich oldanywa kogeny eng' kipsengwet." 
Revelation12:9 Ak ki kiturur maswetinooto oo konyo ng'wony, ereneet ne po keny, ne kiguure Chesawilyet ak keguure Setani, kaberberindetap ng'wony komugul; ki kiturur konyo ng'wony, ak ki kiturur malaikaisyekyik kobooto ineendet." 
Revelation12:10 Ak ki agas kutit ne oo eng' kipsengwet, kole, “Kagonyo nguno yetunet, ak kamuktaet, ak laitornatetap Kamuktaindet nenyo, ak kimnateetap Kristo nenyi; amu kagetururto kataamindetap che kitupche kwo ng'wony, ne itaami icheek eng' taitap Kamuktaindet nenyo peet ak kemoi." 
Revelation12:11 Ak ki iterteer `icheek ineendet amu korotiigap Aarwet, ak amu ng'olyootap paornatennywa; ama cham saboonwekwak agoi meet." 
Revelation12:12 Nooto anyun oboiboitu, okweek kipsengwet, ak okweek che omenye olooto. Pwo agobo ng'wony ak nyanjet, amu kachoorgei chesawilyet konyo ole omi, kotinyei nereeknateet ne oo, amu ingen kole tinyei peetuusyek che ng'ering' kityo.”" 
Revelation12:13 Ak ye kingo keer maswetit kole kageturur konyo ng'wony, kous kwonyi kasichei weeriit." 
Revelation12:14 Ak ki kigoochi kwonyooto kebebaik aeng' che po kipsiichit ne oo, si kobiit kotirirene kwo surkwen agoi oldanyi, ole kibae, eng' peetuusyek, ak peetuusyek alak, ak kebebertap peetuusyek, koistoegei togeetap ereneet." 
Revelation12:15 Ak king'ut ereneet peek eng' kutinnyi che tee aineet, kosube kwonyooto, kole si kobiit koip ineendet ainonooto." 
Revelation12:16 Ak kitoret ng'wony kwonyooto, ak ki yaat kutinnyi ng'wony, ak kolugui aineet ne kang'utu maswetit eng' kutinnyi." 
Revelation12:17 Ak ki nereekyi maswetit kwonyooto, ak kwo kobargei ak kesweekyik che ki ng'et, che riibei ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet, ak kotinyei paornateetap Jeso," 
Revelation12:18 ak kitonone ng'aniegap nyanjet. 
Revelation13:1 Ak ki ageer tyondo kotogosu eng' nyanjet, ne tinyei kuinoik taman ak metowek tisap, ak naryosyek taman eng' kuinoikyik, ak ki mi metowekyik kainaigap chubisyet." 
Revelation13:2 Ak ki uu tyondo ne ki ageer cheplanget, ak ki uu keelyekyik keelyegap magalaluut, ak ki uu kutinnyi kutitap ng'etundo: ak ki igoochi maswetit ineendet kamugennyi, ak ng'echerennyi ne po laitornatet, ak kimnateet ne oo." 
Revelation13:3 Ak ki ageer age eng' metowekyik ko uu ne kagikwer kebar; ak ki kisoop moet ole kiga kikwer, ak ki kwong' ng'wony komugul agobo tyonyooto." 
Revelation13:4 Ki ilas icheek maswetit amu ki igoochi kimnateennyi tyondo, ak ki ilas icheek tyondo, komwa kole, “Ng'oo ne kergei ak tyonyito; ak ng'oo ne imuuchi kobargei ak ineendet?”" 
Revelation13:5 Ak ki kigoochi ineendet kutit kong'alaal tuguuk che eecheen ak chubisyosyek; ak ki kigoochi ineendet kimnateet koboisyee arawek artam ak aeng'. 
Revelation13:6 Ak ki yaat kutinnyi kochup Kamuktaindet, ak kochup kainennyi, ak koonnyi, ak icheek che menyei kipsengwet." 
Revelation13:7 Ak ki kigoochi ineendet kobargei ak piik che tiliileen, ak koterteer icheek; ak ki kigoochi ineendet kimnateet koboi ooreet age tugul ak piik alak tugul, ak kutit age tugul ak pororyet age tugul." 
Revelation13:8 Ak kolas ineendet tugul che menyei ng'wony, che ma ki sirchi kainaikwak bukuitap saboondo ne po Aarwet ne ki kibar kobooch taunetap ng'wony." 
Revelation13:9 Ngo tinyei chii itit, kogas." 
Revelation13:10 Ngo luulis chii, keluulei ineendet: ngo paris chii eng' rotwetap chok, kobare ineendet rotwetap chok matiny. Mi yu muitaet ak kayaneetap piik che tiliileen." 
Revelation13:11 Ak ki ageer tyondo age kotogosu eng' ng'wony; ak ki tinyei kuinoik aeng' che uu che po aarwet, ak ki ng'alaal ko uu maswetit." 
Revelation13:12 Ak koboisyee kimnateet tugul ne po tyondo ne po tai eng' tainnyi. Ak kogoochi ng'wony ak che menyei oloto kolas tyondo ni kabo tai, ne ki kisoop ole kiga kikwer kome." 
Revelation13:13 Ak koyaei ineendet kaboorunoik che eecheen, kot koyaei maat kochoorgei eng' kipsengwet kobutyi ng'wony eng' taitap piik." 
Revelation13:14 Ak ki iberber icheek che menyei ng'wony eng' kaboorunoik che ki kigoochi ineendet koyai eng' taitap tyondo; koleenjin icheek che menyei ng'wony koyachi kanamwet tyondo, ne tinyei perutyetap rotwetap chok, ak kisop tyonyooto." 
Revelation13:15 Ak ki kigoochi ineendet kogoochi kabuuset kanamwetap tyondo, si kobiit kong'alaal kanamwetap tyondo, ak kong'at kebar tugul che ma ilasu kanamwetap tyondo." 
Revelation13:16 Ak ng'atei tugul, che mengeechen ak che eecheen, ak mogoreek ak kibananook, ak che ityagotiin ak che ratotiin, kinde perutyet eng' eunekwak che po tai, anan ko eng' togoochikwak;" 
Revelation13:17 ak kole ma imuuchi chii koalis anan koaldais, kobatee ineendet ne tinyei perutyet, nooto ko kainetap tyondo anan ko koitetap kainennyi." 
Revelation13:18 Mi yu utaatyet. Ineendet ne tinyei kaguiyet, koiit koitetap tyondo; amu nooto koitetap chii: ak koiitennyi ko pogol lo ak tamanwogik lo ak lo." 
Revelation14:1 Ki ageer, ak ogeero, tononi Aarwet eng' tulweetap Zion, ak komi kobooto `ineendet piik eliphuusyek pogol ak artam ak ang'wan, che tinyei kainennyi, ak kainetap Kwandanyi, che ki kisirchi togoochikwak." 
Revelation14:2 Ak ki agas kutit kobun kipsengwet, ne uu cheetap peek che chaang', ak ko uu cheetap tuleet ne oo: ak cheonooto kigagas ko ki uu ne po putiik che putei ketubosyekwak:" 
Revelation14:3 ak kotyeni tyendo ne leel eng' taitap ng'echereetap laitornatet, ak eng' taitap tyong'ik ang'wan che saptos ak poisyek. Ma mi chii ne imuuchi koneetkei tyenooto kobatee pichooto eliphuusyek pogol ak artam ak ang'wan, icheeget che ki kial eng' ng'wony." 
Revelation14:4 Chuuto ko icheeget che ma imurwongei eng' kobogorisyek; amu pergeinik icheeget. Chuuto ko icheeget che isubi Aarwet eng' oldo tugul ole wendi. Ki kial chuuto eng' kwenutap piik, koek tongoanik eng' Kamuktaindet ak eng' Aarwet." 
Revelation14:5 Ama ki nyoorchi kutusweekwak lembeita: ama tinyei tisya. 
Revelation14:6 Ki ageer malaikaiyat age kotirireni eng' kwenutap kipsengwet, kotinyei logoiywek che myach che po koigeny koamji icheek che menyei ng'wony, ak pororyet age tugul ak ooreet age tugul ak kutit age tugul ak piik alak tugul;" 
Revelation14:7 ak komwaei eng' kutit ne oo, kole, “Oiywei Kamuktaindet, ak ogoochi toroornatet; amu kagoit saitap kirwoogennyi; ak olasu ineendet ne ki yai kipsengwet ak ng'wony ak nyanjet ak kondametusyegap peek.”" 
Revelation14:8 Ak koosup malaikaiyat ne po aeng', ne leen, “Kagoluul, kagoluul Babilon ne oo, ne ki igoochi pororyosyek tugul koe divaik che po koroomnatetap soksennyi.”" 
Revelation14:9 Ak koosup icheek malaikaiyat ne po somok, ne mwaei eng' kutit ne oo kole, “Ngot kolas chii age tugul tyondo ak kanamwennyi, ak konyoor perutyet eng' togeennyi, anan eng' eunnyi," 
Revelation14:10 koeei agine divaik che po koroomnatetap Kamuktaindet, che ki kichop ama kiburuch eng' kigombetap nereeknatennyi; ak kinyaliili eng' maat ak koik che laldos eng' taitap malaikaisyek che tiliileen, ak eng' taitap Aarwet:" 
Revelation14:11 ak kotogostoi iyetap ng'wanindanywa koigeny ak koigeny; ama tinyei kamuung'et peet ak kemoi, icheek che ilasu tyondo ak kanamwennyi, ak age tugul ne nyooru perutyetap kainennyi.”" 
Revelation14:12 Mi yu muitaetap piik che tiliileen, icheeget che riibei ng'atuutigap Kamuktaindet, ak kayaneetap Jeso." 
Revelation14:13 Ak ki agas kutit kobunu kipsengwet kole, “Sir ile: Poiboen icheek che pegu eng' Kiptaiyat kobooch nguno.” Mwaei Kabuuset ne Tiliil kole, “Ee, imuunyi icheek eng' poisyonikwak, amu isubi icheek `poisyonikwak.”" 
Revelation14:14 Ki ageer, ak ogeero, pooldet ne leel; ak kitebee poldanooto chiito ne uu weeriitap chii, kotinyei eng' metinnyi naaryeetap thahabu, ak ki mi eunnyi chepkeswet ne ng'atip." 
Revelation14:15 Ak ki mong' malaikaiyat age eng' Hekaluut, komwachin eng' kutit ne oo ineendet ne tebee pooldet, koleenjin, “Iyookte chepkesweng'ung' ak igesisye, amu kagoit saitap kesisyet; amu ki kosiirto kesetap ng'wony.”" 
Revelation14:16 Ak ki wiirchi ng'wony chepkeswennyi ineendet ne ki tebee pooldet; ak ki kiges ng'wony. 
Revelation14:17 Ki mong' malaikaiyat age eng' Hekaluut ne mi kipsengwet, kotinyei agine chepkeswet ne ng'atip." 
Revelation14:18 Ak ki mong' malaikaiyat age eng' kaptisisyet, ineendet ne tinyei kimnateet ne poune maat; ak kiguur ineendet eng' kutit ne oo, ne tinyei chepkeswet ne ng'atip, koleenji, “Iyookte chepkesweng'ung' ne ng'atip, ak iyum sabibugap keetit ne po ng'wony; amu kagoruryo sabibukyik.”" 
Revelation14:19 Ki wiirchi malaikaiyat chepkeswennyi ng'wony, ak kiyum sabibugap ng'wony, ak kowiirchi ole kitue sabibuk, kenut ne oo, ne po nereegegap Kamuktaindet." 
Revelation14:20 Ak ki kityech ole kitue sabibuk eng' nganaseet saang', ak komong' korotiik eng' ole kituisye, kot koit kariigap kutitap paraisisyek, ne itei olo po maelisyek pogol aeng'." 
Revelation15:1 Ak ki ageer kaboorunet age eng' kipsengwet, ne oo ak ko po kwong'eet, malaikaisyek tisap che tinyei korotwek tisap che po let, amu kigeesune chooto nereegegap Kamuktaindet." 
Revelation15:2 Ki aroo kiit ne uu nyanjetap klasit ne purugot ak maat; ak icheeget che ki koterter tyonyooto ak kanamwennyi, ak koitetap kainennyi, kotonondos eng' ye neegitee nyanjetap klasit, che tinyei ketubosyegap Kamuktaindet." 
Revelation15:3 Ak kotyeni icheek tyendap Musa otwogindetap Kamuktaindet, ak tyendap Aarwet, koleen, “Eechen poisyoniguk ak ko po kwong'eet, ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet, Ne po Kamuktaet. Po imanda ak ko po iman ortinweguk, inyee Laitoryatap pororyosyek." 
Revelation15:4 Ng'oo ne ma iywei ak kotoroori kaineng'ung', ee Kiptaiyat? Amu ii tiliil inyegei. Pwoonei pororyosyek tugul ak kogutung'so eng' taing'ung', amu kagong'ang'ak poisyoniguk che po imanda.”" 
Revelation15:5 Ak kingo pata tuguuchu, ageer, ak ki kiyaat Hekaluut ne po emaitap paornateet eng' kipsengwet:" 
Revelation15:6 ak ki mang'une hekalunooto malaikaisyek tisabu che tinyei korotwechooto tisap, kolaachi ngoroik che tiliileen, ak kolile piich, ak koratatagei pirenoigap thahabu eng' tegetikwak." 
Revelation15:7 Ak ki igoochi age eng' tyong'ik ang'wan che saptos malaikaisyek tisap taabook tisap che po thahabu che nyiitootiin nereegegap Kamuktaindet, ineendet ne sabei koigeny ak koigeny." 
Revelation15:8 Ak ki nyi Hekaluut iyeto ne ki punu toroornatetap Kamuktaindet, ak kamuktaennyi; ak ki ma imuuch chii kwo Hekaluut oriit, agoi kogeskei korotwek tisabu che po malaikaisyek tisap." 
Revelation16:1 Ki agas kutit ne oo kobunu Hekaluut, koleenjin malaikaisyechooto tisap, “Oba, oroong'ji emet taabook tisap che po nereegegap Kamuktaindet.”" 
Revelation16:2 Ara ki wo malaikaiyat ne po tai, koroong'ji emet taabeennyi; ak ki ek mook che yaach ak ko ng'woneen eng' piik che tinyei perutyetap tyondo, ak che ki saaei kanamwennyi." 
Revelation16:3 Kiroong'ji malaikaiyat ne po aeng' taabeennyi nyanjet; ak ki ek korotiik ko uu che po chii ne kagome; ak kime age tugul ne sabei, agot tugul che mi nyanjet." 
Revelation16:4 Kiroong'ji malaikaiyat ne po somok taabeennyi ainoosyek ak kondametusyegap peek; ak ki ek korotiik. 
Revelation16:5 Ak ki agas malaikaiyat ne po peek komwa kole, “Ii po imanda, Inyee ne Tiliil, inyee ne imi ak ko ki imi, amu ki irwooch ko uu nooto." 
Revelation16:6 Amu kitumda korotiigap piik che tiliileen ak che po maotik, ak kaigoochi icheek korotiik koe; amu nyoljin icheek ko uu nooto.”" 
Revelation16:7 Ak ki agas kaptisisyet komwa kole, “Uu nooto, ee, Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet, Ne po Kamuktaet, po iman ak ko po imanda kirwoogutiguk.”" 
Revelation16:8 Ak ki roong'ji malaikaiyat ne po ang'wan taabeennyi asiista; ak ki kigoochi kobeel piik eng' maat. 
Revelation16:9 Ki kibeel piik eng' peelet ne oo; ak ki chup kainetap Kamuktaindet ne tinyei kimnateet koboi korotwechuuto; ak ma sik si kobiit kogoochi toroornatet. 
Revelation16:10 Kiroong'ji malaikaiyat ne po muut taabeennyi ng'echereetap tyondo; ak koimenit laitornatennyi; ak kinyei ng'elyebwekwak amu ng'wanindo," 
Revelation16:11 ak ki chup Kamuktaindet ne po kipsengwet amu ng'waninwekwak ak mookwak; ama sik eng' poisyonikwak. 
Revelation16:12 Ak kiroong'ji malaikaiyat ne po lo taabeennyi aineet ne oo, nooto ko Yufrets; ak ki teenyo peekyik, si kobiit kochobok ooreetap laitorinik che punu kong'asiis." 
Revelation16:13 Ak ki ageer tamirmirik che yaach somok che uu mororochik, komang'une kutitap maswetit, ak eng' kutitap tyondo, ak eng' kutitap maotyot ne po lembech:" 
Revelation16:14 amu chooto ko tamirmirigap oik, che yaei kaboorunoik; che pendi kaplaitorinigap ng'wony komugul, si koyum icheek koba lugeet eng' peetuut ne oo ne po Kamuktaindet, Ne po Kamuktaet." 
Revelation16:15 “Ogeero, anyoone ko uu choriin. Paibai ineendet ne riipsei, ak koriibei ngoroikyik, si mawendot aach ngor, ak kegeer kalilanennyi.”" 
Revelation16:16 Ak koyum icheek eng' ole kiguure Har-Magedon eng' kutitap Yahudik. 
Revelation16:17 Ak kiroong'ji malaikaiyat ne po tisap taabeennyi soet; ak ki mong' kutit ne oo eng' Hekaluut, kobun ng'echereetap laitornatet, kole, “Kagosulda!”" 
Revelation16:18 Ak ki piit ilotik, ak kutusweek, ak tuloosyek; ak ki piit potanet ne oo ne po ng'wony, ne ki tomo kobiitu kobooch ngo piit piik eng' ng'wony, potanet ne oo, ne kiim kot." 
Revelation16:19 Ak kipcheak nganaseet ne oo koek kebeberwek somok, ak kilulyo nganasoogap pororyosyek: ak ki kibwaat Babilon ne oo eng' taitap Kamuktaindet, si kobiit kigoochi ineendet kigombet ne po divaigap koroomnatetap nereegekyik." 
Revelation16:20 Ak ki mwei emet age tugul ne ki ikween peek, amata kegeer tuloonook." 
Revelation16:21 Ak kororokyi piik koik che eecheen che po ropta che rorogu eng' kipsengwet, che tee nyigiisindanywa talendait: ak ki chup `piik Kamuktaindet amu koroitap koichooto po ropta; amu oo miising' koroitanyi." 
Revelation17:1 Ki nyo age eng' malaikaisyechooto tisap che ki tinyei taabook tisap, ak konyo kong'alaalwo, kole, “Nyoo yu, si aboorun kirwoogetap chepkugoniot ne oo ne tebee peek che chaang';" 
Revelation17:2 ne ki yai sokseet laitorinigap ng'wony ak ineendet, ak kibogityo icheek che menyei ng'wony, eng' divaigap soksennyi.”" 
Revelation17:3 Ara ki imuta eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil agoi surkwen: ak ki ageer kobogoryot kotebee tyondo ne piriir, ne nyiitaat kainaigap chubisyet, ne tinyei metowek tisap ak kuinoik taman." 
Revelation17:4 Ak ki ilaachi kobogoryot ngoroik che arusen ne piriir ak che piriireen, ak ki kilelesanjine thahabu ak koik che po kamanuutyet ne oo miising' ak sonoek che korooron, ak kotinyei eng' eunnyi kigombet ne po thahabu ne nyiitaat tuguuk che kiwechei, tuguugap simdo che po soksennyi," 
Revelation17:5 ak ki kisirchi togeennyi kainet keele, “Ung'ootyet, Babilon ne oo, kametap chepkugonik ak ne po tuguuk che kiwechei che po ng'wony.”" 
Revelation17:6 Ak ki ageer kwonyooto ko kagobogit eng' korotiigap piik che tiliileen, ak eng' korotiigap paorinigap Jeso. Ye kinga keer ineendet, akwong' eng' kwong'eet ne oo." 
Revelation17:7 Ak ki leenjo malaikaiyat, “Kekwong' amu nee? Amache amwaun ung'ootyetap kwonyito ak ne po tyondo ne keseni ineendet, ne tinyei metowek tisap ak kuinoik taman." 
Revelation17:8 Tyonyi kegeere komi, ama komi; ak ko neegit komong' eng' keriinget ne ma igoksei, ak kwo luseet. Ak kwong'dos icheek che menyei ng'wony, che ki ma kisirchi kainaikwak bukuitap saboondo kobooch ngap kelumda ng'wony, ye keer tyondo, amu ki mi, ama komi, ak kota konyonei." 
Revelation17:9 “Mi yu kaguiyet ne po utaatyet. Metowechooto tisap ko tuloonook tisap, che tebee kwonyooto," 
Revelation17:10 ak chooto ko laitorinik tisap; kogobutyo muutu, miitei agenge, tomo konyo age; ak ye nyo, konyaaljin kotep ne matya." 
Revelation17:11 Ak tyonyooto ki mi, ama komi, ineendet ko ne po sisiit, ak ta ko agenge eng' chuun tisap; ak kowendi luseet." 
Revelation17:12 “Ak kuinoichooto taman che kegeer ko laitorinik taman che tomo konam laitornatet; ak konyooru kimnateet ko uu laitorinik, kobooto tyondo, eng' poroindap sait agenge." 
Revelation17:13 Tinyei chuuto kabwaatet agenge, ak kogoochin icheek kamugennywa tyondo ak kimnateennywa." 
Revelation17:14 Paregei chuuto ak Aarwet ak koterteer Aarwet icheek, amu ineendet ko Kiptaiyatap kiptainik, ak ko Laitoryatap laitorinik; ak icheeget che mi kobooto ineendet, che ki kiguur ak che ki kilewen ak che kiyani.”" 
Revelation17:15 Ak ki leenjo, “Peechu kegeere, che katebee chepkugoniot, ko piik, tuiyosyek, pororyosyek ak kutusweek." 
Revelation17:16 Ak kuinoichu kegeere taman, ak tyondo, ko tuun wechei chepkugoniot ak kometo kotebi ineegei, komi aach ngor, ak koam panyeekyik, ak kobeel ineendet eng' maat kogeskei." 
Revelation17:17 Amu ki inde Kamuktaindet mugulelwekwak koyai ko uu ye ibwaati, ak kosich tugul kabwaatet agenge, ak kogoochi tyondo laitornatennywa, agoi kosulda ng'aleegap Kamuktaindet." 
Revelation17:18 “Ak kwonyi kegeere ko nganaseet ne oo, ne pou laitorinigap ng'wony.”" 
Revelation18:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu, ageer malaikaiyat age kochoorugei eng' kipsengwet, ne tinyei kimnateet ne oo; ak kooluu ng'wony eng' liilindanyi." 
Revelation18:2 Ak kiwaach eng' kutit ne kiim kole, “Kagoluul, kagoluul Babilon ne oo, ak kagoek ole menyei oik, ak irimeetap tamirmiryet age tugul ne murwoon, ak irimeetap toriit age tugul ne murwoon ak ne kiwechei." 
Revelation18:3 Kagobutyo pororyosyek tugul amu divaigap koroomnatetap soksennyi. Ak kisokso laitorinigap ng'wony ak ineendet, ak ki ek mogoreek chemung'arainigap ng'wony eng' kimnateetap kaseretap tuguukyik.”" 
Revelation18:4 Ak ki agas kutit age kobunu kipsengwet, kole, “Omang'une ineendet, okweek piikyuk, si moyamde tengekwogikyik, si monyooru korotwekyik." 
Revelation18:5 Amu ki koit tengekwogikyik kipsengwet, ak kagobwaat Kamuktaindet tengekwogikyik." 
Revelation18:6 Oweekyi ineendet ko uu ye ki koyai, ak oyaakyi ineendet konyil aeng' ko uu poisyonikyik; kigombet ne kiburuge, oburukyi ineendet konyil aeng'." 
Revelation18:7 Ko uu ye ki iloskei ak koser tuguukyik, ogoochi ineendet ng'wanindo ak arageneet ko uu nooto. Amu mwaei ineendet eng' muguleldanyi kole, ‘Atebye ko aa laitoryat ne kwondo, ma aa mosok ak ma koi ageer riirek.’" 
Revelation18:8 Nooto anyun itu korotwekyik eng' peetuunak, meet, riirek, ak rubeet; ak kebeel ineendet eng' maat kogeskei; amu kiim Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet ne ki irwookyi ineendet.”" 
Revelation18:9 Ak riirtos ak koteeitos agobo ineendet laitorinigap ng'wony, che kisokso ak kotebyei kobooto ineendet eng' kaseretap tuguuk, ye keer iyetap lalennyi," 
Revelation18:10 kotonondos eng' ole loo amu kayweetap ng'wanindanyi, koleen, “Pwo! Pwo! Wee nganaseet ne oo, Babilon, nganaseet ne kiim! Amu kait kirwoogeng'ung' eng' sait agenge.”" 
Revelation18:11 Ak koriirtos chemung'arainigap ng'wony ak koteeitos agobo ineendet, amu ma koalei chii kogeny tuguukwak che aldoi;" 
Revelation18:12 tuguugap thahabu, ak fedha, ak koik che pichiien eng' alet, ak sonoek che korooron, ak katanisyek che korooron, ak ngoroik che arusen ne piriir, ak aririsyek, ak ngoroik che piriireen; ak keetit age tugul ne nyamdut, ak kiit age tugul ne po kelegap peeleek, ak kiit age tugul ne ki kiyae keetit ne po kamanuutyet ne oo, ak che po sugunonik, ak kariik, ak koik che leelachen;" 
Revelation18:13 ak kinamon, ak nyamdutik, ak nyamdutik che kibeelei, ak mwanik che ki ilegei, ak tuguuk che nyamdut, ak divaik, ak mwanik, ak peek che ng'ootiin che tambulul, ak nganuuk, ak tuuga, ak keechiirek; ak paraisisyek ak chepkichutisyek ak mutwoorik; ak saboonwegap piik." 
Revelation18:14 Ak ki kobetenen logoek che kigase myat saboondang'ung' ak ki kobetenen tuguuk tugul che anyiny ak che myachen, ama kenyooru kogeny agoi." 
Revelation18:15 Tonondos eng' ole loo chemung'arainigap tuguuchuuto, che ki ek mogoreek eng' ineendet, amu kayweetap ng'wanindanyi, ak koriirtos ak koteeitos;" 
Revelation18:16 koleen, “Pwo! Pwo! Wee nganaseet ne oo, ne ki ilaachi katanisyek che korooron, ak ngoroik che arusen ne piriir ak che piriireen, ne ki kilelesanjine thahabu ak koik che po kamanuutyet ne oo ak sonoek che korooron!" 
Revelation18:17 Amu kabetyo eng' sait agenge mogornatosyek che eecheen che uu chooto.” Ak kitonondos eng' ole loo kiptaiyat age tugul ne po moinget, ak age tugul ne punei moinget kowendi oldo tugul, ak piik che poisyei eng' melisyek, ak tugul che nyooru porotennywa eng' nyanjet," 
Revelation18:18 ak koriiryo ye kingo keer iyetap lalennyi, kole, “Mi nee ne kergei ak nganasani oo?”" 
Revelation18:19 Ak kolakyin temburyek metowekwak, ak kowaachei, koriirtos ak koteeitos, koleen, “Pwo! Pwo! Wee nganasani oo, ole ki egune mogore piik tugul che ki tinyei melisyekwak eng' nyanjet amu ooindap kamanuutyennyi! Amu kait ng'emisyennyi eng' sait agenge." 
Revelation18:20 “Paibaitu eng' ineendet inyee kipsengwet, ak okweek che oo tiliileen, ak okweek che kiyooktoi, ak okweek maotik; amu kagorwookyi `Kamuktaindet ineendet amu okweek.”" 
Revelation18:21 Ak kisut malaikaiyat ne kiim koita ne uu koitap pai ne oo, ak kowiirchi nyanjet, kole, “Ki wiirtoi Babilon nganaseet ne oo, kobut ko uu nooto eng' kabutet ne oo, ama kenyooru kogeny agoi." 
Revelation18:22 Ama kegasei kogeny eng' inyee putigap ketubosyek ak che tyendos ak putigap ndurerusyek ak che kuutei iryagook; ama kenyooru musogindet ne po musoknateet age tugul eng' inyee kogeny agoi; ama kegasei cheetap koitap pai eng' inyee kogeny agoi; 
Revelation18:23 ama kokweng'sei lapkeiyetap tait eng' inyee kogeny agoi; ama kegasei kutitap sandet ak murereet eng' inyee kogeny agoi; amu ki piik che eecheen che po ng'wony chemung'arainiguk; amu ki kiberber pororyosyek tugul eng' panisyeng'ung'.” 
Revelation18:24 Ak ki kinyoorchi ineendet korotiigap maotik ak che po piik che tiliileen, ak che po tugul che ki kibar eng' ng'wony." 
Revelation19:1 Kingo pata tuguuchu, agas kiit ne uu kutit ne oo ne po tuiyet ne oo eng' kipsengwet, kole, “Haleluya! Po Kamuktaindet nenyo yetunet, toroornatet, ak kamuktaet;" 
Revelation19:2 amu po iman ak ko po imanda kirwoogutikyik; amu kagorwookyi chepkugoniot ne oo, ne ki imurwon ng'wony eng' soksennyi, ak kagoyaakta mugetuut ne po korotiigap otwogikyik eng' eutap kwonyooto.”" 
Revelation19:3 Ak ki mwa kogeny ne po aeng' kole, “Haleluya! Togostoi iyetanyi koigeny ak koigeny.”" 
Revelation19:4 Ak ki ibutyi ng'wony poisyek tiptemu ak ang'wan che saptos ak kolas Kamuktaindet ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet, komwaei koleen, “Amen! Haleluya!”" 
Revelation19:5 Ak ki mong' kutit eng' ng'echereetap laitornatet, kole, “Olasu Kamuktaindet nenyo, okweek tugul otwogikyik che oiywei ineendet, che mengeechen ak che eecheen.”" 
Revelation19:6 Ak ki agas kiit ne uu kutitap tuiyet ne oo, ak ko uu cheetap peek che chaang', ak ko uu cheetap tuloosyek che kiimeen, kole, “Haleluya! Amu laitorani Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindennyo Ne po Kamuktaet." 
Revelation19:7 Ongeboiboitu ak kigaske miising', ak kigoochi toroornatet ineendet. Amu kagoit katunisyetap Aarwet, ak kagochopkei osotyonnyi." 
Revelation19:8 Ki kigoochi ineendet kolaachkei eng' katanit ne karaaran, ne leel kot ak ko tiliil.” Amu katanit ne karaaran ko poisyonigap imanda che po piik che tiliileen." 
Revelation19:9 Ak koleenjo, “Sir ile: Poiboen icheek che keguurchin igoortap katunisyetap Aarwet.” Ak ki leenjo, “Chu ko ng'aleegap iman che po Kamuktaindet.”" 
Revelation19:10 Ak ki abutyi keelyekyik alasu ineendet. Ak koleenjo, “Ameyai ko uu nooto! Ki otwogik tuwai kobooto tupchosyeguk che tinyei paornateet ne po Jeso. Ilasu Kamuktaindet: amu paornateetap Jeso ko Kabuusetap maonateet.”" 
Revelation19:11 Ak ki ageer koyaatak kipsengwet, ak ogeero, paraisiit ne leel, ak ineendet ne kitebee, ko ki kiguuree Ne Kiyani ak ko Iman; ak korwoochi ak koyaei lugeet eng' imanda." 
Revelation19:12 Ak ki uu konyekyik liplibenetap maat, ak ki mi metinnyi naryosyek che chaang'; ak kotinyei kainet ne ki kisir, ne ma mi chii ne ingen kobatee ineendet ineegei." 
Revelation19:13 Ak ki ilaachi ngoryeet ne ki kiroong'ji korotiik: ak kiguure kainennyi “Ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet.” 
Revelation19:14 Ak ki isubi ineendet lugoosyek che mi kipsengwet che ketei paraisisyek che leelach, kolaachi katanisyek che korooron che leelach kot ak ko tiliileen." 
Revelation19:15 Ak ki mang'une kutinnyi rotwetap chok ne ng'atip, si kobiit kobire pororyosyek: ak koboi icheek eng' kirokto ne po karnet: ak kotyech sabibuk eng' ole kituisye che po koroomnateet ne po nereegegap Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet." 
Revelation19:16 Ak kotinyei eng' ngoryennyi ak eng' kubestanyi kainet ne ki kisir kole, “Laitoryat ne po Laitorinik ak Kiptaiyat ne po Kiptainik.”" 
Revelation19:17 Ak ki ageer malaikaiyat kotononi eng' asiista; ak kiwaach eng' kutit ne oo, koleenji toriitik tugul che tirirendos eng' kwenutap kipsengwet, “Obwa otuiyechi igoorto ne oo ne po Kamuktaindet," 
Revelation19:18 si kobiit oam poorwegap laitorinik, ak poorwegap kiptainigap lugeet, ak poorwegap piik che kiimeen, ak poorwegap paraisisyek ak che po che laanyei icheek, ak poorwegap piik tugul, che ityagotiin ak che ratotiin, ak che mengeechen ak che eecheen.”" 
Revelation19:19 Ki ageer tyondo ak laitorinigap ng'wony kobooto lugosyekwak, ko kaiyomogei koyai lugeet ak ineendet ne kiga tebee paraisiit, ak lugeennyi." 
Revelation19:20 Ak ki kinam tyondo, kobooto maotyondonooto ki po lembech ne kiyaei kaboorunoik eng' tainnyi, ne ki iberberi che kiga kinde perutyetap tyondo, ak icheek che ki ilasu kanamwennyi. Ki kiwiirchi chooto tuwai kosaptos araraita ne po maat ne lalei eng' koik che laldos." 
Revelation19:21 Ak ki kibar icheek che ki ng'et eng' rotwetap chok ne ki mang'une kutitap ineendet ne kitebee paraisiit, ak kibiyong'so toriitik tugul eng' poorwekwak." 
Revelation20:1 Ak ki ageer malaikaiyat kochoorugei eng' kipsengwet, kotinyei yaateiwotap keriinget ne ma igoksei ak sirimdo ne oo eng' eunnyi." 
Revelation20:2 Ak konam maswetit, ereneet ne ki po keny, ne ineendet ko Chesawilyet ak ko Setani, ak korat ineendet kenyiisyek eliphuut agenge," 
Revelation20:3 ak kowiirchi ineendet keriinget ne ma igoksei, ak koger, ak kong'ooch paragunnyi, si mata koberber pororyosyek kogeny, agoi kogeskei kenyiisyek eliphuut agenge. Ye ibata nooto kityaach ne matya." 
Revelation20:4 Ak ki ageer ng'echerogap laitornatet, ak kitebee icheek, ak ki kigoochi icheek korwooch. Ak ki ageer saboonwegap icheek che ki kitil metowek amu paornateetap Jeso, ak agobo ng'olyootap Kamuktaindet, ak icheek che ki ma kolasu tyondo, anan kanamwennyi, ak che ki ma nyoor perutyet eng' togoochikwak anan eng' eunekwak; ak kisopcho ak kolaitoran kobooto Kristo kenyiisyek eliphuut." 
Revelation20:5 Ma sapcho che kiga kobek agoi kogeskei kenyiisyek eliphuut agenge. Niito ko ng'eetyeet ne po tai. 
Revelation20:6 Paibai ak ko tiliil ne tinyei yamdaet eng' ng'eetyeet ne po tai. Mabou icheek meet ne po aeng'; ago egu icheek tisiigap Kamuktaindet ak ko po Kristo, ak kolaitoran ak ineendet kenyiisyek eliphuut agenge." 
Revelation20:7 Ye igeskei kenyiisyek eliphuut agenge, kityaach Setani komong' eng' korgorennyi," 
Revelation20:8 ak komong' koberber pororyosyek che miitei luukwek ang'wan che po ng'wony, Gog ak Magog, koyumji icheek lugeet; che tee koiitennywa ng'aniegap nyanjet." 
Revelation20:9 Ak kotogosta koyom ng'wony ak koyiem ye mi che tiliileen, ak nganaseet ne chamat; ak ki choorgei maat eng' kipsengwet, ak kobeel icheek." 
Revelation20:10 Ak ki kiwiirchi chesawilyet ne ki iberber icheek araraitap maat ak koik che laldos, ole miitei ak icheek tyondo ak maotyot ne po lembech; ak kinyaliili peet ak kemoi agoi koigeny ak koigeny." 
Revelation20:11 Ki ageer ng'echereet ne oo ak ko leel ne po laitornatet, ak ineendet ne kitebee, ne kimwee togeennyi ng'wony ak kipsengwet; ama ki sikyi ole tebee." 
Revelation20:12 Ak ki ageer che ki kobek, che eecheen ak che mengeechen, kotonondos eng' taitap ng'echereetap laitornatet; ak ki kiyaat bukuisyek. Ki kiyat kora bukuit age, nooto ko bukuitap saboondo. Ak ki kirwookyi che ki kobek eng' tuguuk che kiga kisirchi bukuisyechooto, ko uu poisyonikwak." 
Revelation20:13 Ak kigon nyanjet che ki kobek che ki mi oriitinnyi; ak kigon meet ak ye mi che ki kobek, icheek che ki kobek che ki mi oriitinnywa, ak ki kirwookyi chii age tugul ko uu poisyonikyik." 
Revelation20:14 Ak ki kiwiirchi meet ak ye mi che ki kobek, araraitap maat. Niito ko meet ne po aeng', araraitap maat." 
Revelation20:15 Ak ngot kenyoor chii age tugul ne ki ma kisirchi bukuitap saboondo, kewiirchin araraitap maat." 
Revelation21:1 Ak ki ageer kipsengwet ne leel ak ng'wony ne leel; amu ki kosiirto kipsengwet ne po tai ak ng'wonyut ne po tai; ama komi nyanjet kogeny. 
Revelation21:2 Ki ageer nganaseet ne tiliil, Jerusalem ne leel, kochoorugei eng' kipsengwet kobunu Kamuktaindet, ko kagechop ko uu murereet ne kagelelesonjinechi manong'otyondennyi." 
Revelation21:3 Ak ki agas kutit ne oo komang'une ng'echereetap laitornatet kole, “Ogeero, mi emaitap Kamuktaindet ak piik, ak kotebyei kobooto icheek, ak koek icheek piikyik, ak kotebyei Kamuktaindet ineendet ak icheek, ak koek Kamuktaindet nenywa;" 
Revelation21:4 ak kous ineendet peegap kong' alak tugul eng' konyekwak. Amaa komi meet kogeny; ama komi kateiyet kogeny, anan riirek, anan ng'wanindo; kogosiirto tuguuk che po tai.”" 
Revelation21:5 Ak ki mwa ineendet ne tebee ng'echereetap laitornatet kole, “Ogeero, ayae tuguuk tugul koleelagitu.” Ak ki le, “Sir, amu ng'aleechu ko che kiyani ak ko po iman.”" 
Revelation21:6 Ak koleenjo, “Kagosulda! Aa Alpha ak ko aa Omega, taunet ak kagesunet. Agoochini puch ineendet ne amei melelda che po kondametutap peegap saboondo." 
Revelation21:7 Ineendet ne iterteeri konamei tuguuchu; ak aegu Kamuktaindet nenyi, ak koek ineendet weeriinnyu." 
Revelation21:8 Ago che iyweisyei, ak che ma iyani, ak che kiwechei, ak rumiik, ak che soksei, ak pooniik, ak che saaei kanamonik, ak kiplembechonik tugul, kotinyei kebebertanywa eng' araraita ne lale maat ak koik che laldos; ne nooto ko meet ne po aeng'.”" 
Revelation21:9 Ak ki nyo age eng' malaikaisyechooto tisap che ki tinyei taabook tisap, che kinyiitotin korotwek tisabu che po let; ak kong'alaalwo kole, “Nyoo yu, si aboorun murereet, osotyotap Aarwet.”" 
Revelation21:10 Ak ki imuta eng' Kabuuset ne Tiliil agoi tulweet ne oo ak ko kooi, ak ki iboorwo nganaseet ne tiliil Jerusalem, kochoorugei eng' kipsengwet kobunu Kamuktaindet," 
Revelation21:11 kotinyei liilindap Kamuktaindet: ne kergei lapkeiyennyi ak koita ne po kamanuutyet ne oo, ko uu koita ne po jasipi, ne tiliil ko uu krustalo." 
Revelation21:12 Ki tinyei irimeet ne oo ak ko kooi; ak kotinyei kurgotik taman ak aeng', ak mi ormariichochooto malaikaisyek tamanu ak aeng'; ak ki kisirchi kainaik, chooto po ortinwek taman ak aeng' che po piigap Israel." 
Revelation21:13 Ki mi komostap kong'asiis kurgotik somogu, ak ki mi komostap murot kaataam kurgotik somogu, ak ki mi komostap murot tai kurgotik somogu, ak ki mi komostap cherongo kurgotik somogu." 
Revelation21:14 Ak ki tinyei irimeetap nganaseet lumeiywek taman ak aeng', ak ki mi kainaik tamanu ak aeng' che po che kiyooktoi taman ak aeng' che po Aarwet." 
Revelation21:15 Ki tinyei ineendet ne ki ng'alaalwo tegat ne po thahabu si kokwae nganaseet, ak kurgotikyik, ak irimennyi." 
Revelation21:16 Ak ki aechin irimosyek tugul ang'wanu che po nganaseet, ak ki aechin koindonyi ak tebeesindo: ak ki ikwae nganaseet tegandanooto, koek maelisyek eliphuut agenge ak pogol muut: koindonyi ak tebeesindanyi ak koindonyi ne wendi parak koaechin." 
Revelation21:17 Ki ikwa irimennyi, ak ki ek kakwautigap euut pogol ak artam ak ang'wan, eng' kakwaetap chiito, nooto ko ne po malaikaiyat." 
Revelation21:18 Ak ki kiteege jasipi irimennyi: ak ki thahabu che tiliileen nganaseet, ko uu klasit ne tiliil." 
Revelation21:19 Ak ki kilelesonji lumeiywegap irimeet ne po nganaseet eng' koik alak tugul che po kamanuutyet ne oo. Lumeiywot ne po tai ko ki jasipi; ne po aeng' ko sapphire; ne po somok ko kalkedo; ne po ang'wan ko sumaragdo; 
Revelation21:20 ne po muut ko sardonukso; ne po lo ko sardio; ne po tisap ko krusolito; ne po sisiit ko berulo; ne po sogool ko topasio; ne po taman ko krusopraso; ne po taman ak agenge ko huakinto; ne po taman ak aeng' ko ametusto. 
Revelation21:21 Ak kurgotik taman ak aeng' ko ki sonoek taman ak aeng' che korooron; age tugul eng' kurgotik ko ki po sonoiyat agenge, ak ki thahabu che tiliileen ooreetap nganaseet, ko uu klasit ne sengelel." 
Revelation21:22 Ama ageer hekaluut eng' nganaseet; amu Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet Ne po Kamuktaet ak Aarwet ko hekalunnyi. 
Revelation21:23 Ak ma machei nganaseet asiista, anan arawet, koluuchi: amu iluuchin liilindap Kamuktaindet, ak tainnyi ko Aarwet." 
Revelation21:24 Ak kobendoti pororyosyek eng' lapkeiyennyi, ak koibu laitorinigap ng'wony toroornatennywa konyo oriit." 
Revelation21:25 Amagoi kiger kurgotikyik peet amu ma mi kemout olooto. 
Revelation21:26 Ak ibu icheek toroornatet ak teegistap pororyosyek kobwa oriit. 
Revelation21:27 Ak ma koi wo oriit kiy age tugul ne murwoon, anan ko ne yaei kiy ne kiwechei, ak lembeita, kobatee icheek che ki kisirchi bukuitap saboondo ne po Aarwet." 
Revelation22:1 Ak ki iboorwo aineetap peegap saboon, ne tiliil ko uu krustalo, kobunu ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Kamuktaindet ak ne po Aarwet," 
Revelation22:2 eng' kwenutap oriitinnyi. Ak ki mi keetitap saboon ainonooto, komosi ak komosi, ne yiei logoek taman ak aeng' che teerchiin, ak koyiei logoekyik eng' arawet age tugul: ak kisoobi pororyosyek eng' sogegap keetoto." 
Revelation22:3 Ama komi chubisyet kogeny: ak tuun mi oriitinnyi ng'echereetap laitornatet ne po Kamuktaindet ak ne po Aarwet: ak yachin poisyet ineendet otwogikyik; 
Revelation22:4 ak keerei togeennyi; ak mi kainennyi togoochikwak. 
Revelation22:5 Ama komi kemout kogeny; ama machei lapkeiyetap tait, anan ko lapkeiyetap asiista; amu igoochin icheek lapkeiyet Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet, ak laitorani icheek koigeny ak koigeny." 
Revelation22:6 Ak ki leenjo, “Ng'aleechu ko che kiyani ak ko po iman: ak ki iyook Kiptaiyat, ineendet ne Kamuktaindet ne po kabuusetap maotik, malaikaiyandennyi koboorchi otwogikyik tuguuk che sip kobiitu matiny.”" 
Revelation22:7 “Ogeero, anyoone achogu. Paibai ne riibei ng'aleegap maonateetap bukuini.”" 
Revelation22:8 Anee Johana ne ki agas tuguuchu ak ageer. Ak ye kinga kas ak ageer, abutyi ng'wony alasu eng' keelyegap malaikaiyat ne ki iboorwo tuguuchuuto." 
Revelation22:9 Ak koleenjo, “Amat iyai ko uu nooto; amu ki otwogik kobooto tupchosyeguk maotik, ak kobooto icheek che riibei ng'aleegap bukuini. Ilasu Kamuktaindet!”" 
Revelation22:10 Ak ki leenjo, “Amat ing'ooch ng'aleek che po maonateetap bukuini; amu kagoriik peetuusyek.”" 
Revelation22:11 Ineendet ne ma po imanda, koyai che ma po imanda kosiir: ak ineendet ne po simdo, ingoek ne po simdo kosiir: ak ineendet ne po imanda, koyai che po imanda kosiir: ak ineendet ne tiliil, ingotiliilit kosiir." 
Revelation22:12 “Ogeero, anyoone achogu; ak aibu melektanyu si agoochi chii age tugul ko uu poisyonikyik." 
Revelation22:13 Aa Alpha ak ko aa Omega, ne po tai ak ne po let, taunet, ak kagesunet.”" 
Revelation22:14 Poiboen icheek che mwetei ngoroikwak, si kobiit komuuch kosich chamjinet koit ole mi keetitap saboondo ak kobun kurgotik kobendi nganaseet oriit." 
Revelation22:15 Mi saang' sesenik, ak pooniik, ak che soksei, ak rumiik, ak che saaei kanamonik, ak age tugul ne chamei lembeita ak koyaei." 
Revelation22:16 “Anee Jeso ne kaayogu malaikaiyandennyu si kobaoryanwok tuguuchu eng' kanisosyek. Aa tigityot ak keswootap Daudi, taboiyat ne po karon ne ikwenyi.”" 
Revelation22:17 Mwaei Kabuuset ne Tiliil ak murereet kole, “Nyoo!” Ak ineendet ne kasei, komwa kole, “Nyoo!” Ak ineendet ne amei melelda, konyo; ak ineendet ne machei, koip peegap saboon puch." 
Revelation22:18 Abaoryanjini chii age tugul ne kasei ng'aleek che po maonateetap bukuini, ale: Ngo tesyi chii age tugul ng'aleechu ng'aleek alak, kotesyin Kamuktaindet korotwek che ki kisirchi bukuini." 
Revelation22:19 Ak ngo nem chii age tugul ng'aleek eng' bukuitap maonatoni, konemu Kamuktaindet kebebertanyi eng' keetitap saboondo, ak eng' nganaseet ne tiliil, che ki kisirchi bukuini." 
Revelation22:20 Mwaei ineendet ne paoryanjin tuguuchu kole, “Ee anyoone achogu.” Amen. Nyoo, Kiptaiyat Jeso!"
